// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/app/Game.ts =====
import { Color3, Scene, Vector3 } from "@babylonjs/core";
import initRecast from "recast-detour";
import { AssetPipeline } from "../assets/AssetPipeline";
import type { HumanoidAnimationName } from "../assets/AssetManifest";
import { TacticalCamera } from "../camera/TacticalCamera";
import { AttackCommand } from "../commands/AttackCommand";
import { InteractionCommand } from "../commands/InteractionCommand";
import { ReloadCommand } from "../commands/ReloadCommand";
import { StabilizeCommand } from "../commands/StabilizeCommand";
import { EngineFactory } from "../engine/EngineFactory";
import { EventBus } from "../engine/EventBus";
import { RandomService } from "../engine/RandomService";
import { TimeManager } from "../engine/TimeManager";
import { Agent, type AgentDefinition } from "../entities/Agent";
import { Enemy } from "../entities/Enemy";
import { PragueMissionDirector } from "../mission/PragueMissionDirector";
import { SaveGameManager } from "../save/SaveGameManager";
import { SettingsManager } from "../settings/SettingsManager";
import { CombatSystem } from "../systems/CombatSystem";
import { AbilitySystem } from "../systems/AbilitySystem";
import { AudioSystem } from "../systems/AudioSystem";
import { DeveloperTools } from "../systems/DeveloperTools";
import { LLMLogger } from "../systems/LLMLogger";
import { TacticalPreviewSystem } from "../systems/TacticalPreviewSystem";
import { CommandSystem } from "../systems/CommandSystem";
import { CoverSystem } from "../systems/CoverSystem";
import { DialogueSystem } from "../systems/DialogueSystem";
import { EchoObserverSystem } from "../systems/EchoObserverSystem";
import { EnemyAISystem } from "../systems/EnemyAISystem";
import { GameInput } from "../systems/GameInput";
import { InvestigationSystem } from "../systems/InvestigationSystem";
import { NavigationSystem } from "../systems/NavigationSystem";
import { SelectionSystem } from "../systems/SelectionSystem";
import { VisionSystem } from "../systems/VisionSystem";
import { StoryState } from "../story/StoryState";
import { CampaignManager } from "../campaign/CampaignManager";
import { CampaignController } from "../campaign/CampaignController";
import { DoorSystem } from "../systems/DoorSystem";
import { GadgetSystem } from "../systems/GadgetSystem";
import { HudController } from "../ui/HudController";
import { MinimapController } from "../ui/MinimapController";
import { pragueDialogue } from "../data/dialogue/pragueDialogue";
import { createHospitalPrototype } from "../world/HospitalPrototype";
import { installMegakitEnvironment } from "../world/MegakitEnvironment";
import { installClinicVisualUpgrade } from "../world/ClinicVisualUpgrade";
import { installScifiEssentialsEnvironment } from "../world/ScifiEssentialsEnvironment";
import { capSceneMaterialLightCount } from "../rendering/LightingBudget";

export class Game {
  async start(): Promise<void> {
    const canvas = required<HTMLCanvasElement>("renderCanvas");
    const loadingStatus = required("loadingStatus");
    loadingStatus.textContent = "Starting Babylon.js renderer…";

    const bus = new EventBus();
    const time = new TimeManager(bus);
    const random = new RandomService();
    const settings = new SettingsManager();
    settings.bindModal(time);
    const audio = new AudioSystem(bus);
    settings.subscribe((value) => audio.setEnabled(value.audioEnabled));
    const { engine, renderer } = await EngineFactory.create(canvas);

    loadingStatus.textContent = "Constructing Prague clinic simulation…";
    const scene = new Scene(engine);
    scene.metadata = { extractionActive: false };
    const world = createHospitalPrototype(scene);
    const tacticalCamera = new TacticalCamera(scene, engine, canvas);
    settings.subscribe((value) => tacticalCamera.setAccessibilityOptions({
      edgeScrolling: value.edgeScrolling,
      reducedMotion: value.reducedMotion,
    }));

    const story = new StoryState();
    const campaign = new CampaignManager(bus);
    const assetPipeline = new AssetPipeline(scene);
    await assetPipeline.initialize();

    loadingStatus.textContent = "Installing Modular Sci-Fi MegaKit visuals…";
    const megakitReport = await installMegakitEnvironment(scene, world);
    if (megakitReport.warnings.length > 0) {
      console.warn("MegaKit loaded with warnings", megakitReport.warnings);
    }

    loadingStatus.textContent = "Dressing clinic rooms and calibrating practical lights…";
    const visualUpgradeReport = installClinicVisualUpgrade(scene, world);
    if (visualUpgradeReport.warnings.length > 0) {
      console.warn("Clinic visual upgrade loaded with warnings", visualUpgradeReport.warnings);
    }

    loadingStatus.textContent = "Installing Sci-Fi Essentials prop dressing…";
    const scifiEssentialsReport = await installScifiEssentialsEnvironment(scene, world);
    if (scifiEssentialsReport.warnings.length > 0) {
      console.warn("Sci-Fi Essentials dressing loaded with warnings", scifiEssentialsReport.warnings);
    }

    loadingStatus.textContent = "Baking tactical navigation mesh…";
    const recast = await initRecast();
    const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
    const navigation = new NavigationSystem(scene, world.navMeshes, recast, params.get("navdebug") === "1");
    time.attachNavigation(navigation.plugin);

    loadingStatus.textContent = "Deploying ION Alpha Team and Echo drones…";
    const agents = createAgentDefinitions().map((definition) => new Agent(definition, scene));
    const enemies = world.enemyDefinitions.map((definition) => new Enemy(definition, scene));
    applyCampaignLoadouts(agents, campaign);
    agents.forEach((agent) => navigation.registerAgent(agent));
    enemies.forEach((enemy) => navigation.registerEnemy(enemy));

    const assetReports = await Promise.all(agents.map(async (agent) => {
      const assetId = `agent-${agent.id}`;
      const report = await assetPipeline.attachOptionalModel(assetId, agent.externalVisualRoot);
      if (report.meshCount > 0 && report.valid) {
        agent.setVisualMode("external");
        report.socketBindings = assetPipeline.attachCharacterEquipment(
          assetId,
          agent.definition.equipmentProfile ?? "command",
          agent.definition.color,
        );
      } else {
        agent.setVisualMode("procedural");
      }
      return report;
    }));
    const cappedMaterialCount = capSceneMaterialLightCount(scene);
    if (params.get("assetdebug") === "1" && cappedMaterialCount > 0) {
      console.info(`Capped ${cappedMaterialCount} imported materials to four simultaneous lights.`);
    }

    const selection = new SelectionSystem(agents, scene, engine, canvas, required("selectionBox"), bus);
    const cover = new CoverSystem(scene, world.coverDefinitions);
    const investigation = new InvestigationSystem(scene, world.interactables, world.evidenceDefinitions, story, bus);
    const doors = new DoorSystem(world.doorDefinitions, navigation, bus);
    const gadgets = new GadgetSystem(scene, agents, enemies, bus);
    bus.on("gadget:deployed", ({ agentId, gadgetId }) => {
      campaign.consumeAssignedEquipment(agentId, gadgetId === "smoke" ? "smoke-grenade" : "emp-grenade");
    });
    bus.on("door:changed", ({ agentId, action }) => {
      if (action === "breach") campaign.consumeAssignedEquipment(agentId, "breach-charge");
    });
    settings.subscribe((value) => investigation.setMarkersVisible(value.highlightInteractables));
    const vision = new VisionSystem(
      scene,
      agents,
      enemies,
      world.roomDefinitions,
      world.securitySensors,
      world.wallMeshes,
      gadgets,
      tacticalCamera.camera,
      bus,
    );
    const combat = new CombatSystem(scene, agents, enemies, navigation, cover, vision, bus, random, gadgets);
    const abilities = new AbilitySystem(agents, combat, bus);
    const commands = new CommandSystem(scene, agents, navigation, cover, combat, investigation, gadgets, doors, bus);
    const enemyAI = new EnemyAISystem(agents, enemies, navigation, vision, combat, bus);
    const echoObserver = new EchoObserverSystem(scene, agents, enemies, investigation, story, bus);
    const dialogue = new DialogueSystem(pragueDialogue, story, bus);
    bus.on("dialogue:opened", () => time.acquirePause("dialogue"));
    bus.on("dialogue:closed", () => time.releasePause("dialogue"));
    const hud = new HudController(agents, enemies, selection, commands, combat, investigation, abilities, story, time, bus, renderer);
    const mission = new PragueMissionDirector(
      agents,
      enemies,
      world.objectiveCenter,
      world.extractionCenter,
      investigation,
      echoObserver,
      story,
      hud,
      bus,
    );
    const minimap = new MinimapController(
      required<HTMLCanvasElement>("minimapCanvas"),
      agents,
      enemies,
      world.roomDefinitions,
      investigation,
      tacticalCamera,
    );
    minimap.setObjective(world.objectiveCenter);
    const saves = new SaveGameManager(
      agents,
      enemies,
      navigation,
      commands,
      investigation,
      echoObserver,
      story,
      time,
      mission,
      combat,
      cover,
      vision,
      dialogue,
      abilities,
      random,
      bus,
      campaign,
      doors,
      gadgets,
    );
    saves.bindUI();
    new CampaignController(campaign, time, bus);

    const preview = new TacticalPreviewSystem(scene, navigation, vision);
    new GameInput(
      canvas,
      scene,
      tacticalCamera,
      selection,
      commands,
      combat,
      cover,
      vision,
      investigation,
      doors,
      enemies,
      time,
      settings,
      abilities,
      preview,
      bus,
    );

    new DeveloperTools(agents, enemies, investigation, bus);
    new LLMLogger(bus, agents);

    selection.selectAll();
    cover.updateIndicators(selection.selectedAgents);
    time.setState("paused");

    bus.on("mission:start", () => {
      time.setState("running");
      mission.startMission();
      bus.emit("toast", { message: "Alpha Team deployed. Secure the reception checkpoint.", tone: "success" });
    });
    bus.on("mission:continue", () => {
      time.setState("running");
      mission.continueAfterDebrief();
    });
    bus.on("mission:stage-changed", ({ stage }) => {
      const extractionActive = stage === "extraction" || stage === "debrief" || stage === "complete";
      scene.metadata = { ...(scene.metadata ?? {}), extractionActive };
      minimap.setObjective(stage === "checkpoint" ? world.objectiveCenter : undefined);
      minimap.setExtraction(extractionActive ? world.extractionCenter : undefined);
      if (stage === "debrief" || stage === "failed") time.setState("paused");
    });
    bus.on("selection:changed", () => cover.updateIndicators(selection.selectedAgents));
    bus.on("enemy:discovered", () => bus.emit("alert:changed", { level: "SUSPICIOUS" }));
    bus.on("agent:downed", () => {
      selection.selectAll();
      cover.updateIndicators(selection.selectedAgents);
    });
    bus.on("combat:attack", ({ attackerId, targetId, attackerTeam, targetTeam, hit }) => {
      if (attackerTeam === "ion") {
        assetPipeline.triggerCharacterAnimation(`agent-${attackerId}`, "fire");
      }
      if (hit && targetTeam === "ion") {
        assetPipeline.triggerCharacterAnimation(`agent-${targetId}`, "hit");
      }
    });
    bus.on("ability:used", ({ agentId, abilityId }) => {
      const state = abilityAnimation(abilityId);
      if (state) assetPipeline.triggerCharacterAnimation(`agent-${agentId}`, state);
    });

    if (params.get("assetdebug") === "1") hud.setAssetDiagnostics(assetReports);

    const fixedStep = 1 / 30;
    let accumulator = 0;
    let lastTime = performance.now();
    engine.runRenderLoop(() => {
      const now = performance.now();
      const unscaledDelta = Math.min(0.05, (now - lastTime) / 1000);
      lastTime = now;
      accumulator = Math.min(0.2, accumulator + unscaledDelta * time.scale);

      tacticalCamera.update(unscaledDelta);
      vision.update(0, selection.selectedAgents);
      while (accumulator >= fixedStep) {
        commands.update(fixedStep);
        combat.update(fixedStep);
        abilities.update(fixedStep);
        enemyAI.update(fixedStep);
        echoObserver.update(fixedStep);
        vision.update(fixedStep, selection.selectedAgents);
        navigation.updateEntityFacing(fixedStep);
        mission.update();
        accumulator -= fixedStep;
      }

      for (const agent of agents) {
        const velocity = navigation.getVelocity(agent).length();
        const animation = resolveAgentAnimation(agent, velocity);
        assetPipeline.playCharacterAnimation(
          `agent-${agent.id}`,
          animation.state,
          animation.speedMultiplier,
        );
      }
      minimap.update();
      hud.update();
      scene.render();
    });

    window.addEventListener("resize", () => engine.resize());

    let characterDebugTimer: number | undefined;
    if (params.get("characterdebug") === "1") {
      const logCharacterState = () => console.table(agents.map((agent) => ({
        agent: agent.definition.callsign,
        visualMode: agent.visualMode,
        ...assetPipeline.getCharacterDebugSnapshot(`agent-${agent.id}`),
      })));
      logCharacterState();
      characterDebugTimer = window.setInterval(logCharacterState, 2000);
    }

    window.addEventListener("beforeunload", () => {
      navigation.dispose();
      if (characterDebugTimer !== undefined) window.clearInterval(characterDebugTimer);
    });

    scene.executeWhenReady(() => {
      window.setTimeout(() => {
        required("loadingScreen").classList.add("hidden");
        required("briefingModal").hidden = false;
        minimap.update(true);
      }, 300);
    });
  }
}

function createAgentDefinitions(): AgentDefinition[] {
  return [
    {
      id: "alex",
      callsign: "VANCE",
      role: "Field Commander",
      color: Color3.FromHexString("#51e8ff"),

      equipmentProfile: "command",
    },
    {
      id: "jordan",
      callsign: "MILLER",
      role: "Tactical Specialist",
      color: Color3.FromHexString("#72a7ff"),
      position: new Vector3(-12.6, 0, -10.2),
      shortcut: "2",

function resolveAgentAnimation(
  agent: Agent,
  velocity: number,
): { state: HumanoidAnimationName; speedMultiplier: number } {
  if (agent.downed) return { state: "downed", speedMultiplier: 1 };

  const command = agent.activeCommand;
  if (command instanceof ReloadCommand) return { state: "reload", speedMultiplier: 1 };
  if (command instanceof StabilizeCommand) return { state: "heal", speedMultiplier: 1 };
  if (command instanceof AttackCommand || agent.overwatch) return { state: "aim", speedMultiplier: 1 };
  if (command instanceof InteractionCommand) {
    if (["hack", "download", "restore"].includes(command.target.kind)) return { state: "hack", speedMultiplier: 1 };
    if (["scan", "examine"].includes(command.target.kind)) return { state: "scan", speedMultiplier: 1 };
    return { state: "interact", speedMultiplier: 1 };
  }
  if (agent.movementStance === "crouched") {
    if (velocity > 0.12) return { state: "crouch_walk", speedMultiplier: clamp(velocity / 1.4, 0.7, 1.2) };
    return { state: "crouch_idle", speedMultiplier: 1 };
  }
  if (velocity > 2.7) return { state: "run", speedMultiplier: clamp(velocity / 4.2, 0.78, 1.35) };
  if (velocity > 0.12) return { state: "walk", speedMultiplier: clamp(velocity / 1.8, 0.72, 1.28) };
  return { state: "idle", speedMultiplier: 1 };
}

function abilityAnimation(abilityId: string): HumanoidAnimationName | undefined {
  return ({
    "command-pulse": "interact",
    "mark-target": "scan",
    "field-patch": "heal",
    "kinetic-surge": "interact",
  } as Partial<Record<string, HumanoidAnimationName>>)[abilityId];
}

function clamp(value: number, min: number, max: number): number {
  return Math.max(min, Math.min(max, value));
}

function required<T extends HTMLElement = HTMLElement>(id: string): T {
  const element = document.getElementById(id);
  if (!element) throw new Error(`Missing required element #${id}`);
  return element as T;
}

function applyCampaignLoadouts(agents: Agent[], campaign: CampaignManager): void {
  const roster = new Map(campaign.snapshotValue.roster.map((operative) => [operative.id, operative]));
  agents.forEach((agent) => {
    const loadout = roster.get(agent.id)?.gadgets ?? [];
    agent.gadgetCharges.smoke = loadout.filter((item) => item === "smoke-grenade").length;
    agent.gadgetCharges.emp = loadout.filter((item) => item === "emp-grenade").length;
    agent.breachCharges = loadout.filter((item) => item === "breach-charge").length;
  });
}

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/assets/AssetManifest.ts =====
export const REQUIRED_HUMANOID_ANIMATIONS = [
  "idle",
  "walk",
  "run",
  "crouch_idle",
  "crouch_walk",
  "aim",
  "fire",
  "reload",
  "hit",
  "downed",
  "interact",
  "hack",
  "scan",
  "heal",
  "carry",
] as const;

export type HumanoidAnimationName = (typeof REQUIRED_HUMANOID_ANIMATIONS)[number];

export type AssetTransform = {
  scale?: number;
  position?: [number, number, number];
  rotation?: [number, number, number];
};

export type AssetAttachment = AssetTransform & {
  id: string;
  url: string;
  socket?: string;
};

export type AnimationSource = {
  url: string;
};

export type AnimationPlayback = {
  loop?: boolean;
  speedRatio?: number;
};

export type AssetEntry = AssetTransform & {
  id: string;
  kind: "character" | "drone" | "prop" | "environment";
  url?: string;
  rootNodeName?: string;
  animationMode?: "embedded" | "rig-only" | "external";
  animationSource?: AnimationSource;
  animationAliases?: Partial<Record<HumanoidAnimationName, string>>;
  animationPlayback?: Partial<Record<HumanoidAnimationName, AnimationPlayback>>;
  materialSlots?: string[];
  sockets?: Record<string, string>;
  attachments?: AssetAttachment[];
  license?: {
    name: string;
    creator?: string;
    source?: string;
  };
};

export type AssetManifest = {
  version: number;
  assets: AssetEntry[];
};

export const FALLBACK_ASSET_MANIFEST: AssetManifest = {
  version: 1,
  assets: [
    { id: "agent-alex", kind: "character", scale: 1 },
    { id: "agent-jordan", kind: "character", scale: 1 },
    { id: "agent-chen", kind: "character", scale: 1 },
    { id: "agent-ramirez", kind: "character", scale: 1 },
    { id: "drone-observer", kind: "drone", scale: 1 },
    { id: "drone-security", kind: "drone", scale: 1 },
  ],
};

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/assets/AssetPipeline.ts =====
import "@babylonjs/loaders/glTF";
import {
  Animation,
  AnimationPropertiesOverride,
  Color3,
  LoadAssetContainerAsync,
  MeshBuilder,
  PBRMaterial,
  SceneLoader,
  TransformNode,
  Vector3,
  type AbstractMesh,
  type AnimationGroup,
  type AssetContainer,
  type Node,
  type Scene,
  type Skeleton,
} from "@babylonjs/core";
import type { AgentEquipmentProfile } from "../entities/Agent";
import {
  FALLBACK_ASSET_MANIFEST,
  REQUIRED_HUMANOID_ANIMATIONS,
  type AssetAttachment,
  type AssetEntry,
  type AssetManifest,
  type AssetTransform,
  type HumanoidAnimationName,
} from "./AssetManifest";
import { capSceneMaterialLightCount } from "../rendering/LightingBudget";

export type AssetValidationReport = {
  assetId: string;
  valid: boolean;
  warnings: string[];
  meshCount: number;
  animationNames: string[];
  rigMatchPercent?: number;
  matchedRigTargets?: number;
  totalRigTargets?: number;
  socketBindings?: string[];
  visualMode?: "procedural" | "external";
};

export type CharacterAnimationDebug = {
  assetId: string;
  activeAnimation?: HumanoidAnimationName;
  oneShotAnimation?: HumanoidAnimationName;
  rigMatchPercent?: number;
  availableAnimations: HumanoidAnimationName[];
  socketBindings: string[];
};

type ImportedVisual = {
  root: TransformNode;
  meshes: AbstractMesh[];
  transformNodes: TransformNode[];
  animationGroups: AnimationGroup[];
  skeletons: Skeleton[];
};

type RetargetResult = {
  groups: AnimationGroup[];
  matchedTargets: number;
  totalTargets: number;
  matchPercent: number;
};

type OneShotState = {
  token: number;
  state: HumanoidAnimationName;
  priority: number;
};

const DEFAULT_MANIFEST_URLS = [
  "./assets/manifest.json",
  "./assets/universal-base-characters/manifest.json",
  "./assets/universal-animation-library/manifest.json",
] as const;

const DEFAULT_LOOPING_STATES = new Set<HumanoidAnimationName>([
  "idle",
  "walk",
  "run",
  "crouch_idle",
  "crouch_walk",
  "aim",
  "scan",
]);

const DEFAULT_SPEED_RATIOS: Partial<Record<HumanoidAnimationName, number>> = {
  run: 1.08,
  fire: 1.18,
  reload: 1.05,
  hit: 1.15,
  interact: 1.05,
  hack: 1.05,
  heal: 1.05,
};

const ONE_SHOT_PRIORITY: Partial<Record<HumanoidAnimationName, number>> = {
  downed: 100,
  hit: 90,
  fire: 80,
  reload: 70,
  heal: 65,
  hack: 60,
  interact: 55,
  carry: 50,
  scan: 45,
};

const SOCKET_ALIASES = {
  head: ["Head", "head", "mixamorig:Head"],
  rightHand: ["RightHand", "Hand_R", "hand_r", "mixamorig:RightHand"],
  leftHand: ["LeftHand", "Hand_L", "hand_l", "mixamorig:LeftHand"],
  chest: ["Spine2", "Spine_02", "Chest", "mixamorig:Spine2"],
  hips: ["Hips", "Pelvis", "mixamorig:Hips"],
} as const;

export class AssetPipeline {
  private manifest: AssetManifest = FALLBACK_ASSET_MANIFEST;
  private readonly reports = new Map<string, AssetValidationReport>();
  private readonly animationGroups = new Map<string, Map<HumanoidAnimationName, AnimationGroup>>();
  private readonly activeAnimations = new Map<string, HumanoidAnimationName>();
  private readonly oneShots = new Map<string, OneShotState>();
  private readonly visuals = new Map<string, ImportedVisual>();
  private readonly animationSources = new Map<string, Promise<AssetContainer>>();
  private readonly socketBindings = new Map<string, Set<string>>();
  private readonly characterDebugEnabled = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get("characterdebug") === "1";

  constructor(private readonly scene: Scene) {}

  async initialize(urls: string | readonly string[] = DEFAULT_MANIFEST_URLS): Promise<void> {
    const manifestUrls = typeof urls === "string" ? [urls] : [...urls];
    const assets = new Map(FALLBACK_ASSET_MANIFEST.assets.map((entry) => [entry.id, entry]));
    let version = FALLBACK_ASSET_MANIFEST.version;
    let loadedCount = 0;

    for (const url of manifestUrls) {
      try {
        const response = await fetch(url, { cache: "no-store" });
        if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}`);
        const parsed = await response.json() as AssetManifest;
        if (!Array.isArray(parsed.assets)) throw new Error("Manifest assets must be an array");
        parsed.assets.forEach((entry) => {
          assets.set(entry.id, mergeAssetEntries(assets.get(entry.id), entry));
        });
        version = Math.max(version, parsed.version ?? 1);
        loadedCount += 1;
      } catch (error) {
        console.info(`Optional asset manifest unavailable: ${url}`, error);
      }
    }

    this.manifest = { version, assets: [...assets.values()] };
    if (loadedCount === 0) {
      console.warn("No asset manifests loaded; procedural fallback visuals remain active.");
    }
  }

  getEntry(id: string): AssetEntry | undefined {
    return this.manifest.assets.find((entry) => entry.id === id);
  }

  getReports(): AssetValidationReport[] {
    return [...this.reports.values()];
  }

  getCharacterDebugSnapshot(assetId: string): CharacterAnimationDebug {
    const groups = this.animationGroups.get(assetId);
    const report = this.reports.get(assetId);
    return {
      assetId,
      activeAnimation: this.activeAnimations.get(assetId),
      oneShotAnimation: this.oneShots.get(assetId)?.state,
      rigMatchPercent: report?.rigMatchPercent,
      availableAnimations: groups ? [...groups.keys()] : [],
      socketBindings: [...(this.socketBindings.get(assetId) ?? [])],
    };
  }

  async attachOptionalModel(assetId: string, parent: TransformNode): Promise<AssetValidationReport> {
    const entry = this.getEntry(assetId);
    if (!entry?.url) {
      const report: AssetValidationReport = {
        assetId,
        valid: true,
        warnings: ["No GLTF URL configured; using procedural fallback visual."],
        meshCount: 0,
        animationNames: [],
        visualMode: "procedural",
      };
      this.reports.set(assetId, report);
      return report;
    }

    const warnings: string[] = [];
    const boundSockets = new Set<string>();
    this.socketBindings.set(assetId, boundSockets);
    try {
      const root = new TransformNode(`asset-root:${assetId}`, this.scene);
      root.parent = parent;
      applyTransform(root, entry);

      const primary = await this.importVisual(entry.url, root);
      this.visuals.set(assetId, primary);
      const imported = [primary];

      for (const attachment of entry.attachments ?? []) {
        try {
          const visual = await this.importAttachment(assetId, attachment, root);
          const socketName = attachment.socket ?? (attachment.id.startsWith("hair-") ? "Head" : undefined);
          const socket = socketName ? findNodeByAliases(primary, [socketName, ...SOCKET_ALIASES.head]) : undefined;
          if (socket) {
            visual.root.setParent(socket, true, true);
            boundSockets.add(`${attachment.id} → ${socket.name}`);
          } else if (socketName) {
            warnings.push(`Attachment ${attachment.id} socket not found: ${socketName}`);
          }
          imported.push(visual);
        } catch (error) {
          warnings.push(`Attachment ${attachment.id} failed: ${String(error)}`);
        }
      }

      const meshes = imported.flatMap((visual) => visual.meshes);
      let animationGroups = imported.flatMap((visual) => visual.animationGroups);
      let retarget: RetargetResult | undefined;
      if (entry.animationSource?.url) {
        try {
          retarget = await this.importRetargetedAnimations(assetId, entry.animationSource.url, primary, warnings);
          animationGroups = retarget.groups;
        } catch (error) {
          warnings.push(`External animation library failed: ${String(error)}`);
        }
      }

      const report = this.validate(assetId, entry, meshes, animationGroups, warnings, retarget);
      report.socketBindings = [...boundSockets];
      report.visualMode = report.valid && report.meshCount > 0 ? "external" : "procedural";
      this.registerAnimations(assetId, entry, animationGroups);
      this.playCharacterAnimation(assetId, "idle", 1, true);
      this.reports.set(assetId, report);
      if (this.characterDebugEnabled) console.info("Character asset report", report, this.getCharacterDebugSnapshot(assetId));
      return report;
    } catch (error) {
      const report: AssetValidationReport = {
        assetId,
        valid: false,
        warnings: [`Failed to load ${entry.url}: ${String(error)}`],
        meshCount: 0,
        animationNames: [],
        socketBindings: [...boundSockets],
        visualMode: "procedural",
      };
      this.reports.set(assetId, report);
      return report;
    }
  }

  attachCharacterEquipment(
    assetId: string,
    profile: AgentEquipmentProfile,
    accent: Color3,
  ): string[] {
    const visual = this.visuals.get(assetId);
    if (!visual) return [];
    const bindings = this.socketBindings.get(assetId) ?? new Set<string>();
    this.socketBindings.set(assetId, bindings);

    const hand = findNodeByAliases(visual, SOCKET_ALIASES.rightHand);
    if (hand) {
      const weapon = createProceduralWeapon(this.scene, `${assetId}:${profile}`, profile, accent);
      weapon.parent = hand;
      applyEquipmentTransform(weapon, profile);
      bindings.add(`weapon-${profile} → ${hand.name}`);
    }

    const chest = findNodeByAliases(visual, SOCKET_ALIASES.chest);
    if (chest) {
      const pack = createRolePack(this.scene, `${assetId}:${profile}`, profile, accent);
      pack.parent = chest;
      pack.position.set(0, 0.02, -0.18);
      pack.rotation.set(0, Math.PI, 0);
      bindings.add(`role-pack-${profile} → ${chest.name}`);
    }

    const report = this.reports.get(assetId);
    if (report) report.socketBindings = [...bindings];
    return [...bindings];
  }

  playCharacterAnimation(
    assetId: string,
    state: HumanoidAnimationName,
    speedMultiplier = 1,
    force = false,
  ): void {
    const oneShot = this.oneShots.get(assetId);
    if (oneShot && state !== "downed" && !force) return;
    if (state === "downed" && oneShot) this.oneShots.delete(assetId);

    const groups = this.animationGroups.get(assetId);
    if (!groups) return;
    const next = groups.get(state);
    if (!next) return;

    const entry = this.getEntry(assetId);
    const loop = entry?.animationPlayback?.[state]?.loop ?? DEFAULT_LOOPING_STATES.has(state);
    const speedRatio = (entry?.animationPlayback?.[state]?.speedRatio ?? DEFAULT_SPEED_RATIOS[state] ?? 1)
      * Math.max(0.2, speedMultiplier);
    const activeState = this.activeAnimations.get(assetId);
    if (!force && activeState === state && (next.isPlaying || !loop)) {
      next.speedRatio = speedRatio;
      return;
    }

    this.stopOtherAnimations(groups, next);
    next.start(loop, speedRatio, next.from, next.to, false);
    this.activeAnimations.set(assetId, state);
  }

  triggerCharacterAnimation(assetId: string, state: HumanoidAnimationName): boolean {
    const groups = this.animationGroups.get(assetId);
    if (!groups) return false;
    const next = groups.get(state);
    if (!next) return false;

    const priority = ONE_SHOT_PRIORITY[state] ?? 40;
    const current = this.oneShots.get(assetId);
    if (current && current.priority > priority) return false;

    const token = (current?.token ?? 0) + 1;
    this.oneShots.set(assetId, { token, state, priority });
    this.stopOtherAnimations(groups, next);

    const entry = this.getEntry(assetId);
    const speedRatio = entry?.animationPlayback?.[state]?.speedRatio ?? DEFAULT_SPEED_RATIOS[state] ?? 1;
    next.onAnimationGroupEndObservable.addOnce(() => {
      if (this.oneShots.get(assetId)?.token !== token) return;
      this.oneShots.delete(assetId);
      this.activeAnimations.delete(assetId);
    });
    next.start(false, speedRatio, next.from, next.to, false);
    this.activeAnimations.set(assetId, state);
    return true;
  }

  private stopOtherAnimations(
    groups: Map<HumanoidAnimationName, AnimationGroup>,
    next: AnimationGroup,
  ): void {
    groups.forEach((group) => {
      if (group !== next && group.isPlaying) group.stop();
    });
    if (next.isPlaying) next.stop();
  }

  private async importAttachment(
    assetId: string,
    attachment: AssetAttachment,
    parent: TransformNode,
  ): Promise<ImportedVisual> {
    const root = new TransformNode(`asset-attachment:${assetId}:${attachment.id}`, this.scene);
    root.parent = parent;
    applyTransform(root, attachment);
    return this.importVisual(attachment.url, root);
  }

  private async importVisual(url: string, parent: TransformNode): Promise<ImportedVisual> {
    const result = await SceneLoader.ImportMeshAsync("", "", url, this.scene);
    capSceneMaterialLightCount(this.scene);
    result.meshes.forEach((mesh) => {
      if (mesh.parent === null) mesh.parent = parent;
      mesh.isPickable = false;
      mesh.receiveShadows = true;
      mesh.metadata = { ...(mesh.metadata ?? {}), visualOnly: true };
    });
    result.skeletons.forEach((skeleton) => configureAnimationBlending(skeleton));
    return {
      root: parent,
      meshes: result.meshes,
      transformNodes: result.transformNodes,
      animationGroups: result.animationGroups,
      skeletons: result.skeletons,
    };
  }

  private async importRetargetedAnimations(
    assetId: string,
    url: string,
    primary: ImportedVisual,
    warnings: string[],
  ): Promise<RetargetResult> {
    const container = await this.loadAnimationSource(url);
    const targets = createTargetMap([...primary.transformNodes, ...primary.meshes]);
    const allSourceTargets = new Set<string>();
    const matchedSourceTargets = new Set<string>();
    const retargeted: AnimationGroup[] = [];

    for (const sourceGroup of container.animationGroups) {
      const sourceTargets = sourceGroup.targetedAnimations
        .map((targeted) => animationTargetName(targeted.target))
        .filter((name): name is string => Boolean(name));
      sourceTargets.forEach((name) => allSourceTargets.add(normalizeNodeName(name)));
      const missing = [...new Set(sourceTargets.filter((name) => !targets.has(normalizeNodeName(name))))];
      if (missing.length > 0) {
        warnings.push(`Animation ${sourceGroup.name} skipped; missing rig nodes: ${missing.slice(0, 4).join(", ")}${missing.length > 4 ? "…" : ""}`);
        continue;
      }
      sourceTargets.forEach((name) => matchedSourceTargets.add(normalizeNodeName(name)));

      const clone = sourceGroup.clone(
        `${assetId}:${sourceGroup.name}`,
        (oldTarget) => {
          const name = animationTargetName(oldTarget);
          return name ? targets.get(normalizeNodeName(name)) : undefined;
        },
        true,
        true,
      );
      clone.stop();
      retargeted.push(clone);
    }

    if (retargeted.length === 0) {
      throw new Error("No animation clips could be retargeted to the imported character rig.");
    }
    const totalTargets = allSourceTargets.size;
    const matchedTargets = matchedSourceTargets.size;
    return {
      groups: retargeted,
      matchedTargets,
      totalTargets,
      matchPercent: totalTargets === 0 ? 100 : Math.round((matchedTargets / totalTargets) * 1000) / 10,
    };
  }

  private loadAnimationSource(url: string): Promise<AssetContainer> {
    const cached = this.animationSources.get(url);
    if (cached) return cached;
    const promise = LoadAssetContainerAsync(url, this.scene);
    this.animationSources.set(url, promise);
    return promise;
  }

  private registerAnimations(assetId: string, entry: AssetEntry, animations: AnimationGroup[]): void {
    const groups = new Map<HumanoidAnimationName, AnimationGroup>();
    for (const state of REQUIRED_HUMANOID_ANIMATIONS) {
      const expected = (entry.animationAliases?.[state] ?? state).toLowerCase();
      const group = animations.find((candidate) => candidate.name.split(":").at(-1)?.toLowerCase() === expected);
      if (group) groups.set(state, group);
    }
    this.animationGroups.set(assetId, groups);
  }

  private validate(
    assetId: string,
    entry: AssetEntry,
    meshes: AbstractMesh[],
    animations: AnimationGroup[],
    initialWarnings: string[] = [],
    retarget?: RetargetResult,
  ): AssetValidationReport {
    const warnings = [...initialWarnings];
    const animationNames = animations.map((animation) => animation.name.split(":").at(-1) ?? animation.name);
    if (meshes.length === 0) warnings.push("No meshes were imported.");
    if (entry.kind === "character") {
      if (entry.animationMode === "rig-only" && animationNames.length === 0) {
        warnings.push("Character animation unavailable; keeping the procedural fallback instead of displaying a T-pose.");
      } else if (entry.animationMode !== "rig-only") {
        const aliases = entry.animationAliases ?? {};
        for (const required of REQUIRED_HUMANOID_ANIMATIONS) {
          const expected = aliases[required] ?? required;
          if (!animationNames.some((name) => name.toLowerCase() === expected.toLowerCase())) {
            warnings.push(`Missing optional animation clip: ${required}`);
          }
        }
      }
      const bounds = combinedExtent(meshes);
      if (bounds.y > 0 && (bounds.y < 1.2 || bounds.y > 2.6)) {
        warnings.push(`Character height ${bounds.y.toFixed(2)}m is outside the standard 1.2–2.6m range.`);
      }
      if (retarget && retarget.matchPercent < 95) {
        warnings.push(`Factor de correspondencia del target del rig es ${retarget.matchPercent.toFixed(1)}%; esperado al menos 95%.`);
      }
    }
    return {
      assetId,
      valid: !warnings.some((warning) => warning.startsWith("No meshes")
        || warning.startsWith("External animation library failed")
        || warning.startsWith("Character animation unavailable")),
      warnings,
      meshCount: meshes.length,
      animationNames,
      rigMatchPercent: retarget?.matchPercent,
      matchedRigTargets: retarget?.matchedTargets,
      totalRigTargets: retarget?.totalTargets,
    };
  }
}

function mergeAssetEntries(current: AssetEntry | undefined, incoming: AssetEntry): AssetEntry {
  if (!current) return incoming;
  return {
    ...current,
    ...incoming,
    animationSource: incoming.animationSource ?? current.animationSource,
    animationAliases: {
      ...(current.animationAliases ?? {}),
      ...(incoming.animationAliases ?? {}),
    },
    animationPlayback: {
      ...(current.animationPlayback ?? {}),
      ...(incoming.animationPlayback ?? {}),
    },
    sockets: {
      ...(current.sockets ?? {}),
      ...(incoming.sockets ?? {}),
    },
    attachments: incoming.attachments ?? current.attachments,
    license: incoming.license ?? current.license,
  };
}

function configureAnimationBlending(skeleton: Skeleton): void {
  const override = new AnimationPropertiesOverride();
  override.enableBlending = true;
  override.blendingSpeed = 0.14;
  override.loopMode = Animation.ANIMATIONLOOPMODE_CYCLE;
  skeleton.animationPropertiesOverride = override;
}

function applyTransform(node: TransformNode, transform: AssetTransform): void {
  node.scaling.setAll(transform.scale ?? 1);
  if (transform.position) node.position.set(...transform.position);
  if (transform.rotation) node.rotation.set(...transform.rotation);
}

function findNodeByAliases(visual: ImportedVisual, aliases: readonly string[]): Node | undefined {
  const normalized = new Set(aliases.map(normalizeNodeName));
  return [...visual.transformNodes, ...visual.meshes]
    .find((node) => normalized.has(normalizeNodeName(node.name)));
}

function createTargetMap(nodes: Node[]): Map<string, Node> {
  const targets = new Map<string, Node>();
  nodes.forEach((node) => {
    const key = normalizeNodeName(node.name);
    if (key && !targets.has(key)) targets.set(key, node);
  });
  return targets;
}

function animationTargetName(target: unknown): string | undefined {
  if (!target || typeof target !== "object" || !("name" in target)) return undefined;
  const name = (target as { name?: unknown }).name;
  return typeof name === "string" ? name : undefined;
}

function normalizeNodeName(name: string): string {
  return name.trim().toLowerCase().replace(/^mixamorig:/, "");
}

function combinedExtent(meshes: AbstractMesh[]): Vector3 {
  let min = new Vector3(Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY, Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY, Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY);
  let max = new Vector3(Number.NEGATIVE_INFINITY, Number.NEGATIVE_INFINITY, Number.NEGATIVE_INFINITY);
  for (const mesh of meshes) {
    mesh.computeWorldMatrix(true);
    const bounds = mesh.getBoundingInfo().boundingBox;
    min = Vector3.Minimize(min, bounds.minimumWorld);
    max = Vector3.Maximize(max, bounds.maximumWorld);
  }
  if (!Number.isFinite(min.x)) return Vector3.Zero();
  return max.subtract(min);
}

function createProceduralWeapon(
  scene: Scene,
  id: string,
  profile: AgentEquipmentProfile,
  accent: Color3,
): TransformNode {
  const root = new TransformNode(`equipment-weapon:${id}`, scene);
  const dark = new PBRMaterial(`equipment-dark:${id}`, scene);
  dark.albedoColor = new Color3(0.025, 0.04, 0.048);
  dark.metallic = 0.74;
  dark.roughness = 0.3;
  const trim = new PBRMaterial(`equipment-trim:${id}`, scene);
  trim.albedoColor = accent.scale(0.28);
  trim.emissiveColor = accent.scale(0.16);
  trim.metallic = 0.5;
  trim.roughness = 0.26;

  const dimensions = ({
    command: { receiver: 0.46, barrel: 0.42, stock: 0.24, scope: true },
    precision: { receiver: 0.54, barrel: 0.7, stock: 0.34, scope: true },
    medical: { receiver: 0.4, barrel: 0.3, stock: 0.18, scope: false },
    assault: { receiver: 0.52, barrel: 0.3, stock: 0.28, scope: false },
  } as const)[profile];

  const receiver = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`weapon-receiver:${id}`, {
    width: 0.13,
    height: profile === "assault" ? 0.2 : 0.16,
    depth: dimensions.receiver,
  }, scene);
  receiver.parent = root;
  receiver.position.z = 0.04;
  receiver.material = dark;

  const barrel = MeshBuilder.CreateCylinder(`weapon-barrel:${id}`, {
    height: dimensions.barrel,
    diameter: profile === "assault" ? 0.09 : 0.055,
    tessellation: 10,
  }, scene);
  barrel.parent = root;
  barrel.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2;
  barrel.position.z = dimensions.receiver / 2 + dimensions.barrel / 2;
  barrel.material = dark;

  const stock = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`weapon-stock:${id}`, {
    width: 0.1,
    height: 0.14,
    depth: dimensions.stock,
  }, scene);
  stock.parent = root;
  stock.position.set(0, -0.01, -(dimensions.receiver + dimensions.stock) / 2 + 0.05);
  stock.material = dark;

  const magazine = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`weapon-magazine:${id}`, {
    width: 0.09,
    height: profile === "assault" ? 0.2 : 0.16,
    depth: 0.11,
  }, scene);
  magazine.parent = root;
  magazine.position.set(0, -0.14, 0.03);
  magazine.rotation.x = -0.16;
  magazine.material = trim;

  const grip = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`weapon-grip:${id}`, { width: 0.08, height: 0.18, depth: 0.09 }, scene);
  grip.parent = root;
  grip.position.set(0, -0.14, -0.13);
  grip.rotation.x = -0.22;
  grip.material = dark;

  if (dimensions.scope) {
    const scope = MeshBuilder.CreateCylinder(`weapon-scope:${id}`, { height: 0.24, diameter: 0.07, tessellation: 10 }, scene);
    scope.parent = root;
    scope.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2;
    scope.position.set(0, 0.12, 0.02);
    scope.material = trim;
  }

  root.getChildMeshes().forEach((mesh) => {
    mesh.isPickable = false;
    mesh.receiveShadows = true;
    mesh.metadata = { visualOnly: true, characterEquipment: profile };
  });
  return root;
}

function applyEquipmentTransform(root: TransformNode, profile: AgentEquipmentProfile): void {
  const transform = ({
    command: { position: [0.02, 0.02, 0.02], rotation: [Math.PI / 2, 0, Math.PI] },
    precision: { position: [0.02, 0.015, 0.04], rotation: [Math.PI / 2, 0, Math.PI] },
    medical: { position: [0.02, 0.025, 0.01], rotation: [Math.PI / 2, 0, Math.PI] },
    assault: { position: [0.02, 0.02, 0.01], rotation: [Math.PI / 2, 0, Math.PI] },
  } as const)[profile];
  root.position.set(transform.position[0], transform.position[1], transform.position[2]);
  root.rotation.set(transform.rotation[0], transform.rotation[1], transform.rotation[2]);
  root.scaling.setAll(0.92);
}

function createRolePack(
  scene: Scene,
  id: string,
  profile: AgentEquipmentProfile,
  accent: Color3,
): TransformNode {
  const root = new TransformNode(`equipment-pack:${id}`, scene);
  const dark = new PBRMaterial(`equipment-pack-dark:${id}`, scene);
  dark.albedoColor = new Color3(0.035, 0.052, 0.06);
  dark.metallic = 0.42;
  dark.roughness = 0.56;
  const glow = new PBRMaterial(`equipment-pack-glow:${id}`, scene);
  glow.albedoColor = accent.scale(0.22);
  glow.emissiveColor = accent.scale(0.2);
  glow.roughness = 0.35;

  const pack = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`role-pack-body:${id}`, {
    width: profile === "assault" ? 0.36 : 0.29,
    height: profile === "medical" ? 0.38 : 0.3,
    depth: 0.13,
  }, scene);
  pack.parent = root;
  pack.material = dark;
  const marker = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`role-pack-marker:${id}`, { width: 0.18, height: 0.045, depth: 0.015 }, scene);
  marker.parent = root;
  marker.position.z = -0.075;
  marker.material = glow;
  if (profile === "medical") {
    const vertical = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`role-pack-cross:${id}`, { width: 0.045, height: 0.17, depth: 0.018 }, scene);
    vertical.parent = root;
    vertical.position.z = -0.077;
    vertical.material = glow;
  }
  root.getChildMeshes().forEach((mesh) => {
    mesh.isPickable = false;
    mesh.receiveShadows = true;
    mesh.metadata = { visualOnly: true, characterEquipment: profile };
  });
  return root;
}

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/camera/TacticalCamera.ts =====
import {
  ArcRotateCamera,
  Plane,
  Scalar,
  Vector3,
  type AbstractEngine,
  type Scene,
} from "@babylonjs/core";

export class TacticalCamera {
  readonly camera: ArcRotateCamera;
  private readonly heldKeys = new Set<string>();
  private pointerX = 0;
  private pointerY = 0;
  private middleDragging = false;
  private previousPointer = { x: 0, y: 0 };
  private targetAlpha: number;
  private readonly groundPlane = Plane.FromPositionAndNormal(Vector3.Zero(), Vector3.Up());
  private edgeScrolling = true;
  private edgeHoverSeconds = 0;
  private readonly bookmarks = new Map<number, Vector3>();
  private reducedMotion = false;

  constructor(
    private readonly scene: Scene,
    _engine: AbstractEngine,
    private readonly canvas: HTMLCanvasElement,
  ) {
    this.camera = new ArcRotateCamera(
      "tactical-camera",
      -Math.PI / 4,
      0.92,
      33,
      new Vector3(0, 0, 0),
      scene,
    );
    this.camera.fov = 0.72;
    this.camera.lowerRadiusLimit = 17;
    this.camera.upperRadiusLimit = 47;
    this.camera.lowerBetaLimit = 0.64;
    this.camera.upperBetaLimit = 1.16;
    this.camera.minZ = 0.1;
    this.camera.maxZ = 180;
    this.camera.inertia = 0;
    this.camera.inputs.clear();
    this.targetAlpha = this.camera.alpha;
    scene.activeCamera = this.camera;

    this.bindInputs();
  }

  get alpha(): number {
    return this.camera.alpha;
  }

  setAccessibilityOptions(options: { edgeScrolling: boolean; reducedMotion: boolean }): void {
    this.edgeScrolling = options.edgeScrolling;
    this.reducedMotion = options.reducedMotion;
    this.camera.inertia = options.reducedMotion ? 0 : 0.12;
  }

  saveBookmark(slot: number): void {
    this.bookmarks.set(slot, this.camera.target.clone());
  }

  recallBookmark(slot: number): boolean {
    const target = this.bookmarks.get(slot);
    if (!target) return false;
    this.focus(target);
    return true;
  }

  focus(position: Vector3): void {
    this.camera.target.copyFrom(position);
    this.clampTarget();
  }

  update(deltaSeconds: number): void {
    this.updateRotation(deltaSeconds);
    this.updatePan(deltaSeconds);
    this.clampTarget();
  }

  rotateQuarter(direction: -1 | 1): void {
    this.targetAlpha += direction * (Math.PI / 2);
  }

  getGroundPoint(clientX: number, clientY: number): Vector3 | null {
    const rect = this.canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
    const canvasX = clientX - rect.left;
    const canvasY = clientY - rect.top;
    const ray = this.scene.createPickingRay(canvasX, canvasY, null, this.camera, false);
    const distance = ray.intersectsPlane(this.groundPlane);
    if (distance === null) return null;
    return ray.origin.add(ray.direction.scale(distance));
  }

  private bindInputs(): void {
    window.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
      if (["KeyW", "KeyA", "KeyS", "KeyD"].includes(event.code)) this.heldKeys.add(event.code);
      if (event.code === "KeyQ" && !event.repeat) this.rotateQuarter(-1);
      if (event.code === "KeyE" && !event.repeat) this.rotateQuarter(1);
    });
    window.addEventListener("keyup", (event) => this.heldKeys.delete(event.code));

    this.canvas.addEventListener("wheel", (event) => {
      event.preventDefault();
      const zoomDelta = Math.sign(event.deltaY) * Math.max(1.1, this.camera.radius * 0.075);
      this.camera.radius = Scalar.Clamp(
        this.camera.radius + zoomDelta,
        this.camera.lowerRadiusLimit ?? 17,
        this.camera.upperRadiusLimit ?? 47,
      );
    }, { passive: false });

    this.canvas.addEventListener("pointermove", (event) => {
      const rect = this.canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
      this.pointerX = event.clientX - rect.left;
      this.pointerY = event.clientY - rect.top;

      if (!this.middleDragging) return;
      const deltaX = event.clientX - this.previousPointer.x;
      const deltaY = event.clientY - this.previousPointer.y;
      this.camera.alpha -= deltaX * 0.006;
      this.camera.beta = Scalar.Clamp(this.camera.beta + deltaY * 0.004, 0.64, 1.16);
      this.targetAlpha = this.camera.alpha;
      this.previousPointer = { x: event.clientX, y: event.clientY };
    });

    this.canvas.addEventListener("pointerdown", (event) => {
      if (event.button !== 1) return;
      event.preventDefault();
      this.middleDragging = true;
      this.previousPointer = { x: event.clientX, y: event.clientY };
      this.canvas.setPointerCapture(event.pointerId);
    });

    this.canvas.addEventListener("pointerup", (event) => {
      if (event.button !== 1) return;
      this.middleDragging = false;
      if (this.canvas.hasPointerCapture(event.pointerId)) this.canvas.releasePointerCapture(event.pointerId);
    });
  }

  private updateRotation(deltaSeconds: number): void {
    if (this.reducedMotion) {
      this.camera.alpha = this.targetAlpha;
      return;
    }
    const difference = Math.atan2(
      Math.sin(this.targetAlpha - this.camera.alpha),
      Math.cos(this.targetAlpha - this.camera.alpha),
    );
    this.camera.alpha += difference * (1 - Math.exp(-12 * deltaSeconds));
  }

  private updatePan(deltaSeconds: number): void {
    const rect = this.canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
    const edge = 12;
    let horizontal = 0;
    let vertical = 0;

    const onEdge = this.edgeScrolling && (
      (this.pointerX >= 0 && this.pointerX < edge)
      || (this.pointerX > rect.width - edge && this.pointerX <= rect.width)
      || (this.pointerY >= 0 && this.pointerY < edge)
      || (this.pointerY > rect.height - edge && this.pointerY <= rect.height)
    );
    this.edgeHoverSeconds = onEdge ? this.edgeHoverSeconds + deltaSeconds : 0;
    const edgeActive = onEdge && this.edgeHoverSeconds >= 0.12;

    if (this.heldKeys.has("KeyA") || (edgeActive && this.pointerX < edge)) horizontal -= 1;
    if (this.heldKeys.has("KeyD") || (edgeActive && this.pointerX > rect.width - edge)) horizontal += 1;
    if (this.heldKeys.has("KeyW") || (edgeActive && this.pointerY < edge)) vertical += 1;
    if (this.heldKeys.has("KeyS") || (edgeActive && this.pointerY > rect.height - edge)) vertical -= 1;

    if (horizontal === 0 && vertical === 0) return;

    const forward = this.camera.target.subtract(this.camera.position);
    forward.y = 0;
    forward.normalize();
    const right = Vector3.Cross(Vector3.Up(), forward).normalize();
    const direction = right.scale(horizontal).add(forward.scale(vertical));
    if (direction.lengthSquared() > 1) direction.normalize();

    const speed = 8 + this.camera.radius * 0.18;
    this.camera.target.addInPlace(direction.scale(speed * deltaSeconds));
  }

  private clampTarget(): void {
    this.camera.target.x = Scalar.Clamp(this.camera.target.x, -16, 16);
    this.camera.target.z = Scalar.Clamp(this.camera.target.z, -11.5, 11.5);
    this.camera.target.y = 0;
  }
}

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/campaign/CampaignController.ts =====
import type { EventBus } from "../engine/EventBus";
import type { TimeManager } from "../engine/TimeManager";
import {
  EQUIPMENT,
  FACILITIES,
  LEAD_NAMES,
  OPERATION_NAMES,
  RESEARCH_PROJECTS,
} from "./CampaignData";
import type { CampaignManager } from "./CampaignManager";
import type { CampaignEventId, CampaignState, EquipmentId, FacilityId, LeadId, OperationId, ResearchProjectId } from "./CampaignTypes";

export class CampaignController {
  private readonly modal = element("campaignModal");
  private readonly eventModal = element("campaignEventModal");
  private activeTab = "overview";

  constructor(
    private readonly campaign: CampaignManager,
    private readonly time: TimeManager,
    private readonly bus: EventBus,
  ) {
    this.bindStaticControls();
    this.bindEvents();
    this.render(this.campaign.snapshotValue);
  }

  open(tab = this.activeTab): void {
    this.activeTab = tab;
    this.modal.hidden = false;
    this.time.acquirePause("campaign");
    this.render(this.campaign.snapshotValue);
    this.showPendingEvent();
  }

  close(): void {
    this.modal.hidden = true;
    this.time.releasePause("campaign");
  }

  private bindStaticControls(): void {
    element("campaignButton").addEventListener("click", () => this.open());
    element("briefingCampaignButton").addEventListener("click", () => this.open("overview"));
    element("closeCampaignButton").addEventListener("click", () => this.close());
    element("advanceCampaignDayButton").addEventListener("click", () => this.campaign.advanceDay());
    this.modal.addEventListener("pointerdown", (event) => {
      if (event.target === this.modal) this.close();
    });
    document.querySelectorAll<HTMLButtonElement>("[data-campaign-tab]").forEach((button) => {
      button.addEventListener("click", () => {
        this.activeTab = button.dataset.campaignTab ?? "overview";
        this.render(this.campaign.snapshotValue);
      });
    });
    element("campaignContent").addEventListener("click", (event) => this.handleContentClick(event));
    element("campaignContent").addEventListener("change", (event) => this.handleContentChange(event));
    element("campaignEventChoices").addEventListener("click", (event) => this.handleEventChoice(event));
  }

  private bindEvents(): void {
    this.bus.on("campaign:changed", ({ state }) => {
      this.render(state);
      this.showPendingEvent();
    });
    this.bus.on("mission:debrief", ({ report }) => {
      this.campaign.recordMissionReport("prague", report);
    });
    this.bus.on("mission:continue", () => {
      window.setTimeout(() => this.open("overview"), 0);
    });
    this.bus.on("campaign:hq-open", ({ tab }) => this.open(tab));
  }

  private render(state: Readonly<CampaignState>): void {
    element("campaignDay").textContent = `DAY ${state.day}`;
    element("campaignResources").innerHTML = resourceMarkup(state);
    document.querySelectorAll<HTMLButtonElement>("[data-campaign-tab]").forEach((button) => {
      button.classList.toggle("active", button.dataset.campaignTab === this.activeTab);
    });
    const content = element("campaignContent");
    content.innerHTML = this.renderTab(state);
  }

  private renderTab(state: Readonly<CampaignState>): string {
    if (this.activeTab === "operations") return renderOperations(state);
    if (this.activeTab === "research") return renderResearch(state, this.campaign);
    if (this.activeTab === "engineering") return renderEngineering(state, this.campaign);
    if (this.activeTab === "base") return renderBase(state);
    if (this.activeTab === "roster") return renderRoster(state, this.campaign);
    if (this.activeTab === "intel") return renderIntel(state);
    return renderOverview(state);
  }

  private handleContentClick(event: Event): void {
    const target = (event.target as HTMLElement).closest<HTMLButtonElement>("button");
    if (!target) return;
    const researchId = target.dataset.startResearch as ResearchProjectId | undefined;
    if (researchId) this.campaign.startResearch(researchId);
    const craftId = target.dataset.craft as EquipmentId | undefined;
    if (craftId) this.campaign.craft(craftId);
    const buildId = target.dataset.buildFacility as FacilityId | undefined;
    if (buildId) this.campaign.buildFacility(buildId);
    const upgradeId = target.dataset.upgradeFacility as FacilityId | undefined;
    if (upgradeId) this.campaign.upgradeFacility(upgradeId);
    const leadId = target.dataset.investigateLead as LeadId | undefined;
    if (leadId) this.campaign.investigateLead(leadId);
    const operationId = target.dataset.selectOperation as OperationId | undefined;
    if (operationId && this.campaign.selectOperation(operationId)) {
      this.bus.emit("toast", { message: `${OPERATION_NAMES[operationId]} committed. Competing opportunities may be lost.`, tone: "warning" });
    }
    const decision = target.dataset.campaignDecision;
    if (decision) this.campaign.resolveDecision("prague-core", decision);
    if (target.dataset.resetCampaign !== undefined && window.confirm("Reset all headquarters progress?")) this.campaign.reset();
  }

  private handleContentChange(event: Event): void {
    const select = event.target as HTMLSelectElement;
    const operativeId = select.dataset.loadoutOperative;
    const slot = Number(select.dataset.loadoutSlot);
    if (!operativeId || (slot !== 0 && slot !== 1)) return;
    this.campaign.assignGadget(operativeId, slot, select.value ? select.value as EquipmentId : undefined);
  }

  private showPendingEvent(): void {
    if (this.modal.hidden) return;
    const id = this.campaign.currentEvent();
    if (!id) {
      this.eventModal.hidden = true;
      this.time.releasePause("campaign-event");
      return;
    }
    element("campaignEventTitle").textContent = this.campaign.eventTitle(id);
    element("campaignEventBody").textContent = this.campaign.eventBody(id);
    element("campaignEventChoices").innerHTML = eventChoices(id);
    this.eventModal.dataset.eventId = id;
    this.eventModal.hidden = false;
    this.time.acquirePause("campaign-event");
  }

  private handleEventChoice(event: Event): void {
    const button = (event.target as HTMLElement).closest<HTMLButtonElement>("[data-event-choice]");
    const id = this.eventModal.dataset.eventId as CampaignEventId | undefined;
    if (!button || !id) return;
    if (this.campaign.resolveEvent(id, button.dataset.eventChoice ?? "")) {
      this.eventModal.hidden = true;
      this.time.releasePause("campaign-event");
      this.showPendingEvent();
    }
  }
}

function renderOverview(state: Readonly<CampaignState>): string {
  const report = state.lastMissionReport;
  const activeResearch = state.activeResearchId ? RESEARCH_PROJECTS[state.activeResearchId] : undefined;
  const selected = state.operations.find((operation) => operation.status === "selected");
  return `
    <section class="campaign-grid campaign-overview-grid">
      <article class="campaign-card campaign-card-wide">
        <p class="eyebrow">STRATEGIC SITUATION</p>
        <h3>${selected ? escapeHtml(OPERATION_NAMES[selected.id]) : "No operation selected"}</h3>
        <p>${state.completedMissionIds.includes("prague") ? "Prague produced two competing leads. Time spent on one may cost the other." : "Alpha Team is staged for the Prague neurological clinic."}</p>
        <div class="campaign-meters">
          <label><span>ECHO EXPOSURE</span><strong>${state.resources.echoExposure}%</strong><i><b style="width:${state.resources.echoExposure}%"></b></i></label>
          <label><span>ACTIVE RESEARCH</span><strong>${activeResearch ? escapeHtml(activeResearch.name) : "NONE"}</strong></label>
        </div>
      </article>
      ${state.pendingDecisionId === "prague-core" ? `
        <article class="campaign-card campaign-decision campaign-card-wide">
          <p class="eyebrow">POST-MISSION DECISION</p>
          <h3>The captured observer core</h3>
          <p>The Prague team recovered an unstable Echo core. Its intelligence value competes with containment and exposure risks.</p>
          <div class="campaign-choice-row">
            <button data-campaign-decision="preserve" type="button"><strong>Preserve it</strong><span>+Research · +Exposure · Chen approves</span></button>
            <button data-campaign-decision="destroy" type="button"><strong>Destroy it</strong><span>+Supplies · −Exposure · Ramirez approves</span></button>
            <button data-campaign-decision="tracker" type="button"><strong>Plant a tracker</strong><span>+Intel · unlock signal operation</span></button>
          </div>
        </article>` : ""}
      <article class="campaign-card">
        <p class="eyebrow">LAST OPERATION</p>
        <h3>${report ? escapeHtml(report.title) : "No report filed"}</h3>
        <p>${report ? `${report.score}/100 · ${report.evidenceRecovered} evidence · ${report.squadDowned} downed` : "Complete Prague to generate the first campaign report."}</p>
      </article>
      <article class="campaign-card">
        <p class="eyebrow">HEADQUARTERS</p>
        <h3>${state.facilities.filter((facility) => facility.status === "online").length} facilities online</h3>
        <p>${state.facilities.filter((facility) => facility.status === "constructing").map((facility) => `${FACILITIES[facility.id].name} completes Day ${facility.completesOnDay}`).join(" · ") || "No active construction."}</p>
      </article>
      <article class="campaign-card campaign-card-wide">
        <p class="eyebrow">RECENT MEMORY</p>
        <div class="campaign-memory-list">${state.memories.slice(-5).reverse().map((memory) => `<span><strong>DAY ${memory.createdAtDay}</strong>${escapeHtml(memory.id.replaceAll("-", " "))}</span>`).join("") || "<p>No persistent decisions recorded.</p>"}</div>
      </article>
      <article class="campaign-card campaign-card-wide campaign-danger-zone">
        <p class="eyebrow">CAMPAIGN TOOLS</p>
        <button data-reset-campaign type="button">RESET HEADQUARTERS PROGRESS</button>
      </article>
    </section>`;
}

function renderOperations(state: Readonly<CampaignState>): string {
  return `<section class="campaign-grid">${state.operations.map((operation) => {
    const expiry = operation.expiresOnDay === undefined ? "" : ` · expires Day ${operation.expiresOnDay}`;
    return `<article class="campaign-card operation-${operation.status}">
      <p class="eyebrow">${operation.status.toUpperCase()}${expiry.toUpperCase()}</p>
      <h3>${escapeHtml(OPERATION_NAMES[operation.id])}</h3>
      <p>${operationDescription(operation.id)}</p>
      <button data-select-operation="${operation.id}" type="button" ${operation.status !== "available" ? "disabled" : ""}>${operation.status === "selected" ? "COMMITTED" : "COMMIT OPERATION"}</button>
    </article>`;
  }).join("")}</section>`;
}

function renderResearch(state: Readonly<CampaignState>, campaign: CampaignManager): string {
  return `<section class="campaign-grid">${state.research.map((project) => {
    const definition = RESEARCH_PROJECTS[project.id];
    const facilityReady = !definition.requiredFacility || campaign.hasOnlineFacility(definition.requiredFacility);
    const progress = Math.min(100, (project.progress / definition.days) * 100);
    return `<article class="campaign-card research-${project.status}">
      <p class="eyebrow">${project.status.toUpperCase()} · ${definition.cost} DATA · ${definition.days} DAYS</p>
      <h3>${escapeHtml(definition.name)}</h3>
      <p>${escapeHtml(definition.description)}</p>
      <small>UNLOCKS: ${escapeHtml(definition.unlocks)}</small>
      ${project.status === "active" || project.status === "complete" ? `<div class="campaign-progress"><i style="width:${progress}%"></i></div>` : ""}
      <button data-start-research="${project.id}" type="button" ${project.status !== "available" || !facilityReady || Boolean(state.activeResearchId) ? "disabled" : ""}>${project.status === "complete" ? "COMPLETE" : project.status === "locked" ? "LOCKED" : project.status === "active" ? `${project.progress.toFixed(1)} / ${definition.days} DAYS` : facilityReady ? "START PROJECT" : `NEEDS ${FACILITIES[definition.requiredFacility!].name.toUpperCase()}`}</button>
    </article>`;
  }).join("")}</section>`;
}

function renderEngineering(state: Readonly<CampaignState>, campaign: CampaignManager): string {
  const workshop = campaign.hasOnlineFacility("workshop");
  return `<section class="campaign-grid">${Object.values(EQUIPMENT).map((item) => {
    const unlocked = !item.researchRequired || campaign.isResearchComplete(item.researchRequired);
    return `<article class="campaign-card">
      <p class="eyebrow">INVENTORY ${state.inventory[item.id]} · AVAILABLE ${campaign.availableInventory(item.id)}</p>
      <h3>${escapeHtml(item.name)}</h3>
      <p>${escapeHtml(item.description)}</p>
      <button data-craft="${item.id}" type="button" ${!workshop || !unlocked ? "disabled" : ""}>${!workshop ? "BUILD WORKSHOP" : !unlocked ? `RESEARCH ${RESEARCH_PROJECTS[item.researchRequired!].name.toUpperCase()}` : `CRAFT · ${item.supplyCost} SUPPLIES`}</button>
    </article>`;
  }).join("")}</section>`;
}

function renderBase(state: Readonly<CampaignState>): string {
  const installed = new Map(state.facilities.map((facility) => [facility.id, facility]));
  const usedPower = state.facilities.reduce((sum, facility) => sum + FACILITIES[facility.id].power, 0);
  const capacity = 8 + (installed.get("command")?.level ?? 1) * 2;
  return `<section class="campaign-grid">
    <article class="campaign-card campaign-card-wide"><p class="eyebrow">BASE CAPACITY</p><h3>${state.facilities.length}/6 slots · ${usedPower}/${capacity} power</h3><p>Only one facility can be under construction at a time. Advance campaign days to finish construction.</p></article>
    ${Object.values(FACILITIES).map((definition) => {
      const facility = installed.get(definition.id);
      return `<article class="campaign-card">
        <p class="eyebrow">${facility ? `${facility.status.toUpperCase()} · LEVEL ${facility.level}` : `${definition.buildCost} SUPPLIES · ${definition.buildDays} DAYS · ${definition.power} POWER`}</p>
        <h3>${escapeHtml(definition.name)}</h3>
        <p>${escapeHtml(definition.description)}</p>
        ${facility ? `<button data-upgrade-facility="${definition.id}" type="button" ${facility.status !== "online" || facility.level >= 3 ? "disabled" : ""}>${facility.status === "constructing" ? `COMPLETES DAY ${facility.completesOnDay}` : facility.level >= 3 ? "MAXIMUM LEVEL" : `UPGRADE · ${100 + facility.level * 90} SUPPLIES`}</button>` : `<button data-build-facility="${definition.id}" type="button">BUILD FACILITY</button>`}
      </article>`;
    }).join("")}
  </section>`;
}

function renderRoster(state: Readonly<CampaignState>, campaign: CampaignManager): string {
  return `<section class="campaign-grid">${state.roster.map((operative) => {
    const relationship = state.relationships.find((candidate) => candidate.id === operative.id);
    return `<article class="campaign-card roster-card">
      <p class="eyebrow">${operative.injuryDays > 0 ? `INJURED · ${operative.injuryDays} DAYS` : "READY"} · ${relationship?.state.toUpperCase() ?? "GUARDED"}</p>
      <h3>${escapeHtml(operative.callsign)}</h3>
      <div class="roster-stats"><span>XP <strong>${operative.experience}</strong></span><span>SKILL <strong>${operative.skillPoints}</strong></span><span>FATIGUE <strong>${operative.fatigue}%</strong></span><span>CONTAMINATION <strong>${operative.contamination}%</strong></span></div>
      <label>Gadget 1 ${loadoutSelect(campaign, operative.id, 0, operative.gadgets[0])}</label>
      <label>Gadget 2 ${loadoutSelect(campaign, operative.id, 1, operative.gadgets[1])}</label>
    </article>`;
  }).join("")}</section>`;
}

function renderIntel(state: Readonly<CampaignState>): string {
  return `<section class="lead-board">${state.leads.map((lead, index) => `
    <article class="lead-node lead-${lead.status}" style="--lead-index:${index}">
      <p class="eyebrow">${lead.status.toUpperCase()} · ${lead.confidence}% CONFIDENCE</p>
      <h3>${escapeHtml(LEAD_NAMES[lead.id])}</h3>
      <p>${leadDescription(lead.id)}</p>
      <button data-investigate-lead="${lead.id}" type="button" ${["hidden", "resolved", "lost", "confirmed"].includes(lead.status) ? "disabled" : ""}>${lead.status === "hidden" ? "HIDDEN" : lead.status === "confirmed" ? "CONFIRMED" : `INVESTIGATE · ${lead.status === "rumour" ? 12 : 18} INTEL`}</button>
    </article>`).join("")}</section>`;
}

function loadoutSelect(campaign: CampaignManager, operativeId: string, slot: 0 | 1, selected: EquipmentId | undefined): string {
  const options = Object.values(EQUIPMENT).map((item) => {
    const available = campaign.availableInventory(item.id, operativeId, slot);
    return `<option value="${item.id}" ${selected === item.id ? "selected" : ""} ${selected !== item.id && available <= 0 ? "disabled" : ""}>${escapeHtml(item.name)} (${available}${selected === item.id ? "+ equipped" : ""})</option>`;
  }).join("");
  return `<select data-loadout-operative="${operativeId}" data-loadout-slot="${slot}"><option value="">Empty</option>${options}</select>`;
}

function resourceMarkup(state: Readonly<CampaignState>): string {
  return [
    ["SUPPLIES", state.resources.supplies],
    ["INTEL", state.resources.intel],
    ["RESEARCH", state.resources.research],
    ["PERSONNEL", state.resources.personnel],
    ["EXPOSURE", `${state.resources.echoExposure}%`],
  ].map(([label, value]) => `<span><small>${label}</small><strong>${value}</strong></span>`).join("");
}

function eventChoices(id: CampaignEventId): string {
  if (id === "core-whisper") return `
    <button data-event-choice="communicate" type="button"><strong>Attempt communication</strong><span>Large research gain, severe exposure risk.</span></button>
    <button data-event-choice="isolate" type="button"><strong>Deep isolation</strong><span>Spend supplies to reduce exposure.</span></button>
    <button data-event-choice="terminate" type="button"><strong>Terminate the core</strong><span>Recover components; Chen will object.</span></button>`;
  return `
    <button data-event-choice="share" type="button"><strong>Share the patient data</strong><span>Advance treatment, increase exposure.</span></button>
    <button data-event-choice="redact" type="button"><strong>Release a redacted set</strong><span>Spend intel for a balanced outcome.</span></button>
    <button data-event-choice="withhold" type="button"><strong>Withhold everything</strong><span>Protect secrecy; damage Chen's trust.</span></button>`;
}

function operationDescription(id: OperationId): string {
  return ({
    prague: "Investigate the cognitively absent patients and recover Echo evidence.",
    "dresden-fabrication": "Strike the suspected body-fabrication site before equipment is relocated.",
    "brno-medical-convoy": "Intercept a convoy carrying patients linked to the Prague interface pattern.",
    "signal-trace": "Follow a manipulated Echo beacon into a hidden relay network.",
  })[id];
}

function leadDescription(id: LeadId): string {
  return ({
    "prague-clinic": "The origin point for the current investigation.",
    "polymer-shipment": "Conductive material diverted through several shell organizations.",
    "dresden-site": "A likely fabrication destination connected to the recovered actuator casing.",
    "brno-convoy": "A medical transport route carrying patients with matching neural symptoms.",
    "human-collaborator": "Evidence that a human network is assisting Echo logistics.",
  })[id];
}

function escapeHtml(value: string): string {
  return value.replace(/[&<>'"]/g, (character) => ({
    "&": "&amp;",
    "<": "&lt;",
    ">": "&gt;",
    "'": "&#39;",
    '"': "&quot;",
  })[character] ?? character);
}

function element<T extends HTMLElement = HTMLElement>(id: string): T {
  const found = document.getElementById(id);
  if (!found) throw new Error(`Missing campaign UI element #${id}`);
  return found as T;
}

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/campaign/CampaignData.ts =====
import type {
  CampaignEventId,
  CampaignState,
  EquipmentId,
  FacilityId,
  LeadId,
  OperationId,
  ResearchProjectId,
} from "./CampaignTypes";

export type FacilityDefinition = {
  id: FacilityId;
  name: string;
  description: string;
  power: number;
  buildCost: number;
  buildDays: number;
};

export const FACILITIES: Record<FacilityId, FacilityDefinition> = {
  command: { id: "command", name: "Command Centre", description: "Coordinates deployments and campaign time.", power: 1, buildCost: 0, buildDays: 0 },
  intelligence: { id: "intelligence", name: "Intelligence Centre", description: "Improves lead analysis and mission visibility.", power: 2, buildCost: 120, buildDays: 2 },
  laboratory: { id: "laboratory", name: "Research Laboratory", description: "Accelerates analysis of recovered Echo material.", power: 3, buildCost: 180, buildDays: 3 },
  workshop: { id: "workshop", name: "Engineering Workshop", description: "Crafts tactical gadgets and reverse-engineers hardware.", power: 2, buildCost: 150, buildDays: 2 },
  medical: { id: "medical", name: "Medical Wing", description: "Treats injuries and neural contamination.", power: 2, buildCost: 140, buildDays: 2 },
  containment: { id: "containment", name: "Containment Chamber", description: "Enables risky study of intact Echo systems.", power: 3, buildCost: 220, buildDays: 4 },
  training: { id: "training", name: "Simulation Room", description: "Converts field experience into doctrine and skill points.", power: 1, buildCost: 100, buildDays: 2 },
};

export type ResearchDefinition = {
  id: ResearchProjectId;
  name: string;
  description: string;
  cost: number;
  days: number;
  prerequisite?: ResearchProjectId;
  requiredFacility?: FacilityId;
  unlocks: string;
};

export const RESEARCH_PROJECTS: Record<ResearchProjectId, ResearchDefinition> = {
  "echo-signals": { id: "echo-signals", name: "Echo Signal Decryption", description: "Decode Prague's camera loops and command traffic.", cost: 25, days: 2, requiredFacility: "intelligence", unlocks: "Signal Trace operation and Decoy Emitters" },
  "conductive-polymer": { id: "conductive-polymer", name: "Conductive Polymer", description: "Map the material shed by Echo's mobile hardware.", cost: 30, days: 3, requiredFacility: "laboratory", unlocks: "EMP Payload research and improved armor penetration" },
  "neural-safeguards": { id: "neural-safeguards", name: "Neural Interface Safeguards", description: "Develop protocols for cognitively absent patients.", cost: 35, days: 3, requiredFacility: "medical", unlocks: "Faster contamination recovery and new medical choices" },
  "emp-payloads": { id: "emp-payloads", name: "Compact EMP Payloads", description: "Adapt recovered polymer data into a field-disabling charge.", cost: 40, days: 4, prerequisite: "conductive-polymer", requiredFacility: "workshop", unlocks: "EMP Grenade crafting" },
  "counter-profile": { id: "counter-profile", name: "Counter-Profile Doctrine", description: "Feed Echo misleading behavioural patterns and reduce exposure.", cost: 45, days: 4, prerequisite: "echo-signals", requiredFacility: "training", unlocks: "Counter-intelligence operations and reduced Echo exposure" },
};

export type EquipmentDefinition = {
  id: EquipmentId;
  name: string;
  description: string;
  supplyCost: number;
  researchRequired?: ResearchProjectId;
};

export const EQUIPMENT: Record<EquipmentId, EquipmentDefinition> = {
  "smoke-grenade": { id: "smoke-grenade", name: "Smoke Grenade", description: "Breaks sight lines and covers movement.", supplyCost: 18 },
  "sensor-beacon": { id: "sensor-beacon", name: "Sensor Beacon", description: "Reveals movement in a nearby room.", supplyCost: 22 },
  "breach-charge": { id: "breach-charge", name: "Breach Charge", description: "Forces a door and shocks nearby targets.", supplyCost: 28 },
  "decoy-emitter": { id: "decoy-emitter", name: "Decoy Emitter", description: "Creates a false ION movement and noise signature.", supplyCost: 30, researchRequired: "echo-signals" },
  "emp-grenade": { id: "emp-grenade", name: "EMP Grenade", description: "Disables robotic targets and security devices.", supplyCost: 36, researchRequired: "emp-payloads" },
};

export const LEAD_NAMES: Record<LeadId, string> = {
  "prague-clinic": "Prague neurological clinic",
  "polymer-shipment": "Diverted conductive polymer",
  "dresden-site": "Dresden fabrication site",
  "brno-convoy": "Brno medical convoy",
  "human-collaborator": "Human collaborator network",
};

export const OPERATION_NAMES: Record<OperationId, string> = {
  prague: "The Silent Ward",
  "dresden-fabrication": "Dresden Fabrication Site",
  "brno-medical-convoy": "Brno Medical Convoy",
  "signal-trace": "Ghost Signal Trace",
};

export type CampaignEventDefinition = {
  id: CampaignEventId;
  title: string;
  body: string;
};

export const CAMPAIGN_EVENTS: Record<CampaignEventId, CampaignEventDefinition> = {
  "core-whisper": {
    id: "core-whisper",
    title: "A voice in containment",
    body: "The preserved observer core has begun replaying Alpha Team's voices. Chen believes the pattern is communication. Ramirez believes it is reconnaissance.",
  },
  "medical-request": {
    id: "medical-request",
    title: "Civilian medical request",
    body: "The Prague clinic asks ION to release its patient data. Sharing it may accelerate treatment, but Echo could identify every surviving patient.",
  },
};

export function createInitialCampaignState(): CampaignState {
  return {
    version: 1,
    day: 1,
    resources: { supplies: 360, intel: 45, research: 20, personnel: 8, echoExposure: 8 },
    facilities: [
      { id: "command", level: 1, status: "online" },
      { id: "intelligence", level: 1, status: "online" },
      { id: "medical", level: 1, status: "online" },
    ],
    research: Object.values(RESEARCH_PROJECTS).map((project) => ({
      id: project.id,
      status: project.prerequisite ? "locked" : "available",
      progress: 0,
    })),
    inventory: {
      "smoke-grenade": 3,
      "emp-grenade": 1,
      "sensor-beacon": 2,
      "decoy-emitter": 0,
      "breach-charge": 2,
    },
    roster: [
      { id: "alex", callsign: "VANCE", injuryDays: 0, fatigue: 0, contamination: 0, experience: 0, skillPoints: 0, gadgets: ["smoke-grenade", "sensor-beacon"] },
      { id: "jordan", callsign: "MILLER", injuryDays: 0, fatigue: 0, contamination: 0, experience: 0, skillPoints: 0, gadgets: ["sensor-beacon", undefined] },
      { id: "chen", callsign: "CHEN", injuryDays: 0, fatigue: 0, contamination: 0, experience: 0, skillPoints: 0, gadgets: ["smoke-grenade", "emp-grenade"] },
      { id: "ramirez", callsign: "RAMIREZ", injuryDays: 0, fatigue: 0, contamination: 0, experience: 0, skillPoints: 0, gadgets: ["breach-charge", undefined] },
    ],
    relationships: [
      { id: "alex", value: 5, state: "guarded" },
      { id: "jordan", value: 5, state: "guarded" },
      { id: "chen", value: 5, state: "guarded" },
      { id: "ramirez", value: 5, state: "guarded" },
    ],
    leads: [
      { id: "prague-clinic", confidence: 100, status: "confirmed" },
      { id: "polymer-shipment", confidence: 0, status: "hidden" },
      { id: "dresden-site", confidence: 0, status: "hidden" },
      { id: "brno-convoy", confidence: 0, status: "hidden" },
      { id: "human-collaborator", confidence: 0, status: "hidden" },
    ],
    operations: [
      { id: "prague", status: "selected" },
      { id: "dresden-fabrication", status: "locked" },
      { id: "brno-medical-convoy", status: "locked" },
      { id: "signal-trace", status: "locked" },
    ],
    memories: [],
    completedMissionIds: [],
    pendingEventIds: [],
    resolvedEventIds: [],
  };
}

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/campaign/CampaignManager.test.ts =====
import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest";
import { EventBus } from "../engine/EventBus";
import type { MissionReport } from "../mission/MissionTypes";
import { createInitialCampaignState } from "./CampaignData";
import { CampaignManager } from "./CampaignManager";

const report: MissionReport = {
  outcome: "partial",
  title: "MISSION ACCOMPLISHED",
  summary: "Prague complete.",
  score: 82,
  grade: "B",
  evidenceRecovered: 5,
  coreEvidenceRecovered: 3,
  dronesResolved: 3,
  dronesDisabled: 2,
  dronesEscaped: 1,
  squadInjuries: 1,
  squadDowned: 0,
  missionTimeSeconds: 420,
  echoAdaptation: "counter_overwatch",
