  nextLead: "Dresden",
};

describe("CampaignManager", () => {
  it("turns a tactical report into strategic rewards, leads, injuries, and a decision", () => {
    const campaign = new CampaignManager(new EventBus(), createInitialCampaignState());
    expect(campaign.recordMissionReport("prague", report)).toBe(true);
    const state = campaign.snapshot();

    expect(state.completedMissionIds).toContain("prague");
    expect(state.resources.research).toBeGreaterThan(20);
    expect(state.resources.intel).toBeGreaterThan(45);
    expect(state.pendingDecisionId).toBe("prague-core");
    expect(state.operations.find((operation) => operation.id === "dresden-fabrication")?.status).toBe("available");
    expect(state.roster.some((operative) => operative.injuryDays > 0)).toBe(true);
  });

  it("persists consequence-bearing choices and competing operation commitments", () => {
    const campaign = new CampaignManager(new EventBus(), createInitialCampaignState());
    campaign.recordMissionReport("prague", report);
    expect(campaign.resolveDecision("prague-core", "tracker")).toBe(true);
    expect(campaign.selectOperation("brno-medical-convoy")).toBe(true);
    const state = campaign.snapshot();

    expect(state.pendingDecisionId).toBeUndefined();
    expect(state.operations.find((operation) => operation.id === "signal-trace")?.status).toBe("available");
    expect(state.operations.find((operation) => operation.id === "dresden-fabrication")?.status).toBe("expired");
    expect(state.memories.some((memory) => memory.id === "prague-core-tracked")).toBe(true);
  });

  it("constructs facilities, advances research, and fabricates unlocked equipment", () => {
    const initial = createInitialCampaignState();
    initial.facilities.push({ id: "laboratory", level: 1, status: "online" });
    initial.resources.research = 100;
    const campaign = new CampaignManager(new EventBus(), initial);

    expect(campaign.startResearch("conductive-polymer")).toBe(true);
    campaign.advanceDay();
    campaign.advanceDay();
    campaign.advanceDay();
    expect(campaign.isResearchComplete("conductive-polymer")).toBe(true);

    expect(campaign.buildFacility("workshop")).toBe(true);
    campaign.advanceDay();
    campaign.advanceDay();
    expect(campaign.hasOnlineFacility("workshop")).toBe(true);
    expect(campaign.craft("smoke-grenade")).toBe(true);
    expect(campaign.snapshot().inventory["smoke-grenade"]).toBe(4);
  });
  it("consumes deployed equipment from the operative loadout and inventory", () => {
    const campaign = new CampaignManager(new EventBus(), createInitialCampaignState());
    expect(campaign.consumeAssignedEquipment("chen", "emp-grenade")).toBe(true);
    const state = campaign.snapshot();
    const chen = state.roster.find((operative) => operative.id === "chen");

    expect(state.inventory["emp-grenade"]).toBe(0);
    expect(chen?.gadgets).not.toContain("emp-grenade");
  });

});

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/campaign/CampaignManager.ts =====
import type { EventBus } from "../engine/EventBus";
import type { MissionReport } from "../mission/MissionTypes";
import {
  CAMPAIGN_EVENTS,
  EQUIPMENT,
  FACILITIES,
  RESEARCH_PROJECTS,
  createInitialCampaignState,
} from "./CampaignData";
import type {
  CampaignDecisionId,
  CampaignEventId,
  CampaignState,
  EquipmentId,
  FacilityId,
  LeadId,
  NarrativeMemory,
  OperationId,
  ResearchProjectId,
  RelationshipState,
} from "./CampaignTypes";

const STORAGE_KEY = "echo-tactics.campaign.v1";

export class CampaignManager {
  private state: CampaignState;

  constructor(private readonly bus: EventBus, initialState?: CampaignState) {
    this.state = initialState ? structuredClone(initialState) : this.load();
    this.normalize();
  }

  get snapshotValue(): Readonly<CampaignState> {
    return this.state;
  }

  snapshot(): CampaignState {
    return structuredClone(this.state);
  }

  restore(snapshot: CampaignState | undefined): void {
    if (!snapshot) return;
    this.state = structuredClone(snapshot);
    this.normalize();
    this.persistAndEmit();
  }

  reset(): void {
    this.state = createInitialCampaignState();
    this.persistAndEmit();
  }

  advanceDay(): boolean {
    this.state.day += 1;
    this.processConstruction();
    this.processResearch();
    this.processRecovery();
    this.processDeadlines();
    this.triggerScheduledEvents();
    this.persistAndEmit();
    this.bus.emit("toast", { message: `Campaign advanced to Day ${this.state.day}.`, tone: "info" });
    return true;
  }

  recordMissionReport(missionId: OperationId, report: MissionReport): boolean {
    if (this.state.completedMissionIds.includes(missionId)) return false;
    this.state.completedMissionIds.push(missionId);
    this.state.lastMissionReport = structuredClone(report);
    this.setOperationStatus(missionId, report.outcome === "failure" ? "expired" : "complete");

    const researchReward = report.coreEvidenceRecovered * 12 + Math.max(0, report.evidenceRecovered - report.coreEvidenceRecovered) * 5;
    const intelReward = report.dronesDisabled * 5 + report.dronesEscaped * 2;
    const supplyReward = 80 + report.score;
    this.state.resources.research += researchReward;
    this.state.resources.intel += intelReward;
    this.state.resources.supplies += supplyReward;
    this.state.resources.echoExposure = clamp(
      this.state.resources.echoExposure + report.dronesEscaped * 10 + report.squadDowned * 5 - report.dronesDisabled * 2,
      0,
      100,
    );

    this.state.roster.forEach((operative) => {
      operative.experience += 30 + report.score;
      operative.fatigue = clamp(operative.fatigue + 22, 0, 100);
      if (operative.experience >= (operative.skillPoints + 1) * 100) operative.skillPoints += 1;
    });
    distributeInjuries(this.state, report);

    if (report.outcome !== "failure") {
      this.revealLead("polymer-shipment", 65, "probable");
      this.revealLead("dresden-site", 45, "rumour");
      this.revealLead("brno-convoy", 35, "rumour");
      this.setOperationStatus("dresden-fabrication", "available", this.state.day + 4);
      this.setOperationStatus("brno-medical-convoy", "available", this.state.day + 2);
      this.state.pendingDecisionId = "prague-core";
      this.addMemory({
        id: "prague-operation-complete",
        category: "mission",
        participants: ["alex", "jordan", "chen", "ramirez"],
        value: report.score,
        tags: [report.outcome, report.echoAdaptation],
      });
    }

    this.persistAndEmit();
    return true;
  }

  resolveDecision(decisionId: CampaignDecisionId, choiceId: string): boolean {
    if (this.state.pendingDecisionId !== decisionId) return false;
    if (decisionId === "prague-core") {
      if (choiceId === "preserve") {
        this.state.resources.research += 35;
        this.state.resources.echoExposure = clamp(this.state.resources.echoExposure + 12, 0, 100);
        this.adjustRelationship("chen", 16);
        this.adjustRelationship("ramirez", -8);
        this.addMemory({ id: "prague-core-preserved", category: "ethical", participants: ["chen", "ramirez"], value: 1, tags: ["preserve", "echo-core"] });
        this.queueEvent("core-whisper");
      } else if (choiceId === "destroy") {
        this.state.resources.supplies += 90;
        this.state.resources.echoExposure = clamp(this.state.resources.echoExposure - 8, 0, 100);
        this.adjustRelationship("ramirez", 14);
        this.adjustRelationship("chen", -6);
        this.addMemory({ id: "prague-core-destroyed", category: "ethical", participants: ["chen", "ramirez"], value: -1, tags: ["destroy", "echo-core"] });
      } else if (choiceId === "tracker") {
        this.state.resources.intel += 30;
        this.state.resources.echoExposure = clamp(this.state.resources.echoExposure + 6, 0, 100);
        this.revealLead("human-collaborator", 45, "rumour");
        this.setOperationStatus("signal-trace", "available", this.state.day + 3);
        this.adjustRelationship("jordan", 12);
        this.addMemory({ id: "prague-core-tracked", category: "research", participants: ["jordan"], value: 1, tags: ["tracker", "counter-intelligence"] });
      } else {
        return false;
      }
    }
    this.state.pendingDecisionId = undefined;
    this.persistAndEmit();
    return true;
  }

  buildFacility(id: FacilityId): boolean {
    if (this.state.facilities.some((facility) => facility.id === id)) return false;
    if (this.state.facilities.length >= 6) {
      this.warn("No headquarters facility slot is available.");
      return false;
    }
    if (this.state.facilities.some((facility) => facility.status === "constructing")) {
      this.warn("Only one facility can be constructed at a time.");
      return false;
    }
    const definition = FACILITIES[id];
    if (this.state.resources.supplies < definition.buildCost) {
      this.warn("Insufficient supplies for construction.");
      return false;
    }
    this.state.resources.supplies -= definition.buildCost;
    this.state.facilities.push({
      id,
      level: 1,
      status: "constructing",
      completesOnDay: this.state.day + definition.buildDays,
    });
    this.persistAndEmit();
    return true;
  }

  upgradeFacility(id: FacilityId): boolean {
    const facility = this.state.facilities.find((candidate) => candidate.id === id && candidate.status === "online");
    if (!facility || facility.level >= 3) return false;
    const cost = 100 + facility.level * 90;
    if (this.state.resources.supplies < cost) {
      this.warn("Insufficient supplies for the facility upgrade.");
      return false;
    }
    this.state.resources.supplies -= cost;
    facility.level += 1;
    this.persistAndEmit();
    return true;
  }

  startResearch(id: ResearchProjectId): boolean {
    const project = this.state.research.find((candidate) => candidate.id === id);
    const definition = RESEARCH_PROJECTS[id];
    if (!project || project.status !== "available") return false;
    if (this.state.activeResearchId) {
      this.warn("Another research project is already active.");
      return false;
    }
    if (definition.requiredFacility && !this.hasOnlineFacility(definition.requiredFacility)) {
      this.warn(`${FACILITIES[definition.requiredFacility].name} is required.`);
      return false;
    }
    if (this.state.resources.research < definition.cost) {
      this.warn("Insufficient research data.");
      return false;
    }
    this.state.resources.research -= definition.cost;
    project.status = "active";
    project.progress = 0;
    this.state.activeResearchId = id;
    this.persistAndEmit();
    return true;
  }

  craft(id: EquipmentId): boolean {
    if (!this.hasOnlineFacility("workshop")) {
      this.warn("An online Engineering Workshop is required.");
      return false;
    }
    const definition = EQUIPMENT[id];
    if (definition.researchRequired && !this.isResearchComplete(definition.researchRequired)) {
      this.warn(`${RESEARCH_PROJECTS[definition.researchRequired].name} must be completed first.`);
      return false;
    }
    const workshopLevel = this.facilityLevel("workshop");
    const cost = Math.max(1, definition.supplyCost - Math.max(0, workshopLevel - 1) * 3);
    if (this.state.resources.supplies < cost) {
      this.warn("Insufficient supplies for fabrication.");
      return false;
    }
    this.state.resources.supplies -= cost;
    this.state.inventory[id] += 1;
    this.persistAndEmit();
    return true;
  }

  assignGadget(operativeId: string, slot: 0 | 1, equipmentId: EquipmentId | undefined): boolean {
    const operative = this.state.roster.find((candidate) => candidate.id === operativeId);
    if (!operative) return false;
    if (equipmentId && this.availableInventory(equipmentId, operativeId, slot) <= 0) {
      this.warn(`No unassigned ${EQUIPMENT[equipmentId].name} is available.`);
      return false;
    }
    operative.gadgets[slot] = equipmentId;
    this.persistAndEmit();
    return true;
  }

  consumeAssignedEquipment(operativeId: string, equipmentId: EquipmentId): boolean {
    const operative = this.state.roster.find((candidate) => candidate.id === operativeId);
    if (!operative) return false;
    const slot = operative.gadgets.findIndex((gadget) => gadget === equipmentId);
    if (slot < 0 || this.state.inventory[equipmentId] <= 0) return false;
    operative.gadgets[slot as 0 | 1] = undefined;
    this.state.inventory[equipmentId] = Math.max(0, this.state.inventory[equipmentId] - 1);
    this.persistAndEmit();
    return true;
  }

  investigateLead(id: LeadId): boolean {
    const lead = this.state.leads.find((candidate) => candidate.id === id);
    if (!lead || lead.status === "hidden" || lead.status === "resolved" || lead.status === "lost") return false;
    const cost = lead.status === "rumour" ? 12 : 18;
    if (this.state.resources.intel < cost) {
      this.warn("Insufficient intel to strengthen this lead.");
      return false;
    }
    this.state.resources.intel -= cost;
    lead.confidence = clamp(lead.confidence + 30, 0, 100);
    lead.status = lead.confidence >= 85 ? "confirmed" : lead.confidence >= 50 ? "probable" : "rumour";
    if (id === "dresden-site" && lead.status === "confirmed") this.setOperationStatus("dresden-fabrication", "available", this.state.day + 4);
    if (id === "brno-convoy" && lead.status === "confirmed") this.setOperationStatus("brno-medical-convoy", "available", this.state.day + 2);
    this.persistAndEmit();
    return true;
  }

  selectOperation(id: OperationId): boolean {
    const operation = this.state.operations.find((candidate) => candidate.id === id);
    if (!operation || operation.status !== "available") return false;
    this.state.operations.forEach((candidate) => {
      if (candidate.status === "selected") candidate.status = "available";
    });
    operation.status = "selected";
    if (id === "dresden-fabrication") {
      const competing = this.state.operations.find((candidate) => candidate.id === "brno-medical-convoy");
      if (competing?.status === "available") competing.status = "expired";
      this.adjustRelationship("ramirez", 5);
    }
    if (id === "brno-medical-convoy") {
      const competing = this.state.operations.find((candidate) => candidate.id === "dresden-fabrication");
      if (competing?.status === "available") competing.status = "expired";
      this.adjustRelationship("chen", 8);
    }
    this.addMemory({ id: `operation-selected:${id}`, category: "mission", participants: ["alex"], value: 1, tags: [id] });
    this.persistAndEmit();
    return true;
  }

  resolveEvent(id: CampaignEventId, choiceId: string): boolean {
    if (!this.state.pendingEventIds.includes(id)) return false;
    if (id === "core-whisper") {
      if (choiceId === "communicate") {
        this.state.resources.research += 25;
        this.state.resources.echoExposure = clamp(this.state.resources.echoExposure + 15, 0, 100);
        this.adjustRelationship("chen", 10);
        this.addMemory({ id: "echo-contact-opened", category: "research", participants: ["chen"], value: 1, tags: ["communication", "risk"] });
      } else if (choiceId === "isolate") {
        this.state.resources.supplies -= Math.min(45, this.state.resources.supplies);
        this.state.resources.echoExposure = clamp(this.state.resources.echoExposure - 5, 0, 100);
        this.adjustRelationship("jordan", 7);
      } else if (choiceId === "terminate") {
        this.state.resources.supplies += 45;
        this.adjustRelationship("ramirez", 9);
        this.adjustRelationship("chen", -5);
      } else return false;
    } else if (id === "medical-request") {
      if (choiceId === "share") {
        this.state.resources.research += 20;
        this.state.resources.echoExposure = clamp(this.state.resources.echoExposure + 8, 0, 100);
        this.adjustRelationship("chen", 8);
      } else if (choiceId === "withhold") {
        this.state.resources.intel += 10;
        this.adjustRelationship("chen", -7);
      } else if (choiceId === "redact") {
        this.state.resources.intel = Math.max(0, this.state.resources.intel - 10);
        this.state.resources.research += 10;
        this.adjustRelationship("jordan", 5);
      } else return false;
    }
    this.state.pendingEventIds = this.state.pendingEventIds.filter((eventId) => eventId !== id);
    if (!this.state.resolvedEventIds.includes(id)) this.state.resolvedEventIds.push(id);
    this.persistAndEmit();
    return true;
  }

  currentEvent(): CampaignEventId | undefined {
    return this.state.pendingEventIds[0];
  }

  eventTitle(id: CampaignEventId): string {
    return CAMPAIGN_EVENTS[id].title;
  }

  eventBody(id: CampaignEventId): string {
    return CAMPAIGN_EVENTS[id].body;
  }

  availableInventory(id: EquipmentId, ignoredOperativeId?: string, ignoredSlot?: 0 | 1): number {
    let assigned = 0;
    this.state.roster.forEach((operative) => {
      operative.gadgets.forEach((gadget, slot) => {
        if (operative.id === ignoredOperativeId && slot === ignoredSlot) return;
        if (gadget === id) assigned += 1;
      });
    });
    return Math.max(0, this.state.inventory[id] - assigned);
  }

  isResearchComplete(id: ResearchProjectId): boolean {
    return this.state.research.some((project) => project.id === id && project.status === "complete");
  }

  hasOnlineFacility(id: FacilityId): boolean {
    return this.state.facilities.some((facility) => facility.id === id && facility.status === "online");
  }

  facilityLevel(id: FacilityId): number {
    return this.state.facilities.find((facility) => facility.id === id && facility.status === "online")?.level ?? 0;
  }

  private processConstruction(): void {
    this.state.facilities.forEach((facility) => {
      if (facility.status === "constructing" && (facility.completesOnDay ?? Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY) <= this.state.day) {
        facility.status = "online";
        facility.completesOnDay = undefined;
        this.bus.emit("toast", { message: `${FACILITIES[facility.id].name} is now online.`, tone: "success" });
      }
    });
  }

  private processResearch(): void {
    const activeId = this.state.activeResearchId;
    if (!activeId) return;
    const project = this.state.research.find((candidate) => candidate.id === activeId);
    if (!project) return;
    const speed = 1 + Math.max(0, this.facilityLevel("laboratory") - 1) * 0.25;
    project.progress += speed;
    if (project.progress + 0.001 < RESEARCH_PROJECTS[activeId].days) return;
    project.status = "complete";
    project.progress = RESEARCH_PROJECTS[activeId].days;
    this.state.activeResearchId = undefined;
    this.state.research.forEach((candidate) => {
      const definition = RESEARCH_PROJECTS[candidate.id];
      if (candidate.status === "locked" && definition.prerequisite && this.isResearchComplete(definition.prerequisite)) {
        candidate.status = "available";
      }
    });
    if (activeId === "echo-signals") this.setOperationStatus("signal-trace", "available", this.state.day + 3);
    if (activeId === "counter-profile") this.state.resources.echoExposure = clamp(this.state.resources.echoExposure - 18, 0, 100);
    this.addMemory({ id: `research-complete:${activeId}`, category: "research", participants: ["jordan", "chen"], value: 1, tags: [activeId] });
    this.bus.emit("toast", { message: `Research complete: ${RESEARCH_PROJECTS[activeId].name}.`, tone: "success" });
  }

  private processRecovery(): void {
    const medicalLevel = this.facilityLevel("medical");
    this.state.roster.forEach((operative) => {
      operative.injuryDays = Math.max(0, operative.injuryDays - Math.max(1, medicalLevel));
      operative.fatigue = Math.max(0, operative.fatigue - 16);
      operative.contamination = Math.max(0, operative.contamination - Math.max(2, medicalLevel * 3));
    });
  }

  private processDeadlines(): void {
    this.state.operations.forEach((operation) => {
      if (operation.status === "available" && operation.expiresOnDay !== undefined && operation.expiresOnDay < this.state.day) {
        operation.status = "expired";
        if (operation.id === "brno-medical-convoy") {
          this.adjustRelationship("chen", -8);
          this.state.resources.echoExposure = clamp(this.state.resources.echoExposure + 6, 0, 100);
        }
      }
    });
  }

  private triggerScheduledEvents(): void {
    if (this.state.day >= 3 && this.state.completedMissionIds.includes("prague") && !this.state.resolvedEventIds.includes("medical-request")) {
      this.queueEvent("medical-request");
    }
  }

  private queueEvent(id: CampaignEventId): void {
    if (this.state.resolvedEventIds.includes(id) || this.state.pendingEventIds.includes(id)) return;
    this.state.pendingEventIds.push(id);
  }

  private revealLead(id: LeadId, confidence: number, status: "rumour" | "probable" | "confirmed"): void {
    const lead = this.state.leads.find((candidate) => candidate.id === id);
    if (!lead || lead.status === "resolved") return;
    lead.confidence = Math.max(lead.confidence, confidence);
    lead.status = lead.confidence >= 85 ? "confirmed" : lead.confidence >= 50 ? "probable" : status;
  }

  private setOperationStatus(id: OperationId, status: CampaignState["operations"][number]["status"], expiresOnDay?: number): void {
    const operation = this.state.operations.find((candidate) => candidate.id === id);
    if (!operation) return;
    operation.status = status;
    operation.expiresOnDay = expiresOnDay;
  }

  private adjustRelationship(id: string, amount: number): void {
    const relationship = this.state.relationships.find((candidate) => candidate.id === id);
    if (!relationship) return;
    relationship.value = clamp(relationship.value + amount, -100, 100);
    relationship.state = relationshipLabel(relationship.value);
  }

  private addMemory(input: Omit<NarrativeMemory, "createdAtDay">): void {
    if (this.state.memories.some((memory) => memory.id === input.id)) return;
    this.state.memories.push({ ...input, createdAtDay: this.state.day });
  }

  private normalize(): void {
    const fallback = createInitialCampaignState();
    this.state = {
      ...fallback,
      ...this.state,
      resources: { ...fallback.resources, ...this.state.resources },
      inventory: { ...fallback.inventory, ...this.state.inventory },
      facilities: this.state.facilities ?? fallback.facilities,
      research: this.state.research ?? fallback.research,
      roster: this.state.roster ?? fallback.roster,
      relationships: this.state.relationships ?? fallback.relationships,
      leads: this.state.leads ?? fallback.leads,
      operations: this.state.operations ?? fallback.operations,
      memories: this.state.memories ?? [],
      completedMissionIds: this.state.completedMissionIds ?? [],
      pendingEventIds: this.state.pendingEventIds ?? [],
      resolvedEventIds: this.state.resolvedEventIds ?? [],
    };
    this.state.relationships.forEach((relationship) => { relationship.state = relationshipLabel(relationship.value); });
  }

  private load(): CampaignState {
    try {
      if (typeof localStorage === "undefined") return createInitialCampaignState();
      const raw = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
      return raw ? JSON.parse(raw) as CampaignState : createInitialCampaignState();
    } catch {
      return createInitialCampaignState();
    }
  }

  private persistAndEmit(): void {
    if (typeof localStorage !== "undefined") localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(this.state));
    this.bus.emit("campaign:changed", { state: this.snapshot() });
  }

  private warn(message: string): void {
    this.bus.emit("toast", { message, tone: "warning" });
  }
}

function relationshipLabel(value: number): RelationshipState["state"] {
  if (value >= 60) return "loyal";
  if (value >= 20) return "trusted";
  if (value <= -20) return "strained";
  return "guarded";
}

function distributeInjuries(state: CampaignState, report: MissionReport): void {
  const injuredCount = Math.min(state.roster.length, Math.max(report.squadInjuries, report.squadDowned));
  state.roster.forEach((operative, index) => {
    if (index < injuredCount) operative.injuryDays = Math.max(operative.injuryDays, report.squadDowned > index ? 4 : 2);
  });
}

function clamp(value: number, min: number, max: number): number {
  return Math.max(min, Math.min(max, value));
}

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/campaign/CampaignTypes.ts =====
import type { MissionReport } from "../mission/MissionTypes";

export type CampaignResourceKey = "supplies" | "intel" | "research" | "personnel" | "echoExposure";
export type CampaignResources = Record<CampaignResourceKey, number>;

export type FacilityId = "command" | "intelligence" | "laboratory" | "workshop" | "medical" | "containment" | "training";
export type FacilityState = {
  id: FacilityId;
  level: number;
  status: "online" | "constructing";
  completesOnDay?: number;
};

export type ResearchProjectId =
  | "echo-signals"
  | "conductive-polymer"
  | "neural-safeguards"
  | "emp-payloads"
  | "counter-profile";

export type ResearchProjectState = {
  id: ResearchProjectId;
  status: "available" | "active" | "complete" | "locked";
  progress: number;
};

export type EquipmentId = "smoke-grenade" | "emp-grenade" | "sensor-beacon" | "decoy-emitter" | "breach-charge";
export type InventoryState = Record<EquipmentId, number>;

export type OperativeCampaignState = {
  id: string;
  callsign: string;
  injuryDays: number;
  fatigue: number;
  contamination: number;
  experience: number;
  skillPoints: number;
  gadgets: [EquipmentId | undefined, EquipmentId | undefined];
};

export type RelationshipState = {
  id: string;
  value: number;
  state: "strained" | "guarded" | "trusted" | "loyal";
};

export type LeadId = "prague-clinic" | "polymer-shipment" | "dresden-site" | "brno-convoy" | "human-collaborator";
export type LeadState = {
  id: LeadId;
  confidence: number;
  status: "hidden" | "rumour" | "probable" | "confirmed" | "resolved" | "lost";
};

export type OperationId = "prague" | "dresden-fabrication" | "brno-medical-convoy" | "signal-trace";
export type CampaignOperationState = {
  id: OperationId;
  status: "locked" | "available" | "selected" | "complete" | "expired";
  expiresOnDay?: number;
};

export type NarrativeMemory = {
  id: string;
  category: "mission" | "relationship" | "ethical" | "research" | "failure" | "promise";
  participants: string[];
  value: number;
  tags: string[];
  createdAtDay: number;
};

export type CampaignDecisionId = "prague-core" | "containment-signal";
export type CampaignEventId = "core-whisper" | "medical-request";

export type CampaignState = {
  version: number;
  day: number;
  resources: CampaignResources;
  facilities: FacilityState[];
  research: ResearchProjectState[];
  activeResearchId?: ResearchProjectId;
  inventory: InventoryState;
  roster: OperativeCampaignState[];
  relationships: RelationshipState[];
  leads: LeadState[];
  operations: CampaignOperationState[];
  memories: NarrativeMemory[];
  completedMissionIds: string[];
  pendingDecisionId?: CampaignDecisionId;
  pendingEventIds: CampaignEventId[];
  resolvedEventIds: CampaignEventId[];
  lastMissionReport?: MissionReport;
};

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/combat/HitChance.test.ts =====
import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest";
import { calculateHitChance } from "./HitChance";

describe("calculateHitChance", () => {
  it("penalizes long range, cover, movement, and suppression", () => {
    const clear = calculateHitChance({
      baseAccuracy: 0.8,
      distance: 4,
      weaponRange: 12,
      coverModifier: 0,
      shooterSuppressed: false,
      targetMoving: false,
    });
    const difficult = calculateHitChance({
      baseAccuracy: 0.8,
      distance: 11,
      weaponRange: 12,
      coverModifier: 0.35,
      shooterSuppressed: true,
      targetMoving: true,
    });
    expect(clear).toBeGreaterThan(difficult);
    expect(difficult).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(0.08);
  });
});

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/combat/HitChance.ts =====
export type HitChanceInput = {
  baseAccuracy: number;
  distance: number;
  weaponRange: number;
  coverModifier: number;
  shooterSuppressed: boolean;
  targetMoving: boolean;
  elevationDifference?: number;
};

export function calculateHitChance(input: HitChanceInput): number {
  const rangeRatio = input.weaponRange <= 0 ? 1 : input.distance / input.weaponRange;
  const rangePenalty = rangeRatio <= 0.45 ? 0 : Math.min(0.34, (rangeRatio - 0.45) * 0.48);
  const suppressionPenalty = input.shooterSuppressed ? 0.18 : 0;
  const movementPenalty = input.targetMoving ? 0.12 : 0;
  const elevationBonus = Math.max(-0.08, Math.min(0.08, (input.elevationDifference ?? 0) * 0.035));
  return clamp(
    input.baseAccuracy - rangePenalty - input.coverModifier - suppressionPenalty - movementPenalty + elevationBonus,
    0.08,
    0.95,
  );
}

function clamp(value: number, min: number, max: number): number {
  return Math.max(min, Math.min(max, value));
}

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/commands/AttackCommand.ts =====
import { TacticalCommand, type CommandContext } from "./TacticalCommand";
import type { Agent } from "../entities/Agent";
import type { Enemy } from "../entities/Enemy";
import { FIRE_MODES, type FireMode } from "../tactical/TacticalTypes";

export class AttackCommand extends TacticalCommand {
  private elapsed = 0;
  private movingToShot = false;

  constructor(agent: Agent, readonly target: Enemy, readonly fireMode: FireMode = "standard", syncGroupId?: string) {
    super(agent, `${FIRE_MODES[fireMode].label} fire: ${target.kind}`, syncGroupId);
  }

  begin(context: CommandContext): void {
    if (this.status !== "queued" || this.agent.downed || this.target.disabled) {
      this.fail("Target unavailable");
      return;
    }
    if (["pinned", "broken"].includes(this.agent.suppressionState)) {
      this.fail(`${this.agent.suppressionState} agents cannot attack`);
      return;
    }
    this.agent.overwatch = false;
    const estimate = context.combat.estimateAttack(this.agent, this.target, this.fireMode);
    if (!estimate.blocked && estimate.distance <= this.agent.weaponRange) {
      context.navigation.stopAgent(this.agent);
      this.status = "active";
      return;
    }

    const firingPosition = context.combat.findFiringPosition(this.agent, this.target);
    if (!firingPosition || !context.navigation.moveAgent(this.agent, firingPosition)) {
      this.fail(estimate.blocked ? "No reachable firing position" : "Target out of range");
      return;
    }
    context.cover.release(this.agent);
    this.movingToShot = true;
    this.status = "active";
  }

  update(context: CommandContext, deltaSeconds: number): void {
    if (this.status !== "active") return;
    if (this.target.disabled) {
      this.status = "complete";
      return;
    }
    if (["pinned", "broken"].includes(this.agent.suppressionState)) {
      this.fail(`Attack interrupted: ${this.agent.suppressionState}`);
      return;
    }

    if (this.movingToShot) {
      const estimate = context.combat.estimateAttack(this.agent, this.target, this.fireMode);
      if (!estimate.blocked && estimate.distance <= this.agent.weaponRange) {
        context.navigation.stopAgent(this.agent);
        this.movingToShot = false;
      } else {
        return;
      }
    }

    this.elapsed += deltaSeconds;
    faceTarget(this.agent, this.target);
    if (this.elapsed < FIRE_MODES[this.fireMode].aimSeconds) return;
    const result = context.combat.performAttack(this.agent, this.target, false, this.fireMode);
    if (result.executed) this.status = "complete";
    else this.fail(result.reason ?? "Attack failed");
  }
}

function faceTarget(agent: Agent, target: Enemy): void {
  const delta = target.root.position.subtract(agent.root.position);
  agent.root.rotation.y = Math.atan2(delta.x, delta.z);
}

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/commands/DoorCommand.ts =====
import type { Agent } from "../entities/Agent";
import type { DoorAction } from "../tactical/TacticalTypes";
import { doorInteractionPoint, type DoorRuntime } from "../systems/DoorSystem";
import { TacticalCommand, type CommandContext } from "./TacticalCommand";

export class DoorCommand extends TacticalCommand {
  readonly destination;
  readonly previewKind = "interact" as const;
  private working = false;
  private elapsed = 0;

  constructor(agent: Agent, readonly door: DoorRuntime, readonly action: DoorAction, syncGroupId?: string) {
    super(agent, `${action} ${door.label}`, syncGroupId);
    this.destination = doorInteractionPoint(door, agent.root.position);
  }

  begin(context: CommandContext): void {
    const validation = context.doors.canUse(this.agent, this.door, this.action);
    if (!validation.allowed) {
      this.fail(validation.reason ?? "Door action unavailable");
      return;
    }
    this.agent.overwatch = false;
    if (context.navigation.moveAgent(this.agent, this.destination)) this.status = "active";
    else this.fail("Door unreachable");
  }

  update(context: CommandContext, deltaSeconds: number): void {
    if (this.status !== "active") return;
    const position = context.navigation.getAgentPosition(this.agent);
    if (!this.working) {
      if (Math.hypot(position.x - this.destination.x, position.z - this.destination.z) > 0.85) return;
      context.navigation.stopAgent(this.agent);
      this.working = true;
    }
    this.elapsed += deltaSeconds;
    if (this.elapsed < context.doors.duration(this.action)) return;
    this.status = context.doors.complete(this.agent, this.door, this.action) ? "complete" : "failed";
  }
}

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/commands/GadgetCommand.ts =====
import { Vector3 } from "@babylonjs/core";
import type { Agent } from "../entities/Agent";
import type { GadgetId } from "../tactical/TacticalTypes";
import { TacticalCommand, type CommandContext } from "./TacticalCommand";

export class GadgetCommand extends TacticalCommand {
  private elapsed = 0;
  readonly destination: Vector3;
  readonly previewKind = "gadget" as const;

  constructor(agent: Agent, readonly gadgetId: GadgetId, destination: Vector3, syncGroupId?: string) {
    super(agent, `Deploy ${gadgetId.toUpperCase()}`, syncGroupId);
    this.destination = destination.clone();
  }

  begin(context: CommandContext): void {
    if (this.agent.downed || this.agent.gadgetCharges[this.gadgetId] <= 0) {
      this.fail(`${this.gadgetId.toUpperCase()} unavailable`);
      return;
    }
    context.navigation.stopAgent(this.agent);
    this.status = "active";
  }

  update(context: CommandContext, deltaSeconds: number): void {
    if (this.status !== "active") return;
    this.elapsed += deltaSeconds;
    const delta = this.destination.subtract(this.agent.root.position);
    this.agent.root.rotation.y = Math.atan2(delta.x, delta.z);
    if (this.elapsed < 0.55) return;
    this.status = context.gadgets.deploy(this.agent, this.gadgetId, this.destination, context.combat.simulationTime)
      ? "complete"
      : "failed";
  }
}

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/commands/InteractionCommand.ts =====
import { Vector3 } from "@babylonjs/core";
import type { Agent } from "../entities/Agent";
import type { InteractableRuntime } from "../investigation/InvestigationTypes";
import type { InvestigationSystem } from "../systems/InvestigationSystem";
import { TacticalCommand, type CommandContext } from "./TacticalCommand";

export class InteractionCommand extends TacticalCommand {
  readonly previewKind = "interact" as const;
  readonly destination: Vector3;
  private working = false;
  private elapsed = 0;

  constructor(
    agent: Agent,
    readonly target: InteractableRuntime,
    private readonly investigation: InvestigationSystem,
    syncGroupId?: string,
  ) {
    super(agent, `${verb(target.kind)} ${target.label}`, syncGroupId);
    this.destination = target.interactionPoint.clone();
  }

  begin(context: CommandContext): void {
    if (this.status !== "queued" || this.agent.downed || !this.investigation.canAgentUse(this.agent, this.target).allowed) {
      this.fail("Interaction unavailable");
      return;
    }
    context.cover.release(this.agent);
    this.agent.overwatch = false;
    const accepted = context.navigation.moveAgent(this.agent, this.destination);
    if (accepted) this.status = "active";
    else this.fail("Interaction point unreachable");
  }

  update(context: CommandContext, deltaSeconds: number): void {
    if (this.status !== "active") return;
    if (!this.investigation.canAgentUse(this.agent, this.target).allowed && !this.working) {
      this.fail("Interaction became unavailable");
      return;
    }
    const position = context.navigation.getAgentPosition(this.agent);
    const distance = Math.hypot(position.x - this.destination.x, position.z - this.destination.z);
    if (!this.working) {
      if (distance > 0.7) return;
      context.navigation.stopAgent(this.agent);
      this.working = true;
      face(this.agent, this.target.position);
    }

    this.elapsed += deltaSeconds;
    const progress = this.elapsed / Math.max(0.25, this.target.duration);
    this.investigation.reportProgress(this.agent, this.target, progress);
    if (progress >= 1) {
      this.status = this.investigation.complete(this.agent, this.target) ? "complete" : "failed";
    }
  }
}

function verb(kind: InteractableRuntime["kind"]): string {
  return ({
    examine: "Examine",
    scan: "Scan",
    collect: "Collect",
    hack: "Hack",
    restore: "Restore",
    download: "Download",
    recover: "Recover",
  })[kind];
}

function face(agent: Agent, point: Vector3): void {
  const delta = point.subtract(agent.root.position);
  agent.root.rotation.y = Math.atan2(delta.x, delta.z);
}

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/commands/MoveCommand.ts =====
import { Vector3 } from "@babylonjs/core";
import { TacticalCommand, type CommandContext } from "./TacticalCommand";
import type { Agent } from "../entities/Agent";
import { MOVEMENT_STANCES, type MovementStance } from "../tactical/TacticalTypes";

export class MoveCommand extends TacticalCommand {
  private readonly arrivalRadius = 0.35;
  readonly previewKind = "move" as const;

  constructor(
    agent: Agent,
    readonly destination: Vector3,
    readonly sequenceNumber: number,
    readonly stance: MovementStance = "tactical",
    readonly finalFacing?: number,
    syncGroupId?: string,
  ) {
    super(agent, `${MOVEMENT_STANCES[stance].label} move to ${formatPoint(destination)}`, syncGroupId);
  }

  begin(context: CommandContext): void {
    if (this.status !== "queued" || this.agent.downed || this.agent.suppressionState === "broken") {
      this.fail(this.agent.suppressionState === "broken" ? "Agent is broken" : "Agent unavailable");
      return;
    }
    context.cover.release(this.agent);
    this.agent.overwatch = false;
    this.agent.movementStance = this.stance;
    context.navigation.setEntitySpeed(this.agent, 4.3 * MOVEMENT_STANCES[this.stance].speedMultiplier);
    const accepted = context.navigation.moveAgent(this.agent, this.destination);
    if (accepted) {
      this.status = "active";
      context.combat.createMovementNoise(this.agent, MOVEMENT_STANCES[this.stance].noiseMultiplier);
    } else {
      context.navigation.setEntitySpeed(this.agent, 4.3);
      this.fail("Destination unreachable");
    }
  }

  update(context: CommandContext, _deltaSeconds: number): void {
    if (this.status !== "active") return;
    if (this.agent.suppressionState === "pinned" || this.agent.suppressionState === "broken") {
      context.navigation.stopAgent(this.agent);
      context.navigation.setEntitySpeed(this.agent, 4.3);
      this.fail(this.agent.suppressionState === "pinned" ? "Pinned by suppressive fire" : "Agent broke under fire");
      return;
    }
    const position = context.navigation.getAgentPosition(this.agent);
    const planarDistance = Math.hypot(position.x - this.destination.x, position.z - this.destination.z);

    if (planarDistance <= this.arrivalRadius) {
      context.navigation.stopAgent(this.agent);
      context.navigation.setEntitySpeed(this.agent, 4.3);
      if (this.finalFacing !== undefined) this.agent.root.rotation.y = this.finalFacing;
      this.status = "complete";
    }
  }
  override cancel(context: CommandContext): void {
    context.navigation.setEntitySpeed(this.agent, 4.3);
    super.cancel(context);
  }
}

function formatPoint(point: Vector3): string {
  return `${point.x.toFixed(1)}, ${point.z.toFixed(1)}`;
}

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/commands/OverwatchCommand.ts =====
import { TacticalCommand, type CommandContext } from "./TacticalCommand";
import type { Agent } from "../entities/Agent";

export class OverwatchCommand extends TacticalCommand {
  constructor(
    agent: Agent,
    readonly yaw: number,
    readonly arc = Math.PI * 0.52,
    readonly range = agent.weaponRange,
    syncGroupId?: string,
  ) {
    super(agent, `Overwatch ${Math.round((arc * 180) / Math.PI)}° cone`, syncGroupId);
  }

  begin(context: CommandContext): void {
    if (this.status !== "queued" || this.agent.downed || this.agent.ammo <= 0 || ["pinned", "broken"].includes(this.agent.suppressionState)) {
      this.fail("Overwatch unavailable");
      return;
    }
    context.navigation.stopAgent(this.agent);
    this.agent.root.rotation.y = this.yaw;
    context.combat.setOverwatch(this.agent, this.yaw, this.arc, this.range);
    this.status = "complete";
  }

  update(_context: CommandContext, _deltaSeconds: number): void {}
}

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/commands/ReloadCommand.ts =====
import { TacticalCommand, type CommandContext } from "./TacticalCommand";
import type { Agent } from "../entities/Agent";

export class ReloadCommand extends TacticalCommand {
  private elapsed = 0;

  constructor(agent: Agent, syncGroupId?: string) {
    super(agent, "Reload weapon", syncGroupId);
  }

  begin(context: CommandContext): void {
    if (this.status !== "queued" || this.agent.downed || this.agent.ammo >= this.agent.magazineSize) {
      this.status = "failed";
      return;
    }
    context.navigation.stopAgent(this.agent);
    this.agent.overwatch = false;
    this.status = "active";
  }

  update(_context: CommandContext, deltaSeconds: number): void {
    if (this.status !== "active") return;
    this.elapsed += deltaSeconds;
    if (this.elapsed >= 1.25) {
      this.agent.ammo = this.agent.magazineSize;
      this.status = "complete";
    }
  }
}

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/commands/StabilizeCommand.ts =====
import { TacticalCommand, type CommandContext } from "./TacticalCommand";
import type { Agent } from "../entities/Agent";

export class StabilizeCommand extends TacticalCommand {
  private elapsed = 0;
  private moving = false;

  constructor(
    agent: Agent,
    readonly target: Agent,
    syncGroupId?: string,
  ) {
    super(agent, `Stabilize ${target.definition.callsign}`, syncGroupId);
  }

  begin(context: CommandContext): void {
    if (this.status !== "queued" || this.agent.downed || !this.target.downed) {
      this.fail("Teammate is not available for stabilization");
      return;
    }
    this.agent.overwatch = false;
    const distance = planarDistance(this.agent, this.target);
    if (distance > 2.4) {
      const destination = context.navigation.closestPoint(this.target.root.position);
      if (!context.navigation.moveAgent(this.agent, destination)) {
        this.fail("Cannot reach downed teammate");
        return;
      }
      context.cover.release(this.agent);
      this.moving = true;
    } else {
      context.navigation.stopAgent(this.agent);
    }
    this.status = "active";
  }

  update(context: CommandContext, deltaSeconds: number): void {
    if (this.status !== "active") return;
    if (!this.target.downed) {
      this.status = "complete";
      return;
    }
    if (this.moving) {
      if (planarDistance(this.agent, this.target) > 2.25) return;
      context.navigation.stopAgent(this.agent);
      this.moving = false;
    }
    this.elapsed += deltaSeconds;
    if (this.elapsed >= 1.5) {
      this.target.stabilize();
      this.status = "complete";
    }
  }
}

function planarDistance(a: Agent, b: Agent): number {
  return Math.hypot(a.root.position.x - b.root.position.x, a.root.position.z - b.root.position.z);
}

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/commands/TacticalCommand.ts =====
import type { Agent } from "../entities/Agent";
import type { CombatSystem } from "../systems/CombatSystem";
import type { CoverSystem } from "../systems/CoverSystem";
import type { NavigationSystem } from "../systems/NavigationSystem";
import type { GadgetSystem } from "../systems/GadgetSystem";
import type { DoorSystem } from "../systems/DoorSystem";

export type CommandStatus = "queued" | "active" | "complete" | "failed" | "cancelled";

export type CommandContext = {
  navigation: NavigationSystem;
  cover: CoverSystem;
  combat: CombatSystem;
  gadgets: GadgetSystem;
  doors: DoorSystem;
};

export abstract class TacticalCommand {
  readonly id = crypto.randomUUID();
  status: CommandStatus = "queued";
  readonly createdAt = performance.now();
  failureReason?: string;

  constructor(
    readonly agent: Agent,
    readonly label: string,
    readonly syncGroupId?: string,
  ) {}

  abstract begin(context: CommandContext): void;
  abstract update(context: CommandContext, deltaSeconds: number): void;

  protected fail(reason: string): void {
    this.failureReason = reason;
    this.status = "failed";
  }

  cancel(context: CommandContext): void {
    if (this.status === "complete" || this.status === "cancelled") return;
    this.status = "cancelled";
    context.navigation.stopAgent(this.agent);
  }
}

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/commands/TakeCoverCommand.ts =====
import { TacticalCommand, type CommandContext } from "./TacticalCommand";
import type { Agent } from "../entities/Agent";
import type { CoverPoint } from "../systems/CoverSystem";

export class TakeCoverCommand extends TacticalCommand {
  readonly destination;
  readonly previewKind = "cover" as const;

  constructor(
    agent: Agent,
    readonly coverPoint: CoverPoint,
    readonly sequenceNumber: number,
    syncGroupId?: string,
  ) {
    super(agent, `Take ${coverPoint.height} cover`, syncGroupId);
    this.destination = coverPoint.position.clone();
  }

  begin(context: CommandContext): void {
    if (this.status !== "queued" || this.agent.downed) {
      context.cover.releaseReservation(this.agent, this.coverPoint);
      this.fail("Agent unavailable");
      return;
    }
    if (!context.cover.reserve(this.agent, this.coverPoint)) {
      context.cover.releaseReservation(this.agent, this.coverPoint);
      this.fail("Cover position occupied");
      return;
    }
    context.cover.release(this.agent);
    this.agent.overwatch = false;
    if (context.navigation.moveAgent(this.agent, this.destination)) this.status = "active";
    else {
      context.cover.releaseReservation(this.agent, this.coverPoint);
      this.fail("Cover position unreachable");
    }
  }

  override cancel(context: CommandContext): void {
    context.cover.releaseReservation(this.agent, this.coverPoint);
    super.cancel(context);
  }

  update(context: CommandContext, _deltaSeconds: number): void {
    if (this.status !== "active") return;
    const position = context.navigation.getAgentPosition(this.agent);
    if (Math.hypot(position.x - this.destination.x, position.z - this.destination.z) <= 0.4) {
      context.navigation.stopAgent(this.agent);
      context.cover.assign(this.agent, this.coverPoint);
      this.status = "complete";
    }
  }
}

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/data/dialogue/pragueDialogue.ts =====
import type { DialogueDefinition } from "../../dialogue/DialogueTypes";

export const pragueDialogue: DialogueDefinition[] = [
  {
    id: "prague_arrival",
    once: true,
    lines: [
      { id: "a1", speaker: "blackthorn", expression: "cold", text: "Alpha Team, the clinic has been dark for forty-eight minutes. Recover physical evidence and identify the cause of the outage." },

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/engine/EngineFactory.ts =====
import { Engine, WebGPUEngine, type AbstractEngine } from "@babylonjs/core";

export type EngineResult = {
  engine: AbstractEngine;
  renderer: "WebGPU" | "WebGL 2" | "WebGL";
};

export class EngineFactory {
  static async create(canvas: HTMLCanvasElement): Promise<EngineResult> {
    const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
    const requestWebGPU = params.get("webgpu") === "1";

    if (requestWebGPU && "gpu" in navigator && (await WebGPUEngine.IsSupportedAsync)) {
      try {
        const engine = new WebGPUEngine(canvas, {
          antialias: true,
          adaptToDeviceRatio: true,
        });
        await engine.initAsync();
        return { engine, renderer: "WebGPU" };
      } catch (error) {
        console.warn("WebGPU initialization failed; falling back to WebGL.", error);
      }
    }

    const engine = new Engine(canvas, true, {
      preserveDrawingBuffer: false,
      stencil: true,
      antialias: true,
      adaptToDeviceRatio: true,
      powerPreference: "high-performance",
    });

    return {
      engine,
      renderer: engine.webGLVersion >= 2 ? "WebGL 2" : "WebGL",
    };
  }
}

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/engine/EventBus.ts =====
import type { Vector3 } from "@babylonjs/core";
import type { EnemyKind, EnemyState } from "../entities/Enemy";
import type { EvidenceCategory } from "../investigation/InvestigationTypes";
import type { EchoMetrics } from "../systems/EchoObserverSystem";
import type { MissionObjectiveStep, MissionReport, PragueMissionStage } from "../mission/MissionTypes";
import type { SaveSlotId } from "../save/SaveGameManager";
import type { CampaignState } from "../campaign/CampaignTypes";

export type GameEventMap = {
  "selection:changed": { agentIds: string[] };
  "command:queued": { agentId: string; commandType: string; append: boolean };
  "commands:cleared": { agentId: string; count: number };
  "command:removed": { agentId: string; commandId: string };
  "command:reordered": { agentId: string; commandId: string; direction: -1 | 1 };
  "interaction:progress": { interactionId: string; agentId: string; label: string; progress: number };
  "interaction:completed": { interactionId: string; agentId: string; evidenceId?: string; dialogueId?: string };
  "interaction:corrupted": { interactionId: string; label: string };
  "evidence:collected": { evidenceId: string; title: string; category: EvidenceCategory; agentId: string; interpretation: string; core: boolean };
  "security:disabled": { sensorId: string };
  "dialogue:play": { dialogueId: string };
  "dialogue:choice": { dialogueId: string; choiceId: string; effects: string[] };
  "echo:encounter-start": { adaptation: "isolation" | "counter_overwatch" | "security_escalation" | "data_denial" | "observation" };
  "echo:adaptation": { adaptation: "isolation" | "counter_overwatch" | "security_escalation" | "data_denial" | "observation"; summary: string };
  "echo:profile-changed": { metrics: EchoMetrics };
  "echo:profile-tier": { tier: "profiling" | "prediction" | "adaptation"; confidence: number };
  "combat:attack": { attackerId: string; targetId: string; attackerTeam: "ion" | "echo"; targetTeam: "ion" | "echo"; hit: boolean; damage: number; overwatch: boolean };
  "commands:changed": { agentId?: string };
  "time:changed": { state: "running" | "slow" | "paused"; scale: number };
  "toast": { message: string; tone?: "info" | "success" | "warning" };
  "objective:reached": { objectiveId: string };
  "combat:log": { message: string; tone?: "info" | "success" | "warning" | "danger" };
  "combat:changed": Record<string, never>;
  "ability:used": { agentId: string; abilityId: string; label: string };
  "ability:changed": Record<string, never>;
  "noise:created": { position: Vector3; radius: number; sourceTeam: "ion" | "echo" };
  "enemy:discovered": { enemyId: string; kind: EnemyKind };
  "enemy:disabled": { enemyId: string };
  "enemy:escaped": { enemyId: string };
  "enemy:state": { enemyId: string; state: EnemyState };
  "agent:downed": { agentId: string };
  "room:revealed": { roomId: string; roomName: string };
  "security:alarm": { sensorId: string };
  "alert:changed": { level: "CLEAR" | "SUSPICIOUS" | "HOSTILE" };
  "mission:start": Record<string, never>;
  "mission:stage-changed": { stage: PragueMissionStage };
  "mission:objectives": { steps: MissionObjectiveStep[] };
  "mission:debrief": { report: MissionReport };
  "mission:continue": Record<string, never>;
  "command:completed": { agentId: string; commandId: string; commandType: string; status: string; label: string };
  "checkpoint:requested": { id: string; label: string };
  "save:completed": { slot: SaveSlotId; checkpoint: string };
  "save:loaded": { slot: SaveSlotId; checkpoint: string };
  "dialogue:opened": { dialogueId: string };
  "dialogue:closed": Record<string, never>;
  "gadget:deployed": { agentId: string; gadgetId: "smoke" | "emp"; position: Vector3 };
  "door:changed": { doorId: string; state: "open" | "closed" | "locked" | "breached"; action: "open" | "close" | "lock" | "hack" | "breach"; agentId: string };
  "sync:changed": { groupId: string; state: "planning" | "released" | "cancelled" | "complete" };
  "campaign:changed": { state: CampaignState };
  "campaign:hq-open": { tab?: string };
};

type Handler<T> = (payload: T) => void;

export class EventBus {
  private readonly handlers = new Map<keyof GameEventMap, Set<Handler<never>>>();

  on<K extends keyof GameEventMap>(event: K, handler: Handler<GameEventMap[K]>): () => void {
    const set = this.handlers.get(event) ?? new Set<Handler<never>>();
    set.add(handler as Handler<never>);
    this.handlers.set(event, set);
    return () => set.delete(handler as Handler<never>);
  }

  emit<K extends keyof GameEventMap>(event: K, payload: GameEventMap[K]): void {
    this.handlers.get(event)?.forEach((handler) => handler(payload as never));
  }
}

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/engine/RandomService.test.ts =====
import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest";
import { RandomService } from "./RandomService";

describe("RandomService", () => {
  it("replays the same deterministic sequence for the same seed", () => {
    const first = new RandomService(12345);
    const second = new RandomService(12345);
    expect([first.next(), first.next(), first.next()]).toEqual([second.next(), second.next(), second.next()]);
  });

  it("continues from a restored snapshot", () => {
    const random = new RandomService(9876);
    random.next();
    const snapshot = random.snapshot();
    const expected = random.next();
    const restored = new RandomService(1);
    restored.restore(snapshot);
    expect(restored.next()).toBe(expected);
  });
});

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/engine/RandomService.ts =====
export type RandomSnapshot = { seed: number; state: number };

/** Deterministic xorshift32 random source used by the tactical simulation. */
export class RandomService {
  private state: number;

  constructor(readonly seed = createSeed()) {
    this.state = normalizeSeed(seed);
  }

  next(): number {
    let value = this.state | 0;
    value ^= value << 13;
    value ^= value >>> 17;
    value ^= value << 5;
    this.state = value >>> 0;
    return this.state / 0x1_0000_0000;
  }

  range(min: number, max: number): number {
    return min + (max - min) * this.next();
  }

  integer(min: number, maxInclusive: number): number {
    return Math.floor(this.range(min, maxInclusive + 1));
  }

  pick<T>(values: readonly T[]): T | undefined {
    return values.length === 0 ? undefined : values[this.integer(0, values.length - 1)];
  }

  snapshot(): RandomSnapshot {
    return { seed: this.seed, state: this.state };
  }

  restore(snapshot: RandomSnapshot): void {
    this.state = normalizeSeed(snapshot.state || snapshot.seed);
  }
}

function createSeed(): number {
  if (typeof window !== "undefined" && typeof window.location !== "undefined") {
    const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
    const supplied = Number(params.get("seed"));
    if (Number.isFinite(supplied) && supplied !== 0) return supplied >>> 0;
  }
  return (Date.now() ^ Math.floor(performance.now() * 1000)) >>> 0;
}

function normalizeSeed(seed: number): number {
  const normalized = seed >>> 0;
  return normalized === 0 ? 0x6d2b79f5 : normalized;
}

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/engine/TimeManager.ts =====
import type { RecastJSPlugin } from "@babylonjs/core";
import type { EventBus } from "./EventBus";

export type TimeState = "running" | "slow" | "paused";

export class TimeManager {
  private state: TimeState = "running";
  private lastActiveState: Exclude<TimeState, "paused"> = "running";
  private navigationPlugin?: RecastJSPlugin;
  private readonly pauseLocks = new Set<string>();

  constructor(
    private readonly bus: EventBus,
    private readonly slowScale = 0.25,
  ) {}

  attachNavigation(plugin: RecastJSPlugin): void {
    this.navigationPlugin = plugin;
    this.applyScale();
  }

  get currentState(): TimeState {
    return this.state;
  }

  get scale(): number {
    if (this.state === "paused" || this.pauseLocks.size > 0) return 0;
    return this.state === "slow" ? this.slowScale : 1;
  }

  get isModalPaused(): boolean {
    return this.pauseLocks.size > 0;
  }

  acquirePause(reason: string): void {
    const before = this.scale;
    this.pauseLocks.add(reason);
    if (before !== this.scale) this.emitChanged();
  }

  releasePause(reason: string): void {
    const before = this.scale;
    this.pauseLocks.delete(reason);
    if (before !== this.scale) this.emitChanged();
  }

  togglePause(): void {
    if (this.pauseLocks.size > 0) return;
    if (this.state === "paused") {
      this.setState(this.lastActiveState);
      return;
    }
    this.lastActiveState = this.state;
    this.setState("paused");
  }

  toggleSlowMotion(): void {
    if (this.pauseLocks.size > 0) return;
    if (this.state === "paused") {
      this.lastActiveState = this.lastActiveState === "slow" ? "running" : "slow";
      this.bus.emit("toast", {
        message: `Resume speed set to ${this.lastActiveState === "slow" ? "0.25×" : "1×"}.`,
      });
      return;
    }
    this.setState(this.state === "slow" ? "running" : "slow");
  }

  setState(next: TimeState): void {
    if (this.state === next) return;
    this.state = next;
    if (next !== "paused") this.lastActiveState = next;
    this.emitChanged();
  }

  private emitChanged(): void {
    this.applyScale();
    this.bus.emit("time:changed", {
      state: this.scale === 0 ? "paused" : this.state,
      scale: this.scale,
    });
  }

  private applyScale(): void {
    if (this.navigationPlugin) this.navigationPlugin.timeFactor = this.scale;
  }
}

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/entities/Agent.test.ts =====
import { Color3, NullEngine, Scene, Vector3 } from "@babylonjs/core";
import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest";
import { Agent } from "./Agent";

function createAgent(): { engine: NullEngine; scene: Scene; agent: Agent } {
  const engine = new NullEngine();
  const scene = new Scene(engine);
  const agent = new Agent({
    id: "test",
    callsign: "TEST",
    role: "QA",
    color: new Color3(0.2, 0.8, 1),
    position: Vector3.Zero(),
    shortcut: "1",
    weaponId: "commandRifle",
  }, scene);
  return { engine, scene, agent };
}

describe("Agent visual modes", () => {
  it("shows exactly one character visual root while preserving gameplay selection", () => {
    const { engine, scene, agent } = createAgent();
    expect(agent.proceduralVisualRoot.isEnabled()).toBe(true);
    expect(agent.externalVisualRoot.isEnabled()).toBe(false);

    agent.setVisualMode("external");
    expect(agent.visualMode).toBe("external");
    expect(agent.proceduralVisualRoot.isEnabled()).toBe(false);
    expect(agent.externalVisualRoot.isEnabled()).toBe(true);

    agent.setSelected(true);
    expect(agent.selectionRing.isEnabled()).toBe(true);
    scene.dispose();
    engine.dispose();
  });

  it("uses animation-driven downed poses for external models and fallback rotation otherwise", () => {
    const { engine, scene, agent } = createAgent();
    agent.setVisualMode("external");
    agent.setDowned(true);
    expect(agent.root.rotation.z).toBe(0);

    agent.setDowned(false);
    agent.setVisualMode("procedural");
    agent.setDowned(true);
    expect(agent.root.rotation.z).toBeCloseTo(Math.PI / 2);

    scene.dispose();
    engine.dispose();
  });
});

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/entities/Agent.ts =====
import {
  Color3,
  Mesh,
  MeshBuilder,
  StandardMaterial,
  TransformNode,
  Vector3,
  type Scene,
} from "@babylonjs/core";
import type { TacticalCommand } from "../commands/TacticalCommand";
import { WEAPONS, type WeaponDefinition } from "../data/combat/weapons";
import type { Combatant } from "./Combatant";
import { suppressionState, type GadgetId, type MovementStance } from "../tactical/TacticalTypes";

export type AgentVisualMode = "procedural" | "external";
export type AgentEquipmentProfile = "command" | "precision" | "medical" | "assault";

export type AgentDefinition = {
  id: string;
  callsign: string;
  role: string;
  color: Color3;
  position: Vector3;
  shortcut: string;
  maxHealth?: number;
  armor?: number;
  accuracy?: number;
  mobility?: number;
  detection?: number;
  will?: number;
  tech?: number;
  tags?: string[];
  weaponId?: keyof typeof WEAPONS;
  equipmentProfile?: AgentEquipmentProfile;
};

export class Agent implements Combatant {
  readonly id: string;
  readonly team = "ion" as const;
  readonly root: TransformNode;
  readonly proceduralVisualRoot: TransformNode;
  readonly externalVisualRoot: TransformNode;
  readonly selectionRing: Mesh;
  readonly pathMeshes: Mesh[] = [];
  readonly commandQueue: TacticalCommand[] = [];
  activeCommand?: TacticalCommand;
  crowdIndex = -1;
  selected = false;

  health: number;
  readonly maxHealth: number;
  armor: number;
  accuracy: number;
  readonly mobility: number;
  readonly detection: number;
  readonly will: number;
  readonly tech: number;
  readonly tags: ReadonlySet<string>;
  readonly weapon: WeaponDefinition;
  weaponRange: number;
  baseDamage: number;
  ammo: number;
  readonly magazineSize: number;
  suppressedUntil = 0;
  suppression = 0;
  movementStance: MovementStance = "tactical";
  stunnedUntil = 0;
  jammedUntil = 0;
  overwatchYaw = 0;
  overwatchArc = Math.PI * 0.52;
  overwatchRange = 0;
  readonly gadgetCharges: Record<GadgetId, number> = { smoke: 0, emp: 0 };
  breachCharges = 0;
  downed = false;
  disabled = false;
  overwatch = false;
  coverPointId?: string;

  private readonly proceduralMeshes: Mesh[] = [];
  private readonly selectionProxy: Mesh;
  private currentVisualMode: AgentVisualMode = "procedural";

  constructor(
    readonly definition: AgentDefinition,
    scene: Scene,
  ) {
    this.id = definition.id;
    this.maxHealth = definition.maxHealth ?? 100;
    this.health = this.maxHealth;
    this.armor = definition.armor ?? 20;
    this.accuracy = definition.accuracy ?? 0.72;
    this.mobility = definition.mobility ?? 10;
    this.detection = definition.detection ?? 10;
    this.will = definition.will ?? 10;
    this.tech = definition.tech ?? 10;
    this.tags = new Set(definition.tags ?? []);
    this.weapon = WEAPONS[definition.weaponId ?? "commandRifle"] ?? WEAPONS.commandRifle!;
    this.weaponRange = this.weapon.maximumRange;
    this.baseDamage = this.weapon.baseDamage;
    this.magazineSize = this.weapon.magazineSize;
    this.ammo = this.magazineSize;

    this.root = new TransformNode(`agent:${definition.id}`, scene);
    this.root.position.copyFrom(definition.position);

    this.proceduralVisualRoot = new TransformNode(`agent-procedural:${definition.id}`, scene);
    this.proceduralVisualRoot.parent = this.root;
    this.externalVisualRoot = new TransformNode(`agent-external:${definition.id}`, scene);
    this.externalVisualRoot.parent = this.root;
    this.externalVisualRoot.setEnabled(false);

    const bodyMaterial = new StandardMaterial(`agent-mat:${definition.id}`, scene);
    bodyMaterial.diffuseColor = definition.color.scale(0.72);
    bodyMaterial.emissiveColor = definition.color.scale(0.12);
    bodyMaterial.specularColor = new Color3(0.35, 0.4, 0.42);

    const armorMaterial = new StandardMaterial(`armor-mat:${definition.id}`, scene);
    armorMaterial.diffuseColor = new Color3(0.045, 0.075, 0.09);
    armorMaterial.emissiveColor = definition.color.scale(0.06);

    const torso = MeshBuilder.CreateCapsule(`torso:${definition.id}`, {
      height: 1.02,
      radius: 0.34,
      tessellation: 10,
    }, scene);
    torso.scaling.z = 0.72;
    torso.position.y = 1.2;
    torso.parent = this.proceduralVisualRoot;
    torso.material = armorMaterial;

    const chest = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`chest:${definition.id}`, {
      width: 0.7,
      height: 0.24,
      depth: 0.42,
    }, scene);
    chest.position.set(0, 1.42, 0.02);
    chest.parent = this.proceduralVisualRoot;
    chest.material = bodyMaterial;

    const head = MeshBuilder.CreateSphere(`head:${definition.id}`, {
      diameter: 0.46,
      segments: 12,
    }, scene);
    head.position.y = 1.93;
    head.parent = this.proceduralVisualRoot;
    head.material = bodyMaterial;

    const visor = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`visor:${definition.id}`, {
      width: 0.36,
      height: 0.1,
      depth: 0.08,
    }, scene);
    visor.position.set(0, 1.95, 0.23);
    visor.parent = this.proceduralVisualRoot;
    visor.material = bodyMaterial;

    const leftLeg = MeshBuilder.CreateCapsule(`leg-l:${definition.id}`, {
      height: 0.82,
      radius: 0.11,
      tessellation: 8,
    }, scene);
    leftLeg.position.set(-0.19, 0.5, 0);
    leftLeg.parent = this.proceduralVisualRoot;
    leftLeg.material = armorMaterial;

    const rightLeg = leftLeg.clone(`leg-r:${definition.id}`);
    rightLeg.position.x = 0.19;
    rightLeg.parent = this.proceduralVisualRoot;

    const rifleRoot = new TransformNode(`fallback-weapon:${definition.id}`, scene);
    rifleRoot.position.set(0.39, 1.14, 0.2);
    rifleRoot.rotation.x = 0.12;
    rifleRoot.parent = this.proceduralVisualRoot;
    const receiver = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`fallback-receiver:${definition.id}`, {
      width: 0.16,
      height: 0.18,
      depth: 0.66,
    }, scene);
    receiver.parent = rifleRoot;
    receiver.material = armorMaterial;
    const barrel = MeshBuilder.CreateCylinder(`fallback-barrel:${definition.id}`, {
      height: 0.48,
      diameter: 0.065,
      tessellation: 8,
    }, scene);
    barrel.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2;
    barrel.position.z = 0.52;
    barrel.parent = rifleRoot;
    barrel.material = armorMaterial;
    const stock = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`fallback-stock:${definition.id}`, {
      width: 0.12,
      height: 0.16,
      depth: 0.3,
    }, scene);
    stock.position.z = -0.44;
    stock.parent = rifleRoot;
    stock.material = armorMaterial;

    this.proceduralMeshes.push(torso, chest, head, visor, leftLeg, rightLeg, receiver, barrel, stock);
    this.proceduralMeshes.forEach((mesh) => {
      mesh.isPickable = false;
      mesh.metadata = { visualOnly: true, proceduralAgentVisual: true };
    });

    this.selectionProxy = MeshBuilder.CreateCapsule(`agent-proxy:${definition.id}`, {
      height: 2.05,
      radius: 0.38,
      tessellation: 8,
    }, scene);
    this.selectionProxy.position.y = 1.02;
    this.selectionProxy.parent = this.root;
    this.selectionProxy.isPickable = true;
    this.selectionProxy.visibility = 0.001;
    this.selectionProxy.metadata = {
      agentId: definition.id,
      entityId: definition.id,
      entityType: "agent",
      blocksShots: true,
      gameplayProxy: true,
    };

    this.selectionRing = MeshBuilder.CreateTorus(`selection:${definition.id}`, {
      diameter: 1.48,
      thickness: 0.09,
      tessellation: 40,
    }, scene);
    this.selectionRing.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2;
    this.selectionRing.position.y = 0.06;
    this.selectionRing.parent = this.root;
    this.selectionRing.isPickable = false;

    const selectionMaterial = new StandardMaterial(`selection-mat:${definition.id}`, scene);
    selectionMaterial.emissiveColor = definition.color;
    selectionMaterial.disableLighting = true;
    this.selectionRing.material = selectionMaterial;
    this.selectionRing.setEnabled(false);

    const shadowDisc = MeshBuilder.CreateDisc(`agent-shadow:${definition.id}`, { radius: 0.48, tessellation: 24 }, scene);
    shadowDisc.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2;
    shadowDisc.position.y = 0.02;
    shadowDisc.parent = this.root;
    shadowDisc.isPickable = false;
    const shadowMaterial = new StandardMaterial(`agent-shadow-mat:${definition.id}`, scene);
    shadowMaterial.diffuseColor = new Color3(0.04, 0.05, 0.06);
    shadowMaterial.emissiveColor = new Color3(0.01, 0.01, 0.01);
    shadowMaterial.alpha = 0.35;
    shadowDisc.material = shadowMaterial;
  }

  get visualMode(): AgentVisualMode {
    return this.currentVisualMode;
  }

  get suppressionState() {
    return suppressionState(this.suppression);
  }

  setSelected(selected: boolean): void {
    this.selected = selected;
    this.selectionRing.setEnabled(selected && !this.downed);
  }

  setVisualMode(mode: AgentVisualMode): void {
    this.currentVisualMode = mode;
    this.proceduralVisualRoot.setEnabled(mode === "procedural");
    this.externalVisualRoot.setEnabled(mode === "external");
    this.applyDownedPose();
  }

  /** Backward-compatible alias for older integration patches. */
  setProceduralVisualVisible(visible: boolean): void {
    this.setVisualMode(visible ? "procedural" : "external");
  }

  applyDamage(amount: number): number {
    if (this.downed || this.disabled) return 0;
    this.suppression = Math.min(120, this.suppression + Math.max(8, amount * 0.65));
    const armorAbsorption = Math.min(this.armor, Math.ceil(amount * 0.35));
    this.armor -= armorAbsorption;
    const healthDamage = Math.max(1, amount - armorAbsorption);
    this.health = Math.max(0, this.health - healthDamage);
    if (this.health <= 0) this.setDowned(true);
    return healthDamage;
  }

  stabilize(): void {
    if (!this.downed) return;
    this.downed = false;
    this.suppression = Math.min(this.suppression, 25);
    this.health = Math.max(25, Math.round(this.maxHealth * 0.25));
    this.applyDownedPose();
    this.selectionProxy.visibility = 0.001;
    this.setSelected(this.selected);
  }

  setDowned(downed: boolean): void {
    this.downed = downed;
    this.overwatch = false;
    this.applyDownedPose();
    this.selectionRing.setEnabled(!downed && this.selected);
  }

  clearPathMeshes(): void {
    while (this.pathMeshes.length) {
      this.pathMeshes.pop()?.dispose(false, true);
    }
  }

  private applyDownedPose(): void {
    if (!this.downed || this.currentVisualMode === "external") {
      this.root.rotation.z = 0;
      this.root.position.y = 0;
      return;
    }
    this.root.rotation.z = Math.PI / 2;
    this.root.position.y = 0.28;
  }
}

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/entities/Combatant.ts =====
import type { TransformNode } from "@babylonjs/core";
import type { WeaponDefinition } from "../data/combat/weapons";
import type { MovementStance, SuppressionState } from "../tactical/TacticalTypes";

export type Team = "ion" | "echo";

export interface Combatant {
  readonly id: string;
  readonly team: Team;
  readonly root: TransformNode;
  health: number;
  readonly maxHealth: number;
  armor: number;
  accuracy: number;
  weaponRange: number;
  weapon?: WeaponDefinition;
  baseDamage: number;
  ammo: number;
  readonly magazineSize: number;
  suppressedUntil: number;
  suppression: number;
  suppressionState: SuppressionState;
  movementStance: MovementStance;
  stunnedUntil: number;
  downed: boolean;
  disabled: boolean;
  crowdIndex: number;
  coverPointId?: string;

  applyDamage(amount: number): number;
}

export function isCombatant(value: unknown): value is Combatant {
  if (!value || typeof value !== "object") return false;
  const candidate = value as Partial<Combatant>;
  return typeof candidate.id === "string" && !!candidate.root && typeof candidate.health === "number";
}

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/entities/Enemy.ts =====
import {
  Color3,
  Mesh,
  MeshBuilder,
  StandardMaterial,
  TransformNode,
  Vector3,
  type Scene,
} from "@babylonjs/core";
import type { Combatant } from "./Combatant";
import { suppressionState, type MovementStance } from "../tactical/TacticalTypes";

export type EnemyKind = "observer" | "security" | "hunter" | "jammer";
export type EnemyState = "DORMANT" | "PATROL" | "INVESTIGATE" | "SEARCH" | "ENGAGE" | "RETREAT" | "DISABLED";

export type EnemyDefinition = {
  id: string;
  kind: EnemyKind;
  position: Vector3;
  patrolPoints: Vector3[];
  retreatPoint: Vector3;
  initialState?: EnemyState;
};

export class Enemy implements Combatant {
  readonly id: string;
  readonly team = "echo" as const;
  readonly root: TransformNode;
  readonly kind: EnemyKind;
  readonly patrolPoints: Vector3[];
  readonly retreatPoint: Vector3;
  readonly visualMeshes: Mesh[] = [];
  readonly lastKnownMarker: Mesh;

  state: EnemyState;
  health: number;
  readonly maxHealth: number;
  armor: number;
  accuracy: number;
  weaponRange: number;
  baseDamage: number;
  ammo = 99;
  readonly magazineSize = 99;
  suppressedUntil = 0;
  suppression = 0;
  movementStance: MovementStance = "tactical";
  stunnedUntil = 0;
  downed = false;
  disabled = false;
  crowdIndex = -1;
  coverPointId?: string;
  discovered = false;
  currentlyVisible = false;
  patrolIndex = 0;
  searchTimer = 0;
  fireCooldown = 0;
  scanProgress = 0;
  reinforcementCalled = false;
  overwatchJammer = false;
  lastKnownAgentPosition?: Vector3;
  targetAgentId?: string;
  escaped = false;
  debugDecision = "idle";
  debugScore = 0;

  constructor(definition: EnemyDefinition, scene: Scene) {
    this.id = definition.id;
    this.kind = definition.kind;
    this.patrolPoints = definition.patrolPoints.map((point) => point.clone());
    this.retreatPoint = definition.retreatPoint.clone();
    this.state = definition.initialState ?? "PATROL";
    const stats = {
      observer: { health: 55, armor: 8, accuracy: 0.55, range: 9, damage: 12 },
      security: { health: 85, armor: 18, accuracy: 0.64, range: 12, damage: 20 },
      hunter: { health: 96, armor: 14, accuracy: 0.72, range: 2.2, damage: 27 },
      jammer: { health: 72, armor: 12, accuracy: 0.58, range: 10, damage: 14 },
    } as const;
    const profile = stats[definition.kind];
    this.maxHealth = profile.health;
    this.health = this.maxHealth;
    this.armor = profile.armor;
    this.accuracy = profile.accuracy;
    this.weaponRange = profile.range;
    this.baseDamage = profile.damage;

    this.root = new TransformNode(`enemy:${definition.id}`, scene);
    this.root.position.copyFrom(definition.position);

    const shell = new StandardMaterial(`enemy-shell:${definition.id}`, scene);
    shell.diffuseColor = definition.kind === "observer"
      ? new Color3(0.08, 0.12, 0.14)
      : definition.kind === "hunter"
        ? new Color3(0.19, 0.06, 0.04)
        : definition.kind === "jammer"
          ? new Color3(0.09, 0.06, 0.2)
          : new Color3(0.16, 0.055, 0.045);
    shell.emissiveColor = definition.kind === "observer"
      ? new Color3(0.03, 0.2, 0.23)
      : definition.kind === "jammer"
        ? new Color3(0.25, 0.08, 0.5)
        : new Color3(0.23, 0.045, 0.02);
    shell.specularColor = new Color3(0.45, 0.5, 0.52);

    const opticMaterial = new StandardMaterial(`enemy-optic:${definition.id}`, scene);
    opticMaterial.diffuseColor = new Color3(0.15, 0.02, 0.01);
    opticMaterial.emissiveColor = definition.kind === "observer"
      ? new Color3(0.25, 0.95, 1)
      : definition.kind === "jammer"
        ? new Color3(0.72, 0.24, 1)
        : new Color3(1, 0.18, 0.06);
    opticMaterial.disableLighting = true;

    const body = MeshBuilder.CreateSphere(`enemy-body:${definition.id}`, {
      diameterX: definition.kind === "observer" ? 0.9 : 1.15,
      diameterY: definition.kind === "observer" ? 0.55 : 0.72,
      diameterZ: definition.kind === "observer" ? 1.05 : 1.25,
      segments: 14,
    }, scene);
    body.position.y = 1.35;
    body.parent = this.root;
    body.material = shell;

    const optic = MeshBuilder.CreateSphere(`enemy-optic-mesh:${definition.id}`, {
      diameter: definition.kind === "observer" ? 0.24 : 0.31,
      segments: 10,
    }, scene);
    optic.position.set(0, 1.37, 0.52);
    optic.parent = this.root;
    optic.material = opticMaterial;

    const leftWing = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`enemy-wing-l:${definition.id}`, {
      width: 0.58,
      height: 0.09,
      depth: 0.24,
    }, scene);
    leftWing.position.set(-0.62, 1.34, 0);
    leftWing.parent = this.root;
    leftWing.material = shell;

    const rightWing = leftWing.clone(`enemy-wing-r:${definition.id}`);
    rightWing.position.x = 0.62;
    rightWing.parent = this.root;

    const sensor = MeshBuilder.CreateTorus(`enemy-sensor:${definition.id}`, {
      diameter: definition.kind === "observer" ? 0.8 : 1.0,
      thickness: 0.035,
      tessellation: 32,
    }, scene);
    sensor.position.y = 1.33;
    sensor.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2;
    sensor.parent = this.root;
    sensor.material = opticMaterial;

    this.visualMeshes.push(body, optic, leftWing, rightWing, sensor);
    this.visualMeshes.forEach((mesh) => {
      mesh.isPickable = true;
      mesh.metadata = {
        enemyId: this.id,
        entityId: this.id,
        entityType: "enemy",
        blocksShots: true,
      };
    });

    this.lastKnownMarker = MeshBuilder.CreateTorus(`last-known:${definition.id}`, {
      diameter: 1.15,
      thickness: 0.045,
      tessellation: 32,
    }, scene);
    this.lastKnownMarker.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2;
    this.lastKnownMarker.position.copyFrom(definition.position);
    this.lastKnownMarker.position.y = 0.06;
    this.lastKnownMarker.isPickable = false;
    const markerMaterial = new StandardMaterial(`last-known-mat:${definition.id}`, scene);
    markerMaterial.emissiveColor = new Color3(1, 0.44, 0.12);
    markerMaterial.alpha = 0.48;
    markerMaterial.disableLighting = true;
    this.lastKnownMarker.material = markerMaterial;
    this.lastKnownMarker.setEnabled(false);

    this.setVisualState(false, false);
  }

  applyDamage(amount: number): number {
    if (this.disabled) return 0;
    this.suppression = Math.min(120, this.suppression + Math.max(10, amount * 0.72));
    const armorAbsorption = Math.min(this.armor, Math.ceil(amount * 0.28));
    this.armor -= armorAbsorption;
    const healthDamage = Math.max(1, amount - armorAbsorption);
    this.health = Math.max(0, this.health - healthDamage);
    if (this.health <= 0) this.disable();
    return healthDamage;
  }

  disable(): void {
    this.disabled = true;
    this.escaped = false;
    this.state = "DISABLED";
    this.currentlyVisible = true;
    this.visualMeshes.forEach((mesh) => { mesh.visibility = 0.55; });
    this.root.rotation.z = Math.PI / 2;
    this.root.position.y = 0.2;
    this.lastKnownMarker.setEnabled(false);
  }
