  const targetYaw = Math.atan2(delta.x, delta.z);
  const difference = Math.abs(Math.atan2(Math.sin(targetYaw - yaw), Math.cos(targetYaw - yaw)));
  return difference <= arc / 2;
}

function nameOf(combatant: Combatant): string {
  const agent = combatant as Agent;
  if (agent.definition?.callsign) return agent.definition.callsign;
  const enemy = combatant as Enemy;
  if (enemy.kind === "observer") return "Observer drone";
  if (enemy.kind === "hunter") return "Hunter frame";
  if (enemy.kind === "jammer") return "Jammer frame";
  return "Security drone";
}

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/systems/CommandSystem.ts =====
import {
  DynamicTexture,
  Mesh,
  MeshBuilder,
  StandardMaterial,
  Vector3,
  type Scene,
} from "@babylonjs/core";
import { AttackCommand } from "../commands/AttackCommand";
import { InteractionCommand } from "../commands/InteractionCommand";
import { MoveCommand } from "../commands/MoveCommand";
import { OverwatchCommand } from "../commands/OverwatchCommand";
import { ReloadCommand } from "../commands/ReloadCommand";
import { StabilizeCommand } from "../commands/StabilizeCommand";
import { TakeCoverCommand } from "../commands/TakeCoverCommand";
import { GadgetCommand } from "../commands/GadgetCommand";
import { DoorCommand } from "../commands/DoorCommand";
import type { TacticalCommand } from "../commands/TacticalCommand";
import type { EventBus } from "../engine/EventBus";
import type { Agent } from "../entities/Agent";
import type { Enemy } from "../entities/Enemy";
import type { InteractableRuntime } from "../investigation/InvestigationTypes";
import type { CombatSystem } from "./CombatSystem";
import type { CoverPoint, CoverSystem } from "./CoverSystem";
import type { NavigationSystem } from "./NavigationSystem";
import type { InvestigationSystem } from "./InvestigationSystem";
import type { GadgetSystem } from "./GadgetSystem";
import type { DoorAction, FireMode, GadgetId, MovementStance } from "../tactical/TacticalTypes";
import type { DoorRuntime, DoorSystem } from "./DoorSystem";

export class CommandSystem {
  private commandSequence = 0;
  private syncSequence = 0;
  private activeSyncGroup?: string;
  private readonly releasedSyncGroups = new Set<string>();

  constructor(
    private readonly scene: Scene,
    private readonly agents: Agent[],
    private readonly navigation: NavigationSystem,
    private readonly cover: CoverSystem,
    private readonly combat: CombatSystem,
    private readonly investigation: InvestigationSystem,
    private readonly gadgets: GadgetSystem,
    private readonly doors: DoorSystem,
    private readonly bus: EventBus,
  ) {
    const cancelInvalidInteractions = () => {
      for (const agent of this.agents) {
        const active = agent.activeCommand;
        if (active instanceof InteractionCommand && !this.investigation.canAgentUse(agent, active.target).allowed) {
          active.cancel(this.context());
          agent.activeCommand = undefined;
        }
        for (let index = agent.commandQueue.length - 1; index >= 0; index -= 1) {
          const command = agent.commandQueue[index];
          if (command instanceof InteractionCommand && !this.investigation.canAgentUse(agent, command.target).allowed) {
            command.cancel(this.context());
            agent.commandQueue.splice(index, 1);
          }
        }
        this.refreshPathPreview(agent);
      }
      this.bus.emit("commands:changed", {});
    };
    this.bus.on("interaction:completed", cancelInvalidInteractions);
    this.bus.on("interaction:corrupted", cancelInvalidInteractions);
  }

  beginSyncPlanning(): string {
    this.activeSyncGroup = `sync-${++this.syncSequence}`;
    this.bus.emit("sync:changed", { groupId: this.activeSyncGroup, state: "planning" });
    return this.activeSyncGroup;
  }

  commitSyncGroup(): string | undefined {
    const groupId = this.activeSyncGroup;
    if (!groupId) return undefined;
    this.releasedSyncGroups.add(groupId);
    this.activeSyncGroup = undefined;
    this.bus.emit("sync:changed", { groupId, state: "released" });
    this.bus.emit("commands:changed", {});
    return groupId;
  }

  cancelSyncPlanning(): void {
    const groupId = this.activeSyncGroup;
    if (!groupId) return;
    for (const agent of this.agents) {
      for (let index = agent.commandQueue.length - 1; index >= 0; index -= 1) {
        if (agent.commandQueue[index]?.syncGroupId === groupId) agent.commandQueue.splice(index, 1);
      }
      this.refreshPathPreview(agent);
    }
    this.activeSyncGroup = undefined;
    this.bus.emit("sync:changed", { groupId, state: "cancelled" });
    this.bus.emit("commands:changed", {});
  }

  get syncPlanningGroup(): string | undefined {
    return this.activeSyncGroup;
  }

  queueMove(agents: Agent[], destinations: Vector3[], append: boolean, stance: MovementStance = "tactical", finalFacings: Array<number | undefined> = []): void {
    agents.forEach((agent, index) => {
      if (!append) this.clearAgentCommands(agent);
      const destination = destinations[index];
      if (!destination || agent.downed) return;
      const snapped = this.navigation.closestPoint(destination);
      agent.commandQueue.push(new MoveCommand(agent, snapped, ++this.commandSequence, stance, finalFacings[index], this.activeSyncGroup));
      this.bus.emit("command:queued", { agentId: agent.id, commandType: "move", append });
      this.refreshPathPreview(agent);
    });
    this.bus.emit("commands:changed", {});
  }

  queueCover(agents: Agent[], points: Array<CoverPoint | undefined>, append: boolean): void {
    agents.forEach((agent, index) => {
      const point = points[index];
      if (!point || agent.downed) return;
      if (!append) this.clearAgentCommands(agent);
      if (!this.cover.reserve(agent, point)) return;
      agent.commandQueue.push(new TakeCoverCommand(agent, point, ++this.commandSequence));
      this.bus.emit("command:queued", { agentId: agent.id, commandType: "cover", append });
      this.refreshPathPreview(agent);
    });
    this.bus.emit("commands:changed", {});
  }

  queueAttack(agents: Agent[], target: Enemy, append: boolean, fireMode: FireMode = "standard"): void {
    agents.forEach((agent) => {
      if (agent.downed) return;
      if (!append) this.clearAgentCommands(agent);
      agent.commandQueue.push(new AttackCommand(agent, target, fireMode, this.activeSyncGroup));
      this.bus.emit("command:queued", { agentId: agent.id, commandType: "attack", append });
    });
    this.bus.emit("commands:changed", {});
  }

  queueReload(agents: Agent[], append = true): void {
    agents.forEach((agent) => {
      if (agent.downed || agent.ammo >= agent.magazineSize) return;
      if (!append) this.clearAgentCommands(agent);
      agent.commandQueue.push(new ReloadCommand(agent, this.activeSyncGroup));
      this.bus.emit("command:queued", { agentId: agent.id, commandType: "reload", append });
    });
    this.bus.emit("commands:changed", {});
  }

  queueOverwatch(agents: Agent[], yaw: number | undefined = undefined, append = true, arc = Math.PI * 0.52): void {
    agents.forEach((agent) => {
      if (agent.downed || agent.ammo <= 0) return;
      if (!append) this.clearAgentCommands(agent);
      agent.commandQueue.push(new OverwatchCommand(agent, yaw ?? agent.root.rotation.y, arc, agent.weaponRange, this.activeSyncGroup));
      this.bus.emit("command:queued", { agentId: agent.id, commandType: "overwatch", append });
    });
    this.bus.emit("commands:changed", {});
  }

  queueStabilize(helper: Agent, target: Agent, append = true): void {
    if (!append) this.clearAgentCommands(helper);
    helper.commandQueue.push(new StabilizeCommand(helper, target, this.activeSyncGroup));
    this.bus.emit("command:queued", { agentId: helper.id, commandType: "stabilize", append });
    this.bus.emit("commands:changed", { agentId: helper.id });
  }

  queueInteraction(agent: Agent, target: InteractableRuntime, append = false): boolean {
    const validation = this.investigation.canAgentUse(agent, target);
    if (!validation.allowed || agent.downed) {
      this.bus.emit("toast", { message: validation.reason ?? "Interaction unavailable.", tone: "warning" });
      return false;
    }
    if (!append) this.clearAgentCommands(agent);
    agent.commandQueue.push(new InteractionCommand(agent, target, this.investigation, this.activeSyncGroup));
    this.bus.emit("command:queued", { agentId: agent.id, commandType: target.kind, append });
    this.refreshPathPreview(agent);
    this.bus.emit("commands:changed", { agentId: agent.id });
    return true;
  }

  queueGadget(agent: Agent, gadgetId: GadgetId, destination: Vector3, append = false): boolean {
    if (agent.downed || agent.gadgetCharges[gadgetId] <= 0) return false;
    if (!append) this.clearAgentCommands(agent);
    agent.commandQueue.push(new GadgetCommand(agent, gadgetId, this.navigation.closestPoint(destination), this.activeSyncGroup));
    this.bus.emit("command:queued", { agentId: agent.id, commandType: `gadget-${gadgetId}`, append });
    this.refreshPathPreview(agent);
    this.bus.emit("commands:changed", { agentId: agent.id });
    return true;
  }

  queueDoor(agent: Agent, door: DoorRuntime, action: DoorAction, append = false): boolean {
    const validation = this.doors.canUse(agent, door, action);
    if (!validation.allowed) {
      this.bus.emit("toast", { message: validation.reason ?? "Door action unavailable.", tone: "warning" });
      return false;
    }
    if (!append) this.clearAgentCommands(agent);
    agent.commandQueue.push(new DoorCommand(agent, door, action, this.activeSyncGroup));
    this.bus.emit("command:queued", { agentId: agent.id, commandType: `door-${action}`, append });
    this.refreshPathPreview(agent);
    this.bus.emit("commands:changed", { agentId: agent.id });
    return true;
  }

  update(deltaSeconds: number): void {
    if (deltaSeconds <= 0) return;
    const context = this.context();

    for (const agent of this.agents) {
      if (agent.downed) {
        this.clearAgentCommands(agent);
        continue;
      }
      if (!agent.activeCommand && agent.commandQueue.length > 0) {
        const pending = agent.commandQueue[0];
        if (pending?.syncGroupId && !this.releasedSyncGroups.has(pending.syncGroupId)) continue;
        const next = agent.commandQueue.shift();
        if (next) {
          agent.activeCommand = next;
          next.begin(context);
          this.refreshPathPreview(agent);
          this.bus.emit("commands:changed", { agentId: agent.id });
        }
      }

      const active = agent.activeCommand;
      if (!active) continue;
      active.update(context, deltaSeconds);
      if (["complete", "failed", "cancelled"].includes(active.status)) {
        if (active.status === "failed") {
          this.bus.emit("combat:log", {
            message: `${agent.definition.callsign}: ${active.label} failed${active.failureReason ? ` — ${active.failureReason}` : ""}.`,
            tone: "warning",
          });
        }
        this.bus.emit("command:completed", {
          agentId: agent.id,
          commandId: active.id,
          commandType: active.constructor.name.replace(/Command$/, "").toLowerCase(),
          status: active.status,
          label: active.label,
        });
        agent.activeCommand = undefined;
        this.refreshPathPreview(agent);
        this.bus.emit("commands:changed", { agentId: agent.id });
      }
    }
    this.cleanupReleasedSyncGroups();
  }

  clearAgentCommands(agent: Agent): void {
    const count = this.getCommands(agent).length;
    const context = this.context();
    if (agent.activeCommand) {
      agent.activeCommand.cancel(context);
      agent.activeCommand = undefined;
    }
    agent.commandQueue.forEach((command) => command.cancel(context));
    agent.commandQueue.length = 0;
    if (count > 0) this.bus.emit("commands:cleared", { agentId: agent.id, count });
    this.refreshPathPreview(agent);
  }

  clearAgents(agents: Agent[]): void {
    agents.forEach((agent) => this.clearAgentCommands(agent));
    this.bus.emit("commands:changed", {});
  }

  removeCommand(agent: Agent, commandId: string): boolean {
    const context = this.context();
    if (agent.activeCommand?.id === commandId) {
      agent.activeCommand.cancel(context);
      agent.activeCommand = undefined;
      this.bus.emit("command:removed", { agentId: agent.id, commandId });
      this.refreshPathPreview(agent);
      this.bus.emit("commands:changed", { agentId: agent.id });
      return true;
    }
    const index = agent.commandQueue.findIndex((command) => command.id === commandId);
    if (index < 0) return false;
    const [removed] = agent.commandQueue.splice(index, 1);
    if (removed) removed.cancel(context);
    this.bus.emit("command:removed", { agentId: agent.id, commandId });
    this.refreshPathPreview(agent);
    this.bus.emit("commands:changed", { agentId: agent.id });
    return true;
  }

  reorderQueuedCommand(agent: Agent, commandId: string, direction: -1 | 1): boolean {
    const index = agent.commandQueue.findIndex((command) => command.id === commandId);
    const nextIndex = index + direction;
    if (index < 0 || nextIndex < 0 || nextIndex >= agent.commandQueue.length) return false;
    const command = agent.commandQueue[index];
    const other = agent.commandQueue[nextIndex];
    if (!command || !other) return false;
    agent.commandQueue[index] = other;
    agent.commandQueue[nextIndex] = command;
    this.bus.emit("command:reordered", { agentId: agent.id, commandId, direction });
    this.refreshPathPreview(agent);
    this.bus.emit("commands:changed", { agentId: agent.id });
    return true;
  }

  getCommands(agent: Agent): TacticalCommand[] {
    return [...(agent.activeCommand ? [agent.activeCommand] : []), ...agent.commandQueue];
  }

  private context() {
    return { navigation: this.navigation, cover: this.cover, combat: this.combat, gadgets: this.gadgets, doors: this.doors };
  }

  private refreshPathPreview(agent: Agent): void {
    agent.clearPathMeshes();
    const commands = this.getCommands(agent);
    let start = this.navigation.getAgentPosition(agent);
    let waypointNumber = 0;

    commands.forEach((command) => {
      const destination = commandDestination(command);
      if (!destination) return;
      waypointNumber += 1;
      const path = this.navigation.computePath(start, destination);
      if (path.length >= 2) {
        const line = MeshBuilder.CreateLines(`path:${agent.id}:${command.id}`, {
          points: path.map((point) => point.add(new Vector3(0, 0.09, 0))),
        }, this.scene);
        line.color = agent.definition.color;
        line.alpha = command.status === "active" ? 0.95 : 0.52;
        line.isPickable = false;
        agent.pathMeshes.push(line);
      }
      const marker = this.createWaypointMarker(
        agent,
        destination,
        waypointNumber,
        command.status === "active",
        command instanceof TakeCoverCommand ? "◆" : String(waypointNumber),
      );
      agent.pathMeshes.push(marker);
      start = destination;
    });
  }

  private createWaypointMarker(
    agent: Agent,
    point: Vector3,
    number: number,
    active: boolean,
    label: string,
  ): Mesh {
    const marker = MeshBuilder.CreatePlane(`waypoint:${agent.id}:${number}`, { size: active ? 0.72 : 0.58 }, this.scene);
    marker.position.copyFrom(point.add(new Vector3(0, 0.72, 0)));
    marker.billboardMode = Mesh.BILLBOARDMODE_ALL;
    marker.isPickable = false;

    const texture = new DynamicTexture(`waypoint-texture:${agent.id}:${number}`, { width: 128, height: 128 }, this.scene, false);
    texture.hasAlpha = true;
    const context = texture.getContext() as unknown as CanvasRenderingContext2D;
    context.clearRect(0, 0, 128, 128);
    context.beginPath();
    context.arc(64, 64, 48, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    context.fillStyle = agent.definition.color.toHexString();
    context.fill();
    context.lineWidth = 6;
    context.strokeStyle = active ? "#ffffff" : "rgba(255,255,255,.55)";
    context.stroke();
    context.fillStyle = "#051016";
    context.font = `bold ${label.length > 1 ? 48 : 54}px system-ui`;
    context.textAlign = "center";
    context.textBaseline = "middle";
    context.fillText(label, 64, 67);
    texture.update();

    const material = new StandardMaterial(`waypoint-material:${agent.id}:${number}`, this.scene);
    material.diffuseTexture = texture;
    material.emissiveTexture = texture;
    material.opacityTexture = texture;
    material.disableLighting = true;
    material.backFaceCulling = false;
    marker.material = material;
    return marker;
  }

  private cleanupReleasedSyncGroups(): void {
    for (const groupId of [...this.releasedSyncGroups]) {
      const stillUsed = this.agents.some((agent) => agent.activeCommand?.syncGroupId === groupId || agent.commandQueue.some((command) => command.syncGroupId === groupId));
      if (!stillUsed) {
        this.releasedSyncGroups.delete(groupId);
        this.bus.emit("sync:changed", { groupId, state: "complete" });
      }
    }
  }
}

function commandDestination(command: TacticalCommand): Vector3 | undefined {
  if (command instanceof MoveCommand || command instanceof TakeCoverCommand || command instanceof InteractionCommand || command instanceof GadgetCommand || command instanceof DoorCommand) return command.destination;
  return undefined;
}

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/systems/CoverSystem.ts =====
import {
  Color3,
  Mesh,
  MeshBuilder,
  StandardMaterial,
  Vector3,
  type Scene,
} from "@babylonjs/core";
import type { Agent } from "../entities/Agent";
import type { CoverHeight, CoverPointDefinition } from "../world/WorldTypes";

export type CoverPoint = CoverPointDefinition & {
  occupiedBy?: string;
  reservedBy?: string;
  indicator: Mesh;
};

export class CoverSystem {
  private readonly points = new Map<string, CoverPoint>();
  private indicatorsVisible = true;

  constructor(scene: Scene, definitions: CoverPointDefinition[]) {
    const lowMaterial = createMaterial(scene, "cover-low-material", new Color3(0.22, 0.75, 0.95));
    const highMaterial = createMaterial(scene, "cover-high-material", new Color3(0.35, 1, 0.68));

    definitions.forEach((definition) => {
      const indicator = createIndicator(scene, definition, definition.height === "high" ? highMaterial : lowMaterial);
      this.points.set(definition.id, { ...definition, indicator });
    });
  }


  snapshot(): Array<{ id: string; occupiedBy?: string; reservedBy?: string }> {
    return this.allPoints.map((point) => ({
      id: point.id,
      occupiedBy: point.occupiedBy,
      reservedBy: point.reservedBy,
    }));
  }

  restore(snapshot: Array<{ id: string; occupiedBy?: string; reservedBy?: string }>, agents: Agent[]): void {
    this.points.forEach((point) => {
      point.occupiedBy = undefined;
      point.reservedBy = undefined;
    });
    agents.forEach((agent) => { agent.coverPointId = undefined; });
    snapshot.forEach((state) => {
      const point = this.points.get(state.id);
      if (!point) return;
      point.occupiedBy = state.occupiedBy;
      point.reservedBy = state.reservedBy;
      if (state.occupiedBy) {
        const agent = agents.find((candidate) => candidate.id === state.occupiedBy);
        if (agent) {
          agent.coverPointId = point.id;
          agent.root.rotation.y = Math.atan2(-point.normal.x, -point.normal.z);
        }
      }
    });
    this.updateIndicators([]);
  }

  get allPoints(): CoverPoint[] {
    return [...this.points.values()];
  }

  toggleIndicators(): boolean {
    this.indicatorsVisible = !this.indicatorsVisible;
    this.updateIndicators([]);
    return this.indicatorsVisible;
  }

  updateIndicators(selectedAgents: Agent[]): void {
    const selectedIds = new Set(selectedAgents.map((agent) => agent.id));
    for (const point of this.points.values()) {
      const occupiedBySelected = !!point.occupiedBy && selectedIds.has(point.occupiedBy);
      const reservedBySelected = !!point.reservedBy && selectedIds.has(point.reservedBy);
      const blockedByOther = (!!point.occupiedBy && !occupiedBySelected) || (!!point.reservedBy && !reservedBySelected);
      point.indicator.setEnabled(this.indicatorsVisible && !blockedByOther);
      point.indicator.visibility = occupiedBySelected || reservedBySelected ? 0.95 : 0.44;
    }
  }

  findAssignments(destinations: Vector3[], agents: Agent[], maxDistance = 2.25): Array<CoverPoint | undefined> {
    const reserved = new Set<string>();
    return agents.map((agent, index) => {
      const destination = destinations[index];
      if (!destination) return undefined;
      const candidates = this.allPoints
        .filter((point) => (!point.occupiedBy || point.occupiedBy === agent.id)
          && (!point.reservedBy || point.reservedBy === agent.id)
          && !reserved.has(point.id))
        .map((point) => ({ point, distance: planarDistance(point.position, destination) }))
        .filter(({ distance }) => distance <= maxDistance)
        .sort((a, b) => a.distance - b.distance);
      const chosen = candidates[0]?.point;
      if (chosen) reserved.add(chosen.id);
      return chosen;
    });
  }

  getPoint(id: string | undefined): CoverPoint | undefined {
    return id ? this.points.get(id) : undefined;
  }

  reserve(agent: Agent, point: CoverPoint): boolean {
    if ((point.occupiedBy && point.occupiedBy !== agent.id) || (point.reservedBy && point.reservedBy !== agent.id)) return false;
    point.reservedBy = agent.id;
    return true;
  }

  releaseReservation(agent: Agent, point: CoverPoint): void {
    if (point.reservedBy === agent.id) point.reservedBy = undefined;
  }

  assign(agent: Agent, point: CoverPoint): void {
    this.release(agent);
    point.reservedBy = undefined;
    point.occupiedBy = agent.id;
    agent.coverPointId = point.id;
    agent.root.rotation.y = Math.atan2(-point.normal.x, -point.normal.z);
  }

  release(agent: Agent): void {
    const current = this.getPoint(agent.coverPointId);
    if (current?.occupiedBy === agent.id) current.occupiedBy = undefined;
    agent.coverPointId = undefined;
  }

  coverProtection(target: Agent, attackerPosition: Vector3): { modifier: number; flanked: boolean; height?: CoverHeight } {
    const point = this.getPoint(target.coverPointId);
    if (!point) return { modifier: 0, flanked: true };
    const toAttacker = attackerPosition.subtract(target.root.position);
    toAttacker.y = 0;
    if (toAttacker.lengthSquared() < 0.01) return { modifier: 0, flanked: true, height: point.height };
    toAttacker.normalize();
    const protectedSide = Vector3.Dot(toAttacker, point.normal) < -0.1;
    if (!protectedSide) return { modifier: 0, flanked: true, height: point.height };
    return {
      modifier: point.height === "high" ? 0.35 : 0.2,
      flanked: false,
      height: point.height,
    };
  }
}

function createMaterial(scene: Scene, name: string, color: Color3): StandardMaterial {
  const material = new StandardMaterial(name, scene);
  material.emissiveColor = color;
  material.diffuseColor = color.scale(0.18);
  material.alpha = 0.7;
  material.disableLighting = true;
  return material;
}

function createIndicator(scene: Scene, definition: CoverPointDefinition, material: StandardMaterial): Mesh {
  const root = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`cover-indicator:${definition.id}`, {
    width: definition.height === "high" ? 0.72 : 0.6,
    height: definition.height === "high" ? 0.62 : 0.38,
    depth: 0.08,
  }, scene);
  root.position.copyFrom(definition.position.add(new Vector3(0, definition.height === "high" ? 0.46 : 0.29, 0)));
  root.rotation.y = Math.atan2(definition.normal.x, definition.normal.z);
  root.material = material;
  root.isPickable = false;
  root.metadata = { coverPointId: definition.id };
  return root;
}

function planarDistance(a: Vector3, b: Vector3): number {
  return Math.hypot(a.x - b.x, a.z - b.z);
}

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/systems/DeveloperTools.ts =====
import type { EventBus } from "../engine/EventBus";
import type { Agent } from "../entities/Agent";
import type { Enemy } from "../entities/Enemy";
import type { InvestigationSystem } from "./InvestigationSystem";

export class DeveloperTools {
  constructor(
    private readonly agents: Agent[],
    private readonly enemies: Enemy[],
    private readonly investigation: InvestigationSystem,
    private readonly bus: EventBus,
  ) {
    if (new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get("dev") !== "1") return;
    window.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => this.onKey(event));
    this.bus.emit("toast", { message: "Developer tools enabled: F6 heal, F7 reveal, F8 disable drones.", tone: "info" });
  }

  private onKey(event: KeyboardEvent): void {
    if (event.code === "F6") {
      event.preventDefault();
      this.agents.forEach((agent) => {
        agent.health = agent.maxHealth;
        agent.armor = Math.max(agent.armor, 20);
        if (agent.downed) agent.stabilize();
      });
      this.bus.emit("combat:changed", {});
      this.bus.emit("toast", { message: "DEV: squad restored.", tone: "success" });
    }
    if (event.code === "F7") {
      event.preventDefault();
      this.investigation.getAvailableInteractables().forEach((target) => {
        target.mesh.visibility = 1;
      });
      this.bus.emit("toast", { message: "DEV: available evidence highlighted.", tone: "info" });
    }
    if (event.code === "F8") {
      event.preventDefault();
      this.enemies.filter((enemy) => !enemy.disabled).forEach((enemy) => enemy.disable());
      this.bus.emit("combat:changed", {});
      this.bus.emit("toast", { message: "DEV: all drones disabled.", tone: "warning" });
    }
  }
}

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/systems/DialogueSystem.ts =====
import type { DialogueChoice, DialogueDefinition, DialogueLine, DialogueSpeaker } from "../dialogue/DialogueTypes";
import type { EventBus } from "../engine/EventBus";
import type { StoryState } from "../story/StoryState";

export type DialogueSnapshot = {
  playedIds: string[];
  queuedIds: string[];
  activeDialogueId?: string;
  lineIndex: number;
  history: Array<{ speaker: DialogueSpeaker; text: string }>;
};

export class DialogueSystem {
  private readonly definitions = new Map<string, DialogueDefinition>();
  private readonly played = new Set<string>();
  private readonly queue: string[] = [];
  private readonly history: Array<{ speaker: DialogueSpeaker; text: string }> = [];
  private activeDefinition?: DialogueDefinition;
  private lineIndex = 0;
  private autoTimer?: number;
  private voiceEnabled = false;

  private readonly panel = element("dialoguePanel");
  private readonly portrait = element("dialoguePortrait");
  private readonly speaker = element("dialogueSpeaker");
  private readonly text = element("dialogueText");
  private readonly choices = element("dialogueChoices");
  private readonly nextButton = element<HTMLButtonElement>("dialogueNextButton");
  private readonly historyPanel = element("dialogueHistory");
  private readonly historyList = element("dialogueHistoryList");

  constructor(
    definitions: DialogueDefinition[],
    private readonly story: StoryState,
    private readonly bus: EventBus,
  ) {
    definitions.forEach((definition) => this.definitions.set(definition.id, definition));
    this.nextButton.addEventListener("click", () => this.advance());
    element("dialogueSkipButton").addEventListener("click", () => this.finishCurrent());
    element("dialogueReplayButton").addEventListener("click", () => this.replayCurrentLine());
    element("dialogueHistoryButton").addEventListener("click", () => this.toggleHistory());
    element("dialogueVoiceButton").addEventListener("click", (event) => {
      this.voiceEnabled = !this.voiceEnabled;
      (event.currentTarget as HTMLButtonElement).textContent = this.voiceEnabled ? "VOICE ON" : "VOICE OFF";
      if (!this.voiceEnabled && "speechSynthesis" in window) window.speechSynthesis.cancel();
    });
    element("closeDialogueHistory").addEventListener("click", () => { this.historyPanel.hidden = true; });
    bus.on("dialogue:play", ({ dialogueId }) => this.play(dialogueId));
    bus.on("interaction:completed", ({ dialogueId }) => {
      if (dialogueId) this.play(dialogueId);
    });
  }

  snapshot(): DialogueSnapshot {
    return {
      playedIds: [...this.played],
      queuedIds: [...this.queue],
      activeDialogueId: this.activeDefinition?.id,
      lineIndex: this.lineIndex,
      history: this.history.slice(-100),
    };
  }

  restore(snapshot: DialogueSnapshot | undefined): void {
    window.clearTimeout(this.autoTimer);
    if ("speechSynthesis" in window) window.speechSynthesis.cancel();
    this.played.clear();
    (snapshot?.playedIds ?? []).forEach((id) => this.played.add(id));
    this.queue.length = 0;
    this.queue.push(...(snapshot?.queuedIds ?? []).filter((id) => this.definitions.has(id)));
    this.history.length = 0;
    this.history.push(...(snapshot?.history ?? []));
    this.activeDefinition = snapshot?.activeDialogueId ? this.definitions.get(snapshot.activeDialogueId) : undefined;
    this.lineIndex = Math.max(0, snapshot?.lineIndex ?? 0);
    if (this.activeDefinition) {
      this.panel.hidden = false;
      this.bus.emit("dialogue:opened", { dialogueId: this.activeDefinition.id });
      this.showLine();
    } else {
      this.panel.hidden = true;
      this.bus.emit("dialogue:closed", {});
      this.choices.replaceChildren();
    }
  }

  play(dialogueId: string): void {
    const definition = this.definitions.get(dialogueId);
    if (!definition || (definition.once && this.played.has(dialogueId))) return;
    if (this.activeDefinition) {
      if (!this.queue.includes(dialogueId)) this.queue.push(dialogueId);
      return;
    }
    this.start(definition);
  }

  private start(definition: DialogueDefinition): void {
    this.activeDefinition = definition;
    this.lineIndex = 0;
    this.played.add(definition.id);
    this.panel.hidden = false;
    this.bus.emit("dialogue:opened", { dialogueId: definition.id });
    this.showLine();
  }

  private showLine(): void {
    window.clearTimeout(this.autoTimer);
    const definition = this.activeDefinition;
    const line = definition?.lines[this.lineIndex];
    if (!definition || !line) {
      this.finishCurrent();
      return;
    }

    const identity = speakerIdentity(line.speaker);
    this.portrait.textContent = identity.initials;
    this.portrait.className = `dialogue-portrait ${line.speaker} ${line.expression ?? "neutral"}`;
    this.speaker.textContent = identity.name;
    this.text.textContent = line.text;
    this.nextButton.textContent = this.lineIndex === definition.lines.length - 1 ? "CLOSE" : "NEXT";
    this.history.push({ speaker: line.speaker, text: line.text });
    this.renderChoices(line);
    this.speak(line);

    if (!line.choices?.length && line.autoAdvanceMs) {
      this.autoTimer = window.setTimeout(() => this.advance(), line.autoAdvanceMs);
    }
  }

  private renderChoices(line: DialogueLine): void {
    this.choices.replaceChildren();
    const hasChoices = Boolean(line.choices?.length);
    this.choices.hidden = !hasChoices;
    this.nextButton.hidden = hasChoices;
    line.choices?.forEach((choice) => {
      const button = document.createElement("button");
      button.type = "button";
      button.textContent = choice.label;
      button.addEventListener("click", () => this.choose(choice));
      this.choices.append(button);
    });
  }

  private choose(choice: DialogueChoice): void {
    const dialogueId = this.activeDefinition?.id;
    if (!dialogueId) return;
    this.story.add(...(choice.effects ?? []));
    this.bus.emit("dialogue:choice", { dialogueId, choiceId: choice.id, effects: choice.effects ?? [] });
    this.nextButton.hidden = false;
    this.advance();
  }

  private advance(): void {
    if (!this.activeDefinition) return;
    this.lineIndex += 1;
    this.showLine();
  }

  private finishCurrent(): void {
    window.clearTimeout(this.autoTimer);
    if ("speechSynthesis" in window) window.speechSynthesis.cancel();
    this.activeDefinition = undefined;
    this.panel.hidden = true;
    this.choices.replaceChildren();
    let nextDefinition: DialogueDefinition | undefined;
    while (!nextDefinition && this.queue.length > 0) {
      const next = this.queue.shift();
      if (next) nextDefinition = this.definitions.get(next);
    }
    if (nextDefinition) this.start(nextDefinition);
    else this.bus.emit("dialogue:closed", {});
  }

  private replayCurrentLine(): void {
    const line = this.activeDefinition?.lines[this.lineIndex];
    if (line) this.speak(line, true);
  }

  private toggleHistory(): void {
    this.historyPanel.hidden = !this.historyPanel.hidden;
    if (this.historyPanel.hidden) return;
    this.historyList.innerHTML = this.history
      .slice(-30)
      .map((entry) => `<div><strong>${speakerIdentity(entry.speaker).name}</strong><p>${escapeHtml(entry.text)}</p></div>`)
      .join("");
  }

  private speak(line: DialogueLine, force = false): void {
    if ((!this.voiceEnabled && !force) || !("speechSynthesis" in window)) return;
    window.speechSynthesis.cancel();
    const utterance = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(line.text);
    utterance.rate = line.speaker === "echo" ? 0.82 : 0.96;
    utterance.pitch = line.speaker === "echo" ? 0.58 : line.speaker === "alex" ? 1.08 : 0.9;
    const voices = window.speechSynthesis.getVoices();
    const preferred = voices.find((voice) => voice.lang.startsWith("en") && voice.localService) ?? voices.find((voice) => voice.lang.startsWith("en"));
    if (preferred) utterance.voice = preferred;
    window.speechSynthesis.speak(utterance);
  }
}

function speakerIdentity(speaker: DialogueSpeaker): { name: string; initials: string } {
  return ({
    alex: { name: "ALEX VANCE", initials: "AV" },
    jordan: { name: "JORDAN MILLER", initials: "JM" },
    chen: { name: "ELIAS CHEN", initials: "EC" },
    ramirez: { name: "MIGUEL RAMIREZ", initials: "MR" },
    blackthorn: { name: "DIRECTOR BLACKTHORN", initials: "BT" },
    echo: { name: "ECHO", initials: "Ø" },
    system: { name: "ION SYSTEM", initials: "ION" },
  })[speaker];
}

function element<T extends HTMLElement = HTMLElement>(id: string): T {
  const found = document.getElementById(id);
  if (!found) throw new Error(`Missing dialogue element #${id}`);
  return found as T;
}

function escapeHtml(value: string): string {
  return value.replace(/[&<>'"]/g, (character) => ({
    "&": "&amp;", "<": "&lt;", ">": "&gt;", "'": "&#39;", '"': "&quot;",
  })[character] ?? character);
}

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/systems/DoorSystem.ts =====
import { Color3, StandardMaterial, Vector3 } from "@babylonjs/core";
import type { EventBus } from "../engine/EventBus";
import type { Agent } from "../entities/Agent";
import type { DoorAction } from "../tactical/TacticalTypes";
import type { DoorDefinition } from "../world/WorldTypes";
import type { NavigationObstacle, NavigationSystem } from "./NavigationSystem";

export type DoorState = "open" | "closed" | "locked" | "breached";
export type DoorSnapshot = { id: string; state: DoorState };
export type DoorRuntime = DoorDefinition & { state: DoorState };

export class DoorSystem {
  private readonly doors = new Map<string, DoorRuntime>();
  private readonly obstacles = new Map<string, NavigationObstacle>();

  constructor(
    definitions: DoorDefinition[],
    private readonly navigation: NavigationSystem,
    private readonly bus: EventBus,
  ) {
    for (const definition of definitions) {
      const runtime: DoorRuntime = { ...definition, state: definition.initialState ?? "closed" };
      runtime.mesh.metadata = {
        ...(runtime.mesh.metadata ?? {}),
        doorId: runtime.id,
        entityType: "door",
      };
      runtime.mesh.isPickable = true;
      this.doors.set(runtime.id, runtime);
      this.applyVisual(runtime);
    }
  }

  get(id: string | undefined): DoorRuntime | undefined {
    return id ? this.doors.get(id) : undefined;
  }

  availableAction(door: DoorRuntime): DoorAction {
    if (door.state === "open") return "close";
    if (door.state === "locked") return "hack";
    return "open";
  }

  duration(action: DoorAction): number {
    return ({ open: 0.45, close: 0.45, lock: 0.8, hack: 2.4, breach: 1.1 } as const)[action];
  }

  canUse(agent: Agent, door: DoorRuntime, action: DoorAction): { allowed: boolean; reason?: string } {
    if (agent.downed) return { allowed: false, reason: "Agent unavailable" };
    if (door.state === "breached" && action !== "open") return { allowed: false, reason: "Door is breached" };
    if (action === "hack" && !agent.tags.has("tech")) return { allowed: false, reason: "Requires a tech specialist" };
    if (action === "breach" && !agent.tags.has("assault")) return { allowed: false, reason: "Requires an assault specialist" };
    if (action === "breach" && agent.breachCharges <= 0) return { allowed: false, reason: "No breach charge equipped" };
    if (action === "lock" && door.state !== "closed") return { allowed: false, reason: "Close the door before locking" };
    if (action === "open" && door.state === "locked") return { allowed: false, reason: "Door is locked" };
    return { allowed: true };
  }

  complete(agent: Agent, door: DoorRuntime, action: DoorAction): boolean {
    const validation = this.canUse(agent, door, action);
    if (!validation.allowed) return false;
    if (action === "open" || action === "hack") door.state = "open";
    if (action === "close") door.state = "closed";
    if (action === "lock") door.state = "locked";
    if (action === "breach") {
      door.state = "breached";
      agent.breachCharges = Math.max(0, agent.breachCharges - 1);
    }
    this.applyVisual(door);
    if (action === "breach") {
      this.bus.emit("noise:created", { position: door.position.clone(), radius: 18, sourceTeam: "ion" });
    }
    this.bus.emit("door:changed", { doorId: door.id, state: door.state, action, agentId: agent.id });
    this.bus.emit("combat:log", {
      message: `${agent.definition.callsign}: ${action.toUpperCase()} ${door.label}.`,
      tone: action === "breach" ? "warning" : "success",
    });
    return true;
  }

  snapshot(): DoorSnapshot[] {
    return [...this.doors.values()].map((door) => ({ id: door.id, state: door.state }));
  }

  restore(snapshot: DoorSnapshot[] | undefined): void {
    for (const saved of snapshot ?? []) {
      const door = this.doors.get(saved.id);
      if (!door) continue;
      door.state = saved.state;
      this.applyVisual(door);
    }
  }

  private applyVisual(door: DoorRuntime): void {
    const open = door.state === "open" || door.state === "breached";
    door.mesh.scaling.y = door.state === "breached" ? 0.25 : 1;
    door.mesh.rotation.y = open ? door.openYaw : door.closedYaw;
    door.mesh.position.copyFrom(open ? door.openPosition : door.position);
    door.mesh.metadata = {
      ...(door.mesh.metadata ?? {}),
      doorId: door.id,
      blocksVision: !open,
      blocksShots: !open,
      cameraOccluder: !open,
    };
    this.syncNavigationObstacle(door, open);
    const material = door.mesh.material;
    if (material instanceof StandardMaterial) {
      material.emissiveColor = door.state === "locked"
        ? new Color3(0.5, 0.04, 0.02)
        : door.state === "open"
          ? new Color3(0.02, 0.18, 0.12)
          : new Color3(0.02, 0.08, 0.1);
    }
  }

  private syncNavigationObstacle(door: DoorRuntime, open: boolean): void {
    const existing = this.obstacles.get(door.id);
    if (open) {
      if (existing) {
        this.navigation.removeObstacle(existing);
        this.obstacles.delete(door.id);
      }
      return;
    }
    if (existing) return;
    const obstacle = this.navigation.addBoxObstacle(
      door.position.clone(),
      new Vector3(0.24, 1.4, 0.86),
      door.closedYaw,
    );
    if (obstacle) this.obstacles.set(door.id, obstacle);
  }
}

export function doorInteractionPoint(door: DoorRuntime, agentPosition: Vector3): Vector3 {
  const a = door.interactionPoints[0];
  const b = door.interactionPoints[1];
  return Vector3.DistanceSquared(agentPosition, a) <= Vector3.DistanceSquared(agentPosition, b) ? a.clone() : b.clone();
}

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/systems/EchoObserverSystem.test.ts =====
import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest";
import { chooseAdaptation } from "./EchoObserverSystem";

describe("chooseAdaptation", () => {
  it("prioritizes isolation and overwatch counters deterministically", () => {
    expect(chooseAdaptation({ squadSplitCount: 2, overwatchUsage: 5, alarmsTriggered: 1, evidenceRecovered: 8 })).toBe("isolation");
    expect(chooseAdaptation({ squadSplitCount: 0, overwatchUsage: 3, alarmsTriggered: 1, evidenceRecovered: 8 })).toBe("counter_overwatch");
  });

  it("falls back to observation when no dominant pattern exists", () => {
    expect(chooseAdaptation({ squadSplitCount: 0, overwatchUsage: 0, alarmsTriggered: 0, evidenceRecovered: 2 })).toBe("observation");
  });
});

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/systems/EchoObserverSystem.ts =====
import {
  Color3,
  MeshBuilder,
  StandardMaterial,
  Vector3,
  type Scene,
} from "@babylonjs/core";
import type { EventBus } from "../engine/EventBus";
import type { Agent } from "../entities/Agent";
import type { Enemy } from "../entities/Enemy";
import type { StoryState } from "../story/StoryState";
import type { InvestigationSystem } from "./InvestigationSystem";

export type EchoAdaptation = "isolation" | "counter_overwatch" | "security_escalation" | "data_denial" | "observation";

export type EchoMetrics = {
  squadSplitCount: number;
  overwatchUsage: number;
  alarmsTriggered: number;
  evidenceRecovered: number;
  disabledDrones: number;
  lethalDroneKills: number;
  medicalInterventions: number;
  commandsCancelled: number;
  missionTime: number;
  injuredAgents: number;
  commandCounts: Record<string, number>;
  preferredAgent?: string;
};

export type EchoObserverSnapshot = {
  metrics: EchoMetrics;
  encounterStarted: boolean;
  selectedAdaptation?: EchoAdaptation;
  injuredAgentIds: string[];
};

export class EchoObserverSystem {
  readonly metrics: EchoMetrics = {
    squadSplitCount: 0,
    overwatchUsage: 0,
    alarmsTriggered: 0,
    evidenceRecovered: 0,
    disabledDrones: 0,
    lethalDroneKills: 0,
    medicalInterventions: 0,
    commandsCancelled: 0,
    missionTime: 0,
    injuredAgents: 0,
    commandCounts: {},
  };

  private splitActive = false;
  private encounterStarted = false;
  private selectedAdaptation?: EchoAdaptation;
  private readonly injuredAgentIds = new Set<string>();
  private profileTier: "profiling" | "prediction" | "adaptation" = "profiling";
  private readonly decoyDisposers: Array<() => void> = [];

  constructor(
    private readonly scene: Scene,
    private readonly agents: Agent[],
    private readonly enemies: Enemy[],
    private readonly investigation: InvestigationSystem,
    private readonly story: StoryState,
    private readonly bus: EventBus,
  ) {
    bus.on("command:queued", ({ agentId, commandType }) => {
      this.metrics.commandCounts[agentId] = (this.metrics.commandCounts[agentId] ?? 0) + 1;
      if (commandType === "overwatch") this.metrics.overwatchUsage += 1;
      if (commandType === "stabilize") this.metrics.medicalInterventions += 1;
      this.refreshPreferredAgent();
      this.emitProfileChanged();
    });
    bus.on("commands:cleared", ({ count }) => {
      this.metrics.commandsCancelled += count;
      this.emitProfileChanged();
    });
    bus.on("security:alarm", () => {
      this.metrics.alarmsTriggered += 1;
      this.emitProfileChanged();
    });
    bus.on("evidence:collected", () => {
      this.metrics.evidenceRecovered += 1;
      this.emitProfileChanged();
    });
    bus.on("enemy:disabled", () => {
      this.metrics.disabledDrones += 1;
      this.metrics.lethalDroneKills += 1;
      this.emitProfileChanged();
    });
    bus.on("combat:attack", ({ targetTeam, targetId, damage }) => {
      if (targetTeam === "ion" && damage > 0) {
        this.injuredAgentIds.add(targetId);
        this.metrics.injuredAgents = this.injuredAgentIds.size;
        this.emitProfileChanged();
      }
    });
  }

  update(deltaSeconds: number): void {
    if (deltaSeconds <= 0) return;
    this.metrics.missionTime += deltaSeconds;
    if (this.encounterStarted) return;
    const active = this.agents.filter((agent) => !agent.downed);
    let maxDistance = 0;
    for (let a = 0; a < active.length; a += 1) {
      for (let b = a + 1; b < active.length; b += 1) {
        const first = active[a];
        const second = active[b];
        if (!first || !second) continue;
        maxDistance = Math.max(maxDistance, planarDistance(first.root.position, second.root.position));
      }
    }
    const split = maxDistance >= 8;
    if (split && !this.splitActive) {
      this.metrics.squadSplitCount += 1;
      this.emitProfileChanged();
    }
    this.splitActive = split;
  }

  beginEncounter(): EchoAdaptation {
    if (this.selectedAdaptation) return this.selectedAdaptation;
    this.encounterStarted = true;
    this.metrics.evidenceRecovered = this.investigation.recoveredCount;
    const adaptation = chooseAdaptation(this.metrics);
    this.selectedAdaptation = adaptation;
    this.story.set("echo.adaptation", adaptation);
    this.story.add(`echo.adaptation.${adaptation}`);

    if (adaptation === "counter_overwatch") {
      this.enemies.forEach((enemy) => { enemy.overwatchJammer = true; });
      this.spawnDecoys();
    } else if (adaptation === "security_escalation") {
      this.enemies.filter((enemy) => enemy.kind === "security").forEach((enemy) => {
        enemy.armor += 12;
        enemy.accuracy = Math.min(0.9, enemy.accuracy + 0.12);
        enemy.baseDamage += 5;
      });
    } else if (adaptation === "data_denial") {
      const corrupted = this.investigation.corruptOneAvailable();
      if (corrupted) {
        this.bus.emit("combat:log", { message: `Echo corrupted ${corrupted.label}.`, tone: "danger" });
      }
    }

    const summary = adaptationSummary(adaptation);
    this.bus.emit("echo:adaptation", { adaptation, summary });
    this.bus.emit("echo:encounter-start", { adaptation });
    this.bus.emit("dialogue:play", { dialogueId: `echo_${adaptation}` });
    this.emitProfileChanged();
    return adaptation;
  }

  get adaptation(): EchoAdaptation | undefined {
    return this.selectedAdaptation;
  }

  snapshot(): EchoObserverSnapshot {
    return {
      metrics: { ...this.metrics, commandCounts: { ...this.metrics.commandCounts } },
      encounterStarted: this.encounterStarted,
      selectedAdaptation: this.selectedAdaptation,
      injuredAgentIds: [...this.injuredAgentIds],
    };
  }

  restore(snapshot: EchoObserverSnapshot): void {
    this.disposeDecoys();
    Object.assign(this.metrics, { ...snapshot.metrics, commandCounts: { ...snapshot.metrics.commandCounts } });
    this.encounterStarted = snapshot.encounterStarted;
    this.selectedAdaptation = snapshot.selectedAdaptation;
    this.injuredAgentIds.clear();
    snapshot.injuredAgentIds.forEach((id) => this.injuredAgentIds.add(id));
    this.splitActive = false;
    this.emitProfileChanged();
  }

  private refreshPreferredAgent(): void {
    const top = Object.entries(this.metrics.commandCounts).sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1])[0];
    this.metrics.preferredAgent = top?.[0];
  }

  private emitProfileChanged(): void {
    this.story.set("echo.squad_split_count", this.metrics.squadSplitCount);
    this.story.set("echo.overwatch_usage", this.metrics.overwatchUsage);
    this.story.set("echo.alarms_triggered", this.metrics.alarmsTriggered);
    const signals = this.metrics.squadSplitCount + this.metrics.overwatchUsage + this.metrics.alarmsTriggered + this.metrics.evidenceRecovered;
    const confidence = Math.min(100, 8 + signals * 9);
    const tier = confidence >= 70 ? "adaptation" : confidence >= 38 ? "prediction" : "profiling";
    if (tier !== this.profileTier) {
      this.profileTier = tier;
      this.bus.emit("echo:profile-tier", { tier, confidence });
    }
    this.bus.emit("echo:profile-changed", { metrics: { ...this.metrics, commandCounts: { ...this.metrics.commandCounts } } });
  }

  private spawnDecoys(): void {
    const positions = [
      new Vector3(4.8, 1.25, -4.4),
      new Vector3(10.8, 1.25, 3.5),
      new Vector3(14.5, 1.25, -5.2),
    ];
    positions.forEach((position, index) => {
      const decoy = MeshBuilder.CreateSphere(`echo-decoy:${index}`, { diameter: 0.85, segments: 12 }, this.scene);
      decoy.position.copyFrom(position);
      decoy.isPickable = false;
      const material = new StandardMaterial(`echo-decoy-material:${index}`, this.scene);
      material.diffuseColor = new Color3(0.05, 0.25, 0.28);
      material.emissiveColor = new Color3(0.1, 0.8, 0.92);
      material.alpha = 0.42;
      material.wireframe = true;
      decoy.material = material;
      const started = performance.now();
      const observer = this.scene.onBeforeRenderObservable.add(() => {
        const elapsed = (performance.now() - started) / 1000;
        decoy.position.y = position.y + Math.sin(elapsed * 2.5 + index) * 0.22;
        decoy.rotation.y += 0.012;
        decoy.visibility = 0.25 + Math.abs(Math.sin(elapsed * 6 + index)) * 0.4;
      });
      this.decoyDisposers.push(() => {
        this.scene.onBeforeRenderObservable.remove(observer);
        decoy.dispose(false, true);
      });
    });
  }

  private disposeDecoys(): void {
    while (this.decoyDisposers.length) this.decoyDisposers.pop()?.();
  }
}

export function chooseAdaptation(metrics: Pick<EchoMetrics, "squadSplitCount" | "overwatchUsage" | "alarmsTriggered" | "evidenceRecovered">): EchoAdaptation {
  if (metrics.squadSplitCount >= 2) return "isolation";
  if (metrics.overwatchUsage >= 3) return "counter_overwatch";
  if (metrics.alarmsTriggered >= 1) return "security_escalation";
  if (metrics.evidenceRecovered >= 5) return "data_denial";
  return "observation";
}

export function adaptationSummary(adaptation: EchoAdaptation): string {
  return ({
    isolation: "Echo identified repeated squad separation and is assigning drones to isolate individual agents.",
    counter_overwatch: "Echo detected reactive-fire reliance and introduced false signatures plus overwatch jamming.",
    security_escalation: "Echo recorded tolerance for detection and reinforced both security frames.",
    data_denial: "Echo recognized evidence-first behavior and destroyed an unrecovered evidence node.",
    observation: "Echo found no dominant pattern and initiated direct multi-angle observation.",
  })[adaptation];
}

function planarDistance(a: Vector3, b: Vector3): number {
  return Math.hypot(a.x - b.x, a.z - b.z);
}

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/systems/EnemyAISystem.ts =====
import { Vector3 } from "@babylonjs/core";
import type { Agent } from "../entities/Agent";
import type { Enemy } from "../entities/Enemy";
import type { EventBus } from "../engine/EventBus";
import type { CombatSystem } from "./CombatSystem";
import type { NavigationSystem } from "./NavigationSystem";
import type { VisionSystem } from "./VisionSystem";

export class EnemyAISystem {
  private readonly recentNoises: Array<{ position: Vector3; radius: number; age: number }> = [];
  private simulationTime = 0;
  private encounterStarted = false;
  private pendingAlarm = false;

  constructor(
    private readonly agents: Agent[],
    private readonly enemies: Enemy[],
    private readonly navigation: NavigationSystem,
    private readonly vision: VisionSystem,
    private readonly combat: CombatSystem,
    private readonly bus: EventBus,
  ) {
    bus.on("noise:created", ({ position, radius }) => {
      this.recentNoises.push({ position: position.clone(), radius, age: 0 });
    });
    bus.on("security:alarm", () => {
      this.pendingAlarm = true;
      if (this.encounterStarted) this.wakeSecurityDrones();
    });
    bus.on("echo:encounter-start", ({ adaptation }) => {
      this.encounterStarted = true;
      this.activateEncounter(adaptation);
      if (this.pendingAlarm) this.wakeSecurityDrones();
    });
  }

  update(deltaSeconds: number): void {
    if (deltaSeconds <= 0) return;
    this.simulationTime += deltaSeconds;
    this.recentNoises.forEach((noise) => { noise.age += deltaSeconds; });
    while (this.recentNoises[0] && this.recentNoises[0].age > 6) this.recentNoises.shift();

    for (const enemy of this.enemies) {
      if (enemy.disabled) continue;
      if (enemy.stunnedUntil > this.simulationTime) {
        this.navigation.stopEntity(enemy);
        enemy.debugDecision = "emp-stunned";
        continue;
      }
      if (!this.encounterStarted) {
        this.navigation.stopEntity(enemy);
        continue;
      }
      enemy.fireCooldown = Math.max(0, enemy.fireCooldown - deltaSeconds);
      this.updateEnemy(enemy, deltaSeconds);
    }
  }

  private updateEnemy(enemy: Enemy, deltaSeconds: number): void {
    if (enemy.kind === "jammer") this.updateJammerField(enemy, deltaSeconds);
    if (enemy.suppressionState === "broken") {
      enemy.state = "RETREAT";
    } else if (enemy.suppressionState === "pinned") {
      this.navigation.stopEntity(enemy);
      enemy.debugDecision = "pinned";
      return;
    }

    const visibleAgents = this.agents.filter((agent) => !agent.downed && this.vision.canEnemySeeAgent(enemy, agent));
    const closestVisible = visibleAgents.sort((a, b) => distance(enemy, a) - distance(enemy, b))[0];

    if (closestVisible) {
      enemy.targetAgentId = closestVisible.id;
      enemy.lastKnownAgentPosition = closestVisible.root.position.clone();
      enemy.searchTimer = 0;
      if (enemy.kind === "observer") {
        enemy.state = "RETREAT";
        enemy.scanProgress += deltaSeconds;
        if (enemy.scanProgress >= 1.7 && !enemy.reinforcementCalled) {
          enemy.reinforcementCalled = true;
          this.bus.emit("combat:log", { message: "Observer drone transmitted Alpha Team's profile.", tone: "warning" });
          this.wakeSecurityDrones();
        }
      } else {
        enemy.state = "ENGAGE";
      }
    } else if (enemy.state === "ENGAGE") {
      enemy.state = "INVESTIGATE";
      enemy.searchTimer = 0;
    }

    if (enemy.state === "DORMANT") {
      this.navigation.stopEntity(enemy);
      this.reactToNoise(enemy);
      return;
    }

    if (enemy.state === "PATROL") {
      this.reactToNoise(enemy);
      this.patrol(enemy);
      return;
    }

    if (enemy.state === "INVESTIGATE") {
      const destination = enemy.lastKnownAgentPosition ?? this.latestNoiseFor(enemy)?.position;
      if (!destination) {
        enemy.state = "SEARCH";
        enemy.searchTimer = 0;
        return;
      }
      this.navigation.moveEntity(enemy, destination);
      if (planarDistance(enemy.root.position, destination) <= 1.1) {
        enemy.state = "SEARCH";
        enemy.searchTimer = 0;
      }
      return;
    }

    if (enemy.state === "SEARCH") {
      this.navigation.stopEntity(enemy);
      enemy.searchTimer += deltaSeconds;
      enemy.root.rotation.y += deltaSeconds * 0.85;
      if (enemy.searchTimer >= 4) {
        enemy.state = "PATROL";
        enemy.searchTimer = 0;
      }
      return;
    }

    if (enemy.state === "RETREAT") {
      this.navigation.moveEntity(enemy, enemy.retreatPoint);
      if (planarDistance(enemy.root.position, enemy.retreatPoint) <= 1.1) {
        enemy.disabled = true;
        enemy.escaped = true;
        enemy.state = "DISABLED";
        enemy.visualMeshes.forEach((mesh) => { mesh.visibility = 0; });
        this.navigation.stopEntity(enemy);
        this.bus.emit("enemy:escaped", { enemyId: enemy.id });
        this.bus.emit("combat:log", { message: "Observer drone escaped with tactical data.", tone: "danger" });
      }
      return;
    }

    if (enemy.state === "ENGAGE") {
      const target = this.agents.find((agent) => agent.id === enemy.targetAgentId && !agent.downed)
        ?? this.agents.filter((agent) => !agent.downed).sort((a, b) => distance(enemy, a) - distance(enemy, b))[0];
      if (!target) return;
      if (enemy.kind === "hunter") {
        this.updateHunter(enemy, target);
        return;
      }
      if (enemy.kind === "jammer") {
        this.updateJammer(enemy, target);
        return;
      }

      const attackEstimate = this.combat.estimateAttack(enemy, target);
      const healthRatio = enemy.health / enemy.maxHealth;
      const shootScore = !attackEstimate.blocked && attackEstimate.distance <= enemy.weaponRange * 0.92
        ? attackEstimate.chance * 100 + (target.downed ? -100 : 0)
        : -100;
      const retreatScore = healthRatio <= 0.25 ? 95 + (0.25 - healthRatio) * 100 : 0;
      const flankScore = attackEstimate.blocked ? 72 : Math.max(18, 58 - attackEstimate.chance * 45);
      const action = [
        { id: "shoot", score: shootScore },
        { id: "retreat", score: retreatScore },
        { id: "flank", score: flankScore },
      ].sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score)[0]!;
      enemy.debugDecision = action.id;
      enemy.debugScore = action.score;

      if (action.id === "retreat") {
        enemy.state = "RETREAT";
        return;
      }
      if (action.id === "shoot") {
        this.navigation.stopEntity(enemy);
        face(enemy, target.root.position);
        if (enemy.fireCooldown <= 0) {
          this.combat.performAttack(enemy, target);
          enemy.fireCooldown = enemy.kind === "security" ? 1.55 : 2.2;
        }
      } else {
        this.navigation.moveEntity(enemy, this.flankDestination(target, enemy));
      }
    }
  }

  private activateEncounter(adaptation: "isolation" | "counter_overwatch" | "security_escalation" | "data_denial" | "observation"): void {
    const activeAgents = this.agents.filter((agent) => !agent.downed);
    this.enemies.forEach((enemy, index) => {
      enemy.scanProgress = 0;
      enemy.reinforcementCalled = false;
      enemy.state = "PATROL";
      if (adaptation === "isolation" && enemy.kind === "security") {
        const centroid = activeAgents.reduce((sum, agent) => sum.add(agent.root.position), Vector3.Zero()).scale(1 / Math.max(1, activeAgents.length));
        const isolated = [...activeAgents].sort((a, b) => planarDistance(b.root.position, centroid) - planarDistance(a.root.position, centroid))[index % Math.max(1, activeAgents.length)];
        if (isolated) {
          enemy.targetAgentId = isolated.id;
          enemy.lastKnownAgentPosition = isolated.root.position.clone();
          enemy.state = "INVESTIGATE";
        }
      } else if (adaptation === "security_escalation" && enemy.kind === "security") {
        const target = activeAgents[index % Math.max(1, activeAgents.length)];
        if (target) {
          enemy.targetAgentId = target.id;
          enemy.lastKnownAgentPosition = target.root.position.clone();
          enemy.state = "INVESTIGATE";
        }
      } else if (adaptation === "observation" && enemy.kind === "observer") {
        enemy.scanProgress = 1.1;
      }
    });
    this.bus.emit("alert:changed", { level: "HOSTILE" });
    this.bus.emit("combat:log", { message: "Echo drones activated. Behavioral countermeasure deployed.", tone: "danger" });
  }

  private patrol(enemy: Enemy): void {
    const destination = enemy.patrolPoints[enemy.patrolIndex];
    if (!destination) return;
    this.navigation.moveEntity(enemy, destination);
    if (planarDistance(enemy.root.position, destination) <= 0.85) {
      enemy.patrolIndex = (enemy.patrolIndex + 1) % enemy.patrolPoints.length;
    }
  }

  private reactToNoise(enemy: Enemy): void {
    const noise = this.latestNoiseFor(enemy);
    if (!noise) return;
    enemy.lastKnownAgentPosition = noise.position.clone();
    enemy.state = "INVESTIGATE";
    this.bus.emit("enemy:state", { enemyId: enemy.id, state: enemy.state });
  }

  private latestNoiseFor(enemy: Enemy): { position: Vector3; radius: number; age: number } | undefined {
    return [...this.recentNoises]
      .reverse()
      .find((noise) => planarDistance(noise.position, enemy.root.position) <= noise.radius);
  }

  private wakeSecurityDrones(): void {
    let wokeAny = false;
    this.enemies.forEach((enemy) => {
      if (["security", "hunter", "jammer"].includes(enemy.kind) && enemy.state === "DORMANT" && !enemy.disabled) {
        enemy.state = "PATROL";
        wokeAny = true;
      }
    });
    if (wokeAny) {
      this.bus.emit("combat:log", { message: "Echo security drones activated.", tone: "danger" });
      this.bus.emit("alert:changed", { level: "HOSTILE" });
    }
  }

  private flankDestination(target: Agent, enemy: Enemy): Vector3 {
    const direction = target.root.position.subtract(enemy.root.position);
    direction.y = 0;
    if (direction.lengthSquared() < 0.01) return target.root.position.clone();
    direction.normalize();
    const lateral = new Vector3(-direction.z, 0, direction.x);
    const sign = enemy.id.charCodeAt(enemy.id.length - 1) % 2 === 0 ? 1 : -1;
    return target.root.position.add(lateral.scale(sign * 3.2)).subtract(direction.scale(1.8));
  }

  private updateHunter(enemy: Enemy, target: Agent): void {
    const gap = distance(enemy, target);
    face(enemy, target.root.position);
    if (gap <= enemy.weaponRange) {
      this.navigation.stopEntity(enemy);
      if (enemy.fireCooldown <= 0) {
        this.combat.performAttack(enemy, target);
        enemy.fireCooldown = 0.9;
      }
      enemy.debugDecision = "hunter-strike";
      enemy.debugScore = 100 - gap;
      return;
    }
    this.navigation.moveEntity(enemy, target.root.position);
    enemy.debugDecision = "hunter-charge";
    enemy.debugScore = 85;
  }

  private updateJammer(enemy: Enemy, target: Agent): void {
    const gap = distance(enemy, target);
    face(enemy, target.root.position);
    if (gap < 4.5) {
      const away = enemy.root.position.subtract(target.root.position);
      away.y = 0;
      if (away.lengthSquared() > 0.01) away.normalize();
      this.navigation.moveEntity(enemy, enemy.root.position.add(away.scale(4)));
      enemy.debugDecision = "jammer-disengage";
      enemy.debugScore = 80;
      return;
    }
    const estimate = this.combat.estimateAttack(enemy, target);
    if (!estimate.blocked && gap <= enemy.weaponRange) {
      this.navigation.stopEntity(enemy);
      if (enemy.fireCooldown <= 0) {
        this.combat.performAttack(enemy, target);
        enemy.fireCooldown = 2.35;
      }
      enemy.debugDecision = "jammer-fire";
      enemy.debugScore = estimate.chance * 100;
      return;
    }
    this.navigation.moveEntity(enemy, target.root.position);
    enemy.debugDecision = "jammer-advance";
    enemy.debugScore = 55;
  }

  private updateJammerField(enemy: Enemy, deltaSeconds: number): void {
    for (const agent of this.agents) {
      if (agent.downed || distance(enemy, agent) > 8) continue;
      agent.jammedUntil = Math.max(agent.jammedUntil, this.simulationTime + 0.35);
      agent.suppression = Math.min(120, agent.suppression + deltaSeconds * 3.5);
    }
  }
}

function distance(enemy: Enemy, agent: Agent): number {
  return planarDistance(enemy.root.position, agent.root.position);
}

function planarDistance(a: Vector3, b: Vector3): number {
  return Math.hypot(a.x - b.x, a.z - b.z);
}

function face(enemy: Enemy, point: Vector3): void {
  const delta = point.subtract(enemy.root.position);
  enemy.root.rotation.y = Math.atan2(delta.x, delta.z);
}

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/systems/GadgetSystem.ts =====
import {
  Color3,
  Mesh,
  MeshBuilder,
  StandardMaterial,
  Vector3,
  type Scene,
} from "@babylonjs/core";
import type { EventBus } from "../engine/EventBus";
import type { Agent } from "../entities/Agent";
import type { Enemy } from "../entities/Enemy";
import type { GadgetId } from "../tactical/TacticalTypes";

export type GadgetZoneSnapshot = {
  kind: GadgetId;
  position: { x: number; y: number; z: number };
  radius: number;
  remaining: number;
};

type GadgetZone = GadgetZoneSnapshot & { mesh: Mesh };

export class GadgetSystem {
  private readonly zones: GadgetZone[] = [];

  constructor(
    private readonly scene: Scene,
    private readonly agents: Agent[],
    private readonly enemies: Enemy[],
    private readonly bus: EventBus,
  ) {}

  update(deltaSeconds: number, simulationTime: number): void {
    for (let index = this.zones.length - 1; index >= 0; index -= 1) {
      const zone = this.zones[index];
      if (!zone) continue;
      zone.remaining -= deltaSeconds;
      if (zone.kind === "emp") {
        this.applyEmpPulse(zone, simulationTime);
      }
      if (zone.remaining > 0) continue;
      zone.mesh.dispose(false, true);
      this.zones.splice(index, 1);
    }
  }

  deploy(agent: Agent, kind: GadgetId, position: Vector3, simulationTime: number): boolean {
    if (agent.gadgetCharges[kind] <= 0 || agent.downed) return false;
    agent.gadgetCharges[kind] -= 1;
    if (kind === "smoke") this.createZone(kind, position, 3.8, 10);
    else {
      const zone = this.createZone(kind, position, 4.2, 1.2);
      this.applyEmpPulse(zone, simulationTime);
    }
    this.bus.emit("noise:created", {
      position: position.clone(),
      radius: kind === "smoke" ? 5 : 9,
      sourceTeam: "ion",
    });
    this.bus.emit("gadget:deployed", { agentId: agent.id, gadgetId: kind, position: position.clone() });
    this.bus.emit("combat:log", {
      message: `${agent.definition.callsign} deployed ${kind.toUpperCase()}.`,
      tone: "success",
    });
    this.bus.emit("combat:changed", {});
    return true;
  }

  lineCrossesSmoke(a: Vector3, b: Vector3): boolean {
    return this.zones.some((zone) => zone.kind === "smoke" && segmentDistanceXZ(a, b, vector(zone.position)) <= zone.radius);
  }

  pointInSmoke(point: Vector3): boolean {
    return this.zones.some((zone) => zone.kind === "smoke" && planarDistance(point, vector(zone.position)) <= zone.radius);
  }

  snapshot(): GadgetZoneSnapshot[] {
    return this.zones.map(({ kind, position, radius, remaining }) => ({ kind, position: { ...position }, radius, remaining }));
  }

  restore(snapshot: GadgetZoneSnapshot[] | undefined): void {
    this.zones.splice(0).forEach((zone) => zone.mesh.dispose(false, true));
    for (const zone of snapshot ?? []) this.createZone(zone.kind, vector(zone.position), zone.radius, zone.remaining);
  }

  private createZone(kind: GadgetId, position: Vector3, radius: number, remaining: number): GadgetZone {
    const mesh = kind === "smoke"
      ? MeshBuilder.CreateCylinder(`smoke:${crypto.randomUUID()}`, { diameter: radius * 2, height: 2.7, tessellation: 32 }, this.scene)
      : MeshBuilder.CreateTorus(`emp:${crypto.randomUUID()}`, { diameter: radius * 2, thickness: 0.08, tessellation: 48 }, this.scene);
    mesh.position.copyFrom(position);
    mesh.position.y = kind === "smoke" ? 1.25 : 0.12;
    if (kind === "emp") mesh.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2;
    mesh.isPickable = false;
    const material = new StandardMaterial(`${mesh.name}:material`, this.scene);
    material.diffuseColor = kind === "smoke" ? new Color3(0.35, 0.45, 0.5) : new Color3(0.25, 0.55, 1);
    material.emissiveColor = kind === "smoke" ? new Color3(0.05, 0.08, 0.09) : new Color3(0.1, 0.35, 0.9);
    material.alpha = kind === "smoke" ? 0.36 : 0.78;
    material.disableLighting = kind === "emp";
    mesh.material = material;
    const zone: GadgetZone = { kind, position: { x: position.x, y: position.y, z: position.z }, radius, remaining, mesh };
    this.zones.push(zone);
    return zone;
  }

  private applyEmpPulse(zone: GadgetZone, simulationTime: number): void {
    const center = vector(zone.position);
    for (const enemy of this.enemies) {
      if (enemy.disabled || planarDistance(enemy.root.position, center) > zone.radius) continue;
      const duration = enemy.kind === "jammer" ? 2.2 : 5;
      enemy.stunnedUntil = Math.max(enemy.stunnedUntil, simulationTime + duration);
      enemy.suppression = Math.min(120, enemy.suppression + 55);
    }
    for (const agent of this.agents) {
      if (planarDistance(agent.root.position, center) <= zone.radius) {
        agent.jammedUntil = Math.max(agent.jammedUntil, simulationTime + 1.4);
      }
    }
  }
}

function vector(value: { x: number; y: number; z: number }): Vector3 {
  return new Vector3(value.x, value.y, value.z);
}

function planarDistance(a: Vector3, b: Vector3): number {
  return Math.hypot(a.x - b.x, a.z - b.z);
}

function segmentDistanceXZ(a: Vector3, b: Vector3, point: Vector3): number {
  const abX = b.x - a.x;
  const abZ = b.z - a.z;
  const lengthSquared = abX * abX + abZ * abZ;
  if (lengthSquared <= 0.0001) return planarDistance(a, point);
  const t = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, ((point.x - a.x) * abX + (point.z - a.z) * abZ) / lengthSquared));
  return Math.hypot(point.x - (a.x + abX * t), point.z - (a.z + abZ * t));
}

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/systems/GameInput.ts =====
import type { Scene } from "@babylonjs/core";
import type { EventBus } from "../engine/EventBus";
import type { TimeManager, TimeState } from "../engine/TimeManager";
import type { TacticalCamera } from "../camera/TacticalCamera";
import type { Enemy } from "../entities/Enemy";
import type { Agent } from "../entities/Agent";
import type { CombatSystem } from "./CombatSystem";
import type { CommandSystem } from "./CommandSystem";
import type { CoverSystem } from "./CoverSystem";
import type { SelectionSystem } from "./SelectionSystem";
import type { VisionSystem } from "./VisionSystem";
import type { InvestigationSystem } from "./InvestigationSystem";
import { Vector3 } from "@babylonjs/core";
import type { DoorSystem } from "./DoorSystem";
import {
  FIRE_MODES,
  MOVEMENT_STANCES,
  type DoorAction,
  type FireMode,
  type GadgetId,
  type MovementStance,
} from "../tactical/TacticalTypes";
import { formationDestinations } from "../utils/formation";
import type { SettingsManager } from "../settings/SettingsManager";
import type { AbilitySystem } from "./AbilitySystem";
import type { TacticalPreviewSystem } from "./TacticalPreviewSystem";

export class GameInput {
  private holdResumeState?: TimeState;
  private readonly targetInfo = document.getElementById("targetInfo");
  private lastPreviewAt = 0;
  private stance: MovementStance = "tactical";
  private fireMode: FireMode = "standard";
  private pendingGadget?: GadgetId;
  private pendingOverwatch = false;
  private doorAction: DoorAction | "auto" = "auto";
  private rightDown?: { ground: Vector3; clientX: number; clientY: number };

  constructor(
    private readonly canvas: HTMLCanvasElement,
    private readonly scene: Scene,
    private readonly camera: TacticalCamera,
    private readonly selection: SelectionSystem,
    private readonly commands: CommandSystem,
    private readonly combat: CombatSystem,
    private readonly cover: CoverSystem,
    private readonly vision: VisionSystem,
    private readonly investigation: InvestigationSystem,
    private readonly doors: DoorSystem,
    private readonly enemies: Enemy[],
    private readonly time: TimeManager,
    private readonly settings: SettingsManager,
    private readonly abilities: AbilitySystem,
    private readonly preview: TacticalPreviewSystem,
    private readonly bus: EventBus,
  ) {
    this.bind();
    this.updateTacticalControlLabels();
  }

  private bind(): void {
    this.canvas.addEventListener("contextmenu", (event) => event.preventDefault());
    this.canvas.addEventListener("dblclick", () => {
      const selected = this.selection.selectedAgents;
      if (selected.length === 0) return;
      const center = selected.reduce((sum, agent) => sum.add(agent.root.position), selected[0]!.root.position.scale(0));
      this.camera.focus(center.scale(1 / selected.length));
    });
    this.canvas.addEventListener("pointerleave", () => {
      this.preview.clear();
      this.abilities.setHoveredEnemy(undefined);
      if (this.targetInfo) this.targetInfo.hidden = true;
      this.rightDown = undefined;
    });
    this.canvas.addEventListener("pointermove", (event) => this.updateTargetPreview(event));
    this.canvas.addEventListener("pointerdown", (event) => {
      if (event.button !== 2) return;
      const ground = this.camera.getGroundPoint(event.clientX, event.clientY);
      if (ground) this.rightDown = { ground, clientX: event.clientX, clientY: event.clientY };
    });
    this.canvas.addEventListener("pointerup", (event) => {
      if (event.button !== 2) return;
      this.handleRightClick(event);
      this.rightDown = undefined;
    });

    window.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
      const target = event.target as HTMLElement | null;
      if (target?.matches("input, textarea, select, button[data-binding-action]")) return;

      if (this.settings.matches("pause", event.code)) {
        event.preventDefault();
        if (!event.repeat) {
          if (this.settings.value.pauseMode === "hold") {
            if (this.time.currentState !== "paused") {
              this.holdResumeState = this.time.currentState;
              this.time.setState("paused");
            }
          } else {
            this.time.togglePause();
          }
        }
      }
      if (this.settings.matches("slow", event.code) && !event.repeat) this.time.toggleSlowMotion();
      if (this.settings.matches("selectSquad", event.code) && !event.repeat) this.selection.selectAll();
      if (this.settings.matches("overwatch", event.code) && !event.repeat) this.armOverwatch();
      if (this.settings.matches("reload", event.code) && !event.repeat) this.issueReload();
      if (this.settings.matches("stabilize", event.code) && !event.repeat) this.issueStabilize();
      if (this.settings.matches("interact", event.code) && !event.repeat) this.issueNearestInteraction();
      if (event.code === "KeyZ" && !event.repeat) this.cycleStance();
      if (event.code === "KeyG" && !event.repeat) this.issueAbility();
      if (event.code === "KeyB" && !event.repeat) this.cycleFireMode();
      if (event.code === "Digit5" && !event.repeat) this.armGadget("smoke");
      if (event.code === "Digit6" && !event.repeat) this.armGadget("emp");
      if (event.code === "KeyY" && !event.repeat) this.toggleSyncPlanning();
      if (event.code === "Enter" && !event.repeat && this.commands.syncPlanningGroup) this.commitSyncGroup();
      if (this.settings.matches("threatOverlay", event.code) && !event.repeat) {
        const visible = this.vision.toggleCones();
        this.bus.emit("toast", { message: `Threat cones ${visible ? "shown" : "hidden"}.` });
      }
      if (this.settings.matches("coverOverlay", event.code) && !event.repeat) {
        const visible = this.cover.toggleIndicators();
        this.bus.emit("toast", { message: `Cover indicators ${visible ? "shown" : "hidden"}.` });
      }
      if (event.code === "Tab") {
        event.preventDefault();
        if (!event.repeat) this.selection.cycle();
      }
      if (/^Digit[1-4]$/.test(event.code) && !event.repeat) {
        const slot = Number(event.code.at(-1));
        if (event.ctrlKey) {
          event.preventDefault();
          this.camera.saveBookmark(slot);
          this.bus.emit("toast", { message: `Camera bookmark ${slot} saved.` });
        } else if (event.altKey) {
          event.preventDefault();
          if (!this.camera.recallBookmark(slot)) this.bus.emit("toast", { message: `Camera bookmark ${slot} is empty.`, tone: "warning" });
        } else {
          this.selection.selectByIndex(slot - 1);
        }
      }
      if (event.code === "Escape" && !event.repeat) {
        if (this.pendingGadget || this.pendingOverwatch) {
          this.pendingGadget = undefined;
          this.pendingOverwatch = false;
          this.preview.clear();
          this.updateTacticalControlLabels();
          return;
        }
        if (this.commands.syncPlanningGroup) {
          this.commands.cancelSyncPlanning();
          this.updateTacticalControlLabels();
          return;
        }
        this.preview.clear();
        const openModal = document.querySelector<HTMLElement>(".modal-backdrop:not([hidden])");
        if (openModal && openModal.id !== "briefingModal" && openModal.id !== "debriefModal") {
          const closeButton = openModal.querySelector<HTMLButtonElement>("#closeSettingsButton, #closeSaveButton, #closeHelpButton, #closeDialogueHistory, #closeCampaignButton");
          if (closeButton) closeButton.click();
          else openModal.hidden = true;
          return;
        }
        const selected = this.selection.selectedAgents;
        if (selected.length > 0) {
          this.commands.clearAgents(selected);
          this.bus.emit("toast", { message: "Selected command queues cleared." });
        }
      }
    });

    window.addEventListener("keyup", (event) => {
      if (!this.settings.matches("pause", event.code) || this.settings.value.pauseMode !== "hold") return;
      if (this.holdResumeState) {
        this.time.setState(this.holdResumeState);
        this.holdResumeState = undefined;
      }
    });

    document.getElementById("overwatchButton")?.addEventListener("click", () => this.armOverwatch());
    document.getElementById("reloadButton")?.addEventListener("click", () => this.issueReload());
    document.getElementById("stabilizeButton")?.addEventListener("click", () => this.issueStabilize());
    document.getElementById("interactButton")?.addEventListener("click", () => this.issueNearestInteraction());
    document.getElementById("agentAbilityButton")?.addEventListener("click", () => this.issueAbility());
    document.getElementById("stanceButton")?.addEventListener("click", () => this.cycleStance());
    document.getElementById("fireModeButton")?.addEventListener("click", () => this.cycleFireMode());
    document.getElementById("smokeButton")?.addEventListener("click", () => this.armGadget("smoke"));
    document.getElementById("empButton")?.addEventListener("click", () => this.armGadget("emp"));
    document.getElementById("syncButton")?.addEventListener("click", () => this.toggleSyncPlanning());
    document.getElementById("executeSyncButton")?.addEventListener("click", () => this.commitSyncGroup());
    document.getElementById("doorActionButton")?.addEventListener("click", () => this.cycleDoorAction());
  }

  private armOverwatch(): void {
    if (this.selection.selectedAgents.length === 0) return;
    this.pendingOverwatch = true;
    this.pendingGadget = undefined;
    this.updateTacticalControlLabels();
    this.bus.emit("toast", { message: "Right-click a direction to place overwatch cones." });
  }

  private issueReload(): void {
    const selected = this.selection.selectedAgents;
    if (selected.length === 0) return;
    this.commands.queueReload(selected, true);
    this.bus.emit("toast", { message: "Reload queued." });
  }

  private issueStabilize(): void {
    const helper = this.selection.selectedAgents[0];
    if (!helper) return;
    const target = this.agentsNearestDowned(helper);
    if (!target) {
      this.bus.emit("toast", { message: "No downed teammate is available.", tone: "warning" });
      return;
    }
    this.commands.queueStabilize(helper, target, true);
    this.bus.emit("toast", { message: `Stabilize ${target.definition.callsign} queued.` });
  }

  private agentsNearestDowned(helper: Agent): Agent | undefined {
    return this.selection.agents
      .filter((agent) => agent.downed && agent.id !== helper.id)
      .sort((a, b) => distance(helper, a) - distance(helper, b))[0];
  }
