  private issueNearestInteraction(): void {
    const selected = this.selection.selectedAgents;
    if (selected.length === 0) return;
    const options = selected
      .map((agent) => ({ agent, target: this.investigation.nearestAvailable(agent, 5) }))
      .filter((entry): entry is { agent: typeof selected[number]; target: NonNullable<typeof entry.target> } => Boolean(entry.target));
    const first = options[0];
    if (!first) {
      this.bus.emit("toast", { message: "No usable evidence or system is nearby.", tone: "warning" });
      return;
    }
    this.commands.queueInteraction(first.agent, first.target, true);
    this.bus.emit("toast", { message: `${first.agent.definition.callsign}: ${first.target.label} queued.` });
  }

  private issueAbility(): void {
    const agent = this.selection.selectedAgents[0];
    if (!agent) return;
    if (this.combat.isAgentJammed(agent)) {
      this.bus.emit("toast", { message: "Echo jamming is blocking signature abilities.", tone: "warning" });
      return;
    }
    if (!this.abilities.use(agent)) {
      const remaining = this.abilities.cooldownRemaining(agent);
      if (remaining > 0) this.bus.emit("toast", { message: `Ability ready in ${remaining.toFixed(1)}s.`, tone: "warning" });
    }
  }

  private cycleStance(): void {
    const order: MovementStance[] = ["tactical", "cautious", "crouched", "sprint"];
    this.stance = order[(order.indexOf(this.stance) + 1) % order.length]!;
    this.updateTacticalControlLabels();
    this.bus.emit("toast", { message: `Movement stance: ${MOVEMENT_STANCES[this.stance].label}.` });
  }

  private cycleFireMode(): void {
    const order: FireMode[] = ["standard", "aimed", "burst", "suppressive"];
    this.fireMode = order[(order.indexOf(this.fireMode) + 1) % order.length]!;
    this.updateTacticalControlLabels();
    this.bus.emit("toast", { message: `Fire mode: ${FIRE_MODES[this.fireMode].label}.` });
  }

  private armGadget(gadget: GadgetId): void {
    const agent = this.selection.selectedAgents[0];
    if (!agent || agent.gadgetCharges[gadget] <= 0) {
      this.bus.emit("toast", { message: `The selected operative has no ${gadget.toUpperCase()} charge equipped.`, tone: "warning" });
      return;
    }
    this.pendingGadget = gadget;
    this.pendingOverwatch = false;
    this.updateTacticalControlLabels();
    this.bus.emit("toast", { message: `Right-click terrain to deploy ${gadget.toUpperCase()}.` });
  }

  private toggleSyncPlanning(): void {
    if (this.commands.syncPlanningGroup) this.commitSyncGroup();
    else {
      this.commands.beginSyncPlanning();
      this.updateTacticalControlLabels();
      this.bus.emit("toast", { message: "SYNC planning active. Queue orders, then press Enter or Execute." });
    }
  }

  private commitSyncGroup(): void {
    const group = this.commands.commitSyncGroup();
    if (!group) return;
    this.updateTacticalControlLabels();
    this.bus.emit("toast", { message: `${group.toUpperCase()} released. Orders execute together.`, tone: "success" });
  }

  private cycleDoorAction(): void {
    const order: Array<DoorAction | "auto"> = ["auto", "open", "close", "lock", "hack", "breach"];
    this.doorAction = order[(order.indexOf(this.doorAction) + 1) % order.length]!;
    this.updateTacticalControlLabels();
  }

  private updateTacticalControlLabels(): void {
    const stance = document.getElementById("stanceLabel");
    const fire = document.getElementById("fireModeLabel");
    const sync = document.getElementById("syncLabel");
    const execute = document.getElementById("executeSyncButton") as HTMLButtonElement | null;
    const door = document.getElementById("doorActionLabel");
    if (stance) stance.textContent = MOVEMENT_STANCES[this.stance].label;
    if (fire) fire.textContent = FIRE_MODES[this.fireMode].label;
    if (sync) sync.textContent = this.commands.syncPlanningGroup ? "SYNC ACTIVE" : "Sync Plan";
    if (execute) execute.disabled = !this.commands.syncPlanningGroup;
    if (door) door.textContent = this.doorAction === "auto" ? "Door Auto" : `Door ${this.doorAction}`;
    document.getElementById("smokeButton")?.classList.toggle("armed", this.pendingGadget === "smoke");
    document.getElementById("empButton")?.classList.toggle("armed", this.pendingGadget === "emp");
    document.getElementById("overwatchButton")?.classList.toggle("armed", this.pendingOverwatch);
    document.getElementById("syncButton")?.classList.toggle("armed", Boolean(this.commands.syncPlanningGroup));
  }

  private handleRightClick(event: PointerEvent): void {
    this.preview.clear();
    const selected = this.selection.selectedAgents;
    if (selected.length === 0) {
      this.bus.emit("toast", { message: "Select at least one agent before issuing an order.", tone: "warning" });
      return;
    }

    const pick = this.scene.pick(this.scene.pointerX, this.scene.pointerY);
    const door = this.doors.get(pick?.pickedMesh?.metadata?.doorId as string | undefined);
    if (door) {
      const agent = selected[0]!;
      const action = this.doorAction === "auto" ? this.doors.availableAction(door) : this.doorAction;
      if (this.commands.queueDoor(agent, door, action, event.shiftKey)) {
        this.bus.emit("toast", { message: `${agent.definition.callsign}: ${action} ${door.label} queued.` });
      }
      return;
    }

    const interactableId = pick?.pickedMesh?.metadata?.interactableId as string | undefined;
    const interactable = this.investigation.getInteractable(interactableId);
    if (interactable && this.investigation.isAvailable(interactable)) {
      const agent = this.investigation.bestAgentFor(interactable, selected);
      if (!agent) {
        this.bus.emit("toast", { message: `No selected agent can ${interactable.kind} ${interactable.label}.`, tone: "warning" });
        return;
      }
      if (this.commands.queueInteraction(agent, interactable, event.shiftKey)) {
        this.bus.emit("toast", { message: `${agent.definition.callsign}: ${interactable.label} queued.`, tone: "info" });
      }
      return;
    }

    const enemyId = pick?.pickedMesh?.metadata?.enemyId as string | undefined;
    const target = this.enemies.find((enemy) => enemy.id === enemyId && enemy.currentlyVisible && !enemy.disabled);
    if (target) {
      this.commands.queueAttack(selected, target, event.shiftKey, this.fireMode);
      this.bus.emit("toast", { message: `${FIRE_MODES[this.fireMode].label} fire order: ${target.kind}.`, tone: "warning" });
      return;
    }

    const releasePoint = this.camera.getGroundPoint(event.clientX, event.clientY);
    if (!releasePoint) return;

    if (this.pendingGadget) {
      const agent = selected[0]!;
      if (this.commands.queueGadget(agent, this.pendingGadget, releasePoint, event.shiftKey)) {
        this.bus.emit("toast", { message: `${this.pendingGadget.toUpperCase()} deployment queued.` });
      }
      this.pendingGadget = undefined;
      this.updateTacticalControlLabels();
      return;
    }

    if (this.pendingOverwatch) {
      const center = squadCenter(selected);
      const yaw = yawToward(center, releasePoint);
      this.commands.queueOverwatch(selected, yaw, event.shiftKey, Math.PI * 0.52);
      this.pendingOverwatch = false;
      this.updateTacticalControlLabels();
      this.bus.emit("toast", { message: "Directional overwatch cones queued." });
      return;
    }

    const destination = this.rightDown?.ground ?? releasePoint;
    const dragDistance = this.rightDown
      ? Math.hypot(event.clientX - this.rightDown.clientX, event.clientY - this.rightDown.clientY)
      : 0;
    const center = squadCenter(selected);
    const finalYaw = dragDistance >= 18 ? yawToward(destination, releasePoint) : yawToward(center, destination);
    const destinations = formationDestinations(destination, selected.length, this.camera.alpha, 0.9);
    const assignments = this.cover.findAssignments(destinations, selected);
    selected.forEach((agent, index) => {
      const point = assignments[index];
      const targetDestination = destinations[index];
      if (!targetDestination) return;
      if (point && this.stance === "tactical" && dragDistance < 18) this.commands.queueCover([agent], [point], event.shiftKey);
      else this.commands.queueMove([agent], [targetDestination], event.shiftKey, this.stance, [finalYaw]);
    });
    this.bus.emit("toast", {
      message: `${MOVEMENT_STANCES[this.stance].label} move queued for ${selected.length} agent${selected.length > 1 ? "s" : ""}${dragDistance >= 18 ? " with final facing" : ""}.`,
      tone: "info",
    });
  }

  private updateTargetPreview(event: PointerEvent): void {
    if (!this.targetInfo) return;
    const now = performance.now();
    if (now - this.lastPreviewAt < 45) return;
    this.lastPreviewAt = now;

    const pick = this.scene.pick(this.scene.pointerX, this.scene.pointerY);
    const attacker = this.selection.selectedAgents[0];
    const door = this.doors.get(pick?.pickedMesh?.metadata?.doorId as string | undefined);
    if (door && attacker) {
      this.preview.clear();
      const action = this.doorAction === "auto" ? this.doors.availableAction(door) : this.doorAction;
      const validation = this.doors.canUse(attacker, door, action);
      this.showTargetInfo(event, `DOOR · ${door.state.toUpperCase()}`, door.label, validation.allowed ? `${action.toUpperCase()} · Right-click to queue` : validation.reason ?? "Unavailable");
      return;
    }
    const interactableId = pick?.pickedMesh?.metadata?.interactableId as string | undefined;
    const interactable = this.investigation.getInteractable(interactableId);
    this.investigation.setHovered(interactable?.id);
    if (interactable && attacker && this.investigation.isAvailable(interactable)) {
      this.preview.clear();
      this.abilities.setHoveredEnemy(undefined);
      const validation = this.investigation.canAgentUse(attacker, interactable);
      this.showTargetInfo(event, interactable.kind.toUpperCase(), interactable.label, validation.allowed ? `${interactable.duration.toFixed(1)}s · Right-click to queue` : validation.reason ?? "Unavailable");
      return;
    }

    const enemyId = pick?.pickedMesh?.metadata?.enemyId as string | undefined;
    const enemy = this.enemies.find((candidate) => candidate.id === enemyId && candidate.currentlyVisible && !candidate.disabled);
    if (enemy && attacker) {
      const estimate = this.combat.estimateAttack(attacker, enemy, this.fireMode);
      this.abilities.setHoveredEnemy(enemy);
      this.preview.showAttack(attacker, enemy, estimate.chance, estimate.blocked);
      const smoke = estimate.smokeObscured ? " · SMOKE" : "";
      this.showTargetInfo(event, `${enemy.kind.toUpperCase()} FRAME`, estimate.blocked ? "LINE BLOCKED" : `${Math.round(estimate.chance * 100)}% ${FIRE_MODES[this.fireMode].label.toUpperCase()}`, `${estimate.distance.toFixed(1)}m · ${enemy.health}/${enemy.maxHealth} HP · ${enemy.suppressionState.toUpperCase()}${smoke}`);
      return;
    }

    this.abilities.setHoveredEnemy(undefined);
    const selected = this.selection.selectedAgents;
    const groundPoint = selected.length > 0 ? this.camera.getGroundPoint(event.clientX, event.clientY) : null;
    if (groundPoint && selected.length > 0) {
      if (this.pendingOverwatch) {
        const center = squadCenter(selected);
        this.preview.showCone(center, yawToward(center, groundPoint), Math.PI * 0.52, Math.max(...selected.map((agent) => agent.weaponRange)));
        this.showTargetInfo(event, "OVERWATCH CONE", "RIGHT-CLICK TO SET", "90° reaction arc");
        return;
      }
      if (this.pendingGadget) {
        this.preview.showArea(groundPoint, this.pendingGadget === "smoke" ? 3.8 : 4.2, this.pendingGadget);
        this.showTargetInfo(event, `${this.pendingGadget.toUpperCase()} GADGET`, "RIGHT-CLICK TO DEPLOY", this.pendingGadget === "smoke" ? "10s concealment field" : "5s robotic disable");
        return;
      }
      const destinations = formationDestinations(groundPoint, selected.length, this.camera.alpha, 0.9);
      this.preview.showMove(selected, destinations);
      const exposed = destinations.some((point) => this.vision.isPointObserved(point));
      this.showTargetInfo(event, `${MOVEMENT_STANCES[this.stance].label.toUpperCase()} MOVE`, exposed ? "EXPOSED ROUTE" : "ROUTE CLEAR", `${selected.length} agent${selected.length > 1 ? "s" : ""} · Right-drag to set final facing`);
      return;
    }

    this.preview.clear();
    this.targetInfo.hidden = true;
  }

  private showTargetInfo(event: PointerEvent, heading: string, value: string, detail: string): void {
    if (!this.targetInfo) return;
    this.targetInfo.hidden = false;
    this.targetInfo.style.left = `${Math.min(window.innerWidth - 190, event.clientX + 16)}px`;
    this.targetInfo.style.top = `${Math.min(window.innerHeight - 100, event.clientY + 16)}px`;
    this.targetInfo.innerHTML = `<strong>${escapeHtml(heading)}</strong><span>${escapeHtml(value)}</span><small>${escapeHtml(detail)}</small>`;
  }
}

function distance(a: { root: { position: { x: number; z: number } } }, b: { root: { position: { x: number; z: number } } }): number {
  return Math.hypot(a.root.position.x - b.root.position.x, a.root.position.z - b.root.position.z);
}

function escapeHtml(value: string): string {
  return value.replace(/[&<>'"]/g, (character) => ({
    "&": "&amp;", "<": "&lt;", ">": "&gt;", "'": "&#39;", '"': "&quot;",
  })[character] ?? character);
}

function squadCenter(agents: Agent[]): Vector3 {
  return agents.reduce((sum, agent) => sum.add(agent.root.position), Vector3.Zero()).scale(1 / Math.max(1, agents.length));
}

function yawToward(a: Vector3, b: Vector3): number {
  const delta = b.subtract(a);
  return Math.atan2(delta.x, delta.z);
}

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/systems/InvestigationSystem.ts =====
import {
  Color3,
  Mesh,
  MeshBuilder,
  StandardMaterial,
  Vector3,
  type Scene,
} from "@babylonjs/core";
import type { EventBus } from "../engine/EventBus";
import type { Agent } from "../entities/Agent";
import type {
  EvidenceDefinition,
  InteractableDefinition,
  InteractableRuntime,
} from "../investigation/InvestigationTypes";
import type { StoryState } from "../story/StoryState";

export type InvestigationSnapshot = {
  recoveredEvidenceIds: string[];
  interactables: Array<{ id: string; completed: boolean; corrupted: boolean }>;
};

export class InvestigationSystem {
  private readonly interactables = new Map<string, InteractableRuntime>();
  private readonly evidence = new Map<string, EvidenceDefinition>();
  private readonly recoveredEvidence = new Set<string>();
  private readonly markers = new Map<string, Mesh>();
  private hoveredId?: string;
  private markersVisible = true;

  constructor(
    private readonly scene: Scene,
    interactables: InteractableDefinition[],
    evidenceDefinitions: EvidenceDefinition[],
    private readonly story: StoryState,
    private readonly bus: EventBus,
  ) {
    evidenceDefinitions.forEach((definition) => this.evidence.set(definition.id, definition));
    interactables.forEach((definition) => {
      const runtime: InteractableRuntime = { ...definition, completed: false, corrupted: false };
      this.interactables.set(runtime.id, runtime);
      runtime.mesh.metadata = {
        ...(runtime.mesh.metadata ?? {}),
        interactableId: runtime.id,
        entityType: "interactable",
      };
      runtime.mesh.isPickable = true;
      this.markers.set(runtime.id, this.createMarker(runtime));
    });
    this.bus.on("dialogue:choice", () => this.refreshVisuals());
    this.refreshVisuals();
  }

  get recoveredCount(): number {
    return this.recoveredEvidence.size;
  }

  get coreRecoveredCount(): number {
    return [...this.recoveredEvidence].filter((id) => this.evidence.get(id)?.core).length;
  }

  get totalCoreEvidence(): number {
    return [...this.evidence.values()].filter((item) => item.core).length;
  }

  get totalEvidence(): number {
    return this.evidence.size;
  }

  snapshot(): InvestigationSnapshot {
    return {
      recoveredEvidenceIds: [...this.recoveredEvidence],
      interactables: [...this.interactables.values()].map((item) => ({
        id: item.id,
        completed: item.completed,
        corrupted: item.corrupted,
      })),
    };
  }

  restore(snapshot: InvestigationSnapshot): void {
    this.recoveredEvidence.clear();
    snapshot.recoveredEvidenceIds.forEach((id) => {
      if (this.evidence.has(id)) this.recoveredEvidence.add(id);
    });
    for (const state of snapshot.interactables) {
      const target = this.interactables.get(state.id);
      if (!target) continue;
      target.completed = state.completed;
      target.corrupted = state.corrupted;
    }
    this.refreshVisuals();
  }

  getInteractable(id: string | undefined): InteractableRuntime | undefined {
    return id ? this.interactables.get(id) : undefined;
  }

  getEvidence(id: string): EvidenceDefinition | undefined {
    return this.evidence.get(id);
  }

  getRecoveredEvidence(): EvidenceDefinition[] {
    return [...this.recoveredEvidence]
      .map((id) => this.evidence.get(id))
      .filter((item): item is EvidenceDefinition => Boolean(item));
  }

  getAvailableInteractables(): InteractableRuntime[] {
    return [...this.interactables.values()].filter((item) => this.isAvailable(item));
  }

  isAvailable(target: InteractableRuntime): boolean {
    if (target.completed || target.corrupted) return false;
    return (target.prerequisiteFlags ?? []).every((flag) => this.story.has(flag));
  }

  canAgentUse(agent: Agent, target: InteractableRuntime): { allowed: boolean; reason?: string } {
    if (!this.isAvailable(target)) {
      return { allowed: false, reason: target.corrupted ? "Evidence corrupted" : "Interaction unavailable" };
    }
    const required = target.requiredAgentTags ?? this.evidence.get(target.evidenceId ?? "")?.requiredAgentTags ?? [];
    const missing = required.filter((tag) => !agent.tags.has(tag));
    if (missing.length > 0) return { allowed: false, reason: `Requires ${missing.join(" / ")}` };
    return { allowed: true };
  }

  bestAgentFor(target: InteractableRuntime, candidates: Agent[]): Agent | undefined {
    return candidates
      .filter((agent) => !agent.downed && this.canAgentUse(agent, target).allowed)
      .sort((a, b) => {
        const aDistance = planarDistance(a.root.position, target.interactionPoint);
        const bDistance = planarDistance(b.root.position, target.interactionPoint);
        const techBonus = (b.tech - a.tech) * 0.05;
        return aDistance - bDistance + techBonus;
      })[0];
  }

  nearestAvailable(agent: Agent, maxDistance = 4): InteractableRuntime | undefined {
    return this.getAvailableInteractables()
      .filter((target) => this.canAgentUse(agent, target).allowed)
      .map((target) => ({ target, distance: planarDistance(agent.root.position, target.position) }))
      .filter(({ distance }) => distance <= maxDistance)
      .sort((a, b) => a.distance - b.distance)[0]?.target;
  }

  setHovered(id?: string): void {
    if (id === this.hoveredId) return;
    this.hoveredId = id;
    this.refreshVisuals();
  }

  setMarkersVisible(visible: boolean): void {
    this.markersVisible = visible;
    this.refreshVisuals();
  }

  reportProgress(agent: Agent, target: InteractableRuntime, progress: number): void {
    this.bus.emit("interaction:progress", {
      interactionId: target.id,
      agentId: agent.id,
      label: target.label,
      progress: Math.max(0, Math.min(1, progress)),
    });
  }

  complete(agent: Agent, target: InteractableRuntime): boolean {
    if (!this.canAgentUse(agent, target).allowed) return false;
    target.completed = true;
    (target.grantsFlags ?? []).forEach((flag) => this.story.add(flag));

    let interpretation: string | undefined;
    if (target.evidenceId) {
      const evidence = this.evidence.get(target.evidenceId);
      if (evidence && !this.recoveredEvidence.has(evidence.id)) {
        this.recoveredEvidence.add(evidence.id);
        this.story.add(...evidence.storyFlagsGranted);
        interpretation = evidence.interpretations?.[agent.id] ?? evidence.description;
        this.bus.emit("evidence:collected", {
          evidenceId: evidence.id,
          title: evidence.title,
          category: evidence.category,
          agentId: agent.id,
          interpretation,
          core: Boolean(evidence.core),
        });
      }
    }

    if (target.sensorId) {
      this.bus.emit("security:disabled", { sensorId: target.sensorId });
    }

    this.bus.emit("interaction:completed", {
      interactionId: target.id,
      agentId: agent.id,
      evidenceId: target.evidenceId,
      dialogueId: target.dialogueId,
    });
    this.bus.emit("interaction:progress", {
      interactionId: target.id,
      agentId: agent.id,
      label: target.label,
      progress: 1,
    });
    this.bus.emit("combat:log", {
      message: `${agent.definition.callsign}: ${target.label} complete${interpretation ? ` — ${interpretation}` : ""}`,
      tone: "success",
    });
    this.refreshVisuals();
    return true;
  }

  corruptOneAvailable(): InteractableRuntime | undefined {
    const target = this.getAvailableInteractables()
      .filter((item) => Boolean(item.evidenceId))
      .sort((a, b) => Number(Boolean(this.evidence.get(b.evidenceId ?? "")?.core)) - Number(Boolean(this.evidence.get(a.evidenceId ?? "")?.core)))[0];
    if (!target) return undefined;
    target.corrupted = true;
    this.story.add(`interaction.${target.id}.corrupted`);
    this.bus.emit("interaction:corrupted", { interactionId: target.id, label: target.label });
    this.refreshVisuals();
    return target;
  }

  private createMarker(target: InteractableRuntime): Mesh {
    const marker = MeshBuilder.CreateTorus(`interaction-marker:${target.id}`, {
      diameter: 1.15,
      thickness: 0.055,
      tessellation: 40,
    }, this.scene);
    marker.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2;
    marker.position.copyFrom(target.position.add(new Vector3(0, 0.08, 0)));
    marker.isPickable = false;
    const material = new StandardMaterial(`interaction-marker-material:${target.id}`, this.scene);
    material.emissiveColor = interactionColor(target.kind);
    material.diffuseColor = material.emissiveColor.scale(0.18);
    material.disableLighting = true;
    marker.material = material;
    this.scene.onBeforeRenderObservable.add(() => {
      if (!marker.isEnabled()) return;
      const pulse = 1 + Math.sin(performance.now() * 0.004 + target.id.length) * 0.08;
      marker.scaling.setAll(pulse * (this.hoveredId === target.id ? 1.22 : 1));
      marker.rotation.y += 0.003;
    });
    return marker;
  }

  private refreshVisuals(): void {
    for (const target of this.interactables.values()) {
      const marker = this.markers.get(target.id);
      const available = this.isAvailable(target);
      marker?.setEnabled(available && this.markersVisible);
      if (marker?.material instanceof StandardMaterial) {
        marker.material.alpha = this.hoveredId === target.id ? 1 : 0.68;
        if (target.corrupted) marker.material.emissiveColor = new Color3(1, 0.12, 0.05);
      }
      target.mesh.visibility = target.completed ? 0.55 : target.corrupted ? 0.42 : 1;
    }
  }
}

function interactionColor(kind: InteractableRuntime["kind"]): Color3 {
  if (["hack", "download", "restore"].includes(kind)) return new Color3(0.15, 0.82, 1);
  if (["scan", "examine"].includes(kind)) return new Color3(0.46, 0.96, 0.7);
  return new Color3(1, 0.72, 0.23);
}

function planarDistance(a: Vector3, b: Vector3): number {
  return Math.hypot(a.x - b.x, a.z - b.z);
}

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/systems/LLMLogger.ts =====
import type { EventBus } from "../engine/EventBus";
import type { Agent } from "../entities/Agent";

export class LLMLogger {
  private readonly entries: string[] = [];
  private readonly startTime = performance.now();

  constructor(
    private readonly bus: EventBus,
    private readonly agents: Agent[],
  ) {
    this.subscribe();
    (window as any).downloadSessionLog = () => this.download();
    this.addUI();
  }

  private subscribe(): void {
    this.bus.on("command:queued", (p) => {
      const agent = this.agents.find((a) => a.id === p.agentId);
      const callsign = agent?.definition.callsign ?? p.agentId;
      this.log("CMD", `${callsign}: ${p.commandType}${p.append ? " (append)" : ""}`);
    });

    this.bus.on("commands:cleared", (p) => {
      const agent = this.agents.find((a) => a.id === p.agentId);
      const callsign = agent?.definition.callsign ?? p.agentId;
      this.log("CMD", `${callsign}: queue cleared (${p.count} cancelled)`);
    });

    this.bus.on("command:completed", (p) => {
      const agent = this.agents.find((a) => a.id === p.agentId);
      const callsign = agent?.definition.callsign ?? p.agentId;
      this.log(p.status === "complete" ? "MOVE" : "CMD", `${callsign}: ${p.label} → ${p.status}`);
    });

    this.bus.on("time:changed", (p) => {
      this.log("STATE", `Time: ${p.state}`);
    });

    this.bus.on("toast", (p) => {
      this.log("UI", p.message);
    });

    this.bus.on("combat:log", (p) => {
      this.log("COMBAT", p.message);
    });

    this.bus.on("combat:attack", (p) => {
      const attackerName = p.attackerTeam === "ion"
        ? this.agents.find((a) => a.id === p.attackerId)?.definition.callsign ?? p.attackerId
        : `drone:${p.attackerId}`;
      const targetName = p.targetTeam === "echo"
        ? `drone:${p.targetId}`
        : this.agents.find((a) => a.id === p.targetId)?.definition.callsign ?? p.targetId;
      this.log("ATTACK", `${attackerName} → ${targetName}: ${p.hit ? `HIT ${p.damage}` : "MISS"}${p.overwatch ? " (overwatch)" : ""}`);
    });

    this.bus.on("agent:downed", (p) => {
      const agent = this.agents.find((a) => a.id === p.agentId);
      this.log("STATUS", `${agent?.definition.callsign ?? p.agentId}: DOWNED`);
    });

    this.bus.on("enemy:disabled", (p) => {
      this.log("STATUS", `drone:${p.enemyId}: DISABLED`);
    });

    this.bus.on("ability:used", (p) => {
      const agent = this.agents.find((a) => a.id === p.agentId);
      this.log("ABILITY", `${agent?.definition.callsign ?? p.agentId}: ${p.label}`);
    });

    this.bus.on("interaction:completed", (p) => {
      const agent = this.agents.find((a) => a.id === p.agentId);
      this.log("INTERACT", `${agent?.definition.callsign ?? p.agentId}: ${p.interactionId}`);
    });

    this.bus.on("mission:stage-changed", (p) => {
      this.log("MISSION", `Stage: ${p.stage}`);
    });

    this.bus.on("evidence:collected", (p) => {
      const agent = this.agents.find((a) => a.id === p.agentId);
      this.log("EVIDENCE", `${agent?.definition.callsign ?? p.agentId}: ${p.title}`);
    });

    this.bus.on("mission:debrief", (p) => {
      this.log("MISSION", `Debrief: ${p.report.title} (${p.report.grade} ${p.report.score}/100)`);
    });
  }

  private log(category: string, message: string): void {
    const elapsed = ((performance.now() - this.startTime) / 1000).toFixed(1);
    this.entries.push(`[${elapsed.padStart(7)}s] [${category.padEnd(7)}] ${message}`);
  }

  download(): void {
    const header = [
      "=== Echo of Humanity — Session Log ===",
      `Generated: ${new Date().toISOString()}`,
      `Entries: ${this.entries.length}`,
      "",
      "Legend: CMD=command queued/cleared, MOVE=movement complete, UI=user toast,",
      "COMBAT=combat event, ATTACK=shot fired, ABILITY=special ability,",
      "INTERACT=interaction, EVIDENCE=evidence found, STATUS=agent/enemy state,",
      "STATE=time/pause, MISSION=mission stage",
      "",
      "Format: [elapsed_seconds] [category] message",
      "",
      "========================================",
      "",
    ].join("\n");

    const text = header + this.entries.join("\n");
    const blob = new Blob([text], { type: "text/plain;charset=utf-8" });
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const a = document.createElement("a");
    a.href = url;
    a.download = `echo-session-${Date.now()}.txt`;
    document.body.appendChild(a);
    a.click();
    document.body.removeChild(a);
    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
  }

  private addUI(): void {
    const btn = document.createElement("button");
    btn.id = "sessionLogButton";
    btn.textContent = "EXPORT LOG";
    btn.title = "Download session log as text file for LLM analysis";
    const style: Partial<CSSStyleDeclaration> = {
      position: "fixed",
      bottom: "8px",
      right: "8px",
      zIndex: "9999",
      padding: "6px 12px",
      fontSize: "11px",
      fontFamily: "system-ui",
      fontWeight: "700",
      background: "rgba(5,16,22,.85)",
      color: "#72a7ff",
      border: "1px solid #2a4a5a",
      borderRadius: "4px",
      cursor: "pointer",
      letterSpacing: "0.5px",
    };
    Object.assign(btn.style, style);
    btn.addEventListener("click", () => this.download());
    btn.addEventListener("mouseenter", () => {
      btn.style.background = "rgba(10,32,42,.95)";
      btn.style.color = "#a0c8ff";
    });
    btn.addEventListener("mouseleave", () => {
      btn.style.background = "rgba(5,16,22,.85)";
      btn.style.color = "#72a7ff";
    });
    document.body.appendChild(btn);
  }
}

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/systems/NavigationSystem.ts =====
import {
  Color3,
  Mesh,
  RecastJSPlugin,
  StandardMaterial,
  Vector3,
  type ICrowd,
  type INavMeshParameters,
  type Scene,
  type TransformNode,
} from "@babylonjs/core";
import initRecast from "recast-detour";
import type { Agent } from "../entities/Agent";
import type { Enemy } from "../entities/Enemy";

export type NavigationObstacle = NonNullable<ReturnType<RecastJSPlugin["addBoxObstacle"]>>;

export type NavigableEntity = {
  id: string;
  root: TransformNode;
  crowdIndex: number;
  disabled: boolean;
};

type RecastModule = Awaited<ReturnType<typeof initRecast>>;

export class NavigationSystem {
  readonly plugin: RecastJSPlugin;
  readonly crowd: ICrowd;
  private readonly entities = new Map<string, NavigableEntity>();
  private readonly parameters = new Map<string, { radius: number; height: number; maxAcceleration: number; maxSpeed: number; collisionQueryRange: number; pathOptimizationRange: number; separationWeight: number; reachRadius: number }>();

  constructor(
    scene: Scene,
    navMeshes: Mesh[],
    recast: RecastModule,
    showDebug = false,
  ) {
    this.plugin = new RecastJSPlugin(recast);
    this.plugin.createNavMesh(navMeshes, createNavMeshParameters());
    this.plugin.setDefaultQueryExtent(new Vector3(2.5, 4, 2.5));
    this.crowd = this.plugin.createCrowd(32, 0.65, scene);
    this.crowd.setDefaultQueryExtent(new Vector3(2.5, 4, 2.5));

    if (showDebug) {
      const debugMesh = this.plugin.createDebugNavMesh(scene);
      const material = new StandardMaterial("navmesh-debug-material", scene);
      material.diffuseColor = new Color3(0.1, 0.85, 0.55);
      material.emissiveColor = new Color3(0.05, 0.45, 0.25);
      material.alpha = 0.24;
      material.wireframe = true;
      debugMesh.material = material;
      debugMesh.position.y += 0.05;
      debugMesh.isPickable = false;
    }
  }

  registerAgent(agent: Agent): void {
    this.registerEntity(agent, 4.3, 2.1);
  }

  registerEnemy(enemy: Enemy): void {
    this.registerEntity(enemy, enemy.kind === "observer" ? 4.8 : enemy.kind === "hunter" ? 5.4 : enemy.kind === "jammer" ? 3.25 : 3.7, enemy.kind === "hunter" ? 2.4 : 1.8);
  }

  closestPoint(point: Vector3): Vector3 {
    return this.plugin.getClosestPoint(point);
  }

  computePath(start: Vector3, destination: Vector3): Vector3[] {
    return this.plugin.computePathSmooth(this.closestPoint(start), this.closestPoint(destination));
  }

  moveEntity(entity: NavigableEntity, destination: Vector3): boolean {
    if (entity.crowdIndex < 0 || entity.disabled) return false;
    const target = this.closestPoint(destination);
    this.crowd.agentGoto(entity.crowdIndex, target);
    return true;
  }

  moveAgent(agent: Agent, destination: Vector3): boolean {
    return this.moveEntity(agent, destination);
  }


  setEntitySpeed(entity: NavigableEntity, maxSpeed: number): void {
    const current = this.parameters.get(entity.id);
    if (!current || entity.crowdIndex < 0) return;
    const next = { ...current, maxSpeed: Math.max(0.5, maxSpeed) };
    this.parameters.set(entity.id, next);
    this.crowd.updateAgentParameters(entity.crowdIndex, next);
  }


  addBoxObstacle(position: Vector3, extent: Vector3, angle: number): NavigationObstacle | null {
    return this.plugin.addBoxObstacle(position, extent, angle);
  }

  removeObstacle(obstacle: NavigationObstacle | undefined): void {
    if (obstacle) this.plugin.removeObstacle(obstacle);
  }


  teleportEntity(entity: NavigableEntity, destination: Vector3): void {
    const target = this.closestPoint(destination);
    if (entity.crowdIndex >= 0) this.crowd.agentTeleport(entity.crowdIndex, target);
    entity.root.position.copyFrom(target);
  }

  stopEntity(entity: NavigableEntity): void {
    if (entity.crowdIndex < 0) return;
    const current = this.crowd.getAgentPosition(entity.crowdIndex);
    this.crowd.agentGoto(entity.crowdIndex, current);
  }

  stopAgent(agent: Agent): void {
    this.stopEntity(agent);
  }

  getEntityPosition(entity: NavigableEntity): Vector3 {
    if (entity.crowdIndex < 0) return entity.root.position.clone();
    return this.crowd.getAgentPosition(entity.crowdIndex);
  }

  getAgentPosition(agent: Agent): Vector3 {
    return this.getEntityPosition(agent);
  }

  getVelocity(entity: NavigableEntity): Vector3 {
    if (entity.crowdIndex < 0) return Vector3.Zero();
    return this.crowd.getAgentVelocity(entity.crowdIndex);
  }

  updateEntityFacing(deltaSeconds: number): void {
    const blend = 1 - Math.exp(-10 * deltaSeconds);
    for (const entity of this.entities.values()) {
      if (entity.crowdIndex < 0 || entity.disabled) continue;
      const velocity = this.crowd.getAgentVelocity(entity.crowdIndex);
      velocity.y = 0;
      if (velocity.lengthSquared() < 0.04) continue;
      const targetYaw = Math.atan2(velocity.x, velocity.z);
      entity.root.rotation.y = lerpAngle(entity.root.rotation.y, targetYaw, blend);
    }
  }

  updateAgentFacing(deltaSeconds: number): void {
    this.updateEntityFacing(deltaSeconds);
  }

  dispose(): void {
    this.crowd.dispose();
    this.plugin.dispose();
  }

  private registerEntity(entity: NavigableEntity, maxSpeed: number, separationWeight: number): void {
    const start = this.closestPoint(entity.root.position);
    entity.root.position.copyFrom(start);
    const parameters = {
      radius: 0.42,
      height: 1.95,
      maxAcceleration: 9,
      maxSpeed,
      collisionQueryRange: 3.2,
      pathOptimizationRange: 10,
      separationWeight,
      reachRadius: 0.3,
    };
    entity.crowdIndex = this.crowd.addAgent(start, parameters, entity.root);
    this.parameters.set(entity.id, parameters);
    this.entities.set(entity.id, entity);
  }
}

function createNavMeshParameters(): INavMeshParameters {
  return {
    cs: 0.2,
    ch: 0.15,
    walkableSlopeAngle: 45,
    walkableHeight: 10,
    walkableClimb: 2,
    walkableRadius: 2,
    maxEdgeLen: 24,
    maxSimplificationError: 1.3,
    minRegionArea: 8,
    mergeRegionArea: 20,
    maxVertsPerPoly: 6,
    detailSampleDist: 6,
    detailSampleMaxError: 1,
    tileSize: 8,
  };
}

function lerpAngle(current: number, target: number, amount: number): number {
  const difference = Math.atan2(Math.sin(target - current), Math.cos(target - current));
  return current + difference * amount;
}

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/systems/SelectionSystem.ts =====
import { Matrix, Vector3, type AbstractEngine, type Scene } from "@babylonjs/core";
import type { EventBus } from "../engine/EventBus";
import type { Agent } from "../entities/Agent";

export class SelectionSystem {
  private readonly agentsById = new Map<string, Agent>();
  private readonly selectedIds = new Set<string>();
  private pointerDown?: { x: number; y: number; shift: boolean };
  private dragging = false;

  constructor(
    readonly agents: Agent[],
    private readonly scene: Scene,
    private readonly engine: AbstractEngine,
    private readonly canvas: HTMLCanvasElement,
    private readonly selectionBox: HTMLElement,
    private readonly bus: EventBus,
  ) {
    agents.forEach((agent) => this.agentsById.set(agent.definition.id, agent));
    this.bindPointerSelection();
  }

  get selectedAgents(): Agent[] {
    return this.agents.filter((agent) => this.selectedIds.has(agent.definition.id));
  }

  selectOnly(agentId: string): void {
    const agent = this.agentsById.get(agentId);
    if (!agent || agent.downed) return;
    this.selectedIds.clear();
    this.selectedIds.add(agentId);
    this.applySelection();
  }

  toggle(agentId: string): void {
    const agent = this.agentsById.get(agentId);
    if (!agent || agent.downed) return;
    if (this.selectedIds.has(agentId)) this.selectedIds.delete(agentId);
    else this.selectedIds.add(agentId);
    this.applySelection();
  }

  selectAll(): void {
    this.selectedIds.clear();
    this.agents.filter((agent) => !agent.downed).forEach((agent) => this.selectedIds.add(agent.definition.id));
    this.applySelection();
  }

  clear(): void {
    if (this.selectedIds.size === 0) return;
    this.selectedIds.clear();
    this.applySelection();
  }

  selectByIndex(index: number): void {
    const agent = this.agents[index];
    if (agent) this.selectOnly(agent.definition.id);
  }

  cycle(): void {
    const activeAgents = this.agents.filter((agent) => !agent.downed);
    if (activeAgents.length === 0) return;
    const current = this.selectedAgents[0];
    const currentIndex = current ? activeAgents.indexOf(current) : -1;
    const next = activeAgents[(currentIndex + 1) % activeAgents.length];
    if (next) this.selectOnly(next.id);
  }

  private bindPointerSelection(): void {
    this.canvas.addEventListener("pointerdown", (event) => {
      if (event.button !== 0) return;
      this.pointerDown = { x: event.clientX, y: event.clientY, shift: event.shiftKey };
      this.dragging = false;
    });

    this.canvas.addEventListener("pointermove", (event) => {
      if (!this.pointerDown) return;
      const dx = event.clientX - this.pointerDown.x;
      const dy = event.clientY - this.pointerDown.y;
      if (!this.dragging && Math.hypot(dx, dy) > 7) this.dragging = true;
      if (!this.dragging) return;
      this.updateSelectionBox(this.pointerDown.x, this.pointerDown.y, event.clientX, event.clientY);
    });

    this.canvas.addEventListener("pointerup", (event) => {
      if (event.button !== 0 || !this.pointerDown) return;
      const start = this.pointerDown;
      this.pointerDown = undefined;

      if (this.dragging) {
        this.dragging = false;
        this.selectionBox.hidden = true;
        this.selectInsideRectangle(start.x, start.y, event.clientX, event.clientY, start.shift);
        return;
      }

      const pick = this.scene.pick(this.scene.pointerX, this.scene.pointerY);
      const agentId = pick?.pickedMesh?.metadata?.agentId as string | undefined;
      if (agentId && this.agentsById.has(agentId)) {
        if (event.shiftKey) this.toggle(agentId);
        else this.selectOnly(agentId);
      } else if (!event.shiftKey) {
        this.clear();
      }
    });
  }

  private selectInsideRectangle(
    x1: number,
    y1: number,
    x2: number,
    y2: number,
    additive: boolean,
  ): void {
    const left = Math.min(x1, x2);
    const right = Math.max(x1, x2);
    const top = Math.min(y1, y2);
    const bottom = Math.max(y1, y2);
    const canvasRect = this.canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
    const renderWidth = this.engine.getRenderWidth();
    const renderHeight = this.engine.getRenderHeight();
    const viewport = this.scene.activeCamera?.viewport.toGlobal(renderWidth, renderHeight);
    if (!viewport) return;

    if (!additive) this.selectedIds.clear();

    for (const agent of this.agents) {
      const world = agent.root.getAbsolutePosition().add(new Vector3(0, 1.1, 0));
      const projected = Vector3.Project(world, Matrix.Identity(), this.scene.getTransformMatrix(), viewport);
      const clientX = canvasRect.left + (projected.x / renderWidth) * canvasRect.width;
      const clientY = canvasRect.top + (projected.y / renderHeight) * canvasRect.height;
      if (!agent.downed && clientX >= left && clientX <= right && clientY >= top && clientY <= bottom) {
        this.selectedIds.add(agent.definition.id);
      }
    }

    this.applySelection();
  }

  private updateSelectionBox(x1: number, y1: number, x2: number, y2: number): void {
    this.selectionBox.hidden = false;
    this.selectionBox.style.left = `${Math.min(x1, x2)}px`;
    this.selectionBox.style.top = `${Math.min(y1, y2)}px`;
    this.selectionBox.style.width = `${Math.abs(x2 - x1)}px`;
    this.selectionBox.style.height = `${Math.abs(y2 - y1)}px`;
  }

  private applySelection(): void {
    this.agents.forEach((agent) => agent.setSelected(this.selectedIds.has(agent.definition.id)));
    this.bus.emit("selection:changed", { agentIds: [...this.selectedIds] });
  }
}

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/systems/TacticalPreviewSystem.ts =====
import { Color3, Mesh, MeshBuilder, StandardMaterial, Vector3, type Scene } from "@babylonjs/core";
import type { Agent } from "../entities/Agent";
import type { Enemy } from "../entities/Enemy";
import type { NavigationSystem } from "./NavigationSystem";
import type { VisionSystem } from "./VisionSystem";

export class TacticalPreviewSystem {
  private readonly meshes: Mesh[] = [];

  constructor(
    private readonly scene: Scene,
    private readonly navigation: NavigationSystem,
    private readonly vision: VisionSystem,
  ) {}

  showMove(agents: Agent[], destinations: Vector3[]): void {
    this.clear();
    agents.forEach((agent, index) => {
      const destination = destinations[index];
      if (!destination) return;
      const path = this.navigation.computePath(agent.root.position, destination);
      if (path.length < 2) return;
      const exposed = path.some((point) => this.vision.isPointObserved(point));
      const color = exposed ? new Color3(1, 0.62, 0.2) : agent.definition.color;
      const line = MeshBuilder.CreateDashedLines(`preview-path:${agent.id}`, {
        points: path.map((point) => point.add(new Vector3(0, 0.12, 0))),
        dashSize: 0.35,
        gapSize: 0.18,
        dashNb: Math.max(8, path.length * 5),
      }, this.scene);
      line.color = color;
      line.alpha = 0.78;
      line.isPickable = false;
      this.meshes.push(line);
      this.meshes.push(this.createDestination(destination, color, exposed));
    });
  }

  showAttack(agent: Agent, enemy: Enemy, chance: number, blocked: boolean): void {
    this.clear();
    const line = MeshBuilder.CreateDashedLines(`preview-shot:${agent.id}`, {
      points: [agent.root.position.add(new Vector3(0, 1.25, 0)), enemy.root.position.add(new Vector3(0, 1.25, 0))],
      dashSize: 0.22,
      gapSize: 0.12,
      dashNb: 24,
    }, this.scene);
    line.color = blocked ? new Color3(1, 0.2, 0.12) : chance >= 0.65 ? new Color3(0.45, 1, 0.68) : new Color3(1, 0.66, 0.2);
    line.alpha = 0.82;
    line.isPickable = false;
    this.meshes.push(line);
  }

  showCone(origin: Vector3, yaw: number, arc: number, range: number): void {
    this.clear();
    const points = [origin.add(new Vector3(0, 0.11, 0))];
    const segments = 18;
    for (let index = 0; index <= segments; index += 1) {
      const angle = yaw - arc / 2 + (arc * index) / segments;
      points.push(origin.add(new Vector3(Math.sin(angle) * range, 0.11, Math.cos(angle) * range)));
    }
    points.push(origin.add(new Vector3(0, 0.11, 0)));
    const line = MeshBuilder.CreateLines(`preview-cone:${crypto.randomUUID()}`, { points }, this.scene);
    line.color = new Color3(1, 0.72, 0.23);
    line.alpha = 0.82;
    line.isPickable = false;
    this.meshes.push(line);
  }

  showArea(point: Vector3, radius: number, kind: "smoke" | "emp"): void {
    this.clear();
    const marker = MeshBuilder.CreateTorus(`preview-area:${crypto.randomUUID()}`, {
      diameter: radius * 2,
      thickness: 0.075,
      tessellation: 48,
    }, this.scene);
    marker.position.copyFrom(point.add(new Vector3(0, 0.1, 0)));
    marker.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2;
    marker.isPickable = false;
    const material = new StandardMaterial(`${marker.name}:material`, this.scene);
    const color = kind === "smoke" ? new Color3(0.55, 0.75, 0.82) : new Color3(0.35, 0.55, 1);
    material.emissiveColor = color;
    material.diffuseColor = color.scale(0.18);
    material.alpha = 0.68;
    material.disableLighting = true;
    marker.material = material;
    this.meshes.push(marker);
  }

  clear(): void {
    while (this.meshes.length) this.meshes.pop()?.dispose(false, true);
  }

  private createDestination(point: Vector3, color: Color3, exposed: boolean): Mesh {
    const marker = MeshBuilder.CreateCylinder(`preview-destination:${crypto.randomUUID()}`, {
      diameter: 0.72,
      height: 0.035,
      tessellation: 32,
    }, this.scene);
    marker.position.copyFrom(point);
    marker.position.y = 0.08;
    marker.isPickable = false;
    const material = new StandardMaterial(`${marker.name}:material`, this.scene);
    material.emissiveColor = color;
    material.diffuseColor = color.scale(0.14);
    material.alpha = exposed ? 0.72 : 0.5;
    material.disableLighting = true;
    marker.material = material;
    return marker;
  }
}

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/systems/VisionSystem.ts =====
import {
  Color3,
  Mesh,
  MeshBuilder,
  Ray,
  StandardMaterial,
  Vector3,
  VertexData,
  type ArcRotateCamera,
  type Scene,
} from "@babylonjs/core";
import type { Agent } from "../entities/Agent";
import type { Enemy } from "../entities/Enemy";
import type { EventBus } from "../engine/EventBus";
import type { GadgetSystem } from "./GadgetSystem";
import { MOVEMENT_STANCES } from "../tactical/TacticalTypes";
import type { RoomDefinition, SecuritySensorDefinition } from "../world/WorldTypes";

export class VisionSystem {
  private elapsed = 0;
  private conesVisible = true;
  private readonly revealedRooms = new Set<string>();
  private readonly enemyCones = new Map<string, Mesh>();
  private readonly sensorCones = new Map<string, Mesh>();
  private readonly sensorTriggered = new Set<string>();
  private readonly disabledSensors = new Set<string>();

  constructor(
    private readonly scene: Scene,
    private readonly agents: Agent[],
    private readonly enemies: Enemy[],
    private readonly rooms: RoomDefinition[],
    private readonly sensors: SecuritySensorDefinition[],
    private readonly wallMeshes: Mesh[],
    private readonly gadgets: GadgetSystem,
    private readonly camera: ArcRotateCamera,
    private readonly bus: EventBus,
  ) {
    rooms.forEach((room) => {
      if (room.initiallyRevealed) this.revealedRooms.add(room.id);
      room.roofMesh.setEnabled(!room.initiallyRevealed);
    });

    enemies.forEach((enemy) => {
      const color = enemy.kind === "observer" ? new Color3(1, 0.5, 0.12) : enemy.kind === "jammer" ? new Color3(0.7, 0.22, 1) : new Color3(1, 0.16, 0.07);
      const cone = createVisionCone(scene, `enemy-cone:${enemy.id}`, enemy.kind === "observer" ? 11 : enemy.kind === "hunter" ? 8.5 : 10, Math.PI * 0.56, color);
      cone.parent = enemy.root;
      cone.position.y = 0.03;
      cone.setEnabled(false);
      this.enemyCones.set(enemy.id, cone);
    });

    sensors.forEach((sensor) => {
      const cone = createVisionCone(scene, `sensor-cone:${sensor.id}`, sensor.range, sensor.fovRadians, new Color3(1, 0.12, 0.08));
      cone.position.copyFrom(sensor.position);
      cone.position.y = 0.04;
      cone.rotation.y = sensor.yaw;
      cone.setEnabled(this.conesVisible);
      this.sensorCones.set(sensor.id, cone);
    });

    bus.on("noise:created", ({ position, sourceTeam }) => {
      this.spawnSoundIndicator(position, sourceTeam === "ion" ? new Color3(0.35, 0.85, 1) : new Color3(1, 0.28, 0.12));
    });
    bus.on("security:disabled", ({ sensorId }) => {
      this.disabledSensors.add(sensorId);
      this.sensorCones.get(sensorId)?.setEnabled(false);
    });
  }

  update(deltaSeconds: number, selectedAgents: Agent[]): void {
    this.updateCameraOcclusion(selectedAgents);
    if (deltaSeconds <= 0) return;
    this.elapsed += deltaSeconds;
    if (this.elapsed < 0.12) return;
    this.elapsed = 0;

    this.updateRooms();
    this.updateEnemies();
    this.updateSensors();
  }

  toggleCones(): boolean {
    this.conesVisible = !this.conesVisible;
    for (const [enemyId, cone] of this.enemyCones) {
      const enemy = this.enemies.find((candidate) => candidate.id === enemyId);
      cone.setEnabled(this.conesVisible && !!enemy?.discovered && !enemy.disabled);
    }
    for (const [sensorId, cone] of this.sensorCones) cone.setEnabled(this.conesVisible && !this.disabledSensors.has(sensorId));
    return this.conesVisible;
  }

  canAgentSeeEnemy(agent: Agent, enemy: Enemy): boolean {
    return this.canSee(agent.root.position, agent.root.rotation.y, enemy.root.position, 15, Math.PI * 1.25);
  }

  canEnemySeeAgent(enemy: Enemy, agent: Agent): boolean {
    const baseRange = enemy.kind === "observer" ? 12 : enemy.kind === "hunter" ? 9 : 10.5;
    const range = baseRange * MOVEMENT_STANCES[agent.movementStance].detectionMultiplier;
    const fov = enemy.kind === "observer" ? Math.PI * 0.72 : Math.PI * 0.62;
    return this.canSee(enemy.root.position, enemy.root.rotation.y, agent.root.position, range, fov);
  }

  isEnemyVisible(enemy: Enemy): boolean {
    return enemy.currentlyVisible;
  }

  isPointObserved(point: Vector3): boolean {
    const watchedByEnemy = this.enemies.some((enemy) => !enemy.disabled && enemy.discovered
      && this.canSee(enemy.root.position, enemy.root.rotation.y, point, enemy.kind === "observer" ? 12 : 10.5, enemy.kind === "observer" ? Math.PI * 0.72 : Math.PI * 0.62));
    if (watchedByEnemy) return true;
    return this.sensors.some((sensor) => !this.disabledSensors.has(sensor.id)
      && this.canSee(sensor.position, sensor.yaw, point, sensor.range, sensor.fovRadians));
  }

  snapshot(): { revealedRoomIds: string[]; triggeredSensorIds: string[]; disabledSensorIds: string[]; conesVisible: boolean } {
    return {
      revealedRoomIds: [...this.revealedRooms],
      triggeredSensorIds: [...this.sensorTriggered],
      disabledSensorIds: [...this.disabledSensors],
      conesVisible: this.conesVisible,
    };
  }

  restore(snapshot: { revealedRoomIds?: string[]; triggeredSensorIds?: string[]; disabledSensorIds?: string[]; conesVisible?: boolean }): void {
    this.revealedRooms.clear();
    (snapshot.revealedRoomIds ?? []).forEach((id) => this.revealedRooms.add(id));
    this.sensorTriggered.clear();
    (snapshot.triggeredSensorIds ?? []).forEach((id) => this.sensorTriggered.add(id));
    this.disabledSensors.clear();
    (snapshot.disabledSensorIds ?? []).forEach((id) => this.disabledSensors.add(id));
    this.conesVisible = snapshot.conesVisible ?? true;
    this.rooms.forEach((room) => room.roofMesh.setEnabled(!this.revealedRooms.has(room.id)));
    this.sensorCones.forEach((cone, id) => cone.setEnabled(this.conesVisible && !this.disabledSensors.has(id)));
  }

  private spawnSoundIndicator(position: Vector3, color: Color3): void {
    const ring = MeshBuilder.CreateTorus(`sound:${crypto.randomUUID()}`, {
      diameter: 0.8,
      thickness: 0.045,
      tessellation: 48,
    }, this.scene);
    ring.position.copyFrom(position);
    ring.position.y = 0.08;
    ring.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2;
    ring.isPickable = false;
    const material = new StandardMaterial(`sound-mat:${crypto.randomUUID()}`, this.scene);
    material.emissiveColor = color;
    material.alpha = 0.8;
    material.disableLighting = true;
    ring.material = material;
    const started = performance.now();
    const observer = this.scene.onBeforeRenderObservable.add(() => {
      const elapsed = (performance.now() - started) / 1000;
      const scale = 1 + elapsed * 6;
      ring.scaling.setAll(scale);
      ring.visibility = Math.max(0, 1 - elapsed / 1.1);
      if (elapsed >= 1.1) {
        this.scene.onBeforeRenderObservable.remove(observer);
        ring.dispose(false, true);
      }
    });
  }

  private updateRooms(): void {
    for (const room of this.rooms) {
      if (this.revealedRooms.has(room.id)) continue;
      const entered = this.agents.some((agent) => !agent.downed && insideRoom(agent.root.position, room));
      if (!entered) continue;
      this.revealedRooms.add(room.id);
      room.roofMesh.setEnabled(false);
      this.bus.emit("room:revealed", { roomId: room.id, roomName: room.name });
      this.bus.emit("toast", { message: `${room.name} revealed.`, tone: "info" });
    }
  }

  private updateEnemies(): void {
    for (const enemy of this.enemies) {
      if (enemy.disabled) {
        enemy.discovered = enemy.discovered || this.agents.some((agent) => this.canAgentSeeEnemy(agent, enemy));
        enemy.setVisualState(enemy.discovered, false);
        this.enemyCones.get(enemy.id)?.setEnabled(false);
        continue;
      }
      const visible = this.agents.some((agent) => !agent.downed && this.canAgentSeeEnemy(agent, enemy));
      if (visible && !enemy.discovered) {
        enemy.discovered = true;
        this.bus.emit("enemy:discovered", { enemyId: enemy.id, kind: enemy.kind });
        this.bus.emit("toast", { message: `${enemy.kind.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + enemy.kind.slice(1)} frame detected.`, tone: "warning" });
      }
      if (visible) {
        enemy.lastKnownMarker.position.copyFrom(enemy.root.position);
        enemy.lastKnownMarker.position.y = 0.06;
      }
      enemy.currentlyVisible = visible;
      enemy.setVisualState(visible, enemy.discovered && !visible);
      const cone = this.enemyCones.get(enemy.id);
      if (cone) cone.setEnabled(this.conesVisible && enemy.discovered && visible);
    }
  }

  private updateSensors(): void {
    for (const sensor of this.sensors) {
      if (this.disabledSensors.has(sensor.id)) continue;
      const detected = this.agents.some((agent) => {
        if (agent.downed) return false;
        return this.canSee(sensor.position, sensor.yaw, agent.root.position, sensor.range, sensor.fovRadians);
      });
      if (!detected || this.sensorTriggered.has(sensor.id)) continue;
      this.sensorTriggered.add(sensor.id);
      this.bus.emit("security:alarm", { sensorId: sensor.id });
      this.bus.emit("toast", { message: "Security camera detected Alpha Team.", tone: "warning" });
      this.bus.emit("noise:created", { position: sensor.position.clone(), radius: 18, sourceTeam: "echo" });
    }
  }

  private canSee(originPosition: Vector3, yaw: number, targetPosition: Vector3, range: number, fov: number): boolean {
    if (this.gadgets.lineCrossesSmoke(originPosition, targetPosition) || this.gadgets.pointInSmoke(targetPosition)) return false;
    const delta = targetPosition.subtract(originPosition);
    delta.y = 0;
    const distance = delta.length();
    if (distance > range || distance < 0.01) return false;
    const forward = new Vector3(Math.sin(yaw), 0, Math.cos(yaw));
    const direction = delta.normalize();
    const angle = Math.acos(Math.max(-1, Math.min(1, Vector3.Dot(forward, direction))));
    if (angle > fov / 2) return false;

    const origin = originPosition.add(new Vector3(0, 1.3, 0));
    const target = targetPosition.add(new Vector3(0, 1.1, 0));
    const rayDirection = target.subtract(origin);
    const rayLength = rayDirection.length();
    rayDirection.normalize();
    const hit = this.scene.pickWithRay(new Ray(origin, rayDirection, rayLength), (mesh) => {
      const metadata = mesh.metadata as Record<string, unknown> | null;
      return metadata?.blocksVision === true;
    });
    return !hit?.hit;
  }

  private updateCameraOcclusion(selectedAgents: Agent[]): void {
    const targets = selectedAgents.length > 0 ? selectedAgents : this.agents.filter((agent) => !agent.downed).slice(0, 1);
    const occluded = new Set<Mesh>();
    for (const agent of targets) {
      const origin = this.camera.position;
      const target = agent.root.position.add(new Vector3(0, 1, 0));
      const direction = target.subtract(origin);
      const length = direction.length();
      if (length <= 0.1) continue;
      direction.normalize();
      const hits = this.scene.multiPickWithRay(new Ray(origin, direction, length), (mesh) => {
        const metadata = mesh.metadata as Record<string, unknown> | null;
        return metadata?.cameraOccluder === true;
      });
      hits?.forEach((hit) => {
        if (hit.pickedMesh) occluded.add(hit.pickedMesh as Mesh);
      });
    }
    this.wallMeshes.forEach((wall) => {
      const targetVisibility = occluded.has(wall) ? 0.18 : 1;
      wall.visibility += (targetVisibility - wall.visibility) * 0.18;
    });
  }
}

function createVisionCone(scene: Scene, name: string, range: number, fov: number, color: Color3): Mesh {
  const segments = 28;
  const positions: number[] = [0, 0, 0];
  const indices: number[] = [];
  const normals: number[] = [];
  const uvs: number[] = [0.5, 0.5];

  for (let index = 0; index <= segments; index += 1) {
    const angle = -fov / 2 + (fov * index) / segments;
    positions.push(Math.sin(angle) * range, 0, Math.cos(angle) * range);
    uvs.push(0.5 + Math.sin(angle) * 0.5, 0.5 + Math.cos(angle) * 0.5);
    if (index < segments) indices.push(0, index + 1, index + 2);
  }
  VertexData.ComputeNormals(positions, indices, normals);
  const vertexData = new VertexData();
  vertexData.positions = positions;
  vertexData.indices = indices;
  vertexData.normals = normals;
  vertexData.uvs = uvs;
  const mesh = new Mesh(name, scene);
  vertexData.applyToMesh(mesh);

  const material = new StandardMaterial(`${name}:material`, scene);
  material.diffuseColor = color;
  material.emissiveColor = color.scale(0.38);
  material.alpha = 0.17;
  material.backFaceCulling = false;
  material.disableLighting = true;
  mesh.material = material;
  mesh.isPickable = false;
  return mesh;
}

function insideRoom(position: Vector3, room: RoomDefinition): boolean {
  return position.x >= room.minX && position.x <= room.maxX && position.z >= room.minZ && position.z <= room.maxZ;
}

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/tactical/TacticalTypes.test.ts =====
import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest";
import { suppressionAccuracyPenalty, suppressionState } from "./TacticalTypes";

describe("suppression states", () => {
  it("progresses through steady, suppressed, pinned, and broken", () => {
    expect(suppressionState(0)).toBe("steady");
    expect(suppressionState(35)).toBe("suppressed");
    expect(suppressionState(70)).toBe("pinned");
    expect(suppressionState(100)).toBe("broken");
    expect(suppressionAccuracyPenalty(75)).toBeGreaterThan(suppressionAccuracyPenalty(40));
  });
});

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/tactical/TacticalTypes.ts =====
export type MovementStance = "cautious" | "tactical" | "sprint" | "crouched";
export type FireMode = "standard" | "aimed" | "burst" | "suppressive";
export type GadgetId = "smoke" | "emp";
export type DoorAction = "open" | "close" | "lock" | "hack" | "breach";
export type SuppressionState = "steady" | "suppressed" | "pinned" | "broken";

export const MOVEMENT_STANCES: Record<MovementStance, {
  label: string;
  speedMultiplier: number;
  noiseMultiplier: number;
  detectionMultiplier: number;
  incomingHitModifier: number;
}> = {
  cautious: { label: "Cautious", speedMultiplier: 0.65, noiseMultiplier: 0.35, detectionMultiplier: 0.62, incomingHitModifier: 0.03 },
  tactical: { label: "Tactical", speedMultiplier: 1, noiseMultiplier: 1, detectionMultiplier: 1, incomingHitModifier: 0 },
  sprint: { label: "Sprint", speedMultiplier: 1.42, noiseMultiplier: 1.65, detectionMultiplier: 1.32, incomingHitModifier: -0.12 },
  crouched: { label: "Crouched", speedMultiplier: 0.55, noiseMultiplier: 0.45, detectionMultiplier: 0.55, incomingHitModifier: 0.05 },
};

export const FIRE_MODES: Record<FireMode, {
  label: string;
  aimSeconds: number;
  ammoCost: number;
  accuracyModifier: number;
  damageMultiplier: number;
  suppression: number;
  noiseMultiplier: number;
}> = {
  standard: { label: "Standard", aimSeconds: 0.32, ammoCost: 1, accuracyModifier: 0, damageMultiplier: 1, suppression: 28, noiseMultiplier: 1 },
  aimed: { label: "Aimed", aimSeconds: 1.05, ammoCost: 1, accuracyModifier: 0.18, damageMultiplier: 1.12, suppression: 22, noiseMultiplier: 1 },
  burst: { label: "Burst", aimSeconds: 0.48, ammoCost: 3, accuracyModifier: -0.1, damageMultiplier: 1.72, suppression: 48, noiseMultiplier: 1.3 },
  suppressive: { label: "Suppress", aimSeconds: 0.42, ammoCost: 3, accuracyModifier: -0.2, damageMultiplier: 0.72, suppression: 72, noiseMultiplier: 1.45 },
};

export function suppressionState(value: number): SuppressionState {
  if (value >= 100) return "broken";
  if (value >= 70) return "pinned";
  if (value >= 35) return "suppressed";
  return "steady";
}

export function suppressionAccuracyPenalty(value: number): number {
  const state = suppressionState(value);
  if (state === "broken") return 0.35;
  if (state === "pinned") return 0.25;
  if (state === "suppressed") return 0.12;
  return 0;
}

// ===== extracted/Echo_Tactics_Phases_0-14_Source/src/ui/HudController.ts =====
import type { AssetValidationReport } from "../assets/AssetPipeline";
import type { EventBus } from "../engine/EventBus";
import type { TimeManager } from "../engine/TimeManager";
import type { Agent } from "../entities/Agent";
import type { Enemy } from "../entities/Enemy";
import type { MissionObjectiveStep, MissionReport, PragueMissionStage } from "../mission/MissionTypes";
import type { StoryState } from "../story/StoryState";
import type { AbilitySystem } from "../systems/AbilitySystem";
import type { CombatSystem } from "../systems/CombatSystem";
import type { CommandSystem } from "../systems/CommandSystem";
import type { EchoMetrics } from "../systems/EchoObserverSystem";
import type { InvestigationSystem } from "../systems/InvestigationSystem";
import type { SelectionSystem } from "../systems/SelectionSystem";

export class HudController {
  private readonly squadBar = element("squadBar");
  private readonly queueList = element("queueList");
  private readonly queueTitle = element("queueTitle");
  private readonly timeState = element("timeState");
  private readonly rendererBadge = element("rendererBadge");
  private readonly missionStage = element("missionStage");
  private readonly objectiveTitle = element("objectiveTitle");
  private readonly objectiveHint = element("objectiveHint");
  private readonly objectiveSteps = element("objectiveSteps");
  private readonly objectiveProgress = document.querySelector<HTMLElement>(".objective-progress > span");
  private readonly toastStack = element("toastStack");
  private readonly combatLog = element("combatLog");
  private readonly alertLevel = element("alertLevel");
  private readonly threatCount = element("threatCount");
  private readonly evidenceCount = element("evidenceCount");
  private readonly evidenceBadge = element("evidenceBadge");
  private readonly evidenceList = element("evidenceList");
  private readonly workingTheory = element("workingTheory");
  private readonly echoProfileText = element("echoProfileText");
  private readonly echoProfileMeter = element("echoProfileMeter");
  private readonly echoTier = element("echoTier");
  private readonly interactionProgress = element("interactionProgress");
  private readonly interactionProgressLabel = element("interactionProgressLabel");
  private readonly interactionProgressBar = element("interactionProgressBar");
  private readonly logEntries: Array<{ message: string; tone: string }> = [];
  private lastSquadSignature = "";
  private nextPassiveUpdate = 0;

  constructor(
    private readonly agents: Agent[],
    private readonly enemies: Enemy[],
    private readonly selection: SelectionSystem,
    private readonly commands: CommandSystem,
    private readonly combat: CombatSystem,
    private readonly investigation: InvestigationSystem,
    private readonly abilities: AbilitySystem,
    private readonly story: StoryState,
    private readonly time: TimeManager,
    private readonly bus: EventBus,
    renderer: string,
  ) {
    this.rendererBadge.textContent = renderer;
    this.renderSquadBar(true);
    this.bindButtons();
    this.bindContextTabs();
    this.bindEvents();
    this.updateTimeDisplay(this.time.currentState);
    this.updateQueuePanel();
    this.updateThreatCount();
    this.updateEvidence();
    this.updateAbilityButtons();
  }

  update(): void {
    const now = performance.now();
    if (now < this.nextPassiveUpdate) return;
    this.nextPassiveUpdate = now + 180;
    this.renderSquadBar(false);
    this.updateThreatCount();
    this.updateAbilityButtons();
  }

  setObjective(title: string, hint: string, progress: number, complete: boolean): void {
    this.objectiveTitle.textContent = title;
    this.objectiveHint.textContent = hint;
    if (this.objectiveProgress) {
      this.objectiveProgress.style.width = `${Math.round(progress * 100)}%`;
      this.objectiveProgress.classList.toggle("complete", complete);
    }
  }

  setAssetDiagnostics(reports: AssetValidationReport[]): void {
    const panel = document.getElementById("assetDiagnostics");
    const list = document.getElementById("assetDiagnosticsList");
    if (!panel || !list) return;
    panel.hidden = false;
    list.innerHTML = reports.map((report) => `
      <article class="diagnostic-item ${report.valid ? "valid" : "invalid"}">
        <strong>${escapeHtml(report.assetId)}</strong>
        <span>${report.meshCount} meshes · ${report.animationNames.length} clips · ${escapeHtml(report.visualMode ?? "unknown")} visual</span>
        ${report.rigMatchPercent === undefined ? "" : `<span>${report.rigMatchPercent.toFixed(1)}% rig match · ${report.socketBindings?.length ?? 0} socket bindings</span>`}
        <small>${report.warnings.length > 0 ? report.warnings.map(escapeHtml).join(" · ") : "Asset contract passed"}</small>
      </article>
    `).join("");
  }

  private bindEvents(): void {
    this.bus.on("selection:changed", () => {
      this.renderSquadBar(true);
      this.updateQueuePanel();
      this.updateAbilityButtons();
    });
    this.bus.on("commands:changed", () => {
      this.renderSquadBar(true);
      this.updateQueuePanel();
    });
    this.bus.on("combat:changed", () => this.renderSquadBar(true));
    this.bus.on("ability:changed", () => {
      this.renderSquadBar(true);
      this.updateAbilityButtons();
    });
    this.bus.on("agent:downed", () => this.renderSquadBar(true));
    this.bus.on("enemy:disabled", () => this.updateThreatCount());
    this.bus.on("enemy:escaped", () => this.updateThreatCount());
    this.bus.on("time:changed", ({ state }) => this.updateTimeDisplay(state));
    this.bus.on("toast", ({ message, tone }) => this.showToast(message, tone));
    this.bus.on("combat:log", ({ message, tone = "info" }) => this.addCombatLog(message, tone));
    this.bus.on("evidence:collected", () => this.updateEvidence());
    this.bus.on("dialogue:choice", () => this.updateTheory());
    this.bus.on("interaction:corrupted", () => this.updateEvidence());
    this.bus.on("interaction:progress", ({ label, progress }) => {
      this.interactionProgress.hidden = progress >= 1;
      this.interactionProgressLabel.textContent = label.toUpperCase();
      this.interactionProgressBar.style.width = `${Math.round(progress * 100)}%`;
    });
    this.bus.on("sync:changed", () => this.updateQueuePanel());
    this.bus.on("gadget:deployed", () => this.renderSquadBar(true));
    this.bus.on("door:changed", () => this.updateQueuePanel());
    this.bus.on("echo:profile-changed", ({ metrics }) => this.updateEchoProfile(metrics));
    this.bus.on("echo:profile-tier", ({ tier, confidence }) => {
      this.echoTier.textContent = `${tier.toUpperCase()} · ${Math.round(confidence)}%`;
      this.echoTier.className = `echo-tier ${tier}`;
    });
    this.bus.on("echo:adaptation", ({ adaptation, summary }) => {
      this.echoProfileText.textContent = `${adaptation.replaceAll("_", " ").toUpperCase()}: ${summary}`;
      this.echoProfileMeter.style.width = "100%";
    });
    this.bus.on("alert:changed", ({ level }) => {
      this.alertLevel.textContent = level;
      this.alertLevel.className = `alert-chip ${level.toLowerCase()}`;
    });
    this.bus.on("mission:stage-changed", ({ stage }) => this.updateMissionStage(stage));
    this.bus.on("mission:objectives", ({ steps }) => this.renderObjectives(steps));
    this.bus.on("mission:debrief", ({ report }) => this.showDebrief(report));
    this.bus.on("save:loaded", () => {
      this.renderSquadBar(true);
      this.updateQueuePanel();
      this.updateEvidence();
      this.updateThreatCount();
      this.updateAbilityButtons();
    });
  }

  private bindButtons(): void {
    element("pauseButton").addEventListener("click", () => this.time.togglePause());
    element("slowButton").addEventListener("click", () => this.time.toggleSlowMotion());
    element("clearQueueButton").addEventListener("click", () => {
      const selected = this.selection.selectedAgents;
      if (selected.length > 0) this.commands.clearAgents(selected);
    });

    const helpModal = element("helpModal");
    element("helpButton").addEventListener("click", () => {
      helpModal.hidden = false;
      this.time.acquirePause("help");
    });
    element("closeHelpButton").addEventListener("click", () => {
      helpModal.hidden = true;
      this.time.releasePause("help");
    });
    helpModal.addEventListener("pointerdown", (event) => {
      if (event.target === helpModal) {
        helpModal.hidden = true;
        this.time.releasePause("help");
      }
    });

    element("startMissionButton").addEventListener("click", () => {
      element("briefingModal").hidden = true;
      this.bus.emit("mission:start", {});
    });
    element("continueDebriefButton").addEventListener("click", () => {
      element("debriefModal").hidden = true;
      this.bus.emit("mission:continue", {});
    });
    element("restartMissionButton").addEventListener("click", () => window.location.reload());
  }

  private bindContextTabs(): void {
    const buttons = [...document.querySelectorAll<HTMLButtonElement>("[data-context-tab]")];
    const pages = [...document.querySelectorAll<HTMLElement>("[data-context-page]")];
    buttons.forEach((button) => {
      button.addEventListener("click", () => {
        const tab = button.dataset.contextTab;
        buttons.forEach((candidate) => candidate.classList.toggle("active", candidate === button));
        pages.forEach((page) => { page.hidden = page.dataset.contextPage !== tab; });
      });
    });
  }

  private renderSquadBar(force: boolean): void {
    const signature = this.agents.map((agent) => [
      agent.selected,
      agent.health,
      agent.armor,
      agent.ammo,
      agent.downed,
      agent.overwatch,
      agent.coverPointId ?? "",
      this.commands.getCommands(agent).length,
      agent.suppressedUntil > this.combat.simulationTime,
      agent.suppression.toFixed(0),
      agent.suppressionState,
      agent.movementStance,
      agent.jammedUntil > this.combat.simulationTime,
      this.abilities.cooldownRemaining(agent).toFixed(1),
    ].join(":" )).join("|");
    if (!force && signature === this.lastSquadSignature) return;
    this.lastSquadSignature = signature;

    this.squadBar.replaceChildren();
    this.agents.forEach((agent) => {
      const commands = this.commands.getCommands(agent);
      const card = document.createElement("button");
      card.type = "button";
      card.disabled = agent.downed;
      card.className = `agent-card${agent.selected ? " selected" : ""}${agent.downed ? " downed" : ""}`;
      card.style.setProperty("--agent-color", agent.definition.color.toHexString());
      const healthPercent = Math.max(0, (agent.health / agent.maxHealth) * 100);
      const status = agent.downed
        ? "DOWNED"
        : agent.jammedUntil > this.combat.simulationTime
          ? "JAMMED"
          : agent.suppressionState !== "steady"
            ? `${agent.suppressionState.toUpperCase()} ${Math.round(agent.suppression)}%`
            : agent.overwatch
              ? "OVERWATCH"
              : agent.coverPointId
                ? "IN COVER"
                : commands.length > 0
                  ? `${commands.length} ORDER${commands.length > 1 ? "S" : ""}`
                  : agent.movementStance.toUpperCase();
      const cooldown = this.abilities.cooldownRemaining(agent);
      card.innerHTML = `
        <span class="agent-shortcut">${agent.definition.shortcut}</span>
        <span class="agent-color" style="--agent-color:${agent.definition.color.toHexString()}"></span>
        <span class="agent-portrait">${initials(agent.definition.callsign)}</span>
        <span class="agent-copy">
          <strong>${agent.definition.callsign}</strong>
          <small>${agent.weapon.name}</small>
          <span class="agent-health"><i style="width:${healthPercent}%"></i></span>
        </span>
        <span class="agent-status">
          <strong>${agent.health}/${agent.maxHealth}</strong>
          <small>${agent.armor} ARM · ${agent.ammo}/${agent.magazineSize}</small>
          <em class="${agent.suppressionState}">${cooldown > 0 ? `ABILITY ${cooldown.toFixed(0)}s` : status}</em>
        </span>
      `;
      card.addEventListener("click", (event) => {
        if ((event as MouseEvent).shiftKey) this.selection.toggle(agent.id);
        else this.selection.selectOnly(agent.id);
      });
      this.squadBar.append(card);
    });
  }

  private updateQueuePanel(): void {
    const selected = this.selection.selectedAgents;
    if (selected.length === 0) {
      this.queueTitle.textContent = "No active selection";
      this.queueList.innerHTML = `<p class="empty-state">Select an active agent to inspect commands.</p>`;
      return;
    }

    if (selected.length > 1) {
      const total = selected.reduce((sum, agent) => sum + this.commands.getCommands(agent).length, 0);
      this.queueTitle.textContent = `${selected.length} agents selected`;
      this.queueList.innerHTML = total === 0
        ? `<p class="empty-state">Hover the world to preview routes. Right-click to issue; hold Shift to append.</p>`
        : selected.map((agent) => {
            const count = this.commands.getCommands(agent).length;
            return `<button class="queue-summary" data-agent-focus="${agent.id}" type="button"><span>${agent.definition.callsign}</span><strong>${count} order${count === 1 ? "" : "s"}</strong></button>`;
          }).join("");
      this.queueList.querySelectorAll<HTMLButtonElement>("[data-agent-focus]").forEach((button) => {
        button.addEventListener("click", () => this.selection.selectOnly(button.dataset.agentFocus ?? ""));
      });
      return;
    }

    const agent = selected[0];
    if (!agent) return;
    this.queueTitle.textContent = `${agent.definition.callsign} / command queue`;
    const commands = this.commands.getCommands(agent);
    if (commands.length === 0) {
      this.queueList.innerHTML = `<p class="empty-state">No queued commands. Hover terrain for route and exposure previews.</p>`;
      return;
    }

    this.queueList.innerHTML = commands.map((command, index) => `
      <div class="queue-item ${command.status}" data-command-id="${command.id}">
        <span class="queue-index">${index + 1}</span>
        <span class="queue-copy"><strong>${escapeHtml(command.label)}</strong><small>${command.status.toUpperCase()}${command.syncGroupId ? ` · <span class="sync-tag">${escapeHtml(command.syncGroupId.toUpperCase())}</span>` : ""}${command.failureReason ? ` · ${escapeHtml(command.failureReason)}` : ""}</small></span>
        <span class="queue-actions">
          <button type="button" data-command-up title="Move earlier" ${command.status === "active" ? "disabled" : ""}>↑</button>
          <button type="button" data-command-down title="Move later" ${command.status === "active" ? "disabled" : ""}>↓</button>
          <button type="button" data-command-remove title="Remove command">×</button>
        </span>
      </div>
    `).join("");
    this.queueList.querySelectorAll<HTMLElement>("[data-command-id]").forEach((row) => {
      const id = row.dataset.commandId ?? "";
      row.querySelector<HTMLButtonElement>("[data-command-up]")?.addEventListener("click", () => this.commands.reorderQueuedCommand(agent, id, -1));
      row.querySelector<HTMLButtonElement>("[data-command-down]")?.addEventListener("click", () => this.commands.reorderQueuedCommand(agent, id, 1));
      row.querySelector<HTMLButtonElement>("[data-command-remove]")?.addEventListener("click", () => this.commands.removeCommand(agent, id));
    });
  }

  private updateThreatCount(): void {
    const discovered = this.enemies.filter((enemy) => enemy.discovered).length;
    const active = this.enemies.filter((enemy) => enemy.discovered && !enemy.disabled).length;
    this.threatCount.textContent = `${active} ACTIVE / ${discovered} DETECTED`;
  }

  private updateEvidence(): void {
    const recovered = this.investigation.getRecoveredEvidence();
    this.evidenceCount.textContent = `${this.investigation.coreRecoveredCount} / ${this.investigation.totalCoreEvidence} CORE`;
    this.evidenceBadge.textContent = String(recovered.length);
    this.evidenceList.innerHTML = recovered.length === 0
      ? `<p class="empty-state">No evidence recovered.</p>`
      : recovered.map((item) => `
        <article class="evidence-item">
          <strong>${escapeHtml(item.title)}</strong>
          <span>${item.category}${item.core ? " · core" : ""}</span>
          <p>${escapeHtml(item.description)}</p>
        </article>
      `).join("");
    this.updateTheory();
  }

  private updateTheory(): void {
    const theory = this.story.has("theory.extraction")
      ? "ECHO EXTRACTED COGNITIVE STATE"
      : this.story.has("theory.installation")
        ? "ECHO INSTALLED A FOREIGN COGNITIVE PROCESS"
        : "UNRESOLVED — RECOVER THE INTERFACE PORT";
    const confidence = Math.min(100, this.investigation.coreRecoveredCount * 24 + this.investigation.recoveredCount * 5);
    this.workingTheory.textContent = `WORKING THEORY: ${theory} · ${confidence}% CONFIDENCE`;
  }

  private updateEchoProfile(metrics: EchoMetrics): void {
    const signals = metrics.squadSplitCount + metrics.overwatchUsage + metrics.alarmsTriggered + metrics.evidenceRecovered;
    const confidence = Math.min(100, 8 + signals * 9);
    const preferred = metrics.preferredAgent
      ? this.agents.find((agent) => agent.id === metrics.preferredAgent)?.definition.callsign
      : undefined;
    const traits = [
      metrics.squadSplitCount > 0 ? `split events ${metrics.squadSplitCount}` : undefined,
      metrics.overwatchUsage > 0 ? `overwatch ${metrics.overwatchUsage}` : undefined,
      metrics.alarmsTriggered > 0 ? `alarms ${metrics.alarmsTriggered}` : undefined,
      preferred ? `focus ${preferred}` : undefined,
    ].filter(Boolean);
    this.echoProfileText.textContent = traits.length > 0 ? traits.join(" · ").toUpperCase() : "PROFILE INCOMPLETE";
    this.echoProfileMeter.style.width = `${confidence}%`;
  }

  private updateTimeDisplay(state: "running" | "slow" | "paused"): void {
