// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/core/game_flow.gd =====
extends Node

const MAIN_MENU_SCENE := "res://scenes/boot/main.tscn"
const CAMPAIGN_SCENE := "res://scenes/campaign/campaign_hub.tscn"
const TACTICAL_FALLBACK_SCENE := "res://scenes/tactical/tactical_prototype.tscn"
const AFTER_ACTION_SCENE := "res://scenes/campaign/after_action.tscn"

var campaign_state: Dictionary = {}
var is_tactical_paused: bool = false

func new_campaign() -> void:
    _close_active_dialogue()
    campaign_state = {
        "campaign_id": "campaign-%s" % Time.get_unix_time_from_system(),
        "created_at": Time.get_datetime_string_from_system(),
        "chapter_id": "chapter_01_prague",
        "campaign_day": 1,
        "resources": {"credits": 1600, "intel": 6, "research": 0, "power": 12},
        "inventory": {"smoke_grenade": 2, "emp_charge": 2, "field_medkit": 2},
        "research": {},
        "story_flags": {},
        "squad": ["operator_alpha", "operator_bravo", "operator_charlie"],
        "last_scene": "campaign",
    }
    StrategicSystem.ensure_campaign_shape(campaign_state)
    is_tactical_paused = false
    ChapterManager.refresh(campaign_state)
    EventBus.campaign_created.emit(campaign_state)
    DebugConsole.log_message(&"campaign", "Created a new campaign.")

func save_campaign() -> bool:
    if campaign_state.is_empty():
        DebugConsole.warn(&"campaign", "Cannot save an empty campaign.")
        return false
    StrategicSystem.ensure_campaign_shape(campaign_state)
    return SaveSystem.save_campaign(campaign_state)

func load_campaign() -> bool:
    _close_active_dialogue()
    var loaded := SaveSystem.load_campaign()
    if loaded.is_empty():
        return false
    campaign_state = StrategicSystem.ensure_campaign_shape(loaded)
    is_tactical_paused = false
    ChapterManager.refresh(campaign_state)
    EventBus.campaign_loaded.emit(campaign_state)
    return true

func go_to_main_menu() -> void:
    _close_active_dialogue()
    is_tactical_paused = false
    SceneLoader.change_scene(MAIN_MENU_SCENE)

func go_to_campaign() -> void:
    if campaign_state.is_empty():
        new_campaign()
    campaign_state["last_scene"] = "campaign"
    is_tactical_paused = false
    ChapterManager.refresh(campaign_state)
    SceneLoader.change_scene(CAMPAIGN_SCENE)

func start_tactical_mission(mission_id: StringName = &"prague_hospital") -> bool:
    _close_active_dialogue()
    if campaign_state.is_empty():
        new_campaign()
    var mission := ContentDatabase.get_definition(mission_id) as MissionDefinition
    if mission == null:
        DebugConsole.warn(&"mission", "Unknown mission: %s" % mission_id)
        return false
    ChapterManager.refresh(campaign_state)
    if not StrategicSystem.can_launch_mission(mission, campaign_state):
        DebugConsole.warn(&"mission", "Mission '%s' cannot be launched with the current campaign state." % mission_id)
        return false
    var ready_squad := StrategicSystem.get_ready_squad(campaign_state)
    campaign_state["deployed_squad"] = ready_squad.slice(0, mission.squad_maximum)
    campaign_state["active_mission_id"] = String(mission_id)
    campaign_state["last_scene"] = "tactical"
    campaign_state["mission_started_day"] = campaign_state.get("campaign_day", 1)
    var statuses: Dictionary = campaign_state.get("mission_statuses", {})
    statuses[String(mission_id)] = "in_progress"
    campaign_state["mission_statuses"] = statuses
    is_tactical_paused = false
    if mission.map_scene != null:
        SceneLoader.change_scene_to_packed(mission.map_scene)
    else:
        DebugConsole.warn(&"mission", "Mission '%s' has no map; loading fallback." % mission_id)
        SceneLoader.change_scene(TACTICAL_FALLBACK_SCENE)
    return true

func complete_tactical_mission(result: Dictionary = {}) -> void:
    _close_active_dialogue()
    var resolved := result.duplicate(true)
    if not resolved.has("mission_id"):
        resolved["mission_id"] = campaign_state.get("active_mission_id", "unknown")
    campaign_state["last_mission_result"] = resolved
    campaign_state.erase("active_mission_id")
    campaign_state["last_scene"] = "after_action"
    StrategicSystem.apply_mission_result(resolved, campaign_state)
    is_tactical_paused = false
    EventBus.mission_completed.emit(resolved)
    save_campaign()
    SceneLoader.change_scene(AFTER_ACTION_SCENE)

func set_tactical_paused(value: bool) -> void:
    if is_tactical_paused == value:
        return
    is_tactical_paused = value
    EventBus.tactical_pause_changed.emit(value)

func toggle_tactical_pause() -> void:
    set_tactical_paused(not is_tactical_paused)

func _close_active_dialogue() -> void:
    if DialogueManager.active_dialogue != null:
        DialogueManager.end_dialogue()

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/core/performance_manager.gd =====
extends Node

enum QualityProfile { LOW, BALANCED, HIGH, AUTO }

signal quality_profile_changed(profile: QualityProfile)
signal performance_sampled(snapshot: Dictionary)

const SAMPLE_WINDOW := 90
const AUTO_EVALUATION_SECONDS := 6.0

var profile: QualityProfile = QualityProfile.AUTO
var effective_profile: QualityProfile = QualityProfile.BALANCED
var fps_samples: Array[float] = []
var frame_time_samples: Array[float] = []
var _sample_timer: float = 0.0
var _evaluation_timer: float = 0.0
var _scene_budget_timer: float = 0.0
var _last_snapshot: Dictionary = {}

func _ready() -> void:
    process_mode = Node.PROCESS_MODE_ALWAYS
    set_profile(int(SettingsManager.get_value(&"quality_profile", QualityProfile.AUTO)), false)

func _process(delta: float) -> void:
    _sample_timer -= delta
    _evaluation_timer -= delta
    _scene_budget_timer -= delta
    if _sample_timer <= 0.0:
        _sample_timer = 0.25
        _capture_sample(delta)
    if profile == QualityProfile.AUTO and _evaluation_timer <= 0.0:
        _evaluation_timer = AUTO_EVALUATION_SECONDS
        _evaluate_auto_profile()
    if _scene_budget_timer <= 0.0:
        _scene_budget_timer = 4.0
        apply_scene_budget()

func set_profile(value: int, persist: bool = true) -> void:
    profile = clampi(value, QualityProfile.LOW, QualityProfile.AUTO)
    effective_profile = QualityProfile.BALANCED if profile == QualityProfile.AUTO else profile
    if persist:
        SettingsManager.set_value(&"quality_profile", int(profile))
    apply_scene_budget()
    quality_profile_changed.emit(effective_profile)

func profile_name(value: int = -1) -> String:
    var resolved := effective_profile if value < 0 else clampi(value, QualityProfile.LOW, QualityProfile.AUTO)
    return QualityProfile.keys()[resolved].capitalize()

func ai_interval_multiplier() -> float:
    match effective_profile:
        QualityProfile.LOW:
            return 1.65
        QualityProfile.HIGH:
            return 0.82
        _:
            return 1.0

func perception_interval(base_interval: float) -> float:
    match effective_profile:
        QualityProfile.LOW:
            return maxf(base_interval, 0.42)
        QualityProfile.HIGH:
            return minf(base_interval, 0.16)
        _:
            return maxf(base_interval, 0.24)

func visibility_interval(base_interval: float) -> float:
    match effective_profile:
        QualityProfile.LOW:
            return maxf(base_interval, 0.32)
        QualityProfile.HIGH:
            return minf(base_interval, 0.12)
        _:
            return maxf(base_interval, 0.18)

func ui_refresh_interval() -> float:
    match effective_profile:
        QualityProfile.LOW:
            return 0.33
        QualityProfile.HIGH:
            return 0.12
        _:
            return 0.2

func particle_amount_ratio() -> float:
    match effective_profile:
        QualityProfile.LOW:
            return 0.42
        QualityProfile.HIGH:
            return 1.0
        _:
            return 0.72

func shadow_light_budget() -> int:
    match effective_profile:
        QualityProfile.LOW:
            return 2
        QualityProfile.HIGH:
            return 8
        _:
            return 4

func get_snapshot() -> Dictionary:
    return _last_snapshot.duplicate(true)

func apply_scene_budget() -> void:
    var scene := get_tree().current_scene
    if scene == null:
        return
    var shadow_budget := shadow_light_budget()
    var shadow_count := 0
    for node in _walk_tree(scene):
        if node is GPUParticles3D:
            (node as GPUParticles3D).amount_ratio = particle_amount_ratio()
        elif node is CPUParticles3D:
            var particles := node as CPUParticles3D
            if not particles.has_meta("echo_original_amount"):
                particles.set_meta("echo_original_amount", particles.amount)
            particles.amount = maxi(1, int(int(particles.get_meta("echo_original_amount")) * particle_amount_ratio()))
        elif node is Light3D:
            var light := node as Light3D
            if light.has_meta("echo_shadow_requested"):
                light.shadow_enabled = bool(light.get_meta("echo_shadow_requested")) and shadow_count < shadow_budget
            else:
                light.set_meta("echo_shadow_requested", light.shadow_enabled)
                light.shadow_enabled = light.shadow_enabled and shadow_count < shadow_budget
            if light.shadow_enabled:
                shadow_count += 1

func _capture_sample(delta: float) -> void:
    var fps := float(Engine.get_frames_per_second())
    fps_samples.append(fps)
    frame_time_samples.append(delta * 1000.0)
    if fps_samples.size() > SAMPLE_WINDOW:
        fps_samples.pop_front()
    if frame_time_samples.size() > SAMPLE_WINDOW:
        frame_time_samples.pop_front()
    _last_snapshot = {
        "fps": fps,
        "average_fps": _average(fps_samples),
        "frame_ms": delta * 1000.0,
        "average_frame_ms": _average(frame_time_samples),
        "process_ms": float(Performance.get_monitor(Performance.TIME_PROCESS)) * 1000.0,
        "physics_ms": float(Performance.get_monitor(Performance.TIME_PHYSICS_PROCESS)) * 1000.0,
        "navigation_ms": float(Performance.get_monitor(Performance.TIME_NAVIGATION_PROCESS)) * 1000.0,
        "memory_mb": float(Performance.get_monitor(Performance.MEMORY_STATIC)) / 1048576.0,
        "objects": int(Performance.get_monitor(Performance.OBJECT_COUNT)),
        "draw_calls": int(Performance.get_monitor(Performance.RENDER_TOTAL_DRAW_CALLS_IN_FRAME)),
        "primitives": int(Performance.get_monitor(Performance.RENDER_TOTAL_PRIMITIVES_IN_FRAME)),
        "profile": profile_name(),
    }
    performance_sampled.emit(_last_snapshot)

func _evaluate_auto_profile() -> void:
    if fps_samples.size() < 12:
        return
    var average_fps := _average(fps_samples)
    var next := effective_profile
    if average_fps < 44.0:
        next = QualityProfile.LOW
    elif average_fps > 57.0:
        next = QualityProfile.HIGH
    else:
        next = QualityProfile.BALANCED
    if next != effective_profile:
        effective_profile = next
        apply_scene_budget()
        quality_profile_changed.emit(effective_profile)

func _average(values: Array[float]) -> float:
    if values.is_empty():
        return 0.0
    var total := 0.0
    for value in values:
        total += value
    return total / values.size()

func _walk_tree(root: Node) -> Array[Node]:
    var result: Array[Node] = [root]
    var index := 0
    while index < result.size():
        var node := result[index]
        for child in node.get_children():
            result.append(child)
        index += 1
    return result

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/core/save_snapshot_manager.gd =====
extends Node

const SNAPSHOT_DIRECTORY := "user://saves/snapshots"

func _ready() -> void:
    DirAccess.make_dir_recursive_absolute(ProjectSettings.globalize_path(SNAPSHOT_DIRECTORY))

func save_snapshot(snapshot_name: String, campaign_state: Dictionary = {}) -> String:
    var state := campaign_state if not campaign_state.is_empty() else GameFlow.campaign_state
    if state.is_empty():
        return ""
    var safe_name := _sanitize(snapshot_name)
    if safe_name.is_empty():
        safe_name = "snapshot_%s" % Time.get_unix_time_from_system()
    var path := SNAPSHOT_DIRECTORY.path_join(safe_name + ".json")
    if SaveSystem.save_campaign(state.duplicate(true), path):
        return path
    return ""

func load_snapshot(snapshot_name: String) -> Dictionary:
    var path := _resolve_snapshot_path(snapshot_name)
    return SaveSystem.load_campaign(path)

func restore_snapshot(snapshot_name: String) -> bool:
    var state := load_snapshot(snapshot_name)
    if state.is_empty():
        return false
    GameFlow.campaign_state = StrategicSystem.ensure_campaign_shape(state)
    ChapterManager.refresh(GameFlow.campaign_state)
    EventBus.campaign_loaded.emit(GameFlow.campaign_state)
    return true

func delete_snapshot(snapshot_name: String) -> bool:
    var path := _resolve_snapshot_path(snapshot_name)
    if not FileAccess.file_exists(path):
        return false
    return DirAccess.remove_absolute(ProjectSettings.globalize_path(path)) == OK

func list_snapshots() -> Array[Dictionary]:
    var result: Array[Dictionary] = []
    var directory := DirAccess.open(SNAPSHOT_DIRECTORY)
    if directory == null:
        return result
    directory.list_dir_begin()
    var entry := directory.get_next()
    while not entry.is_empty():
        if not directory.current_is_dir() and entry.get_extension().to_lower() == "json":
            var path := SNAPSHOT_DIRECTORY.path_join(entry)
            result.append({
                "name": entry.get_basename(),
                "path": path,
                "modified": FileAccess.get_modified_time(path),
            })
        entry = directory.get_next()
    directory.list_dir_end()
    result.sort_custom(func(a: Dictionary, b: Dictionary) -> bool: return int(a.modified) > int(b.modified))
    return result

func _resolve_snapshot_path(snapshot_name: String) -> String:
    if snapshot_name.begins_with("user://"):
        return snapshot_name
    var safe_name := _sanitize(snapshot_name.trim_suffix(".json"))
    return SNAPSHOT_DIRECTORY.path_join(safe_name + ".json")

func _sanitize(value: String) -> String:
    var result := value.strip_edges().to_lower().replace(" ", "_")
    for character in ["/", "\\", ":", "*", "?", "\"", "<", ">", "|"]:
        result = result.replace(character, "")
    return result

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/core/save_system.gd =====
extends Node

const SAVE_DIRECTORY := "user://saves"
const DEFAULT_SLOT := "campaign_01.json"

func _ready() -> void:
    DirAccess.make_dir_recursive_absolute(ProjectSettings.globalize_path(SAVE_DIRECTORY))

func default_save_path() -> String:
    return SAVE_DIRECTORY.path_join(DEFAULT_SLOT)

func has_save(path: String = "") -> bool:
    var resolved := path if not path.is_empty() else default_save_path()
    return FileAccess.file_exists(resolved)

func save_campaign(campaign_state: Dictionary, path: String = "") -> bool:
    var resolved := path if not path.is_empty() else default_save_path()
    var envelope := {
        "format_version": 1,
        "saved_at": Time.get_datetime_string_from_system(),
        "campaign": campaign_state,
    }
    var file := FileAccess.open(resolved, FileAccess.WRITE)
    if file == null:
        DebugConsole.error(&"save", "Unable to write %s (error %s)." % [resolved, FileAccess.get_open_error()])
        return false
    file.store_string(JSON.stringify(envelope, "\t"))
    EventBus.campaign_saved.emit(resolved)
    DebugConsole.log_message(&"save", "Saved campaign to %s" % resolved)
    return true

func load_campaign(path: String = "") -> Dictionary:
    var resolved := path if not path.is_empty() else default_save_path()
    if not FileAccess.file_exists(resolved):
        DebugConsole.warn(&"save", "No save exists at %s" % resolved)
        return {}
    var file := FileAccess.open(resolved, FileAccess.READ)
    if file == null:
        DebugConsole.error(&"save", "Unable to read %s." % resolved)
        return {}
    var parsed: Variant = JSON.parse_string(file.get_as_text())
    if not parsed is Dictionary:
        DebugConsole.error(&"save", "Save file is not a JSON object.")
        return {}
    var envelope: Dictionary = parsed
    var campaign: Variant = envelope.get("campaign", {})
    if not campaign is Dictionary:
        DebugConsole.error(&"save", "Save file does not contain campaign data.")
        return {}
    return campaign.duplicate(true)

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/core/scene_loader.gd =====
extends Node

var _is_loading: bool = false

func change_scene(scene_path: String) -> bool:
    if _is_loading:
        DebugConsole.warn(&"scene", "Ignored scene request while another transition was active.")
        return false
    if not ResourceLoader.exists(scene_path):
        DebugConsole.error(&"scene", "Scene does not exist: %s" % scene_path)
        return false
    _is_loading = true
    var result := get_tree().change_scene_to_file(scene_path)
    _is_loading = false
    if result != OK:
        DebugConsole.error(&"scene", "Could not change scene to %s (error %s)." % [scene_path, result])
        return false
    return true

func change_scene_to_packed(scene: PackedScene) -> bool:
    if scene == null:
        DebugConsole.error(&"scene", "Cannot load a null PackedScene.")
        return false
    if _is_loading:
        DebugConsole.warn(&"scene", "Ignored scene request while another transition was active.")
        return false
    _is_loading = true
    var result := get_tree().change_scene_to_packed(scene)
    _is_loading = false
    if result != OK:
        DebugConsole.error(&"scene", "Could not change to packed scene (error %s)." % result)
        return false
    return true

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/core/settings_manager.gd =====
extends Node

const SETTINGS_PATH := "user://settings.json"
var settings: Dictionary = {
    "master_volume": 1.0,
    "music_volume": 0.8,
    "effects_volume": 0.9,
    "camera_pan_speed": 14.0,
    "camera_rotate_speed": 1.4,
    "edge_scroll": false,
    "quality_profile": 3,
    "ui_scale": 1.0,
    "high_contrast_ui": false,
    "reduced_motion": false,
    "show_tactical_numbers": true,
}

func _ready() -> void:
    load_settings()

func get_value(key: StringName, fallback: Variant = null) -> Variant:
    return settings.get(String(key), fallback)

func set_value(key: StringName, value: Variant, persist: bool = true) -> void:
    settings[String(key)] = value
    if persist:
        save_settings()

func save_settings() -> bool:
    var file := FileAccess.open(SETTINGS_PATH, FileAccess.WRITE)
    if file == null:
        DebugConsole.error(&"settings", "Could not write settings: %s" % FileAccess.get_open_error())
        return false
    file.store_string(JSON.stringify(settings, "\t"))
    return true

func load_settings() -> void:
    if not FileAccess.file_exists(SETTINGS_PATH):
        return
    var file := FileAccess.open(SETTINGS_PATH, FileAccess.READ)
    if file == null:
        return
    var parsed: Variant = JSON.parse_string(file.get_as_text())
    if parsed is Dictionary:
        settings.merge(parsed, true)

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/core/story_state.gd =====
extends Node

func conditions_met(conditions: Dictionary, state: Dictionary = {}) -> bool:
    var campaign := state if not state.is_empty() else GameFlow.campaign_state
    if conditions.is_empty():
        return true
    var checks := [
        _nested_conditions_met(conditions, campaign),
        _flag_conditions_met(conditions, campaign),
        _resource_conditions_met(conditions, campaign),
        _campaign_conditions_met(conditions, campaign),
        _mission_conditions_met(conditions, campaign),
        _inventory_conditions_met(conditions, campaign),
        _research_conditions_met(conditions, campaign),
        _facility_conditions_met(conditions, campaign),
        _relationship_conditions_met(conditions, campaign),
        _threat_conditions_met(conditions, campaign),
    ]
    return not checks.has(false)

func _nested_conditions_met(conditions: Dictionary, campaign: Dictionary) -> bool:
    for child in _as_array(conditions.get("all", [])):
        if child is Dictionary and not conditions_met(child, campaign):
            return false
    var any_conditions := _as_array(conditions.get("any", []))
    if any_conditions.is_empty():
        return true
    for child in any_conditions:
        if child is Dictionary and conditions_met(child, campaign):
            return true
    return false

func _flag_conditions_met(conditions: Dictionary, campaign: Dictionary) -> bool:
    var flags: Dictionary = campaign.get("story_flags", {})
    var expected_flags := _as_dictionary(conditions.get("flags", {}))
    for key in expected_flags:
        if flags.get(key) != expected_flags[key]:
            return false
    for key in _as_array(conditions.get("has_flags", [])):
        if not bool(flags.get(str(key), false)):
            return false
    for key in _as_array(conditions.get("not_flags", [])):
        if bool(flags.get(str(key), false)):
            return false
    return true

func _resource_conditions_met(conditions: Dictionary, campaign: Dictionary) -> bool:
    var resources: Dictionary = campaign.get("resources", {})
    var minimums := _as_dictionary(conditions.get("resources_at_least", {}))
    for key in minimums:
        if float(resources.get(key, 0.0)) < float(minimums[key]):
            return false
    return true

func _campaign_conditions_met(conditions: Dictionary, campaign: Dictionary) -> bool:
    if conditions.has("chapter_id") and StringName(campaign.get("chapter_id", "")) != StringName(conditions["chapter_id"]):
        return false
    if conditions.has("campaign_day_at_least") and int(campaign.get("campaign_day", 1)) < int(conditions["campaign_day_at_least"]):
        return false
    return true

func _mission_conditions_met(conditions: Dictionary, campaign: Dictionary) -> bool:
    var expected := _as_dictionary(conditions.get("mission_status", {}))
    var statuses: Dictionary = campaign.get("mission_statuses", {})
    for mission_id in expected:
        if statuses.get(mission_id, "unavailable") != expected[mission_id]:
            return false
    return true

func _inventory_conditions_met(conditions: Dictionary, campaign: Dictionary) -> bool:
    var minimums := _as_dictionary(conditions.get("inventory_at_least", {}))
    var inventory: Dictionary = campaign.get("inventory", {})
    for item_id in minimums:
        if int(inventory.get(item_id, 0)) < int(minimums[item_id]):
            return false
    return true

func _research_conditions_met(conditions: Dictionary, campaign: Dictionary) -> bool:
    var expected := _as_dictionary(conditions.get("research_status", {}))
    var research: Dictionary = campaign.get("research", {})
    for research_id in expected:
        if research.get(research_id, {}).get("status", "unavailable") != expected[research_id]:
            return false
    return true

func _facility_conditions_met(conditions: Dictionary, campaign: Dictionary) -> bool:
    var facilities: Dictionary = campaign.get("facilities", {})
    for facility_id in _as_array(conditions.get("facilities_built", [])):
        if facilities.get(str(facility_id), {}).get("status", "missing") != "built":
            return false
    return true

func _relationship_conditions_met(conditions: Dictionary, campaign: Dictionary) -> bool:
    var relationships: Dictionary = campaign.get("relationships", {})
    for relationship_id in _as_dictionary(conditions.get("relationships_at_least", {})):
        if float(relationships.get(relationship_id, 0.0)) < float(conditions["relationships_at_least"][relationship_id]):
            return false
    for relationship_id in _as_dictionary(conditions.get("relationships_at_most", {})):
        if float(relationships.get(relationship_id, 0.0)) > float(conditions["relationships_at_most"][relationship_id]):
            return false
    return true

func _threat_conditions_met(conditions: Dictionary, campaign: Dictionary) -> bool:
    var threat := float(campaign.get("global_threat", 0.0))
    if conditions.has("global_threat_at_least") and threat < float(conditions["global_threat_at_least"]):
        return false
    if conditions.has("global_threat_at_most") and threat > float(conditions["global_threat_at_most"]):
        return false
    return true

func apply_actions(actions: Dictionary, state: Dictionary = {}) -> Dictionary:
    var campaign := state if not state.is_empty() else GameFlow.campaign_state
    if actions.is_empty():
        return campaign
    var flags: Dictionary = campaign.get("story_flags", {})
    for key in _as_dictionary(actions.get("set_flags", {})):
        flags[key] = actions["set_flags"][key]
    for key in _as_array(actions.get("clear_flags", [])):
        flags.erase(str(key))
    campaign["story_flags"] = flags
    var resources: Dictionary = campaign.get("resources", {})
    for key in _as_dictionary(actions.get("add_resources", {})):
        resources[key] = float(resources.get(key, 0.0)) + float(actions["add_resources"][key])
    for key in _as_dictionary(actions.get("set_resources", {})):
        resources[key] = actions["set_resources"][key]
    campaign["resources"] = resources
    var inventory: Dictionary = campaign.get("inventory", {})
    for key in _as_dictionary(actions.get("add_inventory", {})):
        inventory[key] = maxi(0, int(inventory.get(key, 0)) + int(actions["add_inventory"][key]))
    campaign["inventory"] = inventory
    var relationships: Dictionary = campaign.get("relationships", {})
    for key in _as_dictionary(actions.get("add_relationships", {})):
        relationships[key] = float(relationships.get(key, 0.0)) + float(actions["add_relationships"][key])
    campaign["relationships"] = relationships
    var statuses: Dictionary = campaign.get("mission_statuses", {})
    for mission_id in _as_dictionary(actions.get("set_mission_status", {})):
        statuses[mission_id] = actions["set_mission_status"][mission_id]
    campaign["mission_statuses"] = statuses
    var unlocked: Dictionary = campaign.get("unlocked_content", {})
    for content_id in _as_array(actions.get("unlock_content", [])):
        unlocked[str(content_id)] = true
    campaign["unlocked_content"] = unlocked
    if actions.has("add_global_threat"):
        campaign["global_threat"] = clampf(
            float(campaign.get("global_threat", 0.0)) + float(actions["add_global_threat"]),
            0.0,
            1.0
        )
    if actions.has("set_campaign_status"):
        campaign["campaign_status"] = String(actions["set_campaign_status"])
    if actions.has("set_chapter"):
        campaign["chapter_id"] = String(actions["set_chapter"])
    if actions.has("advance_days"):
        StrategicSystem.advance_days(int(actions["advance_days"]), campaign)
    EventBus.story_state_changed.emit(actions.duplicate(true))
    return campaign

func get_flag(flag_id: StringName, default_value: Variant = false) -> Variant:
    return GameFlow.campaign_state.get("story_flags", {}).get(String(flag_id), default_value)

func set_flag(flag_id: StringName, value: Variant = true) -> void:
    var flags: Dictionary = GameFlow.campaign_state.get("story_flags", {})
    flags[String(flag_id)] = value
    GameFlow.campaign_state["story_flags"] = flags
    EventBus.story_state_changed.emit({"set_flags": {String(flag_id): value}})

func _as_dictionary(value: Variant) -> Dictionary:
    return value if value is Dictionary else {}

func _as_array(value: Variant) -> Array:
    return value if value is Array else []

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/core/strategic_system.gd =====
extends Node

const DEFAULT_EQUIPMENT := {
    "operator_alpha": {"weapon": "service_rifle", "utility": "smoke_grenade"},
    "operator_bravo": {"weapon": "service_rifle", "utility": "emp_charge"},
    "operator_charlie": {"weapon": "service_rifle", "utility": "field_medkit"},
}

const BASE_POWER_CAPACITY := 12

func ensure_campaign_shape(state: Dictionary) -> Dictionary:
    if state.is_empty():
        return state
    _ensure_dictionary(state, "resources", {"credits": 1600, "intel": 6, "research": 0, "power": BASE_POWER_CAPACITY})
    _ensure_dictionary(state, "inventory", {"smoke_grenade": 2, "emp_charge": 2, "field_medkit": 2})
    _ensure_dictionary(state, "research", {})
    _ensure_dictionary(state, "facilities", {"command_center": {"status": "built", "level": 1}})
    _ensure_dictionary(state, "construction_queue", {})
    _ensure_dictionary(state, "intel_reports", {})
    _ensure_dictionary(state, "equipment_loadouts", DEFAULT_EQUIPMENT.duplicate(true))
    _ensure_dictionary(state, "personnel", _default_personnel())
    _ensure_dictionary(state, "relationships", {"medical": 0.0, "public": 0.0, "oversight": 0.0})
    _ensure_dictionary(state, "mission_statuses", {"prague_hospital": "available", "migration_training": "available"})
    _ensure_dictionary(state, "mission_history", {})
    _ensure_dictionary(state, "story_flags", {})
    _ensure_dictionary(state, "processed_events", {})
    _ensure_dictionary(state, "unlocked_content", {})
    if not state.has("campaign_day"):
        state["campaign_day"] = 1
    if not state.has("global_threat"):
        state["global_threat"] = 0.15
    if not state.has("campaign_status"):
        state["campaign_status"] = "active"
    return state

func advance_days(days: int = 1, state: Dictionary = {}) -> void:
    var campaign := _resolve_state(state)
    for _index in maxi(days, 0):
        campaign["campaign_day"] = int(campaign.get("campaign_day", 1)) + 1
        _progress_research(campaign)
        _progress_construction(campaign)
        _recover_personnel(campaign)
        _age_intelligence(campaign)
        campaign["global_threat"] = clampf(float(campaign.get("global_threat", 0.15)) + 0.012, 0.0, 1.0)
    EventBus.strategic_state_changed.emit("day_advanced", campaign.duplicate(true))
    ChapterManager.refresh(campaign)

func can_start_research(research_id: StringName, state: Dictionary = {}) -> bool:
    var campaign := _resolve_state(state)
    var definition := ContentDatabase.get_definition(research_id) as ResearchDefinition
    if definition == null or not StoryState.conditions_met(definition.required_flags, campaign):
        return false
    var research: Dictionary = campaign.get("research", {})
    if research.has(String(research_id)):
        return false
    for prerequisite in definition.prerequisites:
        if research.get(String(prerequisite), {}).get("status") != "complete":
            return false
    return float(campaign.get("resources", {}).get("credits", 0.0)) >= definition.research_cost

func start_research(research_id: StringName, state: Dictionary = {}) -> bool:
    var campaign := _resolve_state(state)
    if not can_start_research(research_id, campaign):
        return false
    var definition := ContentDatabase.get_definition(research_id) as ResearchDefinition
    var resources: Dictionary = campaign.get("resources", {})
    resources["credits"] = float(resources.get("credits", 0.0)) - definition.research_cost
    campaign["resources"] = resources
    var research: Dictionary = campaign.get("research", {})
    research[String(research_id)] = {"status": "active", "progress_days": 0.0, "assigned_staff": 1}
    campaign["research"] = research
    EventBus.strategic_state_changed.emit("research_started", {"research_id": String(research_id)})
    return true

func can_construct_facility(facility_id: StringName, state: Dictionary = {}) -> bool:
    var campaign := _resolve_state(state)
    var definition := ContentDatabase.get_definition(facility_id) as FacilityDefinition
    if definition == null or not StoryState.conditions_met(definition.required_flags, campaign):
        return false
    var facilities: Dictionary = campaign.get("facilities", {})
    var construction: Dictionary = campaign.get("construction_queue", {})
    if facilities.has(String(facility_id)) or construction.has(String(facility_id)):
        return false
    for prerequisite in definition.prerequisites:
        if facilities.get(String(prerequisite), {}).get("status") != "built":
            return false
    var resources: Dictionary = campaign.get("resources", {})
    if int(resources.get("credits", 0)) < definition.construction_cost:
        return false
    var power := get_power_summary(campaign)
    return int(power.available) >= definition.power_required

func construct_facility(facility_id: StringName, state: Dictionary = {}) -> bool:
    var campaign := _resolve_state(state)
    if not can_construct_facility(facility_id, campaign):
        return false
    var definition := ContentDatabase.get_definition(facility_id) as FacilityDefinition
    var resources: Dictionary = campaign.get("resources", {})
    resources["credits"] = int(resources.get("credits", 0)) - definition.construction_cost
    campaign["resources"] = resources
    var construction: Dictionary = campaign.get("construction_queue", {})
    construction[String(facility_id)] = {
        "progress_days": 0.0,
        "required_days": definition.construction_days,
        "power_reserved": definition.power_required,
    }
    campaign["construction_queue"] = construction
    EventBus.strategic_state_changed.emit("construction_started", {"facility_id": String(facility_id)})
    return true

func equip_item(unit_id: StringName, equipment_id: StringName, state: Dictionary = {}) -> bool:
    var campaign := _resolve_state(state)
    var definition := ContentDatabase.get_definition(equipment_id) as EquipmentDefinition
    if definition == null:
        return false
    var inventory: Dictionary = campaign.get("inventory", {})
    if int(inventory.get(String(equipment_id), 0)) <= 0:
        return false
    var loadouts: Dictionary = campaign.get("equipment_loadouts", {})
    var loadout: Dictionary = loadouts.get(String(unit_id), {})
    var previous := String(loadout.get(String(definition.slot), ""))
    if not previous.is_empty():
        inventory[previous] = int(inventory.get(previous, 0)) + 1
    loadout[String(definition.slot)] = String(equipment_id)
    loadouts[String(unit_id)] = loadout
    inventory[String(equipment_id)] = int(inventory.get(String(equipment_id), 0)) - 1
    campaign["inventory"] = inventory
    campaign["equipment_loadouts"] = loadouts
    EventBus.strategic_state_changed.emit("equipment_changed", {"unit_id": String(unit_id), "equipment_id": String(equipment_id)})
    return true

func unequip_item(unit_id: StringName, slot: StringName, state: Dictionary = {}) -> bool:
    var campaign := _resolve_state(state)
    var loadouts: Dictionary = campaign.get("equipment_loadouts", {})
    var loadout: Dictionary = loadouts.get(String(unit_id), {})
    var equipment_id := String(loadout.get(String(slot), ""))
    if equipment_id.is_empty():
        return false
    loadout.erase(String(slot))
    loadouts[String(unit_id)] = loadout
    var inventory: Dictionary = campaign.get("inventory", {})
    inventory[equipment_id] = int(inventory.get(equipment_id, 0)) + 1
    campaign["inventory"] = inventory
    campaign["equipment_loadouts"] = loadouts
    EventBus.strategic_state_changed.emit("equipment_changed", {"unit_id": String(unit_id), "equipment_id": ""})
    return true

func get_loadout(unit_id: StringName, state: Dictionary = {}) -> Dictionary:
    var campaign := _resolve_state(state)
    return campaign.get("equipment_loadouts", {}).get(String(unit_id), {}).duplicate(true)

func purchase_intelligence(report_id: StringName, cost: int = 2, state: Dictionary = {}) -> bool:
    var campaign := _resolve_state(state)
    var resources: Dictionary = campaign.get("resources", {})
    if int(resources.get("intel", 0)) < cost:
        return false
    resources["intel"] = int(resources.get("intel", 0)) - cost
    campaign["resources"] = resources
    var reports: Dictionary = campaign.get("intel_reports", {})
    var confidence_bonus := float(get_facility_effect(&"intel_confidence", campaign, 0.0))
    confidence_bonus += float(get_research_effect(&"intel_confidence", campaign, 0.0))
    reports[String(report_id)] = {
        "confidence": clampf(0.72 + confidence_bonus, 0.0, 0.98),
        "acquired_day": campaign.get("campaign_day", 1),
        "expires_day": int(campaign.get("campaign_day", 1)) + 5,
        "status": "verified",
        "source_reliability": 0.8,
    }
    campaign["intel_reports"] = reports
    EventBus.strategic_state_changed.emit("intel_acquired", {"report_id": String(report_id)})
    return true

func can_launch_mission(mission: MissionDefinition, state: Dictionary = {}) -> bool:
    var campaign := _resolve_state(state)
    if mission == null or campaign.get("campaign_status", "active") != "active":
        return false
    if not StoryState.conditions_met(mission.entry_conditions, campaign):
        return false
    var status := String(campaign.get("mission_statuses", {}).get(String(mission.id), "available"))
    if status not in ["available", "failed"]:
        return false
    var ready := get_ready_squad(campaign)
    return ready.size() >= mission.squad_minimum

func get_ready_squad(state: Dictionary = {}) -> Array[StringName]:
    var campaign := _resolve_state(state)
    var result: Array[StringName] = []
    var personnel: Dictionary = campaign.get("personnel", {})
    for unit_variant in campaign.get("squad", []):
        var unit_id := String(unit_variant)
        var record: Dictionary = personnel.get(unit_id, {})
        if String(record.get("status", "available")) != "available":
            continue
        if int(record.get("injury_days", 0)) > 0:
            continue
        if float(record.get("fatigue", 0.0)) >= 90.0:
            continue
        result.append(StringName(unit_id))
    return result

func get_power_summary(state: Dictionary = {}) -> Dictionary:
    var campaign := _resolve_state(state)
    var capacity := int(campaign.get("resources", {}).get("power", BASE_POWER_CAPACITY))
    var used := 0
    for facility_id in campaign.get("facilities", {}):
        var definition := ContentDatabase.get_definition(StringName(facility_id)) as FacilityDefinition
        if definition != null:
            used += definition.power_required
    for facility_id in campaign.get("construction_queue", {}):
        var project: Dictionary = campaign["construction_queue"][facility_id]
        used += int(project.get("power_reserved", 0))
    return {"capacity": capacity, "used": used, "available": maxi(capacity - used, 0)}

func get_facility_effect(effect_id: StringName, state: Dictionary = {}, default_value: Variant = 0.0) -> Variant:
    var campaign := _resolve_state(state)
    var total: Variant = default_value
    for facility_id in campaign.get("facilities", {}):
        var definition := ContentDatabase.get_definition(StringName(facility_id)) as FacilityDefinition
        if definition == null or not definition.effects.has(String(effect_id)):
            continue
        total = _combine_effect(total, definition.effects[String(effect_id)])
    return total

func get_research_effect(effect_id: StringName, state: Dictionary = {}, default_value: Variant = 0.0) -> Variant:
    var campaign := _resolve_state(state)
    var total: Variant = default_value
    for research_id in campaign.get("research", {}):
        var project: Dictionary = campaign["research"][research_id]
        if project.get("status") != "complete":
            continue
        var definition := ContentDatabase.get_definition(StringName(research_id)) as ResearchDefinition
        if definition == null or not definition.effects.has(String(effect_id)):
            continue
        total = _combine_effect(total, definition.effects[String(effect_id)])
    return total

func apply_mission_result(result: Dictionary, state: Dictionary = {}) -> void:
    var campaign := _resolve_state(state)
    var mission_id := String(result.get("mission_id", campaign.get("active_mission_id", "unknown")))
    var mission_history: Dictionary = campaign.get("mission_history", {})
    var records: Array = mission_history.get(mission_id, [])
    records.append(result.duplicate(true))
    mission_history[mission_id] = records
    campaign["mission_history"] = mission_history
    var statuses: Dictionary = campaign.get("mission_statuses", {})
    statuses[mission_id] = "complete" if result.get("status") == "success" else "failed"
    campaign["mission_statuses"] = statuses
    StoryState.apply_actions(result.get("campaign_actions", {}), campaign)
    var casualties := int(result.get("casualties", 0))
    campaign["global_threat"] = clampf(float(campaign.get("global_threat", 0.15)) + 0.04 + casualties * 0.025, 0.0, 1.0)
    _apply_personnel_results(result, campaign)
    EventBus.strategic_state_changed.emit("mission_resolved", result.duplicate(true))
    ChapterManager.refresh(campaign)

func _progress_research(campaign: Dictionary) -> void:
    var research: Dictionary = campaign.get("research", {})
    var speed_bonus := float(get_facility_effect(&"research_speed", campaign, 0.0))
    for research_id in research:
        var project: Dictionary = research[research_id]
        if project.get("status") != "active":
            continue
        var definition := ContentDatabase.get_definition(StringName(research_id)) as ResearchDefinition
        if definition == null:
            continue
        var staff := maxi(1, int(project.get("assigned_staff", 1)))
        var daily_progress := (1.0 + (staff - 1) * 0.35) * (1.0 + speed_bonus)
        project["progress_days"] = float(project.get("progress_days", 0.0)) + daily_progress
        if float(project["progress_days"]) >= definition.duration_days:
            project["status"] = "complete"
            project["completed_day"] = campaign.get("campaign_day", 1)
            var flags: Dictionary = campaign.get("story_flags", {})
            flags["research.%s.complete" % research_id] = true
            campaign["story_flags"] = flags
            var unlocked: Dictionary = campaign.get("unlocked_content", {})
            for unlock_id in definition.unlock_ids:
                unlocked[String(unlock_id)] = true
            campaign["unlocked_content"] = unlocked
            StoryState.apply_actions(definition.completion_actions, campaign)
            EventBus.strategic_state_changed.emit("research_completed", {"research_id": research_id})
        research[research_id] = project
    campaign["research"] = research

func _progress_construction(campaign: Dictionary) -> void:
    var queue: Dictionary = campaign.get("construction_queue", {})
    var completed: Array[String] = []
    for facility_id in queue:
        var project: Dictionary = queue[facility_id]
        project["progress_days"] = float(project.get("progress_days", 0.0)) + 1.0
        if float(project["progress_days"]) >= float(project.get("required_days", 1.0)):
            completed.append(facility_id)
        else:
            queue[facility_id] = project
    var facilities: Dictionary = campaign.get("facilities", {})
    for facility_id in completed:
        queue.erase(facility_id)
        facilities[facility_id] = {"status": "built", "level": 1, "completed_day": campaign.get("campaign_day", 1)}
        EventBus.strategic_state_changed.emit("facility_completed", {"facility_id": facility_id})
    campaign["construction_queue"] = queue
    campaign["facilities"] = facilities

func _recover_personnel(campaign: Dictionary) -> void:
    var personnel: Dictionary = campaign.get("personnel", {})
    var injury_bonus := int(get_facility_effect(&"injury_recovery_bonus", campaign, 0))
    var stress_bonus := float(get_facility_effect(&"stress_recovery", campaign, 0.0))
    for unit_id in personnel:
        var record: Dictionary = personnel[unit_id]
        record["fatigue"] = maxf(0.0, float(record.get("fatigue", 0.0)) - 12.0)
        record["stress"] = maxf(0.0, float(record.get("stress", 0.0)) - 5.0 - stress_bonus)
        record["injury_days"] = maxi(0, int(record.get("injury_days", 0)) - 1 - injury_bonus)
        personnel[unit_id] = record
    campaign["personnel"] = personnel

func _age_intelligence(campaign: Dictionary) -> void:
    var reports: Dictionary = campaign.get("intel_reports", {})
    var day := int(campaign.get("campaign_day", 1))
    for report_id in reports:
        var report: Dictionary = reports[report_id]
        if day > int(report.get("expires_day", day + 1)):
            report["status"] = "stale"
            report["confidence"] = maxf(0.2, float(report.get("confidence", 0.5)) - 0.12)
        reports[report_id] = report
    campaign["intel_reports"] = reports

func _apply_personnel_results(result: Dictionary, campaign: Dictionary) -> void:
    var personnel: Dictionary = campaign.get("personnel", {})
    var unit_results: Dictionary = result.get("unit_results", {})
    var loadouts: Dictionary = campaign.get("equipment_loadouts", {})
    for unit_id in unit_results:
        if not personnel.has(unit_id):
            continue
        var record: Dictionary = personnel[unit_id]
        var unit_result: Dictionary = unit_results[unit_id]
        record["fatigue"] = clampf(float(record.get("fatigue", 0.0)) + 25.0, 0.0, 100.0)
        record["stress"] = clampf(float(record.get("stress", 0.0)) + float(unit_result.get("stress_gain", 8.0)), 0.0, 100.0)
        var health_ratio := float(unit_result.get("health_ratio", 1.0))
        if health_ratio <= 0.0:
            record["status"] = "killed"
            record["injury_days"] = 9999
        elif health_ratio < 0.5:
            record["status"] = "available"
            record["injury_days"] = maxi(int(record.get("injury_days", 0)), 3)
        record["missions"] = int(record.get("missions", 0)) + 1
        personnel[unit_id] = record
        var loadout: Dictionary = loadouts.get(unit_id, {})
        var utility_id := String(loadout.get("utility", ""))
        var remaining: Dictionary = unit_result.get("utility_remaining", {})
        if not utility_id.is_empty() and int(remaining.get(utility_id, 0)) <= 0:
            loadout.erase("utility")
            loadouts[unit_id] = loadout
    campaign["personnel"] = personnel
    campaign["equipment_loadouts"] = loadouts

func _combine_effect(current: Variant, value: Variant) -> Variant:
    if current is bool or value is bool:
        return bool(current) or bool(value)
    if current is int and value is int:
        return int(current) + int(value)
    if (current is float or current is int) and (value is float or value is int):
        return float(current) + float(value)
    return value

func _resolve_state(state: Dictionary) -> Dictionary:
    var campaign := state if not state.is_empty() else GameFlow.campaign_state
    return ensure_campaign_shape(campaign)

func _ensure_dictionary(state: Dictionary, key: String, default_value: Dictionary) -> void:
    if not state.get(key) is Dictionary:
        state[key] = default_value.duplicate(true)
    else:
        var current: Dictionary = state[key]
        for nested_key in default_value:
            if not current.has(nested_key):
                current[nested_key] = default_value[nested_key]
        state[key] = current

func _default_personnel() -> Dictionary:
    return {
        "operator_alpha": {"display_name": "Mara Voss", "role": "Field Lead", "status": "available", "fatigue": 0.0, "stress": 0.0, "injury_days": 0, "missions": 0},
        "operator_bravo": {"display_name": "Tomas Rhee", "role": "Signals", "status": "available", "fatigue": 0.0, "stress": 0.0, "injury_days": 0, "missions": 0},
        "operator_charlie": {"display_name": "Irena Kolar", "role": "Medic", "status": "available", "fatigue": 0.0, "stress": 0.0, "injury_days": 0, "missions": 0},
    }

extends EchoDefinition

@export var entry_node_id: StringName
@export var nodes: Array[DialogueNodeDefinition] = []

func get_node_definition(node_id: StringName) -> DialogueNodeDefinition:
    for node in nodes:
        if node.id == node_id:
            return node
    return null

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/data/echo_definition.gd =====
class_name EchoDefinition
extends Resource

@export var id: StringName
@export var display_name: String
@export_multiline var description: String
@export var tags: Array[StringName] = []

func validate() -> PackedStringArray:
    var errors := PackedStringArray()
    if id == &"":
        errors.append("Definition id is empty.")
    if display_name.strip_edges().is_empty():
        errors.append("Display name is empty for '%s'." % id)
    return errors

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/dialogue/dialogue_overlay.gd =====
class_name DialogueOverlay
extends CanvasLayer

var panel: PanelContainer
var speaker_label: Label
var text_label: Label
var choices_box: VBoxContainer
var timer_label: Label
var continue_button: Button

func _ready() -> void:
    layer = 30
    _build_ui()
    EventBus.dialogue_started.connect(_on_dialogue_started)
    EventBus.dialogue_node_changed.connect(_on_node_changed)
    EventBus.dialogue_timer_changed.connect(_on_timer_changed)
    EventBus.dialogue_ended.connect(_on_dialogue_ended)
    panel.visible = DialogueManager.current_node != null
    if DialogueManager.current_node != null:
        _render_node(DialogueManager.current_node, DialogueManager.get_available_choices())

func _unhandled_input(event: InputEvent) -> void:
    if not panel.visible:
        return
    if event.is_action_pressed("ui_accept") and DialogueManager.get_available_choices().is_empty():
        DialogueManager.advance()
        get_viewport().set_input_as_handled()

func _build_ui() -> void:
    panel = PanelContainer.new()
    panel.position = Vector2(290, 510)
    panel.size = Vector2(1020, 330)
    var style := StyleBoxFlat.new()
    style.bg_color = Color(0.012, 0.022, 0.036, 0.98)
    style.border_width_left = 2
    style.border_width_top = 2
    style.border_width_right = 2
    style.border_width_bottom = 2
    style.border_color = Color(0.18, 0.58, 0.72, 1)
    style.corner_radius_top_left = 10
    style.corner_radius_top_right = 10
    style.corner_radius_bottom_left = 10
    style.corner_radius_bottom_right = 10
    panel.add_theme_stylebox_override("panel", style)
    add_child(panel)
    var margin := MarginContainer.new()
    margin.add_theme_constant_override("margin_left", 20)
    margin.add_theme_constant_override("margin_right", 20)
    margin.add_theme_constant_override("margin_top", 16)
    margin.add_theme_constant_override("margin_bottom", 16)
    panel.add_child(margin)
    var root_box := VBoxContainer.new()
    root_box.add_theme_constant_override("separation", 10)
    margin.add_child(root_box)
    var header := HBoxContainer.new()
    root_box.add_child(header)
    speaker_label = Label.new()
    speaker_label.size_flags_horizontal = Control.SIZE_EXPAND_FILL
    speaker_label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 22)
    speaker_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color(0.48, 0.9, 1, 1))
    header.add_child(speaker_label)
    timer_label = Label.new()
    timer_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color(1, 0.58, 0.25, 1))
    header.add_child(timer_label)
    text_label = Label.new()
    text_label.custom_minimum_size = Vector2(0, 86)
    text_label.autowrap_mode = TextServer.AUTOWRAP_WORD_SMART
    text_label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 18)
    root_box.add_child(text_label)
    choices_box = VBoxContainer.new()
    choices_box.add_theme_constant_override("separation", 6)
    root_box.add_child(choices_box)
    continue_button = Button.new()
    continue_button.text = "Continue [Enter]"
    continue_button.pressed.connect(DialogueManager.advance)
    root_box.add_child(continue_button)
    panel.visible = false

func _render_node(node: DialogueNodeDefinition, choices: Array) -> void:
    speaker_label.text = String(node.speaker_id).replace("_", " ").capitalize()
    text_label.text = node.text
    for child in choices_box.get_children():
        child.queue_free()
    for choice in choices:
        var button := Button.new()
        button.text = choice.text
        button.pressed.connect(_choose.bind(choice.id))
        choices_box.add_child(button)
    continue_button.visible = choices.is_empty()
    timer_label.text = ""
    panel.visible = true

func _choose(choice_id: StringName) -> void:
    DialogueManager.choose(choice_id)

func _on_dialogue_started(_dialogue: DialogueDefinition) -> void:
    panel.visible = true

func _on_node_changed(_dialogue: DialogueDefinition, node: DialogueNodeDefinition, choices: Array) -> void:
    _render_node(node, choices)

func _on_timer_changed(time_remaining: float) -> void:
    timer_label.text = "%.1fs" % time_remaining

func _on_dialogue_ended(_dialogue_id: StringName) -> void:
    panel.visible = false

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/environment/alarm_system.gd =====
class_name AlarmSystem
extends Node

enum AlarmState { NORMAL, SUSPICIOUS, ALERT, LOCKDOWN }

signal alarm_state_changed(previous: AlarmState, current: AlarmState)

@export var state: AlarmState = AlarmState.NORMAL
@export var decay_delay: float = 18.0
var _last_trigger_time: float = -100.0

func _ready() -> void:
    add_to_group("alarm_systems")
    EventBus.shot_resolved.connect(_on_shot_resolved)
    EventBus.door_breached.connect(_on_door_breached)
    _apply_lights()

func trigger_alert(reason: StringName = &"unknown", severity: int = 1) -> void:
    _last_trigger_time = Time.get_ticks_msec() / 1000.0
    var next_state := AlarmState.ALERT if severity <= 1 else AlarmState.LOCKDOWN
    set_state(maxi(state, next_state))
    DebugConsole.log_message(&"alarm", "Alarm triggered: %s" % String(reason))

func set_state(next_state: AlarmState) -> void:
    next_state = clampi(next_state, AlarmState.NORMAL, AlarmState.LOCKDOWN)
    if next_state == state:
        return
    var previous := state
    state = next_state
    _apply_lights()
    alarm_state_changed.emit(previous, state)

func _process(_delta: float) -> void:
    if GameFlow.is_tactical_paused or state <= AlarmState.SUSPICIOUS:
        return
    var now := Time.get_ticks_msec() / 1000.0
    if now - _last_trigger_time >= decay_delay:
        set_state(AlarmState.SUSPICIOUS)

func _apply_lights() -> void:
    for node in get_tree().get_nodes_in_group("alarm_lights"):
        if node is Light3D:
            var light := node as Light3D
            light.visible = state >= AlarmState.ALERT
            light.light_energy = 2.2 if state == AlarmState.LOCKDOWN else 1.35

func _on_shot_resolved(_shooter: TacticalUnit, _target: TacticalUnit, _hit: bool, _damage: float, _chance: float) -> void:
    trigger_alert(&"gunfire", 1)

func _on_door_breached(_actor: TacticalUnit, _door: TacticalDoor) -> void:
    trigger_alert(&"door_breach", 2)

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/environment/asset_layout_spawner.gd =====
class_name AssetLayoutSpawner
extends Node3D

@export_file("*.json") var layout_path: String = "res://migration/generated/prague-decoration-plan.json"
@export var spawn_on_ready: bool = true
@export var default_collision_layer: int = 4
@export var default_collision_mask: int = 3

var spawned_assets: Dictionary = {}

func _ready() -> void:
    add_to_group("asset_layout_spawners")
    if spawn_on_ready:
        call_deferred("spawn_layout")

func spawn_layout() -> void:
    clear_layout()
    if not FileAccess.file_exists(layout_path):
        DebugConsole.warn(&"assets", "Asset layout is missing: %s" % layout_path)
        return
    var file := FileAccess.open(layout_path, FileAccess.READ)
    if file == null:
        return
    var parsed: Variant = JSON.parse_string(file.get_as_text())
    if not parsed is Dictionary:
        DebugConsole.error(&"assets", "Asset layout JSON root must be an object: %s" % layout_path)
        return
    for raw_placement in parsed.get("placements", []):
        if raw_placement is Dictionary:
            _spawn_placement(raw_placement)
    DebugConsole.log_message(&"assets", "Spawned %d migrated Prague asset placement(s)." % spawned_assets.size())

func clear_layout() -> void:
    for instance in spawned_assets.values():
        if is_instance_valid(instance):
            instance.queue_free()
    spawned_assets.clear()

func _spawn_placement(placement: Dictionary) -> void:
    var placement_id := StringName(str(placement.get("id", "")))
    var asset_id := StringName(str(placement.get("asset_id", "")))
    if placement_id == &"" or asset_id == &"":
        return
    var instance := AssetRegistry.instantiate_wrapper(asset_id) as Node3D
    if instance == null:
        DebugConsole.warn(&"assets", "Prague placement '%s' references unavailable asset '%s'." % [placement_id, asset_id])
        return
    instance.name = String(placement_id).to_pascal_case()
    add_child(instance)
    instance.position = _vector3(placement.get("position", [0, 0, 0]), Vector3.ZERO)
    instance.rotation_degrees = _vector3(placement.get("rotation_degrees", [0, 0, 0]), Vector3.ZERO)
    instance.scale *= _vector3(placement.get("scale", [1, 1, 1]), Vector3.ONE)
    instance.set_meta("echo_asset_id", asset_id)
    instance.set_meta("echo_placement_id", placement_id)
    spawned_assets[placement_id] = instance
    if bool(placement.get("collision", false)):
        call_deferred("_add_static_collision", instance)

func _add_static_collision(instance: Node3D) -> void:
    if not is_instance_valid(instance):
        return
    if not instance.find_children("*", "CollisionObject3D", true, false).is_empty():
        return
    for node in instance.find_children("*", "MeshInstance3D", true, false):
        var mesh_instance := node as MeshInstance3D
        if mesh_instance == null or mesh_instance.mesh == null:
            continue
        var shape := mesh_instance.mesh.create_trimesh_shape()
        if shape == null:
            continue
        var body := StaticBody3D.new()
        body.name = "%sCollision" % mesh_instance.name
        body.collision_layer = default_collision_layer
        body.collision_mask = default_collision_mask
        instance.add_child(body)
        body.transform = instance.global_transform.affine_inverse() * mesh_instance.global_transform
        var collision_shape := CollisionShape3D.new()
        collision_shape.shape = shape
        body.add_child(collision_shape)

func _vector3(value: Variant, fallback: Vector3) -> Vector3:
    if value is Array and value.size() >= 3:
        return Vector3(float(value[0]), float(value[1]), float(value[2]))
    if value is Dictionary:
        return Vector3(float(value.get("x", fallback.x)), float(value.get("y", fallback.y)), float(value.get("z", fallback.z)))
    return fallback

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/environment/emp_field.gd =====
class_name EMPField
extends Node3D

@export var radius: float = 4.0
@export var duration: float = 7.0
var remaining: float
var affected: Array[Node] = []
var source_id: StringName

func _ready() -> void:
    remaining = duration
    source_id = StringName("emp_%d" % get_instance_id())
    add_to_group("emp_fields")
    var pulse := get_node_or_null("Pulse") as Node3D
    if pulse != null:
        pulse.scale = Vector3.ONE * radius

func _process(delta: float) -> void:
    if GameFlow.is_tactical_paused:
        return
    remaining -= delta
    _refresh_targets()
    if remaining <= 0.0:
        _release_targets()
        queue_free()

func _refresh_targets() -> void:
    var next: Array[Node] = []
    for node in get_tree().get_nodes_in_group("emp_targets"):
        var spatial := node as Node3D
        if spatial == null and node is Node:
            spatial = (node as Node).get_parent() as Node3D
        if spatial != null and spatial.global_position.distance_to(global_position) <= radius:
            next.append(node)
            if not affected.has(node) and node.has_method("apply_emp"):
                node.apply_emp(source_id)
    for node in affected:
        if not next.has(node) and is_instance_valid(node) and node.has_method("remove_emp"):
            node.remove_emp(source_id)
    affected = next

func _release_targets() -> void:
    for node in affected:
        if is_instance_valid(node) and node.has_method("remove_emp"):
            node.remove_emp(source_id)
    affected.clear()

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/environment/environmental_hazard.gd =====
class_name EnvironmentalHazard
extends Area3D

@export var hazard_type: StringName = &"electrical"
@export var damage_per_second: float = 6.0
@export var suppression_per_second: float = 5.0
@export var electronic: bool = true
var enabled: bool = true
var affected_units: Dictionary = {}
var _emp_sources: Dictionary = {}

func _ready() -> void:
    add_to_group("environmental_hazards")
    if electronic:
        add_to_group("emp_targets")
    body_entered.connect(_on_body_entered)
    body_exited.connect(_on_body_exited)
    _refresh_visual()

func _process(delta: float) -> void:
    if GameFlow.is_tactical_paused or not enabled:
        return
    for unit in affected_units.values():
        if unit is TacticalUnit and is_instance_valid(unit):
            var tactical_unit := unit as TacticalUnit
            tactical_unit.health_component.apply_damage(damage_per_second * delta)
            tactical_unit.suppression_component.add_suppression(suppression_per_second * delta)

func apply_emp(source_id: StringName) -> void:
    if not electronic:
        return
    _emp_sources[source_id] = true
    enabled = false
    _refresh_visual()

func remove_emp(source_id: StringName) -> void:
    _emp_sources.erase(source_id)
    if _emp_sources.is_empty():
        enabled = true
        _refresh_visual()

func _on_body_entered(body: Node3D) -> void:
    if body is TacticalUnit:
        affected_units[body.get_instance_id()] = body

func _on_body_exited(body: Node3D) -> void:
    affected_units.erase(body.get_instance_id())

func _refresh_visual() -> void:
    var visual := get_node_or_null("Visual") as Node3D
    if visual != null:
        visual.visible = enabled

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/environment/room_controller.gd =====
class_name RoomController
extends Area3D

signal visibility_changed(room_id: StringName, interior_visible: bool)

@export var room_id: StringName = &"room"
@export var room_type: StringName = &"generic"
@export var access_point_ids: Array[StringName] = []
@export var objective_tags: Array[StringName] = []
@export var alarm_zone: StringName = &"default"
@export var environmental_state: StringName = &"normal"
@export var roof_paths: Array[NodePath] = []
@export var ceiling_paths: Array[NodePath] = []
@export var hide_when_player_inside: bool = true
var player_occupants: Dictionary = {}
var manual_reveal: bool = false

func _ready() -> void:
    add_to_group("room_controllers")
    body_entered.connect(_on_body_entered)
    body_exited.connect(_on_body_exited)
    _refresh_visibility()

func set_manual_reveal(value: bool) -> void:
    manual_reveal = value
    _refresh_visibility()

func _on_body_entered(body: Node3D) -> void:
    if body is TacticalUnit and (body as TacticalUnit).player_controlled:
        player_occupants[body.get_instance_id()] = body
        _refresh_visibility()

func _on_body_exited(body: Node3D) -> void:
    player_occupants.erase(body.get_instance_id())
    _refresh_visibility()

func _refresh_visibility() -> void:
    var reveal := manual_reveal or (hide_when_player_inside and not player_occupants.is_empty())
    for path in roof_paths + ceiling_paths:
        var node := get_node_or_null(path) as Node3D
        if node != null:
            node.visible = not reveal
    visibility_changed.emit(room_id, reveal)

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/environment/room_visibility_manager.gd =====
class_name RoomVisibilityManager
extends Node

var rooms: Dictionary = {}

func _ready() -> void:
    add_to_group("room_visibility_managers")
    call_deferred("_discover_rooms")

func reveal_room(room_id: StringName, reveal: bool = true) -> void:
    var room := rooms.get(room_id) as RoomController
    if room != null:
        room.set_manual_reveal(reveal)

func _discover_rooms() -> void:
    rooms.clear()
    for node in get_tree().get_nodes_in_group("room_controllers"):
        var room := node as RoomController
        if room != null:
            rooms[room.room_id] = room

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/environment/smoke_field.gd =====
class_name SmokeField
extends Node3D

@export var radius: float = 3.5
@export var duration: float = 12.0
@export_range(0.0, 1.0, 0.05) var density: float = 0.78
var remaining: float

func _ready() -> void:
    remaining = duration
    add_to_group("smoke_fields")
    var volume := get_node_or_null("Volume") as Node3D
    if volume != null:
        volume.scale = Vector3.ONE * radius

func _process(delta: float) -> void:
    if GameFlow.is_tactical_paused:
        return
    remaining -= delta
    if remaining <= 0.0:
        queue_free()

func visibility_factor_for_segment(from: Vector3, to: Vector3) -> float:
    var closest := Geometry3D.get_closest_point_to_segment(global_position, from, to)
    var distance := closest.distance_to(global_position)
    if distance >= radius:
        return 1.0
    var penetration := 1.0 - distance / maxf(radius, 0.01)
    return clampf(1.0 - density * penetration, 0.12, 1.0)

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/environment/tactical_door.gd =====
class_name TacticalDoor
extends Node3D

enum DoorState { OPEN, CLOSED, LOCKED, JAMMED, HACKED, BREACHED, DESTROYED, POWERED_OFF }

signal state_changed(previous: DoorState, current: DoorState)
signal interaction_performed(actor: TacticalUnit, action_id: StringName)

@export var door_id: StringName = &"door"
@export var initial_state: DoorState = DoorState.CLOSED
@export var interaction_range: float = 2.6
@export var maximum_health: float = 80.0
@export var electronic_lock: bool = true
@export var open_angle_degrees: float = -95.0
@export var animation_speed: float = 6.5

@onready var pivot: Node3D = $Pivot
@onready var collision_shape: CollisionShape3D = $BlockingBody/CollisionShape3D
@onready var navigation_link: NavigationLink3D = $NavigationLink3D

var state: DoorState
var health: float
var _target_angle: float = 0.0
var _emp_sources: Dictionary = {}
var _state_before_emp: DoorState

func _ready() -> void:
    state = initial_state
    health = maximum_health
    add_to_group("interactables")
    if electronic_lock:
        add_to_group("emp_targets")
    _apply_state_immediately()

func _process(delta: float) -> void:
    pivot.rotation.y = lerp_angle(pivot.rotation.y, _target_angle, minf(1.0, animation_speed * delta))

func get_available_actions(actor: TacticalUnit) -> Array[StringName]:
    var actions: Array[StringName] = []
    if actor == null or actor.global_position.distance_to(global_position) > interaction_range:
        return actions
    match state:
        DoorState.OPEN:
            actions.append(&"close")
        DoorState.CLOSED, DoorState.HACKED:
            actions.append(&"open")
            actions.append(&"lock")
            actions.append(&"breach")
            actions.append(&"peek")
        DoorState.LOCKED:
            actions.append(&"hack")
            actions.append(&"unlock")
            actions.append(&"breach")
        DoorState.JAMMED:
            actions.append(&"breach")
        DoorState.POWERED_OFF:
            actions.append(&"breach")
            actions.append(&"open")
        DoorState.BREACHED, DoorState.DESTROYED:
            pass
    return actions

func can_interact(actor: TacticalUnit, action_id: StringName) -> bool:
    return get_available_actions(actor).has(action_id)

func perform_interaction(actor: TacticalUnit, action_id: StringName) -> bool:
    if not can_interact(actor, action_id):
        return false
    match action_id:
        &"open":
            set_state(DoorState.OPEN)
        &"close":
            set_state(DoorState.CLOSED)
        &"lock":
            set_state(DoorState.LOCKED)
        &"unlock":
            set_state(DoorState.CLOSED)
        &"hack":
            set_state(DoorState.HACKED)
        &"breach":
            apply_damage(maximum_health, actor)
        &"peek":
            EventBus.door_peeked.emit(actor, self)
        _:
            return false
    interaction_performed.emit(actor, action_id)
    EventBus.interaction_performed.emit(actor, self, action_id)
    return true

func apply_damage(amount: float, actor: TacticalUnit = null) -> float:
    if state in [DoorState.BREACHED, DoorState.DESTROYED]:
        return 0.0
    var applied := minf(maxf(amount, 0.0), health)
    health -= applied
    if health <= 0.0:
        set_state(DoorState.BREACHED)
        EventBus.door_breached.emit(actor, self)
    return applied

func set_state(next_state: DoorState) -> void:
    if next_state == state:
        return
    var previous := state
    state = next_state
    _apply_state()
    state_changed.emit(previous, state)

func apply_emp(source_id: StringName) -> void:
    if not electronic_lock:
        return
    if _emp_sources.is_empty():
        _state_before_emp = state
    _emp_sources[source_id] = true
    if state == DoorState.LOCKED:
        set_state(DoorState.POWERED_OFF)

func remove_emp(source_id: StringName) -> void:
    _emp_sources.erase(source_id)
    if _emp_sources.is_empty() and state == DoorState.POWERED_OFF:
        set_state(_state_before_emp)

func _apply_state_immediately() -> void:
    _target_angle = deg_to_rad(open_angle_degrees) if _is_passable() else 0.0
    pivot.rotation.y = _target_angle
    _update_collision_and_navigation()

func _apply_state() -> void:
    _target_angle = deg_to_rad(open_angle_degrees) if _is_passable() else 0.0
    _update_collision_and_navigation()

func _update_collision_and_navigation() -> void:
    var passable := _is_passable()
    collision_shape.disabled = passable
    navigation_link.enabled = passable

func _is_passable() -> bool:
    return state in [DoorState.OPEN, DoorState.BREACHED, DoorState.DESTROYED]

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/mission/mission_interactable.gd =====
class_name MissionInteractable
extends StaticBody3D

@export var interactable_id: StringName
@export var objective_id: StringName
@export var available_actions: Array[StringName] = [&"interact"]
@export var interaction_range: float = 2.6
@export var single_use: bool = true
@export var action_labels: Dictionary = {}
var consumed: bool = false

func _ready() -> void:
    add_to_group("mission_interactables")
    collision_layer = collision_layer | 4

func get_available_actions(actor: TacticalUnit) -> Array[StringName]:
    var result: Array[StringName] = []
    for action_id in available_actions:
        if can_interact(actor, action_id):
            result.append(action_id)
    return result

func can_interact(actor: TacticalUnit, action_id: StringName) -> bool:
    if actor == null or consumed or not available_actions.has(action_id):
        return false
    if actor.global_position.distance_to(global_position) > interaction_range:
        return false
    var runtime := get_tree().get_first_node_in_group("mission_runtime") as MissionRuntime
    if runtime != null and objective_id != &"" and not runtime.is_objective_active(objective_id):
        return false
    return true

func perform_interaction(actor: TacticalUnit, action_id: StringName) -> bool:
    if not can_interact(actor, action_id):
        return false
    if single_use:
        consumed = true
    EventBus.interaction_performed.emit(actor, self, action_id)
    return true

func get_action_label(action_id: StringName) -> String:
    return String(action_labels.get(String(action_id), String(action_id).capitalize()))

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/mission/mission_objective_hud.gd =====
class_name MissionObjectiveHUD
extends CanvasLayer

var runtime: MissionRuntime
var panel: PanelContainer
var objectives_box: VBoxContainer
var crisis_label: Label
var extract_button: Button
var _refresh_timer: float = 0.0

func _ready() -> void:
    runtime = get_tree().get_first_node_in_group("mission_runtime") as MissionRuntime
    _build_ui()
    EventBus.objective_changed.connect(_on_objective_changed)
    EventBus.crisis_started.connect(_on_crisis_started)
    EventBus.crisis_resolved.connect(_on_crisis_resolved)
    EventBus.mission_extraction_available.connect(_on_extraction_available)
    _refresh()

func _process(delta: float) -> void:
    _refresh_timer -= delta
    if _refresh_timer <= 0.0:
        _refresh_timer = 0.2
        _refresh()

func _unhandled_input(event: InputEvent) -> void:
    if DialogueManager.active_dialogue != null:
        return
    if event.is_action_pressed("mission_extract") and runtime != null:
        runtime.request_extraction()

func _build_ui() -> void:
    panel = PanelContainer.new()
    panel.position = Vector2(18, 78)
    panel.size = Vector2(360, 345)
    var style := StyleBoxFlat.new()
    style.bg_color = Color(0.018, 0.032, 0.048, 0.94)
    style.border_width_left = 1
    style.border_width_top = 1
    style.border_width_right = 1
    style.border_width_bottom = 1
    style.border_color = Color(0.16, 0.55, 0.68, 1)
    style.corner_radius_top_left = 8
    style.corner_radius_top_right = 8
    style.corner_radius_bottom_left = 8
    style.corner_radius_bottom_right = 8
    panel.add_theme_stylebox_override("panel", style)
    add_child(panel)
    var root_box := VBoxContainer.new()
    root_box.add_theme_constant_override("separation", 8)
    panel.add_child(root_box)
    var title := Label.new()
    title.text = "PRAGUE HOSPITAL — OBJECTIVES"
    title.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color(0.45, 0.9, 1, 1))
    root_box.add_child(title)
    crisis_label = Label.new()
    crisis_label.visible = false
    crisis_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color(1, 0.55, 0.25, 1))
    root_box.add_child(crisis_label)
    objectives_box = VBoxContainer.new()
    root_box.add_child(objectives_box)
    extract_button = Button.new()
    extract_button.text = "Extract Team [X]"
    extract_button.visible = false
    extract_button.pressed.connect(_request_extraction)
    root_box.add_child(extract_button)

func _request_extraction() -> void:
    if runtime != null:
        runtime.request_extraction()

func _refresh() -> void:
    if runtime == null:
        runtime = get_tree().get_first_node_in_group("mission_runtime") as MissionRuntime
    if runtime == null:
        return
    for child in objectives_box.get_children():
        child.queue_free()
    for snapshot in runtime.get_objective_snapshot():
        if snapshot.hidden:
            continue
        var label := Label.new()
        var marker := _state_marker(String(snapshot.state))
        label.text = "%s %s\n    %s" % [marker, snapshot.name, snapshot.description]
        label.autowrap_mode = TextServer.AUTOWRAP_WORD_SMART
        label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", _state_color(String(snapshot.state)))
        objectives_box.add_child(label)
    if runtime.crisis_active:
        crisis_label.visible = true
        crisis_label.text = "CRISIS WINDOW: %.1fs — choose one priority" % maxf(runtime.crisis_time_remaining, 0.0)
    extract_button.visible = runtime.extraction_available
    if runtime.extraction_available:
        var extraction := runtime.get_extraction_status()
        extract_button.text = "Extract Team [X] — %d/%d in zone" % [
            int(extraction.inside), int(extraction.required)
        ]
        extract_button.disabled = not bool(extraction.ready)

func _state_marker(state: String) -> String:
    match state:
        "completed":
            return "✓"
        "failed":
            return "✕"
        "active":
            return "◆"
        _:
            return "·"

func _state_color(state: String) -> Color:
    match state:
        "completed":
            return Color(0.45, 0.95, 0.65, 1)
        "failed":
            return Color(1, 0.4, 0.4, 1)
        "active":
            return Color(0.85, 0.92, 1, 1)
        _:
            return Color(0.5, 0.58, 0.66, 1)

func _on_objective_changed(_objective_id: StringName, _state: StringName) -> void:
    _refresh()

func _on_crisis_started(_id: StringName, _options: Array, _limit: float) -> void:
    crisis_label.visible = true
    _refresh()

func _on_crisis_resolved(_id: StringName, choice_id: StringName) -> void:
    crisis_label.text = "PRIORITY LOCKED: %s" % String(choice_id).replace("_", " ").to_upper()
    crisis_label.visible = true
    _refresh()

func _on_extraction_available() -> void:
    extract_button.visible = true

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/mission/mission_runtime.gd =====
class_name MissionRuntime
extends Node

@export var mission_id: StringName = &"prague_hospital"
@export var crisis_id: StringName = &"prague_triage"
@export var crisis_options: Array[StringName] = [&"recover_evidence", &"protect_patients", &"stop_observer"]
@export var crisis_time_limit: float = 95.0
@export var observer_unit_path: NodePath
@export var observer_extraction_path: NodePath
@export var intro_dialogue_id: StringName = &"prague_intro"
@export var crisis_dialogue_id: StringName = &"prague_crisis"

var mission: MissionDefinition
var objective_states: Dictionary = {}
var objective_progress: Dictionary = {}
var mission_started_at: float = 0.0
var crisis_active: bool = false
var crisis_choice: StringName
var crisis_time_remaining: float = -1.0
var extraction_available: bool = false
var finished: bool = false
var observer_escaped: bool = false
var _objective_definitions: Dictionary = {}

func _ready() -> void:
    add_to_group("mission_runtime")
    var active_id := StringName(GameFlow.campaign_state.get("active_mission_id", mission_id))
    mission = ContentDatabase.get_definition(active_id) as MissionDefinition
    if mission == null:
        mission = ContentDatabase.get_definition(mission_id) as MissionDefinition
    if mission != null:
        mission_id = mission.id
    _initialize_objectives()
    EventBus.interaction_performed.connect(_on_interaction_performed)
    EventBus.unit_died.connect(_on_unit_died)
    mission_started_at = Time.get_ticks_msec() / 1000.0
    EventBus.mission_started.emit(mission)
    call_deferred("_start_intro")

func _process(delta: float) -> void:
    if finished or GameFlow.is_tactical_paused:
        return
    if crisis_active and crisis_choice == &"":
        crisis_time_remaining -= delta
        if crisis_time_remaining <= 0.0:
            _expire_crisis()
    _check_observer_escape()
    _check_player_defeat()

func get_objective_snapshot() -> Array[Dictionary]:
    var result: Array[Dictionary] = []
    if mission == null:
        return result
    for objective in mission.objectives:
        if objective == null:
            continue
        var key := String(objective.id)
        result.append({
            "id": objective.id,
            "name": objective.display_name,
            "description": objective.description,
            "required": objective.required,
            "hidden": objective.hidden and objective_states.get(key) == "inactive",
            "state": objective_states.get(key, "inactive"),
            "progress": objective_progress.get(key, 0.0),
