            "progress_target": objective.progress_target,
        })
    return result

func get_extraction_status() -> Dictionary:
    if not extraction_available:
        return {"inside": 0, "required": 0, "ready": false}
    var zone := _get_extraction_zone()
    if zone != null and zone.has_method("get_extraction_status"):
        return zone.get_extraction_status()
    return {"inside": 0, "required": 0, "ready": true}

func is_objective_active(objective_id: StringName) -> bool:
    return objective_states.get(String(objective_id), "inactive") == "active"

func activate_objective(objective_id: StringName) -> bool:
    var key := String(objective_id)
    if not objective_states.has(key) or objective_states[key] != "inactive":
        return false
    var definition: ObjectiveDefinition = _objective_definitions.get(key)
    if definition != null:
        for prerequisite in definition.prerequisites:
            if objective_states.get(String(prerequisite)) != "completed":
                return false
        if not StoryState.conditions_met(definition.activation_flags):
            return false
    objective_states[key] = "active"
    EventBus.objective_changed.emit(objective_id, &"active")
    return true

func complete_objective(objective_id: StringName) -> bool:
    var key := String(objective_id)
    var current_state := String(objective_states.get(key, "missing"))
    if current_state == "inactive" and not activate_objective(objective_id):
        return false
    if objective_states.get(key) != "active":
        return false
    objective_states[key] = "completed"
    var definition: ObjectiveDefinition = _objective_definitions.get(key)
    var target := definition.progress_target if definition != null else 1.0
    objective_progress[key] = target
    if definition != null:
        StoryState.apply_actions({"set_flags": definition.success_flags})
    EventBus.objective_progress_changed.emit(objective_id, target, target)
    EventBus.objective_changed.emit(objective_id, &"completed")
    _activate_dependants(objective_id)
    if objective_id == &"secure_network":
        start_crisis()
    elif crisis_active and crisis_options.has(objective_id) and crisis_choice == &"":
        resolve_crisis(objective_id)
    return true

func fail_objective(objective_id: StringName, reason: String = "") -> bool:
    var key := String(objective_id)
    if objective_states.get(key) in ["completed", "failed"]:
        return false
    objective_states[key] = "failed"
    var definition: ObjectiveDefinition = _objective_definitions.get(key)
    if definition != null:
        StoryState.apply_actions({"set_flags": definition.failure_flags})
    EventBus.objective_changed.emit(objective_id, &"failed")
    if not reason.is_empty():
        DebugConsole.warn(&"mission", "%s failed: %s" % [objective_id, reason])
    return true

func add_objective_progress(objective_id: StringName, amount: float) -> bool:
    if not is_objective_active(objective_id):
        return false
    var key := String(objective_id)
    var definition: ObjectiveDefinition = _objective_definitions.get(key)
    var target := maxf(definition.progress_target if definition != null else 1.0, 0.001)
    objective_progress[key] = clampf(float(objective_progress.get(key, 0.0)) + amount, 0.0, target)
    EventBus.objective_progress_changed.emit(objective_id, objective_progress[key], target)
    if float(objective_progress[key]) >= target:
        return complete_objective(objective_id)
    return true

func start_crisis() -> void:
    if crisis_active or finished or crisis_choice != &"":
        return
    crisis_active = true
    crisis_time_remaining = crisis_time_limit
    for objective_id in crisis_options:
        activate_objective(objective_id)
    EventBus.crisis_started.emit(crisis_id, crisis_options.duplicate(), crisis_time_limit)
    if crisis_dialogue_id != &"":
        DialogueManager.start_dialogue(crisis_dialogue_id, {"mission": mission_id})

func resolve_crisis(choice_id: StringName) -> bool:
    if not crisis_active or crisis_choice != &"" or not crisis_options.has(choice_id):
        return false
    if objective_states.get(String(choice_id)) != "completed":
        objective_states[String(choice_id)] = "completed"
        EventBus.objective_changed.emit(choice_id, &"completed")
    crisis_choice = choice_id
    for option_id in crisis_options:
        if option_id != choice_id and objective_states.get(String(option_id)) != "failed":
            fail_objective(option_id, "Competing crisis priority was abandoned.")
    crisis_active = false
    crisis_time_remaining = 0.0
    _apply_crisis_choice_flags(choice_id)
    EventBus.crisis_resolved.emit(crisis_id, choice_id)
    _start_aftermath_dialogue(choice_id)
    _make_extraction_available()
    return true

func get_observer_escape_position() -> Vector3:
    var marker := get_node_or_null(observer_extraction_path) as Node3D
    return marker.global_position if marker != null else Vector3.ZERO

func is_observer_escape_active() -> bool:
    return crisis_active and crisis_choice == &"" and is_objective_active(&"stop_observer")

func request_extraction(force_abort: bool = false) -> bool:
    if finished:
        return false
    if not force_abort:
        if not extraction_available:
            DebugConsole.warn(&"mission", "Extraction is not yet available.")
            return false
        var zone := _get_extraction_zone()
        if zone != null and zone.has_method("is_ready_for_extraction") and not zone.is_ready_for_extraction():
            var status := get_extraction_status()
            DebugConsole.warn(
                &"mission",
                "Extraction requires all living operators in the zone (%d/%d)." % [status.inside, status.required]
            )
            return false
        if is_objective_active(&"extract_team"):
            complete_objective(&"extract_team")
    finished = true
    GameFlow.complete_tactical_mission(_build_result(force_abort))
    return true

func _initialize_objectives() -> void:
    objective_states.clear()
    objective_progress.clear()
    _objective_definitions.clear()
    if mission == null:
        return
    for objective in mission.objectives:
        if objective == null:
            continue
        var key := String(objective.id)
        _objective_definitions[key] = objective
        objective_progress[key] = 0.0
        objective_states[key] = "active" if objective.prerequisites.is_empty() and not objective.hidden else "inactive"
        if objective_states[key] == "active":
            EventBus.objective_changed.emit(objective.id, &"active")

func _activate_dependants(completed_id: StringName) -> void:
    if mission == null:
        return
    for objective in mission.objectives:
        if objective == null or objective.id == &"extract_team":
            continue
        if objective.prerequisites.has(completed_id):
            activate_objective(objective.id)

func _on_interaction_performed(_actor: TacticalUnit, target: Node, action_id: StringName) -> void:
    if finished or not target is MissionInteractable:
        return
    var interactable := target as MissionInteractable
    if interactable.objective_id == &"":
        return
    DebugConsole.log_message(
        &"mission",
        "Interaction %s completed objective %s." % [action_id, interactable.objective_id]
    )
    complete_objective(interactable.objective_id)

func _on_unit_died(unit: Node) -> void:
    var tactical_unit := unit as TacticalUnit
    if tactical_unit == null:
        return
    if tactical_unit.unit_id == &"observer" and is_observer_escape_active():
        resolve_crisis(&"stop_observer")

func _check_observer_escape() -> void:
    if observer_escaped or not is_observer_escape_active():
        return
    var observer := get_node_or_null(observer_unit_path) as TacticalUnit
    var marker := get_node_or_null(observer_extraction_path) as Node3D
    if observer == null or marker == null or observer.health_component.current_health <= 0.0:
        return
    if observer.global_position.distance_to(marker.global_position) <= 1.4:
        observer_escaped = true
        fail_objective(&"stop_observer", "The observer escaped the hospital.")
        StoryState.set_flag(&"prague.observer_escaped", true)

func _check_player_defeat() -> void:
    if _living_player_count() == 0:
        request_extraction(true)

func _expire_crisis() -> void:
    crisis_active = false
    crisis_time_remaining = 0.0
    for option_id in crisis_options:
        fail_objective(option_id, "Crisis window expired.")
    StoryState.apply_actions({"set_flags": {
        "prague.evidence_destroyed": true,
        "prague.patients_lost": true,
        "prague.observer_escaped": true,
        "prague.crisis_expired": true,
    }})
    EventBus.crisis_resolved.emit(crisis_id, &"none")
    _make_extraction_available()

func _make_extraction_available() -> void:
    extraction_available = true
    activate_objective(&"extract_team")
    EventBus.mission_extraction_available.emit()

func _apply_crisis_choice_flags(choice_id: StringName) -> void:
    var actions := {"set_flags": {}}
    match choice_id:
        &"recover_evidence":
            actions = {"set_flags": {
                "prague.evidence_recovered": true,
                "prague.patients_lost": true,
                "prague.observer_escaped": true,
            }}
        &"protect_patients":
            actions = {"set_flags": {
                "prague.patients_saved": true,
                "prague.evidence_destroyed": true,
                "prague.observer_escaped": true,
            }}
        &"stop_observer":
            actions = {"set_flags": {
                "prague.observer_stopped": true,
                "prague.evidence_destroyed": true,
                "prague.patients_lost": true,
            }}
    StoryState.apply_actions(actions)

func _start_aftermath_dialogue(choice_id: StringName) -> void:
    var dialogues := {
        &"recover_evidence": &"prague_evidence_aftermath",
        &"protect_patients": &"prague_patients_aftermath",
        &"stop_observer": &"prague_observer_aftermath",
    }
    if dialogues.has(choice_id):
        DialogueManager.start_dialogue(dialogues[choice_id], {"mission": mission_id})

func _start_intro() -> void:
    if mission != null and mission.briefing_dialogue != null:
        DialogueManager.start_dialogue(mission.briefing_dialogue, {"mission": mission_id})
    elif intro_dialogue_id != &"":
        DialogueManager.start_dialogue(intro_dialogue_id, {"mission": mission_id})

func _get_extraction_zone() -> Node:
    return get_tree().get_first_node_in_group("mission_extraction_zones")

func _living_player_count() -> int:
    var living := 0
    for node in get_tree().get_nodes_in_group("player_units"):
        var unit := node as TacticalUnit
        if unit != null and unit.health_component.current_health > 0.0:
            living += 1
    return living

func _build_result(aborted: bool) -> Dictionary:
    var unit_results := {}
    var casualties := 0
    for node in get_tree().get_nodes_in_group("player_units"):
        var unit := node as TacticalUnit
        if unit == null:
            continue
        var health_ratio := unit.health_component.current_health / maxf(unit.health_component.maximum_health, 1.0)
        if health_ratio <= 0.0:
            casualties += 1
        var definition_id := unit.definition.id if unit.definition != null else unit.unit_id
        unit_results[String(definition_id)] = {
            "health_ratio": health_ratio,
            "stress_gain": 8.0 + unit.suppression_component.suppression * 0.2,
            "utility_remaining": unit.inventory_component.items.duplicate(true),
        }
    var campaign_actions := _campaign_actions_for_choice(crisis_choice)
    var extracted := objective_states.get("extract_team") == "completed"
    var secured := objective_states.get("secure_network") == "completed"
    var succeeded := not aborted and secured and extracted
    var elapsed := Time.get_ticks_msec() / 1000.0 - mission_started_at
    return {
        "mission_id": String(mission_id),
        "mission_name": mission.display_name if mission != null else String(mission_id),
        "status": "success" if succeeded else "failed",
        "outcome_grade": _outcome_grade(succeeded, casualties),
        "aborted": aborted,
        "duration_seconds": elapsed,
        "objectives": objective_states.duplicate(true),
        "crisis_choice": String(crisis_choice),
        "observer_escaped": observer_escaped or bool(StoryState.get_flag(&"prague.observer_escaped", false)),
        "casualties": casualties,
        "survivors": _living_player_count(),
        "unit_results": unit_results,
        "campaign_actions": campaign_actions,
        "score": _calculate_score(succeeded, casualties, elapsed),
    }

func _campaign_actions_for_choice(choice_id: StringName) -> Dictionary:
    var base_rewards: Dictionary = mission.rewards.duplicate(true) if mission != null else {}
    var credits := int(base_rewards.get("credits", 0))
    var intel := int(base_rewards.get("intel", 0))
    match choice_id:
        &"recover_evidence":
            return {
                "add_resources": {"credits": credits + 350, "intel": intel + 4},
                "add_inventory": {"prague_evidence": 1},
                "add_relationships": {"oversight": 2, "medical": -2, "public": -1},
            }
        &"protect_patients":
            return {
                "add_resources": {"credits": credits + 250, "intel": intel + 1},
                "add_relationships": {"medical": 3, "public": 2},
            }
        &"stop_observer":
            return {
                "add_resources": {"credits": credits + 300, "intel": intel + 5},
                "add_relationships": {"oversight": 1, "medical": -2},
            }
        _:
            return {
                "add_resources": {"credits": credits + 100, "intel": intel},
                "add_relationships": {"medical": -3, "public": -2, "oversight": -1},
            }

func _calculate_score(succeeded: bool, casualties: int, elapsed: float) -> int:
    var score := 1000 if succeeded else 350
    score += 450 if crisis_choice != &"" else 0
    score -= casualties * 300
    score -= int(maxf(elapsed - 300.0, 0.0) * 0.5)
    return maxi(score, 0)

func _outcome_grade(succeeded: bool, casualties: int) -> String:
    if not succeeded:
        return "Failure"
    if casualties == 0 and crisis_choice != &"":
        return "Decisive"
    if casualties == 0:
        return "Operational"
    return "Costly"

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/mission/objective_trigger.gd =====
class_name ObjectiveTrigger
extends Area3D

@export var objective_id: StringName
@export var player_only: bool = true
@export var trigger_once: bool = true
@export var request_extraction: bool = false
@export var require_all_living_players: bool = false
var triggered: bool = false
var _players_inside: Dictionary = {}

func _ready() -> void:
    add_to_group("objective_triggers")
    if request_extraction:
        add_to_group("mission_extraction_zones")
    body_entered.connect(_on_body_entered)
    body_exited.connect(_on_body_exited)

func is_ready_for_extraction() -> bool:
    if not request_extraction:
        return false
    var living_players := _living_player_units()
    if living_players.is_empty():
        return false
    if not require_all_living_players:
        for unit in living_players:
            if _players_inside.has(unit.get_instance_id()):
                return true
        return false
    for unit in living_players:
        if not _players_inside.has(unit.get_instance_id()):
            return false
    return true

func get_extraction_status() -> Dictionary:
    var living_players := _living_player_units()
    var inside := 0
    for unit in living_players:
        if _players_inside.has(unit.get_instance_id()):
            inside += 1
    return {"inside": inside, "required": living_players.size(), "ready": is_ready_for_extraction()}

func _on_body_entered(body: Node3D) -> void:
    var unit := body as TacticalUnit
    if unit == null or (player_only and not unit.player_controlled):
        return
    if unit.player_controlled:
        _players_inside[unit.get_instance_id()] = weakref(unit)
    _try_trigger(unit)

func _on_body_exited(body: Node3D) -> void:
    var unit := body as TacticalUnit
    if unit != null:
        _players_inside.erase(unit.get_instance_id())

func _try_trigger(unit: TacticalUnit) -> void:
    if triggered and trigger_once:
        return
    var runtime := get_tree().get_first_node_in_group("mission_runtime") as MissionRuntime
    if runtime == null or not runtime.is_objective_active(objective_id):
        return
    if request_extraction and not is_ready_for_extraction():
        return
    triggered = true
    runtime.complete_objective(objective_id)
    if request_extraction:
        runtime.request_extraction()

func _living_player_units() -> Array[TacticalUnit]:
    var result: Array[TacticalUnit] = []
    for node in get_tree().get_nodes_in_group("player_units"):
        var unit := node as TacticalUnit
        if unit != null and unit.health_component.current_health > 0.0:
            result.append(unit)
    return result

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/tactical/ability_component.gd =====
class_name AbilityComponent
extends Node

var abilities: Array[AbilityDefinition] = []
var cooldowns: Dictionary = {}

func configure(definitions: Array[AbilityDefinition]) -> void:
    abilities = definitions.duplicate()
    cooldowns.clear()

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/tactical/attack_command.gd =====
class_name AttackCommand
extends TacticalCommand

var target: TacticalUnit
var fire_mode_id: StringName = &"aimed"

func _init(target_unit: TacticalUnit = null, mode_id: StringName = &"aimed") -> void:
    target = target_unit
    fire_mode_id = mode_id
    display_name = "Attack: %s" % String(fire_mode_id)
    issued_at = Time.get_ticks_msec() / 1000.0

func validate(context: Dictionary = {}) -> bool:
    if not super.validate(context):
        return false
    if target == null or not is_instance_valid(target):
        failure_reason = "Target is unavailable."
        return false
    if target.player_controlled == unit.player_controlled:
        failure_reason = "Cannot attack a friendly unit."
        return false
    if not unit.combat_component.can_use_fire_mode(fire_mode_id):
        failure_reason = "Weapon or ammunition is unavailable."
        return false
    return true

func begin(context: Dictionary = {}) -> void:
    super.begin(context)
    unit.overwatch_component.cancel_overwatch()
    if not unit.begin_attack(target, fire_mode_id):
        fail("Attack could not begin.")

func update(_delta: float, _context: Dictionary = {}) -> bool:
    if is_finished():
        return true
    if target == null or not is_instance_valid(target) or target.health_component.current_health <= 0.0:
        unit.combat_component.cancel_action()
        succeed()
        return true
    if not unit.combat_component.is_busy():
        succeed()
        return true
    return false

func cancel(context: Dictionary = {}) -> void:
    super.cancel(context)
    if unit != null and is_instance_valid(unit):
        unit.combat_component.cancel_action()

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/tactical/camera_rig.gd =====
class_name TacticalCameraRig
extends Node3D

@export var pan_speed: float = 14.0
@export var rotate_speed: float = 1.4
@export var zoom_step: float = 2.0
@export var minimum_zoom: float = 8.0
@export var maximum_zoom: float = 32.0

@onready var camera: Camera3D = $Camera3D
var selection_manager: SelectionManager

func _ready() -> void:
    pan_speed = float(SettingsManager.get_value(&"camera_pan_speed", pan_speed))
    rotate_speed = float(SettingsManager.get_value(&"camera_rotate_speed", rotate_speed))

func _process(delta: float) -> void:
    if DeveloperTools.is_open():
        return
    var input_vector := Input.get_vector("camera_left", "camera_right", "camera_forward", "camera_back")
    if input_vector.length_squared() > 0.0:
        var forward := -global_basis.z
        forward.y = 0.0
        forward = forward.normalized()
        var right := global_basis.x
        right.y = 0.0
        right = right.normalized()
        global_position += (right * input_vector.x + forward * input_vector.y) * pan_speed * delta
    var rotation_input := Input.get_axis("camera_rotate_left", "camera_rotate_right")
    if not is_zero_approx(rotation_input):
        rotate_y(-rotation_input * rotate_speed * delta)
    if Input.is_action_just_pressed("focus_selection") and selection_manager != null and not selection_manager.selected_units.is_empty():
        global_position.x = selection_manager.average_position().x
        global_position.z = selection_manager.average_position().z

func _unhandled_input(event: InputEvent) -> void:
    if DeveloperTools.is_open():
        return
    if event is InputEventMouseButton and event.pressed:
        if event.button_index == MOUSE_BUTTON_WHEEL_UP:
            _zoom(-zoom_step)
            get_viewport().set_input_as_handled()
        elif event.button_index == MOUSE_BUTTON_WHEEL_DOWN:
            _zoom(zoom_step)
            get_viewport().set_input_as_handled()

func _zoom(amount: float) -> void:
    var distance := camera.position.length()
    var next_distance := clampf(distance + amount, minimum_zoom, maximum_zoom)
    camera.position = camera.position.normalized() * next_distance

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/tactical/combat_component.gd =====
class_name CombatComponent
extends Node

signal action_started(action_name: StringName, target: Variant)
signal shot_resolved(target: TacticalUnit, hit: bool, damage: float, hit_chance: float)
signal action_finished(action_name: StringName)
signal ammunition_changed(current: int, maximum: int)

var weapon: WeaponDefinition
var ammunition: int = 0
var owner_unit: TacticalUnit
var rng := RandomNumberGenerator.new()

var _busy: bool = false
var _action_name: StringName
var _target_unit: TacticalUnit
var _target_position: Vector3
var _area_radius: float = 0.0
var _fire_mode: FireModeDefinition
var _preparation_remaining: float = 0.0
var _interval_remaining: float = 0.0
var _shots_remaining: int = 0

func _ready() -> void:
    owner_unit = get_parent() as TacticalUnit
    rng.seed = int(Time.get_ticks_usec()) ^ int(get_instance_id())

func configure(definition: WeaponDefinition) -> void:
    weapon = definition
    ammunition = weapon.magazine_size if weapon != null else 0
    ammunition_changed.emit(ammunition, weapon.magazine_size if weapon != null else 0)

func can_fire() -> bool:
    return weapon != null and ammunition > 0 and owner_unit != null and owner_unit.health_component.current_health > 0.0

func can_use_fire_mode(mode_id: StringName) -> bool:
    var mode := get_fire_mode(mode_id)
    return can_fire() and mode != null and ammunition >= mode.ammunition_cost

func get_fire_mode(mode_id: StringName) -> FireModeDefinition:
    if weapon == null:
        return null
    for mode in weapon.fire_modes:
        if mode != null and mode.id == mode_id:
            return mode
    return weapon.fire_modes[0] if not weapon.fire_modes.is_empty() else null

func begin_attack(target: TacticalUnit, mode_id: StringName) -> bool:
    if target == null or not is_instance_valid(target) or not can_use_fire_mode(mode_id):
        return false
    _begin_action(&"attack", target, target.global_position + Vector3.UP * 0.9, 0.0, get_fire_mode(mode_id))
    return true

func begin_suppression(position: Vector3, radius: float, mode_id: StringName = &"suppressive") -> bool:
    if not can_use_fire_mode(mode_id):
        return false
    _begin_action(&"suppress", null, position, maxf(radius, 0.5), get_fire_mode(mode_id))
    return true

func cancel_action() -> void:
    if not _busy:
        return
    var finished_name := _action_name
    _reset_action()
    action_finished.emit(finished_name)

func is_busy() -> bool:
    return _busy

func begin_reload() -> bool:
    if _busy or weapon == null or ammunition >= weapon.magazine_size:
        return false
    _busy = true
    _action_name = &"reload"
    _target_unit = null
    _fire_mode = null
    _preparation_remaining = weapon.reload_duration
    _shots_remaining = 0
    owner_unit.state_machine.change_state(&"reloading")
    action_started.emit(&"reload", owner_unit)
    return true

func _begin_action(action_name: StringName, target: TacticalUnit, position: Vector3, radius: float, mode: FireModeDefinition) -> void:
    _busy = true
    _action_name = action_name
    _target_unit = target
    _target_position = position
    _area_radius = radius
    _fire_mode = mode
    _preparation_remaining = mode.preparation_seconds
    _interval_remaining = 0.0
    _shots_remaining = mini(mode.projectile_count, ammunition)
    owner_unit.state_machine.change_state(&"firing")
    action_started.emit(action_name, target if target != null else position)

func _process(delta: float) -> void:
    if not _busy or GameFlow.is_tactical_paused:
        return
    if owner_unit == null or owner_unit.health_component.current_health <= 0.0:
        cancel_action()
        return
    if _preparation_remaining > 0.0:
        _preparation_remaining -= delta
        return
    if _action_name == &"reload":
        ammunition = weapon.magazine_size
        ammunition_changed.emit(ammunition, weapon.magazine_size)
        _finish_action()
        return
    _interval_remaining -= delta
    if _interval_remaining > 0.0:
        return
    if _shots_remaining <= 0 or ammunition <= 0:
        _finish_action()
        return
    _resolve_shot()
    _shots_remaining -= 1
    _interval_remaining = _fire_mode.interval_seconds
    if _shots_remaining <= 0:
        _finish_action()

func _resolve_shot() -> void:
    ammunition = maxi(0, ammunition - 1)
    ammunition_changed.emit(ammunition, weapon.magazine_size)
    if _action_name == &"suppress":
        _resolve_area_shot()
        return
    if _target_unit == null or not is_instance_valid(_target_unit):
        return
    _target_position = _target_unit.global_position + Vector3.UP * 0.9
    var chance := calculate_hit_chance(_target_unit, _fire_mode)
    var visibility := _visibility_manager()
    var has_los := visibility == null or visibility.has_line_of_sight(owner_unit, _target_unit)
    var hit := has_los and rng.randf() <= chance
    var damage := weapon.damage if hit else 0.0
    if hit:
        _target_unit.health_component.apply_damage(damage)
    _apply_nearby_suppression(_target_position, weapon.suppression_strength * _fire_mode.suppression_multiplier, 2.3)
    _target_unit.suppression_component.add_suppression(weapon.suppression_strength * _fire_mode.suppression_multiplier)
    shot_resolved.emit(_target_unit, hit, damage, chance)
    EventBus.shot_resolved.emit(owner_unit, _target_unit, hit, damage, chance)

func _resolve_area_shot() -> void:
    var shot_point := _target_position + Vector3(rng.randf_range(-_area_radius, _area_radius), 0.0, rng.randf_range(-_area_radius, _area_radius))
    _apply_nearby_suppression(shot_point, weapon.suppression_strength * _fire_mode.suppression_multiplier, _area_radius)
    for node in get_tree().get_nodes_in_group("tactical_units"):
        var candidate := node as TacticalUnit
        if candidate == null or candidate.player_controlled == owner_unit.player_controlled:
            continue
        var distance := candidate.global_position.distance_to(shot_point)
        if distance <= 0.8 and rng.randf() <= 0.22 * _fire_mode.accuracy_multiplier:
            candidate.health_component.apply_damage(weapon.damage * 0.65)
            shot_resolved.emit(candidate, true, weapon.damage * 0.65, 0.22)

func calculate_hit_chance(target: TacticalUnit, mode: FireModeDefinition) -> float:
    if weapon == null or target == null or mode == null:
        return 0.0
    var distance := owner_unit.global_position.distance_to(target.global_position)
    if distance > weapon.maximum_range:
        return 0.0
    var range_factor := 1.0
    if distance > weapon.optimal_range:
        range_factor = lerpf(1.0, 0.28, inverse_lerp(weapon.optimal_range, weapon.maximum_range, distance))
    var suppression_factor := owner_unit.suppression_component.get_accuracy_multiplier()
    var movement_factor := 0.72 if owner_unit.movement_component.moving else 1.0
    var target_movement_factor := 0.82 if target.movement_component.moving else 1.0
    var cover_factor := 1.0
    var visibility := _visibility_manager()
    if visibility != null:
        cover_factor = visibility.get_cover_accuracy_multiplier(owner_unit, target)
        range_factor *= visibility.get_smoke_visibility_factor(owner_unit.global_position + Vector3.UP, target.global_position + Vector3.UP)
    return clampf(0.76 * mode.accuracy_multiplier * range_factor * suppression_factor * movement_factor * target_movement_factor * cover_factor, 0.03, 0.97)

func _apply_nearby_suppression(position: Vector3, amount: float, radius: float) -> void:
    for node in get_tree().get_nodes_in_group("tactical_units"):
        var candidate := node as TacticalUnit
        if candidate == null or candidate.player_controlled == owner_unit.player_controlled:
            continue
        var distance := candidate.global_position.distance_to(position)
        if distance <= radius:
            candidate.suppression_component.add_suppression(amount * (1.0 - distance / maxf(radius, 0.01) * 0.55))

func _finish_action() -> void:
    var finished_name := _action_name
    _reset_action()
    owner_unit.state_machine.change_state(&"idle")
    action_finished.emit(finished_name)

func _reset_action() -> void:
    _busy = false
    _action_name = &""
    _target_unit = null
    _fire_mode = null
    _shots_remaining = 0

func _visibility_manager() -> VisibilityManager:
    return get_tree().get_first_node_in_group("visibility_managers") as VisibilityManager

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/tactical/command_coordinator.gd =====
class_name CommandCoordinator
extends Node

signal synchronization_delayed(group_id: StringName, delay_seconds: float)
signal synchronization_released(group_id: StringName)
signal synchronization_finished(group_id: StringName)

@export var formation_spacing: float = 1.6
var _group_counter: int = 0
var _groups: Dictionary = {}

func _ready() -> void:
    add_to_group("command_coordinators")

func _process(_delta: float) -> void:
    var now := Time.get_ticks_msec() / 1000.0
    for group_id in _groups.keys():
        var group: Dictionary = _groups[group_id]
        if bool(group["released"]) and not bool(group.get("release_notified", false)) and now >= float(group["release_at"]):
            group["release_notified"] = true
            _groups[group_id] = group
            synchronization_released.emit(group_id)

func create_group(expected_count: int, label: String = "Synchronized command") -> StringName:
    _group_counter += 1
    var group_id := StringName("sync_%d" % _group_counter)
    _groups[group_id] = {
        "label": label,
        "expected": maxi(expected_count, 0),
        "commands": [],
        "ready": [],
        "finished": [],
        "released": false,
        "release_at": INF,
        "release_notified": false,
    }
    return group_id

func set_expected_count(group_id: StringName, count: int) -> void:
    if not _groups.has(group_id):
        return
    _groups[group_id]["expected"] = maxi(count, 0)
    if count <= 0:
        _groups.erase(group_id)

func register_command(group_id: StringName, command: TacticalCommand) -> void:
    if group_id == &"":
        return
    if not _groups.has(group_id):
        _groups[group_id] = {
            "label": "External synchronized command",
            "expected": 1,
            "commands": [],
            "ready": [],
            "finished": [],
            "released": false,
            "release_at": INF,
            "release_notified": false,
        }
    var commands: Array = _groups[group_id]["commands"]
    if not commands.has(command):
        commands.append(command)

func mark_command_ready(command: TacticalCommand) -> void:
    var group_id := command.synchronization_group
    if group_id == &"" or not _groups.has(group_id):
        return
    var ready: Array = _groups[group_id]["ready"]
    if not ready.has(command):
        ready.append(command)
    _try_prepare_release(group_id)

func can_command_begin(command: TacticalCommand) -> bool:
    var group_id := command.synchronization_group
    if group_id == &"" or not _groups.has(group_id):
        return true
    _try_prepare_release(group_id)
    var group: Dictionary = _groups[group_id]
    if not bool(group["released"]):
        return false
    return Time.get_ticks_msec() / 1000.0 >= float(group["release_at"]) + command.release_delay

func mark_command_finished(command: TacticalCommand) -> void:
    var group_id := command.synchronization_group
    if group_id == &"" or not _groups.has(group_id):
        return
    var finished: Array = _groups[group_id]["finished"]
    if not finished.has(command):
        finished.append(command)
    var expected := int(_groups[group_id]["expected"])
    if expected > 0 and finished.size() >= expected:
        synchronization_finished.emit(group_id)
        _groups.erase(group_id)

func cancel_group(group_id: StringName, reason: String = "Synchronized group cancelled.") -> void:
    if not _groups.has(group_id):
        return
    for command in _groups[group_id]["commands"]:
        if command is TacticalCommand and not command.is_finished():
            command.fail(reason)
    _groups.erase(group_id)

func issue_group_move(
        units: Array[TacticalUnit],
        center: Vector3,
        stance: int,
        final_facing: Vector3,
        append: bool,
        synchronized: bool = true,
        camera_basis: Basis = Basis.IDENTITY) -> int:
    if units.is_empty():
        return 0
    var group_id := create_group(units.size(), "Formation move") if synchronized else &""
    var positions := _formation_positions(units.size(), center, final_facing, camera_basis)
    var issued := 0
    for index in units.size():
        var unit := units[index]
        if unit.enqueue_move(positions[index], stance, final_facing, append, group_id):
            issued += 1
    if synchronized:
        set_expected_count(group_id, issued)
    DebugConsole.log_message(&"command", "Issued formation move to %d/%d units." % [issued, units.size()])
    return issued

func issue_group_attack(units: Array[TacticalUnit], target: TacticalUnit, fire_mode_id: StringName, append: bool, synchronized: bool = true) -> int:
    if units.is_empty() or target == null:
        return 0
    var group_id := create_group(units.size(), "Coordinated attack") if synchronized else &""
    var issued := 0
    for unit in units:
        if unit.enqueue_attack(target, fire_mode_id, append, group_id):
            issued += 1
    if synchronized:
        set_expected_count(group_id, issued)
    return issued

func _try_prepare_release(group_id: StringName) -> void:
    if not _groups.has(group_id):
        return
    var group: Dictionary = _groups[group_id]
    if bool(group["released"]):
        return
    var expected := int(group["expected"])
    var ready: Array = group["ready"]
    if expected <= 0 or ready.size() < expected:
        return
    var delay := _calculate_jamming_delay(group)
    var now := Time.get_ticks_msec() / 1000.0
    group["released"] = true
    group["release_at"] = now + delay
    if delay > 0.0:
        synchronization_delayed.emit(group_id, delay)
        EventBus.synchronization_disrupted.emit(group_id, delay)
        _apply_jamming_desynchronization(group, delay)
    else:
        synchronization_released.emit(group_id)
    _groups[group_id] = group

func _calculate_jamming_delay(group: Dictionary) -> float:
    var center := Vector3.ZERO
    var count := 0
    for command in group["commands"]:
        if command is TacticalCommand and command.unit != null and is_instance_valid(command.unit):
            center += command.unit.global_position
            count += 1
    if count == 0:
        return 0.0
    center /= float(count)
    var strongest := 0.0
    for node in get_tree().get_nodes_in_group("active_jammers"):
        if node.has_method("interference_at"):
            strongest = maxf(strongest, float(node.interference_at(center)))
    var reduction := 0.0
    if not GameFlow.campaign_state.is_empty():
        reduction = float(StrategicSystem.get_research_effect(
            &"jamming_delay_reduction",
            GameFlow.campaign_state,
            0.0
        ))
    return strongest * 1.75 * (1.0 - clampf(reduction, 0.0, 0.9))

func _apply_jamming_desynchronization(group: Dictionary, delay: float) -> void:
    var index := 0
    for command in group["commands"]:
        if command is TacticalCommand:
            command.release_delay = (float(index) * 0.18 + fmod(float(command.unit.get_instance_id()), 3.0) * 0.07) * clampf(delay, 0.0, 2.0)
            index += 1

func _formation_positions(count: int, center: Vector3, facing: Vector3, camera_basis: Basis) -> Array[Vector3]:
    var positions: Array[Vector3] = []
    if count <= 1:
        positions.append(center)
        return positions
    var forward := facing
    forward.y = 0.0
    if forward.length_squared() < 0.001:
        forward = -camera_basis.z
        forward.y = 0.0
    forward = forward.normalized()
    var right := forward.cross(Vector3.UP).normalized()
    var columns := ceili(sqrt(float(count)))
    var rows := ceili(float(count) / float(columns))
    for index in count:
        var column := index % columns
        var row := index / columns
        var x_offset := (float(column) - float(columns - 1) * 0.5) * formation_spacing
        var z_offset := (float(row) - float(rows - 1) * 0.5) * formation_spacing
        positions.append(center + right * x_offset - forward * z_offset)
    return positions

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/tactical/command_queue.gd =====
class_name CommandQueue
extends Node

signal queue_changed(queue_size: int)
signal command_started(command: TacticalCommand)
signal command_finished(command: TacticalCommand)
signal command_failed(command: TacticalCommand, reason: String)

var commands: Array[TacticalCommand] = []
var current_command: TacticalCommand
var owner_unit: TacticalUnit
var coordinator: CommandCoordinator
var _ready_at: float = 0.0

func _ready() -> void:
    owner_unit = get_parent() as TacticalUnit
    coordinator = get_tree().get_first_node_in_group("command_coordinators") as CommandCoordinator

func enqueue(command: TacticalCommand, append: bool = true) -> bool:
    command.unit = owner_unit
    if not command.validate():
        DebugConsole.warn(&"command", "Rejected %s for %s: %s" % [command.display_name, owner_unit.name, command.failure_reason])
        return false
    if not append:
        clear(true)
    commands.append(command)
    if coordinator != null and command.synchronization_group != &"":
        coordinator.register_command(command.synchronization_group, command)
    queue_changed.emit(pending_count())
    EventBus.command_issued.emit(command)
    return true

func clear(cancel_current: bool = true) -> void:
    if cancel_current and current_command != null:
        current_command.cancel()
        if coordinator != null:
            coordinator.mark_command_finished(current_command)
    current_command = null
    for command in commands:
        command.cancel()
        if coordinator != null:
            coordinator.mark_command_finished(command)
    commands.clear()
    _ready_at = 0.0
    queue_changed.emit(0)

func _process(delta: float) -> void:
    if GameFlow.is_tactical_paused:
        return
    if current_command == null:
        if commands.is_empty():
            return
        current_command = commands.pop_front()
        current_command.mark_ready()
        _ready_at = Time.get_ticks_msec() / 1000.0
        if coordinator != null and current_command.synchronization_group != &"":
            coordinator.mark_command_ready(current_command)
    if not _can_begin_current():
        return
    if current_command.state == TacticalCommand.CommandState.READY:
        current_command.begin()
        command_started.emit(current_command)
        queue_changed.emit(pending_count())
    if current_command.state == TacticalCommand.CommandState.RUNNING:
        current_command.update(delta)
    if current_command.is_finished():
        var finished := current_command
        current_command = null
        if coordinator != null:
            coordinator.mark_command_finished(finished)
        if finished.state == TacticalCommand.CommandState.FAILED:
            command_failed.emit(finished, finished.failure_reason)
        command_finished.emit(finished)
        queue_changed.emit(pending_count())

func _can_begin_current() -> bool:
    if current_command == null:
        return false
    if current_command.synchronization_group == &"" or coordinator == null:
        return Time.get_ticks_msec() / 1000.0 >= _ready_at + current_command.release_delay
    return coordinator.can_command_begin(current_command)

func cancel_current() -> void:
    if current_command == null:
        return
    current_command.cancel()
    if coordinator != null:
        coordinator.mark_command_finished(current_command)
    current_command = null
    _ready_at = 0.0
    queue_changed.emit(pending_count())

func remove_queued(index: int) -> bool:
    if index < 0 or index >= commands.size():
        return false
    var removed := commands[index]
    removed.cancel()
    commands.remove_at(index)
    if coordinator != null:
        coordinator.mark_command_finished(removed)
    queue_changed.emit(pending_count())
    return true

func reorder_queued(from_index: int, to_index: int) -> bool:
    if from_index < 0 or from_index >= commands.size():
        return false
    to_index = clampi(to_index, 0, commands.size() - 1)
    if from_index == to_index:
        return false
    var command := commands[from_index]
    commands.remove_at(from_index)
    commands.insert(to_index, command)
    queue_changed.emit(pending_count())
    return true

func get_command_descriptions() -> PackedStringArray:
    var descriptions := PackedStringArray()
    if current_command != null:
        descriptions.append("▶ %s" % current_command.display_name)
    for command in commands:
        descriptions.append("• %s" % command.display_name)
    return descriptions

func pending_count() -> int:
    return commands.size() + (1 if current_command != null else 0)

func has_active_command() -> bool:
    return current_command != null or not commands.is_empty()

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/tactical/cover_object.gd =====
class_name CoverObject
extends StaticBody3D

@export_range(0.0, 0.9, 0.05) var protection: float = 0.42
@export var effective_distance: float = 1.8

func _ready() -> void:
    add_to_group("cover_objects")

func accuracy_multiplier_against(attacker_position: Vector3, target_position: Vector3) -> float:
    var target_to_cover := global_position - target_position
    target_to_cover.y = 0.0
    if target_to_cover.length() > effective_distance:
        return 1.0
    var target_to_attacker := attacker_position - target_position
    target_to_attacker.y = 0.0
    if target_to_attacker.length_squared() < 0.001 or target_to_cover.length_squared() < 0.001:
        return 1.0
    var alignment := target_to_cover.normalized().dot(target_to_attacker.normalized())
    if alignment < 0.55:
        return 1.0
    return 1.0 - protection

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/tactical/door_command.gd =====
class_name DoorCommand
extends InteractCommand

func _init(door: Node = null, door_action: StringName = &"open") -> void:
    var durations := {
        &"open": 0.35,
        &"close": 0.35,
        &"lock": 0.6,
        &"unlock": 0.6,
        &"hack": 2.75,
        &"breach": 1.35,
        &"peek": 0.5,
    }
    super(door, door_action, float(durations.get(door_action, 0.5)))
    display_name = "Door: %s" % String(door_action)

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/tactical/gadget_system.gd =====
class_name GadgetSystem
extends Node

const SMOKE_SCENE := preload("res://scenes/environment/smoke_field.tscn")
const EMP_SCENE := preload("res://scenes/environment/emp_field.tscn")

signal gadget_deployed(gadget_type: StringName, position: Vector3, owner_unit: TacticalUnit)

func _ready() -> void:
    add_to_group("gadget_systems")

func deploy_gadget(gadget_type: StringName, position: Vector3, owner_unit: TacticalUnit) -> Node3D:
    var scene: PackedScene
    match gadget_type:
        &"smoke":
            scene = SMOKE_SCENE
        &"emp":
            scene = EMP_SCENE
        _:
            DebugConsole.warn(&"gadget", "Unknown gadget type: %s" % String(gadget_type))
            return null
    var instance := scene.instantiate() as Node3D
    get_parent().add_child(instance)
    instance.global_position = position
    gadget_deployed.emit(gadget_type, position, owner_unit)
    EventBus.gadget_deployed.emit(gadget_type, position, owner_unit)
    return instance

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/tactical/heal_command.gd =====
class_name HealCommand
extends TacticalCommand

var target: TacticalUnit
var heal_amount: float = 35.0
var treatment_seconds: float = 1.4
var _elapsed: float = 0.0

func _init(target_unit: TacticalUnit = null, amount: float = 35.0) -> void:
    target = target_unit
    heal_amount = amount
    display_name = "Use field medkit"
    issued_at = Time.get_ticks_msec() / 1000.0

func validate(context: Dictionary = {}) -> bool:
    if not super.validate(context):
        return false
    if target == null or not is_instance_valid(target) or not target.player_controlled:
        failure_reason = "Select a living friendly operator."
        return false
    if target.health_component.dead or target.health_component.current_health >= target.health_component.maximum_health:
        failure_reason = "Target does not require treatment."
        return false
    if unit.global_position.distance_to(target.global_position) > 2.6:
        failure_reason = "Target is outside medkit range."
        return false
    if not unit.inventory_component.has_item(&"field_medkit"):
        failure_reason = "This operator is not carrying a field medkit."
        return false
    return true

func begin(context: Dictionary = {}) -> void:
    super.begin(context)
    _elapsed = 0.0
    unit.state_machine.change_state(&"treating")

func update(delta: float, _context: Dictionary = {}) -> bool:
    _elapsed += delta
    if _elapsed < treatment_seconds:
        return false
    if not validate():
        unit.state_machine.change_state(&"idle")
        fail(failure_reason)
        return true
    if not unit.inventory_component.remove_item(&"field_medkit"):
        unit.state_machine.change_state(&"idle")
        fail("Medkit charge is unavailable.")
        return true
    target.health_component.heal(heal_amount)
    target.suppression_component.clear_suppression(18.0)
    unit.state_machine.change_state(&"idle")
    succeed()
    return true

func cancel(context: Dictionary = {}) -> void:
    super.cancel(context)
    if unit != null and is_instance_valid(unit):
        unit.state_machine.change_state(&"idle")

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/tactical/health_component.gd =====
class_name HealthComponent
extends Node

signal health_changed(current: float, maximum: float)
signal died

var maximum_health: float = 100.0
var current_health: float = 100.0
var owner_unit: Node
var dead: bool = false
var invulnerable: bool = false

func _ready() -> void:
    owner_unit = get_parent()

func configure(value: float) -> void:
    maximum_health = maxf(value, 1.0)
    current_health = maximum_health
    dead = false
    health_changed.emit(current_health, maximum_health)

func apply_damage(amount: float) -> float:
    if dead or invulnerable:
        return 0.0
    var applied := clampf(amount, 0.0, current_health)
    current_health -= applied
    health_changed.emit(current_health, maximum_health)
    EventBus.unit_health_changed.emit(owner_unit, current_health, maximum_health)
    if current_health <= 0.0:
        dead = true
        died.emit()
        EventBus.unit_died.emit(owner_unit)
    return applied

func heal(amount: float) -> float:
    if dead:
        return 0.0
    var previous := current_health
    current_health = minf(maximum_health, current_health + maxf(amount, 0.0))
    health_changed.emit(current_health, maximum_health)
    return current_health - previous

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/tactical/interact_command.gd =====
class_name InteractCommand
extends TacticalCommand

var target: Node
var action_id: StringName = &"interact"
var interaction_duration: float = 0.35
var _elapsed: float = 0.0
var _performed: bool = false

func _init(target_node: Node = null, action: StringName = &"interact", duration: float = 0.35) -> void:
    target = target_node
    action_id = action
    interaction_duration = maxf(duration, 0.0)
    display_name = "Interact: %s" % String(action_id)
    issued_at = Time.get_ticks_msec() / 1000.0

func validate(context: Dictionary = {}) -> bool:
    if not super.validate(context):
        return false
    if target == null or not is_instance_valid(target):
        failure_reason = "Interaction target is unavailable."
        return false
    if not target.has_method("can_interact") or not target.has_method("perform_interaction"):
        failure_reason = "Target is not interactable."
        return false
    if not bool(target.can_interact(unit, action_id)):
        failure_reason = "Interaction is not currently valid."
        return false
    return true

func begin(context: Dictionary = {}) -> void:
    super.begin(context)
    _elapsed = 0.0
    _performed = false
    unit.state_machine.change_state(&"interacting")

func update(delta: float, _context: Dictionary = {}) -> bool:
    if is_finished():
        return true
    _elapsed += delta
    if _elapsed < interaction_duration:
        return false
    if not _performed:
        _performed = true
        if target != null and is_instance_valid(target) and bool(target.perform_interaction(unit, action_id)):
            unit.state_machine.change_state(&"idle")
            succeed()
        else:
            unit.state_machine.change_state(&"idle")
            fail("Interaction failed during execution.")
    return true

func cancel(context: Dictionary = {}) -> void:
    super.cancel(context)
    if unit != null and is_instance_valid(unit):
        unit.state_machine.change_state(&"idle")

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/tactical/inventory_component.gd =====
class_name InventoryComponent
extends Node

var items: Dictionary = {}
var equipment: Dictionary = {}

func configure(starting_equipment: Array[EquipmentDefinition], strategic_loadout: Dictionary = {}) -> void:
    items.clear()
    equipment.clear()
    for definition in starting_equipment:
        if definition == null:
            continue
        equipment[String(definition.slot)] = String(definition.id)
        _grant_equipment_charge(definition.id)
    for slot in strategic_loadout:
        var equipment_id := StringName(str(strategic_loadout[slot]))
        equipment[String(slot)] = String(equipment_id)
        _grant_equipment_charge(equipment_id)

func add_item(item_id: StringName, amount: int = 1) -> void:
    items[String(item_id)] = int(items.get(String(item_id), 0)) + maxi(0, amount)

func has_item(item_id: StringName, amount: int = 1) -> bool:
    return int(items.get(String(item_id), 0)) >= amount

func remove_item(item_id: StringName, amount: int = 1) -> bool:
    var key := String(item_id)
    var current := int(items.get(key, 0))
    if current < amount:
        return false
    current -= amount
    if current <= 0:
        items.erase(key)
    else:
        items[key] = current
    return true

func utility_item_id() -> StringName:
    return StringName(equipment.get("utility", ""))

func gadget_item_id(gadget_type: StringName) -> StringName:
    match gadget_type:
        &"smoke":
            return &"smoke_grenade"
        &"emp":
            return &"emp_charge"
        _:
            return gadget_type

func has_gadget(gadget_type: StringName) -> bool:
    return has_item(gadget_item_id(gadget_type))

func consume_gadget(gadget_type: StringName) -> bool:
    return remove_item(gadget_item_id(gadget_type))

func _grant_equipment_charge(equipment_id: StringName) -> void:
    if equipment_id in [&"smoke_grenade", &"emp_charge", &"field_medkit"]:
        add_item(equipment_id, 1)

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/tactical/move_command.gd =====
class_name MoveCommand
extends TacticalCommand

var destination: Vector3
var stance: int
var final_facing: Vector3

func _init(target: Vector3 = Vector3.ZERO, movement_stance: int = 1, facing: Vector3 = Vector3.FORWARD) -> void:
    destination = target
    stance = movement_stance
    final_facing = facing
    display_name = "Move"
    issued_at = Time.get_ticks_msec() / 1000.0

func validate(context: Dictionary = {}) -> bool:
    if not super.validate(context):
        return false
    if not unit.can_move_to(destination):
        failure_reason = "Destination is invalid or movement is unavailable."
        return false
    return true

func begin(context: Dictionary = {}) -> void:
    super.begin(context)
    unit.begin_move(destination, stance, final_facing)

func update(_delta: float, _context: Dictionary = {}) -> bool:
    if is_finished():
        return true
    if unit == null or not is_instance_valid(unit):
        fail("Unit became unavailable during movement.")
        return true
    if not unit.is_moving():
        succeed()
        return true
    return false

func cancel(context: Dictionary = {}) -> void:
    super.cancel(context)
    if unit != null and is_instance_valid(unit):
        unit.cancel_move()

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/tactical/movement_component.gd =====
class_name MovementComponent
extends Node

enum MovementStance { WALK, JOG, SPRINT }

signal movement_started(destination: Vector3, stance: MovementStance)
signal movement_finished(destination: Vector3)
signal movement_cancelled

@export var arrival_distance: float = 0.18
@export var rotation_speed: float = 8.0

var owner_unit: CharacterBody3D
var navigation_agent: NavigationAgent3D
var destination: Vector3
var final_facing: Vector3 = Vector3.FORWARD
var stance: MovementStance = MovementStance.JOG
var moving: bool = false
var base_speed: float = 4.5

func _ready() -> void:
    owner_unit = get_parent() as CharacterBody3D
    navigation_agent = owner_unit.get_node_or_null("NavigationAgent3D")
    if navigation_agent != null:
        navigation_agent.path_desired_distance = 0.25
        navigation_agent.target_desired_distance = arrival_distance
        navigation_agent.avoidance_enabled = false

func configure(speed: float) -> void:
    base_speed = maxf(speed, 0.1)

func begin_move(target: Vector3, requested_stance: int, requested_facing: Vector3) -> void:
    destination = target
    stance = clampi(requested_stance, MovementStance.WALK, MovementStance.SPRINT)
    final_facing = requested_facing.normalized() if requested_facing.length_squared() > 0.001 else -owner_unit.global_basis.z
    moving = true
    if _can_use_navigation():
        navigation_agent.target_position = destination
    movement_started.emit(destination, stance)

func cancel_move() -> void:
    if not moving:
        return
    moving = false
    owner_unit.velocity = Vector3.ZERO
    movement_cancelled.emit()

func _physics_process(delta: float) -> void:
    if not moving or GameFlow.is_tactical_paused:
        owner_unit.velocity = Vector3.ZERO
        return
    var next_position := destination
    if _can_use_navigation() and not navigation_agent.is_navigation_finished():
        var candidate := navigation_agent.get_next_path_position()
        if candidate.is_finite():
            next_position = candidate
    var offset := next_position - owner_unit.global_position
    offset.y = 0.0
    if owner_unit.global_position.distance_to(destination) <= arrival_distance:
        _finish_move()
        return
    var direction := offset.normalized()
    var speed := _speed_for_stance()
    if owner_unit is TacticalUnit:
        speed *= (owner_unit as TacticalUnit).suppression_component.get_movement_multiplier()
    owner_unit.velocity = direction * speed
    owner_unit.move_and_slide()
    if direction.length_squared() > 0.001:
        var target_yaw := atan2(-direction.x, -direction.z)
        owner_unit.rotation.y = lerp_angle(owner_unit.rotation.y, target_yaw, minf(1.0, rotation_speed * delta))

func _finish_move() -> void:
    moving = false
    owner_unit.velocity = Vector3.ZERO
    var flat_facing := final_facing
    flat_facing.y = 0.0
    if flat_facing.length_squared() > 0.001:
        owner_unit.rotation.y = atan2(-flat_facing.x, -flat_facing.z)
    movement_finished.emit(destination)

func get_speed_for_stance(requested_stance: int) -> float:
    match clampi(requested_stance, MovementStance.WALK, MovementStance.SPRINT):
        MovementStance.WALK:
            return base_speed * 0.58
        MovementStance.SPRINT:
            return base_speed * 1.55
        _:
            return base_speed

func _speed_for_stance() -> float:
    match stance:
        MovementStance.WALK:
            return base_speed * 0.58
        MovementStance.SPRINT:
            return base_speed * 1.55
        _:
            return base_speed

func _can_use_navigation() -> bool:
    if navigation_agent == null or not navigation_agent.is_inside_tree():
        return false
    var navigation_map := navigation_agent.get_navigation_map()
    return navigation_map.is_valid() and NavigationServer3D.map_get_iteration_id(navigation_map) > 0

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/tactical/overwatch_command.gd =====
class_name OverwatchCommand
extends TacticalCommand

var direction: Vector3 = Vector3.FORWARD
var cone_degrees: float = 75.0
var minimum_range: float = 1.5
var maximum_range: float = 18.0
var duration: float = 12.0
var reaction_shots: int = 3

func _init(facing: Vector3 = Vector3.FORWARD, cone: float = 75.0, range_max: float = 18.0) -> void:
    direction = facing
    cone_degrees = cone
    maximum_range = range_max
    display_name = "Directional overwatch"
    issued_at = Time.get_ticks_msec() / 1000.0

func validate(context: Dictionary = {}) -> bool:
    if not super.validate(context):
        return false
    if not unit.combat_component.can_fire():
        failure_reason = "No weapon or ammunition available."
        return false
    if unit.suppression_component.state >= SuppressionComponent.SuppressionState.PINNED:
        failure_reason = "Pinned units cannot establish overwatch."
        return false
    return true

func begin(context: Dictionary = {}) -> void:
    super.begin(context)
    unit.overwatch_component.activate(direction, cone_degrees, minimum_range, maximum_range, duration, reaction_shots)

func update(_delta: float, _context: Dictionary = {}) -> bool:
    if not unit.overwatch_component.active:
        succeed()
        return true
    return false

func cancel(context: Dictionary = {}) -> void:
    super.cancel(context)
    if unit != null and is_instance_valid(unit):
        unit.overwatch_component.cancel_overwatch()

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/tactical/overwatch_component.gd =====
class_name OverwatchComponent
extends Node

signal overwatch_started(direction: Vector3, cone_degrees: float)
signal overwatch_triggered(target: TacticalUnit)
signal overwatch_ended

var owner_unit: TacticalUnit
var active: bool = false
var direction: Vector3 = Vector3.FORWARD
var cone_degrees: float = 75.0
var minimum_range: float = 1.5
var maximum_range: float = 18.0
var remaining_duration: float = 0.0
var remaining_shots: int = 0
var reaction_delay: float = 0.28
var scan_interval: float = 0.14
var _scan_timer: float = 0.0
var _reaction_timer: float = -1.0
var _pending_target: TacticalUnit

func _ready() -> void:
    owner_unit = get_parent() as TacticalUnit

func activate(facing: Vector3, cone: float, range_min: float, range_max: float, duration: float, shots: int) -> void:
    if owner_unit == null or not owner_unit.suppression_component.can_establish_overwatch():
        return
    direction = facing.normalized() if facing.length_squared() > 0.001 else -owner_unit.global_basis.z
    direction.y = 0.0
    direction = direction.normalized()
    cone_degrees = clampf(cone, 10.0, 180.0)
    minimum_range = maxf(range_min, 0.0)
    maximum_range = maxf(range_max, minimum_range + 0.1)
    remaining_duration = maxf(duration, 0.1)
    remaining_shots = maxi(shots, 1)
    active = true
    _scan_timer = 0.0
    _reaction_timer = -1.0
    _pending_target = null
    owner_unit.state_machine.change_state(&"overwatch")
    overwatch_started.emit(direction, cone_degrees)

func cancel_overwatch() -> void:
    if not active:
        return
    active = false
    _pending_target = null
    _reaction_timer = -1.0
    if owner_unit != null and owner_unit.state_machine.current_state == &"overwatch":
        owner_unit.state_machine.change_state(&"idle")
    overwatch_ended.emit()

func _process(delta: float) -> void:
    if not active or GameFlow.is_tactical_paused:
        return
    remaining_duration -= delta
    if remaining_duration <= 0.0 or remaining_shots <= 0 or not owner_unit.combat_component.can_fire():
        cancel_overwatch()
        return
    if owner_unit.suppression_component.state >= SuppressionComponent.SuppressionState.PINNED:
        cancel_overwatch()
        return
    if owner_unit.combat_component.is_busy():
        return
    if owner_unit.state_machine.current_state != &"overwatch":
        owner_unit.state_machine.change_state(&"overwatch")
    if _pending_target != null:
        _reaction_timer -= delta
        if _reaction_timer <= 0.0:
            _trigger_pending_target()
        return
    _scan_timer -= delta
    if _scan_timer > 0.0:
        return
    _scan_timer = scan_interval
    _pending_target = _find_trigger_target()
    if _pending_target != null:
        _reaction_timer = reaction_delay

func _find_trigger_target() -> TacticalUnit:
    var candidates := get_tree().get_nodes_in_group("enemy_units" if owner_unit.player_controlled else "player_units")
    var best: TacticalUnit
    var best_distance := INF
    var visibility := get_tree().get_first_node_in_group("visibility_managers") as VisibilityManager
    for node in candidates:
        var target := node as TacticalUnit
        if target == null or target.health_component.current_health <= 0.0:
            continue
        var offset := target.global_position - owner_unit.global_position
        offset.y = 0.0
        var distance := offset.length()
        if distance < minimum_range or distance > maximum_range:
            continue
        var angle := rad_to_deg(acos(clampf(direction.dot(offset.normalized()), -1.0, 1.0)))
        if angle > cone_degrees * 0.5:
            continue
        if visibility != null and not visibility.has_line_of_sight(owner_unit, target):
            continue
        if not target.movement_component.moving and target.combat_component.is_busy() == false:
            continue
        if distance < best_distance:
            best = target
            best_distance = distance
    return best

func _trigger_pending_target() -> void:
    var target := _pending_target
    _pending_target = null
    _reaction_timer = -1.0
    if target == null or not is_instance_valid(target):
        return
    if owner_unit.combat_component.begin_attack(target, &"aimed"):
        remaining_shots -= 1
        overwatch_triggered.emit(target)
        EventBus.overwatch_triggered.emit(owner_unit, target)

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/tactical/perception_component.gd =====
class_name PerceptionComponent
extends Node

signal visibility_changed(unit: TacticalUnit, is_visible: bool)
signal unit_spotted(unit: TacticalUnit)
signal unit_lost(unit: TacticalUnit)

@export var scan_interval: float = 0.24
var perception_range: float = 20.0
var visible_units: Array[TacticalUnit] = []
var known_positions: Dictionary = {}
var owner_unit: TacticalUnit
var _scan_timer: float = 0.0

func _ready() -> void:
    owner_unit = get_parent() as TacticalUnit

func configure(value: float) -> void:
    perception_range = maxf(value, 0.0)

func _process(delta: float) -> void:
    if GameFlow.is_tactical_paused or owner_unit == null:
        return
    _scan_timer -= delta
    if _scan_timer > 0.0:
        return
    _scan_timer = PerformanceManager.perception_interval(scan_interval)
    _scan()

func can_see(target: TacticalUnit) -> bool:
    if target == null or not is_instance_valid(target):
        return false
    var visibility := get_tree().get_first_node_in_group("visibility_managers") as VisibilityManager
    var effective_range := perception_range
    for node in get_tree().get_nodes_in_group("active_jammers"):
        if node.has_method("interference_at"):
            effective_range *= 1.0 - 0.32 * float(node.interference_at(owner_unit.global_position))
    if visibility != null:
        return visibility.can_see_unit(owner_unit, target, effective_range)
    return owner_unit.global_position.distance_to(target.global_position) <= effective_range

func has_known_position(target: TacticalUnit) -> bool:
    return target != null and known_positions.has(target.get_instance_id())

func get_last_known_position(target: TacticalUnit) -> Vector3:
    if target == null:
        return Vector3.ZERO
    return known_positions.get(target.get_instance_id(), owner_unit.global_position)

func _scan() -> void:
    var next_visible: Array[TacticalUnit] = []
    var group_name := "enemy_units" if owner_unit.player_controlled else "player_units"
    for node in get_tree().get_nodes_in_group(group_name):
        var target := node as TacticalUnit
        if target == null or target.health_component.current_health <= 0.0:
            continue
        if can_see(target):
            next_visible.append(target)
            known_positions[target.get_instance_id()] = target.global_position
            if not visible_units.has(target):
                unit_spotted.emit(target)
                visibility_changed.emit(target, true)
        elif visible_units.has(target):
            unit_lost.emit(target)
            visibility_changed.emit(target, false)
    visible_units = next_visible

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/tactical/player_unit_controller.gd =====
class_name PlayerUnitController
extends Node

var enabled: bool = true

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/tactical/reload_command.gd =====
class_name ReloadCommand
extends TacticalCommand

func _init() -> void:
    display_name = "Reload"
    issued_at = Time.get_ticks_msec() / 1000.0

func validate(context: Dictionary = {}) -> bool:
    if not super.validate(context):
        return false
    if unit.combat_component.weapon == null:
        failure_reason = "No weapon equipped."
        return false
    if unit.combat_component.ammunition >= unit.combat_component.weapon.magazine_size:
        failure_reason = "Magazine is already full."
        return false
    return true

func begin(context: Dictionary = {}) -> void:
    super.begin(context)
    unit.overwatch_component.cancel_overwatch()
    if not unit.combat_component.begin_reload():
        fail("Reload could not begin.")

func update(_delta: float, _context: Dictionary = {}) -> bool:
    if is_finished():
        return true
    if not unit.combat_component.is_busy():
        succeed()
        return true
    return false

func cancel(context: Dictionary = {}) -> void:
    super.cancel(context)
    if unit != null and is_instance_valid(unit):
        unit.combat_component.cancel_action()

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/tactical/selection_manager.gd =====
class_name SelectionManager
extends Node

signal changed(units: Array[TacticalUnit])

var selected_units: Array[TacticalUnit] = []

func _ready() -> void:
    add_to_group("selection_managers")

func clear() -> void:
    for unit in selected_units:
        if is_instance_valid(unit):
            unit.set_selected(false)
    selected_units.clear()
    _emit_changed()

func select_only(unit: TacticalUnit) -> void:
    clear()
    if unit != null:
        selected_units.append(unit)
        unit.set_selected(true)
    _emit_changed()

func add(unit: TacticalUnit) -> void:
    if unit == null or selected_units.has(unit):
        return
    selected_units.append(unit)
    unit.set_selected(true)
    _emit_changed()

func remove(unit: TacticalUnit) -> void:
    if not selected_units.has(unit):
        return
    selected_units.erase(unit)
    unit.set_selected(false)
    _emit_changed()

func toggle(unit: TacticalUnit) -> void:
    if selected_units.has(unit):
        remove(unit)
    else:
        add(unit)

func select_many(units: Array[TacticalUnit], additive: bool = false) -> void:
    if not additive:
        clear()
    for unit in units:
        add(unit)
    _emit_changed()

func average_position() -> Vector3:
    if selected_units.is_empty():
        return Vector3.ZERO
    var total := Vector3.ZERO
    var count := 0
    for unit in selected_units:
        if is_instance_valid(unit):
            total += unit.global_position
            count += 1
    return total / max(1, count)

func _emit_changed() -> void:
    selected_units = selected_units.filter(func(unit: TacticalUnit) -> bool: return is_instance_valid(unit))
    changed.emit(selected_units)
    EventBus.selection_changed.emit(selected_units)

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/tactical/status_effect_component.gd =====
class_name StatusEffectComponent
extends Node

var active_effects: Dictionary = {}

func add_effect(definition: StatusEffectDefinition, stacks: int = 1) -> void:
    if definition == null:
        return
    var existing: Dictionary = active_effects.get(definition.id, {"definition": definition, "stacks": 0, "remaining": 0.0})
    existing["stacks"] = mini(definition.maximum_stacks, int(existing["stacks"]) + stacks)
    existing["remaining"] = definition.duration_seconds
    active_effects[definition.id] = existing

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/tactical/suppress_command.gd =====
class_name SuppressCommand
extends TacticalCommand

var target_position: Vector3
var radius: float = 3.25
var fire_mode_id: StringName = &"suppressive"

func _init(position: Vector3 = Vector3.ZERO, area_radius: float = 3.25) -> void:
    target_position = position
    radius = area_radius
    display_name = "Suppress area"
    issued_at = Time.get_ticks_msec() / 1000.0

func validate(context: Dictionary = {}) -> bool:
    if not super.validate(context):
        return false
    if not target_position.is_finite():
        failure_reason = "Suppression target is invalid."
        return false
    if not unit.combat_component.can_use_fire_mode(fire_mode_id):
        failure_reason = "Suppressive fire is unavailable."
        return false
    return true

func begin(context: Dictionary = {}) -> void:
    super.begin(context)
    unit.overwatch_component.cancel_overwatch()
    if not unit.begin_suppression(target_position, radius):
        fail("Suppressive fire could not begin.")

func update(_delta: float, _context: Dictionary = {}) -> bool:
    if is_finished():
        return true
    if not unit.combat_component.is_busy():
        succeed()
        return true
    return false

func cancel(context: Dictionary = {}) -> void:
    super.cancel(context)
    if unit != null and is_instance_valid(unit):
        unit.combat_component.cancel_action()

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/tactical/suppression_component.gd =====
class_name SuppressionComponent
extends Node

enum SuppressionState { CALM, PRESSURED, SUPPRESSED, PINNED, BROKEN }

signal suppression_changed(value: float, state: SuppressionState)
signal state_changed(previous: SuppressionState, current: SuppressionState)

@export var passive_decay_per_second: float = 2.2
var resistance: float = 20.0
var suppression: float = 0.0
var state: SuppressionState = SuppressionState.CALM
var owner_unit: TacticalUnit

func _ready() -> void:
    owner_unit = get_parent() as TacticalUnit

func configure(value: float) -> void:
    resistance = maxf(value, 1.0)

func add_suppression(amount: float) -> void:
    suppression = maxf(0.0, suppression + amount)
    _update_state()

func clear_suppression(amount: float) -> void:
    suppression = maxf(0.0, suppression - amount)
    _update_state()

func _process(delta: float) -> void:
    if GameFlow.is_tactical_paused or suppression <= 0.0:
        return
    var decay := passive_decay_per_second
    if owner_unit != null and not owner_unit.movement_component.moving:
        decay *= 1.25
    clear_suppression(decay * delta)

func get_accuracy_multiplier() -> float:
    match state:
        SuppressionState.PRESSURED:
            return 0.88
        SuppressionState.SUPPRESSED:
            return 0.68
        SuppressionState.PINNED:
            return 0.42
        SuppressionState.BROKEN:
            return 0.24
        _:
            return 1.0

func get_movement_multiplier() -> float:
    match state:
        SuppressionState.SUPPRESSED:
            return 0.82
        SuppressionState.PINNED:
            return 0.46
        SuppressionState.BROKEN:
            return 0.62
        _:
            return 1.0

func can_establish_overwatch() -> bool:
    return state < SuppressionState.PINNED

func _update_state() -> void:
    var ratio := suppression / resistance
    var next_state := SuppressionState.CALM
    if ratio >= 3.0:
        next_state = SuppressionState.BROKEN
    elif ratio >= 2.0:
        next_state = SuppressionState.PINNED
    elif ratio >= 1.0:
        next_state = SuppressionState.SUPPRESSED
    elif ratio >= 0.4:
        next_state = SuppressionState.PRESSURED
    if next_state != state:
        var previous := state
        state = next_state
        state_changed.emit(previous, state)
        EventBus.suppression_state_changed.emit(owner_unit, state)
    suppression_changed.emit(suppression, state)

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/tactical/tactical_command.gd =====
class_name TacticalCommand
extends RefCounted

enum CommandState { QUEUED, READY, RUNNING, SUCCEEDED, FAILED, CANCELLED }

var unit: TacticalUnit
var issued_at: float = 0.0
var synchronization_group: StringName
var display_name: String = "Command"
var state: CommandState = CommandState.QUEUED
var failure_reason: String = ""
var release_delay: float = 0.0
var metadata: Dictionary = {}

func validate(_context: Dictionary = {}) -> bool:
    failure_reason = ""
    if unit == null or not is_instance_valid(unit):
        failure_reason = "Unit is unavailable."
        return false
    if unit.health_component != null and unit.health_component.current_health <= 0.0:
        failure_reason = "Unit is incapacitated."
        return false
    return true

func mark_ready() -> void:
    state = CommandState.READY

func begin(_context: Dictionary = {}) -> void:
    state = CommandState.RUNNING

func update(_delta: float, _context: Dictionary = {}) -> bool:
    succeed()
    return true

func succeed() -> void:
    if state != CommandState.CANCELLED and state != CommandState.FAILED:
        state = CommandState.SUCCEEDED

func fail(reason: String) -> void:
    failure_reason = reason
    state = CommandState.FAILED

func cancel(_context: Dictionary = {}) -> void:
    state = CommandState.CANCELLED

func is_finished() -> bool:
    return state in [CommandState.SUCCEEDED, CommandState.FAILED, CommandState.CANCELLED]

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/tactical/tactical_estimator.gd =====
class_name TacticalEstimator
extends RefCounted

static func estimate_attack(attacker: TacticalUnit, target: TacticalUnit, fire_mode_id: StringName) -> Dictionary:
    if attacker == null or target == null or attacker.combat_component == null:
        return {}
    var mode := attacker.combat_component.get_fire_mode(fire_mode_id)
    if mode == null or attacker.combat_component.weapon == null:
        return {}
    var weapon := attacker.combat_component.weapon
    var chance := attacker.combat_component.calculate_hit_chance(target, mode)
    var distance := attacker.global_position.distance_to(target.global_position)
    var expected_hits := chance * mode.projectile_count
    var expected_damage := expected_hits * weapon.damage
    var suppression := weapon.suppression_strength * mode.suppression_multiplier * mode.projectile_count
    var visibility := attacker.get_tree().get_first_node_in_group("visibility_managers") as VisibilityManager
    var cover_multiplier := 1.0
    var smoke_multiplier := 1.0
    var line_of_sight := true
    if visibility != null:
        cover_multiplier = visibility.get_cover_accuracy_multiplier(attacker, target)
        smoke_multiplier = visibility.get_smoke_visibility_factor(
            attacker.global_position + Vector3.UP,
            target.global_position + Vector3.UP
        )
        line_of_sight = visibility.has_line_of_sight(attacker, target)
    return {
        "action": String(fire_mode_id).replace("_", " ").capitalize(),
        "hit_chance": chance,
        "hit_percent": roundi(chance * 100.0),
        "expected_damage": expected_damage,
        "expected_hits": expected_hits,
        "suppression": suppression,
        "distance": distance,
        "range_state": _range_state(distance, weapon.optimal_range, weapon.maximum_range),
        "cover_multiplier": cover_multiplier,
        "smoke_multiplier": smoke_multiplier,
        "line_of_sight": line_of_sight,
        "ammo_cost": mode.ammunition_cost,
        "projectiles": mode.projectile_count,
        "confidence": confidence_label(chance),
    }

static func estimate_move(unit: TacticalUnit, destination: Vector3, stance: int) -> Dictionary:
    if unit == null:
        return {}
    var distance := unit.global_position.distance_to(destination)
    var speed := unit.movement_component.get_speed_for_stance(stance) if unit.movement_component != null else 1.0
    return {
        "action": "Move",
        "distance": distance,
        "seconds": distance / maxf(speed, 0.01),
        "stance": MovementComponent.MovementStance.keys()[clampi(stance, 0, 2)].capitalize(),
        "valid": unit.can_move_to(destination),
    }

static func estimate_area_suppression(attacker: TacticalUnit, position: Vector3, radius: float) -> Dictionary:
    if attacker == null or attacker.combat_component.weapon == null:
        return {}
    var affected := 0
    for node in attacker.get_tree().get_nodes_in_group("enemy_units" if attacker.player_controlled else "player_units"):
        var target := node as TacticalUnit
