        if target != null and target.global_position.distance_to(position) <= radius:
            affected += 1
    var mode := attacker.combat_component.get_fire_mode(&"suppressive")
    var amount := attacker.combat_component.weapon.suppression_strength
    if mode != null:
        amount *= mode.suppression_multiplier * mode.projectile_count
    return {
        "action": "Suppress Area",
        "radius": radius,
        "affected_units": affected,
        "suppression": amount,
        "ammo_cost": mode.ammunition_cost if mode != null else 0,
    }

static func confidence_label(chance: float) -> String:
    if chance >= 0.8:
        return "Excellent"
    if chance >= 0.62:
        return "Good"
    if chance >= 0.42:
        return "Risky"
    if chance >= 0.2:
        return "Poor"
    return "Blocked"

static func pure_hit_chance(
        base_accuracy: float,
        mode_multiplier: float,
        range_factor: float,
        suppression_factor: float,
        movement_factor: float,
        cover_factor: float,
        smoke_factor: float) -> float:
    return clampf(
        base_accuracy
        * mode_multiplier
        * range_factor
        * suppression_factor
        * movement_factor
        * cover_factor
        * smoke_factor,
        0.03,
        0.97
    )

static func _range_state(distance: float, optimal_range: float, maximum_range: float) -> String:
    if distance > maximum_range:
        return "Out of range"
    if distance <= optimal_range * 0.55:
        return "Close"
    if distance <= optimal_range:
        return "Optimal"
    return "Long"

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/tactical/tactical_hud.gd =====
class_name TacticalHUD
extends CanvasLayer

const ICON_ROOT := "res://assets/ui/icons/"

@onready var root: Node3D = get_parent()
@onready var input_controller: TacticalInputController = root.get_node("TacticalInputController")
@onready var selection_manager: SelectionManager = root.get_node("SelectionManager")

var interface_root: Control
var pause_label: Label
var selection_label: Label
var stance_label: Label
var sync_toggle: CheckButton
var mode_label: Label
var status_label: Label
var target_preview_label: Label
var queue_list: ItemList
var queue_title: Label
var squad_box: VBoxContainer
var selection_details: RichTextLabel
var objective_label: Label
var crisis_label: Label
var minimap: MinimapWidget
var notification_feed: NotificationFeed
var extract_button: Button
var _status_timer: float = 0.0
var _notification_text: String = ""
var _notification_until: float = 0.0
var _target_preview: Dictionary = {}
var _squad_buttons: Dictionary = {}

func _ready() -> void:
    layer = 40
    _hide_legacy_layout()
    _build_interface()
    selection_manager.changed.connect(_on_selection_changed)
    EventBus.tactical_pause_changed.connect(_on_pause_changed)
    EventBus.synchronization_disrupted.connect(_on_synchronization_disrupted)
    EventBus.overwatch_triggered.connect(_on_overwatch_triggered)
    EventBus.objective_changed.connect(_on_objective_changed)
    EventBus.crisis_started.connect(_on_crisis_started)
    EventBus.crisis_resolved.connect(_on_crisis_resolved)
    EventBus.mission_extraction_available.connect(_on_extraction_available)
    EventBus.shot_resolved.connect(_on_shot_resolved)
    EventBus.unit_died.connect(_on_unit_died)
    EventBus.interaction_performed.connect(_on_interaction_performed)
    input_controller.target_preview_changed.connect(set_target_preview)
    set_stance(input_controller.current_stance)
    set_action_mode(input_controller.action_mode)
    sync_toggle.button_pressed = input_controller.synchronized_group_movement
    _on_selection_changed(selection_manager.selected_units)
    _on_pause_changed(GameFlow.is_tactical_paused)
    _refresh_objectives()
    call_deferred("_hide_standalone_objective_hud")

func _process(delta: float) -> void:
    _status_timer -= delta
    if _status_timer <= 0.0:
        _status_timer = PerformanceManager.ui_refresh_interval()
        _refresh_selected_unit_status()
        _refresh_queue_panel()
        _refresh_squad_roster()
        _refresh_objectives()

func set_stance(value: int) -> void:
    var names := ["Walk", "Jog", "Sprint"]
    if stance_label != null:
        stance_label.text = "STANCE  %s" % names[clampi(value, 0, names.size() - 1)].to_upper()

func set_action_mode(value: int) -> void:
    if mode_label == null:
        return
    var names := ["Select / Move", "Aimed Fire", "Burst Fire", "Suppress Area", "Overwatch Cone", "Smoke", "EMP", "Interact", "Field Medkit"]
    mode_label.text = "MODE  %s" % names[clampi(value, 0, names.size() - 1)].to_upper()
    _target_preview.clear()
    _refresh_target_preview()

func set_interaction_action(action_id: StringName) -> void:
    if mode_label == null:
        return
    var label := "Context Auto" if action_id == &"" else String(action_id).replace("_", " ").capitalize()
    mode_label.text = "MODE  INTERACT — %s" % label.to_upper()

func set_target_preview(payload: Dictionary) -> void:
    _target_preview = payload.duplicate(true)
    _refresh_target_preview()

func _hide_legacy_layout() -> void:
    var top_bar := get_node_or_null("TopBar") as Control
    var command_bar := get_node_or_null("CommandBar") as Control
    if top_bar != null:
        top_bar.visible = false
    if command_bar != null:
        command_bar.visible = false

func _hide_standalone_objective_hud() -> void:
    var standalone := root.get_node_or_null("MissionObjectiveHUD") as CanvasLayer
    if standalone != null:
        standalone.visible = false

func _build_interface() -> void:
    interface_root = Control.new()
    interface_root.name = "ResponsiveInterface"
    interface_root.set_anchors_and_offsets_preset(Control.PRESET_FULL_RECT)
    interface_root.mouse_filter = Control.MOUSE_FILTER_IGNORE
    var interface_theme := Theme.new()
    interface_theme.default_font_size = maxi(11, roundi(14.0 * float(SettingsManager.get_value(&"ui_scale", 1.0))))
    interface_root.theme = interface_theme
    add_child(interface_root)
    _build_top_bar()
    _build_left_stack()
    _build_right_stack()
    _build_bottom_command_dock()

func _build_top_bar() -> void:
    var margin := MarginContainer.new()
    margin.set_anchors_preset(Control.PRESET_TOP_WIDE)
    margin.offset_left = 12.0
    margin.offset_top = 10.0
    margin.offset_right = -12.0
    margin.offset_bottom = 66.0
    margin.mouse_filter = Control.MOUSE_FILTER_IGNORE
    interface_root.add_child(margin)
    var panel := PanelContainer.new()
    panel.add_theme_stylebox_override("panel", _panel_style(Color(0.02, 0.04, 0.06, 0.96), Color(0.16, 0.55, 0.7, 0.95)))
    panel.mouse_filter = Control.MOUSE_FILTER_STOP
    margin.add_child(panel)
    var row := HBoxContainer.new()
    row.add_theme_constant_override("separation", 14)
    panel.add_child(row)
    selection_label = Label.new()
    selection_label.custom_minimum_size = Vector2(140, 0)
    selection_label.vertical_alignment = VERTICAL_ALIGNMENT_CENTER
    row.add_child(selection_label)
    var objective_box := VBoxContainer.new()
    objective_box.size_flags_horizontal = Control.SIZE_EXPAND_FILL
    row.add_child(objective_box)
    objective_label = Label.new()

    objective_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color(0.62, 0.93, 1.0, 1.0))
    objective_box.add_child(objective_label)
    crisis_label = Label.new()

    crisis_label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 12)
    crisis_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color(1.0, 0.75, 0.38, 1.0))
    crisis_label.visible = false
    objective_box.add_child(crisis_label)

    pause_label.vertical_alignment = VERTICAL_ALIGNMENT_CENTER

    row.add_child(return_button)

    mode_label = Label.new()
    mode_label.size_flags_horizontal = Control.SIZE_EXPAND_FILL
    mode_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color(0.65, 0.93, 1, 1))
    header.add_child(mode_label)
    stance_label = Label.new()
    stance_label.custom_minimum_size = Vector2(130, 0)
    header.add_child(stance_label)
    sync_toggle = CheckButton.new()
    sync_toggle.text = "SYNCHRONIZED"
    sync_toggle.tooltip_text = "Commands wait at a synchronization barrier before executing"
    sync_toggle.toggled.connect(input_controller.set_synchronized)
    header.add_child(sync_toggle)
    var action_row := HBoxContainer.new()
    action_row.alignment = BoxContainer.ALIGNMENT_CENTER
    action_row.add_theme_constant_override("separation", 6)
    content.add_child(action_row)
    _add_action_button(action_row, "AIMED\n[4]", "aimed", TacticalInputController.ActionMode.AIMED, "Accurate single shot")
    _add_action_button(action_row, "BURST\n[5]", "burst", TacticalInputController.ActionMode.BURST, "Multi-round attack")
    _add_action_button(action_row, "SUPPRESS\n[6]", "suppress", TacticalInputController.ActionMode.SUPPRESS, "Suppress a target area")
    _add_action_button(action_row, "OVERWATCH\n[7]", "overwatch", TacticalInputController.ActionMode.OVERWATCH, "Set a directional reaction cone")
    _add_action_button(action_row, "SMOKE\n[G]", "smoke", TacticalInputController.ActionMode.SMOKE, "Deploy smoke cover")
    _add_action_button(action_row, "EMP\n[H]", "emp", TacticalInputController.ActionMode.EMP, "Disable electronics and jammers")
    _add_action_button(action_row, "MEDKIT\n[M]", "medkit", TacticalInputController.ActionMode.MEDKIT, "Treat a nearby operator")
    var reload := _command_button("RELOAD\n[R]", "reload", "Reload selected weapons")
    reload.pressed.connect(input_controller.issue_reload_from_ui)
    action_row.add_child(reload)
    var pause := _command_button("PAUSE\n[SPACE]", "pause", "Toggle tactical pause")
    pause.pressed.connect(GameFlow.toggle_tactical_pause)
    action_row.add_child(pause)
    var secondary := HBoxContainer.new()
    secondary.alignment = BoxContainer.ALIGNMENT_CENTER
    secondary.add_theme_constant_override("separation", 6)
    content.add_child(secondary)
    var stance_text := Label.new()
    stance_text.text = "MOVEMENT"
    stance_text.custom_minimum_size = Vector2(76, 0)
    secondary.add_child(stance_text)
    _add_stance_button(secondary, "1 WALK", MovementComponent.MovementStance.WALK)
    _add_stance_button(secondary, "2 JOG", MovementComponent.MovementStance.JOG)
    _add_stance_button(secondary, "3 SPRINT", MovementComponent.MovementStance.SPRINT)
    secondary.add_child(VSeparator.new())
    var context_text := Label.new()
    context_text.text = "CONTEXT"
    context_text.custom_minimum_size = Vector2(68, 0)
    secondary.add_child(context_text)
    _add_interaction_button(secondary, "I AUTO", &"")
    _add_interaction_button(secondary, "O OPEN", &"toggle")
    _add_interaction_button(secondary, "K HACK", &"hack")
    _add_interaction_button(secondary, "B BREACH", &"breach")
    _add_interaction_button(secondary, "L LOCK", &"lock")
    target_preview_label = Label.new()
    target_preview_label.horizontal_alignment = HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_CENTER
    target_preview_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color(0.86, 0.92, 0.96, 1))
    content.add_child(target_preview_label)
    status_label = Label.new()
    status_label.horizontal_alignment = HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_CENTER
    status_label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 12)
    status_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color(0.58, 0.72, 0.8, 1))
    content.add_child(status_label)

func _on_selection_changed(units: Array[TacticalUnit]) -> void:
    selection_label.text = "SELECTED  %d" % units.size()
    _refresh_selected_unit_status()
    _refresh_queue_panel()
    _refresh_squad_roster()

func _refresh_selected_unit_status() -> void:
    if status_label == null or selection_details == null:
        return
    var now := Time.get_ticks_msec() / 1000.0
    if now < _notification_until:
        status_label.text = _notification_text
    elif selection_manager.selected_units.is_empty():
        status_label.text = "Select an operator, then right-click to move. Right-drag sets final facing."
    else:
        status_label.text = "Shift queues orders • F focuses selection • Esc cancels targeting • F10 opens developer tools"
    if selection_manager.selected_units.is_empty():
        selection_details.text = "[color=#8da0ad]No operator selected.[/color]\n\nSelect one or drag a box around multiple operators."
        return
    var unit := selection_manager.selected_units[0]
    var ammo := unit.combat_component.ammunition
    var maximum := unit.combat_component.weapon.magazine_size if unit.combat_component.weapon != null else 0
    var utility_id := unit.inventory_component.utility_item_id()
    var utility_text := "None"
    if utility_id != &"":
        utility_text = "%s × %d" % [
            String(utility_id).replace("_", " ").capitalize(),
            int(unit.inventory_component.items.get(String(utility_id), 0)),
        ]
    var health_ratio := unit.health_component.current_health / maxf(unit.health_component.maximum_health, 1.0)
    var weapon_name := unit.combat_component.weapon.display_name if unit.combat_component.weapon != null else "Unarmed"
    var ability_names: Array[String] = []
    for ability in unit.ability_component.abilities:
        if ability != null:
            ability_names.append(ability.display_name)
    var abilities_text := ", ".join(ability_names) if not ability_names.is_empty() else "None"
    selection_details.text = (
        "[font_size=16][b]%s[/b][/font_size]\n"
        + "%s  HP [b]%.0f / %.0f[/b]\n"
        + "⌖ %s  ▣ [b]%d / %d[/b]\n"
        + "◇ Utility [b]%s[/b]\n"
        + "△ Suppression [b]%s[/b] (%.0f)\n"
        + "◎ State [b]%s[/b]\n"
        + "✦ Abilities [b]%s[/b]"
    ) % [
        unit.definition.display_name if unit.definition != null else unit.name,
        _health_symbol(health_ratio),
        unit.health_component.current_health,
        unit.health_component.maximum_health,
        weapon_name,
        ammo,
        maximum,
        utility_text,
        SuppressionComponent.SuppressionState.keys()[unit.suppression_component.state].capitalize(),
        unit.suppression_component.suppression,
        String(unit.state_machine.current_state).capitalize(),
        abilities_text,
    ]

func _refresh_squad_roster() -> void:
    if squad_box == null:
        return
    var players: Array[TacticalUnit] = []
    for node in get_tree().get_nodes_in_group("player_units"):
        var unit := node as TacticalUnit
        if unit != null:
            players.append(unit)
    players.sort_custom(func(a: TacticalUnit, b: TacticalUnit) -> bool: return a.name < b.name)
    for unit in players:
        var key := unit.get_instance_id()
        var button := _squad_buttons.get(key) as Button
        if button == null:
            button = Button.new()
            button.alignment = HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_LEFT
            button.custom_minimum_size = Vector2(0, 34)
            button.pressed.connect(_select_squad_unit.bind(unit))
            squad_box.add_child(button)
            _squad_buttons[key] = button
        var ratio := unit.health_component.current_health / maxf(unit.health_component.maximum_health, 1.0)
        var selected_marker := "▶" if selection_manager.selected_units.has(unit) else " "
        var shortcut := "F%d" % (players.find(unit) + 1) if players.find(unit) < 3 else "--"
        button.text = "%s [%s] %s  %s  HP %.0f%%  %s" % [
            selected_marker,
            shortcut,
            _health_symbol(ratio),
            unit.definition.display_name if unit.definition != null else unit.name,
            ratio * 100.0,
            SuppressionComponent.SuppressionState.keys()[unit.suppression_component.state].substr(0, 3),
        ]
        button.disabled = unit.health_component.current_health <= 0.0

func _refresh_queue_panel() -> void:
    if queue_list == null:
        return
    queue_list.clear()
    if selection_manager.selected_units.is_empty():
        queue_title.text = "COMMAND QUEUE"
        return
    var unit := selection_manager.selected_units[0]
    queue_title.text = "COMMAND QUEUE — %s" % unit.name.to_upper()
    for description in unit.command_queue.get_command_descriptions():
        queue_list.add_item(description)
    if queue_list.item_count == 0:
        queue_list.add_item("— no queued orders —")
        queue_list.set_item_disabled(0, true)

func _refresh_objectives() -> void:
    if objective_label == null:
        return
    var runtime := get_tree().get_first_node_in_group("mission_runtime") as MissionRuntime
    if runtime == null:
        objective_label.text = "TRAINING PROTOTYPE — TEST TACTICAL SYSTEMS"
        crisis_label.visible = false
        extract_button.visible = false
        return
    var active: Array[String] = []
    for snapshot in runtime.get_objective_snapshot():
        if snapshot.hidden:
            continue
        if String(snapshot.state) == "active":
            active.append("◆ %s" % snapshot.name)
    objective_label.text = "   •   ".join(active) if not active.is_empty() else "OBJECTIVES RESOLVED — MOVE TO EXTRACTION"
    crisis_label.visible = runtime.crisis_active
    if runtime.crisis_active:
        crisis_label.text = "△ CRISIS WINDOW %.1fs — only one priority can be secured" % maxf(runtime.crisis_time_remaining, 0.0)
    extract_button.visible = runtime.extraction_available
    if runtime.extraction_available:
        var extraction := runtime.get_extraction_status()
        extract_button.text = "EXTRACT [X]  %d/%d" % [int(extraction.inside), int(extraction.required)]
        extract_button.disabled = not bool(extraction.ready)

func _refresh_target_preview() -> void:
    if target_preview_label == null:
        return
    if _target_preview.is_empty():
        target_preview_label.text = "Hover a destination, target, area, or interactable to inspect the action."
        return
    var action := String(_target_preview.get("action", "Action"))
    if _target_preview.has("hit_percent"):
        var los := "CLEAR" if bool(_target_preview.get("line_of_sight", true)) else "BLOCKED"
        if not bool(SettingsManager.get_value(&"show_tactical_numbers", true)):
            target_preview_label.text = "%s  |  %s  |  RANGE %s  |  LOS %s" % [
                action.to_upper(),
                String(_target_preview.get("confidence", "Unknown")).to_upper(),
                String(_target_preview.range_state).to_upper(),
                los,
            ]
            return
        target_preview_label.text = "%s  |  ◎ %d%% %s  |  Expected %.1f damage  |  △ %.1f suppression  |  %.1fm %s  |  LOS %s" % [
            action.to_upper(),
            int(_target_preview.hit_percent),
            String(_target_preview.get("confidence", "")),
            float(_target_preview.expected_damage),
            float(_target_preview.suppression),
            float(_target_preview.distance),
            String(_target_preview.range_state),
            los,
        ]
    elif action == "Move":
        target_preview_label.text = "MOVE  |  %.1fm  |  %.1fs  |  %s  |  %s" % [
            float(_target_preview.distance),
            float(_target_preview.seconds),
            String(_target_preview.stance).to_upper(),
            "VALID" if bool(_target_preview.valid) else "BLOCKED",
        ]
    elif action == "Suppress Area":
        target_preview_label.text = "SUPPRESS  |  Radius %.1fm  |  %d enemies in area  |  △ %.1f suppression  |  %d ammo" % [
            float(_target_preview.radius),
            int(_target_preview.affected_units),
            float(_target_preview.suppression),
            int(_target_preview.ammo_cost),
        ]
    elif _target_preview.has("actions"):
        target_preview_label.text = "CONTEXT  |  %s  |  Available: %s" % [
            String(_target_preview.get("target", "Interactable")),
            ", ".join(_target_preview.actions),
        ]
    else:
        target_preview_label.text = action.to_upper()

func _on_return_pressed() -> void:
    var runtime := get_tree().get_first_node_in_group("mission_runtime") as MissionRuntime
    if runtime != null:
        if not runtime.request_extraction():
            if runtime.extraction_available:
                var status := runtime.get_extraction_status()
                _show_notification("Move all surviving operators into extraction (%d/%d)." % [status.inside, status.required], 2.5, &"warning")
            else:
                _show_notification("Extraction unavailable. Complete the active crisis priority.", 2.5, &"warning")
    else:
        GameFlow.complete_tactical_mission({"status": "prototype_exit", "mission_id": "migration_training"})

func _on_pause_changed(value: bool) -> void:
    pause_label.text = "Ⅱ TACTICAL PAUSE" if value else "▶ LIVE"
    pause_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color(1.0, 0.78, 0.38, 1.0) if value else Color(0.42, 0.95, 0.68, 1.0))

func _on_synchronization_disrupted(_group_id: StringName, delay_seconds: float) -> void:
    _show_notification("JAMMED: synchronized command delayed %.1fs and staggered" % delay_seconds, 3.0, &"danger")

func _on_overwatch_triggered(shooter: TacticalUnit, target: TacticalUnit) -> void:
    _show_notification("%s overwatch triggered on %s" % [shooter.name, target.name], 2.5, &"combat")

func _on_objective_changed(objective_id: StringName, state: StringName) -> void:
    _show_notification("Objective %s: %s" % [String(objective_id).replace("_", " ").capitalize(), String(state).capitalize()], 3.5, &"objective")
    _refresh_objectives()

func _on_crisis_started(_id: StringName, _options: Array, _limit: float) -> void:
    _show_notification("Crisis active: choose one priority before time expires", 5.0, &"warning")
    _refresh_objectives()

func _on_crisis_resolved(_id: StringName, choice_id: StringName) -> void:
    _show_notification("Priority locked: %s" % String(choice_id).replace("_", " ").capitalize(), 5.0, &"success")
    _refresh_objectives()

func _on_extraction_available() -> void:
    _show_notification("Extraction available. Move every survivor into the zone.", 5.0, &"success")
    _refresh_objectives()

func _on_shot_resolved(shooter: TacticalUnit, target: TacticalUnit, hit: bool, damage: float, chance: float) -> void:
    _show_notification("%s → %s: %s (%.0f%%, %.0f dmg)" % [shooter.name, target.name, "HIT" if hit else "MISS", chance * 100.0, damage], 2.2, &"combat")

func _on_unit_died(unit: Node) -> void:
    _show_notification("%s is down" % unit.name, 5.0, &"danger")

func _on_interaction_performed(actor: TacticalUnit, target: Node, action_id: StringName) -> void:
    _show_notification("%s: %s → %s" % [actor.name, String(action_id).capitalize(), target.name], 2.5, &"info")

func _show_notification(text: String, duration: float, category: StringName = &"info") -> void:
    _notification_text = text
    _notification_until = Time.get_ticks_msec() / 1000.0 + duration
    if status_label != null:
        status_label.text = text
    if notification_feed != null:
        notification_feed.push_message(text, category, duration)

func _move_selected_queue_item(direction: int) -> void:
    var unit := _first_selected_unit()
    var selected := queue_list.get_selected_items()
    if unit == null or selected.is_empty():
        return
    var current_offset := 1 if unit.command_queue.current_command != null else 0
    var queue_index := selected[0] - current_offset
    if unit.command_queue.reorder_queued(queue_index, queue_index + direction):
        _refresh_queue_panel()
        if queue_list.item_count > 0:
            queue_list.select(clampi(selected[0] + direction, current_offset, queue_list.item_count - 1))

func _remove_selected_queue_item() -> void:
    var unit := _first_selected_unit()
    var selected := queue_list.get_selected_items()
    if unit == null or selected.is_empty():
        return
    if unit.command_queue.current_command != null and selected[0] == 0:
        unit.command_queue.cancel_current()
    else:
        var offset := 1 if unit.command_queue.current_command != null else 0
        unit.command_queue.remove_queued(selected[0] - offset)
    _refresh_queue_panel()

func _clear_selected_queue() -> void:
    var unit := _first_selected_unit()
    if unit != null:
        unit.command_queue.clear(true)
        _refresh_queue_panel()

func _first_selected_unit() -> TacticalUnit:
    return selection_manager.selected_units[0] if not selection_manager.selected_units.is_empty() else null

func _select_squad_unit(unit: TacticalUnit) -> void:
    if unit == null or not is_instance_valid(unit):
        return
    selection_manager.select_only(unit)
    var camera_rig := root.get_node_or_null("CameraRig") as TacticalCameraRig
    if camera_rig != null:
        camera_rig.global_position.x = unit.global_position.x
        camera_rig.global_position.z = unit.global_position.z

func _add_action_button(parent: Container, text: String, icon_name: String, mode: int, tooltip: String) -> void:
    var button := _command_button(text, icon_name, tooltip)
    button.pressed.connect(input_controller.set_action_mode.bind(mode))
    parent.add_child(button)

func _add_stance_button(parent: Container, text: String, stance: int) -> void:
    var button := Button.new()
    button.text = text
    button.tooltip_text = "Set movement stance to %s" % text.substr(2).capitalize()
    button.pressed.connect(input_controller.set_stance.bind(stance))
    parent.add_child(button)

func _add_interaction_button(parent: Container, text: String, action_id: StringName) -> void:
    var button := Button.new()
    button.text = text
    button.tooltip_text = "Use %s interaction" % ("context-sensitive" if action_id == &"" else String(action_id))
    button.pressed.connect(input_controller.set_interaction_action.bind(action_id))
    parent.add_child(button)

func _add_queue_button(parent: Container, text: String, callback: Callable, tooltip: String) -> void:
    var button := Button.new()
    button.text = text
    button.tooltip_text = tooltip
    button.size_flags_horizontal = Control.SIZE_EXPAND_FILL
    button.pressed.connect(callback)
    parent.add_child(button)

func _command_button(text: String, icon_name: String, tooltip: String) -> Button:
    var button := Button.new()
    button.text = text
    button.icon = _icon(icon_name)
    button.icon_max_width = 22
    button.tooltip_text = tooltip
    button.custom_minimum_size = Vector2(82, 50)
    return button

func _section_title(text: String) -> Label:
    var label := Label.new()
    label.text = text
    label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 13)
    label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color(0.55, 0.9, 1.0, 1.0))
    return label

func _icon(name: String) -> Texture2D:
    var path := ICON_ROOT + name + ".svg"
    return load(path) as Texture2D if ResourceLoader.exists(path) else null

func _panel_style(background: Color = Color(0.018, 0.032, 0.048, 0.94), border: Color = Color(0.13, 0.43, 0.57, 0.95)) -> StyleBoxFlat:
    if bool(SettingsManager.get_value(&"high_contrast_ui", false)):
        background = Color(0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.98)
        border = Color(0.92, 0.96, 1.0, 1.0)
    var style := StyleBoxFlat.new()
    style.bg_color = background
    style.border_width_left = 1
    style.border_width_top = 1
    style.border_width_right = 1
    style.border_width_bottom = 1
    style.border_color = border
    style.corner_radius_top_left = 8
    style.corner_radius_top_right = 8
    style.corner_radius_bottom_left = 8
    style.corner_radius_bottom_right = 8
    style.content_margin_left = 10.0
    style.content_margin_top = 8.0
    style.content_margin_right = 10.0
    style.content_margin_bottom = 8.0
    return style

func _health_symbol(ratio: float) -> String:
    if ratio <= 0.0:
        return "✕"
    if ratio < 0.35:
        return "▱"
    if ratio < 0.7:
        return "◒"
    return "●"

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/tactical/tactical_input_controller.gd =====
class_name TacticalInputController
extends Node

signal target_preview_changed(payload: Dictionary)

enum ActionMode { SELECT_MOVE, AIMED, BURST, SUPPRESS, OVERWATCH, SMOKE, EMP, INTERACT, MEDKIT }

@export var drag_threshold: float = 8.0
@export var unit_collision_mask: int = 2
@export var ground_collision_mask: int = 1
@export var interaction_collision_mask: int = 4

@onready var tactical_root: Node3D = get_parent()
@onready var camera_rig: TacticalCameraRig = tactical_root.get_node("CameraRig")
@onready var camera: Camera3D = camera_rig.get_node("Camera3D")
@onready var selection_manager: SelectionManager = tactical_root.get_node("SelectionManager")
@onready var command_coordinator: CommandCoordinator = tactical_root.get_node("CommandCoordinator")
@onready var drag_rectangle: ColorRect = tactical_root.get_node("HUD/DragSelection")
@onready var preview_marker: MeshInstance3D = tactical_root.get_node("MovementPreview/TargetMarker")
@onready var facing_marker: MeshInstance3D = tactical_root.get_node("MovementPreview/FacingMarker")
@onready var preview_lines: MeshInstance3D = tactical_root.get_node("MovementPreview/PreviewLines")

var left_drag_start := Vector2.ZERO
var left_dragging: bool = false
var right_target := Vector3.ZERO
var right_target_valid: bool = false
var right_dragging: bool = false
var current_stance: MovementComponent.MovementStance = MovementComponent.MovementStance.JOG
var synchronized_group_movement: bool = true
var action_mode: ActionMode = ActionMode.SELECT_MOVE
var interaction_action: StringName = &""
var _last_preview_hash: int = -1

func _ready() -> void:
    camera_rig.selection_manager = selection_manager
    drag_rectangle.visible = false
    preview_marker.visible = false
    facing_marker.visible = false
    preview_lines.visible = false
    selection_manager.changed.connect(_on_selection_changed)

func _process(_delta: float) -> void:
    _update_hover_preview()

func _unhandled_input(event: InputEvent) -> void:
    if DialogueManager.active_dialogue != null or DeveloperTools.is_open():
        return
    if event.is_action_pressed("tactical_pause"):
        GameFlow.toggle_tactical_pause()
        get_viewport().set_input_as_handled()
        return
    if event.is_action_pressed("cancel_action"):
        set_action_mode(ActionMode.SELECT_MOVE)
        get_viewport().set_input_as_handled()
        return
    if event.is_action_pressed("stance_walk"):
        set_stance(MovementComponent.MovementStance.WALK)
    elif event.is_action_pressed("stance_jog"):
        set_stance(MovementComponent.MovementStance.JOG)
    elif event.is_action_pressed("stance_sprint"):
        set_stance(MovementComponent.MovementStance.SPRINT)
    elif event.is_action_pressed("action_aimed"):
        set_action_mode(ActionMode.AIMED)
    elif event.is_action_pressed("action_burst"):
        set_action_mode(ActionMode.BURST)
    elif event.is_action_pressed("action_suppress"):
        set_action_mode(ActionMode.SUPPRESS)
    elif event.is_action_pressed("action_overwatch"):
        set_action_mode(ActionMode.OVERWATCH)
    elif event.is_action_pressed("action_smoke"):
        set_action_mode(ActionMode.SMOKE)
    elif event.is_action_pressed("action_emp"):
        set_action_mode(ActionMode.EMP)
    elif event.is_action_pressed("action_interact"):
        set_interaction_action(&"")
    elif event.is_action_pressed("action_medkit"):
        set_action_mode(ActionMode.MEDKIT)
    elif event.is_action_pressed("door_toggle"):
        set_interaction_action(&"toggle")
    elif event.is_action_pressed("door_hack"):
        set_interaction_action(&"hack")
    elif event.is_action_pressed("door_breach"):
        set_interaction_action(&"breach")
    elif event.is_action_pressed("door_lock"):
        set_interaction_action(&"lock")
    elif event.is_action_pressed("reload_weapon"):
        _issue_reload(Input.is_action_pressed("queue_command") or GameFlow.is_tactical_paused)
    elif event.is_action_pressed("select_squad_1"):
        _select_player_index(0)
    elif event.is_action_pressed("select_squad_2"):
        _select_player_index(1)
    elif event.is_action_pressed("select_squad_3"):
        _select_player_index(2)
    if event is InputEventMouseButton:
        _handle_mouse_button(event)
    elif event is InputEventMouseMotion:
        _handle_mouse_motion(event)

func _select_player_index(index: int) -> void:
    var players: Array[TacticalUnit] = []
    for node in get_tree().get_nodes_in_group("player_units"):
        if node is TacticalUnit:
            players.append(node as TacticalUnit)
    players.sort_custom(func(a: TacticalUnit, b: TacticalUnit) -> bool: return a.name < b.name)
    if index >= 0 and index < players.size():
        selection_manager.select_only(players[index])
        camera_rig.global_position.x = players[index].global_position.x
        camera_rig.global_position.z = players[index].global_position.z

func set_stance(value: int) -> void:
    current_stance = clampi(value, MovementComponent.MovementStance.WALK, MovementComponent.MovementStance.SPRINT)
    var hud := tactical_root.get_node_or_null("HUD")
    if hud != null and hud.has_method("set_stance"):
        hud.set_stance(current_stance)

func set_synchronized(value: bool) -> void:
    synchronized_group_movement = value

func set_interaction_action(action_id: StringName) -> void:
    interaction_action = action_id
    set_action_mode(ActionMode.INTERACT)
    var hud := tactical_root.get_node_or_null("HUD")
    if hud != null and hud.has_method("set_interaction_action"):
        hud.set_interaction_action(action_id)

func set_action_mode(value: ActionMode) -> void:
    action_mode = value
    left_dragging = false
    drag_rectangle.visible = false
    var hud := tactical_root.get_node_or_null("HUD")
    if hud != null and hud.has_method("set_action_mode"):
        hud.set_action_mode(action_mode)


func issue_reload_from_ui() -> void:
    _issue_reload(GameFlow.is_tactical_paused)

func _issue_reload(append: bool) -> void:
    for unit in selection_manager.selected_units:
        unit.enqueue_reload(append)

func _handle_mouse_button(event: InputEventMouseButton) -> void:
    if event.button_index == MOUSE_BUTTON_LEFT:
        if action_mode != ActionMode.SELECT_MOVE:
            if not event.pressed:
                _execute_action_at(event.position, event.shift_pressed or GameFlow.is_tactical_paused)
                get_viewport().set_input_as_handled()
            return
        if event.pressed:
            left_drag_start = event.position
            left_dragging = true
            _update_drag_rectangle(event.position)
        elif left_dragging:
            left_dragging = false
            drag_rectangle.visible = false
            if left_drag_start.distance_to(event.position) >= drag_threshold:
                _finish_box_selection(left_drag_start, event.position, event.shift_pressed)
            else:
                _select_at_point(event.position, event.shift_pressed)
            get_viewport().set_input_as_handled()
    elif event.button_index == MOUSE_BUTTON_RIGHT:
        if action_mode != ActionMode.SELECT_MOVE:
            set_action_mode(ActionMode.SELECT_MOVE)
            get_viewport().set_input_as_handled()
            return
        if event.pressed:
            var ground_hit := _raycast_ground(event.position)
            right_target_valid = not ground_hit.is_empty()
            if right_target_valid:
                right_target = ground_hit.position
                right_dragging = true
        elif right_dragging:
            right_dragging = false
            var facing := _calculate_facing(event.position)
            _issue_move(right_target, facing, event.shift_pressed or GameFlow.is_tactical_paused)
            get_viewport().set_input_as_handled()

func _handle_mouse_motion(event: InputEventMouseMotion) -> void:
    if left_dragging:
        _update_drag_rectangle(event.position)
    if right_dragging and right_target_valid:
        _update_facing_preview(event.position)

func _execute_action_at(screen_position: Vector2, append: bool) -> void:
    if selection_manager.selected_units.is_empty():
        set_action_mode(ActionMode.SELECT_MOVE)
        return
    match action_mode:
        ActionMode.AIMED, ActionMode.BURST:
            var hit := _raycast(screen_position, unit_collision_mask)
            var target := _find_unit_ancestor(hit.get("collider")) if not hit.is_empty() else null
            if target != null and not target.player_controlled and target.detected_by_player:
                command_coordinator.issue_group_attack(selection_manager.selected_units, target, &"aimed" if action_mode == ActionMode.AIMED else &"burst", append, synchronized_group_movement)
        ActionMode.SUPPRESS:
            var hit := _raycast_ground(screen_position)
            if not hit.is_empty():
                _issue_group_suppression(hit.position, append)
        ActionMode.OVERWATCH:
            var hit := _raycast_ground(screen_position)
            if not hit.is_empty():
                var direction := hit.position - selection_manager.average_position()
                _issue_group_overwatch(direction, append)
        ActionMode.SMOKE, ActionMode.EMP:
            var hit := _raycast_ground(screen_position)
            if not hit.is_empty():
                selection_manager.selected_units[0].enqueue_gadget(&"smoke" if action_mode == ActionMode.SMOKE else &"emp", hit.position, append)
        ActionMode.INTERACT:
            var hit := _raycast(screen_position, interaction_collision_mask)
            var interactable := _find_interactable_ancestor(hit.get("collider")) if not hit.is_empty() else null
            if interactable != null:
                var actions: Array = interactable.get_available_actions(selection_manager.selected_units[0]) if interactable.has_method("get_available_actions") else []
                var resolved_action := _resolve_interaction_action(actions)
                if resolved_action != &"":
                    selection_manager.selected_units[0].enqueue_interaction(interactable, resolved_action, append)
        ActionMode.MEDKIT:
            var hit := _raycast(screen_position, unit_collision_mask)
            var target := _find_unit_ancestor(hit.get("collider")) if not hit.is_empty() else null
            if target != null and target.player_controlled:
                selection_manager.selected_units[0].enqueue_heal(target, append)
        _:
            pass
    if not append:
        set_action_mode(ActionMode.SELECT_MOVE)

func _issue_group_suppression(target: Vector3, append: bool) -> void:
    var units := selection_manager.selected_units
    var group_id := command_coordinator.create_group(units.size(), "Synchronized suppression") if synchronized_group_movement else &""
    var issued := 0
    for unit in units:
        if unit.enqueue_suppression(target, 3.25, append, group_id):
            issued += 1
    if group_id != &"":
        command_coordinator.set_expected_count(group_id, issued)

func _issue_group_overwatch(direction: Vector3, append: bool) -> void:
    var units := selection_manager.selected_units
    var group_id := command_coordinator.create_group(units.size(), "Synchronized overwatch") if synchronized_group_movement else &""
    var issued := 0
    for unit in units:
        if unit.enqueue_overwatch(direction, append, group_id):
            issued += 1
    if group_id != &"":
        command_coordinator.set_expected_count(group_id, issued)

func _select_at_point(screen_position: Vector2, additive: bool) -> void:
    var hit := _raycast(screen_position, unit_collision_mask)
    if hit.is_empty():
        if not additive:
            selection_manager.clear()
        return
    var unit := _find_unit_ancestor(hit.collider)
    if unit == null or not unit.player_controlled:
        if not additive:
            selection_manager.clear()
        return
    if additive:
        selection_manager.toggle(unit)
    else:
        selection_manager.select_only(unit)

func _finish_box_selection(start: Vector2, finish: Vector2, additive: bool) -> void:
    var selection_rect := Rect2(start, finish - start).abs()
    var matches: Array[TacticalUnit] = []
    for node in get_tree().get_nodes_in_group("player_units"):
        var unit := node as TacticalUnit
        if unit == null or not _is_in_front_of_camera(unit.global_position):
            continue
        var screen_position := camera.unproject_position(unit.global_position + Vector3.UP)
        if selection_rect.has_point(screen_position):
            matches.append(unit)
    selection_manager.select_many(matches, additive)

func _issue_move(target: Vector3, facing: Vector3, append: bool) -> void:
    if selection_manager.selected_units.is_empty() or not right_target_valid:
        return
    command_coordinator.issue_group_move(selection_manager.selected_units, target, current_stance, facing, append, synchronized_group_movement, camera.global_basis)

func _calculate_facing(screen_position: Vector2) -> Vector3:
    var hit := _raycast_ground(screen_position)
    if not hit.is_empty():
        var direction: Vector3 = hit.position - right_target
        direction.y = 0.0
        if direction.length() > 0.35:
            return direction.normalized()
    if not selection_manager.selected_units.is_empty():
        return -selection_manager.selected_units[0].global_basis.z
    return Vector3.FORWARD

func _update_hover_preview() -> void:
    if selection_manager.selected_units.is_empty():
        preview_marker.visible = false
        facing_marker.visible = false
        preview_lines.visible = false
        _emit_target_preview({})
        return
    var mouse_position := get_viewport().get_mouse_position()
    var point := right_target if right_dragging else Vector3.ZERO
    var valid := right_target_valid if right_dragging else false
    if not right_dragging:
        var hit := _raycast_ground(mouse_position)
        valid = not hit.is_empty()
        if valid:
            point = hit.position
    preview_marker.visible = valid
    preview_lines.visible = valid
    if not valid:
        facing_marker.visible = false
        _emit_context_preview(mouse_position, Vector3.ZERO, false)
        return
    preview_marker.global_position = point + Vector3.UP * 0.035
    _draw_preview_geometry(point)
    _emit_context_preview(mouse_position, point, true)


func _emit_context_preview(screen_position: Vector2, ground_point: Vector3, ground_valid: bool) -> void:
    var payload: Dictionary = {}
    var unit := selection_manager.selected_units[0] if not selection_manager.selected_units.is_empty() else null
    match action_mode:
        ActionMode.AIMED, ActionMode.BURST:
            var hit := _raycast(screen_position, unit_collision_mask)
            var target := _find_unit_ancestor(hit.get("collider")) if not hit.is_empty() else null
            if target != null and not target.player_controlled and target.detected_by_player:
                payload = TacticalEstimator.estimate_attack(unit, target, &"aimed" if action_mode == ActionMode.AIMED else &"burst")
                payload["target"] = target.name
        ActionMode.SUPPRESS:
            if ground_valid:
                payload = TacticalEstimator.estimate_area_suppression(unit, ground_point, 3.25)
        ActionMode.OVERWATCH:
            if ground_valid:
                payload = {"action": "Overwatch Cone", "distance": selection_manager.average_position().distance_to(ground_point)}
        ActionMode.SMOKE:
            if ground_valid:
                payload = {"action": "Deploy Smoke", "radius": 3.5, "distance": unit.global_position.distance_to(ground_point)}
        ActionMode.EMP:
            if ground_valid:
                payload = {"action": "Deploy EMP", "radius": 4.0, "distance": unit.global_position.distance_to(ground_point)}
        ActionMode.INTERACT:
            var hit := _raycast(screen_position, interaction_collision_mask)
            var interactable := _find_interactable_ancestor(hit.get("collider")) if not hit.is_empty() else null
            if interactable != null:
                var actions: Array = interactable.get_available_actions(unit) if interactable.has_method("get_available_actions") else []
                var action_names: Array[String] = []
                for action in actions:
                    action_names.append(String(action).replace("_", " ").capitalize())
                payload = {"action": "Interact", "target": interactable.name, "actions": action_names}
        ActionMode.MEDKIT:
            var hit := _raycast(screen_position, unit_collision_mask)
            var target := _find_unit_ancestor(hit.get("collider")) if not hit.is_empty() else null
            if target != null and target.player_controlled:
                payload = {
                    "action": "Field Medkit",
                    "target": target.name,
                    "missing_health": target.health_component.maximum_health - target.health_component.current_health,
                }
        _:
            if ground_valid:
                payload = TacticalEstimator.estimate_move(unit, ground_point, current_stance)
    _emit_target_preview(payload)

func _emit_target_preview(payload: Dictionary) -> void:
    var payload_hash := hash(payload)
    if payload_hash == _last_preview_hash:
        return
    _last_preview_hash = payload_hash
    target_preview_changed.emit(payload)

func _update_facing_preview(screen_position: Vector2) -> void:
    var facing := _calculate_facing(screen_position)
    facing_marker.visible = true
    facing_marker.global_position = right_target + facing * 0.7 + Vector3.UP * 0.08
    facing_marker.rotation.y = atan2(-facing.x, -facing.z)

func _draw_preview_geometry(target: Vector3) -> void:
    var mesh := preview_lines.mesh as ImmediateMesh
    mesh.clear_surfaces()
    mesh.surface_begin(Mesh.PRIMITIVE_LINES)
    match action_mode:
        ActionMode.OVERWATCH:
            _add_overwatch_cone(mesh, selection_manager.average_position(), target)
        ActionMode.SUPPRESS:
            _add_circle(mesh, target, 3.25)
        ActionMode.SMOKE:
            _add_circle(mesh, target, 3.5)
        ActionMode.EMP:
            _add_circle(mesh, target, 4.0)
        _:
            for unit in selection_manager.selected_units:
                mesh.surface_add_vertex(unit.global_position + Vector3.UP * 0.08)
                mesh.surface_add_vertex(target + Vector3.UP * 0.08)
    mesh.surface_end()

func _add_circle(mesh: ImmediateMesh, center: Vector3, radius: float) -> void:
    var segments := 32
    for index in segments:
        var a := TAU * float(index) / float(segments)
        var b := TAU * float(index + 1) / float(segments)
        mesh.surface_add_vertex(center + Vector3(cos(a) * radius, 0.08, sin(a) * radius))
        mesh.surface_add_vertex(center + Vector3(cos(b) * radius, 0.08, sin(b) * radius))

func _add_overwatch_cone(mesh: ImmediateMesh, origin: Vector3, target: Vector3) -> void:
    var direction := target - origin
    direction.y = 0.0
    if direction.length_squared() < 0.001:
        direction = Vector3.FORWARD
    direction = direction.normalized()
    var range_max := 18.0
    if not selection_manager.selected_units.is_empty():
        var weapon := selection_manager.selected_units[0].combat_component.weapon
        if weapon != null:
            range_max = weapon.maximum_range
    var half_angle := deg_to_rad(37.5)
    var left := direction.rotated(Vector3.UP, half_angle)
    var right := direction.rotated(Vector3.UP, -half_angle)
    mesh.surface_add_vertex(origin + Vector3.UP * 0.08)
    mesh.surface_add_vertex(origin + left * range_max + Vector3.UP * 0.08)
    mesh.surface_add_vertex(origin + Vector3.UP * 0.08)
    mesh.surface_add_vertex(origin + right * range_max + Vector3.UP * 0.08)
    var segments := 18
    for index in segments:
        var angle_a := lerpf(-half_angle, half_angle, float(index) / float(segments))
        var angle_b := lerpf(-half_angle, half_angle, float(index + 1) / float(segments))
        mesh.surface_add_vertex(origin + direction.rotated(Vector3.UP, angle_a) * range_max + Vector3.UP * 0.08)
        mesh.surface_add_vertex(origin + direction.rotated(Vector3.UP, angle_b) * range_max + Vector3.UP * 0.08)

func _resolve_interaction_action(actions: Array) -> StringName:
    var result: StringName = &""
    if actions.is_empty():
        return result
    if interaction_action == &"":
        result = actions[0]
    elif interaction_action == &"toggle":
        if actions.has(&"open"):
            result = &"open"
        elif actions.has(&"close"):
            result = &"close"
    elif interaction_action == &"hack":
        if actions.has(&"hack"):
            result = &"hack"
        elif actions.has(&"unlock"):
            result = &"unlock"
    elif actions.has(interaction_action):
        result = interaction_action
    return result

func _raycast(screen_position: Vector2, collision_mask: int) -> Dictionary:
    var origin := camera.project_ray_origin(screen_position)
    var direction := camera.project_ray_normal(screen_position)
    var query := PhysicsRayQueryParameters3D.create(origin, origin + direction * 500.0, collision_mask)
    query.collide_with_areas = true
    query.collide_with_bodies = true
    return tactical_root.get_world_3d().direct_space_state.intersect_ray(query)

func _raycast_ground(screen_position: Vector2) -> Dictionary:
    return _raycast(screen_position, ground_collision_mask)

func _find_unit_ancestor(node: Variant) -> TacticalUnit:
    var current := node as Node
    while current != null:
        if current is TacticalUnit:
            return current as TacticalUnit
        current = current.get_parent()
    return null

func _find_interactable_ancestor(node: Variant) -> Node:
    var current := node as Node
    while current != null:
        if current.has_method("get_available_actions") and current.has_method("perform_interaction"):
            return current
        current = current.get_parent()
    return null

func _update_drag_rectangle(current_position: Vector2) -> void:
    var rectangle := Rect2(left_drag_start, current_position - left_drag_start).abs()
    drag_rectangle.position = rectangle.position
    drag_rectangle.size = rectangle.size
    drag_rectangle.visible = rectangle.size.length() >= drag_threshold

func _is_in_front_of_camera(world_position: Vector3) -> bool:
    var local_position := camera.to_local(world_position)
    if local_position.z >= 0.0:
        return false
    var screen_position := camera.unproject_position(world_position)
    return get_viewport().get_visible_rect().grow(32.0).has_point(screen_position)

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/tactical/tactical_unit.gd =====
class_name TacticalUnit
extends CharacterBody3D

signal selection_changed(is_selected: bool)
signal definition_applied(definition: UnitDefinition)
signal detection_changed(is_detected: bool)

@export var definition: UnitDefinition
@export var unit_id: StringName
@export var player_controlled: bool = true

@onready var navigation_agent: NavigationAgent3D = $NavigationAgent3D
@onready var visual_root: Node3D = $VisualRoot
@onready var body_mesh: MeshInstance3D = $VisualRoot/BodyMesh
@onready var visual_controller: UnitVisualController = $UnitVisualController
@onready var selection_marker: MeshInstance3D = $SelectionMarker
@onready var facing_indicator: MeshInstance3D = $FacingIndicator
@onready var health_component: HealthComponent = $HealthComponent
@onready var movement_component: MovementComponent = $MovementComponent
@onready var combat_component: CombatComponent = $CombatComponent
@onready var perception_component: PerceptionComponent = $PerceptionComponent
@onready var suppression_component: SuppressionComponent = $SuppressionComponent
@onready var inventory_component: InventoryComponent = $InventoryComponent
@onready var ability_component: AbilityComponent = $AbilityComponent
@onready var status_effect_component: StatusEffectComponent = $StatusEffectComponent
@onready var state_machine: UnitStateMachine = $StateMachine
@onready var command_queue: CommandQueue = $CommandQueue
@onready var overwatch_component: OverwatchComponent = $OverwatchComponent
@onready var ai_controller: AIUnitController = $AIUnitController
@onready var jammer_component: JammerComponent = $JammerComponent

var selected: bool = false
var detected_by_player: bool = true

func _ready() -> void:
    add_to_group("tactical_units")
    if player_controlled:
        add_to_group("player_units")
    else:
        add_to_group("enemy_units")
    selection_marker.visible = false
    facing_indicator.visible = false
    apply_definition(definition)
    movement_component.movement_started.connect(_on_movement_started)
    movement_component.movement_finished.connect(_on_movement_finished)
    health_component.died.connect(_on_died)
    ai_controller.configure_for_unit()
    jammer_component.configure_for_definition(definition)
    if not player_controlled:
        set_detected(false)

func apply_definition(value: UnitDefinition) -> void:
    if value == null:
        return
    definition = value
    if unit_id == &"":
        unit_id = definition.id
    health_component.configure(definition.maximum_health)
    movement_component.configure(definition.base_move_speed)
    combat_component.configure(definition.starting_weapon)
    perception_component.configure(definition.perception_range)
    suppression_component.configure(definition.suppression_resistance)
    ability_component.configure(definition.abilities)
    var strategic_loadout := {}
    if player_controlled and not GameFlow.campaign_state.is_empty():
        strategic_loadout = StrategicSystem.get_loadout(definition.id, GameFlow.campaign_state)
    inventory_component.configure(definition.starting_equipment, strategic_loadout)
    _apply_visual_definition()
    if is_node_ready():
        ai_controller.configure_for_unit()
        jammer_component.configure_for_definition(definition)
    definition_applied.emit(definition)

func _apply_visual_definition() -> void:
    if definition == null:
        return
    if visual_controller != null:
        visual_controller.apply_definition(definition)
    elif body_mesh != null:
        var material := StandardMaterial3D.new()
        material.albedo_color = definition.tactical_color
        material.roughness = 0.75
        body_mesh.material_override = material

func set_selected(value: bool) -> void:
    if selected == value:
        return
    selected = value
    selection_marker.visible = selected
    facing_indicator.visible = selected
    selection_changed.emit(selected)

func set_detected(value: bool) -> void:
    if player_controlled:
        value = true
    if detected_by_player == value:
        return
    detected_by_player = value
    visual_root.visible = value
    detection_changed.emit(value)

func can_move_to(target: Vector3) -> bool:
    return target.is_finite() and not is_queued_for_deletion() and suppression_component.state != SuppressionComponent.SuppressionState.BROKEN

func begin_move(target: Vector3, stance: int, final_facing: Vector3) -> void:
    overwatch_component.cancel_overwatch()
    combat_component.cancel_action()
    movement_component.begin_move(target, stance, final_facing)

func cancel_move() -> void:
    movement_component.cancel_move()

func is_moving() -> bool:
    return movement_component.moving

func begin_attack(target: TacticalUnit, fire_mode_id: StringName) -> bool:
    movement_component.cancel_move()
    return combat_component.begin_attack(target, fire_mode_id)

func begin_suppression(position: Vector3, radius: float) -> bool:
    movement_component.cancel_move()
    return combat_component.begin_suppression(position, radius)

func enqueue_move(target: Vector3, stance: int, final_facing: Vector3, append: bool, synchronization_group: StringName = &"") -> bool:
    var command := MoveCommand.new(target, stance, final_facing)
    command.synchronization_group = synchronization_group
    return command_queue.enqueue(command, append)

func enqueue_attack(target: TacticalUnit, fire_mode_id: StringName, append: bool, synchronization_group: StringName = &"") -> bool:
    var command := AttackCommand.new(target, fire_mode_id)
    command.synchronization_group = synchronization_group
    return command_queue.enqueue(command, append)

func enqueue_suppression(position: Vector3, radius: float, append: bool, synchronization_group: StringName = &"") -> bool:
    var command := SuppressCommand.new(position, radius)
    command.synchronization_group = synchronization_group
    return command_queue.enqueue(command, append)

func enqueue_overwatch(direction: Vector3, append: bool, synchronization_group: StringName = &"") -> bool:
    var command := OverwatchCommand.new(direction, 75.0, combat_component.weapon.maximum_range if combat_component.weapon != null else 18.0)
    command.synchronization_group = synchronization_group
    return command_queue.enqueue(command, append)

func enqueue_interaction(target: Node, action_id: StringName, append: bool, synchronization_group: StringName = &"") -> bool:
    var command: TacticalCommand
    if target is TacticalDoor:
        command = DoorCommand.new(target, action_id)
    else:
        command = InteractCommand.new(target, action_id)
    command.synchronization_group = synchronization_group
    return command_queue.enqueue(command, append)

func enqueue_gadget(gadget_type: StringName, target_position: Vector3, append: bool, synchronization_group: StringName = &"") -> bool:
    var command := UseGadgetCommand.new(gadget_type, target_position)
    command.synchronization_group = synchronization_group
    return command_queue.enqueue(command, append)

func enqueue_reload(append: bool, synchronization_group: StringName = &"") -> bool:
    var command := ReloadCommand.new()
    command.synchronization_group = synchronization_group
    return command_queue.enqueue(command, append)

func enqueue_heal(target: TacticalUnit, append: bool, synchronization_group: StringName = &"") -> bool:
    var command := HealCommand.new(target)
    command.synchronization_group = synchronization_group
    return command_queue.enqueue(command, append)

func _on_movement_started(_destination: Vector3, _stance: MovementComponent.MovementStance) -> void:
    state_machine.change_state(&"moving")

func _on_movement_finished(_destination: Vector3) -> void:
    state_machine.change_state(&"idle")

func _on_died() -> void:
    command_queue.clear(true)
    movement_component.cancel_move()
    combat_component.cancel_action()
    overwatch_component.cancel_overwatch()
    jammer_component.set_active(false)
    state_machine.change_state(&"dead")
    collision_layer = 0
    collision_mask = 0

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/tactical/unit_state_machine.gd =====
class_name UnitStateMachine
extends Node

signal state_changed(previous: StringName, current: StringName)

var current_state: StringName = &"idle"

func change_state(next_state: StringName) -> void:
    if next_state == current_state:
        return
    var previous := current_state
    current_state = next_state
    state_changed.emit(previous, current_state)

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/tactical/use_gadget_command.gd =====
class_name UseGadgetCommand
extends TacticalCommand

var gadget_type: StringName = &"smoke"
var target_position: Vector3
var execution_seconds: float = 0.8
var _elapsed: float = 0.0

func _init(type_id: StringName = &"smoke", position: Vector3 = Vector3.ZERO) -> void:
    gadget_type = type_id
    target_position = position
    display_name = "Deploy %s" % String(gadget_type)
    issued_at = Time.get_ticks_msec() / 1000.0

func validate(context: Dictionary = {}) -> bool:
    if not super.validate(context):
        return false
    if unit.global_position.distance_to(target_position) > 14.0:
        failure_reason = "Gadget target is out of range."
        return false
    if not unit.inventory_component.has_gadget(gadget_type):
        failure_reason = "This operator is not carrying the required gadget."
        return false
    var system := unit.get_tree().get_first_node_in_group("gadget_systems")
    if system == null:
        failure_reason = "Gadget system is unavailable."
        return false
    return true

func begin(context: Dictionary = {}) -> void:
    super.begin(context)
    _elapsed = 0.0
    unit.state_machine.change_state(&"using_gadget")

func update(delta: float, _context: Dictionary = {}) -> bool:
    _elapsed += delta
    if _elapsed < execution_seconds:
        return false
    var system := unit.get_tree().get_first_node_in_group("gadget_systems")
    if system != null and system.has_method("deploy_gadget"):
        var instance: Node3D = system.deploy_gadget(gadget_type, target_position, unit)
        if instance != null and unit.inventory_component.consume_gadget(gadget_type):
            unit.state_machine.change_state(&"idle")
            succeed()
        else:
            unit.state_machine.change_state(&"idle")
            fail("Gadget charge could not be consumed.")
    else:
        fail("Gadget deployment failed.")
    return true

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/tactical/visibility_manager.gd =====
class_name VisibilityManager
extends Node

signal enemy_visibility_changed(unit: TacticalUnit, visible: bool)

@export var update_interval: float = 0.16
@export var reveal_all: bool = false
var _timer: float = 0.0
var visible_enemies: Array[TacticalUnit] = []

func _ready() -> void:
    add_to_group("visibility_managers")

func _process(delta: float) -> void:
    if GameFlow.is_tactical_paused:
        return
    _timer -= delta
    if _timer > 0.0:
        return
    _timer = PerformanceManager.visibility_interval(update_interval)
    _update_player_visibility()

func can_see_unit(observer: TacticalUnit, target: TacticalUnit, maximum_range: float) -> bool:
    if observer == null or target == null:
        return false
    var from := observer.global_position + Vector3.UP * 1.1
    var to := target.global_position + Vector3.UP * 0.9
    var distance := from.distance_to(to)
    if distance > maximum_range:
        return false
    if get_smoke_visibility_factor(from, to) < 0.28:
        return false
    return has_line_of_sight(observer, target)

func has_line_of_sight(observer: TacticalUnit, target: TacticalUnit) -> bool:
    if observer == null or target == null:
        return false
    var from := observer.global_position + Vector3.UP * 1.1
    var to := target.global_position + Vector3.UP * 0.9
    var query := PhysicsRayQueryParameters3D.create(from, to, 1 | 2 | 4)
    query.collide_with_areas = false
    query.collide_with_bodies = true
    query.exclude = [observer.get_rid()]
    var result := observer.get_world_3d().direct_space_state.intersect_ray(query)
    if result.is_empty():
        return true
    var collider: Object = result.get("collider")
    var current := collider as Node
    while current != null:
        if current == target:
            return true
        current = current.get_parent()
    return false

func get_smoke_visibility_factor(from: Vector3, to: Vector3) -> float:
    var factor := 1.0
    for node in get_tree().get_nodes_in_group("smoke_fields"):
        if node.has_method("visibility_factor_for_segment"):
            factor *= float(node.visibility_factor_for_segment(from, to))
    return clampf(factor, 0.05, 1.0)

func get_cover_accuracy_multiplier(attacker: TacticalUnit, target: TacticalUnit) -> float:
    var multiplier := 1.0
    for node in get_tree().get_nodes_in_group("cover_objects"):
        if node.has_method("accuracy_multiplier_against"):
            multiplier = minf(multiplier, float(node.accuracy_multiplier_against(attacker.global_position, target.global_position)))
    return multiplier

func _update_player_visibility() -> void:
    var next_visible: Array[TacticalUnit] = []
    for enemy_node in get_tree().get_nodes_in_group("enemy_units"):
        var enemy := enemy_node as TacticalUnit
        if enemy == null:
            continue
        var visible := reveal_all
        if not visible:
            for player_node in get_tree().get_nodes_in_group("player_units"):
                var player := player_node as TacticalUnit
                if player != null and player.perception_component.visible_units.has(enemy):
                    visible = true
                    break
        enemy.set_detected(visible)
        if visible:
            next_visible.append(enemy)
        if visible != visible_enemies.has(enemy):
            enemy_visibility_changed.emit(enemy, visible)
    visible_enemies = next_visible

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/tactical/wait_command.gd =====
class_name WaitCommand
extends TacticalCommand

var duration: float = 0.5
var elapsed: float = 0.0

func _init(seconds: float = 0.5) -> void:
    duration = maxf(seconds, 0.0)
    display_name = "Wait"

func begin(context: Dictionary = {}) -> void:
    super.begin(context)
    elapsed = 0.0

func update(delta: float, _context: Dictionary = {}) -> bool:
    elapsed += delta
    if elapsed >= duration:
        succeed()
        return true
    return false

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/tests/scenario_lab_marker.gd =====
class_name ScenarioLabMarker
extends Node

@export var lab_type: StringName = &"movement"
@export var description: String = ""

func _ready() -> void:
    get_parent().set_meta("scenario_lab_type", lab_type)
    get_parent().set_meta("scenario_lab_description", description)
    DebugConsole.log_message(&"scenario", "Loaded %s lab: %s" % [lab_type, description])
    call_deferred("_configure_lab")

func _configure_lab() -> void:
    match lab_type:
        &"overwatch":
            _place_enemies_in_lane()
        &"door":
            _reset_doors()
        &"smoke_emp":
            _grant_utility()
        &"ai_hunter":
            _isolate_hunter()
        &"ai_jammer":
            _isolate_jammer()
        &"objective":
            _activate_first_objective()
        &"performance":
            _spawn_stress_units()
        _:
            pass

func _place_enemies_in_lane() -> void:
    var index := 0
    for node in get_tree().get_nodes_in_group("enemy_units"):
        var unit := node as TacticalUnit
        if unit != null:
            unit.global_position = Vector3(-4.0 + index * 4.0, 0.0, -8.0)
            index += 1

func _reset_doors() -> void:
    for node in get_tree().get_nodes_in_group("tactical_doors"):
        if node is TacticalDoor:
            (node as TacticalDoor).set_state(TacticalDoor.DoorState.LOCKED)

func _grant_utility() -> void:
    for node in get_tree().get_nodes_in_group("player_units"):
        var unit := node as TacticalUnit
        if unit != null:
            unit.inventory_component.add_item(&"smoke_grenade", 3)
            unit.inventory_component.add_item(&"emp_charge", 3)

func _isolate_hunter() -> void:
    for node in get_tree().get_nodes_in_group("enemy_units"):
        var unit := node as TacticalUnit
        if unit != null and unit.definition is EnemyDefinition:
            unit.visible = (unit.definition as EnemyDefinition).archetype == &"hunter"

func _isolate_jammer() -> void:
    for node in get_tree().get_nodes_in_group("enemy_units"):
        var unit := node as TacticalUnit
        if unit != null and unit.definition is EnemyDefinition:
            unit.visible = (unit.definition as EnemyDefinition).archetype == &"jammer"

func _activate_first_objective() -> void:
    var runtime := get_tree().get_first_node_in_group("mission_runtime") as MissionRuntime
    if runtime != null:
        for snapshot in runtime.get_objective_snapshot():
            if String(snapshot.state) == "inactive":
                runtime.activate_objective(snapshot.id)
                break

func _spawn_stress_units() -> void:
    var units_root := get_parent().get_node_or_null("Units") as Node3D
    var definition := ContentDatabase.get_definition(&"security_guard") as EnemyDefinition
    var unit_scene := load("res://scenes/entities/tactical_unit.tscn") as PackedScene
    if units_root == null or definition == null or unit_scene == null:
        return
    for index in range(12):
        var unit := unit_scene.instantiate() as TacticalUnit
        unit.definition = definition
        unit.unit_id = StringName("stress_guard_%02d" % index)
        unit.player_controlled = false
        var row := index / 4
        var column := index % 4
        unit.position = Vector3(-9.0 + column * 6.0, 0.0, -12.0 - row * 4.0)
        units_root.add_child(unit)

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/tools/debug_visualizer_3d.gd =====
class_name DebugVisualizer3D
extends Node3D

var show_cover: bool = false
var show_ai_paths: bool = false
var show_perception: bool = false
var show_sound_events: bool = false
var show_objectives: bool = false
var show_navigation: bool = false
var sound_events: Array[Dictionary] = []
var _mesh_instance: MeshInstance3D
var _mesh: ImmediateMesh
var _material: StandardMaterial3D
var _refresh_timer: float = 0.0

func _ready() -> void:
    name = "EchoDebugVisualizer3D"
    _mesh = ImmediateMesh.new()
    _material = StandardMaterial3D.new()
    _material.shading_mode = BaseMaterial3D.SHADING_MODE_UNSHADED
    _material.vertex_color_use_as_albedo = true
    _material.transparency = BaseMaterial3D.TRANSPARENCY_ALPHA
    _material.no_depth_test = true
    _mesh_instance = MeshInstance3D.new()
    _mesh_instance.mesh = _mesh
    _mesh_instance.material_override = _material
    add_child(_mesh_instance)
    EventBus.shot_resolved.connect(_on_shot_resolved)
    EventBus.door_breached.connect(_on_door_breached)
    EventBus.interaction_performed.connect(_on_interaction)

func configure(flags: Dictionary) -> void:
    show_cover = bool(flags.get("cover", show_cover))
    show_ai_paths = bool(flags.get("ai_paths", show_ai_paths))
    show_perception = bool(flags.get("perception", show_perception))
    show_sound_events = bool(flags.get("sound", show_sound_events))
    show_objectives = bool(flags.get("objectives", show_objectives))
    show_navigation = bool(flags.get("navigation", show_navigation))
    _redraw()

func _process(delta: float) -> void:
    _refresh_timer -= delta
    for event in sound_events:
        event.remaining = float(event.remaining) - delta
    sound_events = sound_events.filter(func(event: Dictionary) -> bool: return float(event.remaining) > 0.0)
    if _refresh_timer <= 0.0:
        _refresh_timer = 0.2
        _redraw()

func _redraw() -> void:
    if _mesh == null:
        return
    _mesh.clear_surfaces()
    if not (show_cover or show_ai_paths or show_perception or show_sound_events or show_objectives or show_navigation):
        return
    _mesh.surface_begin(Mesh.PRIMITIVE_LINES, _material)
    if show_cover:
        for node in get_tree().get_nodes_in_group("cover_objects"):
            if node is Node3D:
                _add_circle((node as Node3D).global_position + Vector3.UP * 0.12, 1.8, Color(0.4, 0.95, 0.65, 0.85))
    if show_perception:
        for node in get_tree().get_nodes_in_group("tactical_units"):
            var unit := node as TacticalUnit
            if unit != null:
                _add_circle(unit.global_position + Vector3.UP * 0.06, unit.perception_component.perception_range, Color(0.25, 0.65, 1.0, 0.35) if unit.player_controlled else Color(1.0, 0.3, 0.3, 0.3), 48)
    if show_ai_paths or show_navigation:
        for node in get_tree().get_nodes_in_group("tactical_units"):
            var unit := node as TacticalUnit
            if unit == null:
                continue
            var command := unit.command_queue.current_command
            if command is MoveCommand:
                _add_line(unit.global_position + Vector3.UP * 0.18, (command as MoveCommand).destination + Vector3.UP * 0.18, Color(1.0, 0.75, 0.25, 0.9))
            for queued in unit.command_queue.commands:
                if queued is MoveCommand:
                    _add_line(unit.global_position + Vector3.UP * 0.12, (queued as MoveCommand).destination + Vector3.UP * 0.12, Color(1.0, 0.55, 0.2, 0.45))
    if show_objectives:
        for group_name in ["mission_interactables", "objective_triggers"]:
            for node in get_tree().get_nodes_in_group(group_name):
                if node is Node3D:
                    var position := (node as Node3D).global_position + Vector3.UP * 0.1
                    _add_circle(position, 1.25, Color(1.0, 0.85, 0.2, 0.95), 24)
                    _add_cross(position, 0.75, Color(1.0, 0.85, 0.2, 0.95))
    if show_sound_events:
        for event in sound_events:
            var ratio := clampf(float(event.remaining) / float(event.duration), 0.0, 1.0)
            var radius := lerpf(0.4, float(event.radius), 1.0 - ratio)
            _add_circle(event.position, radius, Color(0.95, 0.4, 1.0, ratio), 32)
    _mesh.surface_end()

func _add_line(start: Vector3, finish: Vector3, color: Color) -> void:
    _mesh.surface_set_color(color)
    _mesh.surface_add_vertex(start)
    _mesh.surface_set_color(color)
    _mesh.surface_add_vertex(finish)

func _add_circle(center: Vector3, radius: float, color: Color, segments: int = 32) -> void:
    for index in range(segments):
        var angle_a := TAU * float(index) / float(segments)
        var angle_b := TAU * float(index + 1) / float(segments)
        _add_line(
            center + Vector3(cos(angle_a) * radius, 0.0, sin(angle_a) * radius),
            center + Vector3(cos(angle_b) * radius, 0.0, sin(angle_b) * radius),
            color
        )

func _add_cross(center: Vector3, radius: float, color: Color) -> void:
    _add_line(center - Vector3.RIGHT * radius, center + Vector3.RIGHT * radius, color)
    _add_line(center - Vector3.FORWARD * radius, center + Vector3.FORWARD * radius, color)

func add_sound_event(position: Vector3, radius: float, duration: float = 1.8) -> void:
    sound_events.append({"position": position + Vector3.UP * 0.12, "radius": radius, "duration": duration, "remaining": duration})

func _on_shot_resolved(shooter: TacticalUnit, _target: TacticalUnit, _hit: bool, _damage: float, _chance: float) -> void:
    if shooter != null:
        add_sound_event(shooter.global_position, 8.0)

func _on_door_breached(_actor: TacticalUnit, door: TacticalDoor) -> void:
    if door != null:
        add_sound_event(door.global_position, 12.0, 2.4)

func _on_interaction(_actor: TacticalUnit, target: Node, action_id: StringName) -> void:
    if target is Node3D and action_id in [&"hack", &"interact"]:
        add_sound_event((target as Node3D).global_position, 3.0, 1.2)

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-godot-phase1-14/scripts/tools/developer_tools.gd =====
extends CanvasLayer

const TACTICAL_UNIT_SCENE := preload("res://scenes/entities/tactical_unit.tscn")
const SCENARIO_PATHS := {
    "Movement Lab": "res://scenes/tests/movement_lab.tscn",
    "Cover Lab": "res://scenes/tests/cover_lab.tscn",
    "Overwatch Lab": "res://scenes/tests/overwatch_lab.tscn",
    "Door Lab": "res://scenes/tests/door_lab.tscn",
    "Smoke + EMP Lab": "res://scenes/tests/smoke_emp_lab.tscn",
    "Hunter AI Lab": "res://scenes/tests/ai_hunter_lab.tscn",
    "Jammer AI Lab": "res://scenes/tests/ai_jammer_lab.tscn",
    "Objective Lab": "res://scenes/tests/objective_lab.tscn",
    "Performance Lab": "res://scenes/tests/performance_lab.tscn",
}

var window_root: Control
var window_panel: PanelContainer
var tabs: TabContainer
var performance_panel: PanelContainer
var performance_label: Label
var status_label: Label
var mission_option: OptionButton
var scenario_option: OptionButton
var dialogue_option: OptionButton
var dialogue_graph: TextEdit
var objective_list: ItemList
var story_editor: TextEdit
var campaign_editor: TextEdit
var enemy_option: OptionButton
var equipment_option: OptionButton
var snapshot_name: LineEdit
var snapshot_list: ItemList
var validation_output: TextEdit
var console_output: TextEdit
var visualization_flags := {
    "cover": false,
    "ai_paths": false,
    "perception": false,
    "sound": false,
    "objectives": false,
    "navigation": false,
}
var _debug_visualizer: DebugVisualizer3D
var _restore_tactical_pause: bool = false
var _performance_refresh: float = 0.0

func _ready() -> void:
    layer = 200
    process_mode = Node.PROCESS_MODE_ALWAYS
    _build_ui()
    _populate_static_options()
    window_root.visible = false
    performance_panel.visible = false

func _process(delta: float) -> void:
    _performance_refresh -= delta
    if _performance_refresh <= 0.0:
        _performance_refresh = 0.25
        _refresh_performance_overlay()
        if window_root.visible:
            _refresh_console()

func _unhandled_input(event: InputEvent) -> void:
    if event.is_action_pressed("toggle_developer_tools"):
        toggle_window()
        get_viewport().set_input_as_handled()
    elif event.is_action_pressed("toggle_performance_overlay"):
        performance_panel.visible = not performance_panel.visible
        get_viewport().set_input_as_handled()
    elif event.is_action_pressed("toggle_debug_visualizers"):
        visualization_flags["cover"] = not bool(visualization_flags.cover)
        visualization_flags["ai_paths"] = bool(visualization_flags.cover)
        visualization_flags["objectives"] = bool(visualization_flags.cover)
        _ensure_debug_visualizer()
        get_viewport().set_input_as_handled()
    elif event.is_action_pressed("screenshot_capture"):
        capture_screenshot()
        get_viewport().set_input_as_handled()

func is_open() -> bool:
    return window_root != null and window_root.visible

func toggle_window() -> void:
    window_root.visible = not window_root.visible
    if window_root.visible:
        _restore_tactical_pause = GameFlow.is_tactical_paused
        if _is_tactical_scene():
            GameFlow.set_tactical_paused(true)
        _refresh_all()
    elif _is_tactical_scene():
        GameFlow.set_tactical_paused(_restore_tactical_pause)

func capture_screenshot() -> void:
    var directory := "user://screenshots"
    DirAccess.make_dir_recursive_absolute(ProjectSettings.globalize_path(directory))
    await RenderingServer.frame_post_draw
    var image := get_viewport().get_texture().get_image()
    var filename := "echo_%s.png" % Time.get_datetime_string_from_system().replace(":", "-").replace(" ", "_")
    var path := directory.path_join(filename)
    var error := image.save_png(path)
    _set_status("Screenshot saved: %s" % path if error == OK else "Screenshot failed: %s" % error)

func _build_ui() -> void:
    window_root = Control.new()
    window_root.set_anchors_and_offsets_preset(Control.PRESET_FULL_RECT)
    window_root.mouse_filter = Control.MOUSE_FILTER_STOP
    add_child(window_root)
    var shade := ColorRect.new()
    shade.set_anchors_and_offsets_preset(Control.PRESET_FULL_RECT)
    shade.color = Color(0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.58)
    shade.mouse_filter = Control.MOUSE_FILTER_STOP
    window_root.add_child(shade)
    window_panel = PanelContainer.new()
    window_panel.anchor_left = 0.08
    window_panel.anchor_top = 0.07
    window_panel.anchor_right = 0.92
    window_panel.anchor_bottom = 0.93
    window_panel.add_theme_stylebox_override("panel", _panel_style())
    window_root.add_child(window_panel)
    var main := VBoxContainer.new()
    main.add_theme_constant_override("separation", 8)
    window_panel.add_child(main)
    var header := HBoxContainer.new()
    main.add_child(header)
    var title := Label.new()
    title.text = "ECHO DEVELOPER WORKBENCH"
    title.size_flags_horizontal = Control.SIZE_EXPAND_FILL
