def deep_merge(base: dict[str, Any], override: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
    result = json.loads(json.dumps(base))
    for key, value in override.items():
        if isinstance(value, dict) and isinstance(result.get(key), dict):
            result[key] = deep_merge(result[key], value)
        else:
            result[key] = value
    return result


def load_config(path: Path | None) -> dict[str, Any]:
    if path is None:
        return json.loads(json.dumps(DEFAULT_CONFIG))
    try:
        raw = json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    except OSError as exc:
        raise MigrationError(f"Could not read config {path}: {exc}") from exc
    except json.JSONDecodeError as exc:
        raise MigrationError(f"Invalid JSON config {path}: {exc}") from exc
    if not isinstance(raw, dict):
        raise MigrationError("Migration configuration root must be a JSON object.")
    return deep_merge(DEFAULT_CONFIG, raw)


def build_parser() -> argparse.ArgumentParser:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(
        description="Scan a Babylon.js project and migrate referenced assets into Echo's Godot project.",
        formatter_class=argparse.ArgumentDefaultsHelpFormatter,
    )
    parser.add_argument("--source-root", type=Path, required=True, help="Root of the Babylon.js/JavaScript project")
    parser.add_argument("--godot-root", type=Path, required=True, help="Root containing Godot project.godot")
    parser.add_argument("--config", type=Path, help="Optional JSON migration configuration")
    parser.add_argument("--apply", action="store_true", help="Copy/convert assets and write Godot resources")
    parser.add_argument("--overwrite", action="store_true", help="Replace previously generated files")
    parser.add_argument(
        "--include-unreferenced", action=argparse.BooleanOptionalAction, default=True,
        help="Also migrate files under conventional asset directories even when no static reference was found",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--convert-models", choices=("never", "auto", "always"), default="auto",
        help="Use Blender to convert supported source models to GLB",
    )
    parser.add_argument("--blender", help="Explicit path to Blender executable")
    parser.add_argument(
        "--dedupe", action=argparse.BooleanOptionalAction, default=True,
        help="Deduplicate files with identical SHA-256 content",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--generate-manifests", action=argparse.BooleanOptionalAction, default=True,
        help="Generate AssetManifestDefinition resources and reimport-safe wrapper scenes for models",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--generate-materials", action=argparse.BooleanOptionalAction, default=True,
        help="Detect PBR texture sets and generate StandardMaterial3D resources",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--auto-bind", action="store_true",
        help="Automatically prepare high-confidence model/icon/portrait bindings (still requires Godot EditorScript application)",
    )
    parser.add_argument("--verbose", action="store_true", help="Print path-resolution and conversion details")
    parser.add_argument("--version", action="version", version=TOOL_VERSION)
    return parser


def main(argv: Sequence[str] | None = None) -> int:
    parser = build_parser()
    args = parser.parse_args(argv)
    reporter = Reporter(args.verbose)
    try:
        config = load_config(args.config)
        migrator = AssetMigrator(args, config, reporter)
        report = migrator.run()
    except MigrationError as exc:
        reporter.warn(str(exc))
        return 2
    except KeyboardInterrupt:
        reporter.warn("Migration cancelled.")
        return 130
    return 1 if report["summary"]["conversion_failures"] else 0


if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-migration-script-bundle/migration/tools/migration_finalizer.gd =====
@tool
class_name EchoMigrationFinalizer
extends RefCounted

const BINDINGS_PATH := "res://migration/generated/asset-bindings.json"
const REPORT_PATH := "res://migration/generated/finalize-migration-report.json"
const DATA_ROOT := "res://data"

const MANIFEST_FIXES := {
    "female_light": {"asset_type": &"character_model", "required_sockets": [&"head", &"left_hand", &"right_hand", &"weapon", &"back"]},
    "female_dark": {"asset_type": &"character_model", "required_sockets": [&"head", &"left_hand", &"right_hand", &"weapon", &"back"]},
    "male_light": {"asset_type": &"character_model", "required_sockets": [&"head", &"left_hand", &"right_hand", &"weapon", &"back"]},
    "male_dark": {"asset_type": &"character_model", "required_sockets": [&"head", &"left_hand", &"right_hand", &"weapon", &"back"]},
    "ual1_echo": {"asset_type": &"animation_model"},
    "enemy_eye_drone": {"asset_type": &"enemy_model"},
    "prop_health_pack": {"asset_type": &"equipment_model"},
}

const FLOOR_TEXTURES := {
    "res://assets/materials/reception_linoleum.tres": "res://assets/textures/clinic_zones/reception_floor.png",
    "res://assets/materials/icu_vinyl.tres": "res://assets/textures/clinic_zones/icu_floor.png",
    "res://assets/materials/server_raised_floor.tres": "res://assets/textures/clinic_zones/server_floor.png",
    "res://assets/materials/utility_worn_floor.tres": "res://assets/textures/clinic_zones/utility_floor.png",
    "res://assets/materials/corrupted_floor.tres": "res://assets/textures/clinic_zones/corrupted_floor.png",
}

func run(editor_interface: EditorInterface) -> Dictionary:
    var report := {
        "bindings_applied": [],
        "manifests_updated": [],
        "materials_updated": [],
        "warnings": [],
        "errors": [],
    }
    _apply_bindings(report)
    _fix_manifests(report)
    _connect_floor_textures(report)
    _audit_licenses(report)
    _write_report(report)
    if editor_interface != null:
        editor_interface.get_resource_filesystem().scan()
    print("Echo migration finalizer: %d binding(s), %d manifest(s), %d material(s), %d warning(s), %d error(s)." % [
        report.bindings_applied.size(),
        report.manifests_updated.size(),
        report.materials_updated.size(),
        report.warnings.size(),
        report.errors.size(),
    ])
    for warning in report.warnings:
        push_warning("[Echo Migration] " + str(warning))
    for error in report.errors:
        push_error("[Echo Migration] " + str(error))
    return report

func _apply_bindings(report: Dictionary) -> void:
    if not FileAccess.file_exists(BINDINGS_PATH):
        report.errors.append("Bindings file is missing: %s" % BINDINGS_PATH)
        return
    var file := FileAccess.open(BINDINGS_PATH, FileAccess.READ)
    var parsed: Variant = JSON.parse_string(file.get_as_text()) if file != null else null
    if not parsed is Dictionary:
        report.errors.append("Bindings JSON root must be an object.")
        return
    var definitions := _index_definitions(DATA_ROOT)
    for raw_binding in parsed.get("bindings", []):
        if not raw_binding is Dictionary:
            continue
        var definition_id := StringName(str(raw_binding.get("definition_id", "")))
        var field := StringName(str(raw_binding.get("field", "")))
        var resource_path := str(raw_binding.get("resource_path", ""))
        var entry: Dictionary = definitions.get(definition_id, {})
        var resource: Resource = entry.get("resource")
        var source_path := str(entry.get("path", ""))
        if resource == null:
            report.errors.append("Definition '%s' was not found." % definition_id)
            continue
        if not _has_property(resource, field):
            report.errors.append("Definition '%s' has no field '%s'." % [definition_id, field])
            continue
        if not ResourceLoader.exists(resource_path):
            report.errors.append("Binding resource does not exist: %s" % resource_path)
            continue
        var value := ResourceLoader.load(resource_path)
        if value == null:
            report.errors.append("Could not load binding resource: %s" % resource_path)
            continue
        resource.set(field, value)
        if ResourceSaver.save(resource, source_path) != OK:
            report.errors.append("Could not save binding for '%s'." % definition_id)
            continue
        report.bindings_applied.append({"definition_id": definition_id, "field": field, "resource_path": resource_path})

func _fix_manifests(report: Dictionary) -> void:
    var definitions := _index_definitions("res://data/assets")
    for asset_id in MANIFEST_FIXES:
        var entry: Dictionary = definitions.get(StringName(asset_id), {})
        var manifest := entry.get("resource") as AssetManifestDefinition
        if manifest == null:
            report.warnings.append("Asset manifest '%s' was not found." % asset_id)
            continue
        var fixes: Dictionary = MANIFEST_FIXES[asset_id]
        manifest.asset_type = fixes.get("asset_type", manifest.asset_type)
        if fixes.has("required_sockets"):
            var required: Array[StringName] = []
            for socket_id in fixes.required_sockets:
                required.append(StringName(socket_id))
            manifest.required_sockets = required
        manifest.metadata["classification_reviewed"] = true
        var source_path := str(entry.get("path", ""))
        if ResourceSaver.save(manifest, source_path) == OK:
            report.manifests_updated.append(asset_id)
        else:
            report.errors.append("Could not save manifest '%s'." % asset_id)

func _connect_floor_textures(report: Dictionary) -> void:
    for material_path in FLOOR_TEXTURES:
        var texture_path: String = FLOOR_TEXTURES[material_path]
        var material := ResourceLoader.load(material_path) as StandardMaterial3D
        var texture := ResourceLoader.load(texture_path) as Texture2D
        if material == null or texture == null:
            report.errors.append("Could not load floor material or texture: %s -> %s" % [material_path, texture_path])
            continue
        material.albedo_texture = texture
        if ResourceSaver.save(material, material_path) == OK:
            report.materials_updated.append(material_path)
        else:
            report.errors.append("Could not save material: %s" % material_path)

func _audit_licenses(report: Dictionary) -> void:
    for path in _find_resource_paths("res://data/assets"):
        var manifest := ResourceLoader.load(path) as AssetManifestDefinition
        if manifest == null:
            continue
        var license_text := manifest.license_name.to_lower()
        if license_text.is_empty() or "review" in license_text or "verify" in license_text or "unknown" in license_text:
            report.warnings.append("Verify licence metadata for asset '%s' (%s)." % [manifest.id, path])

func _index_definitions(path: String) -> Dictionary:
    var result := {}
    for resource_path in _find_resource_paths(path):
        var resource := ResourceLoader.load(resource_path)
        if resource != null and _has_property(resource, &"id"):
            var definition_id: StringName = resource.get("id")
            if definition_id != &"":
                result[definition_id] = {"resource": resource, "path": resource_path}
    return result

func _find_resource_paths(path: String) -> PackedStringArray:
    var result := PackedStringArray()
    var directory := DirAccess.open(path)
    if directory == null:
        return result
    directory.list_dir_begin()
    var entry := directory.get_next()
    while not entry.is_empty():
        if not entry.begins_with("."):
            var full_path := path.path_join(entry)
            if directory.current_is_dir():
                result.append_array(_find_resource_paths(full_path))
            elif entry.get_extension().to_lower() in ["tres", "res"]:
                result.append(full_path)
        entry = directory.get_next()
    directory.list_dir_end()
    return result

func _has_property(object: Object, property_name: StringName) -> bool:
    for property in object.get_property_list():
        if StringName(property.name) == property_name:
            return true
    return false

func _write_report(report: Dictionary) -> void:
    DirAccess.make_dir_recursive_absolute(ProjectSettings.globalize_path("res://migration/generated"))
    var file := FileAccess.open(REPORT_PATH, FileAccess.WRITE)
    if file != null:
        file.store_string(JSON.stringify(report, "\t"))

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-migration-script-bundle/scripts/assets/asset_wrapper.gd =====
class_name AssetWrapper
extends Node3D

@export var source_scene: PackedScene
@export var asset_id: StringName
@export var socket_paths: Dictionary = {}
@export var preserve_imported_materials: bool = true
@export var auto_create_character_sockets: bool = true
@onready var visual_root: Node3D = $VisualRoot

var manifest: AssetManifestDefinition
var _dynamic_sockets: Dictionary = {}

const SOCKET_BONE_CANDIDATES := {
    "head": ["head", "head_end", "mixamorighead"],
    "left_hand": ["lefthand", "hand_l", "l_hand", "mixamoriglefthand"],
    "right_hand": ["righthand", "hand_r", "r_hand", "mixamorigrighthand"],
    "weapon": ["righthand", "hand_r", "r_hand", "mixamorigrighthand"],
    "back": ["spine2", "spine_02", "chest", "upperchest", "mixamorigspine2"],
}

const SOCKET_FALLBACK_POSITIONS := {
    "head": Vector3(0, 1.65, 0),
    "left_hand": Vector3(-0.35, 1.1, -0.1),
    "right_hand": Vector3(0.35, 1.1, -0.1),
    "weapon": Vector3(0.32, 1.05, -0.35),
    "back": Vector3(0, 1.25, 0.22),
}

func _ready() -> void:
    _ensure_visual_instance()
    if auto_create_character_sockets:
        var should_create := find_skeleton() != null
        if manifest != null:
            should_create = should_create or manifest.asset_type in [&"character_model", &"enemy_model"]
            should_create = should_create or not manifest.required_sockets.is_empty()
        if should_create:
            ensure_character_sockets(manifest.required_sockets if manifest != null else [])
    if manifest != null:
        _apply_material_overrides(manifest.material_overrides)

func configure_from_manifest(definition: AssetManifestDefinition) -> void:
    manifest = definition
    asset_id = definition.id
    scale = Vector3.ONE * definition.scale_multiplier
    if source_scene == null and not definition.imported_path.is_empty() and ResourceLoader.exists(definition.imported_path):
        source_scene = ResourceLoader.load(definition.imported_path) as PackedScene
    if is_node_ready():
        _ensure_visual_instance()
        if definition.asset_type in [&"character_model", &"enemy_model"] or not definition.required_sockets.is_empty():
            ensure_character_sockets(definition.required_sockets)
        _apply_material_overrides(definition.material_overrides)

func get_socket(socket_id: StringName) -> Node3D:
    var dynamic := _dynamic_sockets.get(String(socket_id)) as Node3D
    if dynamic != null and is_instance_valid(dynamic):
        return dynamic
    var path: NodePath = socket_paths.get(String(socket_id), NodePath(""))
    return get_node_or_null(path) as Node3D if not path.is_empty() else null

func ensure_character_sockets(required: Array[StringName] = []) -> void:
    var socket_ids: Array[StringName] = []
    for required_socket in required:
        socket_ids.append(required_socket)
    if socket_ids.is_empty():
        socket_ids = [&"head", &"left_hand", &"right_hand", &"weapon", &"back"]
    var skeleton := find_skeleton()
    for socket_id in socket_ids:
        if get_socket(socket_id) != null:
            continue
        var marker: Marker3D
        if skeleton != null:
            marker = _create_bone_socket(skeleton, socket_id)
        if marker == null:
            marker = _create_fallback_socket(socket_id)
        if marker != null:
            _dynamic_sockets[String(socket_id)] = marker

func find_skeleton() -> Skeleton3D:
    _resolve_visual_root()
    if visual_root == null:
        return null
    for node in visual_root.find_children("*", "Skeleton3D", true, false):
        if node is Skeleton3D:
            return node as Skeleton3D
    return null

func find_animation_player() -> AnimationPlayer:
    _resolve_visual_root()
    if visual_root == null:
        return null
    for node in visual_root.find_children("*", "AnimationPlayer", true, false):
        if node is AnimationPlayer:
            return node as AnimationPlayer
    return null

func validate_wrapper(required_sockets: Array[StringName]) -> PackedStringArray:
    _resolve_visual_root()
    _ensure_visual_instance()
    var issues := PackedStringArray()
    if auto_create_character_sockets and not required_sockets.is_empty():
        ensure_character_sockets(required_sockets)
    for socket_id in required_sockets:
        if get_socket(socket_id) == null:
            issues.append("Missing socket '%s' on asset '%s'." % [socket_id, asset_id])
    return issues

func _ensure_visual_instance() -> void:
    _resolve_visual_root()
    if source_scene == null or visual_root == null or visual_root.get_child_count() > 0:
        return
    visual_root.add_child(source_scene.instantiate())

func _create_bone_socket(skeleton: Skeleton3D, socket_id: StringName) -> Marker3D:
    var bone_index := _find_candidate_bone(skeleton, SOCKET_BONE_CANDIDATES.get(String(socket_id), []))
    if bone_index < 0:
        return null
    var attachment := BoneAttachment3D.new()
    attachment.name = "%sAttachment" % String(socket_id).to_pascal_case()
    attachment.bone_name = skeleton.get_bone_name(bone_index)
    skeleton.add_child(attachment)
    var marker := Marker3D.new()
    marker.name = "%sSocket" % String(socket_id).to_pascal_case()
    attachment.add_child(marker)
    return marker

func _create_fallback_socket(socket_id: StringName) -> Marker3D:
    var sockets := get_node_or_null("Sockets") as Node3D
    if sockets == null:
        sockets = Node3D.new()
        sockets.name = "Sockets"
        add_child(sockets)
    var marker := Marker3D.new()
    marker.name = "%sSocket" % String(socket_id).to_pascal_case()
    marker.position = SOCKET_FALLBACK_POSITIONS.get(String(socket_id), Vector3.ZERO)
    sockets.add_child(marker)
    return marker

func _find_candidate_bone(skeleton: Skeleton3D, candidates: Array) -> int:
    var normalized_candidates: Array[String] = []
    for candidate in candidates:
        normalized_candidates.append(_normalize_bone_name(str(candidate)))
    for index in range(skeleton.get_bone_count()):
        var normalized := _normalize_bone_name(String(skeleton.get_bone_name(index)))
        if normalized in normalized_candidates:
            return index
    for index in range(skeleton.get_bone_count()):
        var normalized := _normalize_bone_name(String(skeleton.get_bone_name(index)))
        for candidate in normalized_candidates:
            if normalized.ends_with(candidate) or candidate.ends_with(normalized):
                return index
    return -1

func _normalize_bone_name(value: String) -> String:
    return value.to_lower().replace("_", "").replace("-", "").replace(" ", "").replace(":", "")

func _resolve_visual_root() -> void:
    if visual_root == null:
        visual_root = get_node_or_null("VisualRoot") as Node3D

func _apply_material_overrides(overrides: Dictionary) -> void:
    if overrides.is_empty() or visual_root == null:
        return
    for node in visual_root.find_children("*", "MeshInstance3D", true, false):
        var mesh_instance := node as MeshInstance3D
        if mesh_instance == null:
            continue
        var key := mesh_instance.name
        if not overrides.has(key):
            continue
        var override_value: Variant = overrides[key]
        var material: Material
        if override_value is Material:
            material = override_value
        elif override_value is String and ResourceLoader.exists(override_value):
            material = ResourceLoader.load(override_value) as Material
        if material != null:
            mesh_instance.material_override = material

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-migration-script-bundle/scripts/assets/unit_visual_controller.gd =====
class_name UnitVisualController
extends Node

@export var model_anchor_path: NodePath = NodePath("../VisualRoot/ModelAnchor")
@export var placeholder_mesh_path: NodePath = NodePath("../VisualRoot/BodyMesh")

var unit: TacticalUnit
var model_anchor: Node3D
var placeholder_mesh: MeshInstance3D
var active_model: Node3D
var active_wrapper: AssetWrapper
var animation_player: AnimationPlayer
var animation_source_instance: Node3D
var attached_equipment: Array[Node3D] = []

func _ready() -> void:
    unit = get_parent() as TacticalUnit
    model_anchor = get_node_or_null(model_anchor_path) as Node3D
    placeholder_mesh = get_node_or_null(placeholder_mesh_path) as MeshInstance3D
    if unit == null:
        return
    unit.state_machine.state_changed.connect(_on_state_changed)
    unit.combat_component.action_started.connect(_on_action_started)
    unit.combat_component.action_finished.connect(_on_action_finished)

func apply_definition(definition: UnitDefinition) -> void:
    if definition == null or model_anchor == null:
        return
    _clear_model()
    if definition.model_scene == null:
        _show_placeholder(definition)
        return
    active_model = definition.model_scene.instantiate() as Node3D
    if active_model == null:
        _show_placeholder(definition)
        return
    model_anchor.add_child(active_model)
    placeholder_mesh.visible = false
    active_wrapper = active_model as AssetWrapper
    if active_wrapper != null:
        active_wrapper.ensure_character_sockets()
    _prepare_animation(definition)
    _attach_loadout(definition)
    _play_state(unit.state_machine.current_state)

func refresh_loadout() -> void:
    if unit == null or unit.definition == null or active_model == null:
        return
    _clear_equipment()
    _attach_loadout(unit.definition)

func _show_placeholder(definition: UnitDefinition) -> void:
    placeholder_mesh.visible = true
    var material := StandardMaterial3D.new()
    material.albedo_color = definition.tactical_color
    material.roughness = 0.75
    placeholder_mesh.material_override = material

func _clear_model() -> void:
    _clear_equipment()
    animation_player = null
    active_wrapper = null
    active_model = null
    if model_anchor != null:
        for child in model_anchor.get_children():
            child.queue_free()
    if placeholder_mesh != null:
        placeholder_mesh.visible = true

func _clear_equipment() -> void:
    for instance in attached_equipment:
        if is_instance_valid(instance):
            instance.queue_free()
    attached_equipment.clear()

func _attach_loadout(definition: UnitDefinition) -> void:
    if active_model == null:
        return
    if definition.starting_weapon != null and definition.starting_weapon.model_scene != null:
        _attach_scene(definition.starting_weapon.model_scene, &"weapon", Vector3.ZERO, Vector3.ZERO)
    if unit.inventory_component == null:
        return
    for slot in unit.inventory_component.equipment:
        var equipment_id := StringName(str(unit.inventory_component.equipment[slot]))
        var equipment := ContentDatabase.get_definition(equipment_id) as EquipmentDefinition
        if equipment == null or equipment.model_scene == null:
            continue
        var socket_id := &"back"
        if String(slot) in ["hand", "offhand"]:
            socket_id = &"left_hand"
        _attach_scene(equipment.model_scene, socket_id, Vector3.ZERO, Vector3.ZERO)

func _attach_scene(scene: PackedScene, socket_id: StringName, position_offset: Vector3, rotation_offset: Vector3) -> void:
    var socket := _get_socket(socket_id)
    if socket == null:
        DebugConsole.warn(&"assets", "Unit '%s' has no '%s' socket; visual equipment was skipped." % [unit.unit_id, socket_id])
        return
    var instance := scene.instantiate() as Node3D
    if instance == null:
        return
    socket.add_child(instance)
    instance.position = position_offset
    instance.rotation_degrees = rotation_offset
    attached_equipment.append(instance)

func _get_socket(socket_id: StringName) -> Node3D:
    if active_wrapper != null:
        return active_wrapper.get_socket(socket_id)
    for node in active_model.find_children("*%s*" % String(socket_id), "Node3D", true, false):
        if node is Node3D:
            return node as Node3D
    return active_model

func _prepare_animation(definition: UnitDefinition) -> void:
    var embedded_player := _find_animation_player(active_model)
    if definition.animation_library_scene == null and embedded_player != null:
        animation_player = embedded_player
        return
    animation_player = AnimationPlayer.new()
    animation_player.name = "MigratedAnimationPlayer"
    model_anchor.add_child(animation_player)
    animation_player.root_node = NodePath("..")
    if definition.animation_library_scene == null:
        return
    animation_source_instance = definition.animation_library_scene.instantiate() as Node3D
    if animation_source_instance == null:
        return
    animation_source_instance.name = "AnimationSource"
    animation_source_instance.visible = false
    animation_source_instance.process_mode = Node.PROCESS_MODE_DISABLED
    model_anchor.add_child(animation_source_instance)
    var source_player := _find_animation_player(animation_source_instance)
    var target_skeleton := _find_skeleton(active_model)
    if source_player == null or target_skeleton == null:
        DebugConsole.warn(&"assets", "Animation source or target skeleton missing for '%s'." % unit.unit_id)
        return
    _copy_animation_libraries(source_player, animation_player, target_skeleton)

func _copy_animation_libraries(source_player: AnimationPlayer, target_player: AnimationPlayer, target_skeleton: Skeleton3D) -> void:
    var target_skeleton_path := model_anchor.get_path_to(target_skeleton)
    for library_name in source_player.get_animation_library_list():
        var source_library := source_player.get_animation_library(library_name)
        if source_library == null:
            continue
        var target_library := AnimationLibrary.new()
        for animation_name in source_library.get_animation_list():
            var source_animation := source_library.get_animation(animation_name)
            if source_animation == null:
                continue
            var animation := source_animation.duplicate(true) as Animation
            _retarget_animation_paths(animation, target_skeleton_path, target_skeleton)
            target_library.add_animation(animation_name, animation)
        var migrated_name := StringName("migrated" if String(library_name).is_empty() else "migrated_%s" % library_name)
        if target_player.has_animation_library(migrated_name):
            target_player.remove_animation_library(migrated_name)
        target_player.add_animation_library(migrated_name, target_library)

func _retarget_animation_paths(animation: Animation, target_skeleton_path: NodePath, target_skeleton: Skeleton3D) -> void:
    for track_index in range(animation.get_track_count() - 1, -1, -1):
        var track_path := animation.track_get_path(track_index)
        var subnames := String(track_path.get_concatenated_subnames())
        if subnames.is_empty():
            animation.remove_track(track_index)
            continue
        var bone_name := subnames.get_slice(":", 0)
        if target_skeleton.find_bone(bone_name) < 0:
            var matched := _find_bone_case_insensitive(target_skeleton, bone_name)
            if matched.is_empty():
                animation.remove_track(track_index)
                continue
            subnames = matched + subnames.substr(bone_name.length())
        animation.track_set_path(track_index, NodePath("%s:%s" % [String(target_skeleton_path), subnames]))

func _find_bone_case_insensitive(skeleton: Skeleton3D, requested: String) -> String:
    var normalized_requested := _normalize_name(requested)
    for index in range(skeleton.get_bone_count()):
        var candidate := String(skeleton.get_bone_name(index))
        if _normalize_name(candidate) == normalized_requested:
            return candidate
    return ""

func _normalize_name(value: String) -> String:
    return value.to_lower().replace("_", "").replace("-", "").replace(" ", "").replace(":", "")

func _find_animation_player(root: Node) -> AnimationPlayer:
    if root == null:
        return null
    if root is AnimationPlayer:
        return root as AnimationPlayer
    for node in root.find_children("*", "AnimationPlayer", true, false):
        if node is AnimationPlayer:
            return node as AnimationPlayer
    return null

func _find_skeleton(root: Node) -> Skeleton3D:
    if root == null:
        return null
    if root is AssetWrapper:
        return (root as AssetWrapper).find_skeleton()
    for node in root.find_children("*", "Skeleton3D", true, false):
        if node is Skeleton3D:
            return node as Skeleton3D
    return null

func _play_state(state: StringName) -> void:
    if animation_player == null or unit == null or unit.definition == null:
        return
    var aliases: Array = unit.definition.animation_aliases.get(String(state), [String(state)])
    var animation_name := _find_animation_name(aliases)
    if animation_name != &"":
        animation_player.play(animation_name, 0.18)

func _find_animation_name(aliases: Array) -> StringName:
    var names := animation_player.get_animation_list()
    for alias in aliases:
        var token := str(alias).to_lower()
        for animation_name in names:
            if token in String(animation_name).to_lower():
                return animation_name
    return &""

func _on_state_changed(_previous: StringName, current: StringName) -> void:
    _play_state(current)

func _on_action_started(action_name: StringName, _target: Variant) -> void:
    _play_state(&"reloading" if action_name == &"reload" else &"firing")

func _on_action_finished(_action_name: StringName) -> void:
    _play_state(unit.state_machine.current_state)

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-migration-script-bundle/scripts/data/unit_definition.gd =====
class_name UnitDefinition
extends EchoDefinition

@export_range(1.0, 1000.0, 1.0) var maximum_health: float = 100.0
@export_range(0.1, 30.0, 0.1) var base_move_speed: float = 4.5
@export_range(0.0, 100.0, 0.1) var perception_range: float = 20.0
@export_range(0.0, 100.0, 0.1) var suppression_resistance: float = 20.0
@export var starting_weapon: WeaponDefinition
@export var starting_equipment: Array[EquipmentDefinition] = []
@export var abilities: Array[AbilityDefinition] = []
@export var model_scene: PackedScene
@export var animation_library_scene: PackedScene
@export var animation_aliases: Dictionary = {
    "idle": ["idle", "stand"],
    "moving": ["walk", "jog", "run"],
    "firing": ["fire", "shoot", "rifle"],
    "reloading": ["reload"],
    "pinned": ["crouch", "cover", "hit"],
    "dead": ["death", "die"],
}
@export var portrait: Texture2D
@export var tactical_color: Color = Color(0.25, 0.65, 1.0, 1.0)

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-migration-script-bundle/scripts/environment/asset_layout_spawner.gd =====
class_name AssetLayoutSpawner
extends Node3D

@export_file("*.json") var layout_path: String = "res://migration/generated/prague-decoration-plan.json"
@export var spawn_on_ready: bool = true
@export var default_collision_layer: int = 4
@export var default_collision_mask: int = 3

var spawned_assets: Dictionary = {}

func _ready() -> void:
    add_to_group("asset_layout_spawners")
    if spawn_on_ready:
        call_deferred("spawn_layout")

func spawn_layout() -> void:
    clear_layout()
    if not FileAccess.file_exists(layout_path):
        DebugConsole.warn(&"assets", "Asset layout is missing: %s" % layout_path)
        return
    var file := FileAccess.open(layout_path, FileAccess.READ)
    if file == null:
        return
    var parsed: Variant = JSON.parse_string(file.get_as_text())
    if not parsed is Dictionary:
        DebugConsole.error(&"assets", "Asset layout JSON root must be an object: %s" % layout_path)
        return
    for raw_placement in parsed.get("placements", []):
        if raw_placement is Dictionary:
            _spawn_placement(raw_placement)
    DebugConsole.log_message(&"assets", "Spawned %d migrated Prague asset placement(s)." % spawned_assets.size())

func clear_layout() -> void:
    for instance in spawned_assets.values():
        if is_instance_valid(instance):
            instance.queue_free()
    spawned_assets.clear()

func _spawn_placement(placement: Dictionary) -> void:
    var placement_id := StringName(str(placement.get("id", "")))
    var asset_id := StringName(str(placement.get("asset_id", "")))
    if placement_id == &"" or asset_id == &"":
        return
    var instance := AssetRegistry.instantiate_wrapper(asset_id) as Node3D
    if instance == null:
        DebugConsole.warn(&"assets", "Prague placement '%s' references unavailable asset '%s'." % [placement_id, asset_id])
        return
    instance.name = String(placement_id).to_pascal_case()
    add_child(instance)
    instance.position = _vector3(placement.get("position", [0, 0, 0]), Vector3.ZERO)
    instance.rotation_degrees = _vector3(placement.get("rotation_degrees", [0, 0, 0]), Vector3.ZERO)
    instance.scale *= _vector3(placement.get("scale", [1, 1, 1]), Vector3.ONE)
    instance.set_meta("echo_asset_id", asset_id)
    instance.set_meta("echo_placement_id", placement_id)
    spawned_assets[placement_id] = instance
    if bool(placement.get("collision", false)):
        call_deferred("_add_static_collision", instance)

func _add_static_collision(instance: Node3D) -> void:
    if not is_instance_valid(instance):
        return
    if not instance.find_children("*", "CollisionObject3D", true, false).is_empty():
        return
    for node in instance.find_children("*", "MeshInstance3D", true, false):
        var mesh_instance := node as MeshInstance3D
        if mesh_instance == null or mesh_instance.mesh == null:
            continue
        var shape := mesh_instance.mesh.create_trimesh_shape()
        if shape == null:
            continue
        var body := StaticBody3D.new()
        body.name = "%sCollision" % mesh_instance.name
        body.collision_layer = default_collision_layer
        body.collision_mask = default_collision_mask
        instance.add_child(body)
        body.transform = instance.global_transform.affine_inverse() * mesh_instance.global_transform
        var collision_shape := CollisionShape3D.new()
        collision_shape.shape = shape
        body.add_child(collision_shape)

func _vector3(value: Variant, fallback: Vector3) -> Vector3:
    if value is Array and value.size() >= 3:
        return Vector3(float(value[0]), float(value[1]), float(value[2]))
    if value is Dictionary:
        return Vector3(float(value.get("x", fallback.x)), float(value.get("y", fallback.y)), float(value.get("z", fallback.z)))
    return fallback

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-migration-script-bundle/scripts/tactical/tactical_unit.gd =====
class_name TacticalUnit
extends CharacterBody3D

signal selection_changed(is_selected: bool)
signal definition_applied(definition: UnitDefinition)
signal detection_changed(is_detected: bool)

@export var definition: UnitDefinition
@export var unit_id: StringName
@export var player_controlled: bool = true

@onready var navigation_agent: NavigationAgent3D = $NavigationAgent3D
@onready var visual_root: Node3D = $VisualRoot
@onready var body_mesh: MeshInstance3D = $VisualRoot/BodyMesh
@onready var visual_controller: UnitVisualController = $UnitVisualController
@onready var selection_marker: MeshInstance3D = $SelectionMarker
@onready var facing_indicator: MeshInstance3D = $FacingIndicator
@onready var health_component: HealthComponent = $HealthComponent
@onready var movement_component: MovementComponent = $MovementComponent
@onready var combat_component: CombatComponent = $CombatComponent
@onready var perception_component: PerceptionComponent = $PerceptionComponent
@onready var suppression_component: SuppressionComponent = $SuppressionComponent
@onready var inventory_component: InventoryComponent = $InventoryComponent
@onready var ability_component: AbilityComponent = $AbilityComponent
@onready var status_effect_component: StatusEffectComponent = $StatusEffectComponent
@onready var state_machine: UnitStateMachine = $StateMachine
@onready var command_queue: CommandQueue = $CommandQueue
@onready var overwatch_component: OverwatchComponent = $OverwatchComponent
@onready var ai_controller: AIUnitController = $AIUnitController
@onready var jammer_component: JammerComponent = $JammerComponent

var selected: bool = false
var detected_by_player: bool = true

func _ready() -> void:
    add_to_group("tactical_units")
    if player_controlled:
        add_to_group("player_units")
    else:
        add_to_group("enemy_units")
    selection_marker.visible = false
    facing_indicator.visible = false
    apply_definition(definition)
    movement_component.movement_started.connect(_on_movement_started)
    movement_component.movement_finished.connect(_on_movement_finished)
    health_component.died.connect(_on_died)
    ai_controller.configure_for_unit()
    jammer_component.configure_for_definition(definition)
    if not player_controlled:
        set_detected(false)

func apply_definition(value: UnitDefinition) -> void:
    if value == null:
        return
    definition = value
    if unit_id == &"":
        unit_id = definition.id
    health_component.configure(definition.maximum_health)
    movement_component.configure(definition.base_move_speed)
    combat_component.configure(definition.starting_weapon)
    perception_component.configure(definition.perception_range)
    suppression_component.configure(definition.suppression_resistance)
    ability_component.configure(definition.abilities)
    var strategic_loadout := {}
    if player_controlled and not GameFlow.campaign_state.is_empty():
        strategic_loadout = StrategicSystem.get_loadout(definition.id, GameFlow.campaign_state)
    inventory_component.configure(definition.starting_equipment, strategic_loadout)
    _apply_visual_definition()
    if is_node_ready():
        ai_controller.configure_for_unit()
        jammer_component.configure_for_definition(definition)
    definition_applied.emit(definition)

func _apply_visual_definition() -> void:
    if definition == null:
        return
    if visual_controller != null:
        visual_controller.apply_definition(definition)
    elif body_mesh != null:
        var material := StandardMaterial3D.new()
        material.albedo_color = definition.tactical_color
        material.roughness = 0.75
        body_mesh.material_override = material

func set_selected(value: bool) -> void:
    if selected == value:
        return
    selected = value
    selection_marker.visible = selected
    facing_indicator.visible = selected
    selection_changed.emit(selected)

func set_detected(value: bool) -> void:
    if player_controlled:
        value = true
    if detected_by_player == value:
        return
    detected_by_player = value
    visual_root.visible = value
    detection_changed.emit(value)

func can_move_to(target: Vector3) -> bool:
    return target.is_finite() and not is_queued_for_deletion() and suppression_component.state != SuppressionComponent.SuppressionState.BROKEN

func begin_move(target: Vector3, stance: int, final_facing: Vector3) -> void:
    overwatch_component.cancel_overwatch()
    combat_component.cancel_action()
    movement_component.begin_move(target, stance, final_facing)

func cancel_move() -> void:
    movement_component.cancel_move()

func is_moving() -> bool:
    return movement_component.moving

func begin_attack(target: TacticalUnit, fire_mode_id: StringName) -> bool:
    movement_component.cancel_move()
    return combat_component.begin_attack(target, fire_mode_id)

func begin_suppression(position: Vector3, radius: float) -> bool:
    movement_component.cancel_move()
    return combat_component.begin_suppression(position, radius)

func enqueue_move(target: Vector3, stance: int, final_facing: Vector3, append: bool, synchronization_group: StringName = &"") -> bool:
    var command := MoveCommand.new(target, stance, final_facing)
    command.synchronization_group = synchronization_group
    return command_queue.enqueue(command, append)

func enqueue_attack(target: TacticalUnit, fire_mode_id: StringName, append: bool, synchronization_group: StringName = &"") -> bool:
    var command := AttackCommand.new(target, fire_mode_id)
    command.synchronization_group = synchronization_group
    return command_queue.enqueue(command, append)

func enqueue_suppression(position: Vector3, radius: float, append: bool, synchronization_group: StringName = &"") -> bool:
    var command := SuppressCommand.new(position, radius)
    command.synchronization_group = synchronization_group
    return command_queue.enqueue(command, append)

func enqueue_overwatch(direction: Vector3, append: bool, synchronization_group: StringName = &"") -> bool:
    var command := OverwatchCommand.new(direction, 75.0, combat_component.weapon.maximum_range if combat_component.weapon != null else 18.0)
    command.synchronization_group = synchronization_group
    return command_queue.enqueue(command, append)

func enqueue_interaction(target: Node, action_id: StringName, append: bool, synchronization_group: StringName = &"") -> bool:
    var command: TacticalCommand
    if target is TacticalDoor:
        command = DoorCommand.new(target, action_id)
    else:
        command = InteractCommand.new(target, action_id)
    command.synchronization_group = synchronization_group
    return command_queue.enqueue(command, append)

func enqueue_gadget(gadget_type: StringName, target_position: Vector3, append: bool, synchronization_group: StringName = &"") -> bool:
    var command := UseGadgetCommand.new(gadget_type, target_position)
    command.synchronization_group = synchronization_group
    return command_queue.enqueue(command, append)

func enqueue_reload(append: bool, synchronization_group: StringName = &"") -> bool:
    var command := ReloadCommand.new()
    command.synchronization_group = synchronization_group
    return command_queue.enqueue(command, append)

func enqueue_heal(target: TacticalUnit, append: bool, synchronization_group: StringName = &"") -> bool:
    var command := HealCommand.new(target)
    command.synchronization_group = synchronization_group
    return command_queue.enqueue(command, append)

func _on_movement_started(_destination: Vector3, _stance: MovementComponent.MovementStance) -> void:
    state_machine.change_state(&"moving")

func _on_movement_finished(_destination: Vector3) -> void:
    state_machine.change_state(&"idle")

func _on_died() -> void:
    command_queue.clear(true)
    movement_component.cancel_move()
    combat_component.cancel_action()
    overwatch_component.cancel_overwatch()
    jammer_component.set_active(false)
    state_machine.change_state(&"dead")
    collision_layer = 0
    collision_mask = 0

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-migration-script-bundle/scripts/tools/project_validator.gd =====
@tool
class_name EchoProjectValidator
extends RefCounted

var _resources_by_id: Dictionary = {}

func validate_project() -> Dictionary:
    _resources_by_id.clear()
    var report := {
        "errors": [],
        "warnings": [],
        "definitions": 0,
        "assets": 0,
        "missions": 0,
        "dialogue_nodes": 0,
    }
    _scan_resources("res://data", report)
    _validate_cross_references(report)
    _write_report(report)
    return report

func _scan_resources(path: String, report: Dictionary) -> void:
    var directory := DirAccess.open(path)
    if directory == null:
        report.errors.append("Cannot open %s" % path)
        return
    directory.list_dir_begin()
    var entry := directory.get_next()
    while not entry.is_empty():
        if not entry.begins_with("."):
            var full_path := path.path_join(entry)
            if directory.current_is_dir():
                _scan_resources(full_path, report)
            elif entry.get_extension().to_lower() in ["tres", "res"]:
                _validate_resource(full_path, report)
        entry = directory.get_next()
    directory.list_dir_end()

func _validate_resource(path: String, report: Dictionary) -> void:
    var resource := ResourceLoader.load(path)
    if resource == null:
        report.errors.append("Could not load %s" % path)
        return
    if not _has_property(resource, &"id"):
        return
    report.definitions += 1
    var definition_id := String(resource.get("id"))
    if definition_id.is_empty():
        report.errors.append("Definition has no id: %s" % path)
        return
    if _resources_by_id.has(definition_id):
        report.errors.append(
            "Duplicate id '%s': %s and %s" % [definition_id, _resources_by_id[definition_id].resource_path, path]
        )
        return
    _resources_by_id[definition_id] = resource
    if resource.has_method("validate"):
        for issue in resource.validate():
            report.errors.append("%s: %s" % [path, issue])
    if resource is MissionDefinition:
        report.missions += 1
        _validate_mission(resource, report)
    elif resource is DialogueDefinition:
        _validate_dialogue(resource, report)
    elif resource is AssetManifestDefinition:
        report.assets += 1
        _validate_asset(resource, report)
    elif resource is UnitDefinition:
        if resource.model_scene == null:
            report.warnings.append("Unit '%s' has no migrated model scene." % resource.id)
        if resource.animation_library_scene == null:
            report.warnings.append("Unit '%s' has no animation-library scene." % resource.id)
    elif resource is WeaponDefinition:
        if resource.model_scene == null:
            report.warnings.append("Weapon '%s' has no visual model scene." % resource.id)
    elif resource is EquipmentDefinition:
        if resource.model_scene == null:
            report.warnings.append("Equipment '%s' has no visual model scene." % resource.id)

func _validate_cross_references(report: Dictionary) -> void:
    for definition_id in _resources_by_id:
        var resource: Resource = _resources_by_id[definition_id]
        if resource is ObjectiveDefinition:
            _validate_id_array(resource.prerequisites, "ObjectiveDefinition", definition_id, "prerequisite", report)
        elif resource is ResearchDefinition:
            _validate_id_array(resource.prerequisites, "ResearchDefinition", definition_id, "prerequisite", report)
            for unlock_id in resource.unlock_ids:
                if not _resources_by_id.has(String(unlock_id)):
                    report.warnings.append("Research '%s' unlocks unknown id '%s'." % [definition_id, unlock_id])
        elif resource is FacilityDefinition:
            _validate_id_array(resource.prerequisites, "FacilityDefinition", definition_id, "prerequisite", report)
        elif resource is ChapterDefinition:
            if resource.next_chapter_id != &"":
                _validate_id(resource.next_chapter_id, "ChapterDefinition", definition_id, "next chapter", report)
            for mission in resource.mandatory_missions + resource.optional_missions:
                if mission == null:
                    report.errors.append("Chapter '%s' contains a null mission reference." % definition_id)

func _validate_mission(mission: MissionDefinition, report: Dictionary) -> void:
    if mission.map_scene == null:
        report.errors.append("Mission '%s' has no map scene." % mission.id)
        return
    if mission.squad_minimum < 1 or mission.squad_maximum < mission.squad_minimum:
        report.errors.append("Mission '%s' has an invalid squad range." % mission.id)
    var objective_ids := {}
    for objective in mission.objectives:
        if objective == null:
            report.errors.append("Mission '%s' contains a null objective." % mission.id)
            continue
        var key := String(objective.id)
        if objective_ids.has(key):
            report.errors.append("Mission '%s' repeats objective '%s'." % [mission.id, key])
        objective_ids[key] = true
    for objective in mission.objectives:
        if objective == null:
            continue
        for prerequisite in objective.prerequisites:
            if not objective_ids.has(String(prerequisite)):
                report.errors.append(
                    "Mission '%s' objective '%s' requires missing objective '%s'." % [
                        mission.id, objective.id, prerequisite
                    ]
                )
    _validate_mission_targets(mission, report)

func _validate_mission_targets(mission: MissionDefinition, report: Dictionary) -> void:
    var root := mission.map_scene.instantiate()
    if root == null:
        report.errors.append("Mission '%s' map could not be instantiated." % mission.id)
        return
    var available_targets := {}
    _collect_scene_targets(root, available_targets)
    for objective in mission.objectives:
        if objective == null:
            continue
        for target_id in objective.target_ids:
            if not available_targets.has(String(target_id)):
                report.warnings.append(
                    "Mission '%s' objective '%s' target '%s' was not found in the map scene." % [
                        mission.id, objective.id, target_id
                    ]
                )
    root.free()

func _collect_scene_targets(node: Node, targets: Dictionary) -> void:
    targets[node.name.to_snake_case()] = true
    if node is MissionInteractable and node.interactable_id != &"":
        targets[String(node.interactable_id)] = true
    elif node is TacticalUnit and node.unit_id != &"":
        targets[String(node.unit_id)] = true
    elif node is TacticalDoor and node.door_id != &"":
        targets[String(node.door_id)] = true
    for child in node.get_children():
        _collect_scene_targets(child, targets)

func _validate_dialogue(dialogue: DialogueDefinition, report: Dictionary) -> void:
    var nodes := {}
    for node in dialogue.nodes:
        if node == null or node.id == &"":
            report.errors.append("Dialogue '%s' contains a node without an id." % dialogue.id)
            continue
        if nodes.has(String(node.id)):
            report.errors.append("Dialogue '%s' repeats node '%s'." % [dialogue.id, node.id])
        nodes[String(node.id)] = node
        report.dialogue_nodes += 1
    if not nodes.has(String(dialogue.entry_node_id)):
        report.errors.append("Dialogue '%s' has an invalid entry node '%s'." % [dialogue.id, dialogue.entry_node_id])
    for node_id in nodes:
        var node: DialogueNodeDefinition = nodes[node_id]
        if node.next_node_id != &"" and not nodes.has(String(node.next_node_id)):
            report.errors.append("Dialogue '%s' node '%s' links to missing node '%s'." % [dialogue.id, node.id, node.next_node_id])
        var choice_ids := {}
        for choice in node.choices:
            if choice == null or choice.id == &"":
                report.errors.append("Dialogue '%s' node '%s' has a choice without an id." % [dialogue.id, node.id])
                continue
            if choice_ids.has(String(choice.id)):
                report.errors.append("Dialogue '%s' node '%s' repeats choice '%s'." % [dialogue.id, node.id, choice.id])
            choice_ids[String(choice.id)] = true
            if choice.next_node_id != &"" and not nodes.has(String(choice.next_node_id)):
                report.errors.append("Dialogue '%s' choice '%s' links to missing node '%s'." % [dialogue.id, choice.id, choice.next_node_id])
        if node.timeout_choice_id != &"" and not choice_ids.has(String(node.timeout_choice_id)):
            report.errors.append("Dialogue '%s' node '%s' has invalid timeout choice '%s'." % [dialogue.id, node.id, node.timeout_choice_id])

func _validate_asset(asset: AssetManifestDefinition, report: Dictionary) -> void:
    if asset.wrapper_scene == null:
        report.errors.append("Asset '%s' has no wrapper scene." % asset.id)
        return
    var license_text := asset.license_name.strip_edges().to_lower()
    if license_text.is_empty():
        report.warnings.append("Asset '%s' has no license metadata." % asset.id)
    elif "review" in license_text or "verify" in license_text or "unknown" in license_text:
        report.warnings.append("Asset '%s' still requires licence verification." % asset.id)
    if not asset.imported_path.is_empty() and not ResourceLoader.exists(asset.imported_path):
        report.errors.append("Asset '%s' imported path is missing: %s" % [asset.id, asset.imported_path])
    var wrapper := asset.wrapper_scene.instantiate()
    if wrapper is AssetWrapper:
        var typed_wrapper := wrapper as AssetWrapper
        typed_wrapper.asset_id = asset.id
        for issue in typed_wrapper.validate_wrapper(asset.required_sockets):
            report.errors.append(issue)
    else:
        report.warnings.append("Asset '%s' wrapper root does not use AssetWrapper." % asset.id)
    wrapper.free()

func _validate_id_array(
        ids: Array[StringName],
        expected_class: String,
        owner_id: String,
        relationship: String,
        report: Dictionary) -> void:
    for target_id in ids:
        _validate_id(target_id, expected_class, owner_id, relationship, report)

func _validate_id(
        target_id: StringName,
        expected_class: String,
        owner_id: String,
        relationship: String,
        report: Dictionary) -> void:
    var resource: Resource = _resources_by_id.get(String(target_id))
    if resource == null:
        report.errors.append("'%s' has missing %s '%s'." % [owner_id, relationship, target_id])
        return
    var actual_class := resource.get_script().get_global_name() if resource.get_script() != null else resource.get_class()
    if actual_class != expected_class and not resource.is_class(expected_class):
        report.errors.append("'%s' %s '%s' is %s, expected %s." % [owner_id, relationship, target_id, actual_class, expected_class])

func _has_property(resource: Resource, property_name: StringName) -> bool:
    for property in resource.get_property_list():
        if StringName(property.name) == property_name:
            return true
    return false

func _write_report(report: Dictionary) -> void:
    var file := FileAccess.open("res://migration/validation-report.json", FileAccess.WRITE)
    if file != null:
        file.store_string(JSON.stringify(report, "\t"))

// ===== godot/echo-godot-phase1-14/echo-migration-script-bundle/tests/test_asset_migration.gd =====
extends RefCounted

static func run(test: EchoTestFramework) -> void:
    test.suite("Migrated asset integration")
    var expected_models := {
        "res://data/units/operator_alpha.tres": "operator_alpha",
        "res://data/units/operator_bravo.tres": "operator_bravo",
        "res://data/units/operator_charlie.tres": "operator_charlie",
        "res://data/enemies/security_guard.tres": "security_guard",
        "res://data/enemies/hunter.tres": "hunter",
        "res://data/enemies/jammer.tres": "jammer",
        "res://data/enemies/observer.tres": "observer",
    }
    for path in expected_models:
        var definition := ResourceLoader.load(path) as UnitDefinition
        test.assert_true(definition != null, "Loads %s definition" % expected_models[path])
        if definition != null:
            test.assert_true(definition.model_scene != null, "%s has a migrated model binding" % expected_models[path])
            test.assert_true(definition.animation_library_scene != null, "%s has an animation source binding" % expected_models[path])
    var medkit := ResourceLoader.load("res://data/equipment/field_medkit.tres") as EquipmentDefinition
    test.assert_true(medkit != null and medkit.model_scene != null, "Field medkit has a migrated visual model")
    for material_path in [
        "res://assets/materials/reception_linoleum.tres",
        "res://assets/materials/icu_vinyl.tres",
        "res://assets/materials/server_raised_floor.tres",
        "res://assets/materials/utility_worn_floor.tres",
        "res://assets/materials/corrupted_floor.tres",
    ]:
        var material := ResourceLoader.load(material_path) as StandardMaterial3D
        test.assert_true(material != null and material.albedo_texture != null, "%s uses a migrated floor texture" % material_path.get_file())
    test.assert_true(FileAccess.file_exists("res://migration/generated/prague-decoration-plan.json"), "Prague migrated-prop layout exists")
    test.assert_true(FileAccess.file_exists("res://migration/generated/asset-bindings.json"), "Production asset bindings exist")

        </div>

        <div id="settingsModal" class="modal-backdrop" hidden>
          <section class="settings-modal glass" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby="settingsTitle">
            <div class="panel-heading"><div><p class="eyebrow">ACCESSIBILITY & CONTROLS</p><h2 id="settingsTitle">Game settings</h2></div><button id="closeSettingsButton" class="icon-button" type="button">×</button></div>
            <div class="settings-grid">
              <label><span>Subtitle size</span><select id="subtitleSizeSetting"><option value="small">Small</option><option value="medium">Medium</option><option value="large">Large</option></select></label>
              <label><span>Colour vision</span><select id="colorVisionSetting"><option value="default">Default</option><option value="deuteranopia">Deuteranopia</option><option value="tritanopia">Tritanopia</option><option value="high-contrast">High contrast</option></select></label>
              <label><span>Pause input</span><select id="pauseModeSetting"><option value="toggle">Toggle</option><option value="hold">Hold</option></select></label>
              <label><span>UI scale</span><input id="uiScaleSetting" type="range" min="0.85" max="1.2" step="0.05" value="1" /></label>
              <label><span>HUD mode</span><select id="hudModeSetting"><option value="full">Full</option><option value="compact">Compact tactical</option></select></label>
              <label><span>HUD opacity</span><input id="hudOpacitySetting" type="range" min="0.65" max="1" step="0.05" value="0.92" /></label>
              <label class="check"><input id="reducedMotionSetting" type="checkbox" /><span>Reduced camera motion</span></label>
              <label class="check"><input id="edgeScrollingSetting" type="checkbox" checked /><span>Screen-edge scrolling</span></label>
              <label class="check"><input id="highlightInteractablesSetting" type="checkbox" checked /><span>Highlight interactables</span></label>
              <label class="check"><input id="audioEnabledSetting" type="checkbox" checked /><span>Procedural UI audio</span></label>
            </div>
            <h3>Key bindings</h3>
            <div class="binding-grid">
              <div><span>Pause</span><button data-binding-action="pause" type="button">SPACE</button></div>
              <div><span>Slow motion</span><button data-binding-action="slow" type="button">T</button></div>
              <div><span>Overwatch</span><button data-binding-action="overwatch" type="button">O</button></div>
              <div><span>Reload</span><button data-binding-action="reload" type="button">R</button></div>
              <div><span>Stabilize</span><button data-binding-action="stabilize" type="button">H</button></div>
              <div><span>Interact</span><button data-binding-action="interact" type="button">I</button></div>
              <div><span>Cover overlay</span><button data-binding-action="coverOverlay" type="button">C</button></div>
              <div><span>Threat overlay</span><button data-binding-action="threatOverlay" type="button">V</button></div>
              <div><span>Select squad</span><button data-binding-action="selectSquad" type="button">F</button></div>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-actions"><button id="resetSettingsButton" type="button">RESET DEFAULTS</button></div>
          </section>
        </div>

        <div id="saveModal" class="modal-backdrop" hidden>
          <section class="save-modal glass" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby="saveTitle">
            <div class="panel-heading"><div><p class="eyebrow">MISSION CONTINUITY</p><h2 id="saveTitle">Save and load</h2></div><button id="closeSaveButton" class="icon-button" type="button">×</button></div>
            <div class="save-slots">
              <article data-save-slot-card="autosave"><div><strong>AUTOSAVE</strong><small data-slot-meta>Empty slot</small></div><button data-load-slot="autosave" type="button">LOAD</button></article>
              <article data-save-slot-card="slot-1"><div><strong>SLOT 1</strong><small data-slot-meta>Empty slot</small></div><div><button data-save-slot="slot-1" data-save-label="Manual Slot 1" type="button">SAVE</button><button data-load-slot="slot-1" type="button">LOAD</button></div></article>
              <article data-save-slot-card="slot-2"><div><strong>SLOT 2</strong><small data-slot-meta>Empty slot</small></div><div><button data-save-slot="slot-2" data-save-label="Manual Slot 2" type="button">SAVE</button><button data-load-slot="slot-2" type="button">LOAD</button></div></article>
              <article data-save-slot-card="slot-3"><div><strong>SLOT 3 / IMPORT</strong><small data-slot-meta>Empty slot</small></div><div><button data-save-slot="slot-3" data-save-label="Manual Slot 3" type="button">SAVE</button><button data-load-slot="slot-3" type="button">LOAD</button></div></article>
            </div>
            <div class="save-transfer"><button id="exportSaveButton" type="button">EXPORT LATEST JSON</button><label class="file-button">IMPORT JSON<input id="importSaveInput" type="file" accept="application/json" /></label></div>
          </section>
        </div>

        <div id="dialogueHistory" class="modal-backdrop" hidden>
          <section class="dialogue-history-modal glass">
            <div class="panel-heading"><div><p class="eyebrow">COMMS ARCHIVE</p><h2>Dialogue history</h2></div><button id="closeDialogueHistory" class="icon-button" type="button">×</button></div>
            <div id="dialogueHistoryList" class="dialogue-history-list"></div>
          </section>
        </div>

        <div id="helpModal" class="modal-backdrop" hidden>
          <section class="help-modal glass" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby="helpTitle">
            <div class="panel-heading">
              <div><p class="eyebrow">FIELD CONTROLS</p><h2 id="helpTitle">Tactical command guide</h2></div>
              <button id="closeHelpButton" class="icon-button" type="button" aria-label="Close help">×</button>
            </div>
            <div class="controls-grid">
              <div><kbd>Left click</kbd><span>Select agent</span></div>
              <div><kbd>Drag</kbd><span>Box select</span></div>
              <div><kbd>Shift + click</kbd><span>Add/remove selection</span></div>
              <div><kbd>Right click ground</kbd><span>Move / take nearby cover</span></div>
              <div><kbd>Right click object</kbd><span>Interact / attack</span></div>
              <div><kbd>Shift + right click</kbd><span>Append command</span></div>
              <div><kbd>Space</kbd><span>Tactical pause</span></div>
              <div><kbd>T</kbd><span>Slow motion</span></div>
              <div><kbd>O / R</kbd><span>Overwatch / reload</span></div>
              <div><kbd>H / I</kbd><span>Stabilize / interact</span></div>
              <div><kbd>G</kbd><span>Signature ability</span></div>
              <div><kbd>C / V</kbd><span>Cover / threat overlays</span></div>
              <div><kbd>W A S D</kbd><span>Pan camera</span></div>
              <div><kbd>Q / E</kbd><span>Rotate 90°</span></div>
              <div><kbd>Middle drag</kbd><span>Free rotate</span></div>
              <div><kbd>Mouse wheel</kbd><span>Zoom</span></div>
              <div><kbd>1–4 / F</kbd><span>Select agent / squad</span></div>
              <div><kbd>Ctrl / Alt + 1–4</kbd><span>Save / recall camera bookmark</span></div>
              <div><kbd>Esc</kbd><span>Close modal/preview or clear selected orders</span></div>
            </div>
          </section>
        </div>

        <div id="loadingScreen" class="loading-screen">
          <div class="loading-emblem">ION</div>
          <p>INITIALIZING TACTICAL SIMULATION</p>
          <div class="loading-line"><span></span></div>
          <small id="loadingStatus">Booting Babylon.js renderer…</small>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <script type="module" src="/src/main.ts"></script>
  </body>
</html>

// ===== src/app/Game.ts =====
import { createEchoContentRegistry } from "../content/GameContent";
import { GameSession } from "./GameSession";

export class Game {
  private session?: GameSession;

  async start(): Promise<void> {
    const content = createEchoContentRegistry();
    content.validateOrThrow();
    this.session = new GameSession(content);
    await this.session.start();
  }
}

// ===== src/app/GameSession.ts =====
import { Color3, Scene, Vector3 } from "@babylonjs/core";
import initRecast from "recast-detour";
import { AssetPipeline } from "../assets/AssetPipeline";
import type { HumanoidAnimationName } from "../assets/AssetManifest";
import { TacticalCamera } from "../camera/TacticalCamera";
import { AttackCommand } from "../commands/AttackCommand";
import { InteractionCommand } from "../commands/InteractionCommand";
import { ReloadCommand } from "../commands/ReloadCommand";
import { StabilizeCommand } from "../commands/StabilizeCommand";
import { EngineFactory } from "../engine/EngineFactory";
import { EventBus } from "../engine/EventBus";
import { RandomService } from "../engine/RandomService";
import { TimeManager } from "../engine/TimeManager";
import { Agent, type AgentDefinition } from "../entities/Agent";
import { Enemy } from "../entities/Enemy";
import { SaveGameManager } from "../save/SaveGameManager";
import { SettingsManager } from "../settings/SettingsManager";
import { CombatSystem } from "../systems/CombatSystem";
import { AbilitySystem } from "../systems/AbilitySystem";
import { AudioSystem } from "../systems/AudioSystem";
import { DeveloperTools } from "../systems/DeveloperTools";
import { LLMLogger } from "../systems/LLMLogger";
import { TacticalPreviewSystem } from "../systems/TacticalPreviewSystem";
import { CommandSystem } from "../systems/CommandSystem";
import { CoverSystem } from "../systems/CoverSystem";
import { DialogueSystem } from "../systems/DialogueSystem";
import { EchoObserverSystem } from "../systems/EchoObserverSystem";
import { EnemyAISystem } from "../systems/EnemyAISystem";
import { GameInput } from "../systems/GameInput";
import { InvestigationSystem } from "../systems/InvestigationSystem";
import { NavigationSystem } from "../systems/NavigationSystem";
import { SelectionSystem } from "../systems/SelectionSystem";
import { VisionSystem } from "../systems/VisionSystem";
import { StoryState } from "../story/StoryState";
import { CampaignManager } from "../campaign/CampaignManager";
import { CampaignController } from "../campaign/CampaignController";
import { DoorSystem } from "../systems/DoorSystem";
import { GadgetSystem } from "../systems/GadgetSystem";
import { HudController } from "../ui/HudController";
import { MinimapController } from "../ui/MinimapController";
import { installMegakitEnvironment } from "../world/MegakitEnvironment";
import { installClinicVisualUpgrade } from "../world/ClinicVisualUpgrade";
import { installScifiEssentialsEnvironment } from "../world/ScifiEssentialsEnvironment";
import { capSceneMaterialLightCount } from "../rendering/LightingBudget";
import type { ContentRegistry } from "../runtime/content/ContentRegistry";
import type { MissionModule } from "../runtime/mission/MissionRuntime";
import type { HospitalWorld } from "../world/WorldTypes";
import type { PragueRuntimeContext } from "../content/chapters/prague/PragueMissionModule";
import { SequencePlayer, type SequencePlayerSnapshot } from "../runtime/sequence/SequencePlayer";
import { AssetBundleManager } from "../runtime/content/AssetBundleManager";
import { SnapshotRegistry } from "../runtime/save/SnapshotRegistry";

export class GameSession {
  constructor(private readonly content: ContentRegistry) {}

  async start(): Promise<void> {
    const canvas = required<HTMLCanvasElement>("renderCanvas");
    const loadingStatus = required("loadingStatus");
    loadingStatus.textContent = "Starting Babylon.js renderer…";

    const bus = new EventBus();
    const time = new TimeManager(bus);
    const random = new RandomService();
    const settings = new SettingsManager();
    settings.bindModal(time);
    const audio = new AudioSystem(bus);
    settings.subscribe((value) => audio.setEnabled(value.audioEnabled));
    const { engine, renderer } = await EngineFactory.create(canvas);

    const missionId = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get("mission") ?? "prague";
    const missionDefinition = this.content.getMission(missionId);
    const missionModule = this.content.requireMissionModule<MissionModule<HospitalWorld, PragueRuntimeContext>>(missionId);
    loadingStatus.textContent = `Constructing ${missionDefinition?.title ?? missionId} simulation…`;
    const scene = new Scene(engine);
    scene.metadata = { extractionActive: false, missionId, chapterId: missionDefinition?.chapterId ?? "prague" };
    const world = await missionModule.createWorld({ scene });
    const tacticalCamera = new TacticalCamera(scene, engine, canvas);
    settings.subscribe((value) => tacticalCamera.setAccessibilityOptions({
      edgeScrolling: value.edgeScrolling,
      reducedMotion: value.reducedMotion,
    }));

    const story = new StoryState();
    const campaign = new CampaignManager(bus);
    const assetPipeline = new AssetPipeline(scene);
    await assetPipeline.initialize([]);
    const assetBundles = new AssetBundleManager(assetPipeline, this.content);
    await assetBundles.loadForMission(missionId);

    loadingStatus.textContent = "Installing Modular Sci-Fi MegaKit visuals…";
    const megakitReport = await installMegakitEnvironment(scene, world);
    if (megakitReport.warnings.length > 0) {
      console.warn("MegaKit loaded with warnings", megakitReport.warnings);
    }

    loadingStatus.textContent = "Dressing clinic rooms and calibrating practical lights…";
    const visualUpgradeReport = installClinicVisualUpgrade(scene, world);
    if (visualUpgradeReport.warnings.length > 0) {
      console.warn("Clinic visual upgrade loaded with warnings", visualUpgradeReport.warnings);
    }

    loadingStatus.textContent = "Installing Sci-Fi Essentials prop dressing…";
    const scifiEssentialsReport = await installScifiEssentialsEnvironment(scene, world);
    if (scifiEssentialsReport.warnings.length > 0) {
      console.warn("Sci-Fi Essentials dressing loaded with warnings", scifiEssentialsReport.warnings);
    }

    loadingStatus.textContent = "Baking tactical navigation mesh…";
    const recast = await initRecast();
    const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
    const navigation = new NavigationSystem(scene, world.navMeshes, recast, params.get("navdebug") === "1");
    time.attachNavigation(navigation.plugin);

    loadingStatus.textContent = "Deploying ION Alpha Team and Echo drones…";
    const agents = createAgentDefinitions().map((definition) => new Agent(definition, scene));
    const enemies = world.enemyDefinitions.map((definition) => new Enemy(definition, scene));
    applyCampaignLoadouts(agents, campaign);
    agents.forEach((agent) => navigation.registerAgent(agent));
    enemies.forEach((enemy) => navigation.registerEnemy(enemy));

    const assetReports = await Promise.all(agents.map(async (agent) => {
      const assetId = `agent-${agent.id}`;
      const report = await assetPipeline.attachOptionalModel(assetId, agent.externalVisualRoot);
      if (report.meshCount > 0 && report.valid) {
        agent.setVisualMode("external");
        report.socketBindings = assetPipeline.attachCharacterEquipment(
          assetId,
          agent.definition.equipmentProfile ?? "command",
          agent.definition.color,
        );
      } else {
        agent.setVisualMode("procedural");
      }
      return report;
    }));
    const cappedMaterialCount = capSceneMaterialLightCount(scene);
    if (params.get("assetdebug") === "1" && cappedMaterialCount > 0) {
      console.info(`Capped ${cappedMaterialCount} imported materials to four simultaneous lights.`);
    }

    const selection = new SelectionSystem(agents, scene, engine, canvas, required("selectionBox"), bus);
    const cover = new CoverSystem(scene, world.coverDefinitions);
    const investigation = new InvestigationSystem(scene, world.interactables, world.evidenceDefinitions, story, bus);
    const doors = new DoorSystem(world.doorDefinitions, navigation, bus);
    const gadgets = new GadgetSystem(scene, agents, enemies, bus);
    bus.on("gadget:deployed", ({ agentId, gadgetId }) => {
      campaign.consumeAssignedEquipment(agentId, gadgetId === "smoke" ? "smoke-grenade" : "emp-grenade");
    });
    bus.on("door:changed", ({ agentId, action }) => {
      if (action === "breach") campaign.consumeAssignedEquipment(agentId, "breach-charge");
    });
    settings.subscribe((value) => investigation.setMarkersVisible(value.highlightInteractables));
    const vision = new VisionSystem(
      scene,
      agents,
      enemies,
      world.roomDefinitions,
      world.securitySensors,
      world.wallMeshes,
      gadgets,
      tacticalCamera.camera,
      bus,
    );
    const combat = new CombatSystem(scene, agents, enemies, navigation, cover, vision, bus, random, gadgets);
    const abilities = new AbilitySystem(agents, combat, bus);
    const commands = new CommandSystem(scene, agents, navigation, cover, combat, investigation, gadgets, doors, bus);
    const enemyAI = new EnemyAISystem(agents, enemies, navigation, vision, combat, bus);
    const echoObserver = new EchoObserverSystem(scene, agents, enemies, investigation, story, bus);
    const dialogue = new DialogueSystem(this.content.allDialogues(), story, bus, this.content.characters);
    const sequencePlayer = new SequencePlayer(story, bus, {
      setMusic: (state) => audio.setMusicState(state),
      playSound: (assetId) => audio.playStinger(assetId),
      loadMission: (requestedMissionId) => bus.emit("content:mission-requested", { missionId: requestedMissionId }),
    });
    const snapshotRegistry = new SnapshotRegistry();
    snapshotRegistry.register({
      snapshotId: "sequence",
      snapshot: () => sequencePlayer.snapshot(),
      restore: (snapshot) => sequencePlayer.restore(
        snapshot as SequencePlayerSnapshot ?? { commandIndex: 0, completed: true },
        (id) => this.content.getScene(id),
      ),
    });
    snapshotRegistry.register({
      snapshotId: "asset-bundles",
      snapshot: () => assetBundles.snapshot(),
      restore: (snapshot) => assetBundles.restore(snapshot as { loadedBundleIds?: string[] } | undefined),
    });
    bus.on("dialogue:opened", () => time.acquirePause("dialogue"));
    bus.on("dialogue:closed", () => time.releasePause("dialogue"));
    const hud = new HudController(agents, enemies, selection, commands, combat, investigation, abilities, story, time, bus, renderer);
    const mission = missionModule.createRuntime({
      agents,
      enemies,
      receptionCenter: world.objectiveCenter,
      extractionCenter: world.extractionCenter,
      investigation,
      echoObserver,
      story,
      hud,
      bus,
    });
    const minimap = new MinimapController(
      required<HTMLCanvasElement>("minimapCanvas"),
      agents,
      enemies,
      world.roomDefinitions,
      investigation,
      tacticalCamera,
    );
    minimap.setObjective(world.objectiveCenter);
    const saves = new SaveGameManager(
      agents,
      enemies,
      navigation,
      commands,
      investigation,
      echoObserver,
      story,
      time,
      mission,
      combat,
      cover,
      vision,
      dialogue,
      abilities,
      random,
      bus,
      campaign,
      doors,
      gadgets,
      snapshotRegistry,
    );
    saves.bindUI();
    new CampaignController(campaign, time, bus, this.content);

    const preview = new TacticalPreviewSystem(scene, navigation, vision);
    new GameInput(
      canvas,
      scene,
      tacticalCamera,
      selection,
      commands,
      combat,
      cover,
      vision,
      investigation,
      doors,
      enemies,
      time,
      settings,
      abilities,
      preview,
      bus,
    );

    void sequencePlayer;
    new DeveloperTools(agents, enemies, investigation, bus);
    new LLMLogger(bus, agents);

    selection.selectAll();
    cover.updateIndicators(selection.selectedAgents);
    time.setState("paused");

    bus.on("mission:start", () => {
      time.setState("running");
      mission.startMission();
      bus.emit("toast", { message: "Alpha Team deployed. Secure the reception checkpoint.", tone: "success" });
    });
    bus.on("mission:continue", () => {
      time.setState("running");
      mission.continueAfterDebrief();
    });
    bus.on("mission:stage-changed", ({ stage }) => {
      const extractionActive = stage === "extraction" || stage === "debrief" || stage === "complete";
      scene.metadata = { ...(scene.metadata ?? {}), extractionActive };
      minimap.setObjective(stage === "checkpoint" ? world.objectiveCenter : undefined);
      minimap.setExtraction(extractionActive ? world.extractionCenter : undefined);
      if (stage === "debrief" || stage === "failed") time.setState("paused");
    });
    bus.on("selection:changed", () => cover.updateIndicators(selection.selectedAgents));
    bus.on("enemy:discovered", () => bus.emit("alert:changed", { level: "SUSPICIOUS" }));
    bus.on("agent:downed", () => {
      selection.selectAll();
      cover.updateIndicators(selection.selectedAgents);
    });
    bus.on("combat:attack", ({ attackerId, targetId, attackerTeam, targetTeam, hit }) => {
      if (attackerTeam === "ion") {
        assetPipeline.triggerCharacterAnimation(`agent-${attackerId}`, "fire");
      }
      if (hit && targetTeam === "ion") {
        assetPipeline.triggerCharacterAnimation(`agent-${targetId}`, "hit");
      }
    });
    bus.on("ability:used", ({ agentId, abilityId }) => {
      const state = abilityAnimation(abilityId);
      if (state) assetPipeline.triggerCharacterAnimation(`agent-${agentId}`, state);
    });

    if (params.get("assetdebug") === "1") hud.setAssetDiagnostics(assetReports);

    const fixedStep = 1 / 30;
    let accumulator = 0;
    let lastTime = performance.now();
    engine.runRenderLoop(() => {
      const now = performance.now();
      const unscaledDelta = Math.min(0.05, (now - lastTime) / 1000);
      lastTime = now;
      accumulator = Math.min(0.2, accumulator + unscaledDelta * time.scale);

      tacticalCamera.update(unscaledDelta);
      vision.update(0, selection.selectedAgents);
      while (accumulator >= fixedStep) {
        commands.update(fixedStep);
        combat.update(fixedStep);
        abilities.update(fixedStep);
        enemyAI.update(fixedStep);
        echoObserver.update(fixedStep);
        vision.update(fixedStep, selection.selectedAgents);
