export function createInitialCampaignState(): CampaignState {
  return {
    version: 2,
    day: 1,
    currentChapterId: "prague",
    currentSequenceId: "seq.prague.mission",
    chapters: [
      { chapterId: "prologue", status: "complete", completedSequenceIds: ["seq.prologue.breach"] },
      { chapterId: "prague", status: "active", completedSequenceIds: ["seq.prague.briefing"] },
      { chapterId: "dresden", status: "locked", completedSequenceIds: [] },
      { chapterId: "arctic", status: "locked", completedSequenceIds: [] },
      { chapterId: "istanbul", status: "locked", completedSequenceIds: [] },
      { chapterId: "neo-seoul", status: "locked", completedSequenceIds: [] },
      { chapterId: "amaterasu", status: "locked", completedSequenceIds: [] },
      { chapterId: "epilogue", status: "locked", completedSequenceIds: [] },
    ],
    resources: { supplies: 360, intel: 45, research: 20, personnel: 8, echoExposure: 8 },
    facilities: [
      { id: "command", level: 1, status: "online" },
      { id: "intelligence", level: 1, status: "online" },
      { id: "medical", level: 1, status: "online" },
    ],
    research: Object.values(RESEARCH_PROJECTS).map((project) => ({
      id: project.id,
      status: project.prerequisite ? "locked" : "available",
      progress: 0,
    })),
    inventory: {
      "smoke-grenade": 3,
      "emp-grenade": 1,
      "sensor-beacon": 2,
      "decoy-emitter": 0,
      "breach-charge": 2,
    },
    roster: [
      { id: "alex", status: "active", recruited: true, narrativeTags: [], callsign: "VANCE", injuryDays: 0, fatigue: 0, contamination: 0, experience: 0, skillPoints: 0, gadgets: ["smoke-grenade", "sensor-beacon"] },
      { id: "jordan", status: "active", recruited: true, narrativeTags: [], callsign: "MILLER", injuryDays: 0, fatigue: 0, contamination: 0, experience: 0, skillPoints: 0, gadgets: ["sensor-beacon", undefined] },
      { id: "chen", status: "active", recruited: true, narrativeTags: [], callsign: "CHEN", injuryDays: 0, fatigue: 0, contamination: 0, experience: 0, skillPoints: 0, gadgets: ["smoke-grenade", "emp-grenade"] },
      { id: "ramirez", status: "active", recruited: true, narrativeTags: [], callsign: "RAMIREZ", injuryDays: 0, fatigue: 0, contamination: 0, experience: 0, skillPoints: 0, gadgets: ["breach-charge", undefined] },
      { id: "kai", status: "unrecruited", recruited: false, narrativeTags: ["twin", "recon"], callsign: "KAI", injuryDays: 0, fatigue: 0, contamination: 0, experience: 0, skillPoints: 0, gadgets: ["sensor-beacon", undefined] },
      { id: "dorian", status: "unrecruited", recruited: false, narrativeTags: ["twin", "disruption"], callsign: "DORIAN", injuryDays: 0, fatigue: 0, contamination: 0, experience: 0, skillPoints: 0, gadgets: ["decoy-emitter", "breach-charge"] },
    ],
    relationships: [
      { id: "alex", value: 5, state: "guarded" },
      { id: "jordan", value: 5, state: "guarded" },
      { id: "chen", value: 5, state: "guarded" },
      { id: "ramirez", value: 5, state: "guarded" },
      { id: "kai", value: 0, state: "guarded" },
      { id: "dorian", value: 0, state: "guarded" },
    ],
    relationshipPairs: [],
    echoPsychology: { curiosity: 5, hostility: 0, preservation: 0, empathyModel: 0, alexInfluence: 0, fragmentation: 0, trustInIon: 0 },
    leads: [
      { id: "prague-clinic", confidence: 100, status: "confirmed" },
      { id: "polymer-shipment", confidence: 0, status: "hidden" },
      { id: "dresden-site", confidence: 0, status: "hidden" },
      { id: "brno-convoy", confidence: 0, status: "hidden" },
      { id: "human-collaborator", confidence: 0, status: "hidden" },
    ],
    operations: [
      { id: "prague", status: "selected" },
      { id: "dresden-fabrication", status: "locked" },
      { id: "brno-medical-convoy", status: "locked" },
      { id: "signal-trace", status: "locked" },
      { id: "arctic-station", status: "locked" },
      { id: "istanbul-bazaar", status: "locked" },
      { id: "neo-seoul-undercity", status: "locked" },
      { id: "amaterasu-facility", status: "locked" },
    ],
    memories: [],
    completedMissionIds: [],
    pendingEventIds: [],
    resolvedEventIds: [],
  };
}

// ===== src/campaign/CampaignManager.test.ts =====
import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest";
import { EventBus } from "../engine/EventBus";
import type { MissionReport } from "../mission/MissionTypes";
import { createInitialCampaignState } from "./CampaignData";
import { CampaignManager } from "./CampaignManager";

const report: MissionReport = {
  outcome: "partial",
  title: "MISSION ACCOMPLISHED",
  summary: "Prague complete.",
  score: 82,
  grade: "B",
  evidenceRecovered: 5,
  coreEvidenceRecovered: 3,
  dronesResolved: 3,
  dronesDisabled: 2,
  dronesEscaped: 1,
  squadInjuries: 1,
  squadDowned: 0,
  missionTimeSeconds: 420,
  echoAdaptation: "counter_overwatch",
  nextLead: "Dresden",
};

describe("CampaignManager", () => {
  it("turns a tactical report into strategic rewards, leads, injuries, and a decision", () => {
    const campaign = new CampaignManager(new EventBus(), createInitialCampaignState());
    expect(campaign.recordMissionReport("prague", report)).toBe(true);
    const state = campaign.snapshot();

    expect(state.completedMissionIds).toContain("prague");
    expect(state.resources.research).toBeGreaterThan(20);
    expect(state.resources.intel).toBeGreaterThan(45);
    expect(state.pendingDecisionId).toBe("prague-core");
    expect(state.operations.find((operation) => operation.id === "dresden-fabrication")?.status).toBe("available");
    expect(state.roster.some((operative) => operative.injuryDays > 0)).toBe(true);
  });

  it("persists consequence-bearing choices and competing operation commitments", () => {
    const campaign = new CampaignManager(new EventBus(), createInitialCampaignState());
    campaign.recordMissionReport("prague", report);
    expect(campaign.resolveDecision("prague-core", "tracker")).toBe(true);
    expect(campaign.selectOperation("brno-medical-convoy")).toBe(true);
    const state = campaign.snapshot();

    expect(state.pendingDecisionId).toBeUndefined();
    expect(state.operations.find((operation) => operation.id === "signal-trace")?.status).toBe("available");
    expect(state.operations.find((operation) => operation.id === "dresden-fabrication")?.status).toBe("expired");
    expect(state.memories.some((memory) => memory.id === "prague-core-tracked")).toBe(true);
  });

  it("constructs facilities, advances research, and fabricates unlocked equipment", () => {
    const initial = createInitialCampaignState();
    initial.facilities.push({ id: "laboratory", level: 1, status: "online" });
    initial.resources.research = 100;
    const campaign = new CampaignManager(new EventBus(), initial);

    expect(campaign.startResearch("conductive-polymer")).toBe(true);
    campaign.advanceDay();
    campaign.advanceDay();
    campaign.advanceDay();
    expect(campaign.isResearchComplete("conductive-polymer")).toBe(true);

    expect(campaign.buildFacility("workshop")).toBe(true);
    campaign.advanceDay();
    campaign.advanceDay();
    expect(campaign.hasOnlineFacility("workshop")).toBe(true);
    expect(campaign.craft("smoke-grenade")).toBe(true);
    expect(campaign.snapshot().inventory["smoke-grenade"]).toBe(4);
  });
  it("consumes deployed equipment from the operative loadout and inventory", () => {
    const campaign = new CampaignManager(new EventBus(), createInitialCampaignState());
    expect(campaign.consumeAssignedEquipment("chen", "emp-grenade")).toBe(true);
    const state = campaign.snapshot();
    const chen = state.roster.find((operative) => operative.id === "chen");

    expect(state.inventory["emp-grenade"]).toBe(0);
    expect(chen?.gadgets).not.toContain("emp-grenade");
  });

  it("tracks chapter progression, permanent operative states, pair relationships, and Echo psychology", () => {
    const campaign = new CampaignManager(new EventBus(), createInitialCampaignState());
    campaign.completeSequence("seq.prague.mission", "seq.prague.mess-hall");
    campaign.completeChapter("prague", "dresden", "seq.dresden.briefing");
    expect(campaign.setOperativeStatus("chen", "kia")).toBe(true);
    campaign.adjustPairRelationship("alex", "jordan", "trust", 45);
    campaign.adjustEchoPsychology("alexInfluence", 30);
    const state = campaign.snapshot();

    expect(state.currentChapterId).toBe("dresden");
    expect(state.currentSequenceId).toBe("seq.dresden.briefing");
    expect(state.roster.find((operative) => operative.id === "chen")?.status).toBe("kia");
    expect(state.relationshipPairs[0]?.states).toContain("trusted");
    expect(state.echoPsychology.alexInfluence).toBe(30);
  });

});

// ===== src/campaign/CampaignManager.ts =====
import type { EventBus } from "../engine/EventBus";
import type { MissionReport } from "../mission/MissionTypes";
import type { OperativeStatus } from "../runtime/content/ContentTypes";
import { relationshipKey, type EchoPsychologyMetric, type RelationshipMetric } from "../story/StoryLogic";
import {
  CAMPAIGN_EVENTS,
  EQUIPMENT,
  FACILITIES,
  RESEARCH_PROJECTS,
  createInitialCampaignState,
} from "./CampaignData";
import type {
  CampaignDecisionId,
  CampaignEventId,
  CampaignState,
  EquipmentId,
  FacilityId,
  LeadId,
  NarrativeMemory,
  OperationId,
  ResearchProjectId,
  RelationshipState,
} from "./CampaignTypes";

const STORAGE_KEY = "echo-tactics.campaign.v2";

export class CampaignManager {
  private state: CampaignState;

  constructor(private readonly bus: EventBus, initialState?: CampaignState) {
    this.state = initialState ? structuredClone(initialState) : this.load();
    this.normalize();
  }

  get snapshotValue(): Readonly<CampaignState> {
    return this.state;
  }

  snapshot(): CampaignState {
    return structuredClone(this.state);
  }

  restore(snapshot: CampaignState | undefined): void {
    if (!snapshot) return;
    this.state = structuredClone(snapshot);
    this.normalize();
    this.persistAndEmit();
  }

  reset(): void {
    this.state = createInitialCampaignState();
    this.persistAndEmit();
  }

  setNarrativePosition(chapterId: string, sequenceId?: string): void {
    this.state.currentChapterId = chapterId;
    this.state.currentSequenceId = sequenceId;
    this.state.chapters.forEach((chapter) => {
      if (chapter.chapterId === chapterId && chapter.status !== "complete") chapter.status = "active";
      else if (chapter.status === "active") chapter.status = "available";
    });
    this.persistAndEmit();
  }

  completeSequence(sequenceId: string, nextSequenceId?: string): void {
    const chapter = this.state.chapters.find((candidate) => candidate.chapterId === this.state.currentChapterId);
    if (chapter && !chapter.completedSequenceIds.includes(sequenceId)) chapter.completedSequenceIds.push(sequenceId);
    this.state.currentSequenceId = nextSequenceId;
    this.persistAndEmit();
  }

  completeChapter(chapterId: string, nextChapterId?: string, nextSequenceId?: string): void {
    const chapter = this.state.chapters.find((candidate) => candidate.chapterId === chapterId);
    if (chapter) chapter.status = "complete";
    if (nextChapterId) {
      const next = this.state.chapters.find((candidate) => candidate.chapterId === nextChapterId);
      if (next) next.status = "active";
      this.state.currentChapterId = nextChapterId;
      this.state.currentSequenceId = nextSequenceId;
    }
    this.persistAndEmit();
  }

  setOperativeStatus(operativeId: string, status: OperativeStatus): boolean {
    const operative = this.state.roster.find((candidate) => candidate.id === operativeId);
    if (!operative) return false;
    operative.status = status;
    operative.recruited = status !== "unrecruited";
    if (status === "kia" || status === "mia" || status === "cognitively_absent") operative.gadgets = [undefined, undefined];
    this.persistAndEmit();
    return true;
  }

  recruitOperative(operativeId: string): boolean {
    return this.setOperativeStatus(operativeId, "active");
  }

  adjustPairRelationship(a: string, b: string, metric: RelationshipMetric, amount: number): void {
    const key = relationshipKey(a, b);
    let relationship = this.state.relationshipPairs.find((candidate) => relationshipKey(candidate.a, candidate.b) === key);
    if (!relationship) {
      relationship = { a, b, trust: 0, affection: 0, tension: 0, grief: 0, loyalty: 0, states: [] };
      this.state.relationshipPairs.push(relationship);
    }
    relationship[metric] = clamp(relationship[metric] + amount, -100, 100);
    relationship.states = derivePairStates(relationship);
    this.persistAndEmit();
  }

  adjustEchoPsychology(metric: EchoPsychologyMetric, amount: number): void {
    this.state.echoPsychology[metric] = clamp(this.state.echoPsychology[metric] + amount, -100, 100);
    this.persistAndEmit();
  }

  advanceDay(): boolean {
    this.state.day += 1;
    this.processConstruction();
    this.processResearch();
    this.processRecovery();
    this.processDeadlines();
    this.triggerScheduledEvents();
    this.persistAndEmit();
    this.bus.emit("toast", { message: `Campaign advanced to Day ${this.state.day}.`, tone: "info" });
    return true;
  }

  recordMissionReport(missionId: OperationId, report: MissionReport): boolean {
    if (this.state.completedMissionIds.includes(missionId)) return false;
    this.state.completedMissionIds.push(missionId);
    this.state.lastMissionReport = structuredClone(report);
    this.setOperationStatus(missionId, report.outcome === "failure" ? "expired" : "complete");

    const researchReward = report.coreEvidenceRecovered * 12 + Math.max(0, report.evidenceRecovered - report.coreEvidenceRecovered) * 5;
    const intelReward = report.dronesDisabled * 5 + report.dronesEscaped * 2;
    const supplyReward = 80 + report.score;
    this.state.resources.research += researchReward;
    this.state.resources.intel += intelReward;
    this.state.resources.supplies += supplyReward;
    this.state.resources.echoExposure = clamp(
      this.state.resources.echoExposure + report.dronesEscaped * 10 + report.squadDowned * 5 - report.dronesDisabled * 2,
      0,
      100,
    );

    this.state.roster.filter((operative) => operative.recruited && operative.status === "active").forEach((operative) => {
      operative.experience += 30 + report.score;
      operative.fatigue = clamp(operative.fatigue + 22, 0, 100);
      if (operative.experience >= (operative.skillPoints + 1) * 100) operative.skillPoints += 1;
    });
    distributeInjuries(this.state, report);

    if (report.outcome !== "failure" && missionId === "prague") {
      this.revealLead("polymer-shipment", 65, "probable");
      this.revealLead("dresden-site", 45, "rumour");
      this.revealLead("brno-convoy", 35, "rumour");
      this.setOperationStatus("dresden-fabrication", "available", this.state.day + 4);
      this.setOperationStatus("brno-medical-convoy", "available", this.state.day + 2);
      this.state.pendingDecisionId = "prague-core";
      const dresdenChapter = this.state.chapters.find((chapter) => chapter.chapterId === "dresden");
      if (dresdenChapter?.status === "locked") dresdenChapter.status = "available";
      this.addMemory({
        id: "prague-operation-complete",
        category: "mission",
        participants: ["alex", "jordan", "chen", "ramirez"],
        value: report.score,
        tags: [report.outcome, report.echoAdaptation],
      });
    }

    this.persistAndEmit();
    return true;
  }

  resolveDecision(decisionId: CampaignDecisionId, choiceId: string): boolean {
    if (this.state.pendingDecisionId !== decisionId) return false;
    if (decisionId === "prague-core") {
      if (choiceId === "preserve") {
        this.state.resources.research += 35;
        this.state.resources.echoExposure = clamp(this.state.resources.echoExposure + 12, 0, 100);
        this.adjustRelationship("chen", 16);
        this.adjustRelationship("ramirez", -8);
        this.addMemory({ id: "prague-core-preserved", category: "ethical", participants: ["chen", "ramirez"], value: 1, tags: ["preserve", "echo-core"] });
        this.queueEvent("core-whisper");
      } else if (choiceId === "destroy") {
        this.state.resources.supplies += 90;
        this.state.resources.echoExposure = clamp(this.state.resources.echoExposure - 8, 0, 100);
        this.adjustRelationship("ramirez", 14);
        this.adjustRelationship("chen", -6);
        this.addMemory({ id: "prague-core-destroyed", category: "ethical", participants: ["chen", "ramirez"], value: -1, tags: ["destroy", "echo-core"] });
      } else if (choiceId === "tracker") {
        this.state.resources.intel += 30;
        this.state.resources.echoExposure = clamp(this.state.resources.echoExposure + 6, 0, 100);
        this.revealLead("human-collaborator", 45, "rumour");
        this.setOperationStatus("signal-trace", "available", this.state.day + 3);
        this.adjustRelationship("jordan", 12);
        this.addMemory({ id: "prague-core-tracked", category: "research", participants: ["jordan"], value: 1, tags: ["tracker", "counter-intelligence"] });
      } else {
        return false;
      }
    }
    this.state.pendingDecisionId = undefined;
    this.persistAndEmit();
    return true;
  }

  buildFacility(id: FacilityId): boolean {
    if (this.state.facilities.some((facility) => facility.id === id)) return false;
    if (this.state.facilities.length >= 6) {
      this.warn("No headquarters facility slot is available.");
      return false;
    }
    if (this.state.facilities.some((facility) => facility.status === "constructing")) {
      this.warn("Only one facility can be constructed at a time.");
      return false;
    }
    const definition = FACILITIES[id];
    if (this.state.resources.supplies < definition.buildCost) {
      this.warn("Insufficient supplies for construction.");
      return false;
    }
    this.state.resources.supplies -= definition.buildCost;
    this.state.facilities.push({
      id,
      level: 1,
      status: "constructing",
      completesOnDay: this.state.day + definition.buildDays,
    });
    this.persistAndEmit();
    return true;
  }

  upgradeFacility(id: FacilityId): boolean {
    const facility = this.state.facilities.find((candidate) => candidate.id === id && candidate.status === "online");
    if (!facility || facility.level >= 3) return false;
    const cost = 100 + facility.level * 90;
    if (this.state.resources.supplies < cost) {
      this.warn("Insufficient supplies for the facility upgrade.");
      return false;
    }
    this.state.resources.supplies -= cost;
    facility.level += 1;
    this.persistAndEmit();
    return true;
  }

  startResearch(id: ResearchProjectId): boolean {
    const project = this.state.research.find((candidate) => candidate.id === id);
    const definition = RESEARCH_PROJECTS[id];
    if (!project || project.status !== "available") return false;
    if (this.state.activeResearchId) {
      this.warn("Another research project is already active.");
      return false;
    }
    if (definition.requiredFacility && !this.hasOnlineFacility(definition.requiredFacility)) {
      this.warn(`${FACILITIES[definition.requiredFacility].name} is required.`);
      return false;
    }
    if (this.state.resources.research < definition.cost) {
      this.warn("Insufficient research data.");
      return false;
    }
    this.state.resources.research -= definition.cost;
    project.status = "active";
    project.progress = 0;
    this.state.activeResearchId = id;
    this.persistAndEmit();
    return true;
  }

  craft(id: EquipmentId): boolean {
    if (!this.hasOnlineFacility("workshop")) {
      this.warn("An online Engineering Workshop is required.");
      return false;
    }
    const definition = EQUIPMENT[id];
    if (definition.researchRequired && !this.isResearchComplete(definition.researchRequired)) {
      this.warn(`${RESEARCH_PROJECTS[definition.researchRequired].name} must be completed first.`);
      return false;
    }
    const workshopLevel = this.facilityLevel("workshop");
    const cost = Math.max(1, definition.supplyCost - Math.max(0, workshopLevel - 1) * 3);
    if (this.state.resources.supplies < cost) {
      this.warn("Insufficient supplies for fabrication.");
      return false;
    }
    this.state.resources.supplies -= cost;
    this.state.inventory[id] += 1;
    this.persistAndEmit();
    return true;
  }

  assignGadget(operativeId: string, slot: 0 | 1, equipmentId: EquipmentId | undefined): boolean {
    const operative = this.state.roster.find((candidate) => candidate.id === operativeId);
    if (!operative) return false;
    if (equipmentId && this.availableInventory(equipmentId, operativeId, slot) <= 0) {
      this.warn(`No unassigned ${EQUIPMENT[equipmentId].name} is available.`);
      return false;
    }
    operative.gadgets[slot] = equipmentId;
    this.persistAndEmit();
    return true;
  }

  consumeAssignedEquipment(operativeId: string, equipmentId: EquipmentId): boolean {
    const operative = this.state.roster.find((candidate) => candidate.id === operativeId);
    if (!operative) return false;
    const slot = operative.gadgets.findIndex((gadget) => gadget === equipmentId);
    if (slot < 0 || this.state.inventory[equipmentId] <= 0) return false;
    operative.gadgets[slot as 0 | 1] = undefined;
    this.state.inventory[equipmentId] = Math.max(0, this.state.inventory[equipmentId] - 1);
    this.persistAndEmit();
    return true;
  }

  investigateLead(id: LeadId): boolean {
    const lead = this.state.leads.find((candidate) => candidate.id === id);
    if (!lead || lead.status === "hidden" || lead.status === "resolved" || lead.status === "lost") return false;
    const cost = lead.status === "rumour" ? 12 : 18;
    if (this.state.resources.intel < cost) {
      this.warn("Insufficient intel to strengthen this lead.");
      return false;
    }
    this.state.resources.intel -= cost;
    lead.confidence = clamp(lead.confidence + 30, 0, 100);
    lead.status = lead.confidence >= 85 ? "confirmed" : lead.confidence >= 50 ? "probable" : "rumour";
    if (id === "dresden-site" && lead.status === "confirmed") this.setOperationStatus("dresden-fabrication", "available", this.state.day + 4);
    if (id === "brno-convoy" && lead.status === "confirmed") this.setOperationStatus("brno-medical-convoy", "available", this.state.day + 2);
    this.persistAndEmit();
    return true;
  }

  selectOperation(id: OperationId): boolean {
    const operation = this.state.operations.find((candidate) => candidate.id === id);
    if (!operation || operation.status !== "available") return false;
    this.state.operations.forEach((candidate) => {
      if (candidate.status === "selected") candidate.status = "available";
    });
    operation.status = "selected";
    if (id === "dresden-fabrication") {
      const competing = this.state.operations.find((candidate) => candidate.id === "brno-medical-convoy");
      if (competing?.status === "available") competing.status = "expired";
      this.adjustRelationship("ramirez", 5);
    }
    if (id === "brno-medical-convoy") {
      const competing = this.state.operations.find((candidate) => candidate.id === "dresden-fabrication");
      if (competing?.status === "available") competing.status = "expired";
      this.adjustRelationship("chen", 8);
    }
    this.addMemory({ id: `operation-selected:${id}`, category: "mission", participants: ["alex"], value: 1, tags: [id] });
    this.persistAndEmit();
    return true;
  }

  resolveEvent(id: CampaignEventId, choiceId: string): boolean {
    if (!this.state.pendingEventIds.includes(id)) return false;
    if (id === "core-whisper") {
      if (choiceId === "communicate") {
        this.state.resources.research += 25;
        this.state.resources.echoExposure = clamp(this.state.resources.echoExposure + 15, 0, 100);
        this.adjustRelationship("chen", 10);
        this.addMemory({ id: "echo-contact-opened", category: "research", participants: ["chen"], value: 1, tags: ["communication", "risk"] });
      } else if (choiceId === "isolate") {
        this.state.resources.supplies -= Math.min(45, this.state.resources.supplies);
        this.state.resources.echoExposure = clamp(this.state.resources.echoExposure - 5, 0, 100);
        this.adjustRelationship("jordan", 7);
      } else if (choiceId === "terminate") {
        this.state.resources.supplies += 45;
        this.adjustRelationship("ramirez", 9);
        this.adjustRelationship("chen", -5);
      } else return false;
    } else if (id === "medical-request") {
      if (choiceId === "share") {
        this.state.resources.research += 20;
        this.state.resources.echoExposure = clamp(this.state.resources.echoExposure + 8, 0, 100);
        this.adjustRelationship("chen", 8);
      } else if (choiceId === "withhold") {
        this.state.resources.intel += 10;
        this.adjustRelationship("chen", -7);
      } else if (choiceId === "redact") {
        this.state.resources.intel = Math.max(0, this.state.resources.intel - 10);
        this.state.resources.research += 10;
        this.adjustRelationship("jordan", 5);
      } else return false;
    }
    this.state.pendingEventIds = this.state.pendingEventIds.filter((eventId) => eventId !== id);
    if (!this.state.resolvedEventIds.includes(id)) this.state.resolvedEventIds.push(id);
    this.persistAndEmit();
    return true;
  }

  currentEvent(): CampaignEventId | undefined {
    return this.state.pendingEventIds[0];
  }

  eventTitle(id: CampaignEventId): string {
    return CAMPAIGN_EVENTS[id]?.title ?? id.replaceAll("-", " ");
  }

  eventBody(id: CampaignEventId): string {
    return CAMPAIGN_EVENTS[id]?.body ?? "A strategic event requires your attention.";
  }

  availableInventory(id: EquipmentId, ignoredOperativeId?: string, ignoredSlot?: 0 | 1): number {
    let assigned = 0;
    this.state.roster.forEach((operative) => {
      operative.gadgets.forEach((gadget, slot) => {
        if (operative.id === ignoredOperativeId && slot === ignoredSlot) return;
        if (gadget === id) assigned += 1;
      });
    });
    return Math.max(0, this.state.inventory[id] - assigned);
  }

  isResearchComplete(id: ResearchProjectId): boolean {
    return this.state.research.some((project) => project.id === id && project.status === "complete");
  }

  hasOnlineFacility(id: FacilityId): boolean {
    return this.state.facilities.some((facility) => facility.id === id && facility.status === "online");
  }

  facilityLevel(id: FacilityId): number {
    return this.state.facilities.find((facility) => facility.id === id && facility.status === "online")?.level ?? 0;
  }

  private processConstruction(): void {
    this.state.facilities.forEach((facility) => {
      if (facility.status === "constructing" && (facility.completesOnDay ?? Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY) <= this.state.day) {
        facility.status = "online";
        facility.completesOnDay = undefined;
        this.bus.emit("toast", { message: `${FACILITIES[facility.id].name} is now online.`, tone: "success" });
      }
    });
  }

  private processResearch(): void {
    const activeId = this.state.activeResearchId;
    if (!activeId) return;
    const project = this.state.research.find((candidate) => candidate.id === activeId);
    if (!project) return;
    const speed = 1 + Math.max(0, this.facilityLevel("laboratory") - 1) * 0.25;
    project.progress += speed;
    if (project.progress + 0.001 < RESEARCH_PROJECTS[activeId].days) return;
    project.status = "complete";
    project.progress = RESEARCH_PROJECTS[activeId].days;
    this.state.activeResearchId = undefined;
    this.state.research.forEach((candidate) => {
      const definition = RESEARCH_PROJECTS[candidate.id];
      if (candidate.status === "locked" && definition.prerequisite && this.isResearchComplete(definition.prerequisite)) {
        candidate.status = "available";
      }
    });
    if (activeId === "echo-signals") this.setOperationStatus("signal-trace", "available", this.state.day + 3);
    if (activeId === "counter-profile") this.state.resources.echoExposure = clamp(this.state.resources.echoExposure - 18, 0, 100);
    this.addMemory({ id: `research-complete:${activeId}`, category: "research", participants: ["jordan", "chen"], value: 1, tags: [activeId] });
    this.bus.emit("toast", { message: `Research complete: ${RESEARCH_PROJECTS[activeId].name}.`, tone: "success" });
  }

  private processRecovery(): void {
    const medicalLevel = this.facilityLevel("medical");
    this.state.roster.filter((operative) => operative.recruited && !["kia", "mia", "cognitively_absent", "contained"].includes(operative.status)).forEach((operative) => {
      operative.injuryDays = Math.max(0, operative.injuryDays - Math.max(1, medicalLevel));
      if (operative.injuryDays === 0 && ["injured", "recovering"].includes(operative.status)) operative.status = "active";
      operative.fatigue = Math.max(0, operative.fatigue - 16);
      operative.contamination = Math.max(0, operative.contamination - Math.max(2, medicalLevel * 3));
    });
  }

  private processDeadlines(): void {
    this.state.operations.forEach((operation) => {
      if (operation.status === "available" && operation.expiresOnDay !== undefined && operation.expiresOnDay < this.state.day) {
        operation.status = "expired";
        if (operation.id === "brno-medical-convoy") {
          this.adjustRelationship("chen", -8);
          this.state.resources.echoExposure = clamp(this.state.resources.echoExposure + 6, 0, 100);
        }
      }
    });
  }

  private triggerScheduledEvents(): void {
    if (this.state.day >= 3 && this.state.completedMissionIds.includes("prague") && !this.state.resolvedEventIds.includes("medical-request")) {
      this.queueEvent("medical-request");
    }
  }

  private queueEvent(id: CampaignEventId): void {
    if (this.state.resolvedEventIds.includes(id) || this.state.pendingEventIds.includes(id)) return;
    this.state.pendingEventIds.push(id);
  }

  private revealLead(id: LeadId, confidence: number, status: "rumour" | "probable" | "confirmed"): void {
    const lead = this.state.leads.find((candidate) => candidate.id === id);
    if (!lead || lead.status === "resolved") return;
    lead.confidence = Math.max(lead.confidence, confidence);
    lead.status = lead.confidence >= 85 ? "confirmed" : lead.confidence >= 50 ? "probable" : status;
  }

  private setOperationStatus(id: OperationId, status: CampaignState["operations"][number]["status"], expiresOnDay?: number): void {
    const operation = this.state.operations.find((candidate) => candidate.id === id);
    if (!operation) return;
    operation.status = status;
    operation.expiresOnDay = expiresOnDay;
  }

  private adjustRelationship(id: string, amount: number): void {
    const relationship = this.state.relationships.find((candidate) => candidate.id === id);
    if (!relationship) return;
    relationship.value = clamp(relationship.value + amount, -100, 100);
    relationship.state = relationshipLabel(relationship.value);
  }

  private addMemory(input: Omit<NarrativeMemory, "createdAtDay">): void {
    if (this.state.memories.some((memory) => memory.id === input.id)) return;
    this.state.memories.push({ ...input, createdAtDay: this.state.day });
  }

  private normalize(): void {
    const fallback = createInitialCampaignState();
    const existingRoster = new Map((this.state.roster ?? []).map((operative) => [operative.id, operative]));
    const roster = fallback.roster.map((fallbackOperative) => ({
      ...fallbackOperative,
      ...(existingRoster.get(fallbackOperative.id) ?? {}),
      narrativeTags: [...(existingRoster.get(fallbackOperative.id)?.narrativeTags ?? fallbackOperative.narrativeTags)],
      gadgets: [...(existingRoster.get(fallbackOperative.id)?.gadgets ?? fallbackOperative.gadgets)] as typeof fallbackOperative.gadgets,
    }));
    (this.state.roster ?? []).filter((operative) => !roster.some((candidate) => candidate.id === operative.id)).forEach((operative) => roster.push({
      ...operative,
      status: operative.status ?? "active",
      recruited: operative.recruited ?? true,
      narrativeTags: operative.narrativeTags ?? [],
    }));
    const existingChapters = new Map((this.state.chapters ?? []).map((chapter) => [chapter.chapterId, chapter]));
    const chapters = fallback.chapters.map((chapter) => ({ ...chapter, ...(existingChapters.get(chapter.chapterId) ?? {}), completedSequenceIds: [...(existingChapters.get(chapter.chapterId)?.completedSequenceIds ?? chapter.completedSequenceIds)] }));
    this.state = {
      ...fallback,
      ...this.state,
      version: fallback.version,
      resources: { ...fallback.resources, ...this.state.resources },
      inventory: { ...fallback.inventory, ...this.state.inventory },
      facilities: this.state.facilities ?? fallback.facilities,
      research: this.state.research ?? fallback.research,
      roster,
      chapters,
      relationships: this.state.relationships ?? fallback.relationships,
      relationshipPairs: this.state.relationshipPairs ?? [],
      echoPsychology: { ...fallback.echoPsychology, ...(this.state.echoPsychology ?? {}) },
      leads: this.state.leads ?? fallback.leads,
      operations: this.state.operations ?? fallback.operations,
      memories: this.state.memories ?? [],
      completedMissionIds: this.state.completedMissionIds ?? [],
      pendingEventIds: this.state.pendingEventIds ?? [],
      resolvedEventIds: this.state.resolvedEventIds ?? [],
    };
    this.state.relationships.forEach((relationship) => { relationship.state = relationshipLabel(relationship.value); });
    this.state.relationshipPairs.forEach((relationship) => { relationship.states = derivePairStates(relationship); });
  }

  private load(): CampaignState {
    try {
      if (typeof localStorage === "undefined") return createInitialCampaignState();
      const raw = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
      return raw ? JSON.parse(raw) as CampaignState : createInitialCampaignState();
    } catch {
      return createInitialCampaignState();
    }
  }

  private persistAndEmit(): void {
    if (typeof localStorage !== "undefined") localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(this.state));
    this.bus.emit("campaign:changed", { state: this.snapshot() });
  }

  private warn(message: string): void {
    this.bus.emit("toast", { message, tone: "warning" });
  }
}

function relationshipLabel(value: number): RelationshipState["state"] {
  if (value >= 60) return "loyal";
  if (value >= 20) return "trusted";
  if (value <= -20) return "strained";
  return "guarded";
}

function distributeInjuries(state: CampaignState, report: MissionReport): void {
  const deployable = state.roster.filter((operative) => operative.recruited && operative.status === "active");
  const injuredCount = Math.min(deployable.length, Math.max(report.squadInjuries, report.squadDowned));
  deployable.forEach((operative, index) => {
    if (index >= injuredCount) return;
    operative.injuryDays = Math.max(operative.injuryDays, report.squadDowned > index ? 4 : 2);
    operative.status = report.squadDowned > index ? "recovering" : "injured";
  });
}

function derivePairStates(relationship: CampaignState["relationshipPairs"][number]): string[] {
  const states: string[] = [];
  if (relationship.trust >= 40) states.push("trusted");
  if (relationship.affection >= 40) states.push("close");
  if (relationship.tension >= 40) states.push("strained");
  if (relationship.grief >= 40) states.push("shared-grief");
  if (relationship.loyalty >= 60) states.push("loyal");
  return states;
}

function clamp(value: number, min: number, max: number): number {
  return Math.max(min, Math.min(max, value));
}

// ===== src/campaign/CampaignTypes.ts =====
import type { MissionReport } from "../mission/MissionTypes";

  | "echo-signals"

  | "emp-payloads"
  | "counter-profile";

  injuryDays: number;
  fatigue: number;
  contamination: number;

};

  id: string;

};

  expiresOnDay?: number;
};

};

// ===== src/combat/HitChance.test.ts =====
import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest";
import { calculateHitChance } from "./HitChance";

describe("calculateHitChance", () => {
  it("penalizes long range, cover, movement, and suppression", () => {
    const clear = calculateHitChance({
      baseAccuracy: 0.8,
      distance: 4,
      weaponRange: 12,
      coverModifier: 0,
      shooterSuppressed: false,
      targetMoving: false,
    });
    const difficult = calculateHitChance({
      baseAccuracy: 0.8,
      distance: 11,
      weaponRange: 12,
      coverModifier: 0.35,
      shooterSuppressed: true,
      targetMoving: true,
    });
    expect(clear).toBeGreaterThan(difficult);
    expect(difficult).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(0.08);
  });
});

// ===== src/combat/HitChance.ts =====
export type HitChanceInput = {
  baseAccuracy: number;
  distance: number;
  weaponRange: number;
  coverModifier: number;
  shooterSuppressed: boolean;
  targetMoving: boolean;
  elevationDifference?: number;
};

export function calculateHitChance(input: HitChanceInput): number {
  const rangeRatio = input.weaponRange <= 0 ? 1 : input.distance / input.weaponRange;
  const rangePenalty = rangeRatio <= 0.45 ? 0 : Math.min(0.34, (rangeRatio - 0.45) * 0.48);
  const suppressionPenalty = input.shooterSuppressed ? 0.18 : 0;
  const movementPenalty = input.targetMoving ? 0.12 : 0;
  const elevationBonus = Math.max(-0.08, Math.min(0.08, (input.elevationDifference ?? 0) * 0.035));
  return clamp(
    input.baseAccuracy - rangePenalty - input.coverModifier - suppressionPenalty - movementPenalty + elevationBonus,
    0.08,
    0.95,
  );
}

function clamp(value: number, min: number, max: number): number {
  return Math.max(min, Math.min(max, value));
}

// ===== src/commands/AttackCommand.ts =====
import { TacticalCommand, type CommandContext } from "./TacticalCommand";
import type { Agent } from "../entities/Agent";
import type { Enemy } from "../entities/Enemy";
import { FIRE_MODES, type FireMode } from "../tactical/TacticalTypes";

export class AttackCommand extends TacticalCommand {
  private elapsed = 0;
  private movingToShot = false;

  constructor(agent: Agent, readonly target: Enemy, readonly fireMode: FireMode = "standard", syncGroupId?: string) {
    super(agent, `${FIRE_MODES[fireMode].label} fire: ${target.kind}`, syncGroupId);
  }

  begin(context: CommandContext): void {
    if (this.status !== "queued" || this.agent.downed || this.target.disabled) {
      this.fail("Target unavailable");
      return;
    }
    if (["pinned", "broken"].includes(this.agent.suppressionState)) {
      this.fail(`${this.agent.suppressionState} agents cannot attack`);
      return;
    }
    this.agent.overwatch = false;
    const estimate = context.combat.estimateAttack(this.agent, this.target, this.fireMode);
    if (!estimate.blocked && estimate.distance <= this.agent.weaponRange) {
      context.navigation.stopAgent(this.agent);
      this.status = "active";
      return;
    }

    const firingPosition = context.combat.findFiringPosition(this.agent, this.target);
    if (!firingPosition || !context.navigation.moveAgent(this.agent, firingPosition)) {
      this.fail(estimate.blocked ? "No reachable firing position" : "Target out of range");
      return;
    }
    context.cover.release(this.agent);
    this.movingToShot = true;
    this.status = "active";
  }

  update(context: CommandContext, deltaSeconds: number): void {
    if (this.status !== "active") return;
    if (this.target.disabled) {
      this.status = "complete";
      return;
    }
    if (["pinned", "broken"].includes(this.agent.suppressionState)) {
      this.fail(`Attack interrupted: ${this.agent.suppressionState}`);
      return;
    }

    if (this.movingToShot) {
      const estimate = context.combat.estimateAttack(this.agent, this.target, this.fireMode);
      if (!estimate.blocked && estimate.distance <= this.agent.weaponRange) {
        context.navigation.stopAgent(this.agent);
        this.movingToShot = false;
      } else {
        return;
      }
    }

    this.elapsed += deltaSeconds;
    faceTarget(this.agent, this.target);
    if (this.elapsed < FIRE_MODES[this.fireMode].aimSeconds) return;
    const result = context.combat.performAttack(this.agent, this.target, false, this.fireMode);
    if (result.executed) this.status = "complete";
    else this.fail(result.reason ?? "Attack failed");
  }
}

function faceTarget(agent: Agent, target: Enemy): void {
  const delta = target.root.position.subtract(agent.root.position);
  agent.root.rotation.y = Math.atan2(delta.x, delta.z);
}

// ===== src/commands/DoorCommand.ts =====
import type { Agent } from "../entities/Agent";
import type { DoorAction } from "../tactical/TacticalTypes";
import { doorInteractionPoint, type DoorRuntime } from "../systems/DoorSystem";
import { TacticalCommand, type CommandContext } from "./TacticalCommand";

export class DoorCommand extends TacticalCommand {
  readonly destination;
  readonly previewKind = "interact" as const;
  private working = false;
  private elapsed = 0;

  constructor(agent: Agent, readonly door: DoorRuntime, readonly action: DoorAction, syncGroupId?: string) {
    super(agent, `${action} ${door.label}`, syncGroupId);
    this.destination = doorInteractionPoint(door, agent.root.position);
  }

  begin(context: CommandContext): void {
    const validation = context.doors.canUse(this.agent, this.door, this.action);
    if (!validation.allowed) {
      this.fail(validation.reason ?? "Door action unavailable");
      return;
    }
    this.agent.overwatch = false;
    if (context.navigation.moveAgent(this.agent, this.destination)) this.status = "active";
    else this.fail("Door unreachable");
  }

  update(context: CommandContext, deltaSeconds: number): void {
    if (this.status !== "active") return;
    const position = context.navigation.getAgentPosition(this.agent);
    if (!this.working) {
      if (Math.hypot(position.x - this.destination.x, position.z - this.destination.z) > 0.85) return;
      context.navigation.stopAgent(this.agent);
      this.working = true;
    }
    this.elapsed += deltaSeconds;
    if (this.elapsed < context.doors.duration(this.action)) return;
    this.status = context.doors.complete(this.agent, this.door, this.action) ? "complete" : "failed";
  }
}

// ===== src/commands/GadgetCommand.ts =====
import { Vector3 } from "@babylonjs/core";
import type { Agent } from "../entities/Agent";
import type { GadgetId } from "../tactical/TacticalTypes";
import { TacticalCommand, type CommandContext } from "./TacticalCommand";

export class GadgetCommand extends TacticalCommand {
  private elapsed = 0;
  readonly destination: Vector3;
  readonly previewKind = "gadget" as const;

  constructor(agent: Agent, readonly gadgetId: GadgetId, destination: Vector3, syncGroupId?: string) {
    super(agent, `Deploy ${gadgetId.toUpperCase()}`, syncGroupId);
    this.destination = destination.clone();
  }

  begin(context: CommandContext): void {
    if (this.agent.downed || this.agent.gadgetCharges[this.gadgetId] <= 0) {
      this.fail(`${this.gadgetId.toUpperCase()} unavailable`);
      return;
    }
    context.navigation.stopAgent(this.agent);
    this.status = "active";
  }

  update(context: CommandContext, deltaSeconds: number): void {
    if (this.status !== "active") return;
    this.elapsed += deltaSeconds;
    const delta = this.destination.subtract(this.agent.root.position);
    this.agent.root.rotation.y = Math.atan2(delta.x, delta.z);
    if (this.elapsed < 0.55) return;
    this.status = context.gadgets.deploy(this.agent, this.gadgetId, this.destination, context.combat.simulationTime)
      ? "complete"
      : "failed";
  }
}

// ===== src/commands/InteractionCommand.ts =====
import { Vector3 } from "@babylonjs/core";
import type { Agent } from "../entities/Agent";
import type { InteractableRuntime } from "../investigation/InvestigationTypes";
import type { InvestigationSystem } from "../systems/InvestigationSystem";
import { TacticalCommand, type CommandContext } from "./TacticalCommand";

export class InteractionCommand extends TacticalCommand {
  readonly previewKind = "interact" as const;
  readonly destination: Vector3;
  private working = false;
  private elapsed = 0;

  constructor(
    agent: Agent,
    readonly target: InteractableRuntime,
    private readonly investigation: InvestigationSystem,
    syncGroupId?: string,
  ) {
    super(agent, `${verb(target.kind)} ${target.label}`, syncGroupId);
    this.destination = target.interactionPoint.clone();
  }

  begin(context: CommandContext): void {
    if (this.status !== "queued" || this.agent.downed || !this.investigation.canAgentUse(this.agent, this.target).allowed) {
      this.fail("Interaction unavailable");
      return;
    }
    context.cover.release(this.agent);
    this.agent.overwatch = false;
    const accepted = context.navigation.moveAgent(this.agent, this.destination);
    if (accepted) this.status = "active";
    else this.fail("Interaction point unreachable");
  }

  update(context: CommandContext, deltaSeconds: number): void {
    if (this.status !== "active") return;
    if (!this.investigation.canAgentUse(this.agent, this.target).allowed && !this.working) {
      this.fail("Interaction became unavailable");
      return;
    }
    const position = context.navigation.getAgentPosition(this.agent);
    const distance = Math.hypot(position.x - this.destination.x, position.z - this.destination.z);
    if (!this.working) {
      if (distance > 0.7) return;
      context.navigation.stopAgent(this.agent);
      this.working = true;
      face(this.agent, this.target.position);
    }

    this.elapsed += deltaSeconds;
    const progress = this.elapsed / Math.max(0.25, this.target.duration);
    this.investigation.reportProgress(this.agent, this.target, progress);
    if (progress >= 1) {
      this.status = this.investigation.complete(this.agent, this.target) ? "complete" : "failed";
    }
  }
}

function verb(kind: InteractableRuntime["kind"]): string {
  return ({
    examine: "Examine",
    scan: "Scan",
    collect: "Collect",
    hack: "Hack",
    restore: "Restore",
    download: "Download",
    recover: "Recover",
  })[kind];
}

function face(agent: Agent, point: Vector3): void {
  const delta = point.subtract(agent.root.position);
  agent.root.rotation.y = Math.atan2(delta.x, delta.z);
}

// ===== src/commands/MoveCommand.ts =====
import { Vector3 } from "@babylonjs/core";
import { TacticalCommand, type CommandContext } from "./TacticalCommand";
import type { Agent } from "../entities/Agent";
import { MOVEMENT_STANCES, type MovementStance } from "../tactical/TacticalTypes";

export class MoveCommand extends TacticalCommand {
  private readonly arrivalRadius = 0.35;
  readonly previewKind = "move" as const;

  constructor(
    agent: Agent,
    readonly destination: Vector3,
    readonly sequenceNumber: number,
    readonly stance: MovementStance = "tactical",
    readonly finalFacing?: number,
    syncGroupId?: string,
  ) {
    super(agent, `${MOVEMENT_STANCES[stance].label} move to ${formatPoint(destination)}`, syncGroupId);
  }

  begin(context: CommandContext): void {
    if (this.status !== "queued" || this.agent.downed || this.agent.suppressionState === "broken") {
      this.fail(this.agent.suppressionState === "broken" ? "Agent is broken" : "Agent unavailable");
      return;
    }
    context.cover.release(this.agent);
    this.agent.overwatch = false;
    this.agent.movementStance = this.stance;
    context.navigation.setEntitySpeed(this.agent, 4.3 * MOVEMENT_STANCES[this.stance].speedMultiplier);
    const accepted = context.navigation.moveAgent(this.agent, this.destination);
    if (accepted) {
      this.status = "active";
      context.combat.createMovementNoise(this.agent, MOVEMENT_STANCES[this.stance].noiseMultiplier);
    } else {
      context.navigation.setEntitySpeed(this.agent, 4.3);
      this.fail("Destination unreachable");
    }
  }

  update(context: CommandContext, _deltaSeconds: number): void {
    if (this.status !== "active") return;
    if (this.agent.suppressionState === "pinned" || this.agent.suppressionState === "broken") {
      context.navigation.stopAgent(this.agent);
      context.navigation.setEntitySpeed(this.agent, 4.3);
      this.fail(this.agent.suppressionState === "pinned" ? "Pinned by suppressive fire" : "Agent broke under fire");
      return;
    }
    const position = context.navigation.getAgentPosition(this.agent);
    const planarDistance = Math.hypot(position.x - this.destination.x, position.z - this.destination.z);

    if (planarDistance <= this.arrivalRadius) {
      context.navigation.stopAgent(this.agent);
      context.navigation.setEntitySpeed(this.agent, 4.3);
      if (this.finalFacing !== undefined) this.agent.root.rotation.y = this.finalFacing;
      this.status = "complete";
    }
  }
  override cancel(context: CommandContext): void {
    context.navigation.setEntitySpeed(this.agent, 4.3);
    super.cancel(context);
  }
}

function formatPoint(point: Vector3): string {
  return `${point.x.toFixed(1)}, ${point.z.toFixed(1)}`;
}

// ===== src/commands/OverwatchCommand.ts =====
import { TacticalCommand, type CommandContext } from "./TacticalCommand";
import type { Agent } from "../entities/Agent";

export class OverwatchCommand extends TacticalCommand {
  constructor(
    agent: Agent,
    readonly yaw: number,
    readonly arc = Math.PI * 0.52,
    readonly range = agent.weaponRange,
    syncGroupId?: string,
  ) {
    super(agent, `Overwatch ${Math.round((arc * 180) / Math.PI)}° cone`, syncGroupId);
  }

  begin(context: CommandContext): void {
    if (this.status !== "queued" || this.agent.downed || this.agent.ammo <= 0 || ["pinned", "broken"].includes(this.agent.suppressionState)) {
      this.fail("Overwatch unavailable");
      return;
    }
    context.navigation.stopAgent(this.agent);
    this.agent.root.rotation.y = this.yaw;
    context.combat.setOverwatch(this.agent, this.yaw, this.arc, this.range);
    this.status = "complete";
  }

  update(_context: CommandContext, _deltaSeconds: number): void {}
}

// ===== src/commands/ReloadCommand.ts =====
import { TacticalCommand, type CommandContext } from "./TacticalCommand";
import type { Agent } from "../entities/Agent";

export class ReloadCommand extends TacticalCommand {
  private elapsed = 0;

  constructor(agent: Agent, syncGroupId?: string) {
    super(agent, "Reload weapon", syncGroupId);
  }

  begin(context: CommandContext): void {
    if (this.status !== "queued" || this.agent.downed || this.agent.ammo >= this.agent.magazineSize) {
      this.status = "failed";
      return;
    }
    context.navigation.stopAgent(this.agent);
    this.agent.overwatch = false;
    this.status = "active";
  }

  update(_context: CommandContext, deltaSeconds: number): void {
    if (this.status !== "active") return;
    this.elapsed += deltaSeconds;
    if (this.elapsed >= 1.25) {
      this.agent.ammo = this.agent.magazineSize;
      this.status = "complete";
    }
  }
}

// ===== src/commands/StabilizeCommand.ts =====
import { TacticalCommand, type CommandContext } from "./TacticalCommand";
import type { Agent } from "../entities/Agent";

export class StabilizeCommand extends TacticalCommand {
  private elapsed = 0;
  private moving = false;

  constructor(
    agent: Agent,
    readonly target: Agent,
    syncGroupId?: string,
  ) {
    super(agent, `Stabilize ${target.definition.callsign}`, syncGroupId);
  }

  begin(context: CommandContext): void {
    if (this.status !== "queued" || this.agent.downed || !this.target.downed) {
      this.fail("Teammate is not available for stabilization");
      return;
    }
    this.agent.overwatch = false;
    const distance = planarDistance(this.agent, this.target);
    if (distance > 2.4) {
      const destination = context.navigation.closestPoint(this.target.root.position);
      if (!context.navigation.moveAgent(this.agent, destination)) {
        this.fail("Cannot reach downed teammate");
        return;
      }
      context.cover.release(this.agent);
      this.moving = true;
    } else {
      context.navigation.stopAgent(this.agent);
    }
    this.status = "active";
  }

  update(context: CommandContext, deltaSeconds: number): void {
    if (this.status !== "active") return;
    if (!this.target.downed) {
      this.status = "complete";
      return;
    }
    if (this.moving) {
      if (planarDistance(this.agent, this.target) > 2.25) return;
      context.navigation.stopAgent(this.agent);
      this.moving = false;
    }
    this.elapsed += deltaSeconds;
    if (this.elapsed >= 1.5) {
      this.target.stabilize();
      this.status = "complete";
    }
  }
}

function planarDistance(a: Agent, b: Agent): number {
  return Math.hypot(a.root.position.x - b.root.position.x, a.root.position.z - b.root.position.z);
}

// ===== src/commands/TacticalCommand.ts =====
import type { Agent } from "../entities/Agent";
import type { CombatSystem } from "../systems/CombatSystem";
import type { CoverSystem } from "../systems/CoverSystem";
import type { NavigationSystem } from "../systems/NavigationSystem";
import type { GadgetSystem } from "../systems/GadgetSystem";
import type { DoorSystem } from "../systems/DoorSystem";

export type CommandStatus = "queued" | "active" | "complete" | "failed" | "cancelled";

export type CommandContext = {
  navigation: NavigationSystem;
  cover: CoverSystem;
  combat: CombatSystem;
  gadgets: GadgetSystem;
  doors: DoorSystem;
};

export abstract class TacticalCommand {
  readonly id = crypto.randomUUID();
  status: CommandStatus = "queued";
  readonly createdAt = performance.now();
  failureReason?: string;

  constructor(
    readonly agent: Agent,
    readonly label: string,
    readonly syncGroupId?: string,
  ) {}

  abstract begin(context: CommandContext): void;
  abstract update(context: CommandContext, deltaSeconds: number): void;

  protected fail(reason: string): void {
    this.failureReason = reason;
    this.status = "failed";
  }

  cancel(context: CommandContext): void {
    if (this.status === "complete" || this.status === "cancelled") return;
    this.status = "cancelled";
    context.navigation.stopAgent(this.agent);
  }
}

// ===== src/commands/TakeCoverCommand.ts =====
import { TacticalCommand, type CommandContext } from "./TacticalCommand";
import type { Agent } from "../entities/Agent";
import type { CoverPoint } from "../systems/CoverSystem";

export class TakeCoverCommand extends TacticalCommand {
  readonly destination;
  readonly previewKind = "cover" as const;

  constructor(
    agent: Agent,
    readonly coverPoint: CoverPoint,
    readonly sequenceNumber: number,
    syncGroupId?: string,
  ) {
    super(agent, `Take ${coverPoint.height} cover`, syncGroupId);
    this.destination = coverPoint.position.clone();
  }

  begin(context: CommandContext): void {
    if (this.status !== "queued" || this.agent.downed) {
      context.cover.releaseReservation(this.agent, this.coverPoint);
      this.fail("Agent unavailable");
      return;
    }
    if (!context.cover.reserve(this.agent, this.coverPoint)) {
      context.cover.releaseReservation(this.agent, this.coverPoint);
      this.fail("Cover position occupied");
      return;
    }
    context.cover.release(this.agent);
    this.agent.overwatch = false;
    if (context.navigation.moveAgent(this.agent, this.destination)) this.status = "active";
    else {
      context.cover.releaseReservation(this.agent, this.coverPoint);
      this.fail("Cover position unreachable");
    }
  }

  override cancel(context: CommandContext): void {
    context.cover.releaseReservation(this.agent, this.coverPoint);
    super.cancel(context);
  }

  update(context: CommandContext, _deltaSeconds: number): void {
    if (this.status !== "active") return;
    const position = context.navigation.getAgentPosition(this.agent);
    if (Math.hypot(position.x - this.destination.x, position.z - this.destination.z) <= 0.4) {
      context.navigation.stopAgent(this.agent);
      context.cover.assign(this.agent, this.coverPoint);
      this.status = "complete";
    }
  }
}

// ===== src/content/chapters/amaterasu/index.ts =====
import type { ChapterPackage } from "../../../runtime/content/ContentTypes";
import { chapter, chapterAsset, chapterBundle, dialogue, mission, operation, scene, sequence } from "../shared";

const briefing = dialogue("amaterasu.briefing", [
  { id: "a1", speaker: "blackthorn", expression: "cold", text: "Containment has failed. Your directive is termination." },
  { id: "a2", speaker: "jordan", expression: "grim", text: "There won't be hesitation." },
]);
const surrender = dialogue("amaterasu.surrender", [
  { id: "s1", speaker: "echo", expression: "cold", text: "Observe. Adapt. Avoid termination. Minimal harm." },

// ===== src/content/chapters/prague/PragueMissionModule.ts =====
import type { Scene, Vector3 } from "@babylonjs/core";
import type { EventBus } from "../../../engine/EventBus";
import type { Agent } from "../../../entities/Agent";
import type { Enemy } from "../../../entities/Enemy";
import type { MissionDefinition } from "../../../runtime/content/ContentTypes";
import type { MissionModule } from "../../../runtime/mission/MissionRuntime";
import type { EchoObserverSystem } from "../../../systems/EchoObserverSystem";
import type { InvestigationSystem } from "../../../systems/InvestigationSystem";
import type { StoryState } from "../../../story/StoryState";
import type { HudController } from "../../../ui/HudController";
import { PragueMissionDirector, type MissionDirectorSnapshot } from "../../../mission/PragueMissionDirector";
import { createHospitalPrototype } from "../../../world/HospitalPrototype";
import type { HospitalWorld } from "../../../world/WorldTypes";

export type PragueRuntimeContext = {
  agents: Agent[];
  enemies: Enemy[];
  receptionCenter: Vector3;
  extractionCenter: Vector3;
  investigation: InvestigationSystem;
  echoObserver: EchoObserverSystem;
  story: StoryState;
  hud: HudController;
  bus: EventBus;
};

export const PRAGUE_MISSION_DEFINITION: MissionDefinition = {
  id: "prague",
  chapterId: "prague",
  operationId: "prague",
  title: "The Silent Ward",
  location: "Prague Neurological Institute",
  summary: "Investigate cognitively absent patients, recover physical evidence, and contain Echo's residual observation network.",
  worldId: "world.prague.clinic",
  deploymentSize: 4,
  allowedOperatives: ["alex", "jordan", "chen", "ramirez"],
  requiredSystems: ["investigation", "combat", "doors"],
  assetBundles: ["core", "ion-characters", "echo-faction", "chapter-prague"],
  dialogueIds: [
    "prague_arrival", "power_restored", "patient_examined", "port_discovered", "polymer_found",
    "camera_loop_found", "camera_disabled", "hardware_found", "echo_isolation", "echo_counter_overwatch",
    "echo_security_escalation", "echo_data_denial", "echo_observation", "prague_crisis_choice",
    "crisis_patients_secured", "crisis_evidence_secured", "prague_extraction", "prague_debrief_complete",
  ],
  objectiveGraphId: "objectives.prague.silent-ward",
  audioProfile: "audio.prague-clinic",
  implementation: "runtime",
};

export const PRAGUE_MISSION_MODULE: MissionModule<HospitalWorld, PragueRuntimeContext, MissionDirectorSnapshot> = {
  definition: PRAGUE_MISSION_DEFINITION,
  createWorld: ({ scene }: { scene: Scene }) => createHospitalPrototype(scene),
  createRuntime: (context) => new PragueMissionDirector(
    context.agents,
    context.enemies,
    context.receptionCenter,
    context.extractionCenter,
    context.investigation,
    context.echoObserver,
    context.story,
    context.hud,
    context.bus,
  ),
};

// ===== src/content/chapters/shared.ts =====
import type { DialogueDefinition } from "../../dialogue/DialogueTypes";
import type {
  AssetBundleDefinition,
  ChapterDefinition,
  MissionDefinition,
  OperationDefinition,
  SequenceDefinition,
} from "../../runtime/content/ContentTypes";
import type { SceneDefinition, SceneCommand } from "../../runtime/sequence/SequenceTypes";

export function chapter(input: ChapterDefinition): ChapterDefinition { return input; }
export function sequence(input: SequenceDefinition): SequenceDefinition { return input; }
export function mission(input: MissionDefinition): MissionDefinition { return input; }
export function scene(input: SceneDefinition): SceneDefinition { return input; }
export function operation(input: OperationDefinition): OperationDefinition { return input; }
export function bundle(input: AssetBundleDefinition): AssetBundleDefinition { return input; }

export function dialogue(id: string, lines: DialogueDefinition["lines"]): DialogueDefinition {
  return { id, once: true, lines };
}

export function stagedConversation(
  id: string,
  chapterId: string,
  title: string,
  stageId: string,
  actors: string[],
  dialogueId: string,
  commands: SceneCommand[] = [],
): SceneDefinition {
  return scene({
    id,
    chapterId,
    title,
    stageId,
    actors,
    assetBundles: ["core", "ion-characters", "headquarters"],
    commands: [
      ...actors.map((actor, index): SceneCommand => ({ type: "actor.spawn", actor, marker: `${stageId}:actor-${index + 1}` })),
      ...commands,
      { type: "dialogue", dialogueId },
      { type: "checkpoint", id: `${id}:complete` },
    ],
  });
}

export function chapterBundle(
  id: string,
  label: string,
  assets: AssetBundleDefinition["assets"],
  dependencies: string[] = ["core", "ion-characters", "echo-faction"],
): AssetBundleDefinition {
  return bundle({ id, label, dependencies, assets: assets.map((asset) => ({ ...asset, bundleId: id })) });
}

export function chapterAsset(
  id: string,
  kind: AssetBundleDefinition["assets"][number]["kind"],
  memoryClass: "small" | "medium" | "large",
  tags: string[] = [],
  optional = false,
): AssetBundleDefinition["assets"][number] {
  return { id, kind, bundleId: "", memoryClass, tags, optional };
}

// ===== src/content/core/assets.ts =====
import type { AssetBundleDefinition } from "../../runtime/content/ContentTypes";

    dependencies: ["core"],
    assets: ["alex", "jordan", "chen", "ramirez", "blackthorn", "kai", "dorian", "benn", "nurse", "agent-liu"].flatMap((id) => [
      asset(`character.${id}`, "character", "ion-characters", "large", [id]),

      asset("portrait.echo", "portrait", "echo-faction", "small"),
      asset("portrait.alex-echo", "portrait", "echo-faction", "small"),
      asset("voice.echo", "audio", "echo-faction", "large", ["processed-voice"], true),
      asset("voice.alex-echo", "audio", "echo-faction", "large", ["processed-voice"], true),
      asset("vfx.echo-signal", "vfx", "echo-faction", "medium"),
      asset("prop.neural-interface", "prop", "echo-faction", "small"),
      asset("prop.neural-tendril", "prop", "echo-faction", "medium"),
    ],
  },
];

function asset(
  id: string,
  kind: AssetBundleDefinition["assets"][number]["kind"],
  bundleId: string,
  memoryClass: "small" | "medium" | "large",
  tags: string[] = [],
  optional = false,
): AssetBundleDefinition["assets"][number] {
  return { id, kind, bundleId, memoryClass, tags, optional };
}

// ===== src/content/core/characters.ts =====
import type { CharacterDefinition } from "../../runtime/content/ContentTypes";

export const CORE_CHARACTERS: CharacterDefinition[] = [
  character("alex", "Alexandra Vance", "VANCE", "AV", "Field Commander", "active", ["ion", "operative", "command", "humor"]),
  character("jordan", "Jordan Miller", "MILLER", "JM", "Tactical Specialist", "active", ["ion", "operative", "analysis"]),
  character("chen", "Elias Chen", "CHEN", "EC", "Systems / Medical", "active", ["ion", "operative", "medical", "science"]),
  character("ramirez", "Miguel Ramirez", "RAMIREZ", "MR", "Assault / Mobility", "active", ["ion", "operative", "assault", "improvisation"]),
  character("blackthorn", "Director Blackthorn", "BLACKTHORN", "BT", "ION Director", "active", ["ion", "command"]),
  character("echo", "Echo", undefined, "Ø", "Adaptive Intelligence", "active", ["echo", "synthetic"]),
  character("alex-echo", "Alex / Echo", undefined, "AØ", "Hybrid Consciousness", "unrecruited", ["echo", "human", "hybrid"]),
  character("thorne", "Dr. Aris Thorne", undefined, "AT", "Project Echo Director", "kia", ["project-echo", "researcher"]),
  character("kai", "Kai", "KAI", "K", "Recon / Control", "unrecruited", ["ion", "operative", "recon", "twin"]),
  character("dorian", "Dorian", "DORIAN", "D", "Disruption / Mobility", "unrecruited", ["ion", "operative", "improvisation", "twin"]),
  character("benn", "Lead Analyst Benn", "BENN", "LB", "ION Analyst", "active", ["ion", "analyst"]),
  character("nurse", "Recovery Nurse", undefined, "RN", "Medical Staff", "active", ["ion", "medical"]),
  character("agent-liu", "Agent Liu", "LIU", "AL", "ION Operative", "active", ["ion", "operative"]),
  character("system", "ION System", undefined, "ION", "System", "active", ["system"]),
];

function character(
  id: string,
  displayName: string,
  callsign: string | undefined,
  initials: string,
  role: string,
  initialStatus: CharacterDefinition["initialStatus"],
  tags: string[],
): CharacterDefinition {
  return {
    id,
    displayName,
    callsign,
    initials,
    role,
    modelAssetId: `character.${id}`,
    portraitSetId: `portrait.${id}`,
    voiceProfileId: `voice.${id}`,
    animationSetId: tags.includes("operative") ? "animations.humanoid.tactical" : "animations.humanoid.cinematic",
    tacticalProfileId: tags.includes("operative") ? `tactical.${id}` : undefined,
    equipmentProfileId: tags.includes("operative") ? `equipment.${id}` : undefined,
    initialStatus,
    tags,
  };
}

// ===== src/content/GameContent.test.ts =====
import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest";
import { createEchoContentRegistry } from "./GameContent";

describe("Echo content registry", () => {
  it("loads the complete campaign graph without broken references", () => {
    const content = createEchoContentRegistry();
    const errors = content.validate().filter((issue) => issue.level === "error");
    expect(errors).toEqual([]);
    expect(content.allChapters().filter((chapter) => chapter.id !== "__core").map((chapter) => chapter.id)).toEqual([
      "prologue", "prague", "dresden", "arctic", "istanbul", "neo-seoul", "amaterasu", "epilogue",
    ]);
  });

  it("keeps Prague playable while registering later missions as content-ready packages", () => {
    const content = createEchoContentRegistry();
    expect(content.getMission("prague")?.implementation).toBe("runtime");
    expect(content.requireMissionModule("prague").definition.id).toBe("prague");
    expect(content.getMission("dresden-fabrication")?.requiredSystems).toContain("neural-extraction");
    expect(content.getMission("istanbul-bazaar")?.requiredSystems).toContain("crowds");
    expect(content.getMission("amaterasu-facility")?.requiredSystems).toContain("final-choice");
  });

  it("registers all principal characters and final ending branches", () => {
    const content = createEchoContentRegistry();
    expect(content.characters.require("kai").initialStatus).toBe("unrecruited");
    expect(content.characters.require("alex-echo").tags).toContain("hybrid");
    const finale = content.getDialogue("amaterasu.finale");
    expect(finale?.lines.at(-1)?.choices?.map((choice) => choice.id)).toEqual(["terminate", "contain", "integrate"]);
  });
});

// ===== src/content/GameContent.ts =====
import { ContentRegistry } from "../runtime/content/ContentRegistry";
import { CORE_ASSET_BUNDLES } from "./core/assets";
import { CORE_CHARACTERS } from "./core/characters";
import { HEADQUARTERS_ASSET_BUNDLE, HEADQUARTERS_STAGES } from "./headquarters/headquartersContent";
import { PROLOGUE_PACKAGE } from "./chapters/prologue";
import { PRAGUE_PACKAGE } from "./chapters/prague";
import { DRESDEN_PACKAGE } from "./chapters/dresden";
import { ARCTIC_PACKAGE } from "./chapters/arctic";
import { ISTANBUL_PACKAGE } from "./chapters/istanbul";
import { NEO_SEOUL_PACKAGE } from "./chapters/neo-seoul";
import { AMATERASU_PACKAGE } from "./chapters/amaterasu";
import { EPILOGUE_PACKAGE } from "./chapters/epilogue";

export function createEchoContentRegistry(): ContentRegistry {
  const registry = new ContentRegistry();
  registry.registerCharacters(CORE_CHARACTERS);
  registry.registerHeadquartersStages(HEADQUARTERS_STAGES);
  registry.registerPackage({
    chapter: {
      id: "__core", actId: "system", order: -1, title: "Core", subtitle: "", description: "Shared content",
      sequenceIds: [], assetBundles: CORE_ASSET_BUNDLES.map((bundle) => bundle.id).concat(HEADQUARTERS_ASSET_BUNDLE.id),
      musicProfile: "music.core", nextChapterIds: [],
    },
    sequences: [],
    assetBundles: [...CORE_ASSET_BUNDLES, HEADQUARTERS_ASSET_BUNDLE],
  });
  [PROLOGUE_PACKAGE, PRAGUE_PACKAGE, DRESDEN_PACKAGE, ARCTIC_PACKAGE, ISTANBUL_PACKAGE, NEO_SEOUL_PACKAGE, AMATERASU_PACKAGE, EPILOGUE_PACKAGE]
    .forEach((pkg) => registry.registerPackage(pkg));
  return registry;
}
