// ===== src/dialogue/DialogueTypes.ts =====
import type { StoryCondition, StoryEffect } from "../story/StoryLogic";

export type DialogueSpeaker = string;

export type DialogueChoice = {
  id: string;
  label: string;
  effects?: Array<string | StoryEffect>;
  conditions?: StoryCondition[];
};

export type DialogueLine = {
  id: string;
  speaker: DialogueSpeaker;
  text: string;
  expression?: "neutral" | "wry" | "concerned" | "grim" | "urgent" | "cold";
  autoAdvanceMs?: number;
  choices?: DialogueChoice[];
  conditions?: StoryCondition[];
  effects?: StoryEffect[];
  voiceAssetId?: string;
  portraitExpression?: string;
  actorAnimation?: string;
  cameraCue?: string;
  channel?: "local" | "radio" | "archive" | "system" | "echo";
};

export type DialogueDefinition = {
  id: string;
  lines: DialogueLine[];
  once?: boolean;
  priority?: number;
  conditions?: StoryCondition[];
};

// ===== src/engine/EngineFactory.ts =====
import { Engine, WebGPUEngine, type AbstractEngine } from "@babylonjs/core";

export type EngineResult = {
  engine: AbstractEngine;
  renderer: "WebGPU" | "WebGL 2" | "WebGL";
};

export class EngineFactory {
  static async create(canvas: HTMLCanvasElement): Promise<EngineResult> {
    const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
    const requestWebGPU = params.get("webgpu") === "1";

    if (requestWebGPU && "gpu" in navigator && (await WebGPUEngine.IsSupportedAsync)) {
      try {
        const engine = new WebGPUEngine(canvas, {
          antialias: true,
          adaptToDeviceRatio: true,
        });
        await engine.initAsync();
        return { engine, renderer: "WebGPU" };
      } catch (error) {
        console.warn("WebGPU initialization failed; falling back to WebGL.", error);
      }
    }

    const engine = new Engine(canvas, true, {
      preserveDrawingBuffer: false,
      stencil: true,
      antialias: true,
      adaptToDeviceRatio: true,
      powerPreference: "high-performance",
    });

    return {
      engine,
      renderer: engine.webGLVersion >= 2 ? "WebGL 2" : "WebGL",
    };
  }
}

// ===== src/engine/EventBus.ts =====
import type { Vector3 } from "@babylonjs/core";
import type { EnemyKind, EnemyState } from "../entities/Enemy";
import type { EvidenceCategory } from "../investigation/InvestigationTypes";
import type { EchoMetrics } from "../systems/EchoObserverSystem";
import type { MissionObjectiveStep, MissionReport, MissionStage } from "../mission/MissionTypes";
import type { SaveSlotId } from "../save/SaveGameManager";
import type { CampaignState } from "../campaign/CampaignTypes";

export type GameEventMap = {
  "selection:changed": { agentIds: string[] };
  "command:queued": { agentId: string; commandType: string; append: boolean };
  "commands:cleared": { agentId: string; count: number };
  "command:removed": { agentId: string; commandId: string };
  "command:reordered": { agentId: string; commandId: string; direction: -1 | 1 };
  "interaction:progress": { interactionId: string; agentId: string; label: string; progress: number };
  "interaction:completed": { interactionId: string; agentId: string; evidenceId?: string; dialogueId?: string };
  "interaction:corrupted": { interactionId: string; label: string };
  "evidence:collected": { evidenceId: string; title: string; category: EvidenceCategory; agentId: string; interpretation: string; core: boolean };
  "security:disabled": { sensorId: string };
  "dialogue:play": { dialogueId: string };
  "dialogue:choice": { dialogueId: string; choiceId: string; effects: string[] };
  "echo:encounter-start": { adaptation: "isolation" | "counter_overwatch" | "security_escalation" | "data_denial" | "observation" };
  "echo:adaptation": { adaptation: "isolation" | "counter_overwatch" | "security_escalation" | "data_denial" | "observation"; summary: string };
  "echo:profile-changed": { metrics: EchoMetrics };
  "echo:profile-tier": { tier: "profiling" | "prediction" | "adaptation"; confidence: number };
  "combat:attack": { attackerId: string; targetId: string; attackerTeam: "ion" | "echo"; targetTeam: "ion" | "echo"; hit: boolean; damage: number; overwatch: boolean };
  "commands:changed": { agentId?: string };
  "time:changed": { state: "running" | "slow" | "paused"; scale: number };
  "toast": { message: string; tone?: "info" | "success" | "warning" };
  "objective:reached": { objectiveId: string };
  "combat:log": { message: string; tone?: "info" | "success" | "warning" | "danger" };
  "combat:changed": Record<string, never>;
  "ability:used": { agentId: string; abilityId: string; label: string };
  "ability:changed": Record<string, never>;
  "noise:created": { position: Vector3; radius: number; sourceTeam: "ion" | "echo" };
  "enemy:discovered": { enemyId: string; kind: EnemyKind };
  "enemy:disabled": { enemyId: string };
  "enemy:escaped": { enemyId: string };
  "enemy:state": { enemyId: string; state: EnemyState };
  "agent:downed": { agentId: string };
  "room:revealed": { roomId: string; roomName: string };
  "security:alarm": { sensorId: string };
  "alert:changed": { level: "CLEAR" | "SUSPICIOUS" | "HOSTILE" };
  "mission:start": Record<string, never>;
  "mission:stage-changed": { stage: MissionStage };
  "mission:objectives": { steps: MissionObjectiveStep[] };
  "mission:debrief": { report: MissionReport };
  "mission:continue": Record<string, never>;
  "command:completed": { agentId: string; commandId: string; commandType: string; status: string; label: string };
  "checkpoint:requested": { id: string; label: string };
  "save:completed": { slot: SaveSlotId; checkpoint: string };
  "save:loaded": { slot: SaveSlotId; checkpoint: string };
  "dialogue:opened": { dialogueId: string };
  "dialogue:closed": Record<string, never>;
  "gadget:deployed": { agentId: string; gadgetId: "smoke" | "emp"; position: Vector3 };
  "door:changed": { doorId: string; state: "open" | "closed" | "locked" | "breached"; action: "open" | "close" | "lock" | "hack" | "breach"; agentId: string };
  "sync:changed": { groupId: string; state: "planning" | "released" | "cancelled" | "complete" };
  "campaign:changed": { state: CampaignState };
  "campaign:hq-open": { tab?: string };
  "sequence:started": { sceneId: string };
  "sequence:completed": { sceneId: string };
  "content:mission-requested": { missionId: string };
};

type Handler<T> = (payload: T) => void;

export class EventBus {
  private readonly handlers = new Map<keyof GameEventMap, Set<Handler<never>>>();

  on<K extends keyof GameEventMap>(event: K, handler: Handler<GameEventMap[K]>): () => void {
    const set = this.handlers.get(event) ?? new Set<Handler<never>>();
    set.add(handler as Handler<never>);
    this.handlers.set(event, set);
    return () => set.delete(handler as Handler<never>);
  }

  emit<K extends keyof GameEventMap>(event: K, payload: GameEventMap[K]): void {
    this.handlers.get(event)?.forEach((handler) => handler(payload as never));
  }
}

// ===== src/engine/RandomService.test.ts =====
import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest";
import { RandomService } from "./RandomService";

describe("RandomService", () => {
  it("replays the same deterministic sequence for the same seed", () => {
    const first = new RandomService(12345);
    const second = new RandomService(12345);
    expect([first.next(), first.next(), first.next()]).toEqual([second.next(), second.next(), second.next()]);
  });

  it("continues from a restored snapshot", () => {
    const random = new RandomService(9876);
    random.next();
    const snapshot = random.snapshot();
    const expected = random.next();
    const restored = new RandomService(1);
    restored.restore(snapshot);
    expect(restored.next()).toBe(expected);
  });
});

// ===== src/engine/RandomService.ts =====
export type RandomSnapshot = { seed: number; state: number };

/** Deterministic xorshift32 random source used by the tactical simulation. */
export class RandomService {
  private state: number;

  constructor(readonly seed = createSeed()) {
    this.state = normalizeSeed(seed);
  }

  next(): number {
    let value = this.state | 0;
    value ^= value << 13;
    value ^= value >>> 17;
    value ^= value << 5;
    this.state = value >>> 0;
    return this.state / 0x1_0000_0000;
  }

  range(min: number, max: number): number {
    return min + (max - min) * this.next();
  }

  integer(min: number, maxInclusive: number): number {
    return Math.floor(this.range(min, maxInclusive + 1));
  }

  pick<T>(values: readonly T[]): T | undefined {
    return values.length === 0 ? undefined : values[this.integer(0, values.length - 1)];
  }

  snapshot(): RandomSnapshot {
    return { seed: this.seed, state: this.state };
  }

  restore(snapshot: RandomSnapshot): void {
    this.state = normalizeSeed(snapshot.state || snapshot.seed);
  }
}

function createSeed(): number {
  if (typeof window !== "undefined" && typeof window.location !== "undefined") {
    const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
    const supplied = Number(params.get("seed"));
    if (Number.isFinite(supplied) && supplied !== 0) return supplied >>> 0;
  }
  return (Date.now() ^ Math.floor(performance.now() * 1000)) >>> 0;
}

function normalizeSeed(seed: number): number {
  const normalized = seed >>> 0;
  return normalized === 0 ? 0x6d2b79f5 : normalized;
}

// ===== src/engine/TimeManager.ts =====
import type { RecastJSPlugin } from "@babylonjs/core";
import type { EventBus } from "./EventBus";

export type TimeState = "running" | "slow" | "paused";

export class TimeManager {
  private state: TimeState = "running";
  private lastActiveState: Exclude<TimeState, "paused"> = "running";
  private navigationPlugin?: RecastJSPlugin;
  private readonly pauseLocks = new Set<string>();

  constructor(
    private readonly bus: EventBus,
    private readonly slowScale = 0.25,
  ) {}

  attachNavigation(plugin: RecastJSPlugin): void {
    this.navigationPlugin = plugin;
    this.applyScale();
  }

  get currentState(): TimeState {
    return this.state;
  }

  get scale(): number {
    if (this.state === "paused" || this.pauseLocks.size > 0) return 0;
    return this.state === "slow" ? this.slowScale : 1;
  }

  get isModalPaused(): boolean {
    return this.pauseLocks.size > 0;
  }

  acquirePause(reason: string): void {
    const before = this.scale;
    this.pauseLocks.add(reason);
    if (before !== this.scale) this.emitChanged();
  }

  releasePause(reason: string): void {
    const before = this.scale;
    this.pauseLocks.delete(reason);
    if (before !== this.scale) this.emitChanged();
  }

  togglePause(): void {
    if (this.pauseLocks.size > 0) return;
    if (this.state === "paused") {
      this.setState(this.lastActiveState);
      return;
    }
    this.lastActiveState = this.state;
    this.setState("paused");
  }

  toggleSlowMotion(): void {
    if (this.pauseLocks.size > 0) return;
    if (this.state === "paused") {
      this.lastActiveState = this.lastActiveState === "slow" ? "running" : "slow";
      this.bus.emit("toast", {
        message: `Resume speed set to ${this.lastActiveState === "slow" ? "0.25×" : "1×"}.`,
      });
      return;
    }
    this.setState(this.state === "slow" ? "running" : "slow");
  }

  setState(next: TimeState): void {
    if (this.state === next) return;
    this.state = next;
    if (next !== "paused") this.lastActiveState = next;
    this.emitChanged();
  }

  private emitChanged(): void {
    this.applyScale();
    this.bus.emit("time:changed", {
      state: this.scale === 0 ? "paused" : this.state,
      scale: this.scale,
    });
  }

  private applyScale(): void {
    if (this.navigationPlugin) this.navigationPlugin.timeFactor = this.scale;
  }
}

// ===== src/entities/Agent.test.ts =====
import { Color3, NullEngine, Scene, Vector3 } from "@babylonjs/core";
import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest";
import { Agent } from "./Agent";

function createAgent(): { engine: NullEngine; scene: Scene; agent: Agent } {
  const engine = new NullEngine();
  const scene = new Scene(engine);
  const agent = new Agent({
    id: "test",
    callsign: "TEST",
    role: "QA",
    color: new Color3(0.2, 0.8, 1),
    position: Vector3.Zero(),
    shortcut: "1",
    weaponId: "commandRifle",
  }, scene);
  return { engine, scene, agent };
}

describe("Agent visual modes", () => {
  it("shows exactly one character visual root while preserving gameplay selection", () => {
    const { engine, scene, agent } = createAgent();
    expect(agent.proceduralVisualRoot.isEnabled()).toBe(true);
    expect(agent.externalVisualRoot.isEnabled()).toBe(false);

    agent.setVisualMode("external");
    expect(agent.visualMode).toBe("external");
    expect(agent.proceduralVisualRoot.isEnabled()).toBe(false);
    expect(agent.externalVisualRoot.isEnabled()).toBe(true);

    agent.setSelected(true);
    expect(agent.selectionRing.isEnabled()).toBe(true);
    scene.dispose();
    engine.dispose();
  });

  it("uses animation-driven downed poses for external models and fallback rotation otherwise", () => {
    const { engine, scene, agent } = createAgent();
    agent.setVisualMode("external");
    agent.setDowned(true);
    expect(agent.root.rotation.z).toBe(0);

    agent.setDowned(false);
    agent.setVisualMode("procedural");
    agent.setDowned(true);
    expect(agent.root.rotation.z).toBeCloseTo(Math.PI / 2);

    scene.dispose();
    engine.dispose();
  });
});

// ===== src/entities/Agent.ts =====
import {
  Color3,
  Mesh,
  MeshBuilder,
  StandardMaterial,
  TransformNode,
  Vector3,
  type Scene,
} from "@babylonjs/core";
import type { TacticalCommand } from "../commands/TacticalCommand";
import { WEAPONS, type WeaponDefinition } from "../data/combat/weapons";
import type { Combatant } from "./Combatant";
import { suppressionState, type GadgetId, type MovementStance } from "../tactical/TacticalTypes";

export type AgentVisualMode = "procedural" | "external";
export type AgentEquipmentProfile = "command" | "precision" | "medical" | "assault";

export type AgentDefinition = {
  id: string;
  callsign: string;
  role: string;
  color: Color3;
  position: Vector3;
  shortcut: string;
  maxHealth?: number;
  armor?: number;
  accuracy?: number;
  mobility?: number;
  detection?: number;
  will?: number;
  tech?: number;
  tags?: string[];
  weaponId?: keyof typeof WEAPONS;
  equipmentProfile?: AgentEquipmentProfile;
};

export class Agent implements Combatant {
  readonly id: string;
  readonly team = "ion" as const;
  readonly root: TransformNode;
  readonly proceduralVisualRoot: TransformNode;
  readonly externalVisualRoot: TransformNode;
  readonly selectionRing: Mesh;
  readonly pathMeshes: Mesh[] = [];
  readonly commandQueue: TacticalCommand[] = [];
  activeCommand?: TacticalCommand;
  crowdIndex = -1;
  selected = false;

  health: number;
  readonly maxHealth: number;
  armor: number;
  accuracy: number;
  readonly mobility: number;
  readonly detection: number;
  readonly will: number;
  readonly tech: number;
  readonly tags: ReadonlySet<string>;
  readonly weapon: WeaponDefinition;
  weaponRange: number;
  baseDamage: number;
  ammo: number;
  readonly magazineSize: number;
  suppressedUntil = 0;
  suppression = 0;
  movementStance: MovementStance = "tactical";
  stunnedUntil = 0;
  jammedUntil = 0;
  overwatchYaw = 0;
  overwatchArc = Math.PI * 0.52;
  overwatchRange = 0;
  readonly gadgetCharges: Record<GadgetId, number> = { smoke: 0, emp: 0 };
  breachCharges = 0;
  downed = false;
  disabled = false;
  overwatch = false;
  coverPointId?: string;

  private readonly proceduralMeshes: Mesh[] = [];
  private readonly selectionProxy: Mesh;
  private currentVisualMode: AgentVisualMode = "procedural";

  constructor(
    readonly definition: AgentDefinition,
    scene: Scene,
  ) {
    this.id = definition.id;
    this.maxHealth = definition.maxHealth ?? 100;
    this.health = this.maxHealth;
    this.armor = definition.armor ?? 20;
    this.accuracy = definition.accuracy ?? 0.72;
    this.mobility = definition.mobility ?? 10;
    this.detection = definition.detection ?? 10;
    this.will = definition.will ?? 10;
    this.tech = definition.tech ?? 10;
    this.tags = new Set(definition.tags ?? []);
    this.weapon = WEAPONS[definition.weaponId ?? "commandRifle"] ?? WEAPONS.commandRifle!;
    this.weaponRange = this.weapon.maximumRange;
    this.baseDamage = this.weapon.baseDamage;
    this.magazineSize = this.weapon.magazineSize;
    this.ammo = this.magazineSize;

    this.root = new TransformNode(`agent:${definition.id}`, scene);
    this.root.position.copyFrom(definition.position);

    this.proceduralVisualRoot = new TransformNode(`agent-procedural:${definition.id}`, scene);
    this.proceduralVisualRoot.parent = this.root;
    this.externalVisualRoot = new TransformNode(`agent-external:${definition.id}`, scene);
    this.externalVisualRoot.parent = this.root;
    this.externalVisualRoot.setEnabled(false);

    const bodyMaterial = new StandardMaterial(`agent-mat:${definition.id}`, scene);
    bodyMaterial.diffuseColor = definition.color.scale(0.72);
    bodyMaterial.emissiveColor = definition.color.scale(0.12);
    bodyMaterial.specularColor = new Color3(0.35, 0.4, 0.42);

    const armorMaterial = new StandardMaterial(`armor-mat:${definition.id}`, scene);
    armorMaterial.diffuseColor = new Color3(0.045, 0.075, 0.09);
    armorMaterial.emissiveColor = definition.color.scale(0.06);

    const torso = MeshBuilder.CreateCapsule(`torso:${definition.id}`, {
      height: 1.02,
      radius: 0.34,
      tessellation: 10,
    }, scene);
    torso.scaling.z = 0.72;
    torso.position.y = 1.2;
    torso.parent = this.proceduralVisualRoot;
    torso.material = armorMaterial;

    const chest = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`chest:${definition.id}`, {
      width: 0.7,
      height: 0.24,
      depth: 0.42,
    }, scene);
    chest.position.set(0, 1.42, 0.02);
    chest.parent = this.proceduralVisualRoot;
    chest.material = bodyMaterial;

    const head = MeshBuilder.CreateSphere(`head:${definition.id}`, {
      diameter: 0.46,
      segments: 12,
    }, scene);
    head.position.y = 1.93;
    head.parent = this.proceduralVisualRoot;
    head.material = bodyMaterial;

    const visor = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`visor:${definition.id}`, {
      width: 0.36,
      height: 0.1,
      depth: 0.08,
    }, scene);
    visor.position.set(0, 1.95, 0.23);
    visor.parent = this.proceduralVisualRoot;
    visor.material = bodyMaterial;

    const leftLeg = MeshBuilder.CreateCapsule(`leg-l:${definition.id}`, {
      height: 0.82,
      radius: 0.11,
      tessellation: 8,
    }, scene);
    leftLeg.position.set(-0.19, 0.5, 0);
    leftLeg.parent = this.proceduralVisualRoot;
    leftLeg.material = armorMaterial;

    const rightLeg = leftLeg.clone(`leg-r:${definition.id}`);
    rightLeg.position.x = 0.19;
    rightLeg.parent = this.proceduralVisualRoot;

    const rifleRoot = new TransformNode(`fallback-weapon:${definition.id}`, scene);
    rifleRoot.position.set(0.39, 1.14, 0.2);
    rifleRoot.rotation.x = 0.12;
    rifleRoot.parent = this.proceduralVisualRoot;
    const receiver = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`fallback-receiver:${definition.id}`, {
      width: 0.16,
      height: 0.18,
      depth: 0.66,
    }, scene);
    receiver.parent = rifleRoot;
    receiver.material = armorMaterial;
    const barrel = MeshBuilder.CreateCylinder(`fallback-barrel:${definition.id}`, {
      height: 0.48,
      diameter: 0.065,
      tessellation: 8,
    }, scene);
    barrel.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2;
    barrel.position.z = 0.52;
    barrel.parent = rifleRoot;
    barrel.material = armorMaterial;
    const stock = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`fallback-stock:${definition.id}`, {
      width: 0.12,
      height: 0.16,
      depth: 0.3,
    }, scene);
    stock.position.z = -0.44;
    stock.parent = rifleRoot;
    stock.material = armorMaterial;

    this.proceduralMeshes.push(torso, chest, head, visor, leftLeg, rightLeg, receiver, barrel, stock);
    this.proceduralMeshes.forEach((mesh) => {
      mesh.isPickable = false;
      mesh.metadata = { visualOnly: true, proceduralAgentVisual: true };
    });

    this.selectionProxy = MeshBuilder.CreateCapsule(`agent-proxy:${definition.id}`, {
      height: 2.05,
      radius: 0.38,
      tessellation: 8,
    }, scene);
    this.selectionProxy.position.y = 1.02;
    this.selectionProxy.parent = this.root;
    this.selectionProxy.isPickable = true;
    this.selectionProxy.visibility = 0.001;
    this.selectionProxy.metadata = {
      agentId: definition.id,
      entityId: definition.id,
      entityType: "agent",
      blocksShots: true,
      gameplayProxy: true,
    };

    this.selectionRing = MeshBuilder.CreateTorus(`selection:${definition.id}`, {
      diameter: 1.48,
      thickness: 0.09,
      tessellation: 40,
    }, scene);
    this.selectionRing.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2;
    this.selectionRing.position.y = 0.06;
    this.selectionRing.parent = this.root;
    this.selectionRing.isPickable = false;

    const selectionMaterial = new StandardMaterial(`selection-mat:${definition.id}`, scene);
    selectionMaterial.emissiveColor = definition.color;
    selectionMaterial.disableLighting = true;
    this.selectionRing.material = selectionMaterial;
    this.selectionRing.setEnabled(false);

    const shadowDisc = MeshBuilder.CreateDisc(`agent-shadow:${definition.id}`, { radius: 0.48, tessellation: 24 }, scene);
    shadowDisc.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2;
    shadowDisc.position.y = 0.02;
    shadowDisc.parent = this.root;
    shadowDisc.isPickable = false;
    const shadowMaterial = new StandardMaterial(`agent-shadow-mat:${definition.id}`, scene);
    shadowMaterial.diffuseColor = new Color3(0.04, 0.05, 0.06);
    shadowMaterial.emissiveColor = new Color3(0.01, 0.01, 0.01);
    shadowMaterial.alpha = 0.35;
    shadowDisc.material = shadowMaterial;
  }

  get visualMode(): AgentVisualMode {
    return this.currentVisualMode;
  }

  get suppressionState() {
    return suppressionState(this.suppression);
  }

  setSelected(selected: boolean): void {
    this.selected = selected;
    this.selectionRing.setEnabled(selected && !this.downed);
  }

  setVisualMode(mode: AgentVisualMode): void {
    this.currentVisualMode = mode;
    this.proceduralVisualRoot.setEnabled(mode === "procedural");
    this.externalVisualRoot.setEnabled(mode === "external");
    this.applyDownedPose();
  }

  /** Backward-compatible alias for older integration patches. */
  setProceduralVisualVisible(visible: boolean): void {
    this.setVisualMode(visible ? "procedural" : "external");
  }

  applyDamage(amount: number): number {
    if (this.downed || this.disabled) return 0;
    this.suppression = Math.min(120, this.suppression + Math.max(8, amount * 0.65));
    const armorAbsorption = Math.min(this.armor, Math.ceil(amount * 0.35));
    this.armor -= armorAbsorption;
    const healthDamage = Math.max(1, amount - armorAbsorption);
    this.health = Math.max(0, this.health - healthDamage);
    if (this.health <= 0) this.setDowned(true);
    return healthDamage;
  }

  stabilize(): void {
    if (!this.downed) return;
    this.downed = false;
    this.suppression = Math.min(this.suppression, 25);
    this.health = Math.max(25, Math.round(this.maxHealth * 0.25));
    this.applyDownedPose();
    this.selectionProxy.visibility = 0.001;
    this.setSelected(this.selected);
  }

  setDowned(downed: boolean): void {
    this.downed = downed;
    this.overwatch = false;
    this.applyDownedPose();
    this.selectionRing.setEnabled(!downed && this.selected);
  }

  clearPathMeshes(): void {
    while (this.pathMeshes.length) {
      this.pathMeshes.pop()?.dispose(false, true);
    }
  }

  private applyDownedPose(): void {
    if (!this.downed || this.currentVisualMode === "external") {
      this.root.rotation.z = 0;
      this.root.position.y = 0;
      return;
    }
    this.root.rotation.z = Math.PI / 2;
    this.root.position.y = 0.28;
  }
}

// ===== src/entities/Combatant.ts =====
import type { TransformNode } from "@babylonjs/core";
import type { WeaponDefinition } from "../data/combat/weapons";
import type { MovementStance, SuppressionState } from "../tactical/TacticalTypes";

export type Team = "ion" | "echo";

export interface Combatant {
  readonly id: string;
  readonly team: Team;
  readonly root: TransformNode;
  health: number;
  readonly maxHealth: number;
  armor: number;
  accuracy: number;
  weaponRange: number;
  weapon?: WeaponDefinition;
  baseDamage: number;
  ammo: number;
  readonly magazineSize: number;
  suppressedUntil: number;
  suppression: number;
  suppressionState: SuppressionState;
  movementStance: MovementStance;
  stunnedUntil: number;
  downed: boolean;
  disabled: boolean;
  crowdIndex: number;
  coverPointId?: string;

  applyDamage(amount: number): number;
}

export function isCombatant(value: unknown): value is Combatant {
  if (!value || typeof value !== "object") return false;
  const candidate = value as Partial<Combatant>;
  return typeof candidate.id === "string" && !!candidate.root && typeof candidate.health === "number";
}

// ===== src/entities/Enemy.ts =====
import {
  Color3,
  Mesh,
  MeshBuilder,
  StandardMaterial,
  TransformNode,
  Vector3,
  type Scene,
} from "@babylonjs/core";
import type { Combatant } from "./Combatant";
import { suppressionState, type MovementStance } from "../tactical/TacticalTypes";

export type EnemyKind = "observer" | "security" | "hunter" | "jammer";
export type EnemyState = "DORMANT" | "PATROL" | "INVESTIGATE" | "SEARCH" | "ENGAGE" | "RETREAT" | "DISABLED";

export type EnemyDefinition = {
  id: string;
  kind: EnemyKind;
  position: Vector3;
  patrolPoints: Vector3[];
  retreatPoint: Vector3;
  initialState?: EnemyState;
};

export class Enemy implements Combatant {
  readonly id: string;
  readonly team = "echo" as const;
  readonly root: TransformNode;
  readonly kind: EnemyKind;
  readonly patrolPoints: Vector3[];
  readonly retreatPoint: Vector3;
  readonly visualMeshes: Mesh[] = [];
  readonly lastKnownMarker: Mesh;

  state: EnemyState;
  health: number;
  readonly maxHealth: number;
  armor: number;
  accuracy: number;
  weaponRange: number;
  baseDamage: number;
  ammo = 99;
  readonly magazineSize = 99;
  suppressedUntil = 0;
  suppression = 0;
  movementStance: MovementStance = "tactical";
  stunnedUntil = 0;
  downed = false;
  disabled = false;
  crowdIndex = -1;
  coverPointId?: string;
  discovered = false;
  currentlyVisible = false;
  patrolIndex = 0;
  searchTimer = 0;
  fireCooldown = 0;
  scanProgress = 0;
  reinforcementCalled = false;
  overwatchJammer = false;
  lastKnownAgentPosition?: Vector3;
  targetAgentId?: string;
  escaped = false;
  debugDecision = "idle";
  debugScore = 0;

  constructor(definition: EnemyDefinition, scene: Scene) {
    this.id = definition.id;
    this.kind = definition.kind;
    this.patrolPoints = definition.patrolPoints.map((point) => point.clone());
    this.retreatPoint = definition.retreatPoint.clone();
    this.state = definition.initialState ?? "PATROL";
    const stats = {
      observer: { health: 55, armor: 8, accuracy: 0.55, range: 9, damage: 12 },
      security: { health: 85, armor: 18, accuracy: 0.64, range: 12, damage: 20 },
      hunter: { health: 96, armor: 14, accuracy: 0.72, range: 2.2, damage: 27 },
      jammer: { health: 72, armor: 12, accuracy: 0.58, range: 10, damage: 14 },
    } as const;
    const profile = stats[definition.kind];
    this.maxHealth = profile.health;
    this.health = this.maxHealth;
    this.armor = profile.armor;
    this.accuracy = profile.accuracy;
    this.weaponRange = profile.range;
    this.baseDamage = profile.damage;

    this.root = new TransformNode(`enemy:${definition.id}`, scene);
    this.root.position.copyFrom(definition.position);

    const shell = new StandardMaterial(`enemy-shell:${definition.id}`, scene);
    shell.diffuseColor = definition.kind === "observer"
      ? new Color3(0.08, 0.12, 0.14)
      : definition.kind === "hunter"
        ? new Color3(0.19, 0.06, 0.04)
        : definition.kind === "jammer"
          ? new Color3(0.09, 0.06, 0.2)
          : new Color3(0.16, 0.055, 0.045);
    shell.emissiveColor = definition.kind === "observer"
      ? new Color3(0.03, 0.2, 0.23)
      : definition.kind === "jammer"
        ? new Color3(0.25, 0.08, 0.5)
        : new Color3(0.23, 0.045, 0.02);
    shell.specularColor = new Color3(0.45, 0.5, 0.52);

    const opticMaterial = new StandardMaterial(`enemy-optic:${definition.id}`, scene);
    opticMaterial.diffuseColor = new Color3(0.15, 0.02, 0.01);
    opticMaterial.emissiveColor = definition.kind === "observer"
      ? new Color3(0.25, 0.95, 1)
      : definition.kind === "jammer"
        ? new Color3(0.72, 0.24, 1)
        : new Color3(1, 0.18, 0.06);
    opticMaterial.disableLighting = true;

    const body = MeshBuilder.CreateSphere(`enemy-body:${definition.id}`, {
      diameterX: definition.kind === "observer" ? 0.9 : 1.15,
      diameterY: definition.kind === "observer" ? 0.55 : 0.72,
      diameterZ: definition.kind === "observer" ? 1.05 : 1.25,
      segments: 14,
    }, scene);
    body.position.y = 1.35;
    body.parent = this.root;
    body.material = shell;

    const optic = MeshBuilder.CreateSphere(`enemy-optic-mesh:${definition.id}`, {
      diameter: definition.kind === "observer" ? 0.24 : 0.31,
      segments: 10,
    }, scene);
    optic.position.set(0, 1.37, 0.52);
    optic.parent = this.root;
    optic.material = opticMaterial;

    const leftWing = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`enemy-wing-l:${definition.id}`, {
      width: 0.58,
      height: 0.09,
      depth: 0.24,
    }, scene);
    leftWing.position.set(-0.62, 1.34, 0);
    leftWing.parent = this.root;
    leftWing.material = shell;

    const rightWing = leftWing.clone(`enemy-wing-r:${definition.id}`);
    rightWing.position.x = 0.62;
    rightWing.parent = this.root;

    const sensor = MeshBuilder.CreateTorus(`enemy-sensor:${definition.id}`, {
      diameter: definition.kind === "observer" ? 0.8 : 1.0,
      thickness: 0.035,
      tessellation: 32,
    }, scene);
    sensor.position.y = 1.33;
    sensor.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2;
    sensor.parent = this.root;
    sensor.material = opticMaterial;

    this.visualMeshes.push(body, optic, leftWing, rightWing, sensor);
    this.visualMeshes.forEach((mesh) => {
      mesh.isPickable = true;
      mesh.metadata = {
        enemyId: this.id,
        entityId: this.id,
        entityType: "enemy",
        blocksShots: true,
      };
    });

    this.lastKnownMarker = MeshBuilder.CreateTorus(`last-known:${definition.id}`, {
      diameter: 1.15,
      thickness: 0.045,
      tessellation: 32,
    }, scene);
    this.lastKnownMarker.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2;
    this.lastKnownMarker.position.copyFrom(definition.position);
    this.lastKnownMarker.position.y = 0.06;
    this.lastKnownMarker.isPickable = false;
    const markerMaterial = new StandardMaterial(`last-known-mat:${definition.id}`, scene);
    markerMaterial.emissiveColor = new Color3(1, 0.44, 0.12);
    markerMaterial.alpha = 0.48;
    markerMaterial.disableLighting = true;
    this.lastKnownMarker.material = markerMaterial;
    this.lastKnownMarker.setEnabled(false);

    this.setVisualState(false, false);
  }

  applyDamage(amount: number): number {
    if (this.disabled) return 0;
    this.suppression = Math.min(120, this.suppression + Math.max(10, amount * 0.72));
    const armorAbsorption = Math.min(this.armor, Math.ceil(amount * 0.28));
    this.armor -= armorAbsorption;
    const healthDamage = Math.max(1, amount - armorAbsorption);
    this.health = Math.max(0, this.health - healthDamage);
    if (this.health <= 0) this.disable();
    return healthDamage;
  }

  disable(): void {
    this.disabled = true;
    this.escaped = false;
    this.state = "DISABLED";
    this.currentlyVisible = true;
    this.visualMeshes.forEach((mesh) => { mesh.visibility = 0.55; });
    this.root.rotation.z = Math.PI / 2;
    this.root.position.y = 0.2;
    this.lastKnownMarker.setEnabled(false);
  }

  setVisualState(visible: boolean, showLastKnown: boolean): void {
    if (this.disabled) {
      this.visualMeshes.forEach((mesh) => { mesh.visibility = this.discovered ? 0.55 : 0; });
      this.lastKnownMarker.setEnabled(false);
      return;
    }
    this.visualMeshes.forEach((mesh) => { mesh.visibility = visible ? 1 : 0; });
    this.lastKnownMarker.setEnabled(showLastKnown);
  }

  get suppressionState() {
    return suppressionState(this.suppression);
  }
}

// ===== src/investigation/InvestigationTypes.ts =====
import type { Mesh, Vector3 } from "@babylonjs/core";

export type EvidenceCategory = "physical" | "digital" | "medical" | "echo";
export type InteractionKind = "examine" | "scan" | "collect" | "hack" | "restore" | "download" | "recover";

export type EvidenceDefinition = {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  description: string;
  category: EvidenceCategory;
  requiredAgentTags?: string[];
  scanDuration: number;
  storyFlagsGranted: string[];
  interpretations?: Partial<Record<string, string>>;
  core?: boolean;
};

export type InteractableDefinition = {
  id: string;
  label: string;
  kind: InteractionKind;
  mesh: Mesh;
  position: Vector3;
  interactionPoint: Vector3;
  duration: number;
  evidenceId?: string;
  requiredAgentTags?: string[];
  prerequisiteFlags?: string[];
  grantsFlags?: string[];
  sensorId?: string;
  dialogueId?: string;
};

export type InteractableRuntime = InteractableDefinition & {
  completed: boolean;
  corrupted: boolean;
};

// ===== src/main.ts =====
import "./styles.css";
import { Game } from "./app/Game";

const game = new Game();
game.start().catch((error: unknown) => {
  console.error(error);
  const status = document.getElementById("loadingStatus");
  if (status) status.textContent = `Simulation failed: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)}`;
  const loading = document.getElementById("loadingScreen");
  loading?.classList.add("error");
});

// ===== src/mission/MissionTypes.ts =====
export type MissionStage =
  | "briefing"
  | "checkpoint"
  | "investigation"
  | "crisis"
  | "extraction"
  | "debrief"
  | "complete"
  | "failed";

export type PragueMissionStage = MissionStage;

export type CrisisPriority = "evidence" | "patients" | "observer";

export type MissionOutcome = "best" | "partial" | "failure";

export type MissionObjectiveStep = {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  status: "pending" | "active" | "complete" | "failed";
};

export type MissionReport = {
  outcome: MissionOutcome;
  title: string;
  summary: string;
  score: number;
  grade: "S" | "A" | "B" | "C" | "D";
  evidenceRecovered: number;
  coreEvidenceRecovered: number;
  dronesResolved: number;
  dronesDisabled: number;
  dronesEscaped: number;
  squadInjuries: number;
  squadDowned: number;
  missionTimeSeconds: number;
  crisisPriority?: CrisisPriority;
  crisisResolved?: boolean;
  simultaneousObjectivesCompleted?: number;
  echoAdaptation: string;
  nextLead: string;
};

// ===== src/mission/PragueMissionDirector.ts =====
import type { Vector3 } from "@babylonjs/core";
import type { EventBus } from "../engine/EventBus";
import type { Agent } from "../entities/Agent";
import type { Enemy } from "../entities/Enemy";
import type { EchoObserverSystem } from "../systems/EchoObserverSystem";
import type { StoryState } from "../story/StoryState";
import type { InvestigationSystem } from "../systems/InvestigationSystem";
import type { HudController } from "../ui/HudController";
import type { MissionRuntime } from "../runtime/mission/MissionRuntime";
import type {
  CrisisPriority,
  MissionObjectiveStep,
  MissionOutcome,
  MissionReport,
  MissionStage,
  PragueMissionStage,
} from "./MissionTypes";

export type MissionDirectorSnapshot = {
  stage: PragueMissionStage;
  completedObjectiveIds: string[];
  encounterStarted: boolean;
  crisisPriority?: CrisisPriority;
  crisisResolved: boolean;
};

export class PragueMissionDirector implements MissionRuntime<MissionDirectorSnapshot> {
  readonly id = "prague";
  readonly chapterId = "prague";

  private stage: MissionStage = "briefing";
  private encounterStarted = false;
  private readonly completedObjectiveIds = new Set<string>();
  private debriefShown = false;
  private crisisPriority?: CrisisPriority;
  private crisisResolved = false;

  constructor(
    private readonly agents: Agent[],
    private readonly enemies: Enemy[],
    private readonly receptionCenter: Vector3,
    private readonly extractionCenter: Vector3,
    private readonly investigation: InvestigationSystem,
    private readonly echoObserver: EchoObserverSystem,
    private readonly story: StoryState,
    private readonly hud: HudController,
    private readonly bus: EventBus,
  ) {
    this.emitObjectives();
    this.bus.on("dialogue:choice", ({ dialogueId, choiceId }) => {
      if (dialogueId !== "prague_crisis_choice") return;
      if (["evidence", "patients", "observer"].includes(choiceId)) {
        this.crisisPriority = choiceId as CrisisPriority;
        this.bus.emit("toast", { message: `Crisis priority: ${choiceId.toUpperCase()}. Other opportunities remain optional.`, tone: "warning" });
        this.emitObjectives();
      }
    });
    this.bus.on("interaction:completed", ({ interactionId }) => {
      if (interactionId === "power-junction") this.completeObjective("restore-power");
      if (interactionId === "patient-alpha") this.completeObjective("assess-patients");
      if (interactionId === "camera-control") this.completeObjective("disable-camera");
      if (interactionId === "crisis-life-support") this.completeObjective("crisis-patients");
      if (interactionId === "crisis-evidence-cache") this.completeObjective("crisis-evidence");
    });
    this.bus.on("enemy:disabled", ({ enemyId }) => {
      if (enemyId.startsWith("observer")) this.completeObjective("stop-observer");
    });
  }

  get currentStage(): string {
    return this.stage;
  }

  startMission(): void {
    if (this.stage !== "briefing") return;
    this.setStage("checkpoint", "Mission started");
    this.bus.emit("dialogue:play", { dialogueId: "prague_arrival" });
  }

  update(_deltaSeconds?: number): void {
    if (["briefing", "debrief", "complete", "failed"].includes(this.stage)) return;
    this.updateSimultaneousProgress();

    const mobileAgents = this.agents.filter((agent) => !agent.downed && !agent.disabled);
    if (mobileAgents.length === 0) {
      this.failMission("Alpha Team is incapacitated.");
      return;
    }

    if (this.stage === "checkpoint") {
      const inside = this.agents.filter((agent) => within(agent.root.position, this.receptionCenter, 2.6)).length;
      const progress = inside / this.agents.length;
      this.hud.setObjective("Secure reception", `${inside}/${this.agents.length} agents inside the checkpoint.`, progress, false);
      if (inside === this.agents.length) {
        this.completeObjective("secure-reception");
        this.setStage("investigation", "Reception secured");
        this.bus.emit("toast", { message: "Checkpoint secured. Five objectives are now active across the clinic.", tone: "success" });
        this.bus.emit("combat:log", { message: "Restore power, assess patients, recover evidence, and control security in any order.", tone: "info" });
      }
      return;
    }

    if (this.stage === "investigation") {
      const core = this.investigation.coreRecoveredCount;
      const power = this.story.has("clinic.power_restored");
      const patient = this.story.has("evidence.patient_state");
      const camera = this.story.has("security.camera_icu_disabled");
      const completed = [power, patient, camera, core >= 3].filter(Boolean).length;
      this.hud.setObjective(
        "Investigate the clinic",
        `${completed}/4 primary investigation threads resolved · ${core}/3 required core findings.`,
        completed / 4,
        false,
      );
      if (core >= 3 && power && !this.encounterStarted) this.beginEncounter();
      return;
    }

    if (this.stage === "crisis") {
      this.updateCrisisResolution();
      const resolved = this.enemies.filter((enemy) => enemy.disabled).length;
      const priorityText = this.crisisPriority
        ? `${this.crisisPriority.toUpperCase()} ${this.crisisResolved ? "SECURED" : "AT RISK"}`
        : "AWAITING CRISIS DECISION";
      this.hud.setObjective(
        "Contain the Echo crisis",
        `${resolved}/${this.enemies.length} threats resolved · ${priorityText}.`,
        resolved / Math.max(1, this.enemies.length),
        false,
      );
      if (resolved === this.enemies.length && this.crisisPriority) {
        this.completeObjective("neutralize-drones");
        this.setStage("extraction", this.crisisResolved ? "Crisis priority secured" : "Crisis priority lost");
        this.bus.emit("alert:changed", { level: "CLEAR" });
        this.bus.emit("dialogue:play", { dialogueId: "prague_extraction" });
        this.bus.emit("toast", {
          message: this.crisisResolved
            ? "Priority secured. Move all mobile agents to extraction."
            : "Threats resolved, but the selected crisis priority was lost. Extract now.",
          tone: this.crisisResolved ? "success" : "warning",
        });
      }
      return;
    }

    if (this.stage === "extraction") {
      const inside = mobileAgents.filter((agent) => within(agent.root.position, this.extractionCenter, 3.1)).length;
      const progress = inside / Math.max(1, mobileAgents.length);
      this.hud.setObjective("Extract Alpha Team", `${inside}/${mobileAgents.length} mobile agents inside the extraction zone.`, progress, false);
      if (inside === mobileAgents.length) {
        this.completeObjective("extract-squad");
        this.setStage("debrief", "Extraction complete");
        this.showDebrief();
      }
    }
  }

  continueAfterDebrief(): void {
    if (this.stage !== "debrief") return;
    this.setStage("complete", "Mission complete");
    this.hud.setObjective("MISSION COMPLETE", "Prague evidence points toward a fabrication route in Dresden.", 1, true);
    this.bus.emit("dialogue:play", { dialogueId: "prague_debrief_complete" });
  }

  snapshot(): MissionDirectorSnapshot {
    return {
      stage: this.stage,
      completedObjectiveIds: [...this.completedObjectiveIds],
      encounterStarted: this.encounterStarted,
      crisisPriority: this.crisisPriority,
      crisisResolved: this.crisisResolved,
    };
  }

  restore(snapshot: MissionDirectorSnapshot): void {
    this.stage = snapshot.stage;
    this.encounterStarted = snapshot.encounterStarted;
    this.crisisPriority = snapshot.crisisPriority;
    this.crisisResolved = snapshot.crisisResolved ?? false;
    this.completedObjectiveIds.clear();
    snapshot.completedObjectiveIds.forEach((id) => this.completedObjectiveIds.add(id));
    this.debriefShown = false;
    this.emitObjectives();
    if (this.stage === "debrief") this.showDebrief();
    this.bus.emit("mission:stage-changed", { stage: this.stage });
  }

  createReport(outcomeOverride?: MissionOutcome): MissionReport {
    this.updateCrisisResolution();
    const squadDowned = this.agents.filter((agent) => agent.downed).length;
    const squadInjuries = this.echoObserver.metrics.injuredAgents;
    const evidenceRecovered = this.investigation.recoveredCount;
    const coreEvidenceRecovered = this.investigation.coreRecoveredCount;
    const dronesDisabled = this.enemies.filter((enemy) => enemy.disabled && !enemy.escaped).length;
    const dronesEscaped = this.enemies.filter((enemy) => enemy.escaped).length;
    const dronesResolved = dronesDisabled + dronesEscaped;
    const allEvidence = evidenceRecovered >= this.investigation.totalEvidence;
    let outcome: MissionOutcome = outcomeOverride ?? (squadDowned === 0 && squadInjuries === 0 && allEvidence && this.crisisResolved ? "best" : "partial");
    if (this.stage === "failed") outcome = "failure";
    let score = 50;
    score += coreEvidenceRecovered * 7;
    score += Math.max(0, evidenceRecovered - coreEvidenceRecovered) * 4;
    score += dronesResolved * 3;
    score += this.crisisResolved ? 12 : -8;
    score += Math.min(8, this.completedObjectiveIds.size);
    score -= squadInjuries * 6;
    score -= squadDowned * 18;
    score -= Math.floor(this.echoObserver.metrics.missionTime / 180) * 2;
    score = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, score));
    const grade = score >= 95 ? "S" : score >= 85 ? "A" : score >= 70 ? "B" : score >= 55 ? "C" : "D";
    const title = outcome === "best" ? "CLEAN EXTRACTION" : outcome === "partial" ? "MISSION ACCOMPLISHED" : "MISSION FAILED";
    const summary = outcome === "best"
      ? "Alpha Team recovered the Prague evidence chain, contained the crisis priority, and extracted without a casualty."
      : outcome === "partial"
        ? `Alpha Team traced Echo and extracted, but the operation carried tactical costs${this.crisisPriority && !this.crisisResolved ? ` and lost the ${this.crisisPriority} priority` : ""}.`
        : "Alpha Team failed to complete the Prague investigation.";
    return {
      outcome,
      title,
      summary,
      score,
      grade,
      evidenceRecovered,
      coreEvidenceRecovered,
      dronesResolved,
      dronesDisabled,
      dronesEscaped,
      squadInjuries,
      squadDowned,
      crisisPriority: this.crisisPriority,
      crisisResolved: this.crisisResolved,
      simultaneousObjectivesCompleted: this.completedObjectiveIds.size,
      missionTimeSeconds: this.echoObserver.metrics.missionTime,
      echoAdaptation: this.echoObserver.adaptation ?? "not observed",
      nextLead: outcome === "failure" ? "None" : "Conductive polymer shipments rerouted to Dresden, Germany.",
    };
  }

  private beginEncounter(): void {
    this.encounterStarted = true;
    this.setStage("crisis", "Echo crisis triggered");
    const adaptation = this.echoObserver.beginEncounter();
    this.bus.emit("dialogue:play", { dialogueId: "prague_crisis_choice" });
    this.bus.emit("toast", { message: `Echo countermeasure: ${adaptation.replaceAll("_", " ")}. Choose a crisis priority.`, tone: "warning" });
    this.bus.emit("combat:log", { message: "CRISIS: evidence purge, patient failure, and Observer escape are occurring simultaneously.", tone: "danger" });
  }

  private updateSimultaneousProgress(): void {
    const before = this.completedObjectiveIds.size;
    if (this.story.has("clinic.power_restored")) this.completedObjectiveIds.add("restore-power");
    if (this.story.has("evidence.patient_state")) this.completedObjectiveIds.add("assess-patients");
    if (this.story.has("security.camera_icu_disabled")) this.completedObjectiveIds.add("disable-camera");
    if (this.investigation.coreRecoveredCount >= 3) this.completedObjectiveIds.add("recover-core-evidence");
    if (this.investigation.recoveredCount >= 6) this.completedObjectiveIds.add("preserve-optional-evidence");
    if (this.completedObjectiveIds.size !== before) this.emitObjectives();
  }

  private updateCrisisResolution(): void {
    if (!this.crisisPriority) return;
    if (this.crisisPriority === "evidence") this.crisisResolved = this.story.has("crisis.evidence_secured");
    if (this.crisisPriority === "patients") this.crisisResolved = this.story.has("crisis.patients_secured");
    if (this.crisisPriority === "observer") {
      const observer = this.enemies.find((enemy) => enemy.kind === "observer");
      this.crisisResolved = Boolean(observer?.disabled && !observer.escaped);
    }
    const objectiveId = `crisis-${this.crisisPriority}`;
    if (this.crisisResolved && !this.completedObjectiveIds.has(objectiveId)) {
      this.completeObjective(objectiveId);
    }
  }

  private failMission(reason: string): void {
    this.setStage("failed", reason);
    this.hud.setObjective("MISSION FAILED", reason, 1, true);
    this.bus.emit("toast", { message: `Mission failed: ${reason}`, tone: "warning" });
    this.bus.emit("mission:debrief", { report: this.createReport("failure") });
  }

  private showDebrief(): void {
    if (this.debriefShown) return;
    this.debriefShown = true;
    this.hud.setObjective("EXTRACTION COMPLETE", "Review the mission report.", 1, true);
    this.bus.emit("mission:debrief", { report: this.createReport() });
  }

  private setStage(stage: PragueMissionStage, reason: string): void {
    if (this.stage === stage) return;
    this.stage = stage;
    this.emitObjectives();
    this.bus.emit("mission:stage-changed", { stage });
    this.bus.emit("checkpoint:requested", { id: stage, label: reason });
  }

  private completeObjective(id: string): void {
    if (this.completedObjectiveIds.has(id)) return;
    this.completedObjectiveIds.add(id);
    this.bus.emit("objective:reached", { objectiveId: id });
    this.emitObjectives();
  }

  private emitObjectives(): void {
    this.bus.emit("mission:objectives", { steps: objectiveSteps(this.stage, this.completedObjectiveIds, this.crisisPriority, this.crisisResolved) });
  }
}

function objectiveSteps(
  stage: PragueMissionStage,
  completed: ReadonlySet<string>,
  crisisPriority?: CrisisPriority,
  crisisResolved = false,
): MissionObjectiveStep[] {
  const duringInvestigation = stage === "investigation" || stage === "crisis" || stage === "extraction" || stage === "debrief" || stage === "complete";
  const definitions: Array<{ id: string; title: string; active: boolean; failed?: boolean }> = [
    { id: "secure-reception", title: "Secure reception", active: stage === "checkpoint" },
    { id: "restore-power", title: "Restore clinic power", active: duringInvestigation },
    { id: "assess-patients", title: "Assess the ICU patients", active: duringInvestigation },
    { id: "recover-core-evidence", title: "Recover three core findings", active: duringInvestigation },
    { id: "disable-camera", title: "Disable the ICU camera", active: duringInvestigation },
    { id: "preserve-optional-evidence", title: "Preserve optional evidence", active: duringInvestigation },
  ];
  if (stage === "crisis" || stage === "extraction" || stage === "debrief" || stage === "complete") {
    definitions.push({ id: "neutralize-drones", title: "Resolve all Echo threats", active: stage === "crisis" });
    if (crisisPriority) {
      definitions.push({
        id: `crisis-${crisisPriority}`,
        title: crisisPriority === "evidence" ? "PRIORITY: preserve volatile evidence" : crisisPriority === "patients" ? "PRIORITY: stabilize patient life support" : "PRIORITY: stop the Observer intact",
        active: stage === "crisis" && !crisisResolved,
        failed: stage !== "crisis" && !crisisResolved,
      });
    }
  }
  definitions.push({ id: "extract-squad", title: "Reach rooftop extraction", active: stage === "extraction" });
  return definitions.map((definition) => ({
    id: definition.id,
    title: definition.title,
    status: completed.has(definition.id)
      ? "complete"
      : definition.failed
        ? "failed"
        : definition.active
          ? "active"
          : "pending",
  }));
}

function within(a: Vector3, b: Vector3, radius: number): boolean {
  return Math.hypot(a.x - b.x, a.z - b.z) <= radius;
}

// ===== src/recast-wrapper.ts =====
const esmUrl = new URL("../node_modules/recast-detour/recast.es6.js", import.meta.url);

const recastFn = (await import(esmUrl.toString())).default;

const boundInit = (): ReturnType<typeof recastFn> => {
  return recastFn.call(globalThis);
};

export default boundInit;

// ===== src/rendering/LightingBudget.test.ts =====
import {
  MultiMaterial,
  NullEngine,
  PBRMaterial,
  Scene,
} from "@babylonjs/core";
import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest";
import {
  capMaterialLightCount,
  capSceneMaterialLightCount,
} from "./LightingBudget";

describe("lighting budget", () => {
  it("caps glTF-style PBR material light counts", () => {
    const engine = new NullEngine();
    const scene = new Scene(engine);
    const material = new PBRMaterial("imported-pbr", scene);
    material.maxSimultaneousLights = 13;

    expect(capSceneMaterialLightCount(scene, 4)).toBe(1);
    expect(material.maxSimultaneousLights).toBe(4);

    scene.dispose();
    engine.dispose();
  });

  it("also caps sub-materials", () => {
    const engine = new NullEngine();
    const scene = new Scene(engine);
    const first = new PBRMaterial("first", scene);
    const second = new PBRMaterial("second", scene);
    first.maxSimultaneousLights = 8;
    second.maxSimultaneousLights = 6;
    const multi = new MultiMaterial("multi", scene);
    multi.subMaterials.push(first, second);

    expect(capMaterialLightCount(multi, 4)).toBe(2);
    expect(first.maxSimultaneousLights).toBe(4);
    expect(second.maxSimultaneousLights).toBe(4);

    scene.dispose();
    engine.dispose();
  });
});

// ===== src/rendering/LightingBudget.ts =====
import {
  Material,
  MultiMaterial,
  type Scene,
} from "@babylonjs/core";

export const DEFAULT_MAX_SIMULTANEOUS_LIGHTS = 4;

type LightLimitedMaterial = Material & {
  maxSimultaneousLights?: number;
};

/**
 * Babylon's glTF loader expands imported PBR materials to the scene's complete
 * light count. On WebGL2 devices with a small uniform-block budget this can
 * create shaders that cannot compile. Keep each material on a predictable,
 * portable light budget instead.
 */
export function capMaterialLightCount(
  material: Material | null | undefined,
  maxLights = DEFAULT_MAX_SIMULTANEOUS_LIGHTS,
): number {
  if (!material) return 0;

  let changed = 0;
  if (material instanceof MultiMaterial) {
    for (const subMaterial of material.subMaterials) {
      changed += capMaterialLightCount(subMaterial, maxLights);
    }
  }

  const candidate = material as LightLimitedMaterial;
  if (
    typeof candidate.maxSimultaneousLights === "number"
    && candidate.maxSimultaneousLights > maxLights
  ) {
    candidate.maxSimultaneousLights = maxLights;
    material.markAsDirty(Material.LightDirtyFlag);
    changed += 1;
  }

  return changed;
}

export function capSceneMaterialLightCount(
  scene: Scene,
  maxLights = DEFAULT_MAX_SIMULTANEOUS_LIGHTS,
): number {
  return scene.materials.reduce(
    (count, material) => count + capMaterialLightCount(material, maxLights),
    0,
  );
}

// ===== src/runtime/content/AssetBundleManager.ts =====
import type { AssetEntry } from "../../assets/AssetManifest";
import type { AssetPipeline } from "../../assets/AssetPipeline";
import type { ContentRegistry } from "./ContentRegistry";

export class AssetBundleManager {
  private readonly loaded = new Set<string>();

  constructor(
    private readonly pipeline: AssetPipeline,
    private readonly content: ContentRegistry,
  ) {}

  async loadForMission(missionId: string): Promise<void> {
    const mission = this.content.getMission(missionId);
    if (!mission) throw new Error(`Unknown mission asset request: ${missionId}`);
    for (const bundleId of mission.assetBundles) await this.load(bundleId);
  }

  async load(bundleId: string): Promise<void> {
    if (this.loaded.has(bundleId)) return;
    const bundle = this.content.getAssetBundle(bundleId);
    if (!bundle) throw new Error(`Unknown asset bundle: ${bundleId}`);
    for (const dependency of bundle.dependencies ?? []) await this.load(dependency);
    for (const url of bundle.manifestUrls ?? []) await this.pipeline.loadManifest(url, bundleId);
    const virtualAssets = bundle.assets.flatMap((asset): AssetEntry[] => {
      if (!["character", "environment", "prop"].includes(asset.kind)) return [];
      return [{
        id: asset.id,
        kind: asset.kind as AssetEntry["kind"],
        url: asset.url,
        bundleId,
        dependencies: asset.dependencies,
        variants: asset.variants,
        optional: asset.optional,
        memoryClass: asset.memoryClass,
        qualityVariants: asset.qualityVariants,
        license: asset.license,
      }];
    });
    this.pipeline.installManifest({ version: 1, bundleId, assets: virtualAssets }, bundleId);
    this.loaded.add(bundleId);
  }

  unload(bundleId: string): void {
    if (!this.loaded.delete(bundleId)) return;
    this.pipeline.removeBundle(bundleId);
  }

  loadedBundleIds(): string[] {
    return [...this.loaded].sort();
  }

  snapshot(): { loadedBundleIds: string[] } {
    return { loadedBundleIds: this.loadedBundleIds() };
  }

  restore(snapshot: { loadedBundleIds?: string[] } | undefined): void {
    this.loaded.clear();
    (snapshot?.loadedBundleIds ?? []).forEach((id) => this.loaded.add(id));
  }
}

// ===== src/runtime/content/ContentRegistry.ts =====
import type { DialogueDefinition } from "../../dialogue/DialogueTypes";
import type { MissionModule } from "../mission/MissionRuntime";
import type { SceneDefinition } from "../sequence/SequenceTypes";
import type {
  AssetBundleDefinition,
  ChapterDefinition,
  ChapterPackage,
  CharacterDefinition,
  MissionDefinition,
  OperationDefinition,
  SequenceDefinition,
  HeadquartersStageDefinition,
} from "./ContentTypes";

export type ContentValidationIssue = {
  level: "error" | "warning";
  code: string;
  message: string;
  contentId?: string;
};

export class CharacterRegistry {
  private readonly definitions = new Map<string, CharacterDefinition>();

  register(definition: CharacterDefinition): void {
    if (this.definitions.has(definition.id)) throw new Error(`Duplicate character: ${definition.id}`);
    this.definitions.set(definition.id, definition);
  }

  get(id: string): CharacterDefinition | undefined {
    return this.definitions.get(id);
  }

  require(id: string): CharacterDefinition {
    const definition = this.get(id);
    if (!definition) throw new Error(`Unknown character: ${id}`);
    return definition;
  }

  all(): CharacterDefinition[] {
    return [...this.definitions.values()];
  }
}

export class ContentRegistry {
  readonly characters = new CharacterRegistry();
  private readonly chapters = new Map<string, ChapterDefinition>();
  private readonly sequences = new Map<string, SequenceDefinition>();
  private readonly missions = new Map<string, MissionDefinition>();
  private readonly missionModules = new Map<string, MissionModule>();
  private readonly scenes = new Map<string, SceneDefinition>();
  private readonly dialogues = new Map<string, DialogueDefinition>();
  private readonly operations = new Map<string, OperationDefinition>();
  private readonly bundles = new Map<string, AssetBundleDefinition>();
  private readonly headquartersStages = new Map<string, HeadquartersStageDefinition>();

  registerCharacters(definitions: CharacterDefinition[]): this {
    definitions.forEach((definition) => this.characters.register(definition));
    return this;
  }

  registerHeadquartersStages(definitions: HeadquartersStageDefinition[]): this {
    definitions.forEach((definition) => registerUnique(this.headquartersStages, definition.id, definition, "headquarters stage"));
    return this;
  }

  registerPackage(pkg: ChapterPackage): this {
    registerUnique(this.chapters, pkg.chapter.id, pkg.chapter, "chapter");
    pkg.sequences.forEach((definition) => registerUnique(this.sequences, definition.id, definition, "sequence"));
    pkg.missions?.forEach((definition) => registerUnique(this.missions, definition.id, definition, "mission"));
    pkg.missionModules?.forEach((module) => registerUnique(this.missionModules, module.definition.id, module, "mission module"));
    pkg.scenes?.forEach((definition) => registerUnique(this.scenes, definition.id, definition, "scene"));
    pkg.dialogues?.forEach((definition) => registerUnique(this.dialogues, definition.id, definition, "dialogue"));
    pkg.operations?.forEach((definition) => registerUnique(this.operations, definition.id, definition, "operation"));
    pkg.assetBundles?.forEach((definition) => registerUnique(this.bundles, definition.id, definition, "asset bundle"));
    return this;
  }

  getChapter(id: string): ChapterDefinition | undefined { return this.chapters.get(id); }
  getSequence(id: string): SequenceDefinition | undefined { return this.sequences.get(id); }
  getMission(id: string): MissionDefinition | undefined { return this.missions.get(id); }
  getScene(id: string): SceneDefinition | undefined { return this.scenes.get(id); }
  getDialogue(id: string): DialogueDefinition | undefined { return this.dialogues.get(id); }
  getOperation(id: string): OperationDefinition | undefined { return this.operations.get(id); }
  getAssetBundle(id: string): AssetBundleDefinition | undefined { return this.bundles.get(id); }
  getHeadquartersStage(id: string): HeadquartersStageDefinition | undefined { return this.headquartersStages.get(id); }

  requireMissionModule<T extends MissionModule = MissionModule>(id: string): T {
    const module = this.missionModules.get(id);
    if (!module) throw new Error(`Mission ${id} has no runtime module.`);
    return module as T;
  }

  dialogueForChapter(chapterId: string): DialogueDefinition[] {
    const chapter = this.chapters.get(chapterId);
    if (!chapter) return [];
    const referenced = new Set<string>();
    chapter.sequenceIds.forEach((sequenceId) => {
      const sequence = this.sequences.get(sequenceId);
      if (!sequence) return;
      if (sequence.type === "tactical") this.missions.get(sequence.contentId)?.dialogueIds.forEach((id) => referenced.add(id));
      else collectSceneDialogueIds(this.scenes.get(sequence.contentId), referenced);
    });
    return [...referenced].map((id) => this.dialogues.get(id)).filter((value): value is DialogueDefinition => Boolean(value));
  }

  allDialogues(): DialogueDefinition[] { return [...this.dialogues.values()]; }
  allChapters(): ChapterDefinition[] { return [...this.chapters.values()].sort((a, b) => a.order - b.order); }
  allSequences(): SequenceDefinition[] { return [...this.sequences.values()]; }
  allMissions(): MissionDefinition[] { return [...this.missions.values()]; }
  allScenes(): SceneDefinition[] { return [...this.scenes.values()]; }
  allOperations(): OperationDefinition[] { return [...this.operations.values()]; }
  allAssetBundles(): AssetBundleDefinition[] { return [...this.bundles.values()]; }

  operationTitle(id: string): string {
    return this.operations.get(id)?.title ?? id.replaceAll("-", " ");
  }

  operationDescription(id: string): string {
    return this.operations.get(id)?.description ?? "No operation briefing is available.";
  }

  assetManifestUrlsForMission(missionId: string): string[] {
    const mission = this.missions.get(missionId);
    if (!mission) return [];
    const visited = new Set<string>();
    const urls: string[] = [];
    const visit = (bundleId: string) => {
      if (visited.has(bundleId)) return;
      visited.add(bundleId);
      const bundle = this.bundles.get(bundleId);
      if (!bundle) return;
      bundle.dependencies?.forEach(visit);
      bundle.manifestUrls?.forEach((url) => { if (!urls.includes(url)) urls.push(url); });
    };
    mission.assetBundles.forEach(visit);
    return urls;
  }

  validate(): ContentValidationIssue[] {
    const issues: ContentValidationIssue[] = [];
    const error = (code: string, message: string, contentId?: string) => issues.push({ level: "error", code, message, contentId });
    const warning = (code: string, message: string, contentId?: string) => issues.push({ level: "warning", code, message, contentId });

    this.chapters.forEach((chapter) => {
      chapter.sequenceIds.forEach((id) => { if (!this.sequences.has(id)) error("chapter.sequence.missing", `Chapter ${chapter.id} references missing sequence ${id}.`, chapter.id); });
      chapter.assetBundles.forEach((id) => { if (!this.bundles.has(id)) error("chapter.bundle.missing", `Chapter ${chapter.id} references missing asset bundle ${id}.`, chapter.id); });
      chapter.nextChapterIds.forEach((id) => { if (!this.chapters.has(id)) error("chapter.next.missing", `Chapter ${chapter.id} references missing next chapter ${id}.`, chapter.id); });
    });

    this.sequences.forEach((sequence) => {
      if (!this.chapters.has(sequence.chapterId)) error("sequence.chapter.missing", `Sequence ${sequence.id} references missing chapter ${sequence.chapterId}.`, sequence.id);
      if (sequence.type === "tactical" && !this.missions.has(sequence.contentId)) error("sequence.mission.missing", `Sequence ${sequence.id} references missing mission ${sequence.contentId}.`, sequence.id);
      if (sequence.type !== "tactical" && !this.scenes.has(sequence.contentId)) error("sequence.scene.missing", `Sequence ${sequence.id} references missing scene ${sequence.contentId}.`, sequence.id);
      sequence.next?.forEach(({ sequenceId }) => { if (!this.sequences.has(sequenceId)) error("sequence.next.missing", `Sequence ${sequence.id} references missing transition ${sequenceId}.`, sequence.id); });
    });

    this.missions.forEach((mission) => {
      if (!this.chapters.has(mission.chapterId)) error("mission.chapter.missing", `Mission ${mission.id} references missing chapter ${mission.chapterId}.`, mission.id);
      mission.assetBundles.forEach((id) => { if (!this.bundles.has(id)) error("mission.bundle.missing", `Mission ${mission.id} references missing bundle ${id}.`, mission.id); });
      mission.allowedOperatives?.forEach((id) => { if (!this.characters.get(id)) error("mission.character.missing", `Mission ${mission.id} references missing operative ${id}.`, mission.id); });
      mission.dialogueIds.forEach((id) => { if (!this.dialogues.has(id)) warning("mission.dialogue.missing", `Mission ${mission.id} references dialogue ${id}, but it is not registered.`, mission.id); });
      if (mission.implementation === "runtime" && !this.missionModules.has(mission.id)) error("mission.runtime.missing", `Mission ${mission.id} is marked runtime but has no module.`, mission.id);
    });

    this.scenes.forEach((scene) => {
      if (!this.chapters.has(scene.chapterId)) error("scene.chapter.missing", `Scene ${scene.id} references missing chapter ${scene.chapterId}.`, scene.id);
      if (!this.headquartersStages.has(scene.stageId) && !scene.stageId.startsWith("mission:")) warning("scene.stage.missing", `Scene ${scene.id} references unregistered stage ${scene.stageId}.`, scene.id);
      scene.actors.forEach((id) => { if (!this.characters.get(id)) error("scene.character.missing", `Scene ${scene.id} references missing actor ${id}.`, scene.id); });
      scene.assetBundles.forEach((id) => { if (!this.bundles.has(id)) error("scene.bundle.missing", `Scene ${scene.id} references missing bundle ${id}.`, scene.id); });
      const dialogueIds = new Set<string>();
      collectSceneDialogueIds(scene, dialogueIds);
      dialogueIds.forEach((id) => { if (!this.dialogues.has(id)) warning("scene.dialogue.missing", `Scene ${scene.id} references dialogue ${id}, but it is not registered.`, scene.id); });
    });

    this.dialogues.forEach((dialogue) => {
      dialogue.lines.forEach((line) => {
        if (!this.characters.get(line.speaker) && line.speaker !== "system") error("dialogue.character.missing", `Dialogue ${dialogue.id} uses unknown speaker ${line.speaker}.`, dialogue.id);
        if (line.choices?.some((choice) => !choice.effects?.length)) warning("dialogue.choice.no-effects", `Dialogue ${dialogue.id} contains a choice without persistent effects.`, dialogue.id);
      });
    });

    this.bundles.forEach((bundle) => {
      bundle.dependencies?.forEach((id) => { if (!this.bundles.has(id)) error("bundle.dependency.missing", `Bundle ${bundle.id} references missing dependency ${id}.`, bundle.id); });
      bundle.assets.forEach((asset) => {
        if (asset.bundleId !== bundle.id) error("asset.bundle.mismatch", `Asset ${asset.id} declares ${asset.bundleId} but is stored in ${bundle.id}.`, asset.id);
      });
    });

    return issues;
  }

  validateOrThrow(): void {
    const errors = this.validate().filter((issue) => issue.level === "error");
    if (errors.length > 0) throw new Error(`Content validation failed:\n${errors.map((issue) => `- ${issue.message}`).join("\n")}`);
  }
}

function registerUnique<T>(map: Map<string, T>, id: string, value: T, label: string): void {
  if (map.has(id)) throw new Error(`Duplicate ${label}: ${id}`);
  map.set(id, value);
}

function collectSceneDialogueIds(scene: SceneDefinition | undefined, target: Set<string>): void {
  if (!scene) return;
  const visit = (commands: SceneDefinition["commands"]) => commands.forEach((command) => {
    if (command.type === "dialogue") target.add(command.dialogueId);
    if (command.type === "conditional") {
      visit(command.commands);
      visit(command.otherwise ?? []);
    }
  });
  visit(scene.commands);
}

// ===== src/runtime/content/ContentTypes.ts =====
import type { DialogueDefinition } from "../../dialogue/DialogueTypes";
import type { MissionModule } from "../mission/MissionRuntime";
import type { SceneDefinition } from "../sequence/SequenceTypes";

export type ContentId = string;

export type OperativeStatus =
  | "unrecruited"
  | "active"
  | "injured"
  | "recovering"
  | "compromised"
  | "cognitively_absent"
  | "kia"
  | "mia"
  | "captured"
  | "contained"
  | "hybrid";

export type CharacterDefinition = {
  id: ContentId;
  displayName: string;
  callsign?: string;
  initials: string;
  role?: string;
  modelAssetId: ContentId;
  portraitSetId: ContentId;
  voiceProfileId: ContentId;
  animationSetId: ContentId;

  equipmentProfileId?: ContentId;

};

export type AssetDefinition = {
  id: ContentId;
  kind: "character" | "environment" | "prop" | "animation" | "vfx" | "audio" | "portrait" | "texture" | "cinematic";
  url?: string;
  bundleId: ContentId;
  dependencies?: ContentId[];
  variants?: Record<string, string>;

  preload?: boolean;
  optional?: boolean;
  memoryClass?: "small" | "medium" | "large";
  qualityVariants?: Partial<Record<"low" | "medium" | "high", string>>;

};

  id: ContentId;

};

  | "investigation"
  | "combat"
  | "doors"
  | "weather"
  | "moving-containers"
  | "neural-extraction"
  | "casualty-carry"
  | "demolition"
  | "cold-exposure"
  | "archive-reconstruction"
  | "structural-collapse"
  | "crowds"
  | "civilian-evacuation"
  | "nonlethal-rules"
  | "infrastructure-control"
  | "dynamic-routing"
  | "data-purge"
  | "surrender"
  | "neural-archives"
  | "final-choice";

  id: ContentId;
  chapterId: ContentId;
  operationId: ContentId;

  location: string;
  summary: string;
  worldId: ContentId;

};

};

};

};
