};

// ===== src/runtime/mission/MissionRuntime.ts =====
import type { Scene } from "@babylonjs/core";
import type { MissionReport } from "../../mission/MissionTypes";
import type { MissionDefinition } from "../content/ContentTypes";

export type MissionRuntimeSnapshot = {
  missionId: string;
  stage: string;
  data: unknown;
};

export interface MissionRuntime<TSnapshot = unknown> {
  readonly id: string;
  readonly chapterId: string;
  readonly currentStage: string;

  startMission(): void;
  update(deltaSeconds?: number): void;
  continueAfterDebrief(): void;
  createReport(): MissionReport;
  snapshot(): TSnapshot;
  restore(snapshot: TSnapshot): void;
  dispose?(): void;
}

export type MissionLoadContext = {
  scene: Scene;
};

export interface MissionModule<TWorld = unknown, TRuntimeContext = unknown, TSnapshot = unknown> {
  readonly definition: MissionDefinition;
  createWorld(context: MissionLoadContext): Promise<TWorld> | TWorld;
  createRuntime(context: TRuntimeContext): MissionRuntime<TSnapshot>;
}

// ===== src/runtime/save/SnapshotRegistry.test.ts =====
import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest";
import { SnapshotRegistry } from "./SnapshotRegistry";

describe("SnapshotRegistry", () => {
  it("captures and restores runtime providers without coupling the save manager to their classes", () => {
    const registry = new SnapshotRegistry();
    let value = 7;
    registry.register({ snapshotId: "example", snapshot: () => ({ value }), restore: (snapshot) => { value = (snapshot as { value?: number } | undefined)?.value ?? 0; } });
    const snapshot = registry.capture();
    value = 99;
    registry.restore(snapshot);
    expect(value).toBe(7);
    expect(registry.ids()).toEqual(["example"]);
  });
});

// ===== src/runtime/save/SnapshotRegistry.ts =====
export interface SnapshotProvider<T = unknown> {
  readonly snapshotId: string;
  snapshot(): T;
  restore(snapshot: T | undefined): void;
}

export class SnapshotRegistry {
  private readonly providers = new Map<string, SnapshotProvider>();

  register(provider: SnapshotProvider): () => void {
    if (this.providers.has(provider.snapshotId)) throw new Error(`Duplicate snapshot provider: ${provider.snapshotId}`);
    this.providers.set(provider.snapshotId, provider);
    return () => this.providers.delete(provider.snapshotId);
  }

  capture(): Record<string, unknown> {
    return Object.fromEntries([...this.providers].map(([id, provider]) => [id, provider.snapshot()]));
  }

  restore(snapshots: Record<string, unknown> | undefined): void {
    this.providers.forEach((provider, id) => provider.restore(snapshots?.[id]));
  }

  ids(): string[] {
    return [...this.providers.keys()].sort();
  }
}

// ===== src/runtime/sequence/SequencePlayer.test.ts =====
import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest";
import { EventBus } from "../../engine/EventBus";
import { StoryState } from "../../story/StoryState";
import { SequencePlayer } from "./SequencePlayer";

describe("SequencePlayer", () => {
  it("executes story effects and checkpoints from authored scene commands", async () => {
    const bus = new EventBus();
    const story = new StoryState();
    const checkpoints: string[] = [];
    bus.on("checkpoint:requested", ({ id }) => checkpoints.push(id));
    const player = new SequencePlayer(story, bus);
    await player.play({
      id: "scene.test", chapterId: "test", title: "Test Scene", stageId: "test", actors: [], assetBundles: [],
      commands: [
        { type: "effect", effect: { type: "add-flag", id: "test.complete" } },
        { type: "checkpoint", id: "scene-test-complete" },
      ],
    });
    expect(story.has("test.complete")).toBe(true);
    expect(checkpoints).toEqual(["scene-test-complete"]);
    expect(player.snapshot().completed).toBe(true);
  });
});

// ===== src/runtime/sequence/SequencePlayer.ts =====
import type { EventBus } from "../../engine/EventBus";
import type { StoryState } from "../../story/StoryState";
import type { SceneCommand, SceneDefinition } from "./SequenceTypes";

export type SequencePlayerSnapshot = {
  sceneId?: string;
  commandIndex: number;
  completed: boolean;
};

export interface SequencePresentationAdapter {
  camera?(shot: string, duration?: number): Promise<void> | void;
  spawnActor?(actorId: string, marker: string, variant?: string): Promise<void> | void;
  moveActor?(actorId: string, marker: string, duration?: number): Promise<void> | void;
  lookAt?(actorId: string, target: string): Promise<void> | void;
  animateActor?(actorId: string, animation: string, loop?: boolean): Promise<void> | void;
  setMusic?(state: string): Promise<void> | void;
  playSound?(assetId: string): Promise<void> | void;
  setLighting?(profile: string, duration?: number): Promise<void> | void;
  loadMission?(missionId: string): Promise<void> | void;
}

export class SequencePlayer {
  private scene?: SceneDefinition;
  private commandIndex = 0;
  private completed = true;
  private running = false;

  constructor(
    private readonly story: StoryState,
    private readonly bus: EventBus,
    private readonly presentation: SequencePresentationAdapter = {},
  ) {}

  get isRunning(): boolean {
    return this.running;
  }

  async play(scene: SceneDefinition): Promise<boolean> {
    if (!this.story.matchesAll(scene.conditions ?? [])) return false;
    this.scene = scene;
    this.commandIndex = 0;
    this.completed = false;
    this.running = true;
    this.bus.emit("sequence:started", { sceneId: scene.id });
    await this.runCommands(scene.commands);
    this.completed = true;
    this.running = false;
    this.bus.emit("sequence:completed", { sceneId: scene.id });
    return true;
  }

  snapshot(): SequencePlayerSnapshot {
    return { sceneId: this.scene?.id, commandIndex: this.commandIndex, completed: this.completed };
  }

  restore(snapshot: SequencePlayerSnapshot, resolveScene: (id: string) => SceneDefinition | undefined): void {
    this.scene = snapshot.sceneId ? resolveScene(snapshot.sceneId) : undefined;
    this.commandIndex = snapshot.commandIndex;
    this.completed = snapshot.completed;
    this.running = false;
  }

  private async runCommands(commands: SceneCommand[]): Promise<void> {
    for (let index = this.commandIndex; index < commands.length; index += 1) {
      this.commandIndex = index;
      const command = commands[index];
      if (!command) continue;
      await this.execute(command);
    }
    this.commandIndex = commands.length;
  }

  private async execute(command: SceneCommand): Promise<void> {
    if (command.type === "camera") await this.presentation.camera?.(command.shot, command.duration);
    else if (command.type === "actor.spawn") await this.presentation.spawnActor?.(command.actor, command.marker, command.variant);
    else if (command.type === "actor.move") await this.presentation.moveActor?.(command.actor, command.marker, command.duration);
    else if (command.type === "actor.look-at") await this.presentation.lookAt?.(command.actor, command.target);
    else if (command.type === "actor.animation") await this.presentation.animateActor?.(command.actor, command.animation, command.loop);
    else if (command.type === "music") await this.presentation.setMusic?.(command.state);
    else if (command.type === "sound") await this.presentation.playSound?.(command.assetId);
    else if (command.type === "lighting") await this.presentation.setLighting?.(command.profile, command.duration);
    else if (command.type === "effect") this.story.apply(command.effect);
    else if (command.type === "checkpoint") this.bus.emit("checkpoint:requested", { id: command.id, label: this.scene?.title ?? command.id });
    else if (command.type === "load-mission") await this.presentation.loadMission?.(command.missionId);
    else if (command.type === "wait") await wait(command.seconds);
    else if (command.type === "dialogue") await this.playDialogue(command.dialogueId);
    else if (command.type === "conditional") {
      const branch = this.story.matchesAll(command.conditions) ? command.commands : command.otherwise ?? [];
      await this.runNested(branch);
    }
  }

  private async runNested(commands: SceneCommand[]): Promise<void> {
    for (const command of commands) await this.execute(command);
  }

  private playDialogue(dialogueId: string): Promise<void> {
    return new Promise((resolve) => {
      let opened = false;
      const offOpened = this.bus.on("dialogue:opened", ({ dialogueId: openedId }) => {
        if (openedId === dialogueId) opened = true;
      });
      const offClosed = this.bus.on("dialogue:closed", () => {
        if (!opened) return;
        offOpened();
        offClosed();
        resolve();
      });
      this.bus.emit("dialogue:play", { dialogueId });
      window.setTimeout(() => {
        if (opened) return;
        offOpened();
        offClosed();
        resolve();
      }, 0);
    });
  }
}

function wait(seconds: number): Promise<void> {
  return new Promise((resolve) => window.setTimeout(resolve, Math.max(0, seconds) * 1000));
}

// ===== src/runtime/sequence/SequenceTypes.ts =====
import type { StoryCondition, StoryEffect } from "../../story/StoryLogic";

export type SceneCommand =
  | { type: "camera"; shot: string; duration?: number }
  | { type: "actor.spawn"; actor: string; marker: string; variant?: string }
  | { type: "actor.move"; actor: string; marker: string; duration?: number }
  | { type: "actor.look-at"; actor: string; target: string }
  | { type: "actor.animation"; actor: string; animation: string; loop?: boolean }
  | { type: "dialogue"; dialogueId: string }
  | { type: "wait"; seconds: number }
  | { type: "music"; state: string }
  | { type: "sound"; assetId: string }
  | { type: "lighting"; profile: string; duration?: number }
  | { type: "effect"; effect: StoryEffect }
  | { type: "conditional"; conditions: StoryCondition[]; commands: SceneCommand[]; otherwise?: SceneCommand[] }
  | { type: "checkpoint"; id: string }
  | { type: "load-mission"; missionId: string };

export type SceneDefinition = {
  id: string;
  chapterId: string;
  title: string;
  stageId: string;
  actors: string[];
  assetBundles: string[];
  conditions?: StoryCondition[];
  commands: SceneCommand[];
};

// ===== src/runtime/world/WorldMetadataImporter.test.ts =====
import { NullEngine, Scene, TransformNode, Vector3 } from "@babylonjs/core";
import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest";
import { WorldMetadataImporter, parseMarkerName } from "./WorldMetadataImporter";

describe("WorldMetadataImporter", () => {
  it("parses named Blender/GLB gameplay markers", () => {
    expect(parseMarkerName("cover:high:container-west-04")).toEqual({ kind: "cover", id: "high:container-west-04", tokens: ["high", "container-west-04"] });
    expect(parseMarkerName("decorative-lamp")).toBeUndefined();
  });

  it("collects marker positions from scene nodes", () => {
    const engine = new NullEngine();
    const scene = new Scene(engine);
    const node = new TransformNode("spawn:ion:alpha", scene);
    node.position.copyFrom(new Vector3(4, 0, -2));
    const markers = new WorldMetadataImporter().scan([node]);
    expect(markers[0]?.kind).toBe("spawn");
    expect(markers[0]?.position.asArray()).toEqual([4, 0, -2]);
    scene.dispose();
    engine.dispose();
  });
});

// ===== src/runtime/world/WorldMetadataImporter.ts =====
import type { Node, Quaternion, TransformNode, Vector3 } from "@babylonjs/core";

export type WorldMarkerKind = "spawn" | "cover" | "door" | "room" | "objective" | "extract" | "camera" | "patrol" | "hazard" | "scene";

export type WorldMarker = {
  kind: WorldMarkerKind;
  id: string;
  tokens: string[];
  nodeName: string;
  position: Vector3;
  rotationY: number;
  metadata: Record<string, unknown>;
};

export class WorldMetadataImporter {
  scan(nodes: readonly Node[]): WorldMarker[] {
    return nodes.flatMap((node) => {
      const parsed = parseMarkerName(node.name);
      if (!parsed) return [];
      const transform = node as Node & Partial<TransformNode> & { absoluteRotationQuaternion?: Quaternion | null };
      const position = typeof transform.getAbsolutePosition === "function"
        ? transform.getAbsolutePosition().clone()
        : transform.position?.clone();
      if (!position) return [];
      const rotationY = transform.absoluteRotationQuaternion
        ? transform.absoluteRotationQuaternion.toEulerAngles().y
        : transform.rotation?.y ?? 0;
      return [{
        ...parsed,
        nodeName: node.name,
        position,
        rotationY,
        metadata: isRecord(node.metadata) ? { ...node.metadata } : {},
      }];
    });
  }

  byKind(markers: readonly WorldMarker[]): Map<WorldMarkerKind, WorldMarker[]> {
    const grouped = new Map<WorldMarkerKind, WorldMarker[]>();
    markers.forEach((marker) => grouped.set(marker.kind, [...(grouped.get(marker.kind) ?? []), marker]));
    return grouped;
  }
}

export function parseMarkerName(name: string): Pick<WorldMarker, "kind" | "id" | "tokens"> | undefined {
  const [kind, ...tokens] = name.split(":").map((value) => value.trim()).filter(Boolean);
  if (!isMarkerKind(kind) || tokens.length === 0) return undefined;
  return { kind, id: tokens.join(":"), tokens };
}

function isMarkerKind(value: string | undefined): value is WorldMarkerKind {
  return ["spawn", "cover", "door", "room", "objective", "extract", "camera", "patrol", "hazard", "scene"].includes(value ?? "");
}

function isRecord(value: unknown): value is Record<string, unknown> {
  return Boolean(value) && typeof value === "object" && !Array.isArray(value);
}

// ===== src/save/SaveGameManager.ts =====
import { Vector3 } from "@babylonjs/core";
import type { EventBus } from "../engine/EventBus";
import type { RandomService, RandomSnapshot } from "../engine/RandomService";
import type { TimeManager, TimeState } from "../engine/TimeManager";
import type { Agent } from "../entities/Agent";
import type { Enemy, EnemyState } from "../entities/Enemy";
import type { MissionRuntime, MissionRuntimeSnapshot } from "../runtime/mission/MissionRuntime";
import { SnapshotRegistry } from "../runtime/save/SnapshotRegistry";
import type { StoryState, StoryStateSnapshot } from "../story/StoryState";
import type { CommandSystem } from "../systems/CommandSystem";
import type { CombatSnapshot, CombatSystem } from "../systems/CombatSystem";
import type { CoverSystem } from "../systems/CoverSystem";
import type { VisionSystem } from "../systems/VisionSystem";
import type { DialogueSnapshot, DialogueSystem } from "../systems/DialogueSystem";
import type { AbilitySnapshot, AbilitySystem } from "../systems/AbilitySystem";
import type { EchoObserverSnapshot, EchoObserverSystem } from "../systems/EchoObserverSystem";
import type { InvestigationSnapshot, InvestigationSystem } from "../systems/InvestigationSystem";
import type { NavigationSystem } from "../systems/NavigationSystem";
import type { CampaignManager } from "../campaign/CampaignManager";
import type { CampaignState } from "../campaign/CampaignTypes";
import type { DoorSnapshot, DoorSystem } from "../systems/DoorSystem";
import type { GadgetSystem, GadgetZoneSnapshot } from "../systems/GadgetSystem";
import type { GadgetId, MovementStance } from "../tactical/TacticalTypes";

const DATABASE_NAME = "echo-tactics-saves";
const STORE_NAME = "saves";
const SAVE_VERSION = 5;

export type SaveSlotId = "autosave" | "slot-1" | "slot-2" | "slot-3";

type VectorSnapshot = { x: number; y: number; z: number };

type AgentSnapshot = {
  id: string;
  position: VectorSnapshot;
  rotationY: number;
  health: number;
  armor: number;
  ammo: number;
  downed: boolean;
  disabled: boolean;
  overwatch: boolean;
  coverPointId?: string;
  suppressedUntil: number;
  baseDamage: number;
  accuracy: number;
  suppression: number;
  movementStance: MovementStance;
  stunnedUntil: number;
  jammedUntil: number;
  overwatchYaw: number;
  overwatchArc: number;
  overwatchRange: number;
  gadgetCharges: Record<GadgetId, number>;
  breachCharges: number;
};

type EnemySnapshot = {
  id: string;
  position: VectorSnapshot;
  rotationY: number;
  health: number;
  armor: number;
  accuracy: number;
  baseDamage: number;
  state: EnemyState;
  disabled: boolean;
  discovered: boolean;
  currentlyVisible: boolean;
  overwatchJammer: boolean;
  reinforcementCalled: boolean;
  escaped: boolean;
  suppressedUntil: number;
  patrolIndex: number;
  searchTimer: number;
  fireCooldown: number;
  scanProgress: number;
  targetAgentId?: string;
  lastKnownAgentPosition?: VectorSnapshot;
  suppression: number;
  movementStance: MovementStance;
  stunnedUntil: number;
};

export type SaveGame = {
  version: number;
  id: SaveSlotId;
  label: string;
  checkpoint: string;
  createdAt: string;
  updatedAt: string;
  activeChapterId: string;
  activeSequenceId?: string;
  activeMissionId: string;
  mission: MissionRuntimeSnapshot;
  runtimeSnapshots?: Record<string, unknown>;
  story: StoryStateSnapshot;
  investigation: InvestigationSnapshot;
  echo: EchoObserverSnapshot;
  timeState: TimeState;
  combat?: CombatSnapshot;
  random?: RandomSnapshot;
  cover?: Array<{ id: string; occupiedBy?: string; reservedBy?: string }>;
  vision?: { revealedRoomIds: string[]; triggeredSensorIds: string[]; disabledSensorIds: string[]; conesVisible: boolean };
  dialogue?: DialogueSnapshot;
  abilities?: AbilitySnapshot;
  campaign?: CampaignState;
  doors?: DoorSnapshot[];
  gadgets?: GadgetZoneSnapshot[];
  agents: AgentSnapshot[];
  enemies: EnemySnapshot[];
};

export class SaveGameManager {
  constructor(
    private readonly agents: Agent[],
    private readonly enemies: Enemy[],
    private readonly navigation: NavigationSystem,
    private readonly commands: CommandSystem,
    private readonly investigation: InvestigationSystem,
    private readonly echo: EchoObserverSystem,
    private readonly story: StoryState,
    private readonly time: TimeManager,
    private readonly mission: MissionRuntime,
    private readonly combat: CombatSystem,
    private readonly cover: CoverSystem,
    private readonly vision: VisionSystem,
    private readonly dialogue: DialogueSystem,
    private readonly abilities: AbilitySystem,
    private readonly random: RandomService,
    private readonly bus: EventBus,
    private readonly campaign: CampaignManager,
    private readonly doors: DoorSystem,
    private readonly gadgets: GadgetSystem,
    private readonly snapshotRegistry = new SnapshotRegistry(),
  ) {}

  bindUI(): void {
    const modal = document.getElementById("saveModal");
    document.getElementById("saveButton")?.addEventListener("click", () => {
      if (modal) modal.hidden = false;
      this.time.acquirePause("save");
      void this.refreshSlots();
    });
    document.getElementById("closeSaveButton")?.addEventListener("click", () => {
      if (modal) modal.hidden = true;
      this.time.releasePause("save");
    });
    modal?.addEventListener("pointerdown", (event) => {
      if (event.target === modal) {
        modal.hidden = true;
        this.time.releasePause("save");
      }
    });
    document.querySelectorAll<HTMLButtonElement>("[data-save-slot]").forEach((button) => {
      button.addEventListener("click", async () => {
        const slot = button.dataset.saveSlot as SaveSlotId;
        await this.save(slot, button.dataset.saveLabel ?? slot, "Manual save");
        await this.refreshSlots();
      });
    });
    document.querySelectorAll<HTMLButtonElement>("[data-load-slot]").forEach((button) => {
      button.addEventListener("click", async () => {
        const slot = button.dataset.loadSlot as SaveSlotId;
        const loaded = await this.load(slot);
        if (loaded && modal) {
          modal.hidden = true;
          this.time.releasePause("save");
        }
      });
    });
    document.getElementById("exportSaveButton")?.addEventListener("click", () => void this.exportLatest());
    document.getElementById("importSaveInput")?.addEventListener("change", (event) => void this.importFile(event));
    this.bus.on("checkpoint:requested", ({ id, label }) => {
      void this.save("autosave", `Checkpoint: ${label}`, id, true);
    });
    void this.refreshSlots();
  }

  async save(slot: SaveSlotId, label: string, checkpoint: string, quiet = false): Promise<SaveGame> {
    const existing = await this.read(slot);
    const now = new Date().toISOString();
    const save: SaveGame = {
      version: SAVE_VERSION,
      id: slot,
      label,
      checkpoint,
      createdAt: existing?.createdAt ?? now,
      updatedAt: now,
      activeChapterId: this.mission.chapterId,
      activeMissionId: this.mission.id,
      mission: { missionId: this.mission.id, stage: this.mission.currentStage, data: this.mission.snapshot() },
      runtimeSnapshots: this.snapshotRegistry.capture(),
      story: this.story.snapshot(),
      investigation: this.investigation.snapshot(),
      echo: this.echo.snapshot(),
      timeState: this.time.currentState,
      combat: this.combat.snapshot(),
      random: this.random.snapshot(),
      cover: this.cover.snapshot(),
      vision: this.vision.snapshot(),
      dialogue: this.dialogue.snapshot(),
      abilities: this.abilities.snapshot(),
      campaign: this.campaign.snapshot(),
      doors: this.doors.snapshot(),
      gadgets: this.gadgets.snapshot(),
      agents: this.agents.map((agent) => ({
        id: agent.id,
        position: vector(agent.root.position),
        rotationY: agent.root.rotation.y,
        health: agent.health,
        armor: agent.armor,
        ammo: agent.ammo,
        downed: agent.downed,
        disabled: agent.disabled,
        overwatch: agent.overwatch,
        coverPointId: agent.coverPointId,
        suppressedUntil: agent.suppressedUntil,
        baseDamage: agent.baseDamage,
        accuracy: agent.accuracy,
        suppression: agent.suppression,
        movementStance: agent.movementStance,
        stunnedUntil: agent.stunnedUntil,
        jammedUntil: agent.jammedUntil,
        overwatchYaw: agent.overwatchYaw,
        overwatchArc: agent.overwatchArc,
        overwatchRange: agent.overwatchRange,
        gadgetCharges: { ...agent.gadgetCharges },
        breachCharges: agent.breachCharges,
      })),
      enemies: this.enemies.map((enemy) => ({
        id: enemy.id,
        position: vector(enemy.root.position),
        rotationY: enemy.root.rotation.y,
        health: enemy.health,
        armor: enemy.armor,
        accuracy: enemy.accuracy,
        baseDamage: enemy.baseDamage,
        state: enemy.state,
        disabled: enemy.disabled,
        discovered: enemy.discovered,
        currentlyVisible: enemy.currentlyVisible,
        overwatchJammer: enemy.overwatchJammer,
        reinforcementCalled: enemy.reinforcementCalled,
        escaped: enemy.escaped,
        suppressedUntil: enemy.suppressedUntil,
        patrolIndex: enemy.patrolIndex,
        searchTimer: enemy.searchTimer,
        fireCooldown: enemy.fireCooldown,
        scanProgress: enemy.scanProgress,
        targetAgentId: enemy.targetAgentId,
        lastKnownAgentPosition: enemy.lastKnownAgentPosition ? vector(enemy.lastKnownAgentPosition) : undefined,
        suppression: enemy.suppression,
        movementStance: enemy.movementStance,
        stunnedUntil: enemy.stunnedUntil,
      })),
    };
    await this.write(save);
    if (!quiet) this.bus.emit("toast", { message: `${label} saved.`, tone: "success" });
    this.bus.emit("save:completed", { slot, checkpoint });
    return save;
  }

  async load(slot: SaveSlotId): Promise<boolean> {
    const raw = await this.read(slot);
    if (!raw) {
      this.bus.emit("toast", { message: "No save exists in that slot.", tone: "warning" });
      return false;
    }
    const save = migrate(raw);
    this.commands.clearAgents(this.agents);
    this.abilities.resetRuntimeEffects();
    if (save.random) this.random.restore(save.random);
    if (save.combat) this.combat.restore(save.combat);
    this.story.restore(save.story);
    this.investigation.restore(save.investigation);
    this.echo.restore(save.echo);

    for (const snapshot of save.agents) {
      const agent = this.agents.find((candidate) => candidate.id === snapshot.id);
      if (!agent) continue;
      agent.health = snapshot.health;
      agent.armor = snapshot.armor;
      agent.ammo = snapshot.ammo;
      agent.disabled = snapshot.disabled;
      agent.overwatch = snapshot.overwatch;
      agent.coverPointId = undefined;
      agent.suppressedUntil = snapshot.suppressedUntil ?? 0;
      agent.baseDamage = snapshot.baseDamage ?? agent.weapon.baseDamage;
      agent.accuracy = snapshot.accuracy ?? agent.definition.accuracy ?? 0.72;
      agent.suppression = snapshot.suppression ?? 0;
      agent.movementStance = snapshot.movementStance ?? "tactical";
      agent.stunnedUntil = snapshot.stunnedUntil ?? 0;
      agent.jammedUntil = snapshot.jammedUntil ?? 0;
      agent.overwatchYaw = snapshot.overwatchYaw ?? snapshot.rotationY;
      agent.overwatchArc = snapshot.overwatchArc ?? Math.PI * 0.52;
      agent.overwatchRange = snapshot.overwatchRange ?? agent.weaponRange;
      agent.gadgetCharges.smoke = snapshot.gadgetCharges?.smoke ?? 0;
      agent.gadgetCharges.emp = snapshot.gadgetCharges?.emp ?? 0;
      agent.breachCharges = snapshot.breachCharges ?? 0;
      agent.root.rotation.y = snapshot.rotationY;
      agent.setDowned(snapshot.downed);
      this.navigation.teleportEntity(agent, fromVector(snapshot.position));
    }
    for (const snapshot of save.enemies) {
      const enemy = this.enemies.find((candidate) => candidate.id === snapshot.id);
      if (!enemy) continue;
      enemy.health = snapshot.health;
      enemy.armor = snapshot.armor;
      enemy.accuracy = snapshot.accuracy;
      enemy.baseDamage = snapshot.baseDamage;
      enemy.state = snapshot.state;
      enemy.disabled = snapshot.disabled;
      enemy.discovered = snapshot.discovered;
      enemy.currentlyVisible = snapshot.currentlyVisible;
      enemy.overwatchJammer = snapshot.overwatchJammer;
      enemy.reinforcementCalled = snapshot.reinforcementCalled;
      enemy.escaped = snapshot.escaped ?? false;
      enemy.suppressedUntil = snapshot.suppressedUntil ?? 0;
      enemy.patrolIndex = snapshot.patrolIndex ?? 0;
      enemy.searchTimer = snapshot.searchTimer ?? 0;
      enemy.fireCooldown = snapshot.fireCooldown ?? 0;
      enemy.scanProgress = snapshot.scanProgress ?? 0;
      enemy.targetAgentId = snapshot.targetAgentId;
      enemy.lastKnownAgentPosition = snapshot.lastKnownAgentPosition ? fromVector(snapshot.lastKnownAgentPosition) : undefined;
      enemy.suppression = snapshot.suppression ?? 0;
      enemy.movementStance = snapshot.movementStance ?? "tactical";
      enemy.stunnedUntil = snapshot.stunnedUntil ?? 0;
      enemy.root.rotation.y = snapshot.rotationY;
      enemy.root.rotation.z = snapshot.disabled ? Math.PI / 2 : 0;
      this.navigation.teleportEntity(enemy, fromVector(snapshot.position));
      enemy.setVisualState(snapshot.currentlyVisible || snapshot.disabled, snapshot.discovered && !snapshot.currentlyVisible);
    }
    const coverSnapshot = save.cover ?? save.agents
      .filter((agent) => Boolean(agent.coverPointId))
      .map((agent) => ({ id: agent.coverPointId!, occupiedBy: agent.id }));
    this.cover.restore(coverSnapshot, this.agents);
    if (save.vision) this.vision.restore(save.vision);
    this.dialogue.restore(save.dialogue);
    this.abilities.restore(save.abilities);
    this.doors.restore(save.doors);
    this.gadgets.restore(save.gadgets);
    this.campaign.restore(save.campaign);
    this.time.setState(save.timeState);
    this.mission.restore(save.mission.data);
    this.snapshotRegistry.restore(save.runtimeSnapshots);
    this.bus.emit("combat:changed", {});
    this.bus.emit("commands:changed", {});
    this.bus.emit("save:loaded", { slot, checkpoint: save.checkpoint });
    this.bus.emit("toast", { message: `${save.label} loaded.`, tone: "success" });
    await this.refreshSlots();
    return true;
  }

  async list(): Promise<SaveGame[]> {
    const db = await openDatabase();
    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
      const transaction = db.transaction(STORE_NAME, "readonly");
      const request = transaction.objectStore(STORE_NAME).getAll();
      request.onsuccess = () => resolve((request.result as SaveGame[]).map(migrate).sort((a, b) => b.updatedAt.localeCompare(a.updatedAt)));
      request.onerror = () => reject(request.error);
    });
  }

  private async refreshSlots(): Promise<void> {
    const saves = await this.list();
    const byId = new Map(saves.map((save) => [save.id, save]));
    document.querySelectorAll<HTMLElement>("[data-save-slot-card]").forEach((card) => {
      const id = card.dataset.saveSlotCard as SaveSlotId;
      const save = byId.get(id);
      const meta = card.querySelector<HTMLElement>("[data-slot-meta]");
      const load = card.querySelector<HTMLButtonElement>("[data-load-slot]");
      if (meta) meta.textContent = save
        ? `${save.label} · ${new Date(save.updatedAt).toLocaleString()} · ${save.mission.stage}`
        : "Empty slot";
      if (load) load.disabled = !save;
    });
  }

  private async exportLatest(): Promise<void> {
    const saves = await this.list();
    const latest = saves[0];
    if (!latest) {
      this.bus.emit("toast", { message: "Create a save before exporting.", tone: "warning" });
      return;
    }
    const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(latest, null, 2)], { type: "application/json" });
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const link = document.createElement("a");
    link.href = url;
    link.download = `echo-tactics-${latest.id}.json`;
    link.click();
    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
  }

  private async importFile(event: Event): Promise<void> {
    const input = event.target as HTMLInputElement;
    const file = input.files?.[0];
    if (!file) return;
    try {
      const parsed = migrate(JSON.parse(await file.text()) as SaveGame);
      const imported: SaveGame = { ...parsed, id: "slot-3", label: `Imported: ${parsed.label}`, updatedAt: new Date().toISOString() };
      await this.write(imported);
      await this.refreshSlots();
      this.bus.emit("toast", { message: "Save imported into Slot 3.", tone: "success" });
    } catch (error) {
      this.bus.emit("toast", { message: `Import failed: ${String(error)}`, tone: "warning" });
    } finally {
      input.value = "";
    }
  }

  private async read(id: SaveSlotId): Promise<SaveGame | undefined> {
    const db = await openDatabase();
    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
      const transaction = db.transaction(STORE_NAME, "readonly");
      const request = transaction.objectStore(STORE_NAME).get(id);
      request.onsuccess = () => resolve(request.result as SaveGame | undefined);
      request.onerror = () => reject(request.error);
    });
  }

  private async write(save: SaveGame): Promise<void> {
    const db = await openDatabase();
    await new Promise<void>((resolve, reject) => {
      const transaction = db.transaction(STORE_NAME, "readwrite");
      transaction.objectStore(STORE_NAME).put(save);
      transaction.oncomplete = () => resolve();
      transaction.onerror = () => reject(transaction.error);
    });
  }
}

function openDatabase(): Promise<IDBDatabase> {
  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    const request = indexedDB.open(DATABASE_NAME, 1);
    request.onupgradeneeded = () => {
      const db = request.result;
      if (!db.objectStoreNames.contains(STORE_NAME)) db.createObjectStore(STORE_NAME, { keyPath: "id" });
    };
    request.onsuccess = () => resolve(request.result);
    request.onerror = () => reject(request.error);
  });
}

function migrate(save: SaveGame): SaveGame {
  if (!save || typeof save !== "object") throw new Error("Invalid save file");
  if (save.version > SAVE_VERSION) throw new Error(`Save version ${save.version} is newer than supported version ${SAVE_VERSION}`);
  if (save.version <= 4) {
    const legacyMission = save.mission as unknown as { stage?: string };
    save.activeMissionId = save.activeMissionId ?? "prague";
    save.activeChapterId = save.activeChapterId ?? "prague";
    save.mission = {
      missionId: save.activeMissionId,
      stage: legacyMission.stage ?? "briefing",
      data: legacyMission,
    };
    save.runtimeSnapshots = save.runtimeSnapshots ?? {};
  }
  if (save.version <= 3) {
    save.agents = save.agents.map((agent) => ({
      ...agent,
      suppression: agent.suppression ?? 0,
      movementStance: agent.movementStance ?? "tactical",
      stunnedUntil: agent.stunnedUntil ?? 0,
      jammedUntil: agent.jammedUntil ?? 0,
      overwatchYaw: agent.overwatchYaw ?? agent.rotationY,
      overwatchArc: agent.overwatchArc ?? Math.PI * 0.52,
      overwatchRange: agent.overwatchRange ?? 0,
      gadgetCharges: agent.gadgetCharges ?? { smoke: 0, emp: 0 },
      breachCharges: agent.breachCharges ?? 0,
    }));
    save.enemies = save.enemies.map((enemy) => ({
      ...enemy,
      suppression: enemy.suppression ?? 0,
      movementStance: enemy.movementStance ?? "tactical",
      stunnedUntil: enemy.stunnedUntil ?? 0,
    }));
  }
  if (save.version <= 1) {
    save.agents = save.agents.map((agent) => ({
      ...agent,
      suppressedUntil: agent.suppressedUntil ?? 0,
      baseDamage: agent.baseDamage ?? 28,
      accuracy: agent.accuracy ?? 0.72,
    }));
    save.enemies = save.enemies.map((enemy) => ({
      ...enemy,
      escaped: enemy.escaped ?? false,
      suppressedUntil: enemy.suppressedUntil ?? 0,
      patrolIndex: enemy.patrolIndex ?? 0,
      searchTimer: enemy.searchTimer ?? 0,
      fireCooldown: enemy.fireCooldown ?? 0,
      scanProgress: enemy.scanProgress ?? 0,
    }));
  }
  return { ...save, version: SAVE_VERSION };
}

function vector(value: Vector3): VectorSnapshot {
  return { x: value.x, y: value.y, z: value.z };
}

function fromVector(value: VectorSnapshot): Vector3 {
  return new Vector3(value.x, value.y, value.z);
}

// ===== src/settings/SettingsManager.ts =====
import type { TimeManager } from "../engine/TimeManager";
export type InputAction =
  | "pause"
  | "slow"
  | "overwatch"
  | "reload"
  | "stabilize"
  | "interact"
  | "coverOverlay"
  | "threatOverlay"
  | "selectSquad";

export type ColorVisionMode = "default" | "deuteranopia" | "tritanopia" | "high-contrast";
export type SubtitleSize = "small" | "medium" | "large";
export type HudMode = "full" | "compact";

export type GameSettings = {
  subtitleSize: SubtitleSize;
  uiScale: number;
  colorVisionMode: ColorVisionMode;
  reducedMotion: boolean;
  edgeScrolling: boolean;
  highlightInteractables: boolean;
  pauseMode: "toggle" | "hold";
  hudMode: HudMode;
  hudOpacity: number;
  audioEnabled: boolean;
  bindings: Record<InputAction, string>;
};

const STORAGE_KEY = "echo-tactics.settings.v1";

export const DEFAULT_BINDINGS: Record<InputAction, string> = {
  pause: "Space",
  slow: "KeyT",
  overwatch: "KeyO",
  reload: "KeyR",
  stabilize: "KeyH",
  interact: "KeyI",
  coverOverlay: "KeyC",
  threatOverlay: "KeyV",
  selectSquad: "KeyF",
};

export class SettingsManager {
  private settings: GameSettings;
  private readonly listeners = new Set<(settings: GameSettings) => void>();
  private capturing?: InputAction;

  constructor() {
    this.settings = this.load();
    this.apply();
  }

  get value(): Readonly<GameSettings> {
    return this.settings;
  }

  matches(action: InputAction, code: string): boolean {
    return this.settings.bindings[action] === code;
  }

  subscribe(listener: (settings: GameSettings) => void): () => void {
    this.listeners.add(listener);
    listener(structuredClone(this.settings));
    return () => this.listeners.delete(listener);
  }

  bindModal(time?: TimeManager): void {
    const modal = document.getElementById("settingsModal");
    const open = document.getElementById("settingsButton");
    const close = document.getElementById("closeSettingsButton");
    if (!modal || !open || !close) return;

    open.addEventListener("click", () => { modal.hidden = false; time?.acquirePause("settings"); });
    close.addEventListener("click", () => { modal.hidden = true; time?.releasePause("settings"); });
    modal.addEventListener("pointerdown", (event) => {
      if (event.target === modal) { modal.hidden = true; time?.releasePause("settings"); }
    });

    this.bindSelect("subtitleSizeSetting", (value) => {
      this.patch({ subtitleSize: value as SubtitleSize });
    });
    this.bindSelect("colorVisionSetting", (value) => {
      this.patch({ colorVisionMode: value as ColorVisionMode });
    });
    this.bindSelect("pauseModeSetting", (value) => {
      this.patch({ pauseMode: value as "toggle" | "hold" });
    });
    this.bindSelect("hudModeSetting", (value) => this.patch({ hudMode: value as HudMode }));
    this.bindRange("uiScaleSetting", (value) => this.patch({ uiScale: value }));
    this.bindRange("hudOpacitySetting", (value) => this.patch({ hudOpacity: value }));
    this.bindCheckbox("reducedMotionSetting", (value) => this.patch({ reducedMotion: value }));
    this.bindCheckbox("edgeScrollingSetting", (value) => this.patch({ edgeScrolling: value }));
    this.bindCheckbox("highlightInteractablesSetting", (value) => this.patch({ highlightInteractables: value }));
    this.bindCheckbox("audioEnabledSetting", (value) => this.patch({ audioEnabled: value }));

    document.querySelectorAll<HTMLButtonElement>("[data-binding-action]").forEach((button) => {
      button.addEventListener("click", () => {
        const action = button.dataset.bindingAction as InputAction | undefined;
        if (!action) return;
        this.capturing = action;
        button.textContent = "PRESS KEY";
        button.classList.add("capturing");
      });
    });
    window.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
      if (!this.capturing) return;
      event.preventDefault();
      event.stopImmediatePropagation();
      const action = this.capturing;
      this.capturing = undefined;
      this.patch({ bindings: { ...this.settings.bindings, [action]: event.code } });
      this.renderForm();
    }, true);

    document.getElementById("resetSettingsButton")?.addEventListener("click", () => {
      this.settings = defaults();
      this.persist();
      this.apply();
      this.notify();
      this.renderForm();
    });
    this.renderForm();
  }

  patch(patch: Partial<GameSettings>): void {
    this.settings = {
      ...this.settings,
      ...patch,
      bindings: patch.bindings ?? this.settings.bindings,
    };
    this.persist();
    this.apply();
    this.notify();
    this.renderForm();
  }

  private load(): GameSettings {
    try {
      const raw = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
      if (!raw) return defaults();
      const parsed = JSON.parse(raw) as Partial<GameSettings>;
      return {
        ...defaults(),
        ...parsed,
        bindings: { ...DEFAULT_BINDINGS, ...(parsed.bindings ?? {}) },
      };
    } catch {
      return defaults();
    }
  }

  private persist(): void {
    localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(this.settings));
  }

  private apply(): void {
    const root = document.documentElement;
    root.style.setProperty("--ui-scale", String(this.settings.uiScale));
    root.style.setProperty("--hud-opacity", String(this.settings.hudOpacity));
    document.body.dataset.subtitleSize = this.settings.subtitleSize;
    document.body.dataset.colorVision = this.settings.colorVisionMode;
    document.body.classList.toggle("reduced-motion", this.settings.reducedMotion);
    document.body.classList.toggle("hide-interaction-markers", !this.settings.highlightInteractables);
    document.body.dataset.hudMode = this.settings.hudMode;
  }

  private notify(): void {
    const snapshot = structuredClone(this.settings);
    this.listeners.forEach((listener) => listener(snapshot));
  }

  private renderForm(): void {
    setValue("subtitleSizeSetting", this.settings.subtitleSize);
    setValue("colorVisionSetting", this.settings.colorVisionMode);
    setValue("pauseModeSetting", this.settings.pauseMode);
    setValue("hudModeSetting", this.settings.hudMode);
    setValue("uiScaleSetting", String(this.settings.uiScale));
    setValue("hudOpacitySetting", String(this.settings.hudOpacity));
    setChecked("reducedMotionSetting", this.settings.reducedMotion);
    setChecked("edgeScrollingSetting", this.settings.edgeScrolling);
    setChecked("highlightInteractablesSetting", this.settings.highlightInteractables);
    setChecked("audioEnabledSetting", this.settings.audioEnabled);
    document.querySelectorAll<HTMLButtonElement>("[data-binding-action]").forEach((button) => {
      const action = button.dataset.bindingAction as InputAction | undefined;
      if (!action || this.capturing === action) return;
      button.classList.remove("capturing");
      button.textContent = readableCode(this.settings.bindings[action]);
    });
    this.renderHudBindings();
  }

  private renderHudBindings(): void {
    const bindings: Array<[InputAction, string]> = [
      ["overwatch", "#overwatchButton kbd"],
      ["reload", "#reloadButton kbd"],
      ["stabilize", "#stabilizeButton kbd"],
      ["interact", "#interactButton kbd"],
    ];
    bindings.forEach(([action, selector]) => {
      const label = document.querySelector<HTMLElement>(selector);
      if (label) label.textContent = readableCode(this.settings.bindings[action]);
    });
  }

  private bindSelect(id: string, handler: (value: string) => void): void {
    document.getElementById(id)?.addEventListener("change", (event) => {
      handler((event.target as HTMLSelectElement).value);
    });
  }

  private bindRange(id: string, handler: (value: number) => void): void {
    document.getElementById(id)?.addEventListener("input", (event) => {
      handler(Number((event.target as HTMLInputElement).value));
    });
  }

  private bindCheckbox(id: string, handler: (value: boolean) => void): void {
    document.getElementById(id)?.addEventListener("change", (event) => {
      handler((event.target as HTMLInputElement).checked);
    });
  }
}

function defaults(): GameSettings {
  return {
    subtitleSize: "medium",
    uiScale: 1,
    colorVisionMode: "default",
    reducedMotion: false,
    edgeScrolling: true,
    highlightInteractables: true,
    pauseMode: "toggle",
    hudMode: "full",
    hudOpacity: 0.92,
    audioEnabled: true,
    bindings: { ...DEFAULT_BINDINGS },
  };
}

function setValue(id: string, value: string): void {
  const input = document.getElementById(id) as HTMLInputElement | HTMLSelectElement | null;
  if (input) input.value = value;
}

function setChecked(id: string, value: boolean): void {
  const input = document.getElementById(id) as HTMLInputElement | null;
  if (input) input.checked = value;
}

export function readableCode(code: string): string {
  return code
    .replace(/^Key/, "")
    .replace(/^Digit/, "")
    .replace("Space", "SPACE")
    .replace("Arrow", "");
}

// ===== src/story/StoryLogic.ts =====
import type { OperativeStatus } from "../runtime/content/ContentTypes";

export type StoryPrimitive = string | number | boolean;

export type StoryCondition =
  | { type: "flag"; id: string; present?: boolean }
  | { type: "value"; key: string; operator: "eq" | "neq" | "gt" | "gte" | "lt" | "lte"; value: StoryPrimitive }
  | { type: "operative-status"; operativeId: string; status: OperativeStatus }
  | { type: "relationship"; a: string; b: string; metric: RelationshipMetric; operator: "gt" | "gte" | "lt" | "lte"; value: number }
  | { type: "echo"; metric: EchoPsychologyMetric; operator: "gt" | "gte" | "lt" | "lte"; value: number }
  | { type: "all"; conditions: StoryCondition[] }
  | { type: "any"; conditions: StoryCondition[] }
  | { type: "not"; condition: StoryCondition };

export type RelationshipMetric = "trust" | "affection" | "tension" | "grief" | "loyalty";
export type EchoPsychologyMetric = "curiosity" | "hostility" | "preservation" | "empathyModel" | "alexInfluence" | "fragmentation" | "trustInIon";

export type StoryEffect =
  | { type: "add-flag"; id: string }
  | { type: "remove-flag"; id: string }
  | { type: "set-value"; key: string; value: StoryPrimitive }
  | { type: "increment-value"; key: string; amount: number }
  | { type: "set-operative-status"; operativeId: string; status: OperativeStatus }
  | { type: "adjust-relationship"; a: string; b: string; metric: RelationshipMetric; amount: number }
  | { type: "adjust-echo"; metric: EchoPsychologyMetric; amount: number }
  | { type: "add-memory"; id: string; participants: string[]; tags: string[]; value?: number };

export type RelationshipPairState = {
  a: string;
  b: string;
  trust: number;
  affection: number;
  tension: number;
  grief: number;
  loyalty: number;
  states: string[];
};

export type EchoPsychologyState = Record<EchoPsychologyMetric, number>;

export type StoryMemory = {
  id: string;
  participants: string[];
  tags: string[];
  value: number;
};

export function relationshipKey(a: string, b: string): string {
  return [a, b].sort().join("::");
}

export function compareStoryValues(left: StoryPrimitive, operator: "eq" | "neq" | "gt" | "gte" | "lt" | "lte", right: StoryPrimitive): boolean {
  if (operator === "eq") return left === right;
  if (operator === "neq") return left !== right;
  if (typeof left !== "number" || typeof right !== "number") return false;
  if (operator === "gt") return left > right;
  if (operator === "gte") return left >= right;
  if (operator === "lt") return left < right;
  return left <= right;
}

// ===== src/story/StoryState.test.ts =====
import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest";
import { StoryState } from "./StoryState";

describe("StoryState structured narrative data", () => {
  it("applies conditions, permanent statuses, relationships, Echo psychology, and memories", () => {
    const story = new StoryState();
    story.apply({ type: "set-operative-status", operativeId: "chen", status: "kia" });
    story.apply({ type: "adjust-relationship", a: "alex", b: "jordan", metric: "trust", amount: 45 });
    story.apply({ type: "adjust-echo", metric: "alexInfluence", amount: 50 });
    story.apply({ type: "add-memory", id: "arctic-kiss", participants: ["alex", "jordan"], tags: ["relationship"] });

    expect(story.matches({ type: "operative-status", operativeId: "chen", status: "kia" })).toBe(true);
    expect(story.matches({ type: "relationship", a: "jordan", b: "alex", metric: "trust", operator: "gte", value: 40 })).toBe(true);
    expect(story.matches({ type: "echo", metric: "alexInfluence", operator: "gte", value: 40 })).toBe(true);

    const restored = new StoryState();
    restored.restore(story.snapshot());
    expect(restored.getOperativeStatus("chen")).toBe("kia");
    expect(restored.getRelationship("alex", "jordan").states).toContain("trusted");
  });
});

// ===== src/story/StoryState.ts =====
import type { OperativeStatus } from "../runtime/content/ContentTypes";
import {
  compareStoryValues,
  relationshipKey,
  type EchoPsychologyState,
  type RelationshipPairState,
  type StoryCondition,
  type StoryEffect,
  type StoryMemory,
  type StoryPrimitive,
} from "./StoryLogic";

export type StoryStateSnapshot = {
  flags: string[];
  values: Record<string, StoryPrimitive>;
  operativeStatuses?: Record<string, OperativeStatus>;
  relationships?: RelationshipPairState[];
  echoPsychology?: EchoPsychologyState;
  memories?: StoryMemory[];
};

const DEFAULT_ECHO_PSYCHOLOGY: EchoPsychologyState = {
  curiosity: 0,
  hostility: 0,
  preservation: 0,
  empathyModel: 0,
  alexInfluence: 0,
  fragmentation: 0,
  trustInIon: 0,
};

export class StoryState {
  private readonly flags = new Set<string>();
  private readonly values = new Map<string, StoryPrimitive>();
  private readonly operativeStatuses = new Map<string, OperativeStatus>();
  private readonly relationships = new Map<string, RelationshipPairState>();
  private readonly memories = new Map<string, StoryMemory>();
  private echoPsychology: EchoPsychologyState = { ...DEFAULT_ECHO_PSYCHOLOGY };

  has(flag: string): boolean {
    return this.flags.has(flag);
  }

  add(flag: string): void {
    this.flags.add(flag);
  }

  remove(flag: string): void {
    this.flags.delete(flag);
  }

  set(key: string, value: StoryPrimitive): void {
    this.values.set(key, value);
  }

  get<T extends StoryPrimitive>(key: string, fallback: T): T {
    return (this.values.get(key) as T | undefined) ?? fallback;
  }

  increment(key: string, amount = 1): number {
    const next = this.get(key, 0) + amount;
    this.values.set(key, next);
    return next;
  }

  setOperativeStatus(operativeId: string, status: OperativeStatus): void {
    this.operativeStatuses.set(operativeId, status);
  }

  getOperativeStatus(operativeId: string, fallback: OperativeStatus = "active"): OperativeStatus {
    return this.operativeStatuses.get(operativeId) ?? fallback;
  }

  getRelationship(a: string, b: string): RelationshipPairState {
    const key = relationshipKey(a, b);
    let relationship = this.relationships.get(key);
    if (!relationship) {
      relationship = { a, b, trust: 0, affection: 0, tension: 0, grief: 0, loyalty: 0, states: [] };
      this.relationships.set(key, relationship);
    }
    return relationship;
  }

  getEchoPsychology(): Readonly<EchoPsychologyState> {
    return this.echoPsychology;
  }

  matches(condition: StoryCondition): boolean {
    if (condition.type === "flag") return this.has(condition.id) === (condition.present ?? true);
    if (condition.type === "value") return compareStoryValues(this.get(condition.key, false), condition.operator, condition.value);
    if (condition.type === "operative-status") return this.getOperativeStatus(condition.operativeId) === condition.status;
    if (condition.type === "relationship") return compareNumeric(this.getRelationship(condition.a, condition.b)[condition.metric], condition.operator, condition.value);
    if (condition.type === "echo") return compareNumeric(this.echoPsychology[condition.metric], condition.operator, condition.value);
    if (condition.type === "all") return condition.conditions.every((candidate) => this.matches(candidate));
    if (condition.type === "any") return condition.conditions.some((candidate) => this.matches(candidate));
    return !this.matches(condition.condition);
  }

  matchesAll(conditions: StoryCondition[]): boolean {
    return conditions.every((condition) => this.matches(condition));
  }

  apply(effect: StoryEffect): void {
    if (effect.type === "add-flag") this.add(effect.id);
    else if (effect.type === "remove-flag") this.remove(effect.id);
    else if (effect.type === "set-value") this.set(effect.key, effect.value);
    else if (effect.type === "increment-value") this.increment(effect.key, effect.amount);
    else if (effect.type === "set-operative-status") this.setOperativeStatus(effect.operativeId, effect.status);
    else if (effect.type === "adjust-relationship") {
      const relationship = this.getRelationship(effect.a, effect.b);
      relationship[effect.metric] = clamp(relationship[effect.metric] + effect.amount, -100, 100);
      relationship.states = deriveRelationshipStates(relationship);
    } else if (effect.type === "adjust-echo") {
      this.echoPsychology[effect.metric] = clamp(this.echoPsychology[effect.metric] + effect.amount, -100, 100);
    } else if (effect.type === "add-memory" && !this.memories.has(effect.id)) {
      this.memories.set(effect.id, {
        id: effect.id,
        participants: [...effect.participants],
        tags: [...effect.tags],
        value: effect.value ?? 1,
      });
    }
  }

  applyAll(effects: StoryEffect[]): void {
    effects.forEach((effect) => this.apply(effect));
  }

  snapshot(): StoryStateSnapshot {
    return {
      flags: [...this.flags].sort(),
      values: Object.fromEntries(this.values.entries()),
      operativeStatuses: Object.fromEntries(this.operativeStatuses.entries()),
      relationships: [...this.relationships.values()].map((relationship) => ({ ...relationship, states: [...relationship.states] })),
      echoPsychology: { ...this.echoPsychology },
      memories: [...this.memories.values()].map((memory) => ({ ...memory, participants: [...memory.participants], tags: [...memory.tags] })),
    };
  }

  restore(snapshot: StoryStateSnapshot): void {
    this.flags.clear();
    this.values.clear();
    this.operativeStatuses.clear();
    this.relationships.clear();
    this.memories.clear();
    snapshot.flags.forEach((flag) => this.flags.add(flag));
    Object.entries(snapshot.values).forEach(([key, value]) => this.values.set(key, value));
    Object.entries(snapshot.operativeStatuses ?? {}).forEach(([key, value]) => this.operativeStatuses.set(key, value));
    (snapshot.relationships ?? []).forEach((relationship) => this.relationships.set(relationshipKey(relationship.a, relationship.b), { ...relationship, states: [...relationship.states] }));
    this.echoPsychology = { ...DEFAULT_ECHO_PSYCHOLOGY, ...(snapshot.echoPsychology ?? {}) };
    (snapshot.memories ?? []).forEach((memory) => this.memories.set(memory.id, { ...memory, participants: [...memory.participants], tags: [...memory.tags] }));
  }
}

function compareNumeric(left: number, operator: "gt" | "gte" | "lt" | "lte", right: number): boolean {
  if (operator === "gt") return left > right;
  if (operator === "gte") return left >= right;
  if (operator === "lt") return left < right;
  return left <= right;
}

function deriveRelationshipStates(relationship: RelationshipPairState): string[] {
  const states: string[] = [];
  if (relationship.trust >= 40) states.push("trusted");
  if (relationship.affection >= 40) states.push("close");
  if (relationship.tension >= 40) states.push("strained");
  if (relationship.grief >= 40) states.push("shared-grief");
  if (relationship.loyalty >= 60) states.push("loyal");
  return states;
}

function clamp(value: number, min: number, max: number): number {
  return Math.max(min, Math.min(max, value));
}

// ===== src/systems/AbilitySystem.ts =====
import type { EventBus } from "../engine/EventBus";
import type { Agent } from "../entities/Agent";
import type { Enemy } from "../entities/Enemy";
import type { CombatSystem } from "./CombatSystem";

export type AgentAbilityId = "command-pulse" | "mark-target" | "field-patch" | "kinetic-surge";

export type AbilityDefinition = {
  id: AgentAbilityId;
  name: string;
  description: string;
  cooldown: number;
};

export const AGENT_ABILITIES: Record<string, AbilityDefinition> = {
  alex: { id: "command-pulse", name: "Command Pulse", description: "+12% squad accuracy for 8 seconds", cooldown: 22 },
  jordan: { id: "mark-target", name: "Mark Target", description: "+18% hit chance against the marked drone", cooldown: 16 },
  chen: { id: "field-patch", name: "Field Patch", description: "Restore 30 health to the most injured nearby agent", cooldown: 18 },
  ramirez: { id: "kinetic-surge", name: "Kinetic Surge", description: "+15 armor and +8 damage for 8 seconds", cooldown: 24 },
};

export type AbilityEffectSnapshot = {
  kind: "command-pulse" | "kinetic-surge";
  agentIds: string[];
  remaining: number;
};

export type AbilitySnapshot = {
  cooldowns: Record<string, number>;
  activeEffects: AbilityEffectSnapshot[];
};

type TimedEffect = AbilityEffectSnapshot & { id: string; cleanup: () => void };

export class AbilitySystem {
  private readonly cooldowns = new Map<string, number>();
  private readonly effects: TimedEffect[] = [];
  private hoveredEnemy?: Enemy;

  constructor(
    private readonly agents: Agent[],
    private readonly combat: CombatSystem,
    private readonly bus: EventBus,
  ) {}

  update(deltaSeconds: number): void {
    if (deltaSeconds <= 0) return;
    for (const [agentId, remaining] of this.cooldowns) {
      const next = Math.max(0, remaining - deltaSeconds);
      if (next === 0) this.cooldowns.delete(agentId);
      else this.cooldowns.set(agentId, next);
    }
    for (let index = this.effects.length - 1; index >= 0; index -= 1) {
      const effect = this.effects[index];
      if (!effect) continue;
      effect.remaining -= deltaSeconds;
      if (effect.remaining > 0) continue;
      effect.cleanup();
      this.effects.splice(index, 1);
      this.bus.emit("ability:changed", {});
    }
  }

  setHoveredEnemy(enemy: Enemy | undefined): void {
    this.hoveredEnemy = enemy;
  }

  definitionFor(agent: Agent | undefined): AbilityDefinition | undefined {
    return agent ? AGENT_ABILITIES[agent.id] : undefined;
  }

  cooldownRemaining(agent: Agent): number {
    return this.cooldowns.get(agent.id) ?? 0;
  }

  use(agent: Agent): boolean {
    const definition = this.definitionFor(agent);
    if (!definition || agent.downed || this.cooldownRemaining(agent) > 0) return false;

    let used = false;
    if (definition.id === "command-pulse") used = this.commandPulse(agent);
    if (definition.id === "mark-target") used = this.markTarget(agent);
    if (definition.id === "field-patch") used = this.fieldPatch(agent);
    if (definition.id === "kinetic-surge") used = this.kineticSurge(agent);
    if (!used) return false;

    this.cooldowns.set(agent.id, definition.cooldown);
    this.bus.emit("ability:used", { agentId: agent.id, abilityId: definition.id, label: definition.name });
    this.bus.emit("ability:changed", {});
    return true;
  }

  snapshot(): AbilitySnapshot {
    return {
      cooldowns: Object.fromEntries(this.cooldowns),
      activeEffects: this.effects.map(({ kind, agentIds, remaining }) => ({ kind, agentIds: [...agentIds], remaining })),
    };
  }

  resetRuntimeEffects(): void {
    this.effects.splice(0).forEach((effect) => effect.cleanup());
  }

  restore(snapshot: Partial<AbilitySnapshot> | undefined): void {
    this.cooldowns.clear();
    Object.entries(snapshot?.cooldowns ?? {}).forEach(([id, value]) => this.cooldowns.set(id, Math.max(0, value)));
    this.effects.length = 0;
    for (const state of snapshot?.activeEffects ?? []) {
      const affected = state.agentIds
        .map((id) => this.agents.find((agent) => agent.id === id))
        .filter((agent): agent is Agent => Boolean(agent));
      if (state.kind === "command-pulse") {
        this.effects.push({
          id: `restored-command-pulse:${state.agentIds.join(",")}`,
          kind: state.kind,
          agentIds: [...state.agentIds],
          remaining: state.remaining,
          cleanup: () => affected.forEach((agent) => { agent.accuracy = Math.max(0.08, agent.accuracy - 0.12); }),
        });
      } else if (state.kind === "kinetic-surge") {
        const source = affected[0];
        if (!source) continue;
        this.effects.push({
          id: `restored-kinetic-surge:${source.id}`,
          kind: state.kind,
          agentIds: [source.id],
          remaining: state.remaining,
          cleanup: () => {
            source.armor = Math.max(0, source.armor - 15);
            source.baseDamage = Math.max(1, source.baseDamage - 8);
          },
        });
      }
    }
    this.bus.emit("ability:changed", {});
  }

  private commandPulse(source: Agent): boolean {
    const affected = this.agents.filter((agent) => !agent.downed && planarDistance(agent, source) <= 10);
    if (affected.length === 0) return false;
    affected.forEach((agent) => { agent.accuracy += 0.12; });
    this.effects.push({
      id: `command-pulse:${source.id}`,
      kind: "command-pulse",
      agentIds: affected.map((agent) => agent.id),
      remaining: 8,
      cleanup: () => affected.forEach((agent) => { agent.accuracy = Math.max(0.08, agent.accuracy - 0.12); }),
    });
    this.bus.emit("toast", { message: `${source.definition.callsign}: Command Pulse active.`, tone: "success" });
    return true;
  }

  private markTarget(source: Agent): boolean {
    const target = this.hoveredEnemy ?? this.combat.nearestVisibleEnemy(source);
    if (!target) {
      this.bus.emit("toast", { message: "Hover or reveal an Echo drone before marking it.", tone: "warning" });
      return false;
    }
    this.combat.setMarkedEnemy(target.id, 10);
    this.bus.emit("toast", { message: `${source.definition.callsign} marked ${target.kind} drone.`, tone: "success" });
    return true;
  }

  private fieldPatch(source: Agent): boolean {
    const target = this.agents
      .filter((agent) => !agent.downed && agent.health < agent.maxHealth && planarDistance(agent, source) <= 6)
      .sort((a, b) => a.health / a.maxHealth - b.health / b.maxHealth)[0];
    if (!target) {
      this.bus.emit("toast", { message: "No injured conscious agent is within 6 metres.", tone: "warning" });
      return false;
    }
    target.health = Math.min(target.maxHealth, target.health + 30);
    this.bus.emit("combat:changed", {});
    this.bus.emit("toast", { message: `${source.definition.callsign} patched ${target.definition.callsign}.`, tone: "success" });
    return true;
  }

  private kineticSurge(source: Agent): boolean {
    source.armor += 15;
    source.baseDamage += 8;
    this.effects.push({
      id: `kinetic-surge:${source.id}`,
      kind: "kinetic-surge",
      agentIds: [source.id],
      remaining: 8,
      cleanup: () => {
        source.armor = Math.max(0, source.armor - 15);
        source.baseDamage = Math.max(1, source.baseDamage - 8);
      },
    });
    this.bus.emit("toast", { message: `${source.definition.callsign}: Kinetic Surge active.`, tone: "success" });
    return true;
  }
}

function planarDistance(a: Agent, b: Agent): number {
  return Math.hypot(a.root.position.x - b.root.position.x, a.root.position.z - b.root.position.z);
}

// ===== src/systems/AudioSystem.ts =====
import type { EventBus } from "../engine/EventBus";

/** Lightweight procedural UI audio. It remains silent until the first user gesture. */
export class AudioSystem {
  private context?: AudioContext;
  private enabled = true;
  private musicState = "exploration";

  constructor(bus: EventBus) {
    const unlock = () => {
      if (!this.context && "AudioContext" in window) this.context = new AudioContext();
      void this.context?.resume();
    };
    window.addEventListener("pointerdown", unlock, { once: true, capture: true });
    bus.on("command:queued", () => this.beep(460, 0.035, 0.02));
    bus.on("evidence:collected", () => this.beep(720, 0.12, 0.035));
    bus.on("alert:changed", ({ level }) => {
      if (level === "HOSTILE") this.beep(150, 0.22, 0.045);
    });
    bus.on("ability:used", () => this.beep(610, 0.09, 0.03));
  }

  setEnabled(enabled: boolean): void {
    this.enabled = enabled;
  }

  setMusicState(state: string): void {
    if (state === this.musicState) return;
    this.musicState = state;
    const frequency = musicStateFrequency(state);
    this.beep(frequency, 0.18, 0.018);
  }

  playStinger(assetId: string): void {
    const hash = [...assetId].reduce((value, character) => ((value * 31) + character.charCodeAt(0)) >>> 0, 17);
    this.beep(220 + (hash % 480), 0.14, 0.025);
  }

  private beep(frequency: number, duration: number, volume: number): void {
    if (!this.enabled || !this.context || this.context.state !== "running") return;
    const oscillator = this.context.createOscillator();
    const gain = this.context.createGain();
    oscillator.frequency.value = frequency;
    oscillator.type = "sine";
    gain.gain.setValueAtTime(volume, this.context.currentTime);
    gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001, this.context.currentTime + duration);
    oscillator.connect(gain).connect(this.context.destination);
    oscillator.start();
    oscillator.stop(this.context.currentTime + duration);
  }
}

function musicStateFrequency(state: string): number {
  const map: Record<string, number> = {
    exploration: 260, investigation: 300, suspicion: 220, combat: 145, crisis: 125,
    extraction: 410, grief: 180, revelation: 520, "echo-contact": 580, "final-choice": 640,
  };
  return map[state] ?? 340;
}

// ===== src/systems/CombatSystem.ts =====
import {
  Color3,
  DynamicTexture,
  Mesh,
  MeshBuilder,
  Ray,
  StandardMaterial,
  Vector3,
  type Scene,
} from "@babylonjs/core";
import { calculateHitChance } from "../combat/HitChance";
import type { Agent } from "../entities/Agent";
import type { Combatant } from "../entities/Combatant";
import type { Enemy } from "../entities/Enemy";
import type { EventBus } from "../engine/EventBus";
import type { RandomService } from "../engine/RandomService";
import type { CoverSystem } from "./CoverSystem";
import type { NavigationSystem } from "./NavigationSystem";
import type { VisionSystem } from "./VisionSystem";
import type { GadgetSystem } from "./GadgetSystem";
import { FIRE_MODES, MOVEMENT_STANCES, suppressionAccuracyPenalty, type FireMode } from "../tactical/TacticalTypes";

export type AttackEstimate = {
  chance: number;
  distance: number;
  blocked: boolean;
  coverModifier: number;
  flanked: boolean;
  smokeObscured: boolean;
  fireMode: FireMode;
};

export type AttackResult = {
  executed: boolean;
  hit: boolean;
  damage: number;
  chance: number;
  reason?: string;
};

export type CombatSnapshot = { simulationTime: number; markedEnemyId?: string; markRemaining: number };

export class CombatSystem {
  simulationTime = 0;
  markedEnemyId?: string;
  private markRemaining = 0;
  private readonly overwatchCones = new Map<string, Mesh>();

  constructor(
    private readonly scene: Scene,
    private readonly agents: Agent[],
    private readonly enemies: Enemy[],
    private readonly navigation: NavigationSystem,
    private readonly cover: CoverSystem,
    private readonly vision: VisionSystem,
    private readonly bus: EventBus,
    private readonly random: RandomService,
    private readonly gadgets: GadgetSystem,
  ) {}

  update(deltaSeconds: number): void {
    if (deltaSeconds <= 0) return;
    this.simulationTime += deltaSeconds;
    if (this.markRemaining > 0) {
      this.markRemaining = Math.max(0, this.markRemaining - deltaSeconds);
      if (this.markRemaining === 0) this.markedEnemyId = undefined;
    }
    const combatants: Combatant[] = [...this.agents, ...this.enemies];
    for (const combatant of combatants) {
      const decay = combatant.suppressionState === "broken" ? 3 : combatant.suppressionState === "pinned" ? 5 : 8;
      combatant.suppression = Math.max(0, combatant.suppression - decay * deltaSeconds);
      if (combatant.suppressionState === "broken" && combatant.team === "ion") {
        this.navigation.stopEntity(combatant);
      }
    }
    this.gadgets.update(deltaSeconds, this.simulationTime);
    this.syncOverwatchCones();
    this.updateOverwatch();
  }

  estimateAttack(attacker: Combatant, target: Combatant, fireMode: FireMode = "standard"): AttackEstimate {
    const distance = planarDistance(attacker.root.position, target.root.position);
    const hiddenTarget = attacker.team === "ion"
      && target.team === "echo"
      && !this.vision.isEnemyVisible(target as Enemy);
    const blocked = hiddenTarget || !this.hasClearShot(attacker, target);
    const targetAgent = target.team === "ion" ? this.agents.find((agent) => agent.id === target.id) : undefined;
    const coverInfo = targetAgent
      ? this.cover.coverProtection(targetAgent, attacker.root.position)
      : { modifier: 0, flanked: true };
    const targetMoving = this.navigation.getVelocity(target).lengthSquared() > 0.2;
    const smokeObscured = this.gadgets.lineCrossesSmoke(attacker.root.position, target.root.position);
    let chance = blocked || distance > attacker.weaponRange
      ? 0
      : calculateHitChance({
          baseAccuracy: attacker.accuracy,
          distance,
          weaponRange: attacker.weaponRange,
          coverModifier: coverInfo.modifier,
          shooterSuppressed: false,
          targetMoving,
          elevationDifference: attacker.root.position.y - target.root.position.y,
        });
    if (chance > 0) {
      chance += FIRE_MODES[fireMode].accuracyModifier;
      chance -= suppressionAccuracyPenalty(attacker.suppression);
      chance += MOVEMENT_STANCES[target.movementStance].incomingHitModifier;
      if (smokeObscured) chance -= 0.28;
      chance = Math.max(0.05, Math.min(0.98, chance));
    }
    if (target.id === this.markedEnemyId && attacker.team === "ion") chance = Math.min(0.98, chance + 0.18);
    return {
      chance,
      distance,
      blocked,
      coverModifier: coverInfo.modifier,
      flanked: coverInfo.flanked,
      smokeObscured,
      fireMode,
    };
  }

  performAttack(attacker: Combatant, target: Combatant, overwatch = false, fireMode: FireMode = "standard"): AttackResult {
    if (attacker.disabled || attacker.downed || target.disabled || target.downed) {
      return { executed: false, hit: false, damage: 0, chance: 0, reason: "Invalid target" };
    }
    const mode = FIRE_MODES[fireMode];
    if (attacker.ammo < mode.ammoCost) {
      this.bus.emit("toast", { message: `${nameOf(attacker)} needs to reload.`, tone: "warning" });
      return { executed: false, hit: false, damage: 0, chance: 0, reason: "No ammunition" };
    }

    const estimate = this.estimateAttack(attacker, target, fireMode);
    if (estimate.blocked) {
      this.bus.emit("combat:log", { message: `${nameOf(attacker)} has no clear line of fire.`, tone: "warning" });
      return { executed: false, hit: false, damage: 0, chance: 0, reason: "Blocked" };
    }
    if (estimate.distance > attacker.weaponRange) {
      this.bus.emit("combat:log", { message: `${nameOf(target)} is out of range.`, tone: "warning" });
      return { executed: false, hit: false, damage: 0, chance: 0, reason: "Out of range" };
    }

    attacker.ammo = Math.max(0, attacker.ammo - mode.ammoCost);
    target.suppressedUntil = Math.max(target.suppressedUntil, this.simulationTime + (overwatch ? 2.6 : 2.0));
    target.suppression = Math.min(120, target.suppression + mode.suppression + (overwatch ? 8 : 0));
    this.bus.emit("noise:created", {
      position: attacker.root.position.clone(),
      radius: (attacker.weapon?.noiseRadius ?? 15) * mode.noiseMultiplier,
      sourceTeam: attacker.team,
    });

    const effectiveChance = overwatch && target.team === "echo" && (target as Enemy).overwatchJammer
      ? estimate.chance * 0.35
      : estimate.chance;
    const hit = this.random.next() <= effectiveChance;
    const penetrationBonus = attacker.weapon ? Math.round(target.armor * attacker.weapon.armorPenetration * 0.25) : 0;
    const rawDamage = hit
      ? Math.round(attacker.baseDamage * mode.damageMultiplier * this.random.range(0.88, 1.13)) + penetrationBonus
      : 0;
    const damage = hit ? target.applyDamage(rawDamage) : 0;
    this.spawnShot(attacker, target, hit);
    this.spawnFloatingText(target.root.position, hit ? `-${damage}` : "MISS", hit ? new Color3(1, 0.35, 0.18) : new Color3(0.76, 0.9, 0.95));

    const chanceText = `${Math.round(effectiveChance * 100)}%`;
    const flankText = estimate.flanked && target.coverPointId ? " FLANK" : "";
    const modeText = fireMode === "standard" ? "" : ` ${mode.label.toUpperCase()}`;
    const suppressionText = target.suppressionState !== "steady" ? ` ${target.suppressionState.toUpperCase()}` : "";
    this.bus.emit("combat:log", {
      message: hit
        ? `${nameOf(attacker)}${modeText} hit ${nameOf(target)} for ${damage} (${chanceText}${flankText})${suppressionText}.`
        : `${nameOf(attacker)}${modeText} missed ${nameOf(target)} (${chanceText}${flankText})${suppressionText}.`,
      tone: hit ? "danger" : "info",
    });
    this.bus.emit("combat:changed", {});
    this.bus.emit("combat:attack", {
      attackerId: attacker.id,
      targetId: target.id,
      attackerTeam: attacker.team,
      targetTeam: target.team,
      hit,
      damage,
      overwatch,
    });

    if (target.disabled) {
      this.navigation.stopEntity(target);
      this.bus.emit("enemy:disabled", { enemyId: target.id });
      this.bus.emit("combat:log", { message: `${nameOf(target)} disabled.`, tone: "success" });
    } else if (target.downed) {
      this.navigation.stopEntity(target);
      this.bus.emit("agent:downed", { agentId: target.id });
      this.bus.emit("combat:log", { message: `${nameOf(target)} is DOWNED.`, tone: "danger" });
    }

    return { executed: true, hit, damage, chance: effectiveChance };
  }


  snapshot(): CombatSnapshot {
    return {
      simulationTime: this.simulationTime,
      markedEnemyId: this.markedEnemyId,
      markRemaining: this.markRemaining,
    };
  }

  restore(snapshot: CombatSnapshot): void {
    this.simulationTime = Math.max(0, snapshot.simulationTime ?? 0);
    this.markedEnemyId = snapshot.markedEnemyId;
    this.markRemaining = Math.max(0, snapshot.markRemaining ?? 0);
  }

  setMarkedEnemy(enemyId: string | undefined, duration = 0): void {
    this.markedEnemyId = enemyId;
    this.markRemaining = enemyId ? Math.max(duration, 0.01) : 0;
    this.bus.emit("combat:changed", {});
  }

  createMovementNoise(agent: Agent, multiplier: number): void {
    if (multiplier <= 0.5) return;
    this.bus.emit("noise:created", {
      position: agent.root.position.clone(),
      radius: 3.5 * multiplier,
      sourceTeam: "ion",
    });
  }

  setOverwatch(agent: Agent, yaw: number, arc: number, range: number): void {
    agent.overwatchYaw = yaw;
    agent.overwatchArc = arc;
    agent.overwatchRange = range;
    agent.overwatch = true;
    this.createOverwatchCone(agent);
  }

  clearOverwatch(agent: Agent): void {
    agent.overwatch = false;
    this.overwatchCones.get(agent.id)?.dispose(false, true);
    this.overwatchCones.delete(agent.id);
  }

  isAgentJammed(agent: Agent): boolean {
    return agent.jammedUntil > this.simulationTime;
  }

  nearestVisibleEnemy(agent: Agent): Enemy | undefined {
    return this.enemies
      .filter((enemy) => !enemy.disabled && enemy.currentlyVisible)
      .sort((a, b) => planarDistance(agent.root.position, a.root.position) - planarDistance(agent.root.position, b.root.position))[0];
  }

  findFiringPosition(attacker: Agent, target: Enemy): Vector3 | undefined {
    const candidates: Array<{ point: Vector3; score: number }> = [];
    const desiredRange = Math.min(attacker.weapon?.optimalRange ?? attacker.weaponRange * 0.65, attacker.weaponRange - 0.5);
    for (const radius of [desiredRange, Math.max(2.5, desiredRange - 2), Math.min(attacker.weaponRange - 0.4, desiredRange + 2)]) {
      for (let index = 0; index < 16; index += 1) {
        const angle = (index / 16) * Math.PI * 2;
        const raw = target.root.position.add(new Vector3(Math.sin(angle) * radius, 0, Math.cos(angle) * radius));
        const point = this.navigation.closestPoint(raw);
        const distanceToTarget = planarDistance(point, target.root.position);
        if (distanceToTarget > attacker.weaponRange || !this.hasClearShotFrom(point, attacker.id, target)) continue;
        const path = this.navigation.computePath(attacker.root.position, point);
        if (path.length < 2) continue;
        const pathLength = path.slice(1).reduce((sum, value, pathIndex) => sum + Vector3.Distance(path[pathIndex] ?? value, value), 0);
        candidates.push({ point, score: pathLength + Math.abs(distanceToTarget - desiredRange) * 0.5 });
      }
    }
    return candidates.sort((a, b) => a.score - b.score)[0]?.point;
  }

  nearestDownedAgent(helper: Agent, maxDistance = 2.4): Agent | undefined {
    return this.agents
      .filter((agent) => agent.downed && agent.id !== helper.id)
      .map((agent) => ({ agent, distance: planarDistance(helper.root.position, agent.root.position) }))
      .filter(({ distance }) => distance <= maxDistance)
      .sort((a, b) => a.distance - b.distance)[0]?.agent;
  }

  private syncOverwatchCones(): void {
    for (const agent of this.agents) {
      if (agent.overwatch && !agent.downed) {
        if (!this.overwatchCones.has(agent.id)) this.createOverwatchCone(agent);
      } else if (this.overwatchCones.has(agent.id)) {
        this.overwatchCones.get(agent.id)?.dispose(false, true);
        this.overwatchCones.delete(agent.id);
      }
    }
  }

  private createOverwatchCone(agent: Agent): void {
    this.overwatchCones.get(agent.id)?.dispose(false, true);
    const origin = agent.root.position.add(new Vector3(0, 0.1, 0));
    const points = [origin];
    const segments = 20;
    for (let index = 0; index <= segments; index += 1) {
      const angle = agent.overwatchYaw - agent.overwatchArc / 2 + (agent.overwatchArc * index) / segments;
      points.push(origin.add(new Vector3(Math.sin(angle) * agent.overwatchRange, 0, Math.cos(angle) * agent.overwatchRange)));
    }
    points.push(origin);
    const cone = MeshBuilder.CreateLines(`overwatch-cone:${agent.id}`, { points }, this.scene);
    cone.color = agent.definition.color;
    cone.alpha = 0.52;
    cone.isPickable = false;
    this.overwatchCones.set(agent.id, cone);
  }

  private updateOverwatch(): void {
    for (const agent of this.agents) {
      if (!agent.overwatch || agent.downed || agent.ammo <= 0 || agent.stunnedUntil > this.simulationTime) continue;
      const target = this.enemies
        .filter((enemy) => !enemy.disabled && enemy.currentlyVisible)
        .filter((enemy) => planarDistance(agent.root.position, enemy.root.position) <= agent.weaponRange)
        .filter((enemy) => withinArc(agent.root.position, agent.overwatchYaw, agent.overwatchArc, enemy.root.position))
        .sort((a, b) => planarDistance(agent.root.position, a.root.position) - planarDistance(agent.root.position, b.root.position))[0];
      if (!target) continue;
      const estimate = this.estimateAttack(agent, target);
      if (estimate.blocked || estimate.chance <= 0) continue;
      this.clearOverwatch(agent);
      this.bus.emit("combat:log", { message: `${agent.definition.callsign} triggers OVERWATCH.`, tone: "info" });
      this.performAttack(agent, target, true, "standard");
    }
  }

  private hasClearShot(attacker: Combatant, target: Combatant): boolean {
    const origin = attacker.root.position.add(new Vector3(0, attacker.team === "echo" ? 1.35 : 1.25, 0));
    const targetPoint = target.root.position.add(new Vector3(0, target.team === "echo" ? 1.35 : 1.15, 0));
    const direction = targetPoint.subtract(origin);
    const distance = direction.length();
    if (distance <= 0.05) return true;
    direction.normalize();
    const ray = new Ray(origin, direction, distance + 0.2);
    const pick = this.scene.pickWithRay(ray, (mesh) => {
      const metadata = mesh.metadata as Record<string, unknown> | null;
      if (metadata?.entityId === attacker.id) return false;
      return Boolean(metadata?.blocksShots || metadata?.entityId === target.id);
    });
    if (!pick?.hit || !pick.pickedMesh) return true;
    const metadata = pick.pickedMesh.metadata as Record<string, unknown> | null;
    return metadata?.entityId === target.id;
  }


  private hasClearShotFrom(position: Vector3, attackerId: string, target: Combatant): boolean {
    const origin = position.add(new Vector3(0, 1.25, 0));
    const targetPoint = target.root.position.add(new Vector3(0, target.team === "echo" ? 1.35 : 1.15, 0));
    const direction = targetPoint.subtract(origin);
    const distance = direction.length();
    if (distance <= 0.05) return true;
    direction.normalize();
    const pick = this.scene.pickWithRay(new Ray(origin, direction, distance + 0.2), (mesh) => {
      const metadata = mesh.metadata as Record<string, unknown> | null;
      if (metadata?.entityId === attackerId) return false;
      return Boolean(metadata?.blocksShots || metadata?.entityId === target.id);
    });
    if (!pick?.hit || !pick.pickedMesh) return true;
    const metadata = pick.pickedMesh.metadata as Record<string, unknown> | null;
    return metadata?.entityId === target.id;
  }
