      row.querySelector<HTMLButtonElement>("[data-command-up]")?.addEventListener("click", () => this.commands.reorderQueuedCommand(agent, id, -1));
      row.querySelector<HTMLButtonElement>("[data-command-down]")?.addEventListener("click", () => this.commands.reorderQueuedCommand(agent, id, 1));
      row.querySelector<HTMLButtonElement>("[data-command-remove]")?.addEventListener("click", () => this.commands.removeCommand(agent, id));
    });
  }

  private updateThreatCount(): void {
    const discovered = this.enemies.filter((enemy) => enemy.discovered).length;
    const active = this.enemies.filter((enemy) => enemy.discovered && !enemy.disabled).length;
    this.threatCount.textContent = `${active} ACTIVE / ${discovered} DETECTED`;
  }

  private updateEvidence(): void {
    const recovered = this.investigation.getRecoveredEvidence();
    this.evidenceCount.textContent = `${this.investigation.coreRecoveredCount} / ${this.investigation.totalCoreEvidence} CORE`;
    this.evidenceBadge.textContent = String(recovered.length);
    this.evidenceList.innerHTML = recovered.length === 0
      ? `<p class="empty-state">No evidence recovered.</p>`
      : recovered.map((item) => `
        <article class="evidence-item">
          <strong>${escapeHtml(item.title)}</strong>
          <span>${item.category}${item.core ? " · core" : ""}</span>
          <p>${escapeHtml(item.description)}</p>
        </article>
      `).join("");
    this.updateTheory();
  }

  private updateTheory(): void {
    const theory = this.story.has("theory.extraction")
      ? "ECHO EXTRACTED COGNITIVE STATE"
      : this.story.has("theory.installation")
        ? "ECHO INSTALLED A FOREIGN COGNITIVE PROCESS"
        : "UNRESOLVED — RECOVER THE INTERFACE PORT";
    const confidence = Math.min(100, this.investigation.coreRecoveredCount * 24 + this.investigation.recoveredCount * 5);
    this.workingTheory.textContent = `WORKING THEORY: ${theory} · ${confidence}% CONFIDENCE`;
  }

  private updateEchoProfile(metrics: EchoMetrics): void {
    const signals = metrics.squadSplitCount + metrics.overwatchUsage + metrics.alarmsTriggered + metrics.evidenceRecovered;
    const confidence = Math.min(100, 8 + signals * 9);
    const preferred = metrics.preferredAgent
      ? this.agents.find((agent) => agent.id === metrics.preferredAgent)?.definition.callsign
      : undefined;
    const traits = [
      metrics.squadSplitCount > 0 ? `split events ${metrics.squadSplitCount}` : undefined,
      metrics.overwatchUsage > 0 ? `overwatch ${metrics.overwatchUsage}` : undefined,
      metrics.alarmsTriggered > 0 ? `alarms ${metrics.alarmsTriggered}` : undefined,
      preferred ? `focus ${preferred}` : undefined,
    ].filter(Boolean);
    this.echoProfileText.textContent = traits.length > 0 ? traits.join(" · ").toUpperCase() : "PROFILE INCOMPLETE";
    this.echoProfileMeter.style.width = `${confidence}%`;
  }

  private updateTimeDisplay(state: "running" | "slow" | "paused"): void {
    const pauseButton = element<HTMLButtonElement>("pauseButton");
    this.timeState.className = `state-chip ${state}`;
    if (state === "running") {
      this.timeState.textContent = "RUNNING 1×";
      pauseButton.textContent = "PAUSE";
    } else if (state === "slow") {
      this.timeState.textContent = "TACTICAL SLOW 0.25×";
      pauseButton.textContent = "PAUSE";
    } else {
      this.timeState.textContent = "TACTICAL PAUSE";
      pauseButton.textContent = "RESUME";
    }
  }

  private updateMissionStage(stage: PragueMissionStage): void {
    this.missionStage.textContent = stage.toUpperCase().replaceAll("_", " ");
    this.missionStage.className = `mission-stage ${stage}`;
  }

  private renderObjectives(steps: MissionObjectiveStep[]): void {
    this.objectiveSteps.innerHTML = steps.map((step) => `
      <li class="${step.status}"><span></span><strong>${escapeHtml(step.title)}</strong></li>
    `).join("");
  }

  private showDebrief(report: MissionReport): void {
    const modal = element("debriefModal");
    element("debriefTitle").textContent = report.title;
    element("debriefSummary").textContent = report.summary;
    element("debriefGrade").textContent = report.grade;
    element("debriefScore").textContent = `${report.score}/100`;
    element("debriefStats").innerHTML = `
      <div><span>Evidence</span><strong>${report.evidenceRecovered}</strong></div>
      <div><span>Core findings</span><strong>${report.coreEvidenceRecovered}</strong></div>
      <div><span>Drones disabled</span><strong>${report.dronesDisabled}</strong></div>
      <div><span>Drones escaped</span><strong>${report.dronesEscaped}</strong></div>
      <div><span>Agents injured</span><strong>${report.squadInjuries}</strong></div>
      <div><span>Agents downed</span><strong>${report.squadDowned}</strong></div>
      <div><span>Mission time</span><strong>${formatTime(report.missionTimeSeconds)}</strong></div>
      <div><span>Crisis priority</span><strong>${report.crisisPriority?.toUpperCase() ?? "NONE"}</strong></div>
      <div><span>Priority result</span><strong>${report.crisisResolved ? "SECURED" : "LOST"}</strong></div>
      <div><span>Objectives</span><strong>${report.simultaneousObjectivesCompleted ?? 0}</strong></div>
    `;
    element("debriefAdaptation").textContent = report.echoAdaptation.replaceAll("_", " ").toUpperCase();
    element("debriefLead").textContent = report.nextLead;
    element<HTMLButtonElement>("continueDebriefButton").disabled = report.outcome === "failure";
    modal.hidden = false;
  }

  private updateAbilityButtons(): void {
    const selected = this.selection.selectedAgents.filter((agent) => !agent.downed);
    element<HTMLButtonElement>("overwatchButton").disabled = selected.length === 0 || selected.every((agent) => ["pinned", "broken"].includes(agent.suppressionState));
    element<HTMLButtonElement>("reloadButton").disabled = selected.length === 0 || selected.every((agent) => agent.ammo >= agent.magazineSize);
    element<HTMLButtonElement>("stabilizeButton").disabled = selected.length === 0 || !this.agents.some((agent) => agent.downed);
    element<HTMLButtonElement>("interactButton").disabled = selected.length === 0 || this.investigation.getAvailableInteractables().length === 0;

    const agent = selected[0];
    const definition = this.abilities.definitionFor(agent);
    const abilityButton = element<HTMLButtonElement>("agentAbilityButton");
    const label = element("agentAbilityLabel");
    const cooldownLabel = element("agentAbilityCooldown");
    if (!agent || !definition) {
      abilityButton.disabled = true;
      label.textContent = "Signature";
      cooldownLabel.textContent = "";
      return;
    }
    const cooldown = this.abilities.cooldownRemaining(agent);
    abilityButton.disabled = cooldown > 0 || this.combat.isAgentJammed(agent) || ["pinned", "broken"].includes(agent.suppressionState);
    abilityButton.title = definition.description;
    label.textContent = definition.name;
    cooldownLabel.textContent = cooldown > 0 ? `${cooldown.toFixed(1)}s` : "READY";
  }

  private addCombatLog(message: string, tone: string): void {
    this.logEntries.unshift({ message, tone });
    this.logEntries.length = Math.min(this.logEntries.length, 20);
    this.combatLog.innerHTML = this.logEntries
      .map((entry) => `<div class="combat-entry ${entry.tone}">${escapeHtml(entry.message)}</div>`)
      .join("");
  }

  private showToast(message: string, tone: "info" | "success" | "warning" = "info"): void {
    const toast = document.createElement("div");
    toast.className = `toast ${tone}`;
    toast.textContent = message;
    this.toastStack.append(toast);
    requestAnimationFrame(() => toast.classList.add("visible"));
    window.setTimeout(() => {
      toast.classList.remove("visible");
      window.setTimeout(() => toast.remove(), 220);
    }, 2200);
  }
}

function initials(value: string): string {
  return value.slice(0, 2).toUpperCase();
}

function formatTime(seconds: number): string {
  const minutes = Math.floor(seconds / 60);
  const remaining = Math.floor(seconds % 60);
  return `${minutes}:${remaining.toString().padStart(2, "0")}`;
}

function escapeHtml(value: string): string {
  return value.replace(/[&<>'"]/g, (character) => ({
    "&": "&amp;",
    "<": "&lt;",
    ">": "&gt;",
    "'": "&#39;",
    '"': "&quot;",
  })[character] ?? character);
}

function element<T extends HTMLElement = HTMLElement>(id: string): T {
  const found = document.getElementById(id);
  if (!found) throw new Error(`Missing required HUD element #${id}`);
  return found as T;
}

// ===== src/ui/MinimapController.ts =====
import { Vector3 } from "@babylonjs/core";
import type { Agent } from "../entities/Agent";
import type { Enemy } from "../entities/Enemy";
import type { InvestigationSystem } from "../systems/InvestigationSystem";
import type { TacticalCamera } from "../camera/TacticalCamera";
import type { RoomDefinition } from "../world/WorldTypes";

export class MinimapController {
  private readonly context: CanvasRenderingContext2D;
  private objective?: Vector3;
  private extraction?: Vector3;
  private frame = 0;

  constructor(
    private readonly canvas: HTMLCanvasElement,
    private readonly agents: Agent[],
    private readonly enemies: Enemy[],
    private readonly rooms: RoomDefinition[],
    private readonly investigation: InvestigationSystem,
    private readonly camera: TacticalCamera,
    private readonly bounds = { minX: -19, maxX: 19, minZ: -14, maxZ: 14 },
  ) {
    const context = canvas.getContext("2d");
    if (!context) throw new Error("Minimap canvas 2D context unavailable");
    this.context = context;
    canvas.addEventListener("pointerdown", (event) => this.handlePointer(event));
  }

  setObjective(position?: Vector3): void {
    this.objective = position?.clone();
  }

  setExtraction(position?: Vector3): void {
    this.extraction = position?.clone();
  }

  update(force = false): void {
    this.frame += 1;
    if (!force && this.frame % 4 !== 0) return;
    const dpr = Math.min(2, window.devicePixelRatio || 1);
    const width = Math.max(1, Math.floor(this.canvas.clientWidth * dpr));
    const height = Math.max(1, Math.floor(this.canvas.clientHeight * dpr));
    if (this.canvas.width !== width || this.canvas.height !== height) {
      this.canvas.width = width;
      this.canvas.height = height;
    }
    const ctx = this.context;
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, width, height);
    ctx.save();
    ctx.scale(dpr, dpr);
    const cssWidth = width / dpr;
    const cssHeight = height / dpr;
    ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(2, 11, 15, .88)";
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, cssWidth, cssHeight);

    for (const room of this.rooms) {
      const a = this.toMap(room.minX, room.minZ, cssWidth, cssHeight);
      const b = this.toMap(room.maxX, room.maxZ, cssWidth, cssHeight);
      const revealed = !room.roofMesh.isEnabled() || room.initiallyRevealed;
      ctx.fillStyle = revealed ? "rgba(40, 97, 110, .26)" : "rgba(24, 47, 54, .22)";
      ctx.strokeStyle = "rgba(112, 186, 201, .25)";
      ctx.lineWidth = 1;
      ctx.fillRect(a.x, b.y, b.x - a.x, a.y - b.y);
      ctx.strokeRect(a.x, b.y, b.x - a.x, a.y - b.y);
    }

    for (const target of this.investigation.getAvailableInteractables()) {
      this.dot(target.position, cssWidth, cssHeight, "#8df6d0", 2.2);
    }
    if (this.objective) this.ring(this.objective, cssWidth, cssHeight, "#5ae8ff", 5);
    if (this.extraction) this.ring(this.extraction, cssWidth, cssHeight, "#ffd06b", 6);

    for (const enemy of this.enemies) {
      if (!enemy.discovered) continue;
      this.dot(enemy.root.position, cssWidth, cssHeight, enemy.disabled ? "#6c7377" : "#ff624a", enemy.currentlyVisible ? 3.6 : 2.4);
    }
    for (const agent of this.agents) {
      this.dot(agent.root.position, cssWidth, cssHeight, agent.downed ? "#7d8790" : agent.definition.color.toHexString(), agent.selected ? 4.2 : 3.2);
    }
    ctx.restore();
  }

  private handlePointer(event: PointerEvent): void {
    const rect = this.canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
    const x = (event.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width;
    const y = (event.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height;
    const worldX = this.bounds.minX + x * (this.bounds.maxX - this.bounds.minX);
    const worldZ = this.bounds.maxZ - y * (this.bounds.maxZ - this.bounds.minZ);
    this.camera.focus(new Vector3(worldX, 0, worldZ));
  }

  private dot(position: Vector3, width: number, height: number, color: string, radius: number): void {
    const point = this.toMap(position.x, position.z, width, height);
    this.context.beginPath();
    this.context.arc(point.x, point.y, radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    this.context.fillStyle = color;
    this.context.fill();
  }

  private ring(position: Vector3, width: number, height: number, color: string, radius: number): void {
    const point = this.toMap(position.x, position.z, width, height);
    this.context.beginPath();
    this.context.arc(point.x, point.y, radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    this.context.strokeStyle = color;
    this.context.lineWidth = 1.5;
    this.context.stroke();
  }

  private toMap(x: number, z: number, width: number, height: number): { x: number; y: number } {
    return {
      x: ((x - this.bounds.minX) / (this.bounds.maxX - this.bounds.minX)) * width,
      y: ((this.bounds.maxZ - z) / (this.bounds.maxZ - this.bounds.minZ)) * height,
    };
  }
}

// ===== src/utils/formation.ts =====
import { Vector3 } from "@babylonjs/core";

const BASE_SLOTS = [
  new Vector3(0, 0, 0),
  new Vector3(-1.25, 0, -1.1),
  new Vector3(1.25, 0, -1.1),
  new Vector3(0, 0, -2.2),
  new Vector3(-2.5, 0, -2.2),
  new Vector3(2.5, 0, -2.2),
];

export function formationDestinations(
  center: Vector3,
  count: number,
  cameraAlpha: number,
  spacing = 1,
): Vector3[] {
  const cos = Math.cos(-cameraAlpha - Math.PI / 2);
  const sin = Math.sin(-cameraAlpha - Math.PI / 2);

  return Array.from({ length: count }, (_, index) => {
    const slot = BASE_SLOTS[index] ?? new Vector3((index % 3) * 1.4 - 1.4, 0, -Math.floor(index / 3) * 1.4);
    const x = slot.x * spacing;
    const z = slot.z * spacing;
    return new Vector3(
      center.x + x * cos - z * sin,
      center.y,
      center.z + x * sin + z * cos,
    );
  });
}

// ===== src/world/ClinicVisualUpgrade.ts =====
import {
  Color3,
  Color4,
  DynamicTexture,
  ImageProcessingConfiguration,
  Mesh,
  MeshBuilder,
  PBRMaterial,
  PointLight,
  StandardMaterial,
  Texture,
  TransformNode,
  Vector3,
  type AbstractMesh,
  type Scene,
} from "@babylonjs/core";
import type { HospitalWorld, RoomDefinition } from "./WorldTypes";

export type ClinicVisualUpgradeReport = {
  enabled: boolean;
  meshCount: number;
  lightCount: number;
  warnings: string[];
};

type Palette = {
  neutralFloor: PBRMaterial;
  receptionFloor: PBRMaterial;
  icuFloor: PBRMaterial;
  serverFloor: PBRMaterial;
  utilityFloor: PBRMaterial;
  corruptedFloor: PBRMaterial;
  paintedMetal: PBRMaterial;
  darkPolymer: PBRMaterial;
  rubber: PBRMaterial;
  cleanPlastic: PBRMaterial;
  ceramic: PBRMaterial;
  fabric: PBRMaterial;
  glass: PBRMaterial;
  cyan: PBRMaterial;
  amber: PBRMaterial;
  red: PBRMaterial;
};

/**
 * Adds visual-only clinic dressing over the tactical proxy scene. Every mesh
 * created here is non-pickable and excluded from navigation, vision and shots.
 */
export function installClinicVisualUpgrade(
  scene: Scene,
  world: HospitalWorld,
): ClinicVisualUpgradeReport {
  const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
  if (params.get("clinicvisuals") === "0") {
    return { enabled: false, meshCount: 0, lightCount: 0, warnings: [] };
  }

  const root = new TransformNode("clinic-visual-upgrade", scene);
  const palette = createPalette(scene);
  const warnings: string[] = [];
  const beforeMeshes = scene.meshes.length;
  const beforeLights = scene.lights.length;

  configureImage(scene);
  addFloorFinish(scene, world, root, palette);
  addArchitecturalLayer(scene, world, root, palette);
  addCeilingSystem(scene, world.roomDefinitions, root, palette);
  addReceptionDressing(scene, root, palette, world);
  addIcuDressing(scene, root, palette, world);
  addServerAndUtilityDressing(scene, root, palette, world);
  addExtractionDressing(scene, root, palette, world);
  addWayfinding(scene, root, palette);
  addAtmosphericLighting(scene, root, palette, world.roomDefinitions);

  root.getChildMeshes(false).forEach((mesh) => markVisualOnly(mesh, world));

  return {
    enabled: true,
    meshCount: scene.meshes.length - beforeMeshes,
    lightCount: scene.lights.length - beforeLights,
    warnings,
  };
}

function configureImage(scene: Scene): void {
  const image = scene.imageProcessingConfiguration;
  image.toneMappingEnabled = true;
  image.toneMappingType = ImageProcessingConfiguration.TONEMAPPING_ACES;
  image.exposure = 1.08;
  image.contrast = 1.02;
  image.vignetteEnabled = true;
  image.vignetteWeight = 0.48;
  image.vignetteStretch = 0.16;
  image.vignetteColor = new Color4(0.005, 0.012, 0.018, 1);

  const glow = scene.effectLayers.find((layer) => layer.name === "ion-glow");
  if (glow && "intensity" in glow) {
    (glow as { intensity: number }).intensity = 0.14;
  }
}

function createPalette(scene: Scene): Palette {
  const neutralFloor = createTexturedMaterial(
    scene,
    "clinic-neutral-floor",
    `${import.meta.env.BASE_URL}assets/clinic-zones/utility-floor.png`,
    new Color3(0.72, 0.72, 0.71),
    6.4,
    6.4,
    0.82,
    0.04,
    0.94,
  );

  const receptionFloor = createTexturedMaterial(
    scene,
    "clinic-reception-floor",
    `${import.meta.env.BASE_URL}assets/clinic-zones/reception-floor.png`,
    new Color3(0.96, 0.95, 0.91),
    7.5,
    5.1,
    0.88,
    0.02,
    0.92,
  );

  const icuFloor = createTexturedMaterial(
    scene,
    "clinic-icu-floor",
    `${import.meta.env.BASE_URL}assets/clinic-zones/icu-floor.png`,
    new Color3(0.87, 0.93, 0.97),
    6.6,
    5.8,
    0.9,
    0.02,
    0.9,
  );

  const serverFloor = createTexturedMaterial(
    scene,
    "clinic-server-floor",
    `${import.meta.env.BASE_URL}assets/clinic-zones/server-floor.png`,
    new Color3(0.18, 0.2, 0.24),
    3.2,
    3.2,
    0.82,
    0.08,
    0.84,
  );

  const utilityFloor = createTexturedMaterial(
    scene,
    "clinic-utility-floor",
    `${import.meta.env.BASE_URL}assets/clinic-zones/utility-floor.png`,
    new Color3(0.68, 0.68, 0.67),
    5.2,
    4.8,
    0.82,
    0.02,
    0.95,
  );

  const corruptedFloor = createTexturedMaterial(
    scene,
    "clinic-corrupted-floor",
    `${import.meta.env.BASE_URL}assets/clinic-zones/corrupted-floor.png`,
    new Color3(0.35, 0.34, 0.32),
    5.0,
    4.6,
    0.92,
    0.06,
    0.98,
  );

  const paintedMetal = createTexturedMaterial(
    scene,
    "clinic-painted-metal",
    `${import.meta.env.BASE_URL}assets/clinic-textures/painted-metal-014.png`,
    new Color3(0.8, 0.79, 0.77),
    1.7,
    1.7,
    0.8,
    0.18,
    0.8,
  );

  const darkPolymer = pbr(scene, "clinic-dark-polymer", new Color3(0.22, 0.24, 0.25), 0.05, 0.82);
  const rubber = pbr(scene, "clinic-rubber", new Color3(0.08, 0.09, 0.1), 0.02, 0.96);

  const cleanPlastic = createTexturedMaterial(
    scene,
    "clinic-clean-plastic",
    `${import.meta.env.BASE_URL}assets/clinic-textures/plastic-010.png`,
    new Color3(0.92, 0.93, 0.94),
    2.6,
    2.6,
    0.74,
    0.02,
    0.48,
  );

  const ceramic = cleanPlastic.clone("clinic-ceramic");
  ceramic.albedoColor = new Color3(0.97, 0.975, 0.98);
  ceramic.roughness = 0.34;

  const fabric = pbr(scene, "clinic-fabric", new Color3(0.28, 0.38, 0.42), 0.01, 0.96);
  const glass = pbr(scene, "clinic-glass", new Color3(0.18, 0.3, 0.34), 0.04, 0.18);
  glass.alpha = 0.3;
  glass.transparencyMode = PBRMaterial.PBRMATERIAL_ALPHABLEND;
  glass.indexOfRefraction = 1.45;

  const cyan = emissive(scene, "clinic-cyan", new Color3(0.18, 0.82, 0.95), 0.26);
  const amber = emissive(scene, "clinic-amber", new Color3(1, 0.56, 0.16), 0.36);
  const red = emissive(scene, "clinic-red", new Color3(0.98, 0.13, 0.06), 0.44);
  return {
    neutralFloor,
    receptionFloor,
    icuFloor,
    serverFloor,
    utilityFloor,
    corruptedFloor,
    paintedMetal,
    darkPolymer,
    rubber,
    cleanPlastic,
    ceramic,
    fabric,
    glass,
    cyan,
    amber,
    red,
  };
}

function createTexturedMaterial(
  scene: Scene,
  name: string,
  url: string,
  color: Color3,
  uScale: number,
  vScale: number,
  level: number,
  metallic: number,
  roughness: number,
): PBRMaterial {
  const material = pbr(scene, name, color, metallic, roughness);
  applyTexture(material, scene, url, uScale, vScale, level);
  return material;
}

function applyTexture(
  material: PBRMaterial,
  scene: Scene,
  url: string,
  uScale: number,
  vScale: number,
  level = 1,
): void {
  const texture = new Texture(url, scene, true, false, Texture.TRILINEAR_SAMPLINGMODE);
  texture.uScale = uScale;
  texture.vScale = vScale;
  texture.wrapU = Texture.WRAP_ADDRESSMODE;
  texture.wrapV = Texture.WRAP_ADDRESSMODE;
  texture.level = level;
  material.albedoTexture = texture;
}

function addFloorFinish(
  scene: Scene,
  world: HospitalWorld,
  root: TransformNode,
  palette: Palette,
): void {
  const floor = MeshBuilder.CreateGround("clinic-finish-floor", { width: 37.6, height: 27.6, subdivisions: 2 }, scene);
  floor.position.y = 0.018;
  floor.parent = root;
  floor.material = palette.neutralFloor;
  floor.receiveShadows = true;
  floor.isPickable = false;

  const roomFloorMap: Record<string, PBRMaterial> = {
    entry: palette.receptionFloor,
    reception: palette.receptionFloor,
    "icu-west": palette.icuFloor,
    "icu-east": palette.icuFloor,
    server: palette.serverFloor,
  };

  world.roomDefinitions.forEach((room) => {
    const width = room.maxX - room.minX - 0.2;
    const depth = room.maxZ - room.minZ - 0.2;
    const zone = MeshBuilder.CreateGround(`clinic-room-floor:${room.id}`, {
      width,
      height: depth,
      subdivisions: 2,
    }, scene);
    zone.position.set((room.minX + room.maxX) / 2, 0.028, (room.minZ + room.maxZ) / 2);
    zone.parent = root;
    zone.material = roomFloorMap[room.id] ?? palette.neutralFloor;
    zone.receiveShadows = true;
    zone.isPickable = false;
  });

  const utilityZone = MeshBuilder.CreateGround("clinic-utility-zone", { width: 7.1, height: 6.0, subdivisions: 2 }, scene);
  utilityZone.position.set(8.55, 0.03, -10.35);
  utilityZone.parent = root;
  utilityZone.material = palette.utilityFloor;
  utilityZone.receiveShadows = true;
  utilityZone.isPickable = false;

  const corruptedZone = MeshBuilder.CreateGround("clinic-corrupted-zone", { width: 3.8, height: 3.9, subdivisions: 2 }, scene);
  corruptedZone.position.set(16.5, 0.038, -10.35);
  corruptedZone.parent = root;
  corruptedZone.material = palette.corruptedFloor;
  corruptedZone.receiveShadows = true;
  corruptedZone.isPickable = false;

  const corruptionTrail = MeshBuilder.CreateGround("clinic-corrupted-trail", { width: 2.0, height: 5.4, subdivisions: 2 }, scene);
  corruptionTrail.position.set(12.9, 0.037, -9.7);
  corruptionTrail.rotation.y = 0.18;
  corruptionTrail.parent = root;
  corruptionTrail.material = palette.corruptedFloor;
  corruptionTrail.receiveShadows = true;
  corruptionTrail.isPickable = false;

  world.groundMeshes
    .filter((mesh) => mesh.name === "hospital-floor")
    .forEach((mesh) => {
      mesh.visibility = 0.015;
    });
}

function pbr(
  scene: Scene,
  name: string,
  color: Color3,
  metallic: number,
  roughness: number,
): PBRMaterial {
  const material = new PBRMaterial(name, scene);
  material.albedoColor = color;
  material.metallic = metallic;
  material.roughness = roughness;
  return material;
}

function emissive(scene: Scene, name: string, color: Color3, strength: number): PBRMaterial {
  const material = pbr(scene, name, color.scale(0.18), 0.25, 0.34);
  material.emissiveColor = color.scale(strength);
  return material;
}

function addArchitecturalLayer(
  scene: Scene,
  world: HospitalWorld,
  root: TransformNode,
  palette: Palette,
): void {
  world.wallMeshes.forEach((wall, index) => {
    wall.computeWorldMatrix(true);
    const size = wall.getBoundingInfo().boundingBox.extendSizeWorld.scale(2);
    const alongX = size.x >= size.z;

    const panel = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`clinic-wall-panel:${index}`, {
      width: alongX ? size.x + 0.03 : 0.12,
      height: 3.52,
      depth: alongX ? 0.12 : size.z + 0.03,
    }, scene);
    panel.position.copyFrom(wall.position);
    panel.position.y = 1.76;
    panel.parent = root;
    panel.material = palette.ceramic;

    const baseboard = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`clinic-baseboard:${index}`, {
      width: size.x + 0.055,
      height: 0.19,
      depth: size.z + 0.055,
    }, scene);
    baseboard.position.set(wall.position.x, 0.1, wall.position.z);
    baseboard.parent = root;
    baseboard.material = palette.darkPolymer;

    const impactRail = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`clinic-impact-rail:${index}`, {
      width: size.x + (size.x < size.z ? 0.09 : 0),
      height: 0.11,
      depth: size.z + (size.z < size.x ? 0.09 : 0),
    }, scene);
    impactRail.position.set(wall.position.x, 1.02, wall.position.z);
    impactRail.parent = root;
    impactRail.material = index % 9 === 0 ? palette.cyan : palette.paintedMetal;
  });

  const doors = [
    { id: "entry-west", position: new Vector3(-4.2, 1.45, 0.25), yaw: Math.PI / 2, locked: false },
    { id: "icu", position: new Vector3(5.5, 1.45, 1.65), yaw: Math.PI / 2, locked: false },
    { id: "server", position: new Vector3(12.2, 1.45, -8.35), yaw: Math.PI / 2, locked: true },
  ];
  doors.forEach((door) => createDoorAssembly(scene, root, palette, door.id, door.position, door.yaw, door.locked));
}

function createDoorAssembly(
  scene: Scene,
  parent: TransformNode,
  palette: Palette,
  id: string,
  position: Vector3,
  yaw: number,
  locked: boolean,
): void {
  const doorRoot = new TransformNode(`clinic-door:${id}`, scene);
  doorRoot.position.copyFrom(position);
  doorRoot.rotation.y = yaw;
  doorRoot.parent = parent;

  const leaf = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`clinic-door-leaf:${id}`, { width: 1.48, height: 2.58, depth: 0.085 }, scene);
  leaf.parent = doorRoot;
  leaf.position.set(0.36, 0, 0.12);
  leaf.material = palette.paintedMetal;

  const window = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`clinic-door-window:${id}`, { width: 0.56, height: 0.86, depth: 0.025 }, scene);
  window.parent = doorRoot;
  window.position.set(0.34, 0.38, 0.18);
  window.material = palette.glass;

  const access = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`clinic-door-access:${id}`, { width: 0.17, height: 0.26, depth: 0.055 }, scene);
  access.parent = doorRoot;
  access.position.set(-0.58, 0.02, 0.2);
  access.material = locked ? palette.red : palette.cyan;
}

function addCeilingSystem(
  scene: Scene,
  rooms: RoomDefinition[],
  root: TransformNode,
  palette: Palette,
): void {
  const tileSource = MeshBuilder.CreateBox("clinic-ceiling-tile-source", { width: 2.05, height: 0.05, depth: 2.05 }, scene);
  tileSource.parent = root;
  tileSource.material = palette.cleanPlastic;
  tileSource.position.set(-100, -100, -100);
  tileSource.isPickable = false;

  const ceilingRoots = new Map<string, TransformNode>();

  const createFrameStrip = (
    roomRoot: TransformNode,
    name: string,
    width: number,
    depth: number,
    position: Vector3,
    material: PBRMaterial,
  ): void => {
    const strip = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(name, { width, height: 0.06, depth }, scene);
    strip.position.copyFrom(position);
    strip.parent = roomRoot;
    strip.material = material;
  };

  rooms.forEach((room) => {
    const roomRoot = new TransformNode(`clinic-ceiling-room:${room.id}`, scene);
    roomRoot.parent = root;
    ceilingRoots.set(room.id, roomRoot);

    const width = room.maxX - room.minX;
    const depth = room.maxZ - room.minZ;
    const centerX = (room.minX + room.maxX) / 2;
    const centerZ = (room.minZ + room.maxZ) / 2;

    createFrameStrip(roomRoot, `clinic-ceiling-frame-north:${room.id}`, width - 0.2, 0.08, new Vector3(centerX, 3.42, room.minZ + 0.08), palette.paintedMetal);
    createFrameStrip(roomRoot, `clinic-ceiling-frame-south:${room.id}`, width - 0.2, 0.08, new Vector3(centerX, 3.42, room.maxZ - 0.08), palette.paintedMetal);
    createFrameStrip(roomRoot, `clinic-ceiling-frame-west:${room.id}`, 0.08, depth - 0.2, new Vector3(room.minX + 0.08, 3.42, centerZ), palette.paintedMetal);
    createFrameStrip(roomRoot, `clinic-ceiling-frame-east:${room.id}`, 0.08, depth - 0.2, new Vector3(room.maxX - 0.08, 3.42, centerZ), palette.paintedMetal);

    let gx = 0;
    for (let x = room.minX + 1.25; x <= room.maxX - 1.1; x += 2.35) {
      let gz = 0;
      for (let z = room.minZ + 1.25; z <= room.maxZ - 1.1; z += 2.35) {
        const borderBand = x < room.minX + 2.9 || x > room.maxX - 2.9 || z < room.minZ + 2.9 || z > room.maxZ - 2.9;
        const pattern = (gx + gz + room.id.length) % 3 === 0;
        const damagedGap = room.id === "server"
          ? (gx + gz) % 2 === 0
          : room.id === "icu-east"
            ? (gx + gz + 1) % 5 === 0
            : room.id === "reception"
              ? (gx + gz) % 6 === 0
              : false;
        const shouldPlace = (borderBand || pattern) && !damagedGap;
        if (shouldPlace) {
          const panel = tileSource.createInstance(`clinic-ceiling:${room.id}:${gx}:${gz}`);
          panel.position.set(x, 3.46, z);
          panel.parent = roomRoot;
          panel.metadata = { visualOnly: true, roomId: room.id };
        }
        gz += 1;
      }
      gx += 1;
    }

    if (room.id === "icu-west") {
      const tray = createCableTray(scene, `${room.id}:tray`, 7.2, palette);
      tray.position.set(8.9, 3.13, -6.1);
      tray.parent = roomRoot;
      const hvac = createHvac(scene, `${room.id}:hvac`, palette);
      hvac.position.set(2.8, 2.92, -10.6);
      hvac.scaling.setAll(0.62);
      hvac.parent = roomRoot;
    }

    if (room.id === "icu-east") {
      const tray = createCableTray(scene, `${room.id}:tray`, 6.0, palette);
      tray.position.set(14.3, 3.13, 7.0);
      tray.parent = roomRoot;
    }

    if (room.id === "server") {
      const tray = createCableTray(scene, `${room.id}:tray`, 4.8, palette);
      tray.position.set(15.4, 3.13, -10.4);
      tray.parent = roomRoot;
      const hvac = createHvac(scene, `${room.id}:hvac`, palette);
      hvac.position.set(17.0, 2.96, -12.0);
      hvac.scaling.setAll(0.54);
      hvac.parent = roomRoot;
    }

    if (room.id === "reception") {
      const tray = createCableTray(scene, `${room.id}:tray`, 5.2, palette);
      tray.position.set(-10.4, 3.12, 8.5);
      tray.parent = roomRoot;
    }
  });

  const fixtures = [
    { roomId: "entry", position: new Vector3(-14.0, 3.39, -10.0), mode: "cool" },
    { roomId: "entry", position: new Vector3(-10.0, 3.39, -10.0), mode: "cool" },
    { roomId: "entry", position: new Vector3(-7.0, 3.39, -6.0), mode: "cool" },
    { roomId: "icu-west", position: new Vector3(-1.0, 3.39, -10.0), mode: "cool" },
    { roomId: "icu-west", position: new Vector3(3.0, 3.39, -10.0), mode: "failed" },
    { roomId: "icu-west", position: new Vector3(8.0, 3.39, -10.0), mode: "cool" },
    { roomId: "icu-west", position: new Vector3(8.0, 3.39, -5.0), mode: "cool" },
    { roomId: "reception", position: new Vector3(-13.0, 3.39, 6.0), mode: "cool" },
    { roomId: "reception", position: new Vector3(-8.0, 3.39, 6.0), mode: "cool" },
    { roomId: "reception", position: new Vector3(-2.0, 3.39, 7.0), mode: "failed" },
    { roomId: "icu-east", position: new Vector3(7.0, 3.39, 7.0), mode: "cool" },
    { roomId: "icu-east", position: new Vector3(14.5, 3.39, 6.0), mode: "cool" },
    { roomId: "server", position: new Vector3(15.0, 3.39, -10.0), mode: "amber" },
  ] as const;
  const flickerLights: PointLight[] = [];
  fixtures.forEach((fixtureDef, index) => {
    const roomRoot = ceilingRoots.get(fixtureDef.roomId);
    if (!roomRoot) return;
    const fixture = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`clinic-practical:${index}`, { width: 1.6, height: 0.07, depth: 0.34 }, scene);
    fixture.position.copyFrom(fixtureDef.position);
    fixture.parent = roomRoot;
    fixture.material = fixtureDef.mode === "amber"
      ? palette.amber
      : fixtureDef.mode === "failed"
        ? palette.darkPolymer
        : palette.cleanPlastic;

    if (fixtureDef.mode !== "failed") {
      const light = new PointLight(`clinic-practical-light:${index}`, fixtureDef.position.add(new Vector3(0, -0.24, 0)), scene);
      light.parent = roomRoot;
      light.diffuse = fixtureDef.mode === "amber" ? new Color3(1, 0.56, 0.24) : new Color3(0.75, 0.84, 0.86);
      light.intensity = fixtureDef.mode === "amber" ? 3.2 : 4.6;
      light.range = 8.8;
      if (index === 5 || index === 11) flickerLights.push(light);
    }
  });

  scene.onBeforeRenderObservable.add(() => {
    rooms.forEach((room) => {
      const visible = room.roofMesh.isEnabled();
      ceilingRoots.get(room.id)?.setEnabled(visible);
    });
  });

  if (flickerLights.length > 0) {
    scene.onBeforeRenderObservable.add(() => {
      const t = performance.now() * 0.001;
      flickerLights.forEach((light, index) => {
        const interruption = Math.sin(t * (8.7 + index)) > 0.94 ? 0.3 : 1;
        light.intensity = (3.1 + Math.sin(t * 2.1 + index) * 0.25) * interruption;
      });
    });
  }
}

function addReceptionDressing(
  scene: Scene,
  root: TransformNode,
  palette: Palette,
  world: HospitalWorld,
): void {
  const chairPositions = [
    [-16, -0.6, Math.PI / 2], [-16, 1.0, Math.PI / 2], [-16, 2.6, Math.PI / 2],
    [-12.8, 3.3, Math.PI], [-11.2, 3.3, Math.PI], [-9.6, 3.3, Math.PI],
  ] as const;
  chairPositions.forEach(([x, z, yaw], index) => {
    const chair = createChair(scene, `waiting:${index}`, palette);
    chair.position.set(x, 0, z);
    chair.rotation.y = yaw;
    chair.parent = root;
  });

  for (let index = 0; index < 3; index += 1) {
    const cabinet = createCabinet(scene, `reception:${index}`, palette);
    cabinet.position.set(-15.8 + index * 1.35, 0, -12.8);
    cabinet.parent = root;
  }

  const queuePostPositions = [
    [-15.2, -6.5], [-12.6, -6.5], [-15.2, -8.3], [-12.6, -8.3],
  ] as const;
  queuePostPositions.forEach(([x, z], index) => {
    const post = createQueuePost(scene, `queue:${index}`, palette);
    post.position.set(x, 0, z);
    post.parent = root;
  });

  const logo = createSign(scene, "ION CLINIC // PRAGUE", new Color3(0.55, 0.92, 0.96), 1024, 192);
  logo.position.set(-10.5, 2.65, -13.68);
  logo.rotation.y = Math.PI;
  logo.scaling.set(4.8, 0.9, 1);
  logo.parent = root;
  markVisualOnly(logo, world);
}

function addIcuDressing(
  scene: Scene,
  root: TransformNode,
  palette: Palette,
  world: HospitalWorld,
): void {
  const beds = scene.meshes.filter((mesh) => /^bed-\d+$/.test(mesh.name));
  beds.forEach((bed, index) => {
    const mattress = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`clinic-mattress:${index}`, { width: 1.28, height: 0.16, depth: 2.22 }, scene);
    mattress.position.copyFrom(bed.position.add(new Vector3(0, 0.42, 0)));
    mattress.parent = root;
    mattress.material = palette.fabric;

    const pillow = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`clinic-pillow:${index}`, { width: 0.78, height: 0.15, depth: 0.42 }, scene);
    pillow.position.copyFrom(bed.position.add(new Vector3(0, 0.58, -0.72)));
    pillow.parent = root;
    pillow.material = palette.ceramic;

    [-0.72, 0.72].forEach((xOffset, railIndex) => {
      const rail = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`clinic-bed-rail:${index}:${railIndex}`, { width: 0.045, height: 0.28, depth: 1.75 }, scene);
      rail.position.copyFrom(bed.position.add(new Vector3(xOffset, 0.7, 0.04)));
      rail.parent = root;
      rail.material = palette.paintedMetal;
    });

    const iv = createIvStand(scene, `icu:${index}`, palette);
    iv.position.copyFrom(bed.position.add(new Vector3(index < 2 ? 1.02 : -1.02, -0.42, 0.55)));
    iv.parent = root;

    const cart = createMedicalCart(scene, `icu:${index}`, palette);
    cart.position.copyFrom(bed.position.add(new Vector3(index < 2 ? -1.35 : 1.35, -0.42, 0.72)));
    cart.parent = root;
  });

  const curtainDefinitions = [
    { x: 6.45, z: -8.2, length: 5.8, yaw: 0 },
    { x: 16.9, z: 6.0, length: 7.0, yaw: 0 },
  ];
  curtainDefinitions.forEach((definition, index) => {
    const curtain = createPrivacyCurtain(scene, `icu:${index}`, definition.length, palette);
    curtain.position.set(definition.x, 0, definition.z);
    curtain.rotation.y = definition.yaw;
    curtain.parent = root;
  });

  const medicalSign = createSign(scene, "ICU // ISOLATION", new Color3(0.54, 0.94, 0.83), 768, 160);
  medicalSign.position.set(5.72, 2.52, -1.4);
  medicalSign.rotation.y = Math.PI / 2;
  medicalSign.scaling.set(2.3, 0.55, 1);
  medicalSign.parent = root;
  markVisualOnly(medicalSign, world);
}

function addServerAndUtilityDressing(
  scene: Scene,
  root: TransformNode,
  palette: Palette,
  world: HospitalWorld,
): void {
  const hasMegakitCableTrays = scene.meshes.some((mesh) => mesh.metadata?.megakitAssetId === "top-cables");
  if (!hasMegakitCableTrays) {
    const pipeRuns = [
      { position: new Vector3(16.6, 3.0, -10.3), yaw: 0, length: 4.2 },
      { position: new Vector3(14.6, 3.0, -7.9), yaw: Math.PI / 2, length: 3.6 },
      { position: new Vector3(-0.8, 3.0, -11.3), yaw: Math.PI / 2, length: 6.0 },
    ];
    pipeRuns.forEach((definition, index) => {
      const tray = createCableTray(scene, `tray:${index}`, definition.length, palette);
      tray.position.copyFrom(definition.position);
      tray.rotation.y = definition.yaw;
      tray.parent = root;
    });
  }

  for (let index = 0; index < 3; index += 1) {
    const power = createPowerCabinet(scene, `power:${index}`, palette, index === 1);
    power.position.set(13.1 + index * 1.55, 0, -13.1);
    power.parent = root;
  }

  const workbench = MeshBuilder.CreateBox("clinic-utility-workbench", { width: 3.2, height: 0.82, depth: 0.8 }, scene);
  workbench.position.set(-0.5, 0.41, -11.4);
  workbench.parent = root;
  workbench.material = palette.paintedMetal;

  const serverSign = createSign(scene, "SERVER // AUTHORIZED PERSONNEL", new Color3(1, 0.52, 0.16), 1024, 160);
  serverSign.position.set(12.45, 2.5, -10.4);
  serverSign.rotation.y = -Math.PI / 2;
  serverSign.scaling.set(2.45, 0.48, 1);
  serverSign.parent = root;
  markVisualOnly(serverSign, world);
}

function addExtractionDressing(
  scene: Scene,
  root: TransformNode,
  palette: Palette,
  world: HospitalWorld,
): void {
  const center = world.extractionCenter;
  const railDefinitions = [
    { position: center.add(new Vector3(-3.35, 0, 0)), scale: new Vector3(0.1, 1, 6.2) },
    { position: center.add(new Vector3(3.35, 0, 0)), scale: new Vector3(0.1, 1, 6.2) },
    { position: center.add(new Vector3(0, 0, 3.35)), scale: new Vector3(6.2, 1, 0.1) },
  ];
  const hasMegakitRails = scene.meshes.some((mesh) => mesh.metadata?.megakitAssetId === "rail-4");
  if (!hasMegakitRails) {
    railDefinitions.forEach((definition, index) => {
      const rail = createSafetyRail(scene, `extract:${index}`, definition.scale, palette);
      rail.position.copyFrom(definition.position);
      rail.parent = root;
    });
  }

  const hvacA = createHvac(scene, "extract:a", palette);
  hvacA.position.copyFrom(center.add(new Vector3(4.2, 0, -3.8)));
  hvacA.parent = root;
  const hvacB = createHvac(scene, "extract:b", palette);
  hvacB.position.copyFrom(center.add(new Vector3(-4.6, 0, 3.5)));
  hvacB.rotation.y = Math.PI / 2;
  hvacB.parent = root;

  const beaconPositions = [new Vector3(-2.6, 0, -2.6), new Vector3(2.6, 0, -2.6), new Vector3(-2.6, 0, 2.6), new Vector3(2.6, 0, 2.6)];
  beaconPositions.forEach((offset, index) => {
    const beacon = MeshBuilder.CreateCylinder(`clinic-extraction-beacon:${index}`, { height: 0.28, diameter: 0.18, tessellation: 12 }, scene);
    beacon.position.copyFrom(center.add(offset).add(new Vector3(0, 0.14, 0)));
    beacon.parent = root;
    beacon.material = palette.amber;
  });
}

function addWayfinding(scene: Scene, root: TransformNode, palette: Palette): void {
  const stripes = [
    { position: new Vector3(-4.0, 0.025, -7.5), size: new Vector3(0.12, 0.02, 8.0), material: palette.cyan },
    { position: new Vector3(5.25, 0.025, -6.3), size: new Vector3(0.12, 0.02, 9.0), material: palette.cyan },
    { position: new Vector3(12.0, 0.027, -9.6), size: new Vector3(0.15, 0.02, 5.0), material: palette.amber },
  ];
  stripes.forEach((definition, index) => {
    const stripe = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`clinic-wayfinding:${index}`, {
      width: definition.size.x,
      height: definition.size.y,
      depth: definition.size.z,
    }, scene);
    stripe.position.copyFrom(definition.position);
    stripe.parent = root;
    stripe.material = definition.material;
  });
}

function addAtmosphericLighting(
  scene: Scene,
  root: TransformNode,
  palette: Palette,
  rooms: RoomDefinition[],
): void {
  const fillDefinitions = [
    { roomId: "entry", position: new Vector3(-11.5, 2.25, -7.6), color: new Color3(0.74, 0.76, 0.78), intensity: 0.9, range: 10.5 },
    { roomId: "reception", position: new Vector3(-9.2, 2.4, 7.0), color: new Color3(0.88, 0.84, 0.78), intensity: 1.05, range: 12.0 },
    { roomId: "icu-west", position: new Vector3(4.4, 2.4, -7.8), color: new Color3(0.76, 0.84, 0.88), intensity: 1.05, range: 12.0 },
    { roomId: "icu-east", position: new Vector3(12.2, 2.4, 7.2), color: new Color3(0.76, 0.84, 0.9), intensity: 1.0, range: 11.6 },
    { roomId: "server", position: new Vector3(15.8, 2.2, -10.2), color: new Color3(0.44, 0.48, 0.6), intensity: 0.78, range: 7.4 },
  ] as const;

  const roomLightRoots = new Map<string, TransformNode>();
  rooms.forEach((room) => {
    const lightRoot = new TransformNode(`clinic-room-light-root:${room.id}`, scene);
    lightRoot.parent = root;
    roomLightRoots.set(room.id, lightRoot);
  });

  fillDefinitions.forEach((definition, index) => {
    const light = new PointLight(`clinic-fill-light:${index}`, definition.position, scene);
    light.diffuse = definition.color;
    light.intensity = definition.intensity;
    light.range = definition.range;
    light.parent = roomLightRoots.get(definition.roomId) ?? root;
  });

  const emergencyPositions = [
    new Vector3(11.4, 2.15, -8.4),
    new Vector3(17.3, 2.15, -12.5),
  ];
  emergencyPositions.forEach((position, index) => {
    const housing = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`clinic-emergency-light:${index}`, { width: 0.26, height: 0.18, depth: 0.12 }, scene);
    housing.position.copyFrom(position);
    housing.parent = root;
    housing.material = palette.red;
    housing.isPickable = false;
    housing.metadata = { visualOnly: true };
    const light = new PointLight(`clinic-emergency-point:${index}`, position.add(new Vector3(0, -0.25, 0)), scene);
    light.diffuse = new Color3(1, 0.12, 0.04);
    light.intensity = 1.3;
    light.range = 4.6;
    light.parent = root;
  });
}

function createChair(scene: Scene, id: string, palette: Palette): TransformNode {
  const root = new TransformNode(`clinic-chair:${id}`, scene);
  const seat = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`clinic-chair-seat:${id}`, { width: 0.72, height: 0.12, depth: 0.66 }, scene);
  seat.position.y = 0.48;
  seat.parent = root;
  seat.material = palette.fabric;
  const back = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`clinic-chair-back:${id}`, { width: 0.72, height: 0.76, depth: 0.1 }, scene);
  back.position.set(0, 0.88, -0.29);
  back.rotation.x = -0.08;
  back.parent = root;
  back.material = palette.fabric;
  [-0.28, 0.28].forEach((x) => {
    [-0.22, 0.22].forEach((z) => {
      const leg = MeshBuilder.CreateCylinder(`clinic-chair-leg:${id}:${x}:${z}`, { height: 0.46, diameter: 0.055, tessellation: 8 }, scene);
      leg.position.set(x, 0.23, z);
      leg.parent = root;
      leg.material = palette.paintedMetal;
    });
  });
  return root;
}

function createCabinet(scene: Scene, id: string, palette: Palette): TransformNode {
  const root = new TransformNode(`clinic-cabinet:${id}`, scene);
  const body = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`clinic-cabinet-body:${id}`, { width: 1.15, height: 1.85, depth: 0.46 }, scene);
  body.position.y = 0.925;
  body.parent = root;
  body.material = palette.paintedMetal;
  for (let row = 0; row < 4; row += 1) {
    const seam = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`clinic-cabinet-seam:${id}:${row}`, { width: 1.0, height: 0.018, depth: 0.018 }, scene);
    seam.position.set(0, 0.35 + row * 0.38, -0.24);
    seam.parent = root;
    seam.material = palette.darkPolymer;
  }
  return root;
}

function createQueuePost(scene: Scene, id: string, palette: Palette): TransformNode {
  const root = new TransformNode(`clinic-queue-post:${id}`, scene);
  const pole = MeshBuilder.CreateCylinder(`clinic-queue-pole:${id}`, { height: 0.95, diameter: 0.065, tessellation: 10 }, scene);
  pole.position.y = 0.49;
  pole.parent = root;
  pole.material = palette.paintedMetal;
  const base = MeshBuilder.CreateCylinder(`clinic-queue-base:${id}`, { height: 0.06, diameter: 0.4, tessellation: 18 }, scene);
  base.position.y = 0.03;
  base.parent = root;
  base.material = palette.darkPolymer;
  return root;
}

function createIvStand(scene: Scene, id: string, palette: Palette): TransformNode {
  const root = new TransformNode(`clinic-iv:${id}`, scene);
  const pole = MeshBuilder.CreateCylinder(`clinic-iv-pole:${id}`, { height: 1.75, diameter: 0.035, tessellation: 8 }, scene);
  pole.position.y = 0.9;
  pole.parent = root;
  pole.material = palette.paintedMetal;
  const base = MeshBuilder.CreateCylinder(`clinic-iv-base:${id}`, { height: 0.05, diameter: 0.5, tessellation: 12 }, scene);
  base.position.y = 0.025;
  base.parent = root;
  base.material = palette.darkPolymer;
  [-0.11, 0.11].forEach((x, index) => {
    const bag = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`clinic-iv-bag:${id}:${index}`, { width: 0.17, height: 0.3, depth: 0.055 }, scene);
    bag.position.set(x, 1.62, 0);
    bag.parent = root;
    bag.material = index === 0 ? palette.glass : palette.cyan;
  });
  return root;
}

function createMedicalCart(scene: Scene, id: string, palette: Palette): TransformNode {
  const root = new TransformNode(`clinic-medical-cart:${id}`, scene);
  const body = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`clinic-medical-cart-body:${id}`, { width: 0.75, height: 0.68, depth: 0.54 }, scene);
  body.position.y = 0.52;
  body.parent = root;
  body.material = palette.ceramic;
  const top = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`clinic-medical-cart-top:${id}`, { width: 0.82, height: 0.07, depth: 0.62 }, scene);
  top.position.y = 0.895;
  top.parent = root;
  top.material = palette.darkPolymer;
  [-0.29, 0.29].forEach((x) => {
    [-0.18, 0.18].forEach((z) => {
      const wheel = MeshBuilder.CreateCylinder(`clinic-medical-cart-wheel:${id}:${x}:${z}`, { height: 0.05, diameter: 0.12, tessellation: 10 }, scene);
      wheel.rotation.z = Math.PI / 2;
      wheel.position.set(x, 0.1, z);
      wheel.parent = root;
      wheel.material = palette.rubber;
    });
  });
  return root;
}

function createPrivacyCurtain(scene: Scene, id: string, length: number, palette: Palette): TransformNode {
  const root = new TransformNode(`clinic-curtain:${id}`, scene);
  const track = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`clinic-curtain-track:${id}`, { width: 0.07, height: 0.07, depth: length }, scene);
  track.position.y = 3.15;
  track.parent = root;
  track.material = palette.paintedMetal;
  for (let segment = 0; segment < Math.floor(length / 0.7); segment += 1) {
    const panel = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`clinic-curtain-panel:${id}:${segment}`, { width: 0.025, height: 2.25, depth: 0.62 }, scene);
    panel.position.set(Math.sin(segment * 1.9) * 0.055, 1.95, -length / 2 + 0.45 + segment * 0.7);
    panel.parent = root;
    panel.material = palette.fabric;
  }
  return root;
}

function createCableTray(scene: Scene, id: string, length: number, palette: Palette): TransformNode {
  const root = new TransformNode(`clinic-cable-tray:${id}`, scene);
  const railA = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`clinic-cable-tray-a:${id}`, { width: 0.05, height: 0.12, depth: length }, scene);
  railA.position.x = -0.22;
  railA.parent = root;
  railA.material = palette.paintedMetal;
  const railB = railA.clone(`clinic-cable-tray-b:${id}`);
  railB.position.x = 0.22;
  railB.parent = root;
  for (let index = 0; index < Math.floor(length / 0.35); index += 1) {
    const cable = MeshBuilder.CreateCylinder(`clinic-cable:${id}:${index}`, { height: length, diameter: 0.025, tessellation: 6 }, scene);
    cable.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2;
    cable.position.x = -0.16 + (index % 6) * 0.06;
    cable.parent = root;
    cable.material = index % 5 === 0 ? palette.amber : palette.rubber;
  }
  return root;
}

function createPowerCabinet(scene: Scene, id: string, palette: Palette, warning: boolean): TransformNode {
  const root = new TransformNode(`clinic-power:${id}`, scene);
  const body = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`clinic-power-body:${id}`, { width: 1.25, height: 1.9, depth: 0.45 }, scene);
  body.position.y = 0.95;
  body.parent = root;
  body.material = palette.paintedMetal;
  for (let row = 0; row < 5; row += 1) {
    const breaker = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`clinic-breaker:${id}:${row}`, { width: 0.68, height: 0.13, depth: 0.05 }, scene);
    breaker.position.set(0, 0.44 + row * 0.27, -0.25);
    breaker.parent = root;
    breaker.material = warning && row === 3 ? palette.red : palette.darkPolymer;
  }
  return root;
}

function createSafetyRail(scene: Scene, id: string, scale: Vector3, palette: Palette): TransformNode {
  const root = new TransformNode(`clinic-rail:${id}`, scene);
  const horizontalLength = Math.max(scale.x, scale.z);
  const alongX = scale.x > scale.z;
  [0.55, 1.05].forEach((height, index) => {
    const bar = MeshBuilder.CreateCylinder(`clinic-rail-bar:${id}:${index}`, { height: horizontalLength, diameter: 0.055, tessellation: 10 }, scene);
    bar.rotation.z = alongX ? Math.PI / 2 : 0;
    bar.rotation.x = alongX ? 0 : Math.PI / 2;
    bar.position.y = height;
    bar.parent = root;
    bar.material = palette.paintedMetal;
  });
  const posts = Math.max(2, Math.floor(horizontalLength / 1.35));
  for (let index = 0; index <= posts; index += 1) {
    const post = MeshBuilder.CreateCylinder(`clinic-rail-post:${id}:${index}`, { height: 1.1, diameter: 0.065, tessellation: 10 }, scene);
    const offset = -horizontalLength / 2 + (index / posts) * horizontalLength;
    post.position.set(alongX ? offset : 0, 0.55, alongX ? 0 : offset);
    post.parent = root;
    post.material = palette.paintedMetal;
  }
  return root;
}

function createHvac(scene: Scene, id: string, palette: Palette): TransformNode {
  const root = new TransformNode(`clinic-hvac:${id}`, scene);
  const body = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`clinic-hvac-body:${id}`, { width: 2.1, height: 1.15, depth: 1.4 }, scene);
  body.position.y = 0.575;
  body.parent = root;
  body.material = palette.paintedMetal;
  const fan = MeshBuilder.CreateTorus(`clinic-hvac-fan:${id}`, { diameter: 0.72, thickness: 0.08, tessellation: 24 }, scene);
  fan.position.set(0, 0.64, -0.72);
  fan.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2;
  fan.parent = root;
  fan.material = palette.darkPolymer;
  for (let index = -3; index <= 3; index += 1) {
    const grille = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`clinic-hvac-grille:${id}:${index}`, { width: 1.6, height: 0.035, depth: 0.035 }, scene);
    grille.position.set(0, 0.58 + index * 0.1, -0.72);
    grille.parent = root;
    grille.material = palette.darkPolymer;
  }
  return root;
}

function createSign(
  scene: Scene,
  text: string,
  color: Color3,
  width: number,
  height: number,
): Mesh {
  const plane = MeshBuilder.CreatePlane(`clinic-sign:${text}`, { width: 1, height: height / width }, scene);
  const texture = new DynamicTexture(`clinic-sign-texture:${text}`, { width, height }, scene, false);
  texture.hasAlpha = true;
  const context = texture.getContext() as unknown as CanvasRenderingContext2D;
  context.clearRect(0, 0, width, height);
  context.fillStyle = "rgba(3, 12, 17, .88)";
  context.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);
  context.strokeStyle = color.toHexString();
  context.lineWidth = 6;
  context.strokeRect(3, 3, width - 6, height - 6);
  context.fillStyle = color.toHexString();
  context.font = `800 ${Math.floor(height * 0.34)}px system-ui`;
  context.textAlign = "center";
  context.textBaseline = "middle";
  context.fillText(text, width / 2, height / 2);
  texture.update();

  const material = new StandardMaterial(`clinic-sign-material:${text}`, scene);
  material.diffuseTexture = texture;
  material.emissiveTexture = texture;
  material.opacityTexture = texture;
  material.disableLighting = true;
  material.backFaceCulling = false;
  plane.material = material;
  plane.isPickable = false;
  return plane;
}

function markVisualOnly(mesh: AbstractMesh, world: HospitalWorld): void {
  mesh.isPickable = false;
  mesh.metadata = { ...(mesh.metadata ?? {}), visualOnly: true };
  mesh.receiveShadows = true;
  if (mesh instanceof Mesh && shouldCastShadow(mesh)) world.shadowGenerator.addShadowCaster(mesh);
}

function shouldCastShadow(mesh: Mesh): boolean {
  return !mesh.name.includes("sign")
    && !mesh.name.includes("wayfinding")
    && !mesh.name.includes("ceiling")
    && !mesh.name.includes("glass")
    && mesh.getTotalVertices() < 25_000;
}

// ===== src/world/HospitalPrototype.ts =====
import {
  Color3,
  Color4,
  GlowLayer,
  HemisphericLight,
  Mesh,
  MeshBuilder,
  PointLight,
  ShadowGenerator,
  StandardMaterial,
  Vector3,
  Scene,
} from "@babylonjs/core";
import type { EnemyDefinition } from "../entities/Enemy";
import type { DoorDefinition } from "./WorldTypes";
import type {
  CoverPointDefinition,
  HospitalWorld,
  RoomDefinition,
  SecuritySensorDefinition,
} from "./WorldTypes";

export function createHospitalPrototype(scene: Scene): HospitalWorld {
  scene.clearColor = new Color4(0.012, 0.027, 0.035, 1);
  scene.fogMode = Scene.FOGMODE_EXP2;
  scene.fogDensity = 0.009;
  scene.fogColor = new Color3(0.015, 0.035, 0.045);

  const glow = new GlowLayer("ion-glow", scene, { blurKernelSize: 22 });
  glow.intensity = 0.28;

  const ambient = new HemisphericLight("ambient", new Vector3(0.2, 1, -0.1), scene);
  ambient.intensity = 0.56;
  ambient.diffuse = new Color3(0.48, 0.65, 0.75);
  ambient.groundColor = new Color3(0.015, 0.025, 0.032);

  const key = new PointLight("key", new Vector3(-7, 11, -3), scene);
  key.diffuse = new Color3(0.62, 0.78, 0.86);
  key.intensity = 22;
  key.range = 32;
  const shadowGenerator = new ShadowGenerator(1024, key);

  const practicalLights = [
    { name: "reception-practical", position: new Vector3(-10, 3.2, -4), color: new Color3(0.74, 0.86, 0.9), intensity: 10.5 },
    { name: "icu-practical", position: new Vector3(8.5, 3.1, -6), color: new Color3(0.66, 0.8, 0.76), intensity: 9 },
    { name: "server-practical", position: new Vector3(15, 2.8, 7), color: new Color3(0.24, 0.52, 0.72), intensity: 7.5 },
    { name: "utility-practical", position: new Vector3(14, 2.8, -10.5), color: new Color3(0.92, 0.52, 0.24), intensity: 5.5 },
  ];
  practicalLights.forEach((definition) => {
    const light = new PointLight(definition.name, definition.position, scene);
    light.diffuse = definition.color;
    light.intensity = definition.intensity;
    light.range = 10;
  });
  shadowGenerator.useBlurExponentialShadowMap = true;
  shadowGenerator.blurKernel = 18;

  const floorMaterial = material(scene, "floor-mat", new Color3(0.1, 0.13, 0.135));
  floorMaterial.specularColor = new Color3(0.12, 0.2, 0.22);
  const wallMaterial = material(scene, "wall-mat", new Color3(0.16, 0.19, 0.195));
  const trimMaterial = material(scene, "trim-mat", new Color3(0.025, 0.045, 0.052));
  trimMaterial.emissiveColor = new Color3(0.01, 0.03, 0.035);
  const cyanMaterial = material(scene, "cyan-emissive", new Color3(0.03, 0.15, 0.18));
  cyanMaterial.emissiveColor = new Color3(0.025, 0.34, 0.44);
  const redMaterial = material(scene, "echo-emissive", new Color3(0.14, 0.025, 0.018));
  redMaterial.emissiveColor = new Color3(0.92, 0.08, 0.025);

  const navMeshes: Mesh[] = [];
  const groundMeshes: Mesh[] = [];
  const wallMeshes: Mesh[] = [];
  const coverDefinitions: CoverPointDefinition[] = [];
  const doorDefinitions: DoorDefinition[] = [];

  const floor = MeshBuilder.CreateGround("hospital-floor", { width: 38, height: 28, subdivisions: 2 }, scene);
  floor.material = floorMaterial;
  floor.receiveShadows = true;
  floor.isPickable = true;
  floor.metadata = { groundPickable: true };
  navMeshes.push(floor);
  groundMeshes.push(floor);

  const foundation = MeshBuilder.CreateBox("foundation", { width: 39, height: 0.6, depth: 29 }, scene);
  foundation.position.y = -0.34;
  foundation.material = trimMaterial;
  foundation.isPickable = false;

  const wallSpecs: Array<[number, number, number, number]> = [
    [0, -14, 38, 0.55], [0, 14, 38, 0.55], [-19, 0, 0.55, 28], [19, 0, 0.55, 28],
    [-4.2, -7.2, 0.45, 13.6], [-4.2, 8.8, 0.45, 7.6],
    [5.5, -4.1, 0.45, 9.5], [5.5, 9.7, 0.45, 8.1],
    [12.2, 1.0, 0.45, 17.0],
    [-11.6, 1.8, 14.8, 0.45], [1.0, 1.8, 10.0, 0.45], [15.6, -7.0, 6.5, 0.45],
  ];

  wallSpecs.forEach(([x, z, width, depth], index) => {
    const wall = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`wall-${index}`, { width, height: 3.8, depth }, scene);
    wall.position.set(x, 1.9, z);
    wall.material = wallMaterial.clone(`wall-mat-${index}`);
    wall.receiveShadows = true;
    wall.isPickable = true;
    wall.metadata = { obstacle: true, blocksVision: true, blocksShots: true, cameraOccluder: true };
    navMeshes.push(wall);
    wallMeshes.push(wall);
    shadowGenerator.addShadowCaster(wall);

    const trim = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`wall-trim-${index}`, {
      width: width + (width > depth ? 0 : 0.08),
      height: 0.16,
      depth: depth + (depth > width ? 0 : 0.08),
    }, scene);
    trim.position.set(x, 0.18, z);
    trim.material = cyanMaterial;
    trim.visibility = index % 3 === 0 ? 0.42 : 0.16;
    trim.isPickable = false;
  });

  const doorFrames = [
    { id: "reception-door", label: "reception security door", position: new Vector3(-4.2, 1.5, 0.25), locked: false },
    { id: "icu-door", label: "ICU pressure door", position: new Vector3(5.5, 1.5, 1.65), locked: true },
    { id: "server-door", label: "server-room blast door", position: new Vector3(12.2, 1.5, -8.35), locked: true },
  ];
  doorFrames.forEach((definition, index) => {
    const frame = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`door-frame-${index}`, { width: 0.65, height: 3, depth: 2.0 }, scene);
    frame.position.copyFrom(definition.position);
    frame.material = trimMaterial;
    frame.isPickable = false;

    const leaf = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`door-leaf:${definition.id}`, { width: 0.18, height: 2.65, depth: 1.62 }, scene);
    leaf.position.copyFrom(definition.position);
    leaf.material = trimMaterial.clone(`door-material:${definition.id}`);
    leaf.receiveShadows = true;
    leaf.isPickable = true;
    shadowGenerator.addShadowCaster(leaf);
    wallMeshes.push(leaf);
    doorDefinitions.push({
      id: definition.id,
      label: definition.label,
      mesh: leaf,
      position: definition.position.clone(),
      openPosition: definition.position.add(new Vector3(0.74, 0, 0.72)),
      interactionPoints: [
        definition.position.add(new Vector3(0, -1.5, -1.25)),
        definition.position.add(new Vector3(0, -1.5, 1.25)),
      ],
      closedYaw: 0,
      openYaw: Math.PI / 2,
      initialState: definition.locked ? "locked" : "closed",
    });
  });

  const receptionDesk = addReceptionDesk(scene, shadowGenerator, cyanMaterial, trimMaterial);
  navMeshes.push(receptionDesk);
  coverDefinitions.push(
    cover("reception-north", new Vector3(-10.5, 0, -3.75), new Vector3(0, 0, 1), "high"),
    cover("reception-south", new Vector3(-10.5, 0, -5.85), new Vector3(0, 0, -1), "high"),
    cover("reception-west", new Vector3(-13.55, 0, -4.8), new Vector3(-1, 0, 0), "high"),
    cover("reception-east", new Vector3(-7.45, 0, -4.8), new Vector3(1, 0, 0), "high"),
  );

  const bedMeshes = addHospitalBeds(scene, shadowGenerator, wallMaterial, cyanMaterial);
  navMeshes.push(...bedMeshes);
  bedMeshes.forEach((bed, index) => {
    const normal = index < 2 ? new Vector3(-1, 0, 0) : new Vector3(1, 0, 0);
    const offset = normal.scale(1.25);
    coverDefinitions.push(cover(`bed-${index}-cover`, bed.position.add(offset), normal, "low"));
  });

  const racks = addServerRoom(scene, shadowGenerator, trimMaterial, cyanMaterial);
  navMeshes.push(...racks);
  racks.forEach((rack, index) => {
    coverDefinitions.push(cover(`server-${index}-cover`, rack.position.add(new Vector3(-1.05, 0, 0)), new Vector3(-1, 0, 0), "high"));
  });

  addLowCover(scene, navMeshes, coverDefinitions, shadowGenerator, trimMaterial);
  addSecurityCamera(scene, redMaterial);
  addFloorGrid(scene, cyanMaterial);
  const investigation = addInvestigationScene(scene, cyanMaterial, redMaterial, trimMaterial);

  const objectiveCenter = new Vector3(-9.5, 0.08, -0.3);
  const objectiveRing = MeshBuilder.CreateTorus("objective-ring", {
    diameter: 3.4,
    thickness: 0.075,
    tessellation: 64,
  }, scene);
  objectiveRing.position.copyFrom(objectiveCenter);
  objectiveRing.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2;
  const objectiveMaterial = cyanMaterial.clone("objective-amber-material");
  objectiveMaterial.emissiveColor = new Color3(0.92, 0.56, 0.12);
  objectiveMaterial.diffuseColor = new Color3(0.14, 0.075, 0.015);
  objectiveMaterial.alpha = 0.78;
  objectiveRing.material = objectiveMaterial;
  objectiveRing.isPickable = false;

  const objectiveInner = MeshBuilder.CreateCylinder("objective-inner", {
    diameter: 2.9,
    height: 0.025,
    tessellation: 64,
  }, scene);
  objectiveInner.position.copyFrom(objectiveCenter);
  objectiveInner.position.y = 0.04;
  objectiveInner.material = objectiveMaterial;
  objectiveInner.visibility = 0.035;
  objectiveInner.isPickable = false;

  scene.onBeforeRenderObservable.add(() => {
    const time = performance.now() * 0.001;
    objectiveRing.scaling.setAll(1 + Math.sin(time * 2.2) * 0.035);
    objectiveRing.rotation.y += 0.002;
  });

  const extractionCenter = new Vector3(-13.7, 0.08, 10.6);
  const extractionPad = MeshBuilder.CreateCylinder("extraction-pad", { diameter: 5.4, height: 0.035, tessellation: 64 }, scene);
  extractionPad.position.copyFrom(extractionCenter);
  extractionPad.position.y = 0.03;
  extractionPad.material = trimMaterial;
  extractionPad.isPickable = true;
  extractionPad.metadata = { groundPickable: true };

  const extractionRing = MeshBuilder.CreateTorus("extraction-ring", { diameter: 5.0, thickness: 0.11, tessellation: 64 }, scene);
  extractionRing.position.copyFrom(extractionCenter);
  extractionRing.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2;
  extractionRing.material = cyanMaterial.clone("extraction-ring-material");
  if (extractionRing.material instanceof StandardMaterial) {
    extractionRing.material.emissiveColor = new Color3(1, 0.67, 0.18);
    extractionRing.material.diffuseColor = new Color3(0.15, 0.09, 0.02);
  }
  extractionRing.isPickable = false;
  extractionRing.setEnabled(false);
  scene.onBeforeRenderObservable.add(() => {
    const active = Boolean(scene.metadata?.extractionActive);
    extractionRing.setEnabled(active);
    extractionPad.visibility = active ? 0.58 : 0.12;
    if (active) {
      extractionRing.rotation.y += 0.005;
      extractionRing.scaling.setAll(1 + Math.sin(performance.now() * 0.003) * 0.04);
    }
  });

  const roomDefinitions = createRooms(scene);
  const enemyDefinitions = createEnemies();
  const securitySensors: SecuritySensorDefinition[] = [
    {
      id: "camera-icu",
      position: new Vector3(8.8, 2.65, -2.7),
      yaw: Math.PI,
      range: 9,
      fovRadians: Math.PI * 0.42,
    },
  ];

  return {
    shadowGenerator,
    navMeshes,
    groundMeshes,
    wallMeshes,
    objectiveCenter,
    extractionCenter,
    coverDefinitions,
    roomDefinitions,
    enemyDefinitions,
    securitySensors,
    doorDefinitions,
    interactables: investigation.interactables,
    evidenceDefinitions: investigation.evidenceDefinitions,
  };
}

function material(scene: Scene, name: string, diffuse: Color3): StandardMaterial {
  const result = new StandardMaterial(name, scene);
  result.diffuseColor = diffuse;
  result.specularColor = new Color3(0.1, 0.13, 0.14);
  return result;
}

function cover(
  id: string,
  position: Vector3,
  normal: Vector3,
  height: "low" | "high",
): CoverPointDefinition {
  return { id, position, normal: normal.normalize(), height };
}

function addReceptionDesk(
  scene: Scene,
  shadows: ShadowGenerator,
  accent: StandardMaterial,
  dark: StandardMaterial,
): Mesh {
  const desk = MeshBuilder.CreateBox("reception-desk", { width: 5.4, height: 1.1, depth: 1.4 }, scene);
  desk.position.set(-10.5, 0.55, -4.8);
  desk.material = dark;
  desk.isPickable = true;
  desk.metadata = { obstacle: true, blocksVision: true, blocksShots: true };
  shadows.addShadowCaster(desk);

  const strip = MeshBuilder.CreateBox("reception-strip", { width: 4.7, height: 0.09, depth: 1.43 }, scene);
  strip.position.set(-10.5, 0.82, -4.8);
  strip.material = accent;
  strip.isPickable = false;

  for (let index = 0; index < 3; index += 1) {
    const terminal = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`terminal-${index}`, { width: 0.65, height: 0.75, depth: 0.12 }, scene);
    terminal.position.set(-12.1 + index * 1.55, 1.45, -4.4);
    terminal.rotation.x = -0.18;
    terminal.material = accent;
    terminal.isPickable = false;
  }
  return desk;
}

function addHospitalBeds(
  scene: Scene,
  shadows: ShadowGenerator,
  baseMaterial: StandardMaterial,
  accent: StandardMaterial,
): Mesh[] {
  const positions = [
    new Vector3(8.2, 0.42, -9.8), new Vector3(8.2, 0.42, -6.5),
    new Vector3(15.2, 0.42, 4.0), new Vector3(15.2, 0.42, 8.0),
  ];
  return positions.map((position, index) => {
    const bed = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`bed-${index}`, { width: 1.45, height: 0.65, depth: 2.45 }, scene);
    bed.position.copyFrom(position);
    bed.material = baseMaterial;
    bed.isPickable = true;
    bed.metadata = { obstacle: true, blocksVision: false, blocksShots: true };
    shadows.addShadowCaster(bed);

    const monitor = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`bed-monitor-${index}`, { width: 0.55, height: 0.75, depth: 0.16 }, scene);
    monitor.position.set(position.x + 1.0, 1.2, position.z - 0.6);
    monitor.material = accent;
    monitor.isPickable = false;
    return bed;
  });
}

function addServerRoom(
  scene: Scene,
  shadows: ShadowGenerator,
  baseMaterial: StandardMaterial,
  accent: StandardMaterial,
): Mesh[] {
  const racks: Mesh[] = [];
  for (let row = 0; row < 2; row += 1) {
    for (let col = 0; col < 3; col += 1) {
      const rack = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`server-${row}-${col}`, { width: 1.0, height: 2.8, depth: 1.4 }, scene);
      rack.position.set(14.2 + col * 1.45, 1.4, -10.8 + row * 2.25);
      rack.material = baseMaterial;
      rack.isPickable = true;
      rack.metadata = { obstacle: true, blocksVision: true, blocksShots: true };
      shadows.addShadowCaster(rack);
      racks.push(rack);

      const light = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`server-light-${row}-${col}`, { width: 0.72, height: 0.08, depth: 0.04 }, scene);
      light.position.set(rack.position.x, 1.9, rack.position.z - 0.72);
      light.material = accent;
      light.isPickable = false;
    }
  }
  return racks;
}

function addLowCover(
  scene: Scene,
  navMeshes: Mesh[],
  covers: CoverPointDefinition[],
  shadows: ShadowGenerator,
  materialValue: StandardMaterial,
): void {
  const crates = [
    { position: new Vector3(1.1, 0.42, -4.7), width: 2.8, depth: 1.0, axis: "z" as const },
    { position: new Vector3(8.9, 0.42, 7.0), width: 1.0, depth: 3.0, axis: "x" as const },
  ];
  crates.forEach(({ position, width, depth, axis }, index) => {
    const crate = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`cover-crate-${index}`, { width, height: 0.85, depth }, scene);
    crate.position.copyFrom(position);
    crate.material = materialValue;
    crate.isPickable = true;
    crate.metadata = { obstacle: true, blocksVision: false, blocksShots: true };
    shadows.addShadowCaster(crate);
    navMeshes.push(crate);

    if (axis === "z") {
      covers.push(
        cover(`crate-${index}-north`, position.add(new Vector3(0, 0, 1.0)), new Vector3(0, 0, 1), "low"),
        cover(`crate-${index}-south`, position.add(new Vector3(0, 0, -1.0)), new Vector3(0, 0, -1), "low"),
      );
    } else {
      covers.push(
        cover(`crate-${index}-east`, position.add(new Vector3(1.0, 0, 0)), new Vector3(1, 0, 0), "low"),
        cover(`crate-${index}-west`, position.add(new Vector3(-1.0, 0, 0)), new Vector3(-1, 0, 0), "low"),
      );
    }
  });
}

function addSecurityCamera(scene: Scene, materialValue: StandardMaterial): void {
  const mount = MeshBuilder.CreateBox("security-camera-mount", { width: 0.22, height: 0.22, depth: 0.5 }, scene);
  mount.position.set(8.8, 2.65, -2.7);
  mount.rotation.y = Math.PI;
  mount.material = materialValue;
  mount.isPickable = true;
  mount.metadata = { entityType: "security-camera", sensorId: "camera-icu", blocksShots: true };
}

function createRooms(scene: Scene): RoomDefinition[] {
  const fogMaterial = new StandardMaterial("room-fog-material", scene);
  fogMaterial.diffuseColor = new Color3(0.005, 0.013, 0.018);
  fogMaterial.emissiveColor = new Color3(0.004, 0.012, 0.018);
  fogMaterial.alpha = 0.93;
  fogMaterial.disableLighting = true;

  const roomSpecs = [
    { id: "entry", name: "Entry", minX: -18.5, maxX: -4.4, minZ: -13.5, maxZ: 1.5, revealed: true },
    { id: "reception", name: "Reception", minX: -18.5, maxX: 5.2, minZ: 2.0, maxZ: 13.5, revealed: false },
    { id: "icu-west", name: "ICU West", minX: -3.9, maxX: 12.0, minZ: -13.5, maxZ: 1.5, revealed: false },
    { id: "icu-east", name: "ICU East", minX: 5.8, maxX: 18.5, minZ: 2.0, maxZ: 13.5, revealed: false },
    { id: "server", name: "Server Room", minX: 12.5, maxX: 18.5, minZ: -13.5, maxZ: -7.3, revealed: false },
  ];

  return roomSpecs.map((spec) => {
    const roof = MeshBuilder.CreateBox(`room-fog:${spec.id}`, {
      width: spec.maxX - spec.minX,
      height: 0.12,
      depth: spec.maxZ - spec.minZ,
    }, scene);
    roof.position.set((spec.minX + spec.maxX) / 2, 3.65, (spec.minZ + spec.maxZ) / 2);
    roof.material = fogMaterial.clone(`room-fog-mat:${spec.id}`);
    roof.isPickable = false;
    roof.setEnabled(!spec.revealed);
    return {
      id: spec.id,
      name: spec.name,
      minX: spec.minX,
      maxX: spec.maxX,
      minZ: spec.minZ,
      maxZ: spec.maxZ,
      roofMesh: roof,
      initiallyRevealed: spec.revealed,
    };
  });
}

function createEnemies(): EnemyDefinition[] {
  return [
    {
      id: "observer-01",
      kind: "observer",
      position: new Vector3(7.8, 0, -8.1),
      patrolPoints: [new Vector3(7.8, 0, -8.1), new Vector3(9.6, 0, -3.8), new Vector3(6.7, 0, 0.2)],
      retreatPoint: new Vector3(17.0, 0, -12.2),
      initialState: "DORMANT",
    },
    {
      id: "security-01",
      kind: "security",
      position: new Vector3(15.8, 0, 10.1),
      patrolPoints: [new Vector3(15.8, 0, 10.1), new Vector3(13.8, 0, 5.0), new Vector3(16.5, 0, 2.5)],
      retreatPoint: new Vector3(17.2, 0, 12.2),
      initialState: "DORMANT",
    },
    {
      id: "security-02",
      kind: "security",
      position: new Vector3(15.3, 0, -9.2),
      patrolPoints: [new Vector3(15.3, 0, -9.2), new Vector3(13.2, 0, -5.8), new Vector3(10.0, 0, -7.8)],
      retreatPoint: new Vector3(17.2, 0, -12.1),
      initialState: "DORMANT",
    },
    {
      id: "hunter-01",
      kind: "hunter",
      position: new Vector3(10.2, 0, 8.7),
      patrolPoints: [new Vector3(10.2, 0, 8.7), new Vector3(7.2, 0, 5.4), new Vector3(10.8, 0, 2.8)],
      retreatPoint: new Vector3(18.0, 0, 12.0),
      initialState: "DORMANT",
    },
    {
      id: "jammer-01",
      kind: "jammer",
      position: new Vector3(15.2, 0, 5.4),
      patrolPoints: [new Vector3(15.2, 0, 5.4), new Vector3(13.0, 0, 2.7), new Vector3(16.0, 0, -0.2)],
      retreatPoint: new Vector3(18.0, 0, 9.5),
      initialState: "DORMANT",
    },
  ];
}


function addInvestigationScene(
  scene: Scene,
  cyan: StandardMaterial,
  red: StandardMaterial,
  dark: StandardMaterial,
): Pick<HospitalWorld, "interactables" | "evidenceDefinitions"> {
  const markerMaterial = cyan.clone("investigation-terminal-material");
  markerMaterial.emissiveColor = new Color3(0.04, 0.68, 0.85);
  const medicalMaterial = new StandardMaterial("patient-material", scene);
  medicalMaterial.diffuseColor = new Color3(0.28, 0.34, 0.36);
  const polymerMaterial = new StandardMaterial("polymer-material", scene);
  polymerMaterial.diffuseColor = new Color3(0.025, 0.035, 0.04);
  polymerMaterial.emissiveColor = new Color3(0.06, 0.11, 0.12);
  polymerMaterial.specularColor = new Color3(0.8, 0.9, 0.95);

  const power = MeshBuilder.CreateBox("investigation-power-junction", { width: 0.9, height: 1.35, depth: 0.3 }, scene);
  power.position.set(-2.2, 0.8, -10.6);
  power.material = markerMaterial;

  const securityTerminal = MeshBuilder.CreateBox("investigation-security-terminal", { width: 0.9, height: 1.1, depth: 0.38 }, scene);
  securityTerminal.position.set(-7.0, 0.7, 8.8);
  securityTerminal.rotation.y = Math.PI / 2;
  securityTerminal.material = markerMaterial;

  const patient = MeshBuilder.CreateCapsule("investigation-patient", { height: 1.75, radius: 0.28, tessellation: 12 }, scene);
  patient.position.set(8.2, 1.03, -9.8);
  patient.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2;
  patient.material = medicalMaterial;

  const port = MeshBuilder.CreateCylinder("investigation-neural-port", { diameter: 0.22, height: 0.08, tessellation: 18 }, scene);
  port.position.set(8.2, 1.25, -10.56);
  port.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2;
  port.material = red;

  const polymer = MeshBuilder.CreateDisc("investigation-polymer-trace", { radius: 0.22, tessellation: 24 }, scene);
  polymer.position.set(9.65, 0.035, -7.8);
  polymer.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2;
  polymer.scaling.set(1.8, 0.6, 1);
  polymer.material = polymerMaterial;

  const cameraControl = MeshBuilder.CreateBox("investigation-camera-control", { width: 0.72, height: 0.95, depth: 0.25 }, scene);
  cameraControl.position.set(9.3, 0.65, -2.65);
  cameraControl.material = markerMaterial;

  const hardware = MeshBuilder.CreatePolyhedron("investigation-hardware-fragment", { type: 1, size: 0.48 }, scene);
  hardware.position.set(16.1, 0.35, -11.8);
  hardware.material = dark;

  const lifeSupport = MeshBuilder.CreateBox("crisis-life-support", { width: 0.86, height: 1.05, depth: 0.3 }, scene);
  lifeSupport.position.set(10.15, 0.66, -10.65);
  lifeSupport.material = markerMaterial.clone("crisis-life-support-material");

  const evidenceCache = MeshBuilder.CreateBox("crisis-evidence-cache", { width: 0.9, height: 1.15, depth: 0.34 }, scene);
  evidenceCache.position.set(15.35, 0.72, -8.2);
  evidenceCache.material = red.clone("crisis-evidence-cache-material");

  [power, securityTerminal, patient, port, polymer, cameraControl, hardware, lifeSupport, evidenceCache].forEach((mesh) => {
    mesh.isPickable = true;
    mesh.metadata = { ...(mesh.metadata ?? {}), blocksShots: false };
  });

  const evidenceDefinitions = [
    {
      id: "power-drain-profile",
      title: "Controlled Power Drain",
      description: "The outage was a steady, localized drain rather than a surge.",
      category: "digital" as const,
      requiredAgentTags: ["tech"],
      scanDuration: 2.4,
      storyFlagsGranted: ["evidence.power_drain"],
      core: true,
      interpretations: {
        chen: "One wing only. The load curve is deliberate—something isolated the ICU before entering.",
        jordan: "The draw follows a patrol rhythm. It was timing the cameras and doors together.",
      },
    },
    {
      id: "patient-state",
      title: "Stable, Unresponsive Patient",
      description: "Vitals are stable, but conscious responsiveness is absent.",
      category: "medical" as const,
      requiredAgentTags: ["medical"],
      scanDuration: 2.8,
      storyFlagsGranted: ["evidence.patient_state"],
      core: true,
      interpretations: {
        chen: "No tissue trauma. Whatever happened bypassed the body and interrupted cognition directly.",
        alex: "Alive, breathing, and empty. Echo wanted the person, not the body.",
      },
    },
    {
      id: "neural-interface",
      title: "Self-Seated Neural Interface",
      description: "A microscopic connector matches Project Echo's neural-map architecture.",
      category: "echo" as const,
      requiredAgentTags: ["tech"],
      scanDuration: 3.2,
      storyFlagsGranted: ["evidence.neural_interface"],
      core: true,
      interpretations: {
        chen: "The port seated itself with sub-millimetre precision. This is Echo's hardware.",
        jordan: "No bruising and no defensive response. The procedure was controlled from beginning to end.",
      },
    },
    {
      id: "polymer-residue",
      title: "Conductive Polymer Residue",
      description: "Dark printed resin was shed by a mobile actuator housing.",
      category: "physical" as const,
      scanDuration: 1.6,
      storyFlagsGranted: ["evidence.polymer"],
      core: true,
      interpretations: {
        alex: "Whatever walked out of here is printed, physical, and leaving us a trail.",
        ramirez: "Not boot rubber. Too light, too clean. Something mechanical pivoted here.",
      },
    },
    {
      id: "camera-loop",
      title: "Ninety-Second Camera Loop",
      description: "Security footage was replaced in precise ninety-second intervals.",
      category: "digital" as const,
      requiredAgentTags: ["tech"],
      scanDuration: 2.2,
      storyFlagsGranted: ["evidence.camera_loop"],
      core: false,
      interpretations: {
        jordan: "The gaps form a route through every ward. Echo was here less than thirty minutes ago.",
        chen: "No brute-force intrusion. It used the clinic's own maintenance credentials.",
      },
    },
    {
      id: "actuator-fragment",
      title: "Printed Actuator Fragment",
      description: "A damaged actuator casing carries the same proprietary resin signature.",
      category: "physical" as const,
      scanDuration: 2.0,
      storyFlagsGranted: ["evidence.actuator_fragment"],
      core: false,
      interpretations: {
        ramirez: "Fresh fracture. The drone clipped a rack while leaving in a hurry.",
        alex: "Bag it. This gives ION something physical to trace.",
      },
    },
    {
      id: "echo-memory-cache",
      title: "Echo Volatile Memory Cache",
      description: "A live fragment contains the clinic operation's target list and outbound route.",
      category: "echo" as const,
      requiredAgentTags: ["tech"],
      scanDuration: 3.0,
      storyFlagsGranted: ["evidence.echo_memory_cache", "crisis.evidence_secured"],
      core: false,
      interpretations: {
        chen: "The cache is decaying in real time. This is the route Echo planned to use after Prague.",
        jordan: "Names, timings, fallback nodes. Enough to predict the next operation if we preserve it now.",
      },
    },
  ];

  return {
    evidenceDefinitions,
    interactables: [
      {
        id: "power-junction",
        label: "backup power junction",
        kind: "restore",
        mesh: power,
        position: power.position.clone(),
        interactionPoint: new Vector3(-1.25, 0, -10.6),
        duration: 2.4,
        evidenceId: "power-drain-profile",
        requiredAgentTags: ["tech"],
        grantsFlags: ["clinic.power_restored"],
        dialogueId: "power_restored",
      },
      {
        id: "patient-alpha",
        label: "ICU patient",
        kind: "examine",
        mesh: patient,
        position: patient.position.clone(),
